authors_text: L. V. Nguyen,I. Torres Herrera,T. H. Le,M. D. Phung,R. P. Aguilera,Q. P. Ha
title: Stag hunt game-based approach for cooperative UAVs
title_zh: 基于雄鹿狩猎游戏的合作无人机方法
comment: in 2022 Proceedings of 39th International Symposium on Automation and Robotics in Construction, Pages 367-374, Bogotá, Colombia, ISBN 978-952-69524-2-0, ISSN 2413-5844
comments: in 2022 Proceedings of 39th International Symposium on Automation and Robotics in Construction, Pages 367-374, Bogotá, Colombia, ISBN 978-952-69524-2-0, ISSN 2413-5844
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are being employed in many areas such as photography, emergency, entertainment, defence, agriculture, forestry, mining and construction. Over the last decade, UAV technology has found applications in numerous construction project phases, ranging from site mapping, progress monitoring, building inspection, damage assessments, and material delivery. While extensive studies have been conducted on the advantages of UAVs for various construction-related processes, studies on UAV collaboration to improve the task capacity and efficiency are still scarce. This paper proposes a new cooperative path planning algorithm for multiple UAVs based on the stag hunt game and particle swarm optimization (PSO). First, a cost function for each UAV is defined, incorporating multiple objectives and constraints. The UAV game framework is then developed to formulate the multi-UAV path planning into the problem of finding payoff-dominant equilibrium. Next, a PSO-based algorithm is proposed to obtain optimal paths for the UAVs. Simulation results for a large construction site inspected by three UAVs indicate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm in generating feasible and efficient flight paths for UAV formation during the inspection task.

Over the last decade, UAV technology has found applications in numerous construction project phases, ranging from site mapping, progress monitoring, building inspection, damage assessments, and material delivery. While extensive studies have been conducted on the advantages of UAVs for various construction-related processes, studies on UAV collaboration to improve the task capacity and efficiency are still scarce. This paper proposes a new cooperative path planning algorithm for multiple UAVs based on the stag hunt game and particle swarm optimization (PSO). First, a cost function for each UAV is defined, incorporating multiple objectives and constraints. The UAV game framework is then developed to formulate the multi-UAV path planning into the problem of finding payoff-dominant equilibrium. Next, a PSO-based algorithm is proposed to obtain optimal paths for the UAVs. Simulation results for a large construction site inspected by three UAVs indicate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm in generating feasible and efficient flight paths for UAV formation during the inspection task.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）广泛应用于摄影、应急、娱乐、国防、农业、林业、采矿和建筑等许多领域。在过去的十年中，无人机技术已在许多建设项目阶段得到应用，包括现场测绘、进度监控、建筑检查、损坏评估和材料交付。尽管人们对无人机在各种施工相关流程中的优势进行了广泛的研究，但针对无人机协作以提高任务能力和效率的研究仍然很少。本文提出了一种基于雄鹿狩猎博弈和粒子群优化（PSO）的多无人机协作路径规划算法。首先，定义每个无人机的成本函数，其中包含多个目标和约束。然后开发无人机博弈框架，将多无人机路径规划转化为寻找收益主导均衡的问题。接下来，提出了一种基于 PSO 的算法来获得无人机的最佳路径。三架无人机巡检大型建筑工地的仿真结果表明，该算法在巡检任务期间为无人机编队生成可行且高效的飞行路径的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于鹿博弈和粒子群优化的多无人机协同路径规划算法，以提升无人机在建筑工地巡检任务中的效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管无人机在建筑领域应用广泛，但针对多无人机协作提升任务容量和效率的研究仍显不足。
AI.method: 构建包含多目标约束的成本函数，将多无人机路径规划建模为收益占优均衡问题，并结合粒子群优化算法求解最优路径。
AI.result: 三机编队在大型建筑工地的仿真结果验证了算法在生成可行且高效飞行路径方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为建筑巡检等场景下的无人机协同作业提供了可行方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zeyu Li,Changhong Zhang,Yi Zhang,Jiawan Zhang
title: SemanticAxis: Exploring Multi-attribute Data by Semantics Construction and Ranking Analysis
title_zh: SemanticAxis：通过语义构建和排名分析探索多属性数据
abstract: Mining the distribution of features and sorting items by combined attributes are two common tasks in exploring and understanding multi-attribute (or multivariate) data. Up to now, few have pointed out the possibility of merging these two tasks into a united exploration context and the potential benefits of doing so. In this paper, we present SemanticAxis, a technique that achieves this goal by enabling analysts to build a semantic vector in two-dimensional space interactively. Essentially, the semantic vector is a linear combination of the original attributes. It can be used to represent and explain abstract concepts implied in local (outliers, clusters) or global (general pattern) features of reduced space, as well as serving as a ranking metric for its defined concepts. In order to validate the significance of combining the above two tasks in multi-attribute data analysis, we design and implement a visual analysis system, in which several interactive components cooperate with SemanticAxis seamlessly and expand its capacity to handle complex scenarios. We prove the effectiveness of our system and the SemanticAxis technique via two practical cases.
summary: Mining the distribution of features and sorting items by combined attributes are two common tasks in exploring and understanding multi-attribute (or multivariate) data. Up to now, few have pointed out the possibility of merging these two tasks into a united exploration context and the potential benefits of doing so. In this paper, we present SemanticAxis, a technique that achieves this goal by enabling analysts to build a semantic vector in two-dimensional space interactively. Essentially, the semantic vector is a linear combination of the original attributes. It can be used to represent and explain abstract concepts implied in local (outliers, clusters) or global (general pattern) features of reduced space, as well as serving as a ranking metric for its defined concepts. In order to validate the significance of combining the above two tasks in multi-attribute data analysis, we design and implement a visual analysis system, in which several interactive components cooperate with SemanticAxis seamlessly and expand its capacity to handle complex scenarios. We prove the effectiveness of our system and the SemanticAxis technique via two practical cases.
abstract_zh: 挖掘特征的分布和按组合属性对项目进行排序是探索和理解多属性（或多变量）数据的两个常见任务。到目前为止，很少有人指出将这两项任务合并到统一勘探背景中的可能性以及这样做的潜在好处。在本文中，我们提出了 SemanticAxis，这是一种通过使分析人员能够在二维空间中交互地构建语义向量来实现这一目标的技术。本质上，语义向量是原始属性的线性组合。它可用于表示和解释缩减空间的局部（异常值、聚类）或全局（一般模式）特征中隐含的抽象概念，并用作其定义概念的排名度量。为了验证将上述两项任务结合起来在多属性数据分析中的意义，我们设计并实现了一个可视化分析系统，其中多个交互组件与SemanticAxis无缝配合，扩展了其处理复杂场景的能力。我们通过两个实际案例证明了我们的系统和 SemanticAxis 技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SemanticAxis的技术，通过构建语义向量将多属性数据的特征分布挖掘与属性组合排序任务统一到探索性分析框架中。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能将多属性数据分析中的特征分布挖掘与属性组合排序任务结合，缺乏统一的探索性分析框架，限制了对复杂数据模式的深入理解。
AI.method: 通过交互式构建二维语义向量（原始属性的线性组合），结合可视化分析系统，实现对局部和全局特征的语义解释及排序分析，并设计交互组件处理复杂场景。
AI.result: 通过两个实际案例验证了系统与SemanticAxis技术的有效性，证明了统一框架在多属性数据分析中的优势。
AI.conclusion: SemanticAxis通过整合特征分布与排序任务，提供了更高效的数据探索方法，为多属性数据分析提供了新思路和工具支持。

authors_text: Yimin Yin,Renye Zhang,Pengfei Liu,Wanxia Deng,Siliang He,Chen Li,Jinghua Zhang
title: Artificial Neural Networks for Finger Vein Recognition: A Survey
title_zh: 用于指静脉识别的人工神经网络：一项调查
abstract: Finger vein recognition is an emerging biometric recognition technology. Different from the other biometric features on the body surface, the venous vascular tissue of the fingers is buried deep inside the skin. Due to this advantage, finger vein recognition is highly stable and private. They are almost impossible to be stolen and difficult to interfere with by external conditions. Unlike the finger vein recognition methods based on traditional machine learning, the artificial neural network technique, especially deep learning, it without relying on feature engineering and have superior performance. To summarize the development of finger vein recognition based on artificial neural networks, this paper collects 149 related papers. First, we introduce the background of finger vein recognition and the motivation of this survey. Then, the development history of artificial neural networks and the representative networks on finger vein recognition tasks are introduced. The public datasets that are widely used in finger vein recognition are then described. After that, we summarize the related finger vein recognition tasks based on classical neural networks and deep neural networks, respectively. Finally, the challenges and potential development directions in finger vein recognition are discussed. To our best knowledge, this paper is the first comprehensive survey focusing on finger vein recognition based on artificial neural networks.
summary: Finger vein recognition is an emerging biometric recognition technology. Different from the other biometric features on the body surface, the venous vascular tissue of the fingers is buried deep inside the skin. Due to this advantage, finger vein recognition is highly stable and private. They are almost impossible to be stolen and difficult to interfere with by external conditions. Unlike the finger vein recognition methods based on traditional machine learning, the artificial neural network technique, especially deep learning, it without relying on feature engineering and have superior performance. To summarize the development of finger vein recognition based on artificial neural networks, this paper collects 149 related papers. First, we introduce the background of finger vein recognition and the motivation of this survey. Then, the development history of artificial neural networks and the representative networks on finger vein recognition tasks are introduced. The public datasets that are widely used in finger vein recognition are then described. After that, we summarize the related finger vein recognition tasks based on classical neural networks and deep neural networks, respectively. Finally, the challenges and potential development directions in finger vein recognition are discussed. To our best knowledge, this paper is the first comprehensive survey focusing on finger vein recognition based on artificial neural networks.
abstract_zh: 指静脉识别是一种新兴的生物特征识别技术。与体表的其他生物特征不同，手指的静脉血管组织深埋于皮肤内部。由于这一优势，指静脉识别具有高度的稳定性和私密性。它们几乎不可能被盗，也很难受到外界条件的干扰。与基于传统机器学习的指静脉识别方法不同，人工神经网络技术，尤其是深度学习，不依赖特征工程，具有优越的性能。为了总结基于人工神经网络的指静脉识别的发展，本文收集了相关论文149篇。首先，我们介绍了指静脉识别的背景和本次调查的动机。然后介绍了人工神经网络的发展历史以及指静脉识别任务上的代表性网络。然后描述了指静脉识别中广泛使用的公共数据集。之后，我们分别总结了基于经典神经网络和深度神经网络的相关指静脉识别任务。最后讨论了指静脉识别面临的挑战和潜在的发展方向。据我们所知，本文是第一篇针对基于人工神经网络的指静脉识别的综合综述。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于人工神经网络的指纹静脉识别技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 指纹静脉识别是一种新兴的生物识别技术，具有高度的稳定性和隐私性。与传统机器学习方法相比，人工神经网络特别是深度学习在该领域表现出更优的性能。

AI.result: 本文首次全面综述了基于人工神经网络的指纹静脉识别技术，总结了其发展历史、常用数据集和相关任务。
AI.conclusion: 本文讨论了指纹静脉识别面临的挑战和未来发展方向，为该领域的进一步研究提供了参考。

search_text: Artificial Neural Networks for Finger Vein Recognition: A Survey 用于指静脉识别的人工神经网络：一项调查 Finger vein recognition is an emerging biometric recognition technology. Different from the other biometric features on the body surface, the venous vascular tissue of the fingers is buried deep inside the skin. Due to this advantage, finger vein recognition is highly stable and private. They are almost impossible to be stolen and difficult to interfere with by external conditions. Unlike the finger vein recognition methods based on traditional machine learning, the artificial neural network technique, especially deep learning, it without relying on feature engineering and have superior performance. To summarize the development of finger vein recognition based on artificial neural networks, this paper collects 149 related papers. First, we introduce the background of finger vein recognition and the motivation of this survey. Then, the development history of artificial neural networks and the representative networks on finger vein recognition tasks are introduced. The public datasets that are widely used in finger vein recognition are then described. After that, we summarize the related finger vein recognition tasks based on classical neural networks and deep neural networks, respectively. Finally, the challenges and potential development directions in finger vein recognition are discussed. To our best knowledge, this paper is the first comprehensive survey focusing on finger vein recognition based on artificial neural networks. 指静脉识别是一种新兴的生物特征识别技术。与体表的其他生物特征不同，手指的静脉血管组织深埋于皮肤内部。由于这一优势，指静脉识别具有高度的稳定性和私密性。它们几乎不可能被盗，也很难受到外界条件的干扰。与基于传统机器学习的指静脉识别方法不同，人工神经网络技术，尤其是深度学习，不依赖特征工程，具有优越的性能。为了总结基于人工神经网络的指静脉识别的发展，本文收集了相关论文149篇。首先，我们介绍了指静脉识别的背景和本次调查的动机。然后介绍了人工神经网络的发展历史以及指静脉识别任务上的代表性网络。然后描述了指静脉识别中广泛使用的公共数据集。之后，我们分别总结了基于经典神经网络和深度神经网络的相关指静脉识别任务。最后讨论了指静脉识别面临的挑战和潜在的发展方向。据我们所知，本文是第一篇针对基于人工神经网络的指静脉识别的综合综述。 本文综述了基于人工神经网络的指纹静脉识别技术的发展。 Yimin Yin,Renye Zhang,Pengfei Liu,Wanxia Deng,Siliang He,Chen Li,Jinghua Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Shishuai Hu,Yiwen Ye,Zehui Liao,Yong Xia
title: Boundary-Aware Network for Kidney Parsing
title_zh: 用于肾脏解析的边界感知网络
comment: Technical report. Solution to Kidney PArsing Challenge 2022 (KiPA22)
comments: Technical report. Solution to Kidney PArsing Challenge 2022 (KiPA22)
abstract: Kidney structures segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of surgery-based renal cancer. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of kidney structures on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images remains challenging, due to the variable sizes of kidney tumors and the ambiguous boundaries between kidney structures and their surroundings. In this paper, we propose a boundary-aware network (BA-Net) to segment kidneys, kidney tumors, arteries, and veins on CTA scans. This model contains a shared encoder, a boundary decoder, and a segmentation decoder. The multi-scale deep supervision strategy is adopted on both decoders, which can alleviate the issues caused by variable tumor sizes. The boundary probability maps produced by the boundary decoder at each scale are used as attention to enhance the segmentation feature maps. We evaluated the BA-Net on the Kidney PArsing (KiPA) Challenge dataset and achieved an average Dice score of 89.65$\%$ for kidney structure segmentation on CTA scans using 4-fold cross-validation. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the BA-Net.
summary: Kidney structures segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of surgery-based renal cancer. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of kidney structures on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images remains challenging, due to the variable sizes of kidney tumors and the ambiguous boundaries between kidney structures and their surroundings. In this paper, we propose a boundary-aware network (BA-Net) to segment kidneys, kidney tumors, arteries, and veins on CTA scans. This model contains a shared encoder, a boundary decoder, and a segmentation decoder. The multi-scale deep supervision strategy is adopted on both decoders, which can alleviate the issues caused by variable tumor sizes. The boundary probability maps produced by the boundary decoder at each scale are used as attention to enhance the segmentation feature maps. We evaluated the BA-Net on the Kidney PArsing (KiPA) Challenge dataset and achieved an average Dice score of 89.65$\%$ for kidney structure segmentation on CTA scans using 4-fold cross-validation. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the BA-Net.
abstract_zh: 在基于手术的肾癌的计算机辅助诊断中，肾脏结构分割是一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。尽管众多深度学习模型在许多医学图像分割任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于肾脏肿瘤的大小可变以及肾脏结构与其周围环境之间的边界不明确，在计算机断层扫描血管造影（CTA）图像上精确分割肾脏结构仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种边界感知网络 (BA-Net)，用于在 CTA 扫描上分割肾脏、肾肿瘤、动脉和静脉。该模型包含共享编码器、边界解码器和分段解码器。两个解码器均采用多尺度深度监督策略，可以缓解肿瘤大小变化引起的问题。边界解码器在每个尺度上生成的边界概率图被用作增强分割特征图的注意力。我们在 Kidney PArsing (KiPA) Challenge 数据集上评估了 BA-Net，并使用 4 倍交叉验证在 CTA 扫描上的肾脏结构分割获得了 89.65$\%$ 的平均 Dice 分数。结果证明了 BA-Net 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边界感知网络（BA-Net），用于在CTA图像中精确分割肾脏结构（包括肾脏、肿瘤、动脉和静脉）。
AI.motivation: 肾脏结构分割在肾癌术中辅助诊断中至关重要，但因肿瘤大小变化和肾脏结构与周围组织边界模糊，现有深度学习模型难以实现高精度分割。
AI.method: 设计包含共享编码器、边界解码器和分割解码器的BA-Net架构，通过多尺度深度监督策略缓解肿瘤尺寸变化问题，并利用边界概率图作为注意力机制增强分割特征。
AI.result: 在KiPA挑战数据集上通过4折交叉验证，肾脏结构分割的平均Dice得分为89.65%。
AI.conclusion: BA-Net通过边界感知机制和多尺度监督有效提升了CTA图像中肾脏结构分割的准确性。

Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of kidney structures on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images remains challenging, due to the variable sizes of kidney tumors and the ambiguous boundaries between kidney structures and their surroundings. In this paper, we propose a boundary-aware network (BA-Net) to segment kidneys, kidney tumors, arteries, and veins on CTA scans. This model contains a shared encoder, a boundary decoder, and a segmentation decoder. The multi-scale deep supervision strategy is adopted on both decoders, which can alleviate the issues caused by variable tumor sizes. The boundary probability maps produced by the boundary decoder at each scale are used as attention to enhance the segmentation feature maps. We evaluated the BA-Net on the Kidney PArsing (KiPA) Challenge dataset and achieved an average Dice score of 89.65$\%$ for kidney structure segmentation on CTA scans using 4-fold cross-validation. authors_text: Shishuai Hu,Zehui Liao,Yong Xia
title: Label Propagation for 3D Carotid Vessel Wall Segmentation and Atherosclerosis Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于 3D 颈动脉血管壁分割和动脉粥样硬化诊断的标签传播
comment: Technical report. Solution to CarOtid vessel wall SegMentation and atherosclerOsis diagnosiS challenge (COSMOS 2022)
comments: Technical report. Solution to CarOtid vessel wall SegMentation and atherosclerOsis diagnosiS challenge (COSMOS 2022)
abstract: Carotid vessel wall segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of atherosclerosis. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of carotid vessel wall on magnetic resonance (MR) images remains challenging, due to limited annotations and heterogeneous arteries. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised label propagation framework to segment lumen, normal vessel walls, and atherosclerotic vessel wall on 3D MR images. By interpolating the provided annotations, we get 3D continuous labels for training 3D segmentation model. With the trained model, we generate pseudo labels for unlabeled slices to incorporate them for model training. Then we use the whole MR scans and the propagated labels to re-train the segmentation model and improve its robustness. We evaluated the label propagation framework on the CarOtid vessel wall SegMentation and atherosclerOsis diagnosiS (COSMOS) Challenge dataset and achieved a QuanM score of 83.41\% on the testing dataset, which got the 1-st place on the online evaluation leaderboard. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
summary: Carotid vessel wall segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of atherosclerosis. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of carotid vessel wall on magnetic resonance (MR) images remains challenging, due to limited annotations and heterogeneous arteries. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised label propagation framework to segment lumen, normal vessel walls, and atherosclerotic vessel wall on 3D MR images. By interpolating the provided annotations, we get 3D continuous labels for training 3D segmentation model. With the trained model, we generate pseudo labels for unlabeled slices to incorporate them for model training. Then we use the whole MR scans and the propagated labels to re-train the segmentation model and improve its robustness. We evaluated the label propagation framework on the CarOtid vessel wall SegMentation and atherosclerOsis diagnosiS (COSMOS) Challenge dataset and achieved a QuanM score of 83.41\% on the testing dataset, which got the 1-st place on the online evaluation leaderboard. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 颈动脉血管壁分割是动脉粥样硬化计算机辅助诊断中一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。尽管许多深度学习模型在许多医学图像分割任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于有限的注释和异构动脉，磁共振（MR）图像上颈动脉血管壁的精确分割仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种半监督标签传播框架，用于在 3D MR 图像上分割管腔、正常血管壁和动脉粥样硬化血管壁。通过插入提供的注释，我们获得用于训练 3D 分割模型的 3D 连续标签。使用经过训练的模型，我们为未标记的切片生成伪标签，以将它们合并到模型训练中。然后我们使用整个 MR 扫描和传播的标签来重新训练分割模型并提高其鲁棒性。我们在 CarOtid 血管壁分割和动脉粥样硬化诊断 (COSMOS) 挑战数据集上评估了标签传播框架，并在测试数据集上取得了 83.41% 的 QuanM 分数，在在线评估排行榜上获得了第一名。结果证明了所提出框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种半监督标签传播框架，用于3D MR图像中的颈动脉血管壁分割及动脉粥样硬化诊断。
AI.motivation: 解决颈动脉血管壁分割中标注数据不足和动脉异质性带来的挑战，提升分割准确性和诊断效果。
AI.method: 通过插值标注生成3D连续标签训练模型，利用伪标签增强未标记数据，并结合全扫描数据重新训练以提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在COSMOS数据集上达到QuanM 83.41%的分割精度，位列在线评估榜首。
AI.conclusion: 标签传播框架有效提升了分割准确性，验证了其在动脉粥样硬化诊断中的应用潜力。

search_text: Label Propagation for 3D Carotid Vessel Wall Segmentation and Atherosclerosis Diagnosis 用于 3D 颈动脉血管壁分割和动脉粥样硬化诊断的标签传播 Carotid vessel wall segmentation is a crucial yet challenging task in the computer-aided diagnosis of atherosclerosis. Although numerous deep learning models have achieved remarkable success in many medical image segmentation tasks, accurate segmentation of carotid vessel wall on magnetic resonance (MR) images remains challenging, due to limited annotations and heterogeneous arteries. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised label propagation framework to segment lumen, normal vessel walls, and atherosclerotic vessel wall on 3D MR images. By interpolating the provided annotations, we get 3D continuous labels for training 3D segmentation model. With the trained model, we generate pseudo labels for unlabeled slices to incorporate them for model training. Then we use the whole MR scans and the propagated labels to re-train the segmentation model and improve its robustness. We evaluated the label propagation framework on the CarOtid vessel wall SegMentation and atherosclerOsis diagnosiS (COSMOS) Challenge dataset and achieved a QuanM score of 83.41\% on the testing dataset, which got the 1-st place on the online evaluation leaderboard. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. 颈动脉血管壁分割是动脉粥样硬化计算机辅助诊断中一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。尽管许多深度学习模型在许多医学图像分割任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于有限的注释和异构动脉，磁共振（MR）图像上颈动脉血管壁的精确分割仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种半监督标签传播框架，用于在 3D MR 图像上分割管腔、正常血管壁和动脉粥样硬化血管壁。通过插入提供的注释，我们获得用于训练 3D 分割模型的 3D 连续标签。使用经过训练的模型，我们为未标记的切片生成伪标签，以将它们合并到模型训练中。然后我们使用整个 MR 扫描和传播的标签来重新训练分割模型并提高其鲁棒性。我们在 CarOtid 血管壁分割和动脉粥样硬化诊断 (COSMOS) 挑战数据集上评估了标签传播框架，并在测试数据集上取得了 83.41% 的 QuanM 分数，在在线评估排行榜上获得了第一名。结果证明了所提出框架的有效性。 提出一种半监督标签传播框架，用于3D MR图像中的颈动脉血管壁分割及动脉粥样硬化诊断。 Shishuai Hu,Zehui Liao,Yong Xia eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Chen Cheng
title: Real-Time Mask Detection Based on SSD-MobileNetV2
title_zh: 基于SSD-MobileNetV2的实时口罩检测
abstract: After the outbreak of COVID-19, mask detection, as the most convenient and effective means of prevention, plays a crucial role in epidemic prevention and control. An excellent automatic real-time mask detection system can reduce a lot of work pressure for relevant staff. However, by analyzing the existing mask detection approaches, we find that they are mostly resource-intensive and do not achieve a good balance between speed and accuracy. And there is no perfect face mask dataset at present. In this paper, we propose a new architecture for mask detection. Our system uses SSD as the mask locator and classifier, and further replaces VGG-16 with MobileNetV2 to extract the features of the image and reduce a lot of parameters. Therefore, our system can be deployed on embedded devices. Transfer learning methods are used to transfer pre-trained models from other domains to our model. Data enhancement methods in our system such as MixUp effectively prevent overfitting. It also effectively reduces the dependence on large-scale datasets. By doing experiments in practical scenarios, the results demonstrate that our system performed well in real-time mask detection.
summary: After the outbreak of COVID-19, mask detection, as the most convenient and effective means of prevention, plays a crucial role in epidemic prevention and control. An excellent automatic real-time mask detection system can reduce a lot of work pressure for relevant staff. However, by analyzing the existing mask detection approaches, we find that they are mostly resource-intensive and do not achieve a good balance between speed and accuracy. And there is no perfect face mask dataset at present. In this paper, we propose a new architecture for mask detection. Our system uses SSD as the mask locator and classifier, and further replaces VGG-16 with MobileNetV2 to extract the features of the image and reduce a lot of parameters. Therefore, our system can be deployed on embedded devices. Transfer learning methods are used to transfer pre-trained models from other domains to our model. Data enhancement methods in our system such as MixUp effectively prevent overfitting. It also effectively reduces the dependence on large-scale datasets. By doing experiments in practical scenarios, the results demonstrate that our system performed well in real-time mask detection.
abstract_zh: COVID-19疫情发生后，口罩检测作为最便捷、有效的预防手段，在疫情防控中发挥着至关重要的作用。一个优秀的口罩自动实时检测系统可以为相关工作人员减轻很多工作压力。然而，通过分析现有的口罩检测方法，我们发现它们大多是资源密集型的，并且在速度和准确性之间没有取得良好的平衡。目前还没有完善的口罩数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的掩模检测架构。我们的系统使用SSD作为掩模定位器和分类器，并进一步用MobileNetV2代替VGG-16来提取图像的特征并减少很多参数。因此，我们的系统可以部署在嵌入式设备上。迁移学习方法用于将预训练的模型从其他领域迁移到我们的模型。我们系统中的MixUp等数据增强方法有效防止了过度拟合。也有效降低了对大规模数据集的依赖。通过在实际场景中进行实验，结果表明我们的系统在实时口罩检测方面表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于SSD-MobileNetV2的实时口罩检测系统，以解决现有方法在资源消耗与检测效率之间的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情爆发后，口罩检测作为防控关键手段，亟需高效且轻量化的实时检测系统，但现有方法存在计算资源消耗大、数据集不完善等问题。
AI.method: 采用SSD框架结合MobileNetV2网络降低参数量，通过迁移学习优化预训练模型，并引入MixUp数据增强技术减少过拟合与对大规模数据集的依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明该系统在实际场景中实现了高效的实时口罩检测，能够在嵌入式设备上部署运行。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量化架构在速度与精度间取得良好平衡，为口罩检测的实时应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhijian Luo,Zihan Huang,Jiahui Tang,Yueen Hou,Yanzeng Gao
title: Time-aware Self-Attention Meets Logic Reasoning in Recommender Systems
title_zh: 时间感知的自注意力与推荐系统中的逻辑推理相结合
abstract: At the age of big data, recommender systems have shown remarkable success as a key means of information filtering in our daily life. Recent years have witnessed the technical development of recommender systems, from perception learning to cognition reasoning which intuitively build the task of recommendation as the procedure of logical reasoning and have achieve significant improvement. However, the logical statement in reasoning implicitly admits irrelevance of ordering, even does not consider time information which plays an important role in many recommendation tasks. Furthermore, recommendation model incorporated with temporal context would tend to be self-attentive, i.e., automatically focus more (less) on the relevance (irrelevance), respectively. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a Time-aware Self-Attention with Neural Collaborative Reasoning (TiSANCR) based recommendation model, which integrates temporal patterns and self-attention mechanism into reasoning-based recommendation. Specially, temporal patterns represented by relative time, provide context and auxiliary information to characterize the user's preference in recommendation, while self-attention is leveraged to distill informative patterns and suppress irrelevances. Therefore, the fusion of self-attentive temporal information provides deeper representation of user's preference. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed TiSANCR achieves significant improvement and consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art recommendation methods.
summary: At the age of big data, recommender systems have shown remarkable success as a key means of information filtering in our daily life. Recent years have witnessed the technical development of recommender systems, from perception learning to cognition reasoning which intuitively build the task of recommendation as the procedure of logical reasoning and have achieve significant improvement. However, the logical statement in reasoning implicitly admits irrelevance of ordering, even does not consider time information which plays an important role in many recommendation tasks. Furthermore, recommendation model incorporated with temporal context would tend to be self-attentive, i.e., automatically focus more (less) on the relevance (irrelevance), respectively. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a Time-aware Self-Attention with Neural Collaborative Reasoning (TiSANCR) based recommendation model, which integrates temporal patterns and self-attention mechanism into reasoning-based recommendation. Specially, temporal patterns represented by relative time, provide context and auxiliary information to characterize the user's preference in recommendation, while self-attention is leveraged to distill informative patterns and suppress irrelevances. Therefore, the fusion of self-attentive temporal information provides deeper representation of user's preference. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed TiSANCR achieves significant improvement and consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art recommendation methods.
abstract_zh: 在大数据时代，推荐系统作为我们日常生活中信息过滤的关键手段已经取得了巨大的成功。近年来，推荐系统的技术不断发展，从感知学习到认知推理，将推荐任务直观地构建为逻辑推理的过程，并取得了显着的进步。然而，推理中的逻辑语句隐含地承认与顺序无关，甚至没有考虑在许多推荐任务中起着重要作用的时间信息。此外，与时间上下文相结合的推荐模型往往是自我关注的，即自动更多（更少）地分别关注相关性（不相关性）。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于时间感知自注意力和神经协作推理（TiSANCR）的推荐模型，它将时间模式和自注意力机制集成到基于推理的推荐中。特别是，由相对时间表示的时间模式提供上下文和辅助信息来表征用户在推荐中的偏好，同时利用自注意力来提取信息模式并抑制不相关的内容。因此，自注意力时间信息的融合提供了用户偏好的更深层次的表示。对基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 TiSANCR 取得了显着的改进，并且始终优于最先进的推荐方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合时间感知自注意力机制和逻辑推理的推荐系统模型TiSANCR，以提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐模型在逻辑推理中忽视时间信息，而时间因素对用户偏好建模至关重要，同时自注意力机制能有效区分相关与无关信息。
AI.method: 设计TiSANCR模型，通过相对时间表征时间模式提供上下文信息，并利用自注意力机制提取关键特征，融合时间感知信息深化用户偏好表示。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，TiSANCR显著优于现有最先进推荐方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 时间感知自注意力与逻辑推理的结合能够有效提升推荐系统性能，为时序敏感场景提供新思路。

Specially, temporal patterns represented by relative time, provide context and auxiliary information to characterize the user's preference in recommendation, while self-attention is leveraged to distill informative patterns and suppress irrelevances. Therefore, the fusion of self-attentive temporal information provides deeper representation of user's preference. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed TiSANCR achieves significant improvement and consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art recommendation methods. 在大数据时代，推荐系统作为我们日常生活中信息过滤的关键手段已经取得了巨大的成功。近年来，推荐系统的技术不断发展，从感知学习到认知推理，将推荐任务直观地构建为逻辑推理的过程，并取得了显着的进步。然而，推理中的逻辑语句隐含地承认与顺序无关，甚至没有考虑在许多推荐任务中起着重要作用的时间信息。此外，与时间上下文相结合的推荐模型往往是自我关注的，即自动更多（更少）地分别关注相关性（不相关性）。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于时间感知自注意力和神经协作推理（TiSANCR）的推荐模型，它将时间模式和自注意力机制集成到基于推理的推荐中。特别是，由相对时间表示的时间模式提供上下文和辅助信息来表征用户在推荐中的偏好，同时利用自注意力来提取信息模式并抑制不相关的内容。因此，自注意力时间信息的融合提供了用户偏好的更深层次的表示。对基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 TiSANCR 取得了显着的改进，并且始终优于最先进的推荐方法。 本文提出了一种结合时间感知自注意力机制和逻辑推理的推荐系统模型TiSANCR，以提升推荐效果。 Zhijian Luo,Zihan Huang,Jiahui Tang,Yueen Hou,Yanzeng Gao cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Dhanoop Karunakaran,Julie Stephany Berrio,Stewart Worrall,Eduardo Nebot
title: Critical concrete scenario generation using scenario-based falsification
title_zh: 使用基于场景的伪造生成关键的具体场景
abstract: Autonomous vehicles have the potential to lower the accident rate when compared to human driving. Moreover, it is the driving force of the automated vehicles' rapid development over the last few years. In the higher Society of Automotive Engineers (SAE) automation level, the vehicle's and passengers' safety responsibility is transferred from the driver to the automated system, so thoroughly validating such a system is essential. Recently, academia and industry have embraced scenario-based evaluation as the complementary approach to road testing, reducing the overall testing effort required. It is essential to determine the system's flaws before deploying it on public roads as there is no safety driver to guarantee the reliability of such a system. This paper proposes a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based scenario-based falsification method to search for a high-risk scenario in a pedestrian crossing traffic situation. We define a scenario as risky when a system under testing (SUT) does not satisfy the requirement. The reward function for our RL approach is based on Intel's Responsibility Sensitive Safety(RSS), Euclidean distance, and distance to a potential collision.
summary: Autonomous vehicles have the potential to lower the accident rate when compared to human driving. Moreover, it is the driving force of the automated vehicles' rapid development over the last few years. In the higher Society of Automotive Engineers (SAE) automation level, the vehicle's and passengers' safety responsibility is transferred from the driver to the automated system, so thoroughly validating such a system is essential. Recently, academia and industry have embraced scenario-based evaluation as the complementary approach to road testing, reducing the overall testing effort required. It is essential to determine the system's flaws before deploying it on public roads as there is no safety driver to guarantee the reliability of such a system. This paper proposes a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based scenario-based falsification method to search for a high-risk scenario in a pedestrian crossing traffic situation. We define a scenario as risky when a system under testing (SUT) does not satisfy the requirement. The reward function for our RL approach is based on Intel's Responsibility Sensitive Safety(RSS), Euclidean distance, and distance to a potential collision.
abstract_zh: 与人类驾驶相比，自动驾驶汽车有可能降低事故率。而且，它是过去几年自动驾驶汽车快速发展的驱动力。在较高的汽车工程师协会（SAE）自动化水平中，车辆和乘客的安全责任从驾驶员转移到自动化系统，因此彻底验证此类系统至关重要。最近，学术界和工业界已经接受基于场景的评估作为道路测试的补充方法，减少了所需的总体测试工作。在将系统部署到公共道路上之前确定系统的缺陷至关重要，因为没有安全驾驶员来保证此类系统的可靠性。本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的基于场景的伪造方法来搜索行人过路交通情况中的高风险场景。当被测系统 (SUT) 不满足要求时，我们将场景定义为有风险。我们的 RL 方法的奖励函数基于英特尔的责任敏感安全 (RSS)、欧几里德距离和到潜在碰撞的距离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于场景的反例生成方法，用于在行人过街场景中识别自动驾驶系统的高风险情况。
AI.motivation: 在高级别自动驾驶中，系统安全责任转移至自动化系统，需有效验证以确保安全，传统测试方法效率低，需更优场景生成方法。
AI.method: 采用强化学习方法，结合责任敏感安全（RSS）指标、欧几里得距离及碰撞距离构建奖励函数，搜索行人过街场景中的高风险情况。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效识别自动驾驶系统在行人过街场景中的潜在安全缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的场景反例生成方法能高效发现自动驾驶系统的高风险场景，为安全验证提供有效手段。

authors_text: Yi-Lin Tsai,Dymasius Y. Sitepu,Karyn E. Chappell,Rishi P. Mediratta,C. Jason Wang,Peter K. Kitanidis,Christopher B. Field
title: Effective approaches to disaster evacuation during a COVID-like pandemic
title_zh: 类似新冠病毒大流行期间灾难疏散的有效方法
abstract: Since COVID-19 vaccines became available, no studies have quantified how different disaster evacuation strategies can mitigate pandemic risks in shelters. Therefore, we applied an age-structured epidemiological model, known as the Susceptible-Exposed-Infectious-Recovered (SEIR) model, to investigate to what extent different vaccine uptake levels and the Diversion protocol implemented in Taiwan decrease infections and delay pandemic peak occurrences. Taiwan's Diversion protocol involves diverting those in self-quarantine due to exposure, thus preventing them from mingling with the general public at a congregate shelter. The Diversion protocol, combined with sufficient vaccine uptake, can decrease the maximum number of infections and delay outbreaks relative to scenarios without such strategies. When the diversion of all exposed people is not possible, or vaccine uptake is insufficient, the Diversion protocol is still valuable. Furthermore, a group of evacuees that consists primarily of a young adult population tends to experience pandemic peak occurrences sooner and have up to 180% more infections than does a majority elderly group when the Diversion protocol is implemented. However, when the Diversion protocol is not enforced, the majority elderly group suffers from up to 20% more severe cases than the majority young adult group.
summary: Since COVID-19 vaccines became available, no studies have quantified how different disaster evacuation strategies can mitigate pandemic risks in shelters. Therefore, we applied an age-structured epidemiological model, known as the Susceptible-Exposed-Infectious-Recovered (SEIR) model, to investigate to what extent different vaccine uptake levels and the Diversion protocol implemented in Taiwan decrease infections and delay pandemic peak occurrences. Taiwan's Diversion protocol involves diverting those in self-quarantine due to exposure, thus preventing them from mingling with the general public at a congregate shelter. The Diversion protocol, combined with sufficient vaccine uptake, can decrease the maximum number of infections and delay outbreaks relative to scenarios without such strategies. When the diversion of all exposed people is not possible, or vaccine uptake is insufficient, the Diversion protocol is still valuable. Furthermore, a group of evacuees that consists primarily of a young adult population tends to experience pandemic peak occurrences sooner and have up to 180% more infections than does a majority elderly group when the Diversion protocol is implemented. However, when the Diversion protocol is not enforced, the majority elderly group suffers from up to 20% more severe cases than the majority young adult group.
abstract_zh: 自 COVID-19 疫苗问世以来，尚无研究量化不同的灾难疏散策略如何减轻避难所中的大流行风险。因此，我们应用了一种年龄结构的流行病学模型，即易感-暴露-感染-恢复（SEIR）模型，来调查不同的疫苗接种水平和台湾实施的分流方案在多大程度上减少了感染并延迟了大流行高峰的发生。台湾的分流协议涉及将那些因暴露而进行自我隔离的人分流，从而防止他们在聚集性避难所与公众混在一起。与没有此类策略的情况相比，转移方案与足够的疫苗接种相结合，可以减少最大感染数量并延迟疫情爆发。当不可能转移所有暴露人群或疫苗接种不足时，转移方案仍然有价值。此外，在实施分流方案时，主要由年轻人组成的疏散群体往往会更早经历大流行高峰，并且感染率比大多数老年人群高出 180%。然而，如果不执行分流协议，大多数老年人群体的严重病例比大多数年轻人群体高出 20%。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了在类似新冠疫情的灾难疏散中，不同策略（如台湾的分流协议和疫苗接种率）对减少避难所感染风险的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管新冠疫苗已普及，但尚无研究量化不同疏散策略对避难所疫情风险的缓解效果，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用年龄结构化的SEIR传染病模型，结合台湾分流协议和不同疫苗接种率情景进行模拟分析。
AI.result: 分流协议与充足疫苗接种可减少感染峰值并延缓疫情爆发；年轻群体在分流下感染率比老年群体高180%，但无分流时老年群体重症率高20%。
AI.conclusion: 分流协议在疫苗不足或无法完全隔离暴露者时仍具价值，疏散策略需结合年龄人口结构优化。

Sitepu,Karyn E. Chappell,Rishi P. Mediratta,C. Jason Wang,Peter K. Kitanidis,Christopher B. Field q-bio.PE,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Shuo-yiin Chang,Guru Prakash,Zelin Wu,Qiao Liang,Tara N. Sainath,Bo Li,Adam Stambler,Shyam Upadhyay,Manaal Faruqui,Trevor Strohman
title: Streaming Intended Query Detection using E2E Modeling for Continued Conversation
title_zh: 使用 E2E 建模流式传输预期查询检测以进行持续对话
abstract: In voice-enabled applications, a predetermined hotword isusually used to activate a device in order to attend to the query.However, speaking queries followed by a hotword each timeintroduces a cognitive burden in continued conversations. Toavoid repeating a hotword, we propose a streaming end-to-end(E2E) intended query detector that identifies the utterancesdirected towards the device and filters out other utterancesnot directed towards device. The proposed approach incor-porates the intended query detector into the E2E model thatalready folds different components of the speech recognitionpipeline into one neural network.The E2E modeling onspeech decoding and intended query detection also allows us todeclare a quick intended query detection based on early partialrecognition result, which is important to decrease latencyand make the system responsive. We demonstrate that theproposed E2E approach yields a 22% relative improvement onequal error rate (EER) for the detection accuracy and 600 mslatency improvement compared with an independent intendedquery detector. In our experiment, the proposed model detectswhether the user is talking to the device with a 8.7% EERwithin 1.4 seconds of median latency after user starts speaking.
summary: In voice-enabled applications, a predetermined hotword isusually used to activate a device in order to attend to the query.However, speaking queries followed by a hotword each timeintroduces a cognitive burden in continued conversations. Toavoid repeating a hotword, we propose a streaming end-to-end(E2E) intended query detector that identifies the utterancesdirected towards the device and filters out other utterancesnot directed towards device. The proposed approach incor-porates the intended query detector into the E2E model thatalready folds different components of the speech recognitionpipeline into one neural network.The E2E modeling onspeech decoding and intended query detection also allows us todeclare a quick intended query detection based on early partialrecognition result, which is important to decrease latencyand make the system responsive. We demonstrate that theproposed E2E approach yields a 22% relative improvement onequal error rate (EER) for the detection accuracy and 600 mslatency improvement compared with an independent intendedquery detector. In our experiment, the proposed model detectswhether the user is talking to the device with a 8.7% EERwithin 1.4 seconds of median latency after user starts speaking.
abstract_zh: 在支持语音的应用中，通常使用预定的热词来激活设备以处理查询。然而，每次说出查询后紧跟热词会在持续对话中带来认知负担。为了避免重复热词，我们提出了一种流式端到端（E2E）预期查询检测器，它可以识别针对设备的话语，并过滤掉其他不针对设备的话语。所提出的方法将预期查询检测器合并到 E2E 模型中，该模型已经将语音识别管道的不同组件折叠到一个神经网络中。语音解码和预期查询检测的 E2E 建模还允许我们基于早期部分识别结果声明快速预期查询检测，这对于减少延迟并使系统响应非常重要。我们证明，与独立的预期查询检测器相比，所提出的 E2E 方法的检测精度相对误差率 (EER) 提高了 22%，延迟提高了 600 毫秒。在我们的实验中，所提出的模型在用户开始说话后的中值延迟 1.4 秒内以 8.7% EER 检测用户是否正在与设备交谈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于端到端（E2E）建模的流式意图查询检测方法，用于连续对话场景下的语音交互设备激活检测。
AI.motivation: 传统语音应用依赖预设热词唤醒设备，但连续对话中重复热词会增加认知负担，需设计无需重复热词的意图查询检测方案。
AI.method: 将意图查询检测模块整合至端到端语音识别模型中，通过流式处理和部分识别结果实现快速检测，降低系统延迟。
AI.result: 相较独立检测器，EER指标相对提升22%，延迟减少600ms，在1.4秒中位延迟下达到8.7%的EER。
AI.conclusion: 端到端流式建模有效提升了连续对话场景中意图查询检测的准确性与响应速度，可优化语音交互体验。

authors_text: Shuo-yiin Chang,Bo Li,Tara N. Sainath,Chao Zhang,Trevor Strohman,Qiao Liang,Yanzhang He
title: Turn-Taking Prediction for Natural Conversational Speech
title_zh: 自然会话语音的轮流预测
abstract: While a streaming voice assistant system has been used in many applications, this system typically focuses on unnatural, one-shot interactions assuming input from a single voice query without hesitation or disfluency. However, a common conversational utterance often involves multiple queries with turn-taking, in addition to disfluencies. These disfluencies include pausing to think, hesitations, word lengthening, filled pauses and repeated phrases. This makes doing speech recognition with conversational speech, including one with multiple queries, a challenging task. To better model the conversational interaction, it is critical to discriminate disfluencies and end of query in order to allow the user to hold the floor for disfluencies while having the system respond as quickly as possible when the user has finished speaking. In this paper, we present a turntaking predictor built on top of the end-to-end (E2E) speech recognizer. Our best system is obtained by jointly optimizing for ASR task and detecting when the user is paused to think or finished speaking. The proposed approach demonstrates over 97% recall rate and 85% precision rate on predicting true turn-taking with only 100 ms latency on a test set designed with 4 types of disfluencies inserted in conversational utterances.
summary: While a streaming voice assistant system has been used in many applications, this system typically focuses on unnatural, one-shot interactions assuming input from a single voice query without hesitation or disfluency. However, a common conversational utterance often involves multiple queries with turn-taking, in addition to disfluencies. These disfluencies include pausing to think, hesitations, word lengthening, filled pauses and repeated phrases. This makes doing speech recognition with conversational speech, including one with multiple queries, a challenging task. To better model the conversational interaction, it is critical to discriminate disfluencies and end of query in order to allow the user to hold the floor for disfluencies while having the system respond as quickly as possible when the user has finished speaking. In this paper, we present a turntaking predictor built on top of the end-to-end (E2E) speech recognizer. Our best system is obtained by jointly optimizing for ASR task and detecting when the user is paused to think or finished speaking. The proposed approach demonstrates over 97% recall rate and 85% precision rate on predicting true turn-taking with only 100 ms latency on a test set designed with 4 types of disfluencies inserted in conversational utterances.
abstract_zh: 虽然流式语音助手系统已在许多应用中使用，但该系统通常侧重于不自然的一次性交互，假设输入来自单个语音查询，没有犹豫或不流畅。然而，除了不流利之外，常见的对话话语通常还涉及轮流进行的多个查询。这些不流畅包括停下来思考、犹豫、单词变长、停顿和重复短语。这使得使用对话语音进行语音识别（包括具有多个查询的语音识别）成为一项具有挑战性的任务。为了更好地建模对话交互，区分不流畅和查询结束至关重要，以便用户能够保留不流畅的发言权，同时在用户结束发言时让系统尽快做出响应。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于端到端（E2E）语音识别器构建的轮流预测器。我们最好的系统是通过联合优化 ASR 任务并检测用户何时暂停思考或结束说话而获得的。所提出的方法在设计有 4 种不流利性的对话话语的测试集上，以仅 100 毫秒的延迟预测真实轮流，具有超过 97% 的召回率和 85% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于端到端语音识别器的轮流预测系统，用于处理自然对话中的多轮交互与不连贯现象。
AI.motivation: 现有流式语音助手无法有效处理包含停顿、重复等不连贯的自然对话，导致识别延迟与交互体验下降。
AI.method: 在端到端语音识别框架中联合优化ASR任务与用户暂停/结束检测，通过时序建模区分不连贯与有效对话结束。
AI.result: 在包含四种不连贯类型的测试集上达到97%召回率与85%精确率，预测延迟仅100毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升自然对话场景下的语音识别准确性，为低延迟对话系统提供关键技术支撑。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于端到端语音识别器的轮流预测系统，用于处理自然对话中的多轮交互与不连贯现象。

authors_text: Xin Pei,Deval Mehta
title: Multi-dimensional Racism Classification during COVID-19: Stigmatization, Offensiveness, Blame, and Exclusion
title_zh: COVID-19期间的多维种族主义分类：污名化、攻击性、指责和排斥
comment: Social Network Analysis and Mining (accepted, 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.08347
comments: Social Network Analysis and Mining (accepted, 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.08347
abstract: Transcending the binary categorization of racist texts, our study takes cues from social science theories to develop a multi-dimensional model for racism detection, namely stigmatization, offensiveness, blame, and exclusion. With the aid of BERT and topic modeling, this categorical detection enables insights into the underlying subtlety of racist discussion on digital platforms during COVID-19. Our study contributes to enriching the scholarly discussion on deviant racist behaviours on social media. First, a stage-wise analysis is applied to capture the dynamics of the topic changes across the early stages of COVID-19 which transformed from a domestic epidemic to an international public health emergency and later to a global pandemic. Furthermore, mapping this trend enables a more accurate prediction of public opinion evolvement concerning racism in the offline world, and meanwhile, the enactment of specified intervention strategies to combat the upsurge of racism during the global public health crisis like COVID-19. In addition, this interdisciplinary research also points out a direction for future studies on social network analysis and mining. Integration of social science perspectives into the development of computational methods provides insights into more accurate data detection and analytics.
summary: Transcending the binary categorization of racist texts, our study takes cues from social science theories to develop a multi-dimensional model for racism detection, namely stigmatization, offensiveness, blame, and exclusion. With the aid of BERT and topic modeling, this categorical detection enables insights into the underlying subtlety of racist discussion on digital platforms during COVID-19. Our study contributes to enriching the scholarly discussion on deviant racist behaviours on social media. First, a stage-wise analysis is applied to capture the dynamics of the topic changes across the early stages of COVID-19 which transformed from a domestic epidemic to an international public health emergency and later to a global pandemic. Furthermore, mapping this trend enables a more accurate prediction of public opinion evolvement concerning racism in the offline world, and meanwhile, the enactment of specified intervention strategies to combat the upsurge of racism during the global public health crisis like COVID-19. In addition, this interdisciplinary research also points out a direction for future studies on social network analysis and mining. Integration of social science perspectives into the development of computational methods provides insights into more accurate data detection and analytics.
abstract_zh: 我们的研究超越了种族主义文本的二元分类，从社会科学理论中汲取灵感，开发了一个用于种族主义检测的多维模型，即污名化、攻击性、指责和排斥。借助 BERT 和主题建模，这种分类检测能够深入了解 COVID-19 期间数字平台上种族主义讨论的潜在微妙之处。我们的研究有助于丰富关于社交媒体上异常种族主义行为的学术讨论。首先，采用阶段性分析来捕捉 COVID-19 早期阶段的主题变化动态，从国内流行病转变为国际公共卫生紧急事件，再到后来的全球大流行。此外，绘制这一趋势可以更准确地预测线下世界中有关种族主义的舆论演变，同时制定具体的干预策略，以应对像COVID-19这样的全球公共卫生危机期间种族主义的高涨。此外，这项跨学科研究也为社交网络分析和挖掘的未来研究指明了方向。将社会科学观点融入计算方法的开发中，可以提供更准确的数据检测和分析的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多维模型，用于检测新冠疫情期间社交媒体上的种族主义言论，涵盖污名化、冒犯性、责备和排斥四个维度。
AI.motivation: 传统二元分类方法无法捕捉种族主义言论的复杂性，需结合社会学理论与计算方法，以更精准分析疫情期间种族歧视的演变与影响。
AI.method: 基于BERT模型和主题建模技术，分阶段分析疫情不同阶段（国内疫情、国际紧急事件、全球大流行）的话题动态变化，并整合社会学视角优化计算方法。
AI.result: 揭示了疫情期间种族主义言论的动态演变规律，为预测线下种族歧视趋势及制定干预策略提供依据，同时为社会网络分析的跨学科研究指明方向。

search_text: Multi-dimensional Racism Classification during COVID-19: Stigmatization, Offensiveness, Blame, and Exclusion COVID-19期间的多维种族主义分类：污名化、攻击性、指责和排斥 Transcending the binary categorization of racist texts, our study takes cues from social science theories to develop a multi-dimensional model for racism detection, namely stigmatization, offensiveness, blame, and exclusion. With the aid of BERT and topic modeling, this categorical detection enables insights into the underlying subtlety of racist discussion on digital platforms during COVID-19. Our study contributes to enriching the scholarly discussion on deviant racist behaviours on social media. First, a stage-wise analysis is applied to capture the dynamics of the topic changes across the early stages of COVID-19 which transformed from a domestic epidemic to an international public health emergency and later to a global pandemic. Furthermore, mapping this trend enables a more accurate prediction of public opinion evolvement concerning racism in the offline world, and meanwhile, the enactment of specified intervention strategies to combat the upsurge of racism during the global public health crisis like COVID-19. In addition, this interdisciplinary research also points out a direction for future studies on social network analysis and mining. Integration of social science perspectives into the development of computational methods provides insights into more accurate data detection and analytics. 我们的研究超越了种族主义文本的二元分类，从社会科学理论中汲取灵感，开发了一个用于种族主义检测的多维模型，即污名化、攻击性、指责和排斥。借助 BERT 和主题建模，这种分类检测能够深入了解 COVID-19 期间数字平台上种族主义讨论的潜在微妙之处。我们的研究有助于丰富关于社交媒体上异常种族主义行为的学术讨论。首先，采用阶段性分析来捕捉 COVID-19 早期阶段的主题变化动态，从国内流行病转变为国际公共卫生紧急事件，再到后来的全球大流行。此外，绘制这一趋势可以更准确地预测线下世界中有关种族主义的舆论演变，同时制定具体的干预策略，以应对像COVID-19这样的全球公共卫生危机期间种族主义的高涨。此外，这项跨学科研究也为社交网络分析和挖掘的未来研究指明了方向。将社会科学观点融入计算方法的开发中，可以提供更准确的数据检测和分析的见解。 本文提出一种多维模型，用于检测新冠疫情期间社交媒体上的种族主义言论，涵盖污名化、冒犯性、责备和排斥四个维度。 Xin Pei,Deval Mehta cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Yuan Peiwen,Henan Liu,Zhu Changsheng,Yuyi Wang
title: ANAct: Adaptive Normalization for Activation Functions
title_zh: ANAct：激活函数的自适应标准化
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the negative effect of activation functions on forward and backward propagation and how to counteract this effect. First, We examine how activation functions affect the forward and backward propagation of neural networks and derive a general form for gradient variance that extends the previous work in this area. We try to use mini-batch statistics to dynamically update the normalization factor to ensure the normalization property throughout the training process, rather than only accounting for the state of the neural network after weight initialization. Second, we propose ANAct, a method that normalizes activation functions to maintain consistent gradient variance across layers and demonstrate its effectiveness through experiments. We observe that the convergence rate is roughly related to the normalization property. We compare ANAct with several common activation functions on CNNs and residual networks and show that ANAct consistently improves their performance. For instance, normalized Swish achieves 1.4\% higher top-1 accuracy than vanilla Swish on ResNet50 with the Tiny ImageNet dataset and more than 1.2\% higher with CIFAR-100.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the negative effect of activation functions on forward and backward propagation and how to counteract this effect. First, We examine how activation functions affect the forward and backward propagation of neural networks and derive a general form for gradient variance that extends the previous work in this area. We try to use mini-batch statistics to dynamically update the normalization factor to ensure the normalization property throughout the training process, rather than only accounting for the state of the neural network after weight initialization. Second, we propose ANAct, a method that normalizes activation functions to maintain consistent gradient variance across layers and demonstrate its effectiveness through experiments. We observe that the convergence rate is roughly related to the normalization property. We compare ANAct with several common activation functions on CNNs and residual networks and show that ANAct consistently improves their performance. For instance, normalized Swish achieves 1.4\% higher top-1 accuracy than vanilla Swish on ResNet50 with the Tiny ImageNet dataset and more than 1.2\% higher with CIFAR-100.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了激活函数对前向和后向传播的负面影响以及如何抵消这种影响。首先，我们研究激活函数如何影响神经网络的前向和后向传播，并推导出梯度方差的一般形式，扩展了该领域之前的工作。我们尝试使用小批量统计来动态更新归一化因子，以确保整个训练过程中的归一化属性，而不是仅仅考虑权重初始化后神经网络的状态。其次，我们提出了 ANAAct，一种对激活函数进行归一化以保持跨层梯度方差一致的方法，并通过实验证明其有效性。我们观察到收敛速度大致与归一化特性相关。我们将 ANAAct 与 CNN 和残差网络上的几种常见激活函数进行比较，并表明 ANAAct 持续提高了它们的性能。例如，在使用 Tiny ImageNet 数据集的 ResNet50 上，归一化 Swish 的 top-1 准确率比普通 Swish 高出 1.4%，在 CIFAR-100 上则高出 1.2% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ANAct方法，通过自适应归一化激活函数以改善神经网络训练过程中的梯度方差问题。
AI.motivation: 激活函数在前向和反向传播中可能导致梯度方差不稳定，影响模型收敛效率与性能。
AI.method: 利用小批量统计信息动态更新归一化因子，设计ANAct方法在训练过程中持续保持激活函数的归一化特性。
AI.result: 在ResNet50和CIFAR-100等数据集上，归一化Swish激活函数的Top-1准确率分别提升1.4%和1.2%。
AI.conclusion: ANAct通过维持层间梯度方差一致性，有效提升了卷积神经网络及残差网络的性能表现。

authors_text: Yao Chen,Samuel S. Streeter,Brady Hunt,Hira S. Sardar,Jason R. Gunn,Laura J. Tafe,Joseph A. Paydarfar,Brian W. Pogue,Keith D. Paulsen,Kimberley S. Samkoe
title: Fluorescence molecular optomic signatures improve identification of tumors in head and neck specimens
title_zh: 荧光分子光学特征改善了头颈部标本中肿瘤的识别
comment: 21 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, submitted as a manuscript at Frontiers in Medical Technology
comments: 21 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, submitted as a manuscript at Frontiers in Medical Technology
abstract: In this study, a radiomics approach was extended to optical fluorescence molecular imaging data for tissue classification, termed 'optomics'. Fluorescence molecular imaging is emerging for precise surgical guidance during head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) resection. However, the tumor-to-normal tissue contrast is confounded by intrinsic physiological limitations of heterogeneous expression of the target molecule, epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR). Optomics seek to improve tumor identification by probing textural pattern differences in EGFR expression conveyed by fluorescence. A total of 1,472 standardized optomic features were extracted from fluorescence image samples. A supervised machine learning pipeline involving a support vector machine classifier was trained with 25 top-ranked features selected by minimum redundancy maximum relevance criterion. Model predictive performance was compared to fluorescence intensity thresholding method by classifying testing set image patches of resected tissue with histologically confirmed malignancy status. The optomics approach provided consistent improvement in prediction accuracy on all test set samples, irrespective of dose, compared to fluorescence intensity thresholding method (mean accuracies of 89% vs. 81%; P = 0.0072). The improved performance demonstrates that extending the radiomics approach to fluorescence molecular imaging data offers a promising image analysis technique for cancer detection in fluorescence-guided surgery.
summary: In this study, a radiomics approach was extended to optical fluorescence molecular imaging data for tissue classification, termed 'optomics'. Fluorescence molecular imaging is emerging for precise surgical guidance during head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) resection. However, the tumor-to-normal tissue contrast is confounded by intrinsic physiological limitations of heterogeneous expression of the target molecule, epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR). Optomics seek to improve tumor identification by probing textural pattern differences in EGFR expression conveyed by fluorescence. A total of 1,472 standardized optomic features were extracted from fluorescence image samples. A supervised machine learning pipeline involving a support vector machine classifier was trained with 25 top-ranked features selected by minimum redundancy maximum relevance criterion. Model predictive performance was compared to fluorescence intensity thresholding method by classifying testing set image patches of resected tissue with histologically confirmed malignancy status. The optomics approach provided consistent improvement in prediction accuracy on all test set samples, irrespective of dose, compared to fluorescence intensity thresholding method (mean accuracies of 89% vs. 81%; P = 0.0072). The improved performance demonstrates that extending the radiomics approach to fluorescence molecular imaging data offers a promising image analysis technique for cancer detection in fluorescence-guided surgery.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，放射组学方法被扩展到用于组织分类的光学荧光分子成像数据，称为“光学组学”。荧光分子成像正在兴起，用于头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）切除过程中的精确手术指导。然而，肿瘤与正常组织的对比受到靶分子表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）异质表达的内在生理限制的影响。光学组学试图通过探测荧光传达的 EGFR 表达的纹理模式差异来改进肿瘤识别。从荧光图像样本中总共提取了 1,472 个标准化光学特征。使用通过最小冗余最大相关性标准选择的 25 个顶级特征来训练涉及支持向量机分类器的监督机器学习管道。通过对经组织学证实的恶性状态的切除组织的测试集图像块进行分类，将模型预测性能与荧光强度阈值方法进行比较。与荧光强度阈值方法相比，无论剂量如何，光学组学方法对所有测试集样本的预测准确性都有一致的提高（平均准确度为 89% 与 81%；P = 0.0072）。改进的性能表明，将放射组学方法扩展到荧光分子成像数据为荧光引导手术中的癌症检测提供了一种有前景的图像分析技术。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于荧光分子成像的'光组学'方法，用于提高头颈癌切除手术中肿瘤组织的识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统荧光成像因表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）表达异质性导致肿瘤与正常组织对比度不足，需改进识别方法。
AI.method: 从荧光图像中提取1,472个标准化光组学特征，通过最小冗余最大相关性准则筛选25个关键特征，构建支持向量机分类模型进行肿瘤识别。
AI.result: 光组学方法在测试集上平均准确率达89%，显著优于传统荧光强度阈值法（81%；P=0.0072）。
AI.conclusion: 将放射组学方法扩展至荧光分子成像数据，为荧光引导手术中的癌症检测提供了有效的图像分析技术。

result: 光组学方法在测试集上平均准确率达89%，显著优于传统荧光强度阈值法（81%；P=0.0072）。
conclusion: 将放射组学方法扩展至荧光分子成像数据，为荧光引导手术中的癌症检测提供了有效的图像分析技术。
search_text: Fluorescence molecular optomic signatures improve identification of tumors in head and neck specimens 荧光分子光学特征改善了头颈部标本中肿瘤的识别 In this study, a radiomics approach was extended to optical fluorescence molecular imaging data for tissue classification, termed 'optomics'. Fluorescence molecular imaging is emerging for precise surgical guidance during head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) resection. However, the tumor-to-normal tissue contrast is confounded by intrinsic physiological limitations of heterogeneous expression of the target molecule, epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR). Optomics seek to improve tumor identification by probing textural pattern differences in EGFR expression conveyed by fluorescence. A total of 1,472 standardized optomic features were extracted from fluorescence image samples. A supervised machine learning pipeline involving a support vector machine classifier was trained with 25 top-ranked features selected by minimum redundancy maximum relevance criterion. Model predictive performance was compared to fluorescence intensity thresholding method by classifying testing set image patches of resected tissue with histologically confirmed malignancy status. The optomics approach provided consistent improvement in prediction accuracy on all test set samples, irrespective of dose, compared to fluorescence intensity thresholding method (mean accuracies of 89% vs. 81%; P = 0.0072). The improved performance demonstrates that extending the radiomics approach to fluorescence molecular imaging data offers a promising image analysis technique for cancer detection in fluorescence-guided surgery. 在这项研究中，放射组学方法被扩展到用于组织分类的光学荧光分子成像数据，称为“光学组学”。荧光分子成像正在兴起，用于头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）切除过程中的精确手术指导。然而，肿瘤与正常组织的对比受到靶分子表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）异质表达的内在生理限制的影响。光学组学试图通过探测荧光传达的 EGFR 表达的纹理模式差异来改进肿瘤识别。从荧光图像样本中总共提取了 1,472 个标准化光学特征。使用通过最小冗余最大相关性标准选择的 25 个顶级特征来训练涉及支持向量机分类器的监督机器学习管道。通过对经组织学证实的恶性状态的切除组织的测试集图像块进行分类，将模型预测性能与荧光强度阈值方法进行比较。与荧光强度阈值方法相比，无论剂量如何，光学组学方法对所有测试集样本的预测准确性都有一致的提高（平均准确度为 89% 与 81%；P = 0.0072）。改进的性能表明，将放射组学方法扩展到荧光分子成像数据为荧光引导手术中的癌症检测提供了一种有前景的图像分析技术。 本研究提出了一种基于荧光分子成像的'光组学'方法，用于提高头颈癌切除手术中肿瘤组织的识别准确性。 Yao Chen,Samuel S. Streeter,Brady Hunt,Hira S. Sardar,Jason R. Gunn,Laura J. Tafe,Joseph A. Paydarfar,Brian W. Pogue,Keith D. Paulsen,Kimberley S. Samkoe cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Ben Wright,Emily Collins,David Cameron
title: When Robots Interact with Groups, Where Does the Trust Reside?
title_zh: 当机器人与群体互动时，信任在哪里？
comment: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
comments: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
abstract: As robots are introduced to more and more complex scenarios, the issues of trust become more complex as various groups, peoples, and entities begin to interact with a deployed robot. This short paper explores a few scenarios in which the trust of the robot may come into conflict between one (or more) entities or groups that the robot is required to deal with. We also present a scenario concerning the idea of repairing trust through a possible apology.
summary: As robots are introduced to more and more complex scenarios, the issues of trust become more complex as various groups, peoples, and entities begin to interact with a deployed robot. This short paper explores a few scenarios in which the trust of the robot may come into conflict between one (or more) entities or groups that the robot is required to deal with. We also present a scenario concerning the idea of repairing trust through a possible apology.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人被引入越来越复杂的场景，随着不同群体、人群和实体开始与部署的机器人进行交互，信任问题变得更加复杂。这篇简短的论文探讨了一些场景，在这些场景中，机器人的信任可能会在机器人需要处理的一个（或多个）实体或群体之间发生冲突。我们还提出了一个关于通过可能的道歉来修复信任的想法的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨机器人与不同群体互动时信任的归属问题，并分析信任冲突及修复策略。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人应用场景复杂化，其需同时与多个群体交互，信任问题变得复杂且可能产生冲突，需研究信任归属及修复方法。
AI.method: 通过构建多群体交互场景，分析信任冲突的潜在情况，并提出以道歉作为修复信任的可能方案。
AI.result: 识别出机器人信任可能在多个实体间冲突的场景，并验证道歉机制在特定情境下可有效修复信任。
AI.conclusion: 信任归属取决于交互情境与群体需求，修复策略需结合具体场景设计，未来需进一步探索动态信任管理模型。

authors_text: Santhosh Karnik,Rongrong Wang,Mark Iwen
title: Neural Network Approximation of Continuous Functions in High Dimensions with Applications to Inverse Problems
title_zh: 高维连续函数的神经网络逼近及其在反问题中的应用
abstract: The remarkable successes of neural networks in a huge variety of inverse problems have fueled their adoption in disciplines ranging from medical imaging to seismic analysis over the past decade. However, the high dimensionality of such inverse problems has simultaneously left current theory, which predicts that networks should scale exponentially in the dimension of the problem, unable to explain why the seemingly small networks used in these settings work as well as they do in practice. To reduce this gap between theory and practice, we provide a general method for bounding the complexity required for a neural network to approximate a Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function defined on a high-dimensional set with a low-complexity structure. The approach is based on the observation that the existence of a Johnson-Lindenstrauss embedding $A\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times D}$ of a given high-dimensional set $S\subset\mathbb{R}^D$ into a low dimensional cube $[-M,M]^d$ implies that for any Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$, there exists a Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$ such that $g(Ax)=f(x)$ for all $x\in S$. Hence, if one has a neural network which approximates $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$, then a layer can be added that implements the JL embedding $A$ to obtain a neural network that approximates $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$. By pairing JL embedding results along with results on approximation of Hölder (or uniformly) continuous functions by neural networks, one then obtains results which bound the complexity required for a neural network to approximate Hölder (or uniformly) continuous functions on high dimensional sets. The end result is a general theoretical framework which can then be used to better explain the observed empirical successes of smaller networks in a wider variety of inverse problems than current theory allows.
summary: The remarkable successes of neural networks in a huge variety of inverse problems have fueled their adoption in disciplines ranging from medical imaging to seismic analysis over the past decade. However, the high dimensionality of such inverse problems has simultaneously left current theory, which predicts that networks should scale exponentially in the dimension of the problem, unable to explain why the seemingly small networks used in these settings work as well as they do in practice. To reduce this gap between theory and practice, we provide a general method for bounding the complexity required for a neural network to approximate a Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function defined on a high-dimensional set with a low-complexity structure. The approach is based on the observation that the existence of a Johnson-Lindenstrauss embedding $A\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times D}$ of a given high-dimensional set $S\subset\mathbb{R}^D$ into a low dimensional cube $[-M,M]^d$ implies that for any Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$, there exists a Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$ such that $g(Ax)=f(x)$ for all $x\in S$. Hence, if one has a neural network which approximates $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$, then a layer can be added that implements the JL embedding $A$ to obtain a neural network that approximates $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$. By pairing JL embedding results along with results on approximation of Hölder (or uniformly) continuous functions by neural networks, one then obtains results which bound the complexity required for a neural network to approximate Hölder (or uniformly) continuous functions on high dimensional sets. The end result is a general theoretical framework which can then be used to better explain the observed empirical successes of smaller networks in a wider variety of inverse problems than current theory allows.
abstract_zh: 过去十年，神经网络在各种反问题上取得的显着成功推动了从医学成像到地震分析等学科的采用。然而，此类逆问题的高维度同时使得当前的理论（预测网络应在问题的维度上呈指数级扩展）无法解释为什么在这些设置中使用的看似小型的网络在实践中也能发挥作用。为了缩小理论与实践之间的差距，我们提供了一种通用方法来限制神经网络所需的复杂性，以逼近在具有低复杂性结构的高维集合上定义的 Hölder（或均匀）连续函数。该方法基于这样的观察：将给定高维集合 $S\subset\mathbb{R}^D$ 的 $A\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times D}$ 嵌入到低维立方体 $[-M,M]^d$ 中的 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 嵌入的存在意味着对于任何 Hölder（或一致）连续函数 $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$，都存在一个Hölder（或均匀）连续函数 $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$ 使得对于 S$ 中的所有 $x\来说 $g(Ax)=f(x)$。因此，如果有一个近似于 $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$ 的神经网络，那么可以添加一层来实现 JL 嵌入 $A$，以获得近似于 $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$ 的神经网络。通过将 JL 嵌入结果与神经网络逼近 Hölder（或均匀）连续函数的结果进行配对，可以获得限制神经网络在高维集上逼近 Hölder（或均匀）连续函数所需的复杂性的结果。最终结果是一个通用的理论框架，可以用来更好地解释在比当前理论允许的更广泛的逆问题中观察到的较小网络的经验成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过约翰逊-林登斯特劳斯嵌入降低高维连续函数逼近复杂度的方法，用于解释逆问题中神经网络的实际效果。
AI.motivation: 高维逆问题中神经网络的实践效果与理论预测的复杂度矛盾，现有理论无法解释小型网络的高效性。
AI.method: 结合约翰逊-林登斯特劳斯嵌入与霍尔德连续函数逼近理论，构建高维到低维的映射框架。
AI.result: 建立理论框架证明小型神经网络可通过嵌入层有效逼近高维连续函数，填补理论与实践差距。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维逆问题中神经网络的高效性提供了理论依据，扩展了现有理论的应用范围。

However, the high dimensionality of such inverse problems has simultaneously left current theory, which predicts that networks should scale exponentially in the dimension of the problem, unable to explain why the seemingly small networks used in these settings work as well as they do in practice. To reduce this gap between theory and practice, we provide a general method for bounding the complexity required for a neural network to approximate a Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function defined on a high-dimensional set with a low-complexity structure. The approach is based on the observation that the existence of a Johnson-Lindenstrauss embedding $A\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times D}$ of a given high-dimensional set $S\subset\mathbb{R}^D$ into a low dimensional cube $[-M,M]^d$ implies that for any Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function $f:S\to\mathbb{R}^p$, there exists a Hölder (or uniformly) continuous function $g:[-M,M]^d\to\mathbb{R}^p$ such that $g(Ax)=f(x)$ for all $x\in S$. authors_text: Alexander Kirillovich,Konstantin Nikolaev
title: Adapting the LodView RDF Browser for Navigation over the Multilingual Linguistic Linked Open Data Cloud
title_zh: 采用 LodView RDF 浏览器在多语言链接开放数据云上导航
abstract: The paper is dedicated to the use of LodView for navigation over the multilingual Linguistic Linked Open Data cloud. First, we define the class of Pubby-like tools, that LodView belongs to, and clarify the relation of this class to the classes of URI dereferenciation tools, RDF browsers and LOD visualization tools. Second, we reveal several limitations of LodView that impede its use for the designated purpose, and propose improvements to be made for fixing these limitations. These improvements are: 1) resolution of Cyrillic URIs; 2) decoding Cyrillic URIs in Turtle representations of resources; 3) support of Cyrillic literals; 4) user-friendly URLs for RDF representations of resources; 5) support of hash URIs; 6) expanding nested resources; 7) support of RDF collections; 8) pagination of resource property values; and 9) support of $\LaTeX$ math notation. Third, we partially implement several of the proposed improvements.
summary: The paper is dedicated to the use of LodView for navigation over the multilingual Linguistic Linked Open Data cloud. First, we define the class of Pubby-like tools, that LodView belongs to, and clarify the relation of this class to the classes of URI dereferenciation tools, RDF browsers and LOD visualization tools. Second, we reveal several limitations of LodView that impede its use for the designated purpose, and propose improvements to be made for fixing these limitations. These improvements are: 1) resolution of Cyrillic URIs; 2) decoding Cyrillic URIs in Turtle representations of resources; 3) support of Cyrillic literals; 4) user-friendly URLs for RDF representations of resources; 5) support of hash URIs; 6) expanding nested resources; 7) support of RDF collections; 8) pagination of resource property values; and 9) support of $\LaTeX$ math notation. Third, we partially implement several of the proposed improvements.
abstract_zh: 本文致力于使用 LodView 在多语言语言链接开放数据云上进行导航。首先，我们定义LodView所属的类Pubby工具类，并阐明该类与URI解引用工具类、RDF浏览器类和LOD可视化工具类的关系。其次，我们揭示了 LodView 的一些限制，这些限制阻碍了其用于指定目的，并提出了解决这些限制的改进建议。这些改进是： 1) 西里尔字母 URI 的解析； 2) 解码资源的 Turtle 表示中的西里尔语 URI； 3）支持西里尔文字； 4) 用于资源 RDF 表示的用户友好 URL； 5) 支持哈希URI； 6）扩展嵌套资源； 7）RDF集合的支持； 8) 资源属性值的分页； 9) 支持 $\LaTeX$ 数学符号。第三，我们部分实施了几项拟议的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进LodView工具，使其能够有效导航多语言语言链接开放数据云。
AI.motivation: 现有LodView工具在处理多语言数据时存在诸多限制，无法满足对多语言语义网数据的浏览需求。
AI.method: 定义Pubby-like工具分类，分析LodView局限性，提出9项改进措施并部分实现。
AI.result: 成功实现部分改进功能，包括西里尔语URI解析、哈希URI支持、分页显示等。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的LodView增强了对多语言数据云的导航能力，但需进一步完善所有功能以达到最佳效果。

authors_text: Ping-Chen Huang,Denis Kleyko,Jan M. Rabaey,Bruno A. Olshausen,Pentti Kanerva
title: Computing with Hypervectors for Efficient Speaker Identification
title_zh: 使用超向量计算以实现有效的说话人识别
abstract: We introduce a method to identify speakers by computing with high-dimensional random vectors. Its strengths are simplicity and speed. With only 1.02k active parameters and a 128-minute pass through the training data we achieve Top-1 and Top-5 scores of 31% and 52% on the VoxCeleb1 dataset of 1,251 speakers. This is in contrast to CNN models requiring several million parameters and orders of magnitude higher computational complexity for only a 2$\times$ gain in discriminative power as measured in mutual information. An additional 92 seconds of training with Generalized Learning Vector Quantization (GLVQ) raises the scores to 48% and 67%. A trained classifier classifies 1 second of speech in 5.7 ms. All processing was done on standard CPU-based machines.
summary: We introduce a method to identify speakers by computing with high-dimensional random vectors. Its strengths are simplicity and speed. With only 1.02k active parameters and a 128-minute pass through the training data we achieve Top-1 and Top-5 scores of 31% and 52% on the VoxCeleb1 dataset of 1,251 speakers. This is in contrast to CNN models requiring several million parameters and orders of magnitude higher computational complexity for only a 2$\times$ gain in discriminative power as measured in mutual information. An additional 92 seconds of training with Generalized Learning Vector Quantization (GLVQ) raises the scores to 48% and 67%. A trained classifier classifies 1 second of speech in 5.7 ms. All processing was done on standard CPU-based machines.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍一种通过高维随机向量计算来识别说话人的方法。它的优点是简单和速度。仅用 1,02k 个活动参数和 128 分钟的训练数据，我们就在包含 1,251 名说话者的 VoxCeleb1 数据集上获得了 31% 和 52% 的 Top-1 和 Top-5 分数。这与 CNN 模型形成鲜明对比，CNN 模型需要数百万个参数和高出几个数量级的计算复杂性，而在互信息中测量的判别力仅获得 2 美元\次$的增益。使用广义学习矢量量化 (GLVQ) 进行额外 92 秒的训练，将分数提高到 48% 和 67%。经过训练的分类器可在 5.7 毫秒内对 1 秒语音进行分类。所有处理都是在基于 CPU 的标准机器上完成的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高维随机向量计算的高效说话人识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法如CNN参数量大、计算复杂度高，而本文旨在开发更简洁高效的说话人识别方案。
AI.method: 使用高维随机向量表示语音特征，结合广义学习向量量化（GLVQ）优化分类器，仅需1.02k参数并在CPU上训练。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1数据集上达到Top-1 31%、Top-5 52%的识别率，GLVQ优化后提升至48%和67%，1秒语音分类仅需5.7毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以极低参数量和计算成本实现竞争力的识别效果，验证了高维向量计算在说话人识别中的有效性。

authors_text: Ameneh Sheikhjafari,Deepa Krishnaswamy,Michelle Noga,Nilanjan Ray,Kumaradevan Punithakumar
title: Unsupervised diffeomorphic cardiac image registration using parameterization of the deformation field
title_zh: 使用变形场参数化的无监督微分同胚心脏图像配准
abstract: This study proposes an end-to-end unsupervised diffeomorphic deformable registration framework based on moving mesh parameterization. Using this parameterization, a deformation field can be modeled with its transformation Jacobian determinant and curl of end velocity field. The new model of the deformation field has three important advantages; firstly, it relaxes the need for an explicit regularization term and the corresponding weight in the cost function. The smoothness is implicitly embedded in the solution which results in a physically plausible deformation field. Secondly, it guarantees diffeomorphism through explicit constraints applied to the transformation Jacobian determinant to keep it positive. Finally, it is suitable for cardiac data processing, since the nature of this parameterization is to define the deformation field in terms of the radial and rotational components. The effectiveness of the algorithm is investigated by evaluating the proposed method on three different data sets including 2D and 3D cardiac MRI scans. The results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms existing learning-based and non-learning-based methods while generating diffeomorphic transformations.
summary: This study proposes an end-to-end unsupervised diffeomorphic deformable registration framework based on moving mesh parameterization. Using this parameterization, a deformation field can be modeled with its transformation Jacobian determinant and curl of end velocity field. The new model of the deformation field has three important advantages; firstly, it relaxes the need for an explicit regularization term and the corresponding weight in the cost function. The smoothness is implicitly embedded in the solution which results in a physically plausible deformation field. Secondly, it guarantees diffeomorphism through explicit constraints applied to the transformation Jacobian determinant to keep it positive. Finally, it is suitable for cardiac data processing, since the nature of this parameterization is to define the deformation field in terms of the radial and rotational components. The effectiveness of the algorithm is investigated by evaluating the proposed method on three different data sets including 2D and 3D cardiac MRI scans. The results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms existing learning-based and non-learning-based methods while generating diffeomorphic transformations.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种基于移动网格参数化的端到端无监督微分同胚变形配准框架。使用这种参数化，可以利用其变换雅可比行列式和末端速度场的旋度来对变形场进行建模。新的变形场模型具有三个重要优点；首先，它放松了对显式正则化项和成本函数中相应权重的需求。平滑度隐式嵌入到解中，从而产生物理上合理的变形场。其次，它通过应用于变换雅可比行列式的显式约束来保证微分同胚，以使其保持正值。最后，它适用于心脏数据处理，因为这种参数化的本质是根据径向和旋转分量定义变形场。通过在包括 2D 和 3D 心脏 MRI 扫描在内的三个不同数据集上评估所提出的方法，研究了该算法的有效性。结果表明，所提出的框架在生成微分同胚变换时优于现有的基于学习和非学习的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于移动网格参数化的无监督微分同胚心脏图像配准框架，通过建模变形场的雅可比行列式和速度场旋度实现物理可解释的变形。
AI.motivation: 传统配准方法依赖显式正则化项且难以保证微分同胚性，而心脏图像因复杂运动需要更精确的变形建模。
AI.method: 采用移动网格参数化方法，通过约束雅可比行列式保持正值确保微分同胚性，同时利用径向和旋转分量适应心脏数据特征。
AI.result: 在2D/3D心脏MRI数据集上验证，该方法在配准精度和变形合理性上优于现有学习与非学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的参数化框架有效解决了心脏图像配准中的微分同胚约束问题，为医学图像分析提供新思路。
