Using this parameterization, a deformation field can be modeled with its transformation Jacobian determinant and curl of end velocity field. The new model of the deformation field has three important advantages; firstly, it relaxes the need for an explicit regularization term and the corresponding weight in the cost function. The smoothness is implicitly embedded in the solution which results in a physically plausible deformation field. Secondly, it guarantees diffeomorphism through explicit constraints applied to the transformation Jacobian determinant to keep it positive. Finally, it is suitable for cardiac data processing, since the nature of this parameterization is to define the deformation field in terms of the radial and rotational components. The effectiveness of the algorithm is investigated by evaluating the proposed method on three different data sets including 2D and 3D cardiac MRI scans. The results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms existing learning-based and non-learning-based methods while generating diffeomorphic transformations. 本研究提出了一种基于移动网格参数化的端到端无监督微分同胚变形配准框架。使用这种参数化，可以利用其变换雅可比行列式和末端速度场的旋度来对变形场进行建模。新的变形场模型具有三个重要优点；首先，它放松了对显式正则化项和成本函数中相应权重的需求。平滑度隐式嵌入到解中，从而产生物理上合理的变形场。其次，它通过应用于变换雅可比行列式的显式约束来保证微分同胚，以使其保持正值。最后，它适用于心脏数据处理，因为这种参数化的本质是根据径向和旋转分量定义变形场。通过在包括 2D 和 3D 心脏 MRI 扫描在内的三个不同数据集上评估所提出的方法，研究了该算法的有效性。结果表明，所提出的框架在生成微分同胚变换时优于现有的基于学习和非学习的方法。 本文提出一种基于移动网格参数化的无监督微分同胚心脏图像配准框架，通过建模变形场的雅可比行列式和速度场旋度实现物理可解释的变形。 Ameneh Sheikhjafari,Deepa Krishnaswamy,Michelle Noga,Nilanjan Ray,Kumaradevan Punithakumar eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Khaled Humady,Yasmeen Al-Saeed,Nabila Eladawi,Ahmed Elgarayhi,Mohammed Elmogy,Mohammed Sallah
title: Efficient liver segmentation with 3D CNN using computed tomography scans
title_zh: 使用计算机断层扫描通过 3D CNN 进行高效肝脏分割
abstract: The liver is one of the most critical metabolic organs in vertebrates due to its vital functions in the human body, such as detoxification of the blood from waste products and medications. Liver diseases due to liver tumors are one of the most common mortality reasons around the globe. Hence, detecting liver tumors in the early stages of tumor development is highly required as a critical part of medical treatment. Many imaging modalities can be used as aiding tools to detect liver tumors. Computed tomography (CT) is the most used imaging modality for soft tissue organs such as the liver. This is because it is an invasive modality that can be captured relatively quickly. This paper proposed an efficient automatic liver segmentation framework to detect and segment the liver out of CT abdomen scans using the 3D CNN DeepMedic network model. Segmenting the liver region accurately and then using the segmented liver region as input to tumors segmentation method is adopted by many studies as it reduces the false rates resulted from segmenting abdomen organs as tumors. The proposed 3D CNN DeepMedic model has two pathways of input rather than one pathway, as in the original 3D CNN model. In this paper, the network was supplied with multiple abdomen CT versions, which helped improve the segmentation quality. The proposed model achieved 94.36%, 94.57%, 91.86%, and 93.14% for accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, and Dice similarity score, respectively. The experimental results indicate the applicability of the proposed method.
summary: The liver is one of the most critical metabolic organs in vertebrates due to its vital functions in the human body, such as detoxification of the blood from waste products and medications. Liver diseases due to liver tumors are one of the most common mortality reasons around the globe. Hence, detecting liver tumors in the early stages of tumor development is highly required as a critical part of medical treatment. Many imaging modalities can be used as aiding tools to detect liver tumors. Computed tomography (CT) is the most used imaging modality for soft tissue organs such as the liver. This is because it is an invasive modality that can be captured relatively quickly. This paper proposed an efficient automatic liver segmentation framework to detect and segment the liver out of CT abdomen scans using the 3D CNN DeepMedic network model. Segmenting the liver region accurately and then using the segmented liver region as input to tumors segmentation method is adopted by many studies as it reduces the false rates resulted from segmenting abdomen organs as tumors. The proposed 3D CNN DeepMedic model has two pathways of input rather than one pathway, as in the original 3D CNN model. In this paper, the network was supplied with multiple abdomen CT versions, which helped improve the segmentation quality. The proposed model achieved 94.36%, 94.57%, 91.86%, and 93.14% for accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, and Dice similarity score, respectively. The experimental results indicate the applicability of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 肝脏是脊椎动物最重要的代谢器官之一，因为它在人体内具有重要的功能，例如对血液中的废物和药物进行解毒。肝肿瘤引起的肝病是全球最常见的死亡原因之一。因此，在肿瘤发展的早期阶段检测肝脏肿瘤作为医疗的关键部分是非常必要的。许多成像方式可用作检测肝脏肿瘤的辅助工具。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 是肝脏等软组织器官最常用的成像方式。这是因为它是一种可以相对较快地捕获的侵入方式。本文提出了一种高效的自动肝脏分割框架，使用 3D CNN DeepMedic 网络模型从 CT 腹部扫描中检测和分割肝脏。许多研究采用准确分割肝脏区域，然后将分割的肝脏区域作为肿瘤分割方法的输入，因为它减少了将腹部器官分割为肿瘤的错误率。所提出的 3D CNN DeepMedic 模型有两条输入路径，而不是像原始 3D CNN 模型那样只有一条路径。在本文中，网络提供了多个腹部 CT 版本，这有助于提高分割质量。所提出的模型的准确度、灵敏度、特异性和 Dice 相似度评分分别达到 94.36%、94.57%、91.86% 和 93.14%。实验结果表明了该方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D CNN的高效肝脏分割框架，用于从CT腹部扫描中检测和分割肝脏。
AI.motivation: 肝脏肿瘤是全球主要死亡原因之一，早期检测至关重要。CT扫描因快速且能清晰显示软组织而被广泛使用，但需提高分割准确性以减少误诊。
AI.method: 采用改进的3D CNN DeepMedic模型，包含双输入路径，并使用多版本腹部CT数据进行训练以提升分割质量。
AI.result: 模型在准确率、灵敏度、特异性和Dice相似性得分上分别达到94.36%、94.57%、91.86%和93.14%。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了该方法在肝脏分割任务中的有效性，为肿瘤检测提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Matteo Saveriano,Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Ville Kyrki
title: Learning Stable Robotic Skills on Riemannian Manifolds
title_zh: 学习黎曼流形上的稳定机器人技能
abstract: In this paper, we propose an approach to learn stable dynamical systems evolving on Riemannian manifolds. The approach leverages a data-efficient procedure to learn a diffeomorphic transformation that maps simple stable dynamical systems onto complex robotic skills. By exploiting mathematical tools from differential geometry, the method ensures that the learned skills fulfill the geometric constraints imposed by the underlying manifolds, such as unit quaternion (UQ) for orientation and symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices for impedance, while preserving the convergence to a given target. The proposed approach is firstly tested in simulation on a public benchmark, obtained by projecting Cartesian data into UQ and SPD manifolds, and compared with existing approaches. Apart from evaluating the approach on a public benchmark, several experiments were performed on a real robot performing bottle stacking in different conditions and a drilling task in cooperation with a human operator. The evaluation shows promising results in terms of learning accuracy and task adaptation capabilities.
summary: In this paper, we propose an approach to learn stable dynamical systems evolving on Riemannian manifolds. The approach leverages a data-efficient procedure to learn a diffeomorphic transformation that maps simple stable dynamical systems onto complex robotic skills. By exploiting mathematical tools from differential geometry, the method ensures that the learned skills fulfill the geometric constraints imposed by the underlying manifolds, such as unit quaternion (UQ) for orientation and symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices for impedance, while preserving the convergence to a given target. The proposed approach is firstly tested in simulation on a public benchmark, obtained by projecting Cartesian data into UQ and SPD manifolds, and compared with existing approaches. Apart from evaluating the approach on a public benchmark, several experiments were performed on a real robot performing bottle stacking in different conditions and a drilling task in cooperation with a human operator. The evaluation shows promising results in terms of learning accuracy and task adaptation capabilities.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种学习在黎曼流形上演化的稳定动力系统的方法。该方法利用数据高效的过程来学习微分同胚变换，将简单的稳定动力系统映射到复杂的机器人技能上。通过利用微分几何的数学工具，该方法确保学习的技能满足底层流形施加的几何约束，例如用于方向的单位四元数（UQ）和用于阻抗的对称正定（SPD）矩阵，同时保持对给定目标的收敛性。所提出的方法首先在公共基准上进行模拟测试，通过将笛卡尔数据投影到 UQ 和 SPD 流形中获得，并与现有方法进行比较。除了在公共基准上评估该方法之外，还对真实的机器人进行了多项实验，该机器人在不同条件下执行瓶子堆垛以及与人类操作员合作的钻孔任务。该评估在学习准确性和任务适应能力方面显示出有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在黎曼流形上学习稳定机器人技能的方法，通过几何约束保证动态系统收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效处理几何约束，需确保技能符合流形结构并保持收敛性。
AI.method: 利用微分几何工具学习微分同胚变换，将简单系统映射到复杂技能，满足流形约束。
AI.result: 在模拟和实际任务中表现良好，学习精度和适应性提升。
AI.conclusion: 方法有效，适用于复杂任务，未来可扩展应用。

authors_text: Kaizhi Zheng,Kaiwen Zhou,Jing Gu,Yue Fan,Jialu Wang,Zonglin Di,Xuehai He,Xin Eric Wang
title: JARVIS: A Neuro-Symbolic Commonsense Reasoning Framework for Conversational Embodied Agents
title_zh: JARVIS：会话实体代理的神经符号常识推理框架
comment: 19th International Conference on Neurosymbolic Learning and Reasoning
comments: 19th International Conference on Neurosymbolic Learning and Reasoning
abstract: Building a conversational embodied agent to execute real-life tasks has been a long-standing yet quite challenging research goal, as it requires effective human-agent communication, multi-modal understanding, long-range sequential decision making, etc. Traditional symbolic methods have scaling and generalization issues, while end-to-end deep learning models suffer from data scarcity and high task complexity, and are often hard to explain. To benefit from both worlds, we propose JARVIS, a neuro-symbolic commonsense reasoning framework for modular, generalizable, and interpretable conversational embodied agents. First, it acquires symbolic representations by prompting large language models (LLMs) for language understanding and sub-goal planning, and by constructing semantic maps from visual observations. Then the symbolic module reasons for sub-goal planning and action generation based on task- and action-level common sense. Extensive experiments on the TEACh dataset validate the efficacy and efficiency of our JARVIS framework, which achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on all three dialog-based embodied tasks, including Execution from Dialog History (EDH), Trajectory from Dialog (TfD), and Two-Agent Task Completion (TATC) (e.g., our method boosts the unseen Success Rate on EDH from 6.1\% to 15.8\%). Moreover, we systematically analyze the essential factors that affect the task performance and also demonstrate the superiority of our method in few-shot settings. Our JARVIS model ranks first in the Alexa Prize SimBot Public Benchmark Challenge.
summary: Building a conversational embodied agent to execute real-life tasks has been a long-standing yet quite challenging research goal, as it requires effective human-agent communication, multi-modal understanding, long-range sequential decision making, etc. Traditional symbolic methods have scaling and generalization issues, while end-to-end deep learning models suffer from data scarcity and high task complexity, and are often hard to explain. To benefit from both worlds, we propose JARVIS, a neuro-symbolic commonsense reasoning framework for modular, generalizable, and interpretable conversational embodied agents. First, it acquires symbolic representations by prompting large language models (LLMs) for language understanding and sub-goal planning, and by constructing semantic maps from visual observations. Then the symbolic module reasons for sub-goal planning and action generation based on task- and action-level common sense. Extensive experiments on the TEACh dataset validate the efficacy and efficiency of our JARVIS framework, which achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on all three dialog-based embodied tasks, including Execution from Dialog History (EDH), Trajectory from Dialog (TfD), and Two-Agent Task Completion (TATC) (e.g., our method boosts the unseen Success Rate on EDH from 6.1\% to 15.8\%). Moreover, we systematically analyze the essential factors that affect the task performance and also demonstrate the superiority of our method in few-shot settings. Our JARVIS model ranks first in the Alexa Prize SimBot Public Benchmark Challenge.
abstract_zh: 构建一个会话式实体代理来执行现实生活中的任务一直是一个长期存在但相当具有挑战性的研究目标，因为它需要有效的人机通信、多模式理解、远程顺序决策等。传统的符号方法存在扩展和泛化问题，而端到端深度学习模型面临数据稀缺和任务复杂性高的问题，并且往往难以解释。为了从这两个世界中受益，我们提出了 JARVIS，一种用于模块化、可泛化和可解释的会话实体的神经符号常识推理框架。首先，它通过促进大型语言模型（LLM）进行语言理解和子目标规划，并通过视觉观察构建语义图来获取符号表示。然后，符号模块根据任务和行动层面的常识来推理子目标规划和行动生成。 TEACh 数据集上的大量实验验证了我们的 JARVIS 框架的功效和效率，该框架在所有三个基于对话的具体任务上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 结果，包括对话历史记录执行 (EDH)、对话轨迹 (TfD) 和双代理任务完成 (TATC)（例如，我们的方法将 EDH 上看不见的成功率从 6.1\% 提高到15.8%）。此外，我们系统地分析了影响任务性能的基本因素，并证明了我们的方法在少样本设置中的优越性。我们的 JARVIS 模型在 Alexa Awards SimBot 公共基准挑战赛中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JARVIS框架，结合神经网络与符号推理，提升对话型具身智能体在现实任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统符号方法扩展性差，端到端模型数据稀缺且难解释，需融合两者优势以实现高效可解释的智能体。
AI.method: 通过提示大语言模型获取符号表征，构建语义地图，并基于常识进行子目标规划与动作生成。
AI.result: 在TEACh数据集上三项任务均达SOTA，EDH未见任务成功率从6.1%提升至15.8%，并在SimBot挑战赛中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: JARVIS通过神经符号融合有效提升任务性能与可解释性，验证了常识推理在具身对话中的关键作用。

search_text: JARVIS: A Neuro-Symbolic Commonsense Reasoning Framework for Conversational Embodied Agents JARVIS：会话实体代理的神经符号常识推理框架 Building a conversational embodied agent to execute real-life tasks has been a long-standing yet quite challenging research goal, as it requires effective human-agent communication, multi-modal understanding, long-range sequential decision making, etc. Traditional symbolic methods have scaling and generalization issues, while end-to-end deep learning models suffer from data scarcity and high task complexity, and are often hard to explain. To benefit from both worlds, we propose JARVIS, a neuro-symbolic commonsense reasoning framework for modular, generalizable, and interpretable conversational embodied agents. First, it acquires symbolic representations by prompting large language models (LLMs) for language understanding and sub-goal planning, and by constructing semantic maps from visual observations. Then the symbolic module reasons for sub-goal planning and action generation based on task- and action-level common sense. Extensive experiments on the TEACh dataset validate the efficacy and efficiency of our JARVIS framework, which achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on all three dialog-based embodied tasks, including Execution from Dialog History (EDH), Trajectory from Dialog (TfD), and Two-Agent Task Completion (TATC) (e.g., our method boosts the unseen Success Rate on EDH from 6.1\% to 15.8\%). Moreover, we systematically analyze the essential factors that affect the task performance and also demonstrate the superiority of our method in few-shot settings. Our JARVIS model ranks first in the Alexa Prize SimBot Public Benchmark Challenge. 构建一个会话式实体代理来执行现实生活中的任务一直是一个长期存在但相当具有挑战性的研究目标，因为它需要有效的人机通信、多模式理解、远程顺序决策等。传统的符号方法存在扩展和泛化问题，而端到端深度学习模型面临数据稀缺和任务复杂性高的问题，并且往往难以解释。为了从这两个世界中受益，我们提出了 JARVIS，一种用于模块化、可泛化和可解释的会话实体的神经符号常识推理框架。首先，它通过促进大型语言模型（LLM）进行语言理解和子目标规划，并通过视觉观察构建语义图来获取符号表示。然后，符号模块根据任务和行动层面的常识来推理子目标规划和行动生成。 TEACh 数据集上的大量实验验证了我们的 JARVIS 框架的功效和效率，该框架在所有三个基于对话的具体任务上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 结果，包括对话历史记录执行 (EDH)、对话轨迹 (TfD) 和双代理任务完成 (TATC)（例如，我们的方法将 EDH 上看不见的成功率从 6.1\% 提高到15.8%）。此外，我们系统地分析了影响任务性能的基本因素，并证明了我们的方法在少样本设置中的优越性。我们的 JARVIS 模型在 Alexa Awards SimBot 公共基准挑战赛中排名第一。 本文提出JARVIS框架，结合神经网络与符号推理，提升对话型具身智能体在现实任务中的表现。 Kaizhi Zheng,Kaiwen Zhou,Jing Gu,Yue Fan,Jialu Wang,Zonglin Di,Xuehai He,Xin Eric Wang cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Gopinath Balaji,Ranit Sen,Harsh Kirty
title: Detection and Classification of Brain tumors Using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络检测和分类脑肿瘤
comment: 11 pages, 14 figures, Presented this paper and published only abstract in the 'International conference on Machine learning Big data management Cloud and Computing (ICMBDC)' on 1st January 2022, Proceeding Detail available in https://digitalxplore.org/proceeding.php?pid=1210
comments: 11 pages, 14 figures, Presented this paper and published only abstract in the 'International conference on Machine learning Big data management Cloud and Computing (ICMBDC)' on 1st January 2022, Proceeding Detail available in https://digitalxplore.org/proceeding.php?pid=1210
abstract: Abnormal development of tissues in the body as a result of swelling and morbid enlargement is known as a tumor. They are mainly classified as Benign and Malignant. Tumour in the brain is fatal as it may be cancerous, so it can feed on healthy cells nearby and keep increasing in size. This may affect the soft tissues, nerve cells, and small blood vessels in the brain. Hence there is a need to detect and classify them during the early stages with utmost precision. There are different sizes and locations of brain tumors which makes it difficult to understand their nature. The process of detection and classification of brain tumors can prove to be an onerous task even with advanced MRI (Magnetic Resonance Imaging) techniques due to the similarities between the healthy cells nearby and the tumor. In this paper, we have used Keras and Tensorflow to implement state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures, like EfficientNetB0, ResNet50, Xception, MobileNetV2, and VGG16, using Transfer Learning to detect and classify three types of brain tumors namely - Glioma, Meningioma, and Pituitary. The dataset we used consisted of 3264 2-D magnetic resonance images and 4 classes. Due to the small size of the dataset, various data augmentation techniques were used to increase the size of the dataset. Our proposed methodology not only consists of data augmentation, but also various image denoising techniques, skull stripping, cropping, and bias correction. In our proposed work EfficientNetB0 architecture performed the best giving an accuracy of 97.61%. The aim of this paper is to differentiate between normal and abnormal pixels and also classify them with better accuracy.
summary: Abnormal development of tissues in the body as a result of swelling and morbid enlargement is known as a tumor. They are mainly classified as Benign and Malignant. Tumour in the brain is fatal as it may be cancerous, so it can feed on healthy cells nearby and keep increasing in size. This may affect the soft tissues, nerve cells, and small blood vessels in the brain. Hence there is a need to detect and classify them during the early stages with utmost precision. There are different sizes and locations of brain tumors which makes it difficult to understand their nature. The process of detection and classification of brain tumors can prove to be an onerous task even with advanced MRI (Magnetic Resonance Imaging) techniques due to the similarities between the healthy cells nearby and the tumor. In this paper, we have used Keras and Tensorflow to implement state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures, like EfficientNetB0, ResNet50, Xception, MobileNetV2, and VGG16, using Transfer Learning to detect and classify three types of brain tumors namely - Glioma, Meningioma, and Pituitary. The dataset we used consisted of 3264 2-D magnetic resonance images and 4 classes. Due to the small size of the dataset, various data augmentation techniques were used to increase the size of the dataset. Our proposed methodology not only consists of data augmentation, but also various image denoising techniques, skull stripping, cropping, and bias correction. In our proposed work EfficientNetB0 architecture performed the best giving an accuracy of 97.61%. The aim of this paper is to differentiate between normal and abnormal pixels and also classify them with better accuracy.
abstract_zh: 由于肿胀和病态肿大而导致的体内组织异常发育被称为肿瘤。它们主要分为良性和恶性。大脑中的肿瘤是致命的，因为它可能是癌性的，因此它可以以附近的健康细胞为食并不断增大。这可能会影响大脑中的软组织、神经细胞和小血管。因此，需要在早期阶段以最高精度对它们进行检测和分类。脑肿瘤的大小和位置各不相同，因此很难了解其性质。由于附近健康细胞与肿瘤之间的相似性，即使使用先进的 MRI（磁共振成像）技术，脑肿瘤的检测和分类过程也可能是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们使用 Keras 和 Tensorflow 来实现最先进的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构，例如 EfficientNetB0、ResNet50、Xception、MobileNetV2 和 VGG16，并使用迁移学习来检测和分类三种类型的脑肿瘤，即神经胶质瘤、脑膜瘤和垂体瘤。我们使用的数据集由 3264 张 2-D 磁共振图像和 4 个类别组成。由于数据集较小，因此使用了各种数据增强技术来增加数据集的大小。我们提出的方法不仅包括数据增强，还包括各种图像去噪技术、头骨剥离、裁剪和偏差校正。在我们提出的工作中，EfficientNetB0 架构表现最好，准确率为 97.61%。本文的目的是区分正常像素和异常像素，并以更好的精度对它们进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）对脑肿瘤进行检测与分类，采用迁移学习方法实现高效准确的识别。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤具有致命性且早期检测困难，传统MRI技术难以区分肿瘤与健康组织，需开发高精度分类方法以支持早期诊断。
AI.method: 基于Keras和TensorFlow框架，采用EfficientNetB0、ResNet50等预训练CNN模型，结合迁移学习、数据增强、图像去噪、颅骨剥离等技术处理3264张2D MRI图像。
AI.result: EfficientNetB0模型在4分类任务中达到97.61%的准确率，有效区分正常与异常像素并实现肿瘤类型分类。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过优化网络架构与图像预处理流程，显著提升了脑肿瘤检测分类精度，验证了深度学习在医学影像分析中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Boyang Xue,Shoukang Hu,Junhao Xu,Mengzhe Geng,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Bayesian Neural Network Language Modeling for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音识别的贝叶斯神经网络语言建模
abstract: State-of-the-art neural network language models (NNLMs) represented by long short term memory recurrent neural networks (LSTM-RNNs) and Transformers are becoming highly complex. They are prone to overfitting and poor generalization when given limited training data. To this end, an overarching full Bayesian learning framework encompassing three methods is proposed in this paper to account for the underlying uncertainty in LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs. The uncertainty over their model parameters, choice of neural activations and hidden output representations are modeled using Bayesian, Gaussian Process and variational LSTM-RNN or Transformer LMs respectively. Efficient inference approaches were used to automatically select the optimal network internal components to be Bayesian learned using neural architecture search. A minimal number of Monte Carlo parameter samples as low as one was also used. These allow the computational costs incurred in Bayesian NNLM training and evaluation to be minimized. Experiments are conducted on two tasks: AMI meeting transcription and Oxford-BBC LipReading Sentences 2 (LRS2) overlapped speech recognition using state-of-the-art LF-MMI trained factored TDNN systems featuring data augmentation, speaker adaptation and audio-visual multi-channel beamforming for overlapped speech. Consistent performance improvements over the baseline LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs with point estimated model parameters and drop-out regularization were obtained across both tasks in terms of perplexity and word error rate (WER). In particular, on the LRS2 data, statistically significant WER reductions up to 1.3% and 1.2% absolute (12.1% and 11.3% relative) were obtained over the baseline LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs respectively after model combination between Bayesian NNLMs and their respective baselines.

They are prone to overfitting and poor generalization when given limited training data. To this end, an overarching full Bayesian learning framework encompassing three methods is proposed in this paper to account for the underlying uncertainty in LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs. The uncertainty over their model parameters, choice of neural activations and hidden output representations are modeled using Bayesian, Gaussian Process and variational LSTM-RNN or Transformer LMs respectively. Efficient inference approaches were used to automatically select the optimal network internal components to be Bayesian learned using neural architecture search. A minimal number of Monte Carlo parameter samples as low as one was also used. These allow the computational costs incurred in Bayesian NNLM training and evaluation to be minimized. Experiments are conducted on two tasks: AMI meeting transcription and Oxford-BBC LipReading Sentences 2 (LRS2) overlapped speech recognition using state-of-the-art LF-MMI trained factored TDNN systems featuring data augmentation, speaker adaptation and audio-visual multi-channel beamforming for overlapped speech. Consistent performance improvements over the baseline LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs with point estimated model parameters and drop-out regularization were obtained across both tasks in terms of perplexity and word error rate (WER). In particular, on the LRS2 data, statistically significant WER reductions up to 1.3% and 1.2% absolute (12.1% and 11.3% relative) were obtained over the baseline LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs respectively after model combination between Bayesian NNLMs and their respective baselines.
abstract_zh: 以长短期记忆递归神经网络 (LSTM-RNN) 和 Transformer 为代表的最先进的神经网络语言模型 (NNLM) 正变得高度复杂。当训练数据有限时，它们很容易出现过度拟合和泛化不良的情况。为此，本文提出了一个包含三种方法的总体完整贝叶斯学习框架，以解释 LSTM-RNN 和 Transformer LM 中潜在的不确定性。模型参数的不确定性、神经激活的选择和隐藏输出表示分别使用贝叶斯、高斯过程和变分 LSTM-RNN 或 Transformer LM 进行建模。使用有效的推理方法来自动选择要使用神经架构搜索进行贝叶斯学习的最佳网络内部组件。还使用了最少数量的蒙特卡罗参数样本，低至一个。这些使得贝叶斯 NNLM 训练和评估中产生的计算成本最小化。实验针对两项任务进行：AMI 会议转录和 Oxford-BBC LipReading Sentences 2 (LRS2) 重叠语音识别，使用最先进的 LF-MMI 训练因子 TDNN 系统，该系统具有数据增强、说话者自适应和重叠语音的视听多通道波束成形功能。就困惑度和错误率 (WER) 而言，这两项任务均在基线 LSTM-RNN 和 Transformer LM 的基础上，通过点估计模型参数和 drop-out 正则化获得了一致的性能改进。特别是，在 LRS2 数据上，在贝叶斯 NNLM 与其各自的基线之间进行模型组合后，与基线 LSTM-RNN 和 Transformer LM 相比，统计显着的 WER 分别降低了 1.3% 和 1.2% 绝对值（12.1% 和 11.3% 相对值）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯神经网络的语言模型框架，用于改进语音识别中的模型不确定性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LSTM-RNN和Transformer语言模型在数据有限时易过拟合且泛化能力差，需通过贝叶斯方法建模不确定性以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建包含贝叶斯学习、高斯过程和变分方法的框架，结合神经架构搜索与少量Monte Carlo采样，降低计算成本并优化模型结构。
AI.result: 在AMI和LRS2数据集上，相比基线模型，词错误率（WER）分别降低1.3%和1.2%（相对12.1%和11.3%），困惑度显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯神经网络语言模型有效提升语音识别性能，尤其在数据受限场景下表现突出，具有进一步研究价值。

search_text: Bayesian Neural Network Language Modeling for Speech Recognition 用于语音识别的贝叶斯神经网络语言建模 State-of-the-art neural network language models (NNLMs) represented by long short term memory recurrent neural networks (LSTM-RNNs) and Transformers are becoming highly complex. They are prone to overfitting and poor generalization when given limited training data. To this end, an overarching full Bayesian learning framework encompassing three methods is proposed in this paper to account for the underlying uncertainty in LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs. The uncertainty over their model parameters, choice of neural activations and hidden output representations are modeled using Bayesian, Gaussian Process and variational LSTM-RNN or Transformer LMs respectively. Efficient inference approaches were used to automatically select the optimal network internal components to be Bayesian learned using neural architecture search. A minimal number of Monte Carlo parameter samples as low as one was also used. These allow the computational costs incurred in Bayesian NNLM training and evaluation to be minimized. Experiments are conducted on two tasks: AMI meeting transcription and Oxford-BBC LipReading Sentences 2 (LRS2) overlapped speech recognition using state-of-the-art LF-MMI trained factored TDNN systems featuring data augmentation, speaker adaptation and audio-visual multi-channel beamforming for overlapped speech. Consistent performance improvements over the baseline LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs with point estimated model parameters and drop-out regularization were obtained across both tasks in terms of perplexity and word error rate (WER). In particular, on the LRS2 data, statistically significant WER reductions up to 1.3% and 1.2% absolute (12.1% and 11.3% relative) were obtained over the baseline LSTM-RNN and Transformer LMs respectively after model combination between Bayesian NNLMs and their respective baselines. 以长短期记忆递归神经网络 (LSTM-RNN) 和 Transformer 为代表的最先进的神经网络语言模型 (NNLM) 正变得高度复杂。当训练数据有限时，它们很容易出现过度拟合和泛化不良的情况。为此，本文提出了一个包含三种方法的总体完整贝叶斯学习框架，以解释 LSTM-RNN 和 Transformer LM 中潜在的不确定性。模型参数的不确定性、神经激活的选择和隐藏输出表示分别使用贝叶斯、高斯过程和变分 LSTM-RNN 或 Transformer LM 进行建模。使用有效的推理方法来自动选择要使用神经架构搜索进行贝叶斯学习的最佳网络内部组件。还使用了最少数量的蒙特卡罗参数样本，低至一个。这些使得贝叶斯 NNLM 训练和评估中产生的计算成本最小化。实验针对两项任务进行：AMI 会议转录和 Oxford-BBC LipReading Sentences 2 (LRS2) 重叠语音识别，使用最先进的 LF-MMI 训练因子 TDNN 系统，该系统具有数据增强、说话者自适应和重叠语音的视听多通道波束成形功能。就困惑度和错误率 (WER) 而言，这两项任务均在基线 LSTM-RNN 和 Transformer LM 的基础上，通过点估计模型参数和 drop-out 正则化获得了一致的性能改进。特别是，在 LRS2 数据上，在贝叶斯 NNLM 与其各自的基线之间进行模型组合后，与基线 LSTM-RNN 和 Transformer LM 相比，统计显着的 WER 分别降低了 1.3% 和 1.2% 绝对值（12.1% 和 11.3% 相对值）。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯神经网络的语言模型框架，用于改进语音识别中的模型不确定性和泛化能力。 Boyang Xue,Shoukang Hu,Junhao Xu,Mengzhe Geng,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: F. Keddous,H-N. Nguyen,A. Nakib
title: FFCNN: Fast FPGA based Acceleration for Convolution neural network inference
title_zh: FFCNN：基于 FPGA 的快速卷积神经网络推理加速
abstract: We present a new efficient OpenCL-based Accelerator for large scale Convolutional Neural Networks called Fast Inference on FPGAs for Convolution Neural Network (FFCNN). FFCNN is based on a deeply pipelined OpenCL kernels architecture. As pointed out before, high-level synthesis tools such as the OpenCL framework can easily port codes originally designed for CPUs and GPUs to FPGAs, but it is still difficult to make OpenCL codes run efficiently on FPGAs. This work aims to propose an efficient FPGA implementation of OpenCL High-Performance Computing Applications. To do so, a Data reuse and task mapping techniques are also presented to improve design efficiency. In addition, the following motivations were taken into account when developing FFCNN: 1) FFCNN has been designed to be easily implemented on Intel OpenCL SDK based FPGA design flow. 2) In FFFCN, different techniques have been integrated to improve the memory band with and throughput. A performance analysis is conducted on two deep CNN for Large-Scale Images classification. The obtained results, and the comparison with other works designed to accelerate the same types of architectures, show the efficiency and the competitiveness of the proposed accelerator design by significantly improved performance and resource utilization.
summary: We present a new efficient OpenCL-based Accelerator for large scale Convolutional Neural Networks called Fast Inference on FPGAs for Convolution Neural Network (FFCNN). FFCNN is based on a deeply pipelined OpenCL kernels architecture. As pointed out before, high-level synthesis tools such as the OpenCL framework can easily port codes originally designed for CPUs and GPUs to FPGAs, but it is still difficult to make OpenCL codes run efficiently on FPGAs. This work aims to propose an efficient FPGA implementation of OpenCL High-Performance Computing Applications. To do so, a Data reuse and task mapping techniques are also presented to improve design efficiency. In addition, the following motivations were taken into account when developing FFCNN: 1) FFCNN has been designed to be easily implemented on Intel OpenCL SDK based FPGA design flow. 2) In FFFCN, different techniques have been integrated to improve the memory band with and throughput. A performance analysis is conducted on two deep CNN for Large-Scale Images classification. The obtained results, and the comparison with other works designed to accelerate the same types of architectures, show the efficiency and the competitiveness of the proposed accelerator design by significantly improved performance and resource utilization.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新型高效的基于 OpenCL 的大规模卷积神经网络加速器，称为卷积神经网络 FPGA 上的快速推理 (FFCNN)。 FFCNN 基于深度流水线的 OpenCL 内核架构。正如之前指出的，OpenCL框架等高级综合工具可以轻松地将原本为CPU和GPU设计的代码移植到FPGA上，但让OpenCL代码在FPGA上高效运行仍然很困难。这项工作旨在提出 OpenCL 高性能计算应用程序的高效 FPGA 实现。为此，还提出了数据重用和任务映射技术以提高设计效率。此外，在开发 FFCNN 时还考虑了以下动机： 1) FFCNN 的设计目的是在基于 Intel OpenCL SDK 的 FPGA 设计流程上轻松实现。 2）在FFFCN中，集成了不同的技术来提高内存带宽和吞吐量。对两个深度 CNN 进行大规模图像分类的性能分析。获得的结果以及与旨在加速相同类型架构的其他工作的比较，通过显着提高的性能和资源利用率显示了所提出的加速器设计的效率和竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于OpenCL的高效FPGA加速器FFCNN，用于大规模卷积神经网络的推理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有OpenCL框架难以在FPGA上高效运行，需提升内存带宽和吞吐量，同时适配Intel OpenCL SDK设计流程。
AI.method: 采用深度流水线OpenCL内核架构，结合数据重用与任务映射技术优化设计效率，并集成至Intel FPGA开发流程。
AI.result: 在两个大型图像分类CNN模型上验证，性能和资源利用率显著优于同类加速方案。
AI.conclusion: FFCNN通过架构优化与技术集成，证明了其在FPGA上加速CNN推理的有效性与竞争力。

authors_text: Sergio Altares-López,Juan José García-Ripoll,Angela Ribeiro
title: AutoQML: Automatic Generation and Training of Robust Quantum-Inspired Classifiers by Using Genetic Algorithms on Grayscale Images
title_zh: AutoQML：通过在灰度图像上使用遗传算法自动生成和训练鲁棒的量子启发分类器
comment: Submitted for review on the 7th of June 2022
comments: Submitted for review on the 7th of June 2022
abstract: We propose a new hybrid system for automatically generating and training quantum-inspired classifiers on grayscale images by using multiobjective genetic algorithms. We define a dynamic fitness function to obtain the smallest possible circuit and highest accuracy on unseen data, ensuring that the proposed technique is generalizable and robust. We minimize the complexity of the generated circuits in terms of the number of entanglement gates by penalizing their appearance. We reduce the size of the images with two dimensionality reduction approaches: principal component analysis (PCA), which is encoded in the individual for optimization purpose, and a small convolutional autoencoder (CAE). These two methods are compared with one another and with a classical nonlinear approach to understand their behaviors and to ensure that the classification ability is due to the quantum circuit and not the preprocessing technique used for dimensionality reduction.
summary: We propose a new hybrid system for automatically generating and training quantum-inspired classifiers on grayscale images by using multiobjective genetic algorithms. We define a dynamic fitness function to obtain the smallest possible circuit and highest accuracy on unseen data, ensuring that the proposed technique is generalizable and robust. We minimize the complexity of the generated circuits in terms of the number of entanglement gates by penalizing their appearance. We reduce the size of the images with two dimensionality reduction approaches: principal component analysis (PCA), which is encoded in the individual for optimization purpose, and a small convolutional autoencoder (CAE). These two methods are compared with one another and with a classical nonlinear approach to understand their behaviors and to ensure that the classification ability is due to the quantum circuit and not the preprocessing technique used for dimensionality reduction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的混合系统，通过使用多目标遗传算法在灰度图像上自动生成和训练量子启发的分类器。我们定义了一个动态适应度函数，以获得尽可能小的电路和对未见过的数据的最高准确度，确保所提出的技术具有通用性和鲁棒性。我们通过惩罚它们的外观来最小化生成电路的复杂性（就纠缠门的数量而言）。我们通过两种降维方法来减小图像的大小：主成分分析（PCA）（出于优化目的而在个体中进行编码）和小型卷积自动编码器（CAE）。将这两种方法相互比较，并与经典非线性方法进行比较，以了解它们的行为并确保分类能力归因于量子电路，而不是用于降维的预处理技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多目标遗传算法的混合系统，用于自动生成和训练量子启发分类器，以处理灰度图像。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过量子电路设计提高分类器的鲁棒性和泛化能力，同时减少电路复杂度，并验证分类性能是否源自量子电路本身而非预处理技术。
AI.method: 采用多目标遗传算法优化量子电路结构，结合动态适应度函数最小化纠缠门数量；通过PCA和卷积自编码器（CAE）两种降维方法处理图像，并与经典非线性方法对比分析。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成高效且准确的量子启发分类器，且分类能力主要依赖于量子电路而非预处理技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为自动设计量子机器学习模型提供了可行方案，验证了量子电路在图像分类中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多目标遗传算法的混合系统，用于自动生成和训练量子启发分类器，以处理灰度图像。
ai_content.motivation: 旨在通过量子电路设计提高分类器的鲁棒性和泛化能力，同时减少电路复杂度，并验证分类性能是否源自量子电路本身而非预处理技术。
ai_content.method: 采用多目标遗传算法优化量子电路结构，结合动态适应度函数最小化纠缠门数量；通过PCA和卷积自编码器（CAE）两种降维方法处理图像，并与经典非线性方法对比分析。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法能生成高效且准确的量子启发分类器，且分类能力主要依赖于量子电路而非预处理技术。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的方法为自动设计量子机器学习模型提供了可行方案，验证了量子电路在图像分类中的有效性。

search_text: AutoQML: Automatic Generation and Training of Robust Quantum-Inspired Classifiers by Using Genetic Algorithms on Grayscale Images AutoQML：通过在灰度图像上使用遗传算法自动生成和训练鲁棒的量子启发分类器 We propose a new hybrid system for automatically generating and training quantum-inspired classifiers on grayscale images by using multiobjective genetic algorithms. We define a dynamic fitness function to obtain the smallest possible circuit and highest accuracy on unseen data, ensuring that the proposed technique is generalizable and robust. We minimize the complexity of the generated circuits in terms of the number of entanglement gates by penalizing their appearance. We reduce the size of the images with two dimensionality reduction approaches: principal component analysis (PCA), which is encoded in the individual for optimization purpose, and a small convolutional autoencoder (CAE). These two methods are compared with one another and with a classical nonlinear approach to understand their behaviors and to ensure that the classification ability is due to the quantum circuit and not the preprocessing technique used for dimensionality reduction. 我们提出了一种新的混合系统，通过使用多目标遗传算法在灰度图像上自动生成和训练量子启发的分类器。我们定义了一个动态适应度函数，以获得尽可能小的电路和对未见过的数据的最高准确度，确保所提出的技术具有通用性和鲁棒性。我们通过惩罚它们的外观来最小化生成电路的复杂性（就纠缠门的数量而言）。我们通过两种降维方法来减小图像的大小：主成分分析（PCA）（出于优化目的而在个体中进行编码）和小型卷积自动编码器（CAE）。将这两种方法相互比较，并与经典非线性方法进行比较，以了解它们的行为并确保分类能力归因于量子电路，而不是用于降维的预处理技术。 本文提出一种基于多目标遗传算法的混合系统，用于自动生成和训练量子启发分类器，以处理灰度图像。 Sergio Altares-López,Juan José García-Ripoll,Angela Ribeiro quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Wei Yin,Jianming Zhang,Oliver Wang,Simon Niklaus,Simon Chen,Yifan Liu,Chunhua Shen
title: Towards Accurate Reconstruction of 3D Scene Shape from A Single Monocular Image
title_zh: 从单个单目图像精确重建 3D 场景形状
comment: 20 pages. Journal version of the conference paper "Learning to Recover 3D Scene Shape from a Single Image". arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.09365
comments: 20 pages. Journal version of the conference paper "Learning to Recover 3D Scene Shape from a Single Image". arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.09365
abstract: Despite significant progress made in the past few years, challenges remain for depth estimation using a single monocular image. First, it is nontrivial to train a metric-depth prediction model that can generalize well to diverse scenes mainly due to limited training data. Thus, researchers have built large-scale relative depth datasets that are much easier to collect. However, existing relative depth estimation models often fail to recover accurate 3D scene shapes due to the unknown depth shift caused by training with the relative depth data. We tackle this problem here and attempt to estimate accurate scene shapes by training on large-scale relative depth data, and estimating the depth shift. To do so, we propose a two-stage framework that first predicts depth up to an unknown scale and shift from a single monocular image, and then exploits 3D point cloud data to predict the depth shift and the camera's focal length that allow us to recover 3D scene shapes. As the two modules are trained separately, we do not need strictly paired training data. In addition, we propose an image-level normalized regression loss and a normal-based geometry loss to improve training with relative depth annotation. We test our depth model on nine unseen datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance on zero-shot evaluation. Code is available at: https://git.io/Depth
summary: Despite significant progress made in the past few years, challenges remain for depth estimation using a single monocular image. First, it is nontrivial to train a metric-depth prediction model that can generalize well to diverse scenes mainly due to limited training data. Thus, researchers have built large-scale relative depth datasets that are much easier to collect. However, existing relative depth estimation models often fail to recover accurate 3D scene shapes due to the unknown depth shift caused by training with the relative depth data. We tackle this problem here and attempt to estimate accurate scene shapes by training on large-scale relative depth data, and estimating the depth shift. To do so, we propose a two-stage framework that first predicts depth up to an unknown scale and shift from a single monocular image, and then exploits 3D point cloud data to predict the depth shift and the camera's focal length that allow us to recover 3D scene shapes. As the two modules are trained separately, we do not need strictly paired training data. In addition, we propose an image-level normalized regression loss and a normal-based geometry loss to improve training with relative depth annotation. We test our depth model on nine unseen datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance on zero-shot evaluation. Code is available at: https://git.io/Depth
abstract_zh: 尽管过去几年取得了重大进展，但使用单个单目图像进行深度估计仍然面临挑战。首先，训练一个能够很好地推广到不同场景的度量深度预测模型并不简单，这主要是由于训练数据有限。因此，研究人员建立了更容易收集的大规模相对深度数据集。然而，由于使用相对深度数据进行训练导致未知的深度偏移，现有的相对深度估计模型通常无法恢复准确的 3D 场景形状。我们在这里解决这个问题，并尝试通过大规模相对深度数据的训练并估计深度偏移来估计准确的场景形状。为此，我们提出了一个两阶段框架，首先预测未知尺度的深度和单个单眼图像的偏移，然后利用 3D 点云数据来预测深度​​偏移和相机焦距，从而使我们能够恢复 3D 场景形状。由于这两个模块是单独训练的，因此我们不需要严格配对的训练数据。此外，我们提出了图像级归一化回归损失和基于法线的几何损失，以改进相对深度注释的训练。我们在九个未见过的数据集上测试了我们的深度模型，并在零样本评估中实现了最先进的性能。代码位于：https://git.io/Depth

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过单目图像准确重建3D场景形状，解决单目深度估计中的深度偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于相对深度数据的模型因训练数据缺乏绝对深度信息，难以恢复准确的3D场景形状。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段预测未知尺度和偏移的深度，第二阶段利用点云数据估计深度偏移和相机焦距，并设计归一化回归损失和法线几何损失。
AI.result: 在九个未见过的数据集上实现零样本评估的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离训练模块和引入新损失函数，有效解决了相对深度数据导致的深度偏移问题。

authors_text: Jiayi Xu,Shunsuke Yoshimoto,Naoto Ienaga,Yoshihiro Kuroda
title: Intensity-Adjustable Non-contact Cold Sensation Presentation Based on the Vortex Effect
title_zh: 基于涡旋效应的强度可调非接触冷感呈现
abstract: Cold sensations of varying intensities are perceived when human skin is subject to diverse environments. The accurate presentation of temperature changes is important to elicit immersive sensations in applications such as virtual reality. We developed a method to elicit intensity-adjustable non-contact cold sensations based on the vortex effect. We applied this effect to generate cold air at approximately 0 °C and varied the skin temperature over a wide range. The perception of different temperatures can be elicited by adjusting the volume flow rate of the cold air. Additionally, we introduced a cooling model to relate the changes in skin temperature to various parameters such as the cold air volume flow rate and distance from the cold air outlet to the skin. For validation, we conducted measurement experiments and found that our model can estimate the change in skin temperature with a root mean-square error of 0.16 °C. Furthermore, we evaluated the performance of a prototype in psychophysical cold discrimination experiments based on the discrimination threshold. Thus, cold sensations of varying intensities can be generated by varying the parameters. These cold sensations can be combined with images, sounds, and other stimuli to create an immersive and realistic artificial environment.
summary: Cold sensations of varying intensities are perceived when human skin is subject to diverse environments. The accurate presentation of temperature changes is important to elicit immersive sensations in applications such as virtual reality. We developed a method to elicit intensity-adjustable non-contact cold sensations based on the vortex effect. We applied this effect to generate cold air at approximately 0 °C and varied the skin temperature over a wide range. The perception of different temperatures can be elicited by adjusting the volume flow rate of the cold air. Additionally, we introduced a cooling model to relate the changes in skin temperature to various parameters such as the cold air volume flow rate and distance from the cold air outlet to the skin. For validation, we conducted measurement experiments and found that our model can estimate the change in skin temperature with a root mean-square error of 0.16 °C. Furthermore, we evaluated the performance of a prototype in psychophysical cold discrimination experiments based on the discrimination threshold. Thus, cold sensations of varying intensities can be generated by varying the parameters. These cold sensations can be combined with images, sounds, and other stimuli to create an immersive and realistic artificial environment.
abstract_zh: 当人体皮肤处于不同的环境中时，会感受到不同强度的冷感。温度变化的准确呈现对于在虚拟现实等应用中引发身临其境的感觉非常重要。我们开发了一种基于涡流效应引发强度可调的非接触式冷感觉的方法。我们应用这种效应来产生大约 0°C 的冷空气，并在很大范围内改变皮肤温度。通过调节冷空气的体积流量可以引发不同温度的感知。此外，我们引入了一个冷却模型，将皮肤温度的变化与各种参数（例如冷风体积流量和冷风出口到皮肤的距离）联系起来。为了验证，我们进行了测量实验，发现我们的模型可以估计皮肤温度的变化，均方根误差为 0.16 °C。此外，我们还根据辨别阈值评估了原型在心理物理冷辨别实验中的性能。因此，可以通过改变参数来产生不同强度的冷感。这些寒冷的感觉可以与图像、声音和其他刺激相结合，创造出身临其境的、逼真的人工环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于涡流效应的非接触式可调强度冷感呈现方法。
AI.motivation: 在虚拟现实等应用中，精确呈现温度变化对产生沉浸感非常重要，因此需要一种可以调节强度的非接触式冷感呈现方法。
AI.method: 利用涡流效应生成约0°C的冷空气，并通过调节冷空气的体积流量和距离等参数来改变皮肤温度，同时引入冷却模型进行验证。
AI.result: 实验测量表明，模型可以以均方根误差0.16°C估计皮肤温度变化，并在心理物理冷感辨别实验中验证了原型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过调节参数可以生成不同强度的冷感，这些冷感可以与图像、声音等其他刺激结合，创造沉浸式和逼真的虚拟环境。

Furthermore, we evaluated the performance of a prototype in psychophysical cold discrimination experiments based on the discrimination threshold. Thus, cold sensations of varying intensities can be generated by varying the parameters. These cold sensations can be combined with images, sounds, and other stimuli to create an immersive and realistic artificial environment. 当人体皮肤处于不同的环境中时，会感受到不同强度的冷感。温度变化的准确呈现对于在虚拟现实等应用中引发身临其境的感觉非常重要。我们开发了一种基于涡流效应引发强度可调的非接触式冷感觉的方法。我们应用这种效应来产生大约 0°C 的冷空气，并在很大范围内改变皮肤温度。通过调节冷空气的体积流量可以引发不同温度的感知。此外，我们引入了一个冷却模型，将皮肤温度的变化与各种参数（例如冷风体积流量和冷风出口到皮肤的距离）联系起来。为了验证，我们进行了测量实验，发现我们的模型可以估计皮肤温度的变化，均方根误差为 0.16 °C。此外，我们还根据辨别阈值评估了原型在心理物理冷辨别实验中的性能。因此，可以通过改变参数来产生不同强度的冷感。这些寒冷的感觉可以与图像、声音和其他刺激相结合，创造出身临其境的、逼真的人工环境。 本文提出了一种基于涡流效应的非接触式可调强度冷感呈现方法。 Jiayi Xu,Shunsuke Yoshimoto,Naoto Ienaga,Yoshihiro Kuroda cs.HC

authors_text: Moeen Ali Naqvi,Sehrish Malik,Merve Astekin,Leon Moonen
title: On Evaluating Self-Adaptive and Self-Healing Systems using Chaos Engineering
title_zh: 利用混沌工程评估自适应和自愈系统
abstract: With the growing adoption of self-adaptive systems in various domains, there is an increasing need for strategies to assess their correct behavior. In particular self-healing systems, which aim to provide resilience and fault-tolerance, often deal with unanticipated failures in critical and highly dynamic environments. Their reactive and complex behavior makes it challenging to assess if these systems execute according to the desired goals. Recently, several studies have expressed concern about the lack of systematic evaluation methods for self-healing behavior. In this paper, we propose CHESS, an approach for the systematic evaluation of self-adaptive and self-healing systems that builds on chaos engineering. Chaos engineering is a methodology for subjecting a system to unexpected conditions and scenarios. It has shown great promise in helping developers build resilient microservice architectures and cyber-physical systems. CHESS turns this idea around by using chaos engineering to evaluate how well a self-healing system can withstand such perturbations. We investigate the viability of this approach through an exploratory study on a self-healing smart office environment. The study helps us explore the promises and limitations of the approach, as well as identify directions where additional work is needed. We conclude with a summary of lessons learned.
summary: With the growing adoption of self-adaptive systems in various domains, there is an increasing need for strategies to assess their correct behavior. In particular self-healing systems, which aim to provide resilience and fault-tolerance, often deal with unanticipated failures in critical and highly dynamic environments. Their reactive and complex behavior makes it challenging to assess if these systems execute according to the desired goals. Recently, several studies have expressed concern about the lack of systematic evaluation methods for self-healing behavior. In this paper, we propose CHESS, an approach for the systematic evaluation of self-adaptive and self-healing systems that builds on chaos engineering. Chaos engineering is a methodology for subjecting a system to unexpected conditions and scenarios. It has shown great promise in helping developers build resilient microservice architectures and cyber-physical systems. CHESS turns this idea around by using chaos engineering to evaluate how well a self-healing system can withstand such perturbations. We investigate the viability of this approach through an exploratory study on a self-healing smart office environment. The study helps us explore the promises and limitations of the approach, as well as identify directions where additional work is needed. We conclude with a summary of lessons learned.
abstract_zh: 随着各个领域越来越多地采用自适应系统，越来越需要评估其正确行为的策略。特别是旨在提供弹性和容错能力的自愈系统，通常会处理关键和高度动态环境中的意外故障。它们的反应性和复杂行为使得评估这些系统是否按照预期目标执行具有挑战性。最近，一些研究对缺乏自愈行为的系统评估方法表示担忧。在本文中，我们提出了 CHESS，一种基于混沌工程的自适应和自愈系统的系统评估方法。混沌工程是一种使系统承受意外条件和场景的方法。它在帮助开发人员构建弹性微服务架构和网络物理系统方面展现出了巨大的前景。 CHESS 通过使用混沌工程来评估自我修复系统承受此类扰动的能力，从而扭转了这一想法。我们通过对自我修复智能办公环境的探索性研究来调查这种方法的可行性。这项研究帮助我们探索该方法的前景和局限性，并确定需要额外工作的方向。最后我们总结了经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHESS方法，利用混沌工程系统评估自适应和自愈系统的有效性。
AI.motivation: 自愈系统在复杂动态环境中应对未预见故障的能力难以系统评估，现有方法存在不足。
AI.method: 基于混沌工程原理设计CHESS框架，在智能办公环境进行探索性实验验证方法可行性。
AI.result: 实验验证了CHESS方法的有效性，同时揭示了其在特定场景下的局限性及需改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 混沌工程为评估自愈系统提供了新思路，但需进一步完善评估维度和实验场景覆盖范围。

authors_text: Kun Jiang,Yining Shi,Benny Wijaya,Mengmeng Yang,Tuopu Wen,Zhongyang Xiao,Diange Yang
title: Map Container: A Map-based Framework for Cooperative Perception
title_zh: 地图容器：基于地图的协作感知框架
abstract: The idea of cooperative perception is to benefit from shared perception data between multiple vehicles and overcome the limitations of on-board sensors on single vehicle. However, the fusion of multi-vehicle information is still challenging due to inaccurate localization, limited communication bandwidth and ambiguous fusion. Past practices simplify the problem by placing a precise GNSS localization system, manually specify the number of connected vehicles and determine the fusion strategy. This paper proposes a map-based cooperative perception framework, named map container, to improve the accuracy and robustness of cooperative perception, which ultimately overcomes this problem. The concept 'Map Container' denotes that the map serves as the platform to transform all information into the map coordinate space automatically and incorporate different sources of information in a distributed fusion architecture. In the proposed map container, the GNSS signal and the matching relationship between sensor feature and map feature are considered to optimize the estimation of environment states. Evaluation on simulation dataset and real-vehicle platform result validates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: The idea of cooperative perception is to benefit from shared perception data between multiple vehicles and overcome the limitations of on-board sensors on single vehicle. However, the fusion of multi-vehicle information is still challenging due to inaccurate localization, limited communication bandwidth and ambiguous fusion. Past practices simplify the problem by placing a precise GNSS localization system, manually specify the number of connected vehicles and determine the fusion strategy. This paper proposes a map-based cooperative perception framework, named map container, to improve the accuracy and robustness of cooperative perception, which ultimately overcomes this problem. The concept 'Map Container' denotes that the map serves as the platform to transform all information into the map coordinate space automatically and incorporate different sources of information in a distributed fusion architecture. In the proposed map container, the GNSS signal and the matching relationship between sensor feature and map feature are considered to optimize the estimation of environment states. Evaluation on simulation dataset and real-vehicle platform result validates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 协同感知的思想是受益于多辆车之间共享的感知数据，并克服单车上车载传感器的局限性。然而，由于定位不准确、通信带宽有限和融合模糊，多车辆信息的融合仍然具有挑战性。过去的做法通过放置精确的 GNSS 定位系统、手动指定联网车辆的数量并确定融合策略来简化问题。本文提出了一种基于地图的协作感知框架，称为地图容器，以提高协作感知的准确性和鲁棒性，最终克服了这个问题。 “地图容器”的概念是指以地图为平台，将所有信息自动转换到地图坐标空间中，并将不同来源的信息整合到分布式融合架构中。在所提出的地图容器中，考虑了 GNSS 信号以及传感器特征与地图特征之间的匹配关系，以优化环境状态的估计。仿真数据集和实车平台结果的评估验证了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于地图的协作感知框架'Map Container'，通过将多车感知信息统一到地图坐标空间以提升协作感知的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有协作感知方法依赖精确GNSS定位、手动指定连接车辆数量及预设融合策略，难以应对定位误差、通信带宽限制及融合策略模糊等挑战。
AI.method: 构建'地图容器'框架，以地图为平台自动转换多源信息至统一坐标空间，并采用分布式融合架构结合GNSS信号与传感器-地图特征匹配优化环境状态估计。
AI.result: 在仿真数据集和真实车辆平台的评估验证了所提方法的有效性，显著提升了协作感知性能。
AI.conclusion: 地图容器框架通过地图坐标对齐与分布式融合机制，有效解决了多车协作感知中的定位误差和融合策略模糊问题，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Thomas Weissmann,Yixing Huang,Stefan Fischer,Johannes Roesch,Sina Mansoorian,Horacio Ayala Gaona,Antoniu-Oreste Gostian,Markus Hecht,Sebastian Lettmaier,Lisa Deloch,Benjamin Frey,Udo S. Gaipl,Luitpold V. Distel,Andreas Maier,Heinrich Iro,Sabine Semrau,Christoph Bert,Rainer Fietkau,Florian Putz
title: Deep learning for automatic head and neck lymph node level delineation provides expert-level accuracy
title_zh: 自动头颈淋巴结水平描绘的深度学习可提供专家级的准确性
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, published in Frontiers in Oncology
comments: 14 pages, 6 figures, published in Frontiers in Oncology
abstract: Background: Deep learning (DL)-based head and neck lymph node level (HN_LNL) autodelineation is of high relevance to radiotherapy research and clinical treatment planning but still underinvestigated in academic literature. Methods: An expert-delineated cohort of 35 planning CTs was used for training of an nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble model for autosegmentation of 20 different HN_LNL. A second cohort acquired at the same institution later in time served as the test set (n=20). In a completely blinded evaluation, 3 clinical experts rated the quality of DL autosegmentations in a head-to-head comparison with expert-created contours. For a subgroup of 10 cases, intraobserver variability was compared to the average DL autosegmentation accuracy on the original and recontoured set of expert segmentations. A postprocessing step to adjust craniocaudal boundaries of level autosegmentations to the CT slice plane was introduced and the effect on geometric accuracy and expert rating was investigated. Results: Blinded expert ratings for DL segmentations and expert-created contours were not significantly different. DL segmentations with slice plane adjustment were rated numerically higher (mean, 81.0 vs. 79.6,p=0.185) and DL segmentations without slice plane adjustment were rated numerically lower (77.2 vs. 79.6,p=0.167) than manually drawn contours. DL segmentations with CT slice plane adjustment were rated significantly better than DL contours without slice plane adjustment (81.0 vs. 77.2,p=0.004). Geometric accuracy of DL segmentations was not different from intraobserver variability (mean, 0.76 vs. 0.77, p=0.307). Conclusions: We show that a nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble model can be used for highly accurate autodelineation of HN_LNL using only a limited training dataset that is ideally suited for large-scale standardized autodelineation of HN_LNL in the research setting.

DL segmentations with CT slice plane adjustment were rated significantly better than DL contours without slice plane adjustment (81.0 vs. 77.2,p=0.004). Geometric accuracy of DL segmentations was not different from intraobserver variability (mean, 0.76 vs. 0.77, p=0.307). Conclusions: We show that a nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble model can be used for highly accurate autodelineation of HN_LNL using only a limited training dataset that is ideally suited for large-scale standardized autodelineation of HN_LNL in the research setting.
abstract_zh: 背景：基于深度学习（DL）的头颈淋巴结水平（HN_LNL）自动描绘与放射治疗研究和临床治疗计划高度相关，但在学术文献中仍缺乏研究。方法：使用专家指定的 35 个计划 CT 队列来训练 nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble 模型，以自动分割 20 个不同的 HN_LNL。后来在同一机构获得的第二组作为测试集（n=20）。在完全盲法评估中，3 位临床专家通过与专家创建的轮廓进行头对头比较，对 DL 自动分割的质量进行了评估。对于 10 个病例的亚组，将观察者内的变异性与原始专家分割集和重新轮廓集的专家分割的平均 DL 自动分割精度进行比较。引入了将水平自动分割的头尾边界调整到 CT 切片平面的后处理步骤，并研究了其对几何精度和专家评分的影响。结果：盲法专家对 DL 分割和专家创建的轮廓的评分没有显着差异。与手动绘制的轮廓相比，具有切片平面调整的 DL 分割的评分较高（平均值为 81.0 vs. 79.6，p=0.185），而没有切片平面调整的 DL 分割的评分较低（平均值为 77.2 vs. 79.6，p=0.167）。具有 CT 切片平面调整的 DL 分割的评分显着优于未进行切片平面调整的 DL 轮廓（81.0 与 77.2，p=0.004）。深度学习分割的几何精度与观察者内部变异性没有差异（平均值，0.76 vs. 0.77，p=0.307）。结论：我们表明，nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble 模型可用于仅使用有限的训练数据集对 HN_LNL 进行高精度自动描绘，非常适合在研究环境中对 HN_LNL 进行大规模标准化自动描绘。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习模型实现头颈淋巴结区域的自动勾勒，并验证其达到专家水平的准确性。
AI.motivation: 头颈淋巴结自动勾勒对放射治疗规划至关重要，但现有研究缺乏高效且准确的自动方法，需开发标准化工具以提升临床效率。
AI.method: 基于35例专家标注的CT数据训练nnU-net 3D/2D模型，使用20例独立测试集进行盲法专家评分，比较DL结果与人工勾勒的差异，并评估切片平面调整对精度的影响。
AI.result: DL分割与专家勾勒在评分上无显著差异，调整CT切片平面后DL评分显著提升（81.0 vs. 77.2，p=0.004），几何精度与专家内观测变异性相当（0.76 vs. 0.77）。
AI.conclusion: nnU-net模型可利用有限数据实现头颈淋巴结高精度自动勾勒，适用于大规模标准化研究与临床实践。

search_text: Deep learning for automatic head and neck lymph node level delineation provides expert-level accuracy 自动头颈淋巴结水平描绘的深度学习可提供专家级的准确性 Background: Deep learning (DL)-based head and neck lymph node level (HN_LNL) autodelineation is of high relevance to radiotherapy research and clinical treatment planning but still underinvestigated in academic literature. Methods: An expert-delineated cohort of 35 planning CTs was used for training of an nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble model for autosegmentation of 20 different HN_LNL. A second cohort acquired at the same institution later in time served as the test set (n=20). In a completely blinded evaluation, 3 clinical experts rated the quality of DL autosegmentations in a head-to-head comparison with expert-created contours. For a subgroup of 10 cases, intraobserver variability was compared to the average DL autosegmentation accuracy on the original and recontoured set of expert segmentations. A postprocessing step to adjust craniocaudal boundaries of level autosegmentations to the CT slice plane was introduced and the effect on geometric accuracy and expert rating was investigated. Results: Blinded expert ratings for DL segmentations and expert-created contours were not significantly different. DL segmentations with slice plane adjustment were rated numerically higher (mean, 81.0 vs. 79.6,p=0.185) and DL segmentations without slice plane adjustment were rated numerically lower (77.2 vs. 79.6,p=0.167) than manually drawn contours. DL segmentations with CT slice plane adjustment were rated significantly better than DL contours without slice plane adjustment (81.0 vs. 77.2,p=0.004). Geometric accuracy of DL segmentations was not different from intraobserver variability (mean, 0.76 vs. 0.77, p=0.307). Conclusions: We show that a nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble model can be used for highly accurate autodelineation of HN_LNL using only a limited training dataset that is ideally suited for large-scale standardized autodelineation of HN_LNL in the research setting. 背景：基于深度学习（DL）的头颈淋巴结水平（HN_LNL）自动描绘与放射治疗研究和临床治疗计划高度相关，但在学术文献中仍缺乏研究。方法：使用专家指定的 35 个计划 CT 队列来训练 nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble 模型，以自动分割 20 个不同的 HN_LNL。后来在同一机构获得的第二组作为测试集（n=20）。在完全盲法评估中，3 位临床专家通过与专家创建的轮廓进行头对头比较，对 DL 自动分割的质量进行了评估。对于 10 个病例的亚组，将观察者内的变异性与原始专家分割集和重新轮廓集的专家分割的平均 DL 自动分割精度进行比较。引入了将水平自动分割的头尾边界调整到 CT 切片平面的后处理步骤，并研究了其对几何精度和专家评分的影响。结果：盲法专家对 DL 分割和专家创建的轮廓的评分没有显着差异。与手动绘制的轮廓相比，具有切片平面调整的 DL 分割的评分较高（平均值为 81.0 vs. 79.6，p=0.185），而没有切片平面调整的 DL 分割的评分较低（平均值为 77.2 vs. 79.6，p=0.167）。具有 CT 切片平面调整的 DL 分割的评分显着优于未进行切片平面调整的 DL 轮廓（81.0 与 77.2，p=0.004）。深度学习分割的几何精度与观察者内部变异性没有差异（平均值，0.76 vs. 0.77，p=0.307）。结论：我们表明，nnU-net 3D-fullres/2D-ensemble 模型可用于仅使用有限的训练数据集对 HN_LNL 进行高精度自动描绘，非常适合在研究环境中对 HN_LNL 进行大规模标准化自动描绘。 本研究利用深度学习模型实现头颈淋巴结区域的自动勾勒，并验证其达到专家水平的准确性。 Thomas Weissmann,Yixing Huang,Stefan Fischer,Johannes Roesch,Sina Mansoorian,Horacio Ayala Gaona,Antoniu-Oreste Gostian,Markus Hecht,Sebastian Lettmaier,Lisa Deloch,Benjamin Frey,Udo S. authors_text: Lucas Böttcher,Gregory Wheeler
title: Visualizing high-dimensional loss landscapes with Hessian directions
title_zh: 使用 Hessian 方向可视化高维损失景观
abstract: Analyzing geometric properties of high-dimensional loss functions, such as local curvature and the existence of other optima around a certain point in loss space, can help provide a better understanding of the interplay between neural network structure, implementation attributes, and learning performance. In this work, we combine concepts from high-dimensional probability and differential geometry to study how curvature properties in lower-dimensional loss representations depend on those in the original loss space. We show that saddle points in the original space are rarely correctly identified as such in expected lower-dimensional representations if random projections are used. The principal curvature in the expected lower-dimensional representation is proportional to the mean curvature in the original loss space. Hence, the mean curvature in the original loss space determines if saddle points appear, on average, as either minima, maxima, or almost flat regions. We use the connection between expected curvature in random projections and mean curvature in the original space (i.e., the normalized Hessian trace) to compute Hutchinson-type trace estimates without calculating Hessian-vector products as in the original Hutchinson method. Because random projections are not suitable to correctly identify saddle information, we propose to study projections along dominant Hessian directions that are associated with the largest and smallest principal curvatures. We connect our findings to the ongoing debate on loss landscape flatness and generalizability. Finally, for different common image classifiers and a function approximator, we show and compare random and Hessian projections of loss landscapes with up to about $7\times 10^6$ parameters.
summary: Analyzing geometric properties of high-dimensional loss functions, such as local curvature and the existence of other optima around a certain point in loss space, can help provide a better understanding of the interplay between neural network structure, implementation attributes, and learning performance. In this work, we combine concepts from high-dimensional probability and differential geometry to study how curvature properties in lower-dimensional loss representations depend on those in the original loss space. We show that saddle points in the original space are rarely correctly identified as such in expected lower-dimensional representations if random projections are used. The principal curvature in the expected lower-dimensional representation is proportional to the mean curvature in the original loss space. Hence, the mean curvature in the original loss space determines if saddle points appear, on average, as either minima, maxima, or almost flat regions. We use the connection between expected curvature in random projections and mean curvature in the original space (i.e., the normalized Hessian trace) to compute Hutchinson-type trace estimates without calculating Hessian-vector products as in the original Hutchinson method. Because random projections are not suitable to correctly identify saddle information, we propose to study projections along dominant Hessian directions that are associated with the largest and smallest principal curvatures. We connect our findings to the ongoing debate on loss landscape flatness and generalizability. Finally, for different common image classifiers and a function approximator, we show and compare random and Hessian projections of loss landscapes with up to about $7\times 10^6$ parameters.
abstract_zh: 分析高维损失函数的几何特性，例如局部曲率以及损失空间中某个点周围是否存在其他最优值，可以帮助更好地理解神经网络结构、实现属性和学习性能之间的相互作用。在这项工作中，我们结合了高维概率和微分几何的概念来研究低维损失表示中的曲率特性如何依赖于原始损失空间中的曲率特性。我们表明，如果使用随机投影，原始空间中的鞍点很少在预期的低维表示中被正确识别。预期低维表示中的主曲率与原始损失空间中的平均曲率成正比。因此，原始损失空间中的平均曲率决定鞍点平均是否显示为最小值、最大值或几乎平坦的区域。我们使用随机投影中的预期曲率与原始空间中的平均曲率（即归一化的 Hessian 迹）之间的联系来计算 Hutchinson 型迹估计，而无需像原始 Hutchinson 方法那样计算 Hessian 向量积。由于随机投影不适合正确识别鞍座信息，因此我们建议研究沿与最大和最小主曲率相关的主导 Hessian 方向的投影。我们将我们的发现与正在进行的关于损失景观平坦性和普遍性的争论联系起来。最后，对于不同的常见图像分类器和函数逼近器，我们展示并比较了损失景观的随机和 Hessian 投影，参数高达约 $7\times 10^6$。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过研究高维损失函数的曲率特性，利用海森方向而非随机投影来更准确地可视化高维损失景观。
AI.motivation: 高维损失函数的几何特性（如曲率和局部极值）对理解神经网络结构与学习性能的关系至关重要。传统随机投影方法难以准确识别原始空间中的鞍点，需改进方法。
AI.method: 结合高维概率与微分几何，分析随机投影下低维损失表示的曲率与原空间的关系。利用海森矩阵的主曲率方向进行投影，避免计算海森向量积，提出基于归一化海森迹的曲率估计方法。
AI.result: 随机投影无法准确识别鞍点，而主曲率方向投影能有效区分极小值、极大值或平坦区域。实验显示该方法适用于多种图像分类器和函数逼近器，参数量达7×10⁶。
AI.conclusion: 海森方向投影比随机投影更可靠，揭示了损失景观平坦性与泛化能力的关联，为优化算法设计提供几何洞察。

Because random projections are not suitable to correctly identify saddle information, we propose to study projections along dominant Hessian directions that are associated with the largest and smallest principal curvatures. We connect our findings to the ongoing debate on loss landscape flatness and generalizability. Finally, for different common image classifiers and a function approximator, we show and compare random and Hessian projections of loss landscapes with up to about $7\times 10^6$ parameters. 分析高维损失函数的几何特性，例如局部曲率以及损失空间中某个点周围是否存在其他最优值，可以帮助更好地理解神经网络结构、实现属性和学习性能之间的相互作用。在这项工作中，我们结合了高维概率和微分几何的概念来研究低维损失表示中的曲率特性如何依赖于原始损失空间中的曲率特性。我们表明，如果使用随机投影，原始空间中的鞍点很少在预期的低维表示中被正确识别。预期低维表示中的主曲率与原始损失空间中的平均曲率成正比。因此，原始损失空间中的平均曲率决定鞍点平均是否显示为最小值、最大值或几乎平坦的区域。我们使用随机投影中的预期曲率与原始空间中的平均曲率（即归一化的 Hessian 迹）之间的联系来计算 Hutchinson 型迹估计，而无需像原始 Hutchinson 方法那样计算 Hessian 向量积。由于随机投影不适合正确识别鞍座信息，因此我们建议研究沿与最大和最小主曲率相关的主导 Hessian 方向的投影。我们将我们的发现与正在进行的关于损失景观平坦性和普遍性的争论联系起来。最后，对于不同的常见图像分类器和函数逼近器，我们展示并比较了损失景观的随机和 Hessian 投影，参数高达约 $7\times 10^6$。 本文旨在通过研究高维损失函数的曲率特性，利用海森方向而非随机投影来更准确地可视化高维损失景观。 Lucas Böttcher,Gregory Wheeler cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.CO,stat.ML

authors_text: Miao Cheng,Xinge You
title: Leachable Component Clustering
title_zh: 可浸出成分聚类
abstract: Clustering attempts to partition data instances into several distinctive groups, while the similarities among data belonging to the common partition can be principally reserved. Furthermore, incomplete data frequently occurs in many realworld applications, and brings perverse influence on pattern analysis. As a consequence, the specific solutions to data imputation and handling are developed to conduct the missing values of data, and independent stage of knowledge exploitation is absorbed for information understanding. In this work, a novel approach to clustering of incomplete data, termed leachable component clustering, is proposed. Rather than existing methods, the proposed method handles data imputation with Bayes alignment, and collects the lost patterns in theory. Due to the simple numeric computation of equations, the proposed method can learn optimized partitions while the calculation efficiency is held. Experiments on several artificial incomplete data sets demonstrate that, the proposed method is able to present superior performance compared with other state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: Clustering attempts to partition data instances into several distinctive groups, while the similarities among data belonging to the common partition can be principally reserved. Furthermore, incomplete data frequently occurs in many realworld applications, and brings perverse influence on pattern analysis. As a consequence, the specific solutions to data imputation and handling are developed to conduct the missing values of data, and independent stage of knowledge exploitation is absorbed for information understanding. In this work, a novel approach to clustering of incomplete data, termed leachable component clustering, is proposed. Rather than existing methods, the proposed method handles data imputation with Bayes alignment, and collects the lost patterns in theory. Due to the simple numeric computation of equations, the proposed method can learn optimized partitions while the calculation efficiency is held. Experiments on several artificial incomplete data sets demonstrate that, the proposed method is able to present superior performance compared with other state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 聚类尝试将数据实例划分为几个不同的组，同时原则上可以保留属于公共分区的数据之间的相似性。此外，在许多实际应用中，不完整的数据经常出现，并对模式分析带来不利影响。因此，开发了数据插补和处理的具体解决方案来处理数据的缺失值，并吸收知识利用的独立阶段来进行信息理解。在这项工作中，提出了一种不完整数据聚类的新方法，称为可浸出成分聚类。与现有方法不同，所提出的方法通过贝叶斯对齐处理数据插补，并在理论上收集丢失的模式。由于方程的数值计算简单，该方法可以在保持计算效率的同时学习优化的分区。在几个人工不完整数据集上的实验表明，与其他最先进的算法相比，所提出的方法能够呈现出优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种处理不完整数据的聚类方法——可提取组件聚类，通过贝叶斯对齐进行数据插补并优化聚类效果。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中数据常存在缺失值，传统方法在处理不完整数据时效率低且效果不佳，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯对齐技术处理数据插补，通过理论推导收集丢失模式，结合简单数值计算实现高效聚类。
AI.result: 在多个人工不完整数据集实验中，该方法性能优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持计算效率的同时，能有效处理不完整数据并优化聚类结果。

authors_text: Lan Hu,Zhongwei Luo,Runze Yuan,Yuchen Cao,Jiaxin Wei,Kai Wangand Laurent Kneip
title: Incremental Semantic Localization using Hierarchical Clustering of Object Association Sets
title_zh: 使用对象关联集的层次聚类进行增量语义定位
abstract: We present a novel approach for relocalization or place recognition, a fundamental problem to be solved in many robotics, automation, and AR applications. Rather than relying on often unstable appearance information, we consider a situation in which the reference map is given in the form of localized objects. Our localization framework relies on 3D semantic object detections, which are then associated to objects in the map. Possible pair-wise association sets are grown based on hierarchical clustering using a merge metric that evaluates spatial compatibility. The latter notably uses information about relative object configurations, which is invariant with respect to global transformations. Association sets are furthermore updated and expanded as the camera incrementally explores the environment and detects further objects. We test our algorithm in several challenging situations including dynamic scenes, large view-point changes, and scenes with repeated instances. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms prior art in terms of both robustness and accuracy.
summary: We present a novel approach for relocalization or place recognition, a fundamental problem to be solved in many robotics, automation, and AR applications. Rather than relying on often unstable appearance information, we consider a situation in which the reference map is given in the form of localized objects. Our localization framework relies on 3D semantic object detections, which are then associated to objects in the map. Possible pair-wise association sets are grown based on hierarchical clustering using a merge metric that evaluates spatial compatibility. The latter notably uses information about relative object configurations, which is invariant with respect to global transformations. Association sets are furthermore updated and expanded as the camera incrementally explores the environment and detects further objects. We test our algorithm in several challenging situations including dynamic scenes, large view-point changes, and scenes with repeated instances. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms prior art in terms of both robustness and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种重新定位或地点识别的新方法，这是许多机器人、自动化和 AR 应用中需要解决的基本问题。我们考虑参考图以局部对象的形式给出的情况，而不是依赖通常不稳定的外观信息。我们的定位框架依赖于 3D 语义对象检测，然后将其与地图中的对象相关联。可能的成对关联集是基于使用评估空间兼容性的合并度量的分层聚类而增长的。后者特别使用有关​​相对对象配置的信息，该信息对于全局转换而言是不变的。随着相机逐渐探索环境并检测更多物体，关联集也会进一步更新和扩展。我们在几种具有挑战性的情况下测试我们的算法，包括动态场景、大视点变化和具有重复实例的场景。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在鲁棒性和准确性方面都优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次聚类的对象关联集增量语义定位方法，用于机器人、自动化和AR应用中的重定位和地点识别。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖不稳定的外观信息，而本文通过语义物体检测和空间兼容性度量，提升动态场景、大视角变化等复杂环境下的定位鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用3D语义物体检测与地图对象关联，通过层次聚类生成关联集，采用空间兼容性度量（对全局变换不变）并增量更新关联集。
AI.result: 在动态场景、大视角变化及重复实例场景中，算法在稳健性和准确性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义信息与层次聚类策略，有效提升了复杂环境下的定位性能。

authors_text: Chengshuo Shen,Wei Zheng,Yonghua Ding,Xinkun Ai,Fengming Xue,Yu Zhong,Nengchao Wang,Li Gao,Zhipeng Chen,Zhoujun Yang,Zhongyong Chen,Yuan Pan,J-TEXT team
title: IDP-PGFE: An Interpretable Disruption Predictor based on Physics-Guided Feature Extraction
title_zh: IDP-PGFE：基于物理引导特征提取的可解释中断预测器
abstract: Disruption prediction has made rapid progress in recent years, especially in machine learning (ML)-based methods. Understanding why a predictor makes a certain prediction can be as crucial as the prediction's accuracy for future tokamak disruption predictors. The purpose of most disruption predictors is accuracy or cross-machine capability. However, if a disruption prediction model can be interpreted, it can tell why certain samples are classified as disruption precursors. This allows us to tell the types of incoming disruption and gives us insight into the mechanism of disruption. This paper designs a disruption predictor called Interpretable Disruption Predictor based On Physics-guided feature extraction (IDP-PGFE) on J-TEXT. The prediction performance of the model is effectively improved by extracting physics-guided features. A high-performance model is required to ensure the validity of the interpretation results. The interpretability study of IDP-PGFE provides an understanding of J-TEXT disruption and is generally consistent with existing comprehension of disruption. IDP-PGFE has been applied to the disruption due to continuously increasing density towards density limit experiments on J-TEXT. The time evolution of the PGFE features contribution demonstrates that the application of ECRH triggers radiation-caused disruption, which lowers the density at disruption. While the application of RMP indeed raises the density limit in J-TEXT. The interpretability study guides intuition on the physical mechanisms of density limit disruption that RMPs affect not only the MHD instabilities but also the radiation profile, which delays density limit disruption.
summary: Disruption prediction has made rapid progress in recent years, especially in machine learning (ML)-based methods. Understanding why a predictor makes a certain prediction can be as crucial as the prediction's accuracy for future tokamak disruption predictors. The purpose of most disruption predictors is accuracy or cross-machine capability. However, if a disruption prediction model can be interpreted, it can tell why certain samples are classified as disruption precursors. This allows us to tell the types of incoming disruption and gives us insight into the mechanism of disruption. This paper designs a disruption predictor called Interpretable Disruption Predictor based On Physics-guided feature extraction (IDP-PGFE) on J-TEXT. The prediction performance of the model is effectively improved by extracting physics-guided features. A high-performance model is required to ensure the validity of the interpretation results. The interpretability study of IDP-PGFE provides an understanding of J-TEXT disruption and is generally consistent with existing comprehension of disruption. IDP-PGFE has been applied to the disruption due to continuously increasing density towards density limit experiments on J-TEXT. The time evolution of the PGFE features contribution demonstrates that the application of ECRH triggers radiation-caused disruption, which lowers the density at disruption. While the application of RMP indeed raises the density limit in J-TEXT. The interpretability study guides intuition on the physical mechanisms of density limit disruption that RMPs affect not only the MHD instabilities but also the radiation profile, which delays density limit disruption.
abstract_zh: 近年来，中断预测取得了快速进展，特别是在基于机器学习（ML）的方法方面。了解预测器为何做出特定预测对于未来托卡马克破坏预测器来说与预测的准确性一样重要。大多数中断预测器的目的是准确性或跨机器能力。然而，如果可以解释破坏预测模型，它就可以解释为什么某些样本被归类为破坏前兆。这使我们能够判断即将到来的中断的类型，并让我们深入了解中断的机制。本文在 J-TEXT 上设计了一种名为基于物理引导特征提取的可解释中断预测器 (IDP-PGFE) 的中断预测器。通过提取物理引导特征，有效提高了模型的预测性能。需要高性能模型来保证解释结果的有效性。 IDP-PGFE 的可解释性研究提供了对 J-TEXT 破坏的理解，并且总体上与现有的破坏理解一致。 IDP-PGFE 已应用于 J-TEXT 上密度极限实验中不断增加的密度带来的干扰。 PGFE 特征贡献的时间演变表明，ECRH 的应用会触发辐射引起的破坏，从而降低破坏时的密度。而RMP的应用确实提高了J-TEXT的密度限制。可解释性研究指导了对密度限制破坏的物理机制的直觉，即 RMP 不仅影响 MHD 不稳定性，而且还影响辐射剖面，从而延迟了密度限制破坏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理引导特征提取的可解释性中断预测器（IDP-PGFE），用于J-TEXT装置上的托卡马克中断预测。
AI.motivation: 现有的中断预测模型虽然在准确性和跨设备能力上表现良好，但缺乏可解释性，无法说明预测结果的原因。可解释的模型有助于理解中断机制，并为未来的托卡马克操作提供指导。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种基于物理引导特征提取的可解释性中断预测模型（IDP-PGFE），通过提取物理引导特征来提高预测性能，并利用这些特征的贡献分析来解释预测结果。
AI.result: IDP-PGFE模型在J-TEXT装置上成功应用于密度极限实验，其物理引导特征的贡献分析表明，ECRH触发了辐射引起的中断，而RMP提高了密度极限。
AI.conclusion: IDP-PGFE模型不仅提高了预测性能，还提供了对密度极限中断机制的物理理解，有助于未来的托卡马克操作和研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理引导特征提取的可解释性中断预测器（IDP-PGFE），用于J-TEXT装置上的托卡马克中断预测。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的中断预测模型虽然在准确性和跨设备能力上表现良好，但缺乏可解释性，无法说明预测结果的原因。可解释的模型有助于理解中断机制，并为未来的托卡马克操作提供指导。
