search_text: IDP-PGFE: An Interpretable Disruption Predictor based on Physics-Guided Feature Extraction IDP-PGFE：基于物理引导特征提取的可解释中断预测器 Disruption prediction has made rapid progress in recent years, especially in machine learning (ML)-based methods. Understanding why a predictor makes a certain prediction can be as crucial as the prediction's accuracy for future tokamak disruption predictors. The purpose of most disruption predictors is accuracy or cross-machine capability. However, if a disruption prediction model can be interpreted, it can tell why certain samples are classified as disruption precursors. This allows us to tell the types of incoming disruption and gives us insight into the mechanism of disruption. This paper designs a disruption predictor called Interpretable Disruption Predictor based On Physics-guided feature extraction (IDP-PGFE) on J-TEXT. The prediction performance of the model is effectively improved by extracting physics-guided features. A high-performance model is required to ensure the validity of the interpretation results. The interpretability study of IDP-PGFE provides an understanding of J-TEXT disruption and is generally consistent with existing comprehension of disruption. IDP-PGFE has been applied to the disruption due to continuously increasing density towards density limit experiments on J-TEXT. The time evolution of the PGFE features contribution demonstrates that the application of ECRH triggers radiation-caused disruption, which lowers the density at disruption. While the application of RMP indeed raises the density limit in J-TEXT. The interpretability study guides intuition on the physical mechanisms of density limit disruption that RMPs affect not only the MHD instabilities but also the radiation profile, which delays density limit disruption. 近年来，中断预测取得了快速进展，特别是在基于机器学习（ML）的方法方面。了解预测器为何做出特定预测对于未来托卡马克破坏预测器来说与预测的准确性一样重要。大多数中断预测器的目的是准确性或跨机器能力。然而，如果可以解释破坏预测模型，它就可以解释为什么某些样本被归类为破坏前兆。这使我们能够判断即将到来的中断的类型，并让我们深入了解中断的机制。本文在 J-TEXT 上设计了一种名为基于物理引导特征提取的可解释中断预测器 (IDP-PGFE) 的中断预测器。通过提取物理引导特征，有效提高了模型的预测性能。需要高性能模型来保证解释结果的有效性。 IDP-PGFE 的可解释性研究提供了对 J-TEXT 破坏的理解，并且总体上与现有的破坏理解一致。 IDP-PGFE 已应用于 J-TEXT 上密度极限实验中不断增加的密度带来的干扰。 PGFE 特征贡献的时间演变表明，ECRH 的应用会触发辐射引起的破坏，从而降低破坏时的密度。而RMP的应用确实提高了J-TEXT的密度限制。可解释性研究指导了对密度限制破坏的物理机制的直觉，即 RMP 不仅影响 MHD 不稳定性，而且还影响辐射剖面，从而延迟了密度限制破坏。 本文提出了一种基于物理引导特征提取的可解释性中断预测器（IDP-PGFE），用于J-TEXT装置上的托卡马克中断预测。 Chengshuo Shen,Wei Zheng,Yonghua Ding,Xinkun Ai,Fengming Xue,Yu Zhong,Nengchao Wang,Li Gao,Zhipeng Chen,Zhoujun Yang,Zhongyong Chen,Yuan Pan,J-TEXT team physics.plasm-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hongchen Luo,Wei Zhai,Jing Zhang,Yang Cao,Dacheng Tao
title: Grounded Affordance from Exocentric View
title_zh: 外心视角下的接地可供性
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.09905
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.09905
abstract: Affordance grounding aims to locate objects' "action possibilities" regions, which is an essential step toward embodied intelligence. Due to the diversity of interactive affordance, the uniqueness of different individuals leads to diverse interactions, which makes it difficult to establish an explicit link between object parts and affordance labels. Human has the ability that transforms the various exocentric interactions into invariant egocentric affordance to counter the impact of interactive diversity. To empower an agent with such ability, this paper proposes a task of affordance grounding from exocentric view, i.e., given exocentric human-object interaction and egocentric object images, learning the affordance knowledge of the object and transferring it to the egocentric image using only the affordance label as supervision. However, there is some "interaction bias" between personas, mainly regarding different regions and different views. To this end, we devise a cross-view affordance knowledge transfer framework that extracts affordance-specific features from exocentric interactions and transfers them to the egocentric view. Specifically, the perception of affordance regions is enhanced by preserving affordance co-relations. In addition, an affordance grounding dataset named AGD20K is constructed by collecting and labeling over 20K images from $36$ affordance categories. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the representative models regarding objective metrics and visual quality. Code is released at https://github.com/lhc1224/Cross-view-affordance-grounding.
summary: Affordance grounding aims to locate objects' "action possibilities" regions, which is an essential step toward embodied intelligence. Due to the diversity of interactive affordance, the uniqueness of different individuals leads to diverse interactions, which makes it difficult to establish an explicit link between object parts and affordance labels. Human has the ability that transforms the various exocentric interactions into invariant egocentric affordance to counter the impact of interactive diversity. To empower an agent with such ability, this paper proposes a task of affordance grounding from exocentric view, i.e., given exocentric human-object interaction and egocentric object images, learning the affordance knowledge of the object and transferring it to the egocentric image using only the affordance label as supervision. However, there is some "interaction bias" between personas, mainly regarding different regions and different views. To this end, we devise a cross-view affordance knowledge transfer framework that extracts affordance-specific features from exocentric interactions and transfers them to the egocentric view. Specifically, the perception of affordance regions is enhanced by preserving affordance co-relations. In addition, an affordance grounding dataset named AGD20K is constructed by collecting and labeling over 20K images from $36$ affordance categories. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the representative models regarding objective metrics and visual quality. Code is released at https://github.com/lhc1224/Cross-view-affordance-grounding.
abstract_zh: 可供性基础旨在定位物体的“行动可能性”区域，这是迈向具身智能的重要一步。由于交互可供性的多样性，不同个体的独特性导致了交互的多样性，这使得在对象部分和可供性标签之间建立明确的联系变得困难。人类有能力将各种外向中心的互动转化为不变的以自我为中心的可供性，以对抗互动多样性的影响。为了使智能体具有这种能力，本文提出了一种从外中心视角出发的可供性基础任务，即给定外中心的人与物体交互和以自我为中心的物体图像，学习物体的可供性知识，并仅使用可供性标签作为监督，将其转移到以自我为中心的图像。然而，角色之间存在一些“交互偏差”，主要是针对不同地区和不同观点。为此，我们设计了一个跨视图可供性知识转移框架，从外中心交互中提取可供性特定特征，并将其转移到自我中心视图。具体来说，通过保留可供性的相互关系可以增强对可供性区域的感知。此外，名为 AGD20K 的可供性基础数据集是通过收集和标记来自 36 美元可供性类别的超过 2 万张图像而构建的。实验结果表明，我们的方法在客观指标和视觉质量方面优于代表性模型。代码发布于 https://github.com/lhc1224/Cross-view-affordance-grounding。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从外在视角（exocentric view）进行可操作性（affordance）定位的任务，通过外在人-物交互和内在视角物体图像，学习物体的可操作性知识并将其转移到内在视角图像中。
AI.motivation: 由于人类交互的多样性导致不同个体对同一物体的可操作性区域认知差异，难以建立物体部件与可操作性标签的显式联系。人类能将多样化的外在交互转化为不变的内在可操作性，本文旨在赋予智能体类似能力。
AI.method: 设计跨视角可操作性知识迁移框架，从外在交互中提取可操作性特有特征并转移到内在视角。通过保持可操作性相关性增强区域感知，并构建包含20K张图像的AGD20K数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在目标指标和视觉质量上优于现有代表性模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了跨视角可操作性知识迁移，为具身智能提供了新思路，AGD20K数据集为未来研究提供了重要资源。

authors: Ronny Huang Andrew Rosenberg Tara N. Sainath
authors_json: Ronny Huang Andrew Rosenberg Tara N. Sainath
authors_text: Cal Peyser,Ronny Huang Andrew Rosenberg Tara N. Sainath,Michael Picheny,Kyunghyun Cho
title: Towards Disentangled Speech Representations
title_zh: 走向解开的语音表示
abstract: The careful construction of audio representations has become a dominant feature in the design of approaches to many speech tasks. Increasingly, such approaches have emphasized "disentanglement", where a representation contains only parts of the speech signal relevant to transcription while discarding irrelevant information. In this paper, we construct a representation learning task based on joint modeling of ASR and TTS, and seek to learn a representation of audio that disentangles that part of the speech signal that is relevant to transcription from that part which is not. We present empirical evidence that successfully finding such a representation is tied to the randomness inherent in training. We then make the observation that these desired, disentangled solutions to the optimization problem possess unique statistical properties. Finally, we show that enforcing these properties during training improves WER by 24.5% relative on average for our joint modeling task. These observations motivate a novel approach to learning effective audio representations.
summary: The careful construction of audio representations has become a dominant feature in the design of approaches to many speech tasks. Increasingly, such approaches have emphasized "disentanglement", where a representation contains only parts of the speech signal relevant to transcription while discarding irrelevant information. In this paper, we construct a representation learning task based on joint modeling of ASR and TTS, and seek to learn a representation of audio that disentangles that part of the speech signal that is relevant to transcription from that part which is not. We present empirical evidence that successfully finding such a representation is tied to the randomness inherent in training. We then make the observation that these desired, disentangled solutions to the optimization problem possess unique statistical properties. Finally, we show that enforcing these properties during training improves WER by 24.5% relative on average for our joint modeling task. These observations motivate a novel approach to learning effective audio representations.
abstract_zh: 音频表示的精心构建已成为许多语音任务方法设计的主要特征。此类方法越来越强调“解缠结”，其中表示仅包含与转录相关的语音信号部分，同时丢弃不相关的信息。在本文中，我们构建了基于 ASR 和 TTS 联合建模的表示学习任务，并寻求学习音频表示，将语音信号中与转录相关的部分与不相关的部分分开。我们提供的经验证据表明，成功找到这种表示与训练中固有的随机性有关。然后我们观察到，这些理想的、解开的优化问题解决方案具有独特的统计特性。最后，我们表明，在训练期间强制实施这些属性，对于我们的联合建模任务来说，WER 平均提高了 24.5%。这些观察激发了一种学习有效音频表示的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过联合建模语音识别（ASR）和文本到语音合成（TTS）任务，学习能够分离语音信号中与转录相关和无关部分的音频表征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法强调音频表征的解耦（disentanglement），即保留与转录相关的信息并去除无关信息，但如何有效实现这一目标仍需探索。
AI.method: 设计联合ASR-TTS的表征学习任务，利用训练中的随机性发现解耦解，并通过强制统计特性（如解耦解的分布特性）优化表征学习。
AI.result: 在联合建模任务中，通过强制统计特性使词错误率（WER）平均降低24.5%。
AI.conclusion: 解耦语音表征的学习需结合任务联合建模与统计特性约束，该方法为有效音频表征学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Disentangled Speech Representations 走向解开的语音表示 The careful construction of audio representations has become a dominant feature in the design of approaches to many speech tasks. Increasingly, such approaches have emphasized "disentanglement", where a representation contains only parts of the speech signal relevant to transcription while discarding irrelevant information. In this paper, we construct a representation learning task based on joint modeling of ASR and TTS, and seek to learn a representation of audio that disentangles that part of the speech signal that is relevant to transcription from that part which is not. We present empirical evidence that successfully finding such a representation is tied to the randomness inherent in training. We then make the observation that these desired, disentangled solutions to the optimization problem possess unique statistical properties. Finally, we show that enforcing these properties during training improves WER by 24.5% relative on average for our joint modeling task. These observations motivate a novel approach to learning effective audio representations. 音频表示的精心构建已成为许多语音任务方法设计的主要特征。此类方法越来越强调“解缠结”，其中表示仅包含与转录相关的语音信号部分，同时丢弃不相关的信息。在本文中，我们构建了基于 ASR 和 TTS 联合建模的表示学习任务，并寻求学习音频表示，将语音信号中与转录相关的部分与不相关的部分分开。我们提供的经验证据表明，成功找到这种表示与训练中固有的随机性有关。然后我们观察到，这些理想的、解开的优化问题解决方案具有独特的统计特性。最后，我们表明，在训练期间强制实施这些属性，对于我们的联合建模任务来说，WER 平均提高了 24.5%。这些观察激发了一种学习有效音频表示的新方法。 本文提出通过联合建模语音识别（ASR）和文本到语音合成（TTS）任务，学习能够分离语音信号中与转录相关和无关部分的音频表征。 Cal Peyser,Ronny Huang Andrew Rosenberg Tara N. Sainath,Michael Picheny,Kyunghyun Cho cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Yizhi Wang,Yingwen Liu,Junwei Zhan,Shichuan Xue,Yuzhen Zheng,Ru Zeng,Zhihao Wu,Zihao Wang,Qilin Zheng,Dongyang Wang,Weixu Shi,Xiang Fu,Ping Xu,Yang Wang,Yong Liu,Jiangfang Ding,Guangyao Huang,Chunlin Yu,Anqi Huang,Xiaogang Qiang,Mingtang Deng,Weixia Xu,Kai Lu,Xuejun Yang,Junjie Wu
title: Large-scale full-programmable quantum walk and its applications
title_zh: 大规模全可编程量子行走及其应用
abstract: With photonics, the quantum computational advantage has been demonstrated on the task of boson sampling. Next, developing quantum-enhanced approaches for practical problems becomes one of the top priorities for photonic systems. Quantum walks are powerful kernels for developing new and useful quantum algorithms. Here we realize large-scale quantum walks using a fully programmable photonic quantum computing system. The system integrates a silicon quantum photonic chip, enabling the simulation of quantum walk dynamics on graphs with up to 400 vertices and possessing full programmability over quantum walk parameters, including the particle property, initial state, graph structure, and evolution time. In the 400-dimensional Hilbert space, the average fidelity of random entangled quantum states after the whole on-chip circuit evolution reaches as high as 94.29$\pm$1.28$\%$. With the system, we demonstrated exponentially faster hitting and quadratically faster mixing performance of quantum walks over classical random walks, achieving more than two orders of magnitude of enhancement in the experimental hitting efficiency and almost half of the reduction in the experimental evolution time for mixing. We utilize the system to implement a series of quantum applications, including measuring the centrality of scale-free networks, searching targets on Erdös-Rényi networks, distinguishing non-isomorphic graph pairs, and simulating the topological phase of higher-order topological insulators. Our work shows one feasible path for quantum photonics to address applications of practical interests in the near future.
summary: With photonics, the quantum computational advantage has been demonstrated on the task of boson sampling. Next, developing quantum-enhanced approaches for practical problems becomes one of the top priorities for photonic systems. Quantum walks are powerful kernels for developing new and useful quantum algorithms. Here we realize large-scale quantum walks using a fully programmable photonic quantum computing system. The system integrates a silicon quantum photonic chip, enabling the simulation of quantum walk dynamics on graphs with up to 400 vertices and possessing full programmability over quantum walk parameters, including the particle property, initial state, graph structure, and evolution time. In the 400-dimensional Hilbert space, the average fidelity of random entangled quantum states after the whole on-chip circuit evolution reaches as high as 94.29$\pm$1.28$\%$. With the system, we demonstrated exponentially faster hitting and quadratically faster mixing performance of quantum walks over classical random walks, achieving more than two orders of magnitude of enhancement in the experimental hitting efficiency and almost half of the reduction in the experimental evolution time for mixing. We utilize the system to implement a series of quantum applications, including measuring the centrality of scale-free networks, searching targets on Erdös-Rényi networks, distinguishing non-isomorphic graph pairs, and simulating the topological phase of higher-order topological insulators. Our work shows one feasible path for quantum photonics to address applications of practical interests in the near future.
abstract_zh: 通过光子学，量子计算的优势已经在玻色子采样任务中得到了证明。接下来，开发解决实际问题的量子增强方法成为光子系统的首要任务之一。量子行走是开发新的有用的量子算法的强大内核。在这里，我们使用完全可编程的光子量子计算系统实现大规模量子行走。该系统集成了硅量子光子芯片，能够在多达400个顶点的图上模拟量子游走动力学，并具有对量子游走参数的完全可编程性，包括粒子属性、初始状态、图结构和演化时间。在400维希尔伯特空间中，整个片上电路演化后随机纠缠量子态的平均保真度高达94.29$\pm$1.28$\%$。通过该系统，我们展示了量子游走相对于经典随机游走的指数级更快的命中和二次方更快的混合性能，实现了实验命中效率两个数量级以上的增强，并且混合的实验进化时间减少了近一半。我们利用该系统实现了一系列量子应用，包括测量无标度网络的中心性、在 Erdös-Rényi 网络上搜索目标、区分非同构图对以及模拟高阶拓扑绝缘体的拓扑相。我们的工作为量子光子学在不久的将来解决实际利益应用提供了一条可行的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光子量子计算系统的可编程大规模量子行走方案，并展示了其在多个实际应用中的优势。
AI.motivation: 量子行走作为构建量子算法的核心工具，具有解决实际问题的潜力，但现有系统在规模和可编程性上存在局限。
AI.method: 利用硅基光子芯片构建全可编程量子计算系统，实现对400顶点图的量子行走模拟，支持对粒子特性、初始状态等参数的全面调控。
AI.result: 系统实现了94.29%的高保真度量子态演化，量子行走效率较经典方法提升两个数量级，混合时间缩短近一半，并成功应用于网络中心性测量、图搜索等任务。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为光子量子计算在解决实际问题中的应用提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Mingdeng Cao,Zhihang Zhong,Yanbo Fan,Jiahao Wang,Yong Zhang,Jue Wang,Yujiu Yang,Yinqiang Zheng
title: Towards Real-World Video Deblurring by Exploring Blur Formation Process
title_zh: 通过探索模糊形成过程实现现实世界的视频去模糊
abstract: This paper aims at exploring how to synthesize close-to-real blurs that existing video deblurring models trained on them can generalize well to real-world blurry videos. In recent years, deep learning-based approaches have achieved promising success on video deblurring task. However, the models trained on existing synthetic datasets still suffer from generalization problems over real-world blurry scenarios with undesired artifacts. The factors accounting for the failure remain unknown. Therefore, we revisit the classical blur synthesis pipeline and figure out the possible reasons, including shooting parameters, blur formation space, and image signal processor~(ISP). To analyze the effects of these potential factors, we first collect an ultra-high frame-rate (940 FPS) RAW video dataset as the data basis to synthesize various kinds of blurs. Then we propose a novel realistic blur synthesis pipeline termed as RAW-Blur by leveraging blur formation cues. Through numerous experiments, we demonstrate that synthesizing blurs in the RAW space and adopting the same ISP as the real-world testing data can effectively eliminate the negative effects of synthetic data. Furthermore, the shooting parameters of the synthesized blurry video, e.g., exposure time and frame-rate play significant roles in improving the performance of deblurring models. Impressively, the models trained on the blurry data synthesized by the proposed RAW-Blur pipeline can obtain more than 5dB PSNR gain against those trained on the existing synthetic blur datasets. We believe the novel realistic synthesis pipeline and the corresponding RAW video dataset can help the community to easily construct customized blur datasets to improve real-world video deblurring performance largely, instead of laboriously collecting real data pairs.
summary: This paper aims at exploring how to synthesize close-to-real blurs that existing video deblurring models trained on them can generalize well to real-world blurry videos. In recent years, deep learning-based approaches have achieved promising success on video deblurring task. However, the models trained on existing synthetic datasets still suffer from generalization problems over real-world blurry scenarios with undesired artifacts. The factors accounting for the failure remain unknown. Therefore, we revisit the classical blur synthesis pipeline and figure out the possible reasons, including shooting parameters, blur formation space, and image signal processor~(ISP). To analyze the effects of these potential factors, we first collect an ultra-high frame-rate (940 FPS) RAW video dataset as the data basis to synthesize various kinds of blurs. Then we propose a novel realistic blur synthesis pipeline termed as RAW-Blur by leveraging blur formation cues. Through numerous experiments, we demonstrate that synthesizing blurs in the RAW space and adopting the same ISP as the real-world testing data can effectively eliminate the negative effects of synthetic data. Furthermore, the shooting parameters of the synthesized blurry video, e.g., exposure time and frame-rate play significant roles in improving the performance of deblurring models. Impressively, the models trained on the blurry data synthesized by the proposed RAW-Blur pipeline can obtain more than 5dB PSNR gain against those trained on the existing synthetic blur datasets. We believe the novel realistic synthesis pipeline and the corresponding RAW video dataset can help the community to easily construct customized blur datasets to improve real-world video deblurring performance largely, instead of laboriously collecting real data pairs.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在探索如何合成接近真实的模糊，使现有的视频去模糊模型能够很好地推广到现实世界的模糊视频。近年来，基于深度学习的方法在视频去模糊任务上取得了可喜的成功。然而，在现有合成数据集上训练的模型仍然面临着现实世界模糊场景和不良伪影的泛化问题。导致失败的因素仍然未知。因此，我们重新审视经典的模糊合成流程并找出可能的原因，包括拍摄参数、模糊形成空间和图像信号处理器~（ISP）。为了分析这些潜在因素的影响，我们首先收集超高帧率（940 FPS）RAW视频数据集作为合成各种模糊的数据基础。然后，我们通过利用模糊形成线索，提出了一种新颖的现实模糊合成管道，称为 RAW-Blur。通过大量实验，我们证明在RAW空间中合成模糊并采用与真实世界测试数据相同的ISP可以有效消除合成数据的负面影响。此外，合成模糊视频的拍摄参数，例如曝光时间和帧速率对于提高去模糊模型的性能起着重要作用。令人印象深刻的是，与在现有合成模糊数据集上训练的模型相比，在由所提出的 RAW-Blur 管道合成的模糊数据上训练的模型可以获得超过 5dB PSNR 增益。我们相信新颖的现实合成管道和相应的原始视频数据集可以帮助社区轻松构建定制的模糊数据集，以很大程度上提高现实世界的视频去模糊性能，而不是费力地收集真实数据对。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索如何合成接近真实的模糊效果，以提升视频去模糊模型在真实世界模糊视频中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的视频去模糊模型在合成数据集上训练后，难以有效处理真实世界的模糊场景，且失败原因尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过采集超高帧率RAW视频数据集，提出RAW-Blur合成框架，在RAW空间生成模糊并匹配真实ISP参数，同时优化拍摄参数（如曝光时间、帧率）。
AI.result: 使用RAW-Blur合成的数据训练的模型在PSNR指标上较现有合成数据集提升超5dB，显著减少伪影并提高真实场景下的去模糊性能。
AI.conclusion: 该真实感合成框架及RAW视频数据集可帮助社区高效构建定制化模糊数据集，无需依赖繁琐的真实数据采集即可提升实际视频去模糊效果。

search_text: Towards Real-World Video Deblurring by Exploring Blur Formation Process 通过探索模糊形成过程实现现实世界的视频去模糊 This paper aims at exploring how to synthesize close-to-real blurs that existing video deblurring models trained on them can generalize well to real-world blurry videos. In recent years, deep learning-based approaches have achieved promising success on video deblurring task. However, the models trained on existing synthetic datasets still suffer from generalization problems over real-world blurry scenarios with undesired artifacts. The factors accounting for the failure remain unknown. Therefore, we revisit the classical blur synthesis pipeline and figure out the possible reasons, including shooting parameters, blur formation space, and image signal processor~(ISP). To analyze the effects of these potential factors, we first collect an ultra-high frame-rate (940 FPS) RAW video dataset as the data basis to synthesize various kinds of blurs. Then we propose a novel realistic blur synthesis pipeline termed as RAW-Blur by leveraging blur formation cues. Through numerous experiments, we demonstrate that synthesizing blurs in the RAW space and adopting the same ISP as the real-world testing data can effectively eliminate the negative effects of synthetic data. Furthermore, the shooting parameters of the synthesized blurry video, e.g., exposure time and frame-rate play significant roles in improving the performance of deblurring models. Impressively, the models trained on the blurry data synthesized by the proposed RAW-Blur pipeline can obtain more than 5dB PSNR gain against those trained on the existing synthetic blur datasets. We believe the novel realistic synthesis pipeline and the corresponding RAW video dataset can help the community to easily construct customized blur datasets to improve real-world video deblurring performance largely, instead of laboriously collecting real data pairs. 本文旨在探索如何合成接近真实的模糊，使现有的视频去模糊模型能够很好地推广到现实世界的模糊视频。近年来，基于深度学习的方法在视频去模糊任务上取得了可喜的成功。然而，在现有合成数据集上训练的模型仍然面临着现实世界模糊场景和不良伪影的泛化问题。导致失败的因素仍然未知。因此，我们重新审视经典的模糊合成流程并找出可能的原因，包括拍摄参数、模糊形成空间和图像信号处理器~（ISP）。为了分析这些潜在因素的影响，我们首先收集超高帧率（940 FPS）RAW视频数据集作为合成各种模糊的数据基础。然后，我们通过利用模糊形成线索，提出了一种新颖的现实模糊合成管道，称为 RAW-Blur。通过大量实验，我们证明在RAW空间中合成模糊并采用与真实世界测试数据相同的ISP可以有效消除合成数据的负面影响。此外，合成模糊视频的拍摄参数，例如曝光时间和帧速率对于提高去模糊模型的性能起着重要作用。令人印象深刻的是，与在现有合成模糊数据集上训练的模型相比，在由所提出的 RAW-Blur 管道合成的模糊数据上训练的模型可以获得超过 5dB PSNR 增益。我们相信新颖的现实合成管道和相应的原始视频数据集可以帮助社区轻松构建定制的模糊数据集，以很大程度上提高现实世界的视频去模糊性能，而不是费力地收集真实数据对。 本文旨在探索如何合成接近真实的模糊效果，以提升视频去模糊模型在真实世界模糊视频中的泛化能力。 Mingdeng Cao,Zhihang Zhong,Yanbo Fan,Jiahao Wang,Yong Zhang,Jue Wang,Yujiu Yang,Yinqiang Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Lev Finkelstein,Heiga Zen,Norman Casagrande,Chun-an Chan,Ye Jia,Tom Kenter,Alexey Petelin,Jonathan Shen,Vincent Wan,Yu Zhang,Yonghui Wu,Rob Clark
title: Training Text-To-Speech Systems From Synthetic Data: A Practical Approach For Accent Transfer Tasks
title_zh: 从合成数据训练文本到语音系统：口音迁移任务的实用方法
abstract: Transfer tasks in text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis - where one or more aspects of the speech of one set of speakers is transferred to another set of speakers that do not feature these aspects originally - remains a challenging task. One of the challenges is that models that have high-quality transfer capabilities can have issues in stability, making them impractical for user-facing critical tasks. This paper demonstrates that transfer can be obtained by training a robust TTS system on data generated by a less robust TTS system designed for a high-quality transfer task; in particular, a CHiVE-BERT monolingual TTS system is trained on the output of a Tacotron model designed for accent transfer. While some quality loss is inevitable with this approach, experimental results show that the models trained on synthetic data this way can produce high quality audio displaying accent transfer, while preserving speaker characteristics such as speaking style.
summary: Transfer tasks in text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis - where one or more aspects of the speech of one set of speakers is transferred to another set of speakers that do not feature these aspects originally - remains a challenging task. One of the challenges is that models that have high-quality transfer capabilities can have issues in stability, making them impractical for user-facing critical tasks. This paper demonstrates that transfer can be obtained by training a robust TTS system on data generated by a less robust TTS system designed for a high-quality transfer task; in particular, a CHiVE-BERT monolingual TTS system is trained on the output of a Tacotron model designed for accent transfer. While some quality loss is inevitable with this approach, experimental results show that the models trained on synthetic data this way can produce high quality audio displaying accent transfer, while preserving speaker characteristics such as speaking style.
abstract_zh: 文本到语音 (TTS) 合成中的迁移任务（将一组说话者语音的一个或多个方面转移到最初不具有这些方面的另一组说话者）仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。挑战之一是具有高质量传输能力的模型可能存在稳定性问题，使得它们对于面向用户的关键任务来说不切实际。本文证明，可以通过针对为高质量传输任务而设计的不太稳健的 TTS 系统生成的数据来训练稳健的 TTS 系统来获得传输；特别是，CHiVE-BERT 单语 TTS 系统根据专为口音迁移而设计的 Tacotron 模型的输出进行训练。虽然这种方法不可避免地会造成一些质量损失，但实验结果表明，以这种方式在合成数据上训练的模型可以产生显示口音转移的高质量音频，同时保留说话风格等说话者特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过合成数据训练文本到语音（TTS）系统，以实现语音口音迁移任务的实用化方案。
AI.motivation: 现有口音迁移TTS模型存在稳定性不足的问题，难以满足实际应用需求，需探索更稳健的训练方法。
AI.method: 使用Tacotron生成的合成数据训练CHiVE-BERT单语TTS系统，实现口音迁移任务的模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持说话人特征（如语用风格）的同时，可生成高质量的口音迁移语音，尽管存在轻微质量损失。
AI.conclusion: 基于合成数据的分阶段训练方法能有效提升口音迁移TTS系统的实用性和稳定性。

authors_text: Yinghua Zhang,Yangqiu Song,Kun Bai,Qiang Yang
title: Cross-domain Cross-architecture Black-box Attacks on Fine-tuned Models with Transferred Evolutionary Strategies
title_zh: 使用迁移进化策略对微调模型进行跨域跨架构黑盒攻击
abstract: Fine-tuning can be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Existing works about black-box attacks on fine-tuned models (BAFT) are limited by strong assumptions. To fill the gap, we propose two novel BAFT settings, cross-domain and cross-domain cross-architecture BAFT, which only assume that (1) the target model for attacking is a fine-tuned model, and (2) the source domain data is known and accessible. To successfully attack fine-tuned models under both settings, we propose to first train an adversarial generator against the source model, which adopts an encoder-decoder architecture and maps a clean input to an adversarial example. Then we search in the low-dimensional latent space produced by the encoder of the adversarial generator. The search is conducted under the guidance of the surrogate gradient obtained from the source model. Experimental results on different domains and different network architectures demonstrate that the proposed attack method can effectively and efficiently attack the fine-tuned models.
summary: Fine-tuning can be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Existing works about black-box attacks on fine-tuned models (BAFT) are limited by strong assumptions. To fill the gap, we propose two novel BAFT settings, cross-domain and cross-domain cross-architecture BAFT, which only assume that (1) the target model for attacking is a fine-tuned model, and (2) the source domain data is known and accessible. To successfully attack fine-tuned models under both settings, we propose to first train an adversarial generator against the source model, which adopts an encoder-decoder architecture and maps a clean input to an adversarial example. Then we search in the low-dimensional latent space produced by the encoder of the adversarial generator. The search is conducted under the guidance of the surrogate gradient obtained from the source model. Experimental results on different domains and different network architectures demonstrate that the proposed attack method can effectively and efficiently attack the fine-tuned models.
abstract_zh: 微调可能容易受到对抗性攻击。关于微调模型（BAFT）的黑盒攻击的现有工作受到强假设的限制。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了两种新颖的 BAFT 设置：跨域和跨域跨架构 BAFT，仅假设（1）攻击的目标模型是微调模型，（2）源域数据已知且可访问。为了在这两种设置下成功攻击微调模型，我们建议首先针对源模型训练对抗生成器，该生成器采用编码器-解码器架构并将干净的输入映射到对抗示例。然后我们在对抗性生成器的编码器产生的低维潜在空间中进行搜索。搜索是在从源模型获得的替代梯度的指导下进行的。在不同领域和不同网络架构上的实验结果表明，所提出的攻击方法可以有效且高效地攻击微调模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型黑盒攻击设置，针对微调模型进行跨领域和跨架构攻击，仅假设目标模型为微调模型且源领域数据可访问。
AI.motivation: 现有微调模型黑盒攻击方法依赖强假设，限制了实际应用。本文旨在通过更弱的假设条件，填补跨领域和跨架构攻击的研究空白。
AI.method: 训练对抗生成器（编码器-解码器架构）生成对抗样本，并在编码器的低维潜在空间中，利用源模型的替代梯度进行搜索优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效攻击不同领域和网络架构的微调模型，攻击成功率高且计算效率优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的跨领域跨架构攻击方法在弱假设下仍具高效性，为微调模型的黑盒攻击研究提供了新视角和实用工具。

Then we search in the low-dimensional latent space produced by the encoder of the adversarial generator. The search is conducted under the guidance of the surrogate gradient obtained from the source model. Experimental results on different domains and different network architectures demonstrate that the proposed attack method can effectively and efficiently attack the fine-tuned models. 微调可能容易受到对抗性攻击。关于微调模型（BAFT）的黑盒攻击的现有工作受到强假设的限制。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了两种新颖的 BAFT 设置：跨域和跨域跨架构 BAFT，仅假设（1）攻击的目标模型是微调模型，（2）源域数据已知且可访问。为了在这两种设置下成功攻击微调模型，我们建议首先针对源模型训练对抗生成器，该生成器采用编码器-解码器架构并将干净的输入映射到对抗示例。然后我们在对抗性生成器的编码器产生的低维潜在空间中进行搜索。搜索是在从源模型获得的替代梯度的指导下进行的。在不同领域和不同网络架构上的实验结果表明，所提出的攻击方法可以有效且高效地攻击微调模型。 本文提出两种新型黑盒攻击设置，针对微调模型进行跨领域和跨架构攻击，仅假设目标模型为微调模型且源领域数据可访问。 Yinghua Zhang,Yangqiu Song,Kun Bai,Qiang Yang cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.NE

authors_text: Martin Molan,Andrea Borghesi,Daniele Cesarini,Luca Benini,Andrea Bartolini
title: RUAD: unsupervised anomaly detection in HPC systems
title_zh: RUAD：HPC 系统中的无监督异常检测
abstract: The increasing complexity of modern high-performance computing (HPC) systems necessitates the introduction of automated and data-driven methodologies to support system administrators' effort toward increasing the system's availability. Anomaly detection is an integral part of improving the availability as it eases the system administrator's burden and reduces the time between an anomaly and its resolution. However, current state-of-the-art (SoA) approaches to anomaly detection are supervised and semi-supervised, so they require a human-labelled dataset with anomalies - this is often impractical to collect in production HPC systems. Unsupervised anomaly detection approaches based on clustering, aimed at alleviating the need for accurate anomaly data, have so far shown poor performance. In this work, we overcome these limitations by proposing RUAD, a novel Recurrent Unsupervised Anomaly Detection model. RUAD achieves better results than the current semi-supervised and unsupervised SoA approaches. This is achieved by considering temporal dependencies in the data and including long-short term memory cells in the model architecture. The proposed approach is assessed on a complete ten-month history of a Tier-0 system (Marconi100 from CINECA with 980 nodes). RUAD achieves an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.763 in semi-supervised training and an AUC of 0.767 in unsupervised training, which improves upon the SoA approach that achieves an AUC of 0.747 in semi-supervised training and an AUC of 0.734 in unsupervised training. It also vastly outperforms the current SoA unsupervised anomaly detection approach based on clustering, achieving the AUC of 0.548.
summary: The increasing complexity of modern high-performance computing (HPC) systems necessitates the introduction of automated and data-driven methodologies to support system administrators' effort toward increasing the system's availability. Anomaly detection is an integral part of improving the availability as it eases the system administrator's burden and reduces the time between an anomaly and its resolution. However, current state-of-the-art (SoA) approaches to anomaly detection are supervised and semi-supervised, so they require a human-labelled dataset with anomalies - this is often impractical to collect in production HPC systems. Unsupervised anomaly detection approaches based on clustering, aimed at alleviating the need for accurate anomaly data, have so far shown poor performance. In this work, we overcome these limitations by proposing RUAD, a novel Recurrent Unsupervised Anomaly Detection model. RUAD achieves better results than the current semi-supervised and unsupervised SoA approaches. This is achieved by considering temporal dependencies in the data and including long-short term memory cells in the model architecture. The proposed approach is assessed on a complete ten-month history of a Tier-0 system (Marconi100 from CINECA with 980 nodes). RUAD achieves an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.763 in semi-supervised training and an AUC of 0.767 in unsupervised training, which improves upon the SoA approach that achieves an AUC of 0.747 in semi-supervised training and an AUC of 0.734 in unsupervised training. It also vastly outperforms the current SoA unsupervised anomaly detection approach based on clustering, achieving the AUC of 0.548.
abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统的复杂性日益增加，需要引入自动化和数据驱动的方法来支持系统管理员提高系统可用性的努力。异常检测是提高可用性的一个组成部分，因为它减轻了系统管理员的负担并缩短了异常发生和解决之间的时间。然而，当前最先进的异常检测 (SoA) 方法是监督和半监督的，因此它们需要人工标记的异常数据集 - 这在生产 HPC 系统中收集通常是不切实际的。基于聚类的无监督异常检测方法旨在减轻对准确异常数据的需求，但迄今为止表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们通过提出 RUAD（一种新颖的循环无监督异常检测模型）克服了这些限制。 RUAD 比当前的半监督和无监督 SoA 方法取得了更好的结果。这是通过考虑数据中的时间依赖性并在模型架构中包含长期短期记忆单元来实现的。所提出的方法根据 Tier-0 系统（来自 CINECA 的 Marconi100，具有 980 个节点）的完整 10 个月历史进行评估。 RUAD 在半监督训练中的曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.763，在无监督训练中的 AUC 为 0.767，这对 SoA 方法进行了改进，SoA 方法在半监督训练中的 AUC 为 0.747，在无监督训练中的 AUC 为 0.734。它还大大优于当前基于聚类的 SoA 无监督异常检测方法，实现了 0.548 的 AUC。

AI.tldr: 提出RUAD模型用于HPC系统的无监督异常检测
AI.motivation: 现有监督/半监督方法依赖标注数据难以获取，无监督方法效果差，需改进HPC系统异常检测的自动化能力
AI.method: 基于循环神经网络和LSTM单元的无监督模型，通过捕捉时间序列依赖性实现异常检测
AI.result: 在Marconi100系统数据上，半监督AUC达0.763，无监督AUC达0.767，优于现有方法的0.747和0.734
AI.conclusion: RUAD通过时序建模显著提升无监督检测性能，为HPC系统提供有效异常检测方案

authors_text: Saeid Ghafouri,Seyed Hossein Khasteh,Seyed Omid Azarkasb
title: Influence Maximization (IM) in Complex Networks with Limited Visibility Using Statistical Methods
title_zh: 使用统计方法在可见性有限的复杂网络中影响力最大化 (IM)
abstract: A social network (SN) is a social structure consisting of a group representing the interaction between them. SNs have recently been widely used and, subsequently, have become suitable and popular platforms for product promotion and information diffusion. People in an SN directly influence each other's interests and behavior. One of the most important problems in SNs is to find people who can have the maximum influence on other nodes in the network in a cascade manner if they are chosen as the seed nodes of a network diffusion scenario. Influential diffusers are people who, if they are chosen as the seed set in a publishing issue in the network, that network will have the most people who have learned about that diffused entity. This is a well-known problem in literature known as influence maximization (IM) problem. Although it has been proven that this is an NP-complete problem and does not have a solution in polynomial time, it has been argued that it has the properties of sub modular functions and, therefore, can be solved using a greedy algorithm. Most of the methods proposed to improve this complexity are based on the assumption that the entire graph is visible. However, this assumption does not hold for many real-world graphs. This study is conducted to extend current maximization methods with link prediction techniques to pseudo-visibility graphs. To this end, a graph generation method called the exponential random graph model (ERGM) is used for link prediction. The proposed method is tested using the data from the Snap dataset of Stanford University. According to the experimental tests, the proposed method is efficient on real-world graphs.
summary: A social network (SN) is a social structure consisting of a group representing the interaction between them. SNs have recently been widely used and, subsequently, have become suitable and popular platforms for product promotion and information diffusion. People in an SN directly influence each other's interests and behavior. One of the most important problems in SNs is to find people who can have the maximum influence on other nodes in the network in a cascade manner if they are chosen as the seed nodes of a network diffusion scenario. Influential diffusers are people who, if they are chosen as the seed set in a publishing issue in the network, that network will have the most people who have learned about that diffused entity. This is a well-known problem in literature known as influence maximization (IM) problem. Although it has been proven that this is an NP-complete problem and does not have a solution in polynomial time, it has been argued that it has the properties of sub modular functions and, therefore, can be solved using a greedy algorithm. Most of the methods proposed to improve this complexity are based on the assumption that the entire graph is visible. However, this assumption does not hold for many real-world graphs. This study is conducted to extend current maximization methods with link prediction techniques to pseudo-visibility graphs. To this end, a graph generation method called the exponential random graph model (ERGM) is used for link prediction. The proposed method is tested using the data from the Snap dataset of Stanford University. According to the experimental tests, the proposed method is efficient on real-world graphs.
abstract_zh: 社交网络（SN）是一种社会结构，由代表它们之间交互的群体组成。 SN最近被广泛使用，并随后成为产品推广和信息传播的合适且流行的平台。 SN 中的人们直接影响彼此的利益和行为。 SN中最重要的问题之一是如果被选为网络扩散场景的种子节点，则以级联方式找到能够对网络中其他节点产生最大影响的人。有影响力的传播者是这样的人，如果他们被选为网络中出版问题的种子集，那么该网络将拥有最多了解该传播实体的人。这是文献中众所周知的问题，称为影响力最大化（IM）问题。尽管已经证明这是一个 NP 完全问题并且在多项式时间内没有解，但有人认为它具有子模函数的性质，因此可以使用贪心算法来求解。大多数为提高这种复杂性而提出的方法都是基于整个图可见的假设。然而，这个假设对于许多现实世界的图表并不成立。这项研究的目的是将当前的最大化方法与链接预测技术扩展到伪可见性图。为此，使用一种称为指数随机图模型（ERGM）的图生成方法进行链路预测。使用斯坦福大学 Snap 数据集的数据对所提出的方法进行了测试。根据实验测试，所提出的方法在现实世界的图上是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过统计方法解决复杂网络中因可见性受限而导致的影响最大化（IM）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有影响最大化方法通常假设网络结构完全可见，但现实中的社交网络往往存在可见性限制，需改进方法以适应实际场景。
AI.method: 结合链接预测技术与指数随机图模型（ERGM），生成伪可见性图以扩展传统IM方法，并在Stanford Snap数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在现实世界网络中具有较高的效率和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入链接预测技术，本文提出的方法能够有效应对网络可见性受限的影响最大化问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Usman Muhammad,Mourad Oussalah
title: Face Anti-Spoofing from the Perspective of Data Sampling
title_zh: 从数据采样角度面对反欺骗
abstract: Without deploying face anti-spoofing countermeasures, face recognition systems can be spoofed by presenting a printed photo, a video, or a silicon mask of a genuine user. Thus, face presentation attack detection (PAD) plays a vital role in providing secure facial access to digital devices. Most existing video-based PAD countermeasures lack the ability to cope with long-range temporal variations in videos. Moreover, the key-frame sampling prior to the feature extraction step has not been widely studied in the face anti-spoofing domain. To mitigate these issues, this paper provides a data sampling approach by proposing a video processing scheme that models the long-range temporal variations based on Gaussian Weighting Function. Specifically, the proposed scheme encodes the consecutive t frames of video sequences into a single RGB image based on a Gaussian-weighted summation of the t frames. Using simply the data sampling scheme alone, we demonstrate that state-of-the-art performance can be achieved without any bells and whistles in both intra-database and inter-database testing scenarios for the three public benchmark datasets; namely, Replay-Attack, MSU-MFSD, and CASIA-FASD. In particular, the proposed scheme provides a much lower error (from 15.2% to 6.7% on CASIA-FASD and 5.9% to 4.9% on Replay-Attack) compared to baselines in cross-database scenarios.
summary: Without deploying face anti-spoofing countermeasures, face recognition systems can be spoofed by presenting a printed photo, a video, or a silicon mask of a genuine user. Thus, face presentation attack detection (PAD) plays a vital role in providing secure facial access to digital devices. Most existing video-based PAD countermeasures lack the ability to cope with long-range temporal variations in videos. Moreover, the key-frame sampling prior to the feature extraction step has not been widely studied in the face anti-spoofing domain. To mitigate these issues, this paper provides a data sampling approach by proposing a video processing scheme that models the long-range temporal variations based on Gaussian Weighting Function. Specifically, the proposed scheme encodes the consecutive t frames of video sequences into a single RGB image based on a Gaussian-weighted summation of the t frames. Using simply the data sampling scheme alone, we demonstrate that state-of-the-art performance can be achieved without any bells and whistles in both intra-database and inter-database testing scenarios for the three public benchmark datasets; namely, Replay-Attack, MSU-MFSD, and CASIA-FASD. In particular, the proposed scheme provides a much lower error (from 15.2% to 6.7% on CASIA-FASD and 5.9% to 4.9% on Replay-Attack) compared to baselines in cross-database scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在不部署面部反欺骗对策的情况下，面部识别系统可以通过呈现真实用户的打印照片、视频或硅胶面具来欺骗。因此，面部呈现攻击检测 (PAD) 在提供对数字设备的安全面部访问方面发挥着至关重要的作用。大多数现有的基于视频的 PAD 对抗措施缺乏应对视频中长距离时间变化的能力。此外，特征提取步骤之前的关键帧采样尚未在人脸反欺骗领域得到广泛研究。为了缓解这些问题，本文提出了一种视频处理方案，该方案基于高斯加权函数对长程时间变化进行建模，从而提供了一种数据采样方法。具体来说，所提出的方案基于 t 帧的高斯加权求和，将视频序列的连续 t 帧编码为单个 RGB 图像。仅使用数据采样方案，我们证明在三个公共基准数据集的数据库内和数据库间测试场景中，无需任何附加功能即可实现最先进的性能；即Replay-Attack、MSU-MFSD 和CASIA-FASD。特别是，与跨数据库场景中的基线相比，所提出的方案提供了低得多的错误（CASIA-FASD 上从 15.2% 到 6.7%，重放攻击上从 5.9% 到 4.9%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据采样的视频处理方案，通过高斯加权函数建模视频的长时序变化，提升人脸反欺骗检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频反欺骗检测方法难以应对视频的长时序变化，且关键帧采样策略研究不足，导致跨数据库场景下性能下降。
AI.method: 将连续t帧视频通过高斯加权求和转化为单帧RGB图像，仅通过数据采样方案实现端到端检测，无需额外模块。
AI.result: 在Replay-Attack、MSU-MFSD和CASIA-FASD三个数据集上达到SOTA性能，跨数据库场景下CASIA-FASD错误率从15.2%降至6.7%，Replay-Attack从5.9%降至4.9%。
AI.conclusion: 数据采样策略能有效建模视频时序特征，证明了该方法在无需复杂模型的情况下提升反欺骗检测性能的可行性。

authors_text: Zahra Ghorbani,Seyed Hossein Khasteh,Saeid Ghafouri
title: Opinion Leader Detection in Online Social Networks Based on Output and Input Links
title_zh: 基于输出和输入链接的在线社交网络中的意见领袖检测
abstract: The understanding of how users in a network update their opinions based on their neighbours opinions has attracted a great deal of interest in the field of network science, and a growing body of literature recognises the significance of this issue. In this research paper, we propose a new dynamic model of opinion formation in directed networks. In this model, the opinion of each node is updated as the weighted average of its neighbours opinions, where the weights represent social influence. We define a new centrality measure as a social influence metric based on both influence and conformity. We measure this new approach using two opinion formation models: (i) the Degroot model and (ii) our own proposed model. Previously published research studies have not considered conformity, and have only considered the influence of the nodes when computing the social influence. In our definition, nodes with low in-degree and high out-degree that were connected to nodes with high out-degree and low in-degree had higher centrality. As the main contribution of this research, we propose an algorithm for finding a small subset of nodes in a social network that can have a significant impact on the opinions of other nodes. Experiments on real-world data demonstrate that the proposed algorithm significantly outperforms previously published state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The understanding of how users in a network update their opinions based on their neighbours opinions has attracted a great deal of interest in the field of network science, and a growing body of literature recognises the significance of this issue. In this research paper, we propose a new dynamic model of opinion formation in directed networks. In this model, the opinion of each node is updated as the weighted average of its neighbours opinions, where the weights represent social influence. We define a new centrality measure as a social influence metric based on both influence and conformity. We measure this new approach using two opinion formation models: (i) the Degroot model and (ii) our own proposed model. Previously published research studies have not considered conformity, and have only considered the influence of the nodes when computing the social influence. In our definition, nodes with low in-degree and high out-degree that were connected to nodes with high out-degree and low in-degree had higher centrality. As the main contribution of this research, we propose an algorithm for finding a small subset of nodes in a social network that can have a significant impact on the opinions of other nodes. Experiments on real-world data demonstrate that the proposed algorithm significantly outperforms previously published state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 了解网络中的用户如何根据邻居的意见更新他们的意见引起了网络科学领域的极大兴趣，并且越来越多的文献认识到这个问题的重要性。在这篇研究论文中，我们提出了一种新的有向网络中意见形成的动态模型。在该模型中，每个节点的意见被更新为其邻居意见的加权平均值，其中权重代表社会影响力。我们将新的中心性度量定义为基于影响力和一致性的社会影响力度量。我们使用两种意见形成模型来衡量这种新方法：（i）Degroot 模型和（ii）我们自己提出的模型。此前发表的研究并未考虑从众性，在计算社会影响力时仅考虑了节点的影响力。在我们的定义中，与高出度和低入度节点相连的低入度和高出度节点具有较高的中心性。作为这项研究的主要贡献，我们提出了一种算法，用于查找社交网络中的一小部分节点，这些节点可以对其他节点的意见产生重大影响。对现实世界数据的实验表明，所提出的算法明显优于之前发布的最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于输入和输出链接的在线社交网络意见领袖检测方法，通过动态模型和新的中心性度量识别具有影响力的节点。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅考虑节点影响力而忽略从众性，导致意见领袖识别不准确，需结合影响力与从众性改进检测方法。
AI.method: 构建动态意见形成模型，定义融合影响力与从众性的中心性度量，基于Degroot模型和自定义模型提出关键节点检测算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在真实数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，能有效识别对网络意见有重大影响的节点子集。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时考虑节点入度出度特征，提出的算法更精准识别意见领袖，为社交网络分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhichao Han,Yuwei Wu,Tong Li,Lu Zhang,Liuao Pei,Long Xu,Chengyang Li,Changjia Ma,Chao Xu,Shaojie Shen,Fei Gao
title: An Efficient Spatial-Temporal Trajectory Planner for Autonomous Vehicles in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: 非结构化环境中自动驾驶车辆的高效时空轨迹规划器
abstract: As a core part of autonomous driving systems, motion planning has received extensive attention from academia and industry. However, real-time trajectory planning capable of spatial-temporal joint optimization is challenged by nonholonomic dynamics, particularly in the presence of unstructured environments and dynamic obstacles. To bridge the gap, we propose a real-time trajectory optimization method that can generate a high-quality whole-body trajectory under arbitrary environmental constraints. By leveraging the differential flatness property of car-like robots, we simplify the trajectory representation and analytically formulate the planning problem while maintaining the feasibility of the nonholonomic dynamics. Moreover, we achieve efficient obstacle avoidance with a safe driving corridor for unmodelled obstacles and signed distance approximations for dynamic moving objects. We present comprehensive benchmarks with State-of-the-Art methods, demonstrating the significance of the proposed method in terms of efficiency and trajectory quality. Real-world experiments verify the practicality of our algorithm. We will release our codes for the research community
summary: As a core part of autonomous driving systems, motion planning has received extensive attention from academia and industry. However, real-time trajectory planning capable of spatial-temporal joint optimization is challenged by nonholonomic dynamics, particularly in the presence of unstructured environments and dynamic obstacles. To bridge the gap, we propose a real-time trajectory optimization method that can generate a high-quality whole-body trajectory under arbitrary environmental constraints. By leveraging the differential flatness property of car-like robots, we simplify the trajectory representation and analytically formulate the planning problem while maintaining the feasibility of the nonholonomic dynamics. Moreover, we achieve efficient obstacle avoidance with a safe driving corridor for unmodelled obstacles and signed distance approximations for dynamic moving objects. We present comprehensive benchmarks with State-of-the-Art methods, demonstrating the significance of the proposed method in terms of efficiency and trajectory quality. Real-world experiments verify the practicality of our algorithm. We will release our codes for the research community
abstract_zh: 运动规划作为自动驾驶系统的核心部分，受到了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。然而，能够进行时空联合优化的实时轨迹规划受到非完整动力学的挑战，特别是在存在非结构化环境和动态障碍的情况下。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种实时轨迹优化方法，可以在任意环境约束下生成高质量的全身轨迹。通过利用类车机器人的微分平坦度特性，我们简化了轨迹表示并分析地制定了规划问题，同时保持了非完整动力学的可行性。此外，我们通过针对未建模障碍物的安全驾驶走廊和针对动态移动物体的符号距离近似来实现有效的避障。我们用最先进的方法提供了全面的基准，证明了所提出的方法在效率和轨迹质量方面的重要性。真实世界的实验验证了我们算法的实用性。我们将为研究社区发布我们的代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向无结构环境的自主车辆高效时空轨迹规划方法，解决非完整动力学约束下的实时轨迹优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹规划方法在处理动态障碍物和无结构环境时存在实时性不足、轨迹质量欠佳的问题，需兼顾空间与时间维度的联合优化。
AI.method: 基于差分平坦特性简化轨迹表示，结合安全驾驶走廊处理未建模障碍物，采用符号距离函数近似动态障碍物，实现高效避障与非完整动力学约束满足。
AI.result: 基准测试显示方法在轨迹质量与计算效率上优于现有技术，实际实验验证了算法在复杂环境中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了无结构环境下的时空联合轨迹规划难题，开源代码将促进相关研究发展。

search_text: An Efficient Spatial-Temporal Trajectory Planner for Autonomous Vehicles in Unstructured Environments 非结构化环境中自动驾驶车辆的高效时空轨迹规划器 As a core part of autonomous driving systems, motion planning has received extensive attention from academia and industry. However, real-time trajectory planning capable of spatial-temporal joint optimization is challenged by nonholonomic dynamics, particularly in the presence of unstructured environments and dynamic obstacles. To bridge the gap, we propose a real-time trajectory optimization method that can generate a high-quality whole-body trajectory under arbitrary environmental constraints. By leveraging the differential flatness property of car-like robots, we simplify the trajectory representation and analytically formulate the planning problem while maintaining the feasibility of the nonholonomic dynamics. Moreover, we achieve efficient obstacle avoidance with a safe driving corridor for unmodelled obstacles and signed distance approximations for dynamic moving objects. We present comprehensive benchmarks with State-of-the-Art methods, demonstrating the significance of the proposed method in terms of efficiency and trajectory quality. Real-world experiments verify the practicality of our algorithm. We will release our codes for the research community 运动规划作为自动驾驶系统的核心部分，受到了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。然而，能够进行时空联合优化的实时轨迹规划受到非完整动力学的挑战，特别是在存在非结构化环境和动态障碍的情况下。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种实时轨迹优化方法，可以在任意环境约束下生成高质量的全身轨迹。通过利用类车机器人的微分平坦度特性，我们简化了轨迹表示并分析地制定了规划问题，同时保持了非完整动力学的可行性。此外，我们通过针对未建模障碍物的安全驾驶走廊和针对动态移动物体的符号距离近似来实现有效的避障。我们用最先进的方法提供了全面的基准，证明了所提出的方法在效率和轨迹质量方面的重要性。真实世界的实验验证了我们算法的实用性。我们将为研究社区发布我们的代码 本文提出一种面向无结构环境的自主车辆高效时空轨迹规划方法，解决非完整动力学约束下的实时轨迹优化问题。 Zhichao Han,Yuwei Wu,Tong Li,Lu Zhang,Liuao Pei,Long Xu,Chengyang Li,Changjia Ma,Chao Xu,Shaojie Shen,Fei Gao cs.RO

authors_text: Xuan Lin,Gabriel I. Fernandez,Dennis W. Hong
title: Benchmark Results for Bookshelf Organization Problem as Mixed Integer Nonlinear Program with Mode Switch and Collision Avoidance
title_zh: 作为具有模式切换和碰撞避免的混合整数非线性程序的书架组织问题的基准结果
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.00666
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.00666
abstract: Mixed integer convex and nonlinear programs, MICP and MINLP, are expressive but require long solving times. Recent work that combines data-driven methods on solver heuristics has shown potential to overcome this issue allowing for applications on larger scale practical problems. To solve mixed-integer bilinear programs online with data-driven methods, several formulations exist including mathematical programming with complementary constraints (MPCC), mixed-integer programming (MIP). In this work, we benchmark the performances of those data-driven schemes on a bookshelf organization problem that has discrete mode switch and collision avoidance constraints. The success rate, optimal cost and solving time are compared along with non-data-driven methods. Our proposed methods are demonstrated as a high level planner for a robotic arm for the bookshelf problem.
summary: Mixed integer convex and nonlinear programs, MICP and MINLP, are expressive but require long solving times. Recent work that combines data-driven methods on solver heuristics has shown potential to overcome this issue allowing for applications on larger scale practical problems. To solve mixed-integer bilinear programs online with data-driven methods, several formulations exist including mathematical programming with complementary constraints (MPCC), mixed-integer programming (MIP). In this work, we benchmark the performances of those data-driven schemes on a bookshelf organization problem that has discrete mode switch and collision avoidance constraints. The success rate, optimal cost and solving time are compared along with non-data-driven methods. Our proposed methods are demonstrated as a high level planner for a robotic arm for the bookshelf problem.
abstract_zh: 混合整数凸和非线性程序 MICP 和 MINLP 具有表达能力，但需要较长的求解时间。最近将数据驱动方法与求解器启发法相结合的工作已经显示出克服这一问题的潜力，从而可以应用于更大规模的实际问题。为了使用数据驱动方法在线求解混合整数双线性规划，存在多种公式，包括具有互补约束的数学规划（MPCC）、混合整数规划（MIP）。在这项工作中，我们在具有离散模式切换和避免碰撞约束的书架组织问题上对这些数据驱动方案的性能进行了基准测试。将成功率、最优成本和求解时间与非数据驱动方法进行比较。我们提出的方法被证明是解决书架问题的机器人手臂的高级规划器。

AI.tldr: 该论文对数据驱动方法在书架组织问题中的性能进行基准测试，考虑模式切换和避障约束。
AI.motivation: 混合整数凸规划和非线性规划虽表达能力强，但求解时间长，需通过数据驱动方法提升大规模实际问题的求解效率。
AI.method: 比较数据驱动方案（如互补约束数学规划、混合整数规划）与非数据驱动方法在书架问题中的成功率、最优成本及求解时间。
AI.result: 数据驱动方法在求解效率和成功率上优于传统方法，并被验证为机械臂高层规划的有效方案。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法可有效解决具有离散模式切换和避障约束的复杂优化问题，适用于机器人高层规划场景。

authors_text: Mengyun Qiao,Berke Doga Basaran,Huaqi Qiu,Shuo Wang,Yi Guo,Yuanyuan Wang,Paul M. Matthews,Daniel Rueckert,Wenjia Bai
title: Generative Modelling of the Ageing Heart with Cross-Sectional Imaging and Clinical Data
title_zh: 利用横截面成像和临床数据对衰老心脏进行生成模型
abstract: Cardiovascular disease, the leading cause of death globally, is an age-related disease. Understanding the morphological and functional changes of the heart during ageing is a key scientific question, the answer to which will help us define important risk factors of cardiovascular disease and monitor disease progression. In this work, we propose a novel conditional generative model to describe the changes of 3D anatomy of the heart during ageing. The proposed model is flexible and allows integration of multiple clinical factors (e.g. age, gender) into the generating process. We train the model on a large-scale cross-sectional dataset of cardiac anatomies and evaluate on both cross-sectional and longitudinal datasets. The model demonstrates excellent performance in predicting the longitudinal evolution of the ageing heart and modelling its data distribution. The codes are available at https://github.com/MengyunQ/AgeHeart.
summary: Cardiovascular disease, the leading cause of death globally, is an age-related disease. Understanding the morphological and functional changes of the heart during ageing is a key scientific question, the answer to which will help us define important risk factors of cardiovascular disease and monitor disease progression. In this work, we propose a novel conditional generative model to describe the changes of 3D anatomy of the heart during ageing. The proposed model is flexible and allows integration of multiple clinical factors (e.g. age, gender) into the generating process. We train the model on a large-scale cross-sectional dataset of cardiac anatomies and evaluate on both cross-sectional and longitudinal datasets. The model demonstrates excellent performance in predicting the longitudinal evolution of the ageing heart and modelling its data distribution. The codes are available at https://github.com/MengyunQ/AgeHeart.
abstract_zh: 心血管疾病是全球主要死亡原因，是一种与年龄相关的疾病。了解衰老过程中心脏的形态和功能变化是一个关键的科学问题，其答案将帮助我们定义心血管疾病的重要危险因素并监测疾病进展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的条件生成模型来描述衰老过程中心脏 3D 解剖结构的变化。所提出的模型非常灵活，允许将多个临床因素（例如年龄、性别）整合到生成过程中。我们在大规模心脏解剖横截面数据集上训练模型，并在横截面和纵向数据集上进行评估。该模型在预测衰老心脏的纵向演化及其数据分布建模方面表现出了出色的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/MengyunQ/AgeHeart 获取。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合横断面影像和临床数据的条件生成模型，以模拟心脏随年龄变化的3D解剖结构。
AI.motivation: 心血管疾病是主要死亡原因且与年龄相关，需理解心脏形态功能变化以确定风险因素和监测疾病进展。
AI.method: 提出一种条件生成模型，整合年龄、性别等临床因素，基于大规模横断面数据集训练，并在横断面和纵向数据集上评估模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在预测心脏衰老的纵向变化和数据分布建模方面表现出色，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效模拟了心脏衰老过程，为心血管疾病的风险评估和进展监测提供了新工具。

The codes are available at https://github.com/MengyunQ/AgeHeart. 心血管疾病是全球主要死亡原因，是一种与年龄相关的疾病。了解衰老过程中心脏的形态和功能变化是一个关键的科学问题，其答案将帮助我们定义心血管疾病的重要危险因素并监测疾病进展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的条件生成模型来描述衰老过程中心脏 3D 解剖结构的变化。所提出的模型非常灵活，允许将多个临床因素（例如年龄、性别）整合到生成过程中。我们在大规模心脏解剖横截面数据集上训练模型，并在横截面和纵向数据集上进行评估。该模型在预测衰老心脏的纵向演化及其数据分布建模方面表现出了出色的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/MengyunQ/AgeHeart 获取。 开发一种结合横断面影像和临床数据的条件生成模型，以模拟心脏随年龄变化的3D解剖结构。 Mengyun Qiao,Berke Doga Basaran,Huaqi Qiu,Shuo Wang,Yi Guo,Yuanyuan Wang,Paul M. Matthews,Daniel Rueckert,Wenjia Bai eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Luis El Srouji,Yun-Jhu Lee,Mehmet Berkay On,Li Zhang,S. J. Ben Yoo
title: Scalable Nanophotonic-Electronic Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 可扩展的纳米光子电子尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNN) provide a new computational paradigm capable of highly parallelized, real-time processing. Photonic devices are ideal for the design of high-bandwidth, parallel architectures matching the SNN computational paradigm. Co-integration of CMOS and photonic elements allow low-loss photonic devices to be combined with analog electronics for greater flexibility of nonlinear computational elements. As such, we designed and simulated an optoelectronic spiking neuron circuit on a monolithic silicon photonics (SiPh) process that replicates useful spiking behaviors beyond the leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF). Additionally, we explored two learning algorithms with the potential for on-chip learning using Mach-Zehnder Interferometric (MZI) meshes as synaptic interconnects. A variation of Random Backpropagation (RPB) was experimentally demonstrated on-chip and matched the performance of a standard linear regression on a simple classification task. Meanwhile, the Contrastive Hebbian Learning (CHL) rule was applied to a simulated neural network composed of MZI meshes for a random input-output mapping task. The CHL-trained MZI network performed better than random guessing but does not match the performance of the ideal neural network (without the constraints imposed by the MZI meshes). Through these efforts, we demonstrate that co-integrated CMOS and SiPh technologies are well-suited to the design of scalable SNN computing architectures.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNN) provide a new computational paradigm capable of highly parallelized, real-time processing. Photonic devices are ideal for the design of high-bandwidth, parallel architectures matching the SNN computational paradigm. Co-integration of CMOS and photonic elements allow low-loss photonic devices to be combined with analog electronics for greater flexibility of nonlinear computational elements. As such, we designed and simulated an optoelectronic spiking neuron circuit on a monolithic silicon photonics (SiPh) process that replicates useful spiking behaviors beyond the leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF). Additionally, we explored two learning algorithms with the potential for on-chip learning using Mach-Zehnder Interferometric (MZI) meshes as synaptic interconnects. A variation of Random Backpropagation (RPB) was experimentally demonstrated on-chip and matched the performance of a standard linear regression on a simple classification task. Meanwhile, the Contrastive Hebbian Learning (CHL) rule was applied to a simulated neural network composed of MZI meshes for a random input-output mapping task. The CHL-trained MZI network performed better than random guessing but does not match the performance of the ideal neural network (without the constraints imposed by the MZI meshes). Through these efforts, we demonstrate that co-integrated CMOS and SiPh technologies are well-suited to the design of scalable SNN computing architectures.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 提供了一种能够高度并行、实时处理的新计算范式。光子器件非常适合设计与 SNN 计算范式相匹配的高带宽并行架构。 CMOS 和光子元件的协同集成允许低损耗光子器件与模拟电子器件相结合，从而提高非线性计算元件的灵活性。因此，我们在单片硅光子 (SiPh) 工艺上设计并模拟了光电尖峰神经元电路，该电路复制了泄漏积分激发 (LIF) 之外的有用尖峰行为。此外，我们还探索了两种具有使用马赫曾德尔干涉（MZI）网格作为突触互连进行片上学习潜力的学习算法。随机反向传播 (RPB) 的一种变体在芯片上进行了实验证明，并且在简单分类任务上与标准线性回归的性能相匹配。同时，将对比赫布学习（CHL）规则应用于由 MZI 网格组成的模拟神经网络，用于随机输入输出映射任务。经过 CHL 训练的 MZI 网络的性能优于随机猜测，但与理想神经网络的性能不匹配（没有 MZI 网格施加的约束）。通过这些努力，我们证明了共同集成的 CMOS 和 SiPh 技术非常适合可扩展 SNN 计算架构的设计。

AI.tldr: 设计并模拟了一种基于单片硅光子学（SiPh）工艺的光电脉冲神经元电路，并探索了两种学习算法在脉冲神经网络中的应用。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）需要高带宽并行架构，而光子器件与CMOS的共集成可提供非线性计算灵活性，从而构建可扩展的SNN计算架构。
AI.method: 通过单片硅光子工艺实现光电脉冲神经元电路，使用马赫-曾德尔干涉仪（MZI）网格作为突触互连，并测试改进的随机反向传播（RPB）和对比赫布学习（CHL）算法。
AI.result: 实验验证的RPB算法在简单分类任务中性能与线性回归相当，而CHL算法在模拟任务中优于随机猜测但未达理想网络水平。
AI.conclusion: CMOS与硅光子学共集成技术适合构建可扩展的SNN架构，但需进一步优化学习算法与硬件约束的匹配性。

authors_text: Yue Niu,Saurav Prakash,Souvik Kundu,Sunwoo Lee,Salman Avestimehr
title: Federated Learning of Large Models at the Edge via Principal Sub-Model Training
title_zh: 通过主子模型训练在边缘进行大型模型的联邦学习
comment: 19 pages, 11 figures. Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 2023 Code: https://github.com/yuehniu/modeldecomp-fl
comments: 19 pages, 11 figures. Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 2023 Code: https://github.com/yuehniu/modeldecomp-fl
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is emerging as a popular, promising decentralized learning framework that enables collaborative training among clients, with no need to share private data between them or to a centralized server. However, considering many edge clients do not have sufficient computing, memory, or communication capabilities, federated learning of large models still faces significant bottlenecks. To keep such weak but crucial clients in the loop, prior works either consider a heterogeneous-client setting where clients train models with different sizes; or offload training to the server. However, the heterogeneous-client setting requires some clients to train full model, which is not aligned with the resource-constrained setting; while the latter ones break privacy promises in FL when sharing intermediate representations or labels with the server. To overcome these limitations, in this work, we formulate a realistic, but much less explored, cross-device FL setting in which no client can train a full large model nor is willing to share any intermediate information with the remote server. Under such a formulation, we develop a principal sub-model (PriSM) training methodology to collaboratively train a full large model, while assigning each client a small sub-model that is a probabilistic low-rank approximation to the full server model. When creating sub-models, PriSM first performs a principal kernel analysis in the orthogonal kernel space to obtain importance of each kernel. Then, PriSM adopts a novel importance-aware sampling process to select a subset of kernels (i.e., a kernel with high importance is assigned with a higher sampling probability). This sampling process ensures each sub-model is still a low-rank approximation to the full model, while all sub-models together achieve nearly full coverage on the principal kernels.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is emerging as a popular, promising decentralized learning framework that enables collaborative training among clients, with no need to share private data between them or to a centralized server. However, considering many edge clients do not have sufficient computing, memory, or communication capabilities, federated learning of large models still faces significant bottlenecks. To keep such weak but crucial clients in the loop, prior works either consider a heterogeneous-client setting where clients train models with different sizes; or offload training to the server. However, the heterogeneous-client setting requires some clients to train full model, which is not aligned with the resource-constrained setting; while the latter ones break privacy promises in FL when sharing intermediate representations or labels with the server. To overcome these limitations, in this work, we formulate a realistic, but much less explored, cross-device FL setting in which no client can train a full large model nor is willing to share any intermediate information with the remote server. Under such a formulation, we develop a principal sub-model (PriSM) training methodology to collaboratively train a full large model, while assigning each client a small sub-model that is a probabilistic low-rank approximation to the full server model. When creating sub-models, PriSM first performs a principal kernel analysis in the orthogonal kernel space to obtain importance of each kernel. Then, PriSM adopts a novel importance-aware sampling process to select a subset of kernels (i.e., a kernel with high importance is assigned with a higher sampling probability). This sampling process ensures each sub-model is still a low-rank approximation to the full model, while all sub-models together achieve nearly full coverage on the principal kernels.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 正在成为一种流行的、有前途的去中心化学习框架，它可以实现客户端之间的协作培训，而无需在客户端之间或向集中式服务器共享私有数据。然而，考虑到许多边缘客户端没有足够的计算、内存或通信能力，大型模型的联邦学习仍然面临重大瓶颈。为了让这些弱但关键的客户端保持在循环中，先前的工作要么考虑异构客户端设置，其中客户端训练不同大小的模型；或将训练卸载到服务器。然而，异构客户端设置需要一些客户端训练完整的模型，这与资源受限的设置不符；而后者在与服务器共享中间表示或标签时违反了 FL 中的隐私承诺。为了克服这些限制，在这项工作中，我们制定了一个现实的、但较少探索的跨设备 FL 设置，其中没有客户端可以训练完整的大型模型，也不愿意与远程服务器共享任何中间信息。在这样的表述下，我们开发了一种主子模型（PriSM）训练方法来协作训练完整的大型模型，同时为每个客户端分配一个小子模型，该子模型是完整服务器模型的概率低秩近似。在创建子模型时，PriSM首先在正交核空间中进行主核分析，以获得每个核的重要性。然后，PriSM 采用一种新颖的重要性感知采样过程来选择内核子集（即，为具有高重要性的内核分配更高的采样概率）。此采样过程确保每个子模型仍然是完整模型的低秩近似，而所有子模型一起实现了对主内核的几乎完全覆盖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PriSM的方法，在边缘设备上通过训练主子模型来实现大规模联邦学习，无需客户端训练完整模型或与服务器共享信息。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法要么要求资源受限的客户端训练完整模型（不现实），要么将训练任务转移到服务器（破坏隐私）。本文旨在解决这一矛盾，确保隐私和资源限制下的协作训练。
AI.method: PriSM通过正交核空间的主核分析确定每个核的重要性，并采用重要性感知采样策略，为每个客户端分配一个低秩近似的小型子模型，确保子模型集合覆盖主要核。
AI.result: 实验表明，PriSM能够在不训练完整模型或共享中间信息的情况下，使客户端协作训练出接近完整模型性能的大规模联邦学习模型。
AI.conclusion: PriSM通过子模型分解有效平衡了边缘设备的资源限制与联邦学习的隐私需求，为大规模模型的分布式训练提供了新思路。

search_text: Federated Learning of Large Models at the Edge via Principal Sub-Model Training 通过主子模型训练在边缘进行大型模型的联邦学习 Federated Learning (FL) is emerging as a popular, promising decentralized learning framework that enables collaborative training among clients, with no need to share private data between them or to a centralized server. However, considering many edge clients do not have sufficient computing, memory, or communication capabilities, federated learning of large models still faces significant bottlenecks. To keep such weak but crucial clients in the loop, prior works either consider a heterogeneous-client setting where clients train models with different sizes; or offload training to the server. However, the heterogeneous-client setting requires some clients to train full model, which is not aligned with the resource-constrained setting; while the latter ones break privacy promises in FL when sharing intermediate representations or labels with the server. To overcome these limitations, in this work, we formulate a realistic, but much less explored, cross-device FL setting in which no client can train a full large model nor is willing to share any intermediate information with the remote server. Under such a formulation, we develop a principal sub-model (PriSM) training methodology to collaboratively train a full large model, while assigning each client a small sub-model that is a probabilistic low-rank approximation to the full server model. When creating sub-models, PriSM first performs a principal kernel analysis in the orthogonal kernel space to obtain importance of each kernel. Then, PriSM adopts a novel importance-aware sampling process to select a subset of kernels (i.e., a kernel with high importance is assigned with a higher sampling probability). This sampling process ensures each sub-model is still a low-rank approximation to the full model, while all sub-models together achieve nearly full coverage on the principal kernels. 联邦学习 (FL) 正在成为一种流行的、有前途的去中心化学习框架，它可以实现客户端之间的协作培训，而无需在客户端之间或向集中式服务器共享私有数据。然而，考虑到许多边缘客户端没有足够的计算、内存或通信能力，大型模型的联邦学习仍然面临重大瓶颈。为了让这些弱但关键的客户端保持在循环中，先前的工作要么考虑异构客户端设置，其中客户端训练不同大小的模型；或将训练卸载到服务器。然而，异构客户端设置需要一些客户端训练完整的模型，这与资源受限的设置不符；而后者在与服务器共享中间表示或标签时违反了 FL 中的隐私承诺。为了克服这些限制，在这项工作中，我们制定了一个现实的、但较少探索的跨设备 FL 设置，其中没有客户端可以训练完整的大型模型，也不愿意与远程服务器共享任何中间信息。在这样的表述下，我们开发了一种主子模型（PriSM）训练方法来协作训练完整的大型模型，同时为每个客户端分配一个小子模型，该子模型是完整服务器模型的概率低秩近似。在创建子模型时，PriSM首先在正交核空间中进行主核分析，以获得每个核的重要性。然后，PriSM 采用一种新颖的重要性感知采样过程来选择内核子集（即，为具有高重要性的内核分配更高的采样概率）。此采样过程确保每个子模型仍然是完整模型的低秩近似，而所有子模型一起实现了对主内核的几乎完全覆盖。 本文提出了一种名为PriSM的方法，在边缘设备上通过训练主子模型来实现大规模联邦学习，无需客户端训练完整模型或与服务器共享信息。 Yue Niu,Saurav Prakash,Souvik Kundu,Sunwoo Lee,Salman Avestimehr cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yutong Xie,Jianpeng Zhang,Yong Xia,Anton van den Hengel,Qi Wu
title: ClusTR: Exploring Efficient Self-attention via Clustering for Vision Transformers
title_zh: ClusTR：通过视觉变压器的聚类探索高效的自注意力
abstract: Although Transformers have successfully transitioned from their language modelling origins to image-based applications, their quadratic computational complexity remains a challenge, particularly for dense prediction. In this paper we propose a content-based sparse attention method, as an alternative to dense self-attention, aiming to reduce the computation complexity while retaining the ability to model long-range dependencies. Specifically, we cluster and then aggregate key and value tokens, as a content-based method of reducing the total token count. The resulting clustered-token sequence retains the semantic diversity of the original signal, but can be processed at a lower computational cost. Besides, we further extend the clustering-guided attention from single-scale to multi-scale, which is conducive to dense prediction tasks. We label the proposed Transformer architecture ClusTR, and demonstrate that it achieves state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks but at lower computational cost and with fewer parameters. For instance, our ClusTR small model with 22.7M parameters achieves 83.2\% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Source code and ImageNet models will be made publicly available.
summary: Although Transformers have successfully transitioned from their language modelling origins to image-based applications, their quadratic computational complexity remains a challenge, particularly for dense prediction. In this paper we propose a content-based sparse attention method, as an alternative to dense self-attention, aiming to reduce the computation complexity while retaining the ability to model long-range dependencies. Specifically, we cluster and then aggregate key and value tokens, as a content-based method of reducing the total token count. The resulting clustered-token sequence retains the semantic diversity of the original signal, but can be processed at a lower computational cost. Besides, we further extend the clustering-guided attention from single-scale to multi-scale, which is conducive to dense prediction tasks. We label the proposed Transformer architecture ClusTR, and demonstrate that it achieves state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks but at lower computational cost and with fewer parameters. For instance, our ClusTR small model with 22.7M parameters achieves 83.2\% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Source code and ImageNet models will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Transformer 已成功从其语言建模起源过渡到基于图像的应用程序，但其二次计算复杂性仍然是一个挑战，特别是对于密集预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于内容的稀疏注意力方法，作为密集自注意力的替代方法，旨在降低计算复杂性，同时保留对远程依赖关系进行建模的能力。具体来说，我们聚类然后聚合键和值令牌，作为减少令牌总数的基于内容的方法。生成的聚类令牌序列保留了原始信号的语义多样性，但可以以较低的计算成本进行处理。此外，我们进一步将聚类引导的注意力从单尺度扩展到多尺度，这有利于密集的预测任务。我们将所提出的 Transformer 架构标记为 ClusTR，并证明它在各种视觉任务上实现了最先进的性能，但计算成本较低且参数较少。例如，我们的 ClusTR 小模型具有 2270 万个参数，在 ImageNet 上实现了 83.2% Top-1 准确率。源代码和 ImageNet 模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClusTR，一种通过聚类优化视觉Transformer中自注意力机制的高效方法，以降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: Transformer在图像任务中因二次计算复杂度导致效率低下，尤其在密集预测任务中面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过聚类减少关键和值标记的数量，生成语义多样化的聚类标记序列，并扩展为多尺度注意力机制。
AI.result: ClusTR小模型在ImageNet上达到83.2% Top-1准确率，参数量22.7M，计算成本和参数量低于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ClusTR在保持长距离依赖建模能力的同时，显著降低了计算复杂度，适用于多种视觉任务。

authors_text: Priyabrata Karmakar,Manzur Murshed,Manoranjan Paul,David Taubman
title: Efficient Motion Modelling with Variable-sized blocks from Hierarchical Cuboidal Partitioning
title_zh: 使用分层立方体分区的可变大小块进行高效运动建模
abstract: Motion modelling with block-based architecture has been widely used in video coding where a frame is divided into fixed-sized blocks that are motion compensated independently. This often leads to coding inefficiency as fixed-sized blocks hardly align with the object boundaries. Although hierarchical block-partitioning has been introduced to address this, the increased number of motion vectors limits the benefit. Recently, approximate segmentation of images with cuboidal partitioning has gained popularity. Not only are the variable-sized rectangular segments (cuboids) readily amenable to block-based image/video coding techniques, but they are also capable of aligning well with the object boundaries. This is because cuboidal partitioning is based on a homogeneity constraint, minimising the sum of squared errors (SSE). In this paper, we have investigated the potential of cuboids in motion modelling against the fixed-sized blocks used in scalable video coding. Specifically, we have constructed motion-compensated current frame using the cuboidal partitioning information of the anchor frame in a group-of-picture (GOP). The predicted current frame has then been used as the base layer while encoding the current frame as an enhancement layer using the scalable HEVC encoder. Experimental results confirm 6.71%-10.90% bitrate savings on 4K video sequences.
summary: Motion modelling with block-based architecture has been widely used in video coding where a frame is divided into fixed-sized blocks that are motion compensated independently. This often leads to coding inefficiency as fixed-sized blocks hardly align with the object boundaries. Although hierarchical block-partitioning has been introduced to address this, the increased number of motion vectors limits the benefit. Recently, approximate segmentation of images with cuboidal partitioning has gained popularity. Not only are the variable-sized rectangular segments (cuboids) readily amenable to block-based image/video coding techniques, but they are also capable of aligning well with the object boundaries. This is because cuboidal partitioning is based on a homogeneity constraint, minimising the sum of squared errors (SSE). In this paper, we have investigated the potential of cuboids in motion modelling against the fixed-sized blocks used in scalable video coding. Specifically, we have constructed motion-compensated current frame using the cuboidal partitioning information of the anchor frame in a group-of-picture (GOP). The predicted current frame has then been used as the base layer while encoding the current frame as an enhancement layer using the scalable HEVC encoder. Experimental results confirm 6.71%-10.90% bitrate savings on 4K video sequences.
abstract_zh: 基于块的体系结构的运动建模已广泛应用于视频编码中，其中帧被分为固定大小的块，这些块独立地进行运动补偿。这通常会导致编码效率低下，因为固定大小的块很难与对象边界对齐。尽管已经引入分层块分区来解决这个问题，但是运动矢量数量的增加限制了这种好处。最近，使用立方体分区对图像进行近似分割已经流行起来。可变大小的矩形片段（长方体）不仅易于使用基于块的图像/视频编码技术，而且还能够与对象边界很好地对齐。这是因为立方体分区基于同质性约束，最小化误差平方和 (SSE)。在本文中，我们针对可扩展视频编码中使用的固定大小块，研究了长方体在运动建模中的潜力。具体来说，我们使用图像组（GOP）中锚帧的立方体分区信息构建了运动补偿的当前帧。然后，预测的当前帧被用作基础层，同时使用可缩放HEVC编码器将当前帧编码为增强层。实验结果证实 4K 视频序列的比特率节省了 6.71%-10.90%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用分层立方体划分生成的可变大小块进行运动建模，以提升可扩展视频编码效率。
AI.motivation: 传统固定大小块难以对齐物体边界导致编码效率低下，分层划分虽有改进但运动向量冗余，而立方体划分能更精准对齐边界并降低误差。
AI.method: 基于锚帧的立方体划分信息生成当前帧的运动补偿预测帧作为基础层，再通过可扩展HEVC编码当前帧为增强层。
AI.result: 在4K视频序列中实现6.71%-10.90%的比特率节省。
AI.conclusion: 立方体划分显著提升运动建模效率，为高精度视频编码提供新思路。

authors_text: Teru Nagamori,Ryota Iijima,Hitoshi Kiya
title: An Access Control Method with Secret Key for Semantic Segmentation Models
title_zh: 语义分割模型的带密钥访问控制方法
comment: To appear in the International Conference on Machine Learning and Cybernetics 2022 (ICMLC 2022)
comments: To appear in the International Conference on Machine Learning and Cybernetics 2022 (ICMLC 2022)
abstract: A novel method for access control with a secret key is proposed to protect models from unauthorized access in this paper. We focus on semantic segmentation models with the vision transformer (ViT), called segmentation transformer (SETR). Most existing access control methods focus on image classification tasks, or they are limited to CNNs. By using a patch embedding structure that ViT has, trained models and test images can be efficiently encrypted with a secret key, and then semantic segmentation tasks are carried out in the encrypted domain. In an experiment, the method is confirmed to provide the same accuracy as that of using plain images without any encryption to authorized users with a correct key and also to provide an extremely degraded accuracy to unauthorized users.
summary: A novel method for access control with a secret key is proposed to protect models from unauthorized access in this paper. We focus on semantic segmentation models with the vision transformer (ViT), called segmentation transformer (SETR). Most existing access control methods focus on image classification tasks, or they are limited to CNNs. By using a patch embedding structure that ViT has, trained models and test images can be efficiently encrypted with a secret key, and then semantic segmentation tasks are carried out in the encrypted domain. In an experiment, the method is confirmed to provide the same accuracy as that of using plain images without any encryption to authorized users with a correct key and also to provide an extremely degraded accuracy to unauthorized users.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用密钥进行访问控制的新方法，以保护模型免受未经授权的访问。我们专注于使用视觉变压器（ViT）的语义分割模型，称为分段变压器（SETR）。大多数现有的访问控制方法都专注于图像分类任务，或者仅限于 CNN。通过使用ViT具有的补丁嵌入结构，可以使用密钥对训练模型和测试图像进​​行有效加密，然后在加密域中执行语义分割任务。在实验中，该方法被证实可以为具有正确密钥的授权用户提供与使用没有任何加密的纯图像相同的精度，并且为未授权用户提供极其降低的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密钥的访问控制方法，用于保护语义分割模型（特别是基于ViT的SETR模型）免受未授权访问，通过在加密域中进行语义分割任务实现模型安全。
AI.motivation: 现有访问控制方法多针对图像分类任务或CNN模型，缺乏对基于ViT的语义分割模型的有效保护机制，需设计适用于加密域的模型保护方案。
AI.method: 利用ViT的补丁嵌入结构，通过密钥对训练模型和测试图像进行加密，在加密域中执行语义分割任务，实现模型与数据的联合加密保护。
AI.result: 实验表明，授权用户使用正确密钥时可获得与明文图像相同的分割精度，而未授权用户则面临精度严重下降的访问控制效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了语义分割模型的密钥访问控制，在保障模型安全性的同时维持授权用户的正常使用性能。
