search_text: An Access Control Method with Secret Key for Semantic Segmentation Models 语义分割模型的带密钥访问控制方法 A novel method for access control with a secret key is proposed to protect models from unauthorized access in this paper. We focus on semantic segmentation models with the vision transformer (ViT), called segmentation transformer (SETR). Most existing access control methods focus on image classification tasks, or they are limited to CNNs. By using a patch embedding structure that ViT has, trained models and test images can be efficiently encrypted with a secret key, and then semantic segmentation tasks are carried out in the encrypted domain. In an experiment, the method is confirmed to provide the same accuracy as that of using plain images without any encryption to authorized users with a correct key and also to provide an extremely degraded accuracy to unauthorized users. 本文提出了一种使用密钥进行访问控制的新方法，以保护模型免受未经授权的访问。我们专注于使用视觉变压器（ViT）的语义分割模型，称为分段变压器（SETR）。大多数现有的访问控制方法都专注于图像分类任务，或者仅限于 CNN。通过使用ViT具有的补丁嵌入结构，可以使用密钥对训练模型和测试图像进​​行有效加密，然后在加密域中执行语义分割任务。在实验中，该方法被证实可以为具有正确密钥的授权用户提供与使用没有任何加密的纯图像相同的精度，并且为未授权用户提供极其降低的精度。 本文提出一种基于密钥的访问控制方法，用于保护语义分割模型（特别是基于ViT的SETR模型）免受未授权访问，通过在加密域中进行语义分割任务实现模型安全。 Teru Nagamori,Ryota Iijima,Hitoshi Kiya cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Yinglong Wang,Chao Ma,Jianzhuang Liu
title: Removing Rain Streaks via Task Transfer Learning
title_zh: 通过任务迁移学习消除雨纹
abstract: Due to the difficulty in collecting paired real-world training data, image deraining is currently dominated by supervised learning with synthesized data generated by e.g., Photoshop rendering. However, the generalization to real rainy scenes is usually limited due to the gap between synthetic and real-world data. In this paper, we first statistically explore why the supervised deraining models cannot generalize well to real rainy cases, and find the substantial difference of synthetic and real rainy data. Inspired by our studies, we propose to remove rain by learning favorable deraining representations from other connected tasks. In connected tasks, the label for real data can be easily obtained. Hence, our core idea is to learn representations from real data through task transfer to improve deraining generalization. We thus term our learning strategy as \textit{task transfer learning}. If there are more than one connected tasks, we propose to reduce model size by knowledge distillation. The pretrained models for the connected tasks are treated as teachers, all their knowledge is distilled to a student network, so that we reduce the model size, meanwhile preserve effective prior representations from all the connected tasks. At last, the student network is fine-tuned with minority of paired synthetic rainy data to guide the pretrained prior representations to remove rain. Extensive experiments demonstrate that proposed task transfer learning strategy is surprisingly successful and compares favorably with state-of-the-art supervised learning methods and apparently surpass other semi-supervised deraining methods on synthetic data. Particularly, it shows superior generalization over them to real-world scenes.
summary: Due to the difficulty in collecting paired real-world training data, image deraining is currently dominated by supervised learning with synthesized data generated by e.g., Photoshop rendering. However, the generalization to real rainy scenes is usually limited due to the gap between synthetic and real-world data. In this paper, we first statistically explore why the supervised deraining models cannot generalize well to real rainy cases, and find the substantial difference of synthetic and real rainy data. Inspired by our studies, we propose to remove rain by learning favorable deraining representations from other connected tasks. In connected tasks, the label for real data can be easily obtained. Hence, our core idea is to learn representations from real data through task transfer to improve deraining generalization. We thus term our learning strategy as \textit{task transfer learning}. If there are more than one connected tasks, we propose to reduce model size by knowledge distillation. The pretrained models for the connected tasks are treated as teachers, all their knowledge is distilled to a student network, so that we reduce the model size, meanwhile preserve effective prior representations from all the connected tasks. At last, the student network is fine-tuned with minority of paired synthetic rainy data to guide the pretrained prior representations to remove rain. Extensive experiments demonstrate that proposed task transfer learning strategy is surprisingly successful and compares favorably with state-of-the-art supervised learning methods and apparently surpass other semi-supervised deraining methods on synthetic data. Particularly, it shows superior generalization over them to real-world scenes.
abstract_zh: 由于收集配对的真实世界训练数据的困难，图像去雨目前主要由监督学习和由 Photoshop 渲染生成的合成数据主导。然而，由于合成数据与真实数据之间的差距，对真实雨景的推广通常受到限制。在本文中，我们首先在统计上探讨了为什么监督除雨模型不能很好地推广到真实的下雨情况，并发现合成数据和真实下雨数据的实质性差异。受我们研究的启发，我们建议通过从其他相关任务中学习有利的除雨表示来消除降雨。在连接任务中，可以轻松获得真实数据的标签。因此，我们的核心思想是通过任务转移从真实数据中学习表示，以提高去雨泛化能力。因此，我们将我们的学习策略称为 \textit{任务迁移学习}。如果有多个连接任务，我们建议通过知识蒸馏来减小模型大小。连接任务的预训练模型被视为教师，他们的所有知识都被提取到学生网络，以便我们减少模型大小，同时保留所有连接任务的有效先验表示。最后，用少数配对的合成雨数据对学生网络进行微调，以指导预先训练的先验表示去除雨。大量的实验表明，所提出的任务迁移学习策略令人惊讶地成功，并且与最先进的监督学习方法相比毫不逊色，并且明显超越了合成数据上的其他半监督去雨方法。特别是，它对现实世界场景表现出了优于它们的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过任务迁移学习去除图像中的雨痕，以解决合成数据与真实场景间的差距问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖合成数据训练去雨模型，但因合成数据与真实场景存在差异，导致模型泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 从其他相关任务中学习真实数据的表示，通过知识蒸馏整合多个预训练模型的知识，并用少量合成数据微调学生网络。
AI.result: 该方法在合成数据和真实场景中均优于现有监督学习和半监督去雨方法，尤其在真实场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 任务迁移学习通过利用真实数据相关任务的先验知识，有效提升了去雨模型在真实场景中的泛化能力。

authors_text: Ju-Seung Byun,Andrew Perrault
title: Normality-Guided Distributional Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Control
title_zh: 用于连续控制的正态引导分布强化学习
abstract: Learning a predictive model of the mean return, or value function, plays a critical role in many reinforcement learning algorithms. Distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) has been shown to improve performance by modeling the value distribution, not just the mean. We study the value distribution in several continuous control tasks and find that the learned value distribution is empirically quite close to normal. We design a method that exploits this property, employing variances predicted from a variance network, along with returns, to analytically compute target quantile bars representing a normal for our distributional value function. In addition, we propose a policy update strategy based on the correctness as measured by structural characteristics of the value distribution not present in the standard value function. The approach we outline is compatible with many DRL structures. We use two representative on-policy algorithms, PPO and TRPO, as testbeds. Our method yields statistically significant improvements in 10 out of 16 continuous task settings, while utilizing a reduced number of weights and achieving faster training time compared to an ensemble-based method for quantifying value distribution uncertainty.
summary: Learning a predictive model of the mean return, or value function, plays a critical role in many reinforcement learning algorithms. Distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) has been shown to improve performance by modeling the value distribution, not just the mean. We study the value distribution in several continuous control tasks and find that the learned value distribution is empirically quite close to normal. We design a method that exploits this property, employing variances predicted from a variance network, along with returns, to analytically compute target quantile bars representing a normal for our distributional value function. In addition, we propose a policy update strategy based on the correctness as measured by structural characteristics of the value distribution not present in the standard value function. The approach we outline is compatible with many DRL structures. We use two representative on-policy algorithms, PPO and TRPO, as testbeds. Our method yields statistically significant improvements in 10 out of 16 continuous task settings, while utilizing a reduced number of weights and achieving faster training time compared to an ensemble-based method for quantifying value distribution uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 学习平均回报或价值函数的预测模型在许多强化学习算法中起着至关重要的作用。分布式强化学习 (DRL) 已被证明可以通过对值分布（而不仅仅是平均值）进行建模来提高性能。我们研究了几个连续控制任务中的值分布，发现学习到的值分布在经验上非常接近正态分布。我们设计了一种利用此属性的方法，采用从方差网络预测的方差以及回报来分析计算代表分布值函数正态的目标分位数条。此外，我们提出了一种基于正确性的策略更新策略，该正确性是通过标准价值函数中不存在的价值分布的结构特征来衡量的。我们概述的方法与许多 DRL 结构兼容。我们使用两种代表性的同策略算法 PPO 和 TRPO 作为测试平台。与基于集成的量化值分布不确定性的方法相比，我们的方法在 16 个连续任务设置中的 10 个中产生了统计上显着的改进，同时利用减少的权重数量并实现更快的训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于价值分布正态性特性的分布强化学习方法，用于改进连续控制任务中的策略优化。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习仅关注价值函数均值，而分布强化学习通过建模完整价值分布提升性能。作者发现连续控制任务中的价值分布近似正态分布，从而提出利用该特性优化算法的新思路。
AI.method: 设计方差网络预测分布方差，结合回报计算目标分位数构建正态分布；提出基于价值分布结构特征的策略更新方法，并在PPO/TRPO框架中验证。
AI.result: 在16个连续控制任务中10个取得统计显著提升，参数量比集成方法减少且训练速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 利用价值分布正态性可有效提升DRL性能，方法具有结构通用性且计算效率更优。

search_text: Normality-Guided Distributional Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Control 用于连续控制的正态引导分布强化学习 Learning a predictive model of the mean return, or value function, plays a critical role in many reinforcement learning algorithms. Distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) has been shown to improve performance by modeling the value distribution, not just the mean. We study the value distribution in several continuous control tasks and find that the learned value distribution is empirically quite close to normal. We design a method that exploits this property, employing variances predicted from a variance network, along with returns, to analytically compute target quantile bars representing a normal for our distributional value function. In addition, we propose a policy update strategy based on the correctness as measured by structural characteristics of the value distribution not present in the standard value function. The approach we outline is compatible with many DRL structures. We use two representative on-policy algorithms, PPO and TRPO, as testbeds. Our method yields statistically significant improvements in 10 out of 16 continuous task settings, while utilizing a reduced number of weights and achieving faster training time compared to an ensemble-based method for quantifying value distribution uncertainty. 学习平均回报或价值函数的预测模型在许多强化学习算法中起着至关重要的作用。分布式强化学习 (DRL) 已被证明可以通过对值分布（而不仅仅是平均值）进行建模来提高性能。我们研究了几个连续控制任务中的值分布，发现学习到的值分布在经验上非常接近正态分布。我们设计了一种利用此属性的方法，采用从方差网络预测的方差以及回报来分析计算代表分布值函数正态的目标分位数条。此外，我们提出了一种基于正确性的策略更新策略，该正确性是通过标准价值函数中不存在的价值分布的结构特征来衡量的。我们概述的方法与许多 DRL 结构兼容。我们使用两种代表性的同策略算法 PPO 和 TRPO 作为测试平台。与基于集成的量化值分布不确定性的方法相比，我们的方法在 16 个连续任务设置中的 10 个中产生了统计上显着的改进，同时利用减少的权重数量并实现更快的训练时间。 本文提出一种基于价值分布正态性特性的分布强化学习方法，用于改进连续控制任务中的策略优化。 Ju-Seung Byun,Andrew Perrault cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yinsong Xu,Zhuqing Jiang,Aidong Men,Yang Liu,Qingchao Chen
title: Delving into the Continuous Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 深入研究连续域适应
abstract: Existing domain adaptation methods assume that domain discrepancies are caused by a few discrete attributes and variations, e.g., art, real, painting, quickdraw, etc. We argue that this is not realistic as it is implausible to define the real-world datasets using a few discrete attributes. Therefore, we propose to investigate a new problem namely the Continuous Domain Adaptation (CDA) through the lens where infinite domains are formed by continuously varying attributes. Leveraging knowledge of two labeled source domains and several observed unlabeled target domains data, the objective of CDA is to learn a generalized model for whole data distribution with the continuous attribute. Besides the contributions of formulating a new problem, we also propose a novel approach as a strong CDA baseline. To be specific, firstly we propose a novel alternating training strategy to reduce discrepancies among multiple domains meanwhile generalize to unseen target domains. Secondly, we propose a continuity constraint when estimating the cross-domain divergence measurement. Finally, to decouple the discrepancy from the mini-batch size, we design a domain-specific queue to maintain the global view of the source domain that further boosts the adaptation performances. Our method is proven to achieve the state-of-the-art in CDA problem using extensive experiments. The code is available at https://github.com/SPIresearch/CDA.
summary: Existing domain adaptation methods assume that domain discrepancies are caused by a few discrete attributes and variations, e.g., art, real, painting, quickdraw, etc. We argue that this is not realistic as it is implausible to define the real-world datasets using a few discrete attributes. Therefore, we propose to investigate a new problem namely the Continuous Domain Adaptation (CDA) through the lens where infinite domains are formed by continuously varying attributes. Leveraging knowledge of two labeled source domains and several observed unlabeled target domains data, the objective of CDA is to learn a generalized model for whole data distribution with the continuous attribute. Besides the contributions of formulating a new problem, we also propose a novel approach as a strong CDA baseline. To be specific, firstly we propose a novel alternating training strategy to reduce discrepancies among multiple domains meanwhile generalize to unseen target domains. Secondly, we propose a continuity constraint when estimating the cross-domain divergence measurement. Finally, to decouple the discrepancy from the mini-batch size, we design a domain-specific queue to maintain the global view of the source domain that further boosts the adaptation performances. Our method is proven to achieve the state-of-the-art in CDA problem using extensive experiments. The code is available at https://github.com/SPIresearch/CDA.
abstract_zh: 现有的领域适应方法假设领域差异是由一些离散的属性和变化引起的，例如艺术、真实、绘画、快速绘制等。我们认为这是不现实的，因为使用一些离散的属性来定义现实世界的数据集是不合理的。因此，我们建议通过连续变化的属性形成无限域的镜头来研究一个新问题，即连续域适应（CDA）。利用两个标记源域和几个观察到的未标记目标域数据的知识，CDA 的目标是学习具有连续属性的整个数据分布的广义模型。除了提出新问题的贡献之外，我们还提出了一种新方法作为强大的 CDA 基线。具体来说，首先我们提出了一种新颖的交替训练策略，以减少多个领域之间的差异，同时推广到未见过的目标领域。其次，我们在估计跨域散度测量时提出了连续性约束。最后，为了消除小批量大小的差异，我们设计了一个特定于域的队列来维护源域的全局视图，从而进一步提高自适应性能。通过大量的实验，我们的方法被证明可以在 CDA 问题上达到最先进的水平。该代码可在 https://github.com/SPIresearch/CDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出连续领域适应（CDA）问题，研究如何通过无限领域形成的连续属性变化来学习通用模型。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法假设领域差异由少数离散属性引起，但现实世界数据集难以用离散属性定义，因此需要更符合实际的连续领域适应方法。
AI.method: 提出交替训练策略减少多领域差异，设计连续性约束估计跨领域分歧，并构建领域特定队列解耦差异与小批量尺寸的影响。
AI.result: 方法在CDA任务中达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过新问题定义和创新方法，本文为连续领域适应提供了有效解决方案并验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Forough Majidi,Moses Openja,Foutse Khomh,Heng Li
title: An Empirical Study on the Usage of Automated Machine Learning Tools
title_zh: 自动化机器学习工具使用的实证研究
comment: 10 pages, 2 reference pages, 7 figures, accepted at the International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution (ICSME) 2022
comments: 10 pages, 2 reference pages, 7 figures, accepted at the International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution (ICSME) 2022
abstract: The popularity of automated machine learning (AutoML) tools in different domains has increased over the past few years. Machine learning (ML) practitioners use AutoML tools to automate and optimize the process of feature engineering, model training, and hyperparameter optimization and so on. Recent work performed qualitative studies on practitioners' experiences of using AutoML tools and compared different AutoML tools based on their performance and provided features, but none of the existing work studied the practices of using AutoML tools in real-world projects at a large scale. Therefore, we conducted an empirical study to understand how ML practitioners use AutoML tools in their projects. To this end, we examined the top 10 most used AutoML tools and their respective usages in a large number of open-source project repositories hosted on GitHub. The results of our study show 1) which AutoML tools are mostly used by ML practitioners and 2) the characteristics of the repositories that use these AutoML tools. Also, we identified the purpose of using AutoML tools (e.g. model parameter sampling, search space management, model evaluation/error-analysis, Data/ feature transformation, and data labeling) and the stages of the ML pipeline (e.g. feature engineering) where AutoML tools are used. Finally, we report how often AutoML tools are used together in the same source code files. We hope our results can help ML practitioners learn about different AutoML tools and their usages, so that they can pick the right tool for their purposes. Besides, AutoML tool developers can benefit from our findings to gain insight into the usages of their tools and improve their tools to better fit the users' usages and needs.
summary: The popularity of automated machine learning (AutoML) tools in different domains has increased over the past few years. Machine learning (ML) practitioners use AutoML tools to automate and optimize the process of feature engineering, model training, and hyperparameter optimization and so on. Recent work performed qualitative studies on practitioners' experiences of using AutoML tools and compared different AutoML tools based on their performance and provided features, but none of the existing work studied the practices of using AutoML tools in real-world projects at a large scale. Therefore, we conducted an empirical study to understand how ML practitioners use AutoML tools in their projects. To this end, we examined the top 10 most used AutoML tools and their respective usages in a large number of open-source project repositories hosted on GitHub. The results of our study show 1) which AutoML tools are mostly used by ML practitioners and 2) the characteristics of the repositories that use these AutoML tools. Also, we identified the purpose of using AutoML tools (e.g. model parameter sampling, search space management, model evaluation/error-analysis, Data/ feature transformation, and data labeling) and the stages of the ML pipeline (e.g. feature engineering) where AutoML tools are used. Finally, we report how often AutoML tools are used together in the same source code files. We hope our results can help ML practitioners learn about different AutoML tools and their usages, so that they can pick the right tool for their purposes. Besides, AutoML tool developers can benefit from our findings to gain insight into the usages of their tools and improve their tools to better fit the users' usages and needs.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 工具在不同领域的普及度不断提高。机器学习（ML）从业者使用AutoML工具来自动化和优化特征工程、模型训练和超参数优化等过程。最近的工作对从业者使用 AutoML 工具的体验进行了定性研究，并根据性能和提供的功能对不同的 AutoML 工具进行了比较，但现有的工作都没有研究在实际项目中大规模使用 AutoML 工具的实践。因此，我们进行了一项实证研究，以了解机器学习从业者如何在他们的项目中使用 AutoML 工具。为此，我们研究了 GitHub 上托管的大量开源项目存储库中最常用的 10 个 AutoML 工具及其各自的用法。我们的研究结果显示 1) 机器学习从业者最常使用哪些 AutoML 工具，以及 2) 使用这些 AutoML 工具的存储库的特征。此外，我们还确定了使用 AutoML 工具的目的（例如模型参数采样、搜索空间管理、模型评估/错误分析、数据/特征转换和数据标记）以及使用 AutoML 工具的 ML 管道的阶段（例如特征工程）。最后，我们报告了 AutoML 工具在同一源代码文件中一起使用的频率。我们希望我们的结果能够帮助机器学习从业者了解不同的 AutoML 工具及其用法，以便他们能够根据自己的目的选择正确的工具。此外，AutoML 工具开发人员可以从我们的研究结果中受益，深入了解其工具的用法并改进其工具，以更好地满足用户的用法和需求。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究分析了机器学习从业者在实际项目中使用自动化机器学习（AutoML）工具的实践情况。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究对AutoML工具的性能和功能进行了比较，但缺乏对大规模真实项目中使用情况的系统性分析。
AI.method: 研究通过分析GitHub上大量开源项目仓库，考察了排名前10的AutoML工具的使用情况及其在机器学习流程中的应用阶段。
AI.result: 确定了最受从业者使用的AutoML工具、其使用场景（如参数采样、特征工程）、以及工具在项目中的共现频率等关键特征。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为从业者选择合适工具提供参考，同时帮助开发者优化工具以满足实际需求。

Also, we identified the purpose of using AutoML tools (e.g. model parameter sampling, search space management, model evaluation/error-analysis, Data/ feature transformation, and data labeling) and the stages of the ML pipeline (e.g. feature engineering) where AutoML tools are used. Finally, we report how often AutoML tools are used together in the same source code files. We hope our results can help ML practitioners learn about different AutoML tools and their usages, so that they can pick the right tool for their purposes. Besides, AutoML tool developers can benefit from our findings to gain insight into the usages of their tools and improve their tools to better fit the users' usages and needs. 过去几年，自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 工具在不同领域的普及度不断提高。机器学习（ML）从业者使用AutoML工具来自动化和优化特征工程、模型训练和超参数优化等过程。最近的工作对从业者使用 AutoML 工具的体验进行了定性研究，并根据性能和提供的功能对不同的 AutoML 工具进行了比较，但现有的工作都没有研究在实际项目中大规模使用 AutoML 工具的实践。因此，我们进行了一项实证研究，以了解机器学习从业者如何在他们的项目中使用 AutoML 工具。为此，我们研究了 GitHub 上托管的大量开源项目存储库中最常用的 10 个 AutoML 工具及其各自的用法。我们的研究结果显示 1) 机器学习从业者最常使用哪些 AutoML 工具，以及 2) 使用这些 AutoML 工具的存储库的特征。此外，我们还确定了使用 AutoML 工具的目的（例如模型参数采样、搜索空间管理、模型评估/错误分析、数据/特征转换和数据标记）以及使用 AutoML 工具的 ML 管道的阶段（例如特征工程）。最后，我们报告了 AutoML 工具在同一源代码文件中一起使用的频率。我们希望我们的结果能够帮助机器学习从业者了解不同的 AutoML 工具及其用法，以便他们能够根据自己的目的选择正确的工具。此外，AutoML 工具开发人员可以从我们的研究结果中受益，深入了解其工具的用法并改进其工具，以更好地满足用户的用法和需求。 本文通过实证研究分析了机器学习从业者在实际项目中使用自动化机器学习（AutoML）工具的实践情况。 Forough Majidi,Moses Openja,Foutse Khomh,Heng Li cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Youbao Tang,Ning Zhang,Yirui Wang,Shenghua He,Mei Han,Jing Xiao,Ruei-Sung Lin
title: Accurate and Robust Lesion RECIST Diameter Prediction and Segmentation with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行准确且稳健的病变 RECIST 直径预测和分割
comment: One of a series of works about lesion RECIST diameter prediction and weakly-supervised lesion segmentation (MICCAI 2022)
comments: One of a series of works about lesion RECIST diameter prediction and weakly-supervised lesion segmentation (MICCAI 2022)
abstract: Automatically measuring lesion/tumor size with RECIST (Response Evaluation Criteria In Solid Tumors) diameters and segmentation is important for computer-aided diagnosis. Although it has been studied in recent years, there is still space to improve its accuracy and robustness, such as (1) enhancing features by incorporating rich contextual information while keeping a high spatial resolution and (2) involving new tasks and losses for joint optimization. To reach this goal, this paper proposes a transformer-based network (MeaFormer, Measurement transFormer) for lesion RECIST diameter prediction and segmentation (LRDPS). It is formulated as three correlative and complementary tasks: lesion segmentation, heatmap prediction, and keypoint regression. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time to use keypoint regression for RECIST diameter prediction. MeaFormer can enhance high-resolution features by employing transformers to capture their long-range dependencies. Two consistency losses are introduced to explicitly build relationships among these tasks for better optimization. Experiments show that MeaFormer achieves the state-of-the-art performance of LRDPS on the large-scale DeepLesion dataset and produces promising results of two downstream clinic-relevant tasks, i.e., 3D lesion segmentation and RECIST assessment in longitudinal studies.
summary: Automatically measuring lesion/tumor size with RECIST (Response Evaluation Criteria In Solid Tumors) diameters and segmentation is important for computer-aided diagnosis. Although it has been studied in recent years, there is still space to improve its accuracy and robustness, such as (1) enhancing features by incorporating rich contextual information while keeping a high spatial resolution and (2) involving new tasks and losses for joint optimization. To reach this goal, this paper proposes a transformer-based network (MeaFormer, Measurement transFormer) for lesion RECIST diameter prediction and segmentation (LRDPS). It is formulated as three correlative and complementary tasks: lesion segmentation, heatmap prediction, and keypoint regression. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time to use keypoint regression for RECIST diameter prediction. MeaFormer can enhance high-resolution features by employing transformers to capture their long-range dependencies. Two consistency losses are introduced to explicitly build relationships among these tasks for better optimization. Experiments show that MeaFormer achieves the state-of-the-art performance of LRDPS on the large-scale DeepLesion dataset and produces promising results of two downstream clinic-relevant tasks, i.e., 3D lesion segmentation and RECIST assessment in longitudinal studies.
abstract_zh: 使用 RECIST（实体瘤反应评估标准）直径和分割自动测量病灶/肿瘤大小对于计算机辅助诊断非常重要。尽管近年来对其进行了研究，但其准确性和鲁棒性仍有提高的空间，例如（1）通过结合丰富的上下文信息来增强特征，同时保持高空间分辨率；（2）涉及新的任务和损失以进行联合优化。为了实现这一目标，本文提出了一种基于变压器的网络（MeaFormer、Measurement transFormer），用于病变 RECIST 直径预测和分割（LRDPS）。它被表述为三个相关且互补的任务：病灶分割、热图预测和关键点回归。据我们所知，这是第一次使用关键点回归进行 RECIST 直径预测。 MeaFormer 可以通过使用转换器来捕获其远程依赖性来增强高分辨率特征。引入两个一致性损失来显式地建立这些任务之间的关系以实现更好的优化。实验表明，MeaFormer 在大规模 DeepLesion 数据集上实现了 LRDPS 的最先进性能，并在两个下游临床相关任务（即纵向研究中的 3D 病灶分割和 RECIST 评估）中产生了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的MeaFormer网络，用于提高病变RECIST直径预测和分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在保持高空间分辨率的同时难以有效融合上下文信息，且缺乏联合优化新任务与损失函数的设计，导致准确性和鲁棒性仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 设计MeaFormer网络，将病变分割、热图预测和关键点回归作为三个关联任务，利用Transformer捕捉长距离依赖关系，并引入两种一致性损失建立任务间关系。
AI.result: 在DeepLesion数据集上达到LRDPS任务的最先进水平，并在三维病变分割和纵向RECIST评估等下游临床任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过多任务联合优化与Transformer特征增强，MeaFormer有效提升了病变测量的准确性与鲁棒性，为临床应用提供了新方法。

authors_text: Muskan Garg,Naveen Aggarwal
title: Minimal Feature Analysis for Isolated Digit Recognition for varying encoding rates in noisy environments
title_zh: 噪声环境中不同编码率的孤立数字识别的最小特征分析
abstract: This research work is about recent development made in speech recognition. In this research work, analysis of isolated digit recognition in the presence of different bit rates and at different noise levels has been performed. This research work has been carried using audacity and HTK toolkit. Hidden Markov Model (HMM) is the recognition model which was used to perform this experiment. The feature extraction techniques used are Mel Frequency Cepstrum coefficient (MFCC), Linear Predictive Coding (LPC), perceptual linear predictive (PLP), mel spectrum (MELSPEC), filter bank (FBANK). There were three types of different noise levels which have been considered for testing of data. These include random noise, fan noise and random noise in real time environment. This was done to analyse the best environment which can used for real time applications. Further, five different types of commonly used bit rates at different sampling rates were considered to find out the most optimum bit rate.
summary: This research work is about recent development made in speech recognition. In this research work, analysis of isolated digit recognition in the presence of different bit rates and at different noise levels has been performed. This research work has been carried using audacity and HTK toolkit. Hidden Markov Model (HMM) is the recognition model which was used to perform this experiment. The feature extraction techniques used are Mel Frequency Cepstrum coefficient (MFCC), Linear Predictive Coding (LPC), perceptual linear predictive (PLP), mel spectrum (MELSPEC), filter bank (FBANK). There were three types of different noise levels which have been considered for testing of data. These include random noise, fan noise and random noise in real time environment. This was done to analyse the best environment which can used for real time applications. Further, five different types of commonly used bit rates at different sampling rates were considered to find out the most optimum bit rate.
abstract_zh: 这项研究工作是关于语音识别领域的最新发展。在这项研究工作中，对不同比特率和不同噪声水平下的孤立数字识别进行了分析。这项研究工作是使用 audacity 和 HTK 工具包进行的。隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）是用于执行该实验的识别模型。使用的特征提取技术有梅尔频率倒谱系数（MFCC）、线性预测编码（LPC）、感知线性预测（PLP）、梅尔谱（MELSPEC）、滤波器组（FBANK）。数据测试考虑了三种不同的噪声水平。其中包括随机噪声、风扇噪声和实时环境中的随机噪声。这样做是为了分析可用于实时应用程序的最佳环境。此外，考虑了不同采样率下五种不同类型的常用比特率，以找出最佳比特率。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在不同编码率和噪声环境下孤立数字识别的最小特征分析。
AI.motivation: 探索在不同噪声水平和编码率下最优的特征提取方法及参数设置，以提升实时语音识别系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用HMM模型，结合MFCC、LPC、PLP等特征提取技术，通过Audacity和HTK工具包，在随机噪声、风扇噪声及实时环境噪声中测试五种不同比特率的性能。
AI.result: 确定了在不同噪声环境下表现最佳的特征参数及最优比特率组合，为实际应用提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 在噪声干扰下，特定特征提取方法与适中比特率结合可有效提升孤立数字识别的准确性与稳定性。

authors_text: Joon Sung Park,Joseph Seering,Michael S. Bernstein
title: Measuring the Prevalence of Anti-Social Behavior in Online Communities
title_zh: 衡量在线社区中反社会行为的普遍程度
comment: This work will appear in the Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW (CSCW'22)
comments: This work will appear in the Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW (CSCW'22)
abstract: With increasing attention to online anti-social behaviors such as personal attacks and bigotry, it is critical to have an accurate accounting of how widespread anti-social behaviors are. In this paper, we empirically measure the prevalence of anti-social behavior in one of the world's most popular online community platforms. We operationalize this goal as measuring the proportion of unmoderated comments in the 97 most popular communities on Reddit that violate eight widely accepted platform norms. To achieve this goal, we contribute a human-AI pipeline for identifying these violations and a bootstrap sampling method to quantify measurement uncertainty. We find that 6.25% (95% Confidence Interval [5.36%, 7.13%]) of all comments in 2016, and 4.28% (95% CI [2.50%, 6.26%]) in 2020-2021, are violations of these norms. Most anti-social behaviors remain unmoderated: moderators only removed one in twenty violating comments in 2016, and one in ten violating comments in 2020. Personal attacks were the most prevalent category of norm violation; pornography and bigotry were the most likely to be moderated, while politically inflammatory comments and misogyny/vulgarity were the least likely to be moderated. This paper offers a method and set of empirical results for tracking these phenomena as both the social practices (e.g., moderation) and technical practices (e.g., design) evolve.
summary: With increasing attention to online anti-social behaviors such as personal attacks and bigotry, it is critical to have an accurate accounting of how widespread anti-social behaviors are. In this paper, we empirically measure the prevalence of anti-social behavior in one of the world's most popular online community platforms. We operationalize this goal as measuring the proportion of unmoderated comments in the 97 most popular communities on Reddit that violate eight widely accepted platform norms. To achieve this goal, we contribute a human-AI pipeline for identifying these violations and a bootstrap sampling method to quantify measurement uncertainty. We find that 6.25% (95% Confidence Interval [5.36%, 7.13%]) of all comments in 2016, and 4.28% (95% CI [2.50%, 6.26%]) in 2020-2021, are violations of these norms. Most anti-social behaviors remain unmoderated: moderators only removed one in twenty violating comments in 2016, and one in ten violating comments in 2020. Personal attacks were the most prevalent category of norm violation; pornography and bigotry were the most likely to be moderated, while politically inflammatory comments and misogyny/vulgarity were the least likely to be moderated. This paper offers a method and set of empirical results for tracking these phenomena as both the social practices (e.g., moderation) and technical practices (e.g., design) evolve.
abstract_zh: 随着人们对人身攻击和偏执等在线反社会行为的日益关注，准确统计反社会行为的普遍程度至关重要。在本文中，我们根据经验测量了世界上最受欢迎的在线社区平台之一中反社会行为的流行程度。我们将这一目标具体化为衡量 Reddit 上 97 个最受欢迎的社区中未经审核的评论违反八项广泛接受的平台规范的比例。为了实现这一目标，我们提供了一个人类人工智能管道来识别这些违规行为，并提供了一种引导采样方法来量化测量不确定性。我们发现，2016 年所有评论中有 6.25%（95% 置信区间 [5.36%, 7.13%]）以及 2020-2021 年所有评论中的 4.28%（95% CI [2.50%, 6.26%]）违反了这些规范。大多数反社会行为仍然不受控制：2016 年版主仅删除了十分之一的违规评论，而 2020 年则删除了十分之一的违规评论。人身攻击是最常见的违反规范行为；色情和偏执最有可能受到缓和，而政治煽动性评论和厌女症/粗俗则最不可能受到缓和。本文提供了一种方法和一组实证结果，用于随着社会实践（例如，节制）和技术实践（例如，设计）的发展来跟踪这些现象。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在测量Reddit平台上反社会行为的普遍性，通过分析未被审查的违规评论比例，评估其随时间的变化趋势。
AI.motivation: 随着网络反社会行为（如人身攻击、偏见）的关注度上升，亟需准确数据量化其普遍性以指导平台治理和社会研究。
AI.method: 构建人类-AI协作流程识别违规评论，结合引导抽样法量化不确定性，分析2016年及2020-2021年Reddit 97个热门社区的评论数据。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了追踪反社会行为演变的量化方法，揭示了平台审查机制与内容类型间的关联，为技术设计与社会规范调整提供依据。

search_text: Measuring the Prevalence of Anti-Social Behavior in Online Communities 衡量在线社区中反社会行为的普遍程度 With increasing attention to online anti-social behaviors such as personal attacks and bigotry, it is critical to have an accurate accounting of how widespread anti-social behaviors are. In this paper, we empirically measure the prevalence of anti-social behavior in one of the world's most popular online community platforms. We operationalize this goal as measuring the proportion of unmoderated comments in the 97 most popular communities on Reddit that violate eight widely accepted platform norms. To achieve this goal, we contribute a human-AI pipeline for identifying these violations and a bootstrap sampling method to quantify measurement uncertainty. We find that 6.25% (95% Confidence Interval [5.36%, 7.13%]) of all comments in 2016, and 4.28% (95% CI [2.50%, 6.26%]) in 2020-2021, are violations of these norms. Most anti-social behaviors remain unmoderated: moderators only removed one in twenty violating comments in 2016, and one in ten violating comments in 2020. Personal attacks were the most prevalent category of norm violation; pornography and bigotry were the most likely to be moderated, while politically inflammatory comments and misogyny/vulgarity were the least likely to be moderated. This paper offers a method and set of empirical results for tracking these phenomena as both the social practices (e.g., moderation) and technical practices (e.g., design) evolve. 随着人们对人身攻击和偏执等在线反社会行为的日益关注，准确统计反社会行为的普遍程度至关重要。在本文中，我们根据经验测量了世界上最受欢迎的在线社区平台之一中反社会行为的流行程度。我们将这一目标具体化为衡量 Reddit 上 97 个最受欢迎的社区中未经审核的评论违反八项广泛接受的平台规范的比例。为了实现这一目标，我们提供了一个人类人工智能管道来识别这些违规行为，并提供了一种引导采样方法来量化测量不确定性。我们发现，2016 年所有评论中有 6.25%（95% 置信区间 [5.36%, 7.13%]）以及 2020-2021 年所有评论中的 4.28%（95% CI [2.50%, 6.26%]）违反了这些规范。大多数反社会行为仍然不受控制：2016 年版主仅删除了十分之一的违规评论，而 2020 年则删除了十分之一的违规评论。人身攻击是最常见的违反规范行为；色情和偏执最有可能受到缓和，而政治煽动性评论和厌女症/粗俗则最不可能受到缓和。本文提供了一种方法和一组实证结果，用于随着社会实践（例如，节制）和技术实践（例如，设计）的发展来跟踪这些现象。 本文旨在测量Reddit平台上反社会行为的普遍性，通过分析未被审查的违规评论比例，评估其随时间的变化趋势。 Joon Sung Park,Joseph Seering,Michael S. authors_text: Dongmei Wang,Xiong Xiao,Naoyuki Kanda,Takuya Yoshioka,Jian Wu
title: Target Speaker Voice Activity Detection with Transformers and Its Integration with End-to-End Neural Diarization
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行目标说话人语音活动检测及其与端到端神经二值化的集成
abstract: This paper describes a speaker diarization model based on target speaker voice activity detection (TS-VAD) using transformers. To overcome the original TS-VAD model's drawback of being unable to handle an arbitrary number of speakers, we investigate model architectures that use input tensors with variable-length time and speaker dimensions. Transformer layers are applied to the speaker axis to make the model output insensitive to the order of the speaker profiles provided to the TS-VAD model. Time-wise sequential layers are interspersed between these speaker-wise transformer layers to allow the temporal and cross-speaker correlations of the input speech signal to be captured. We also extend a diarization model based on end-to-end neural diarization with encoder-decoder based attractors (EEND-EDA) by replacing its dot-product-based speaker detection layer with the transformer-based TS-VAD. Experimental results on VoxConverse show that using the transformers for the cross-speaker modeling reduces the diarization error rate (DER) of TS-VAD by 11.3%, achieving a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) DER of 4.57%. Also, our extended EEND-EDA reduces DER by 6.9% on the CALLHOME dataset relative to the original EEND-EDA with a similar model size, achieving a new SOTA DER of 11.18% under a widely used training data setting.
summary: This paper describes a speaker diarization model based on target speaker voice activity detection (TS-VAD) using transformers. To overcome the original TS-VAD model's drawback of being unable to handle an arbitrary number of speakers, we investigate model architectures that use input tensors with variable-length time and speaker dimensions. Transformer layers are applied to the speaker axis to make the model output insensitive to the order of the speaker profiles provided to the TS-VAD model. Time-wise sequential layers are interspersed between these speaker-wise transformer layers to allow the temporal and cross-speaker correlations of the input speech signal to be captured. We also extend a diarization model based on end-to-end neural diarization with encoder-decoder based attractors (EEND-EDA) by replacing its dot-product-based speaker detection layer with the transformer-based TS-VAD. Experimental results on VoxConverse show that using the transformers for the cross-speaker modeling reduces the diarization error rate (DER) of TS-VAD by 11.3%, achieving a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) DER of 4.57%. Also, our extended EEND-EDA reduces DER by 6.9% on the CALLHOME dataset relative to the original EEND-EDA with a similar model size, achieving a new SOTA DER of 11.18% under a widely used training data setting.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种基于使用变压器的目标说话人语音活动检测（TS-VAD）的说话人二值化模型。为了克服原始 TS-VAD 模型无法处理任意数量的说话人的缺点，我们研究了使用具有可变长度时间和说话人维度的输入张量的模型架构。将 Transformer 层应用于扬声器轴，以使模型输出对提供给 TS-VAD 模型的扬声器配置文件的顺序不敏感。时间顺序层散布在这些扬声器变换器层之间，以允许捕获输入语音信号的时间和跨扬声器相关性。我们还通过使用基于变压器的 TS-VAD 替换基于点积的说话人检测层，扩展了基于端到端神经二值化和基于编码器-解码器的吸引器 (EEND-EDA) 的二值化模型。 VoxConverse 上的实验结果表明，使用 Transformer 进行跨扬声器建模可将 TS-VAD 的二值化错误率 (DER) 降低 11.3%，达到新的最先进 (SOTA) DER 4.57%。此外，相对于模型大小相似的原始 EEND-EDA，我们的扩展 EEND-EDA 在 CALLHOME 数据集上将 DER 减少了 6.9%，在广泛使用的训练数据设置下实现了 11.18% 的新 SOTA DER。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的目标说话人语音活动检测（TS-VAD）模型，并将其与端到端神经说话人分割（EEND-EDA）集成，以提升多说话人场景下的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统TS-VAD模型无法处理任意数量说话人，且难以捕捉跨说话人和时序的语义关联，限制了其在复杂场景下的应用。
AI.method: 设计可变长度输入张量架构，通过Transformer层处理说话人维度以消除顺序敏感性，结合时序层建模跨说话人与时序相关性，并将改进的TS-VAD替换EEND-EDA中的点积检测层。
AI.result: 在VoxConverse数据集上TS-VAD的DER降低11.3%（达4.57%），改进的EEND-EDA在CALLHOME数据集上DER降低6.9%（达11.18%），均达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Transformer跨说话人建模有效提升分割准确性，改进后的EEND-EDA在保持模型规模的同时显著优化了多说话人场景的分割性能。

authors_text: Baihan Lin,Guillermo Cecchi,Djallel Bouneffouf
title: SupervisorBot: NLP-Annotated Real-Time Recommendations of Psychotherapy Treatment Strategies with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: SupervisorBot：基于深度强化学习的 NLP 注释实时心理治疗策略建议
comment: This work extends our work series in interactive speech or text systems for psychotherapy (e.g. arXiv:2006.04376, arXiv:2204.05522 and arXiv:2204.10189) and proposes a novel recommendation setting
comments: This work extends our work series in interactive speech or text systems for psychotherapy (e.g. arXiv:2006.04376, arXiv:2204.05522 and arXiv:2204.10189) and proposes a novel recommendation setting
abstract: We propose a recommendation system that suggests treatment strategies to a therapist during the psychotherapy session in real-time. Our system uses a turn-level rating mechanism that predicts the therapeutic outcome by computing a similarity score between the deep embedding of a scoring inventory, and the current sentence that the patient is speaking. The system automatically transcribes a continuous audio stream and separates it into turns of the patient and of the therapist and perform real-time inference of their therapeutic working alliance. The dialogue pairs along with their computed working alliance as ratings are then fed into a deep reinforcement learning recommendation system where the sessions are treated as users and the topics are treated as items. Other than evaluating the empirical advantages of the core components on an existing dataset of psychotherapy sessions, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this system in a web app.
summary: We propose a recommendation system that suggests treatment strategies to a therapist during the psychotherapy session in real-time. Our system uses a turn-level rating mechanism that predicts the therapeutic outcome by computing a similarity score between the deep embedding of a scoring inventory, and the current sentence that the patient is speaking. The system automatically transcribes a continuous audio stream and separates it into turns of the patient and of the therapist and perform real-time inference of their therapeutic working alliance. The dialogue pairs along with their computed working alliance as ratings are then fed into a deep reinforcement learning recommendation system where the sessions are treated as users and the topics are treated as items. Other than evaluating the empirical advantages of the core components on an existing dataset of psychotherapy sessions, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this system in a web app.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个推荐系统，可以在心理治疗过程中实时向治疗师建议治疗策略。我们的系统使用轮级评级机制，通过计算评分清单的深度嵌入与患者当前所说的句子之间的相似性分数来预测治疗结果。该系统自动转录连续的音频流，并将其分成患者和治疗师的回合，并对他们的治疗工作联盟进行实时推断。然后，对话对及其计算出的工作联盟作为评级被输入深度强化学习推荐系统，其中会话被视为用户，主题被视为项目。除了在现有的心理治疗课程数据集上评估核心组件的经验优势之外，我们还在网络应用程序中展示了该系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一个实时推荐心理治疗策略的系统，利用NLP和深度强化学习技术。
AI.motivation: 通过实时推荐治疗策略，辅助治疗师提升治疗效果和效率。
AI.method: 结合NLP转录、回合评分机制和深度强化学习，实时分析对话并推荐治疗策略。
AI.result: 系统在数据集上验证了有效性，并通过网页应用展示了实际效果。
AI.conclusion: 证明了该系统在实时推荐治疗策略中的有效性，为心理治疗提供了智能化辅助工具。

search_text: SupervisorBot: NLP-Annotated Real-Time Recommendations of Psychotherapy Treatment Strategies with Deep Reinforcement Learning SupervisorBot：基于深度强化学习的 NLP 注释实时心理治疗策略建议 We propose a recommendation system that suggests treatment strategies to a therapist during the psychotherapy session in real-time. Our system uses a turn-level rating mechanism that predicts the therapeutic outcome by computing a similarity score between the deep embedding of a scoring inventory, and the current sentence that the patient is speaking. The system automatically transcribes a continuous audio stream and separates it into turns of the patient and of the therapist and perform real-time inference of their therapeutic working alliance. The dialogue pairs along with their computed working alliance as ratings are then fed into a deep reinforcement learning recommendation system where the sessions are treated as users and the topics are treated as items. Other than evaluating the empirical advantages of the core components on an existing dataset of psychotherapy sessions, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this system in a web app. 我们提出了一个推荐系统，可以在心理治疗过程中实时向治疗师建议治疗策略。我们的系统使用轮级评级机制，通过计算评分清单的深度嵌入与患者当前所说的句子之间的相似性分数来预测治疗结果。该系统自动转录连续的音频流，并将其分成患者和治疗师的回合，并对他们的治疗工作联盟进行实时推断。然后，对话对及其计算出的工作联盟作为评级被输入深度强化学习推荐系统，其中会话被视为用户，主题被视为项目。除了在现有的心理治疗课程数据集上评估核心组件的经验优势之外，我们还在网络应用程序中展示了该系统的有效性。 提出一个实时推荐心理治疗策略的系统，利用NLP和深度强化学习技术。 Baihan Lin,Guillermo Cecchi,Djallel Bouneffouf cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Usman Muhammad,Mourad Oussalah
title: Self-Supervised Face Presentation Attack Detection with Dynamic Grayscale Snippets
title_zh: 使用动态灰度片段进行自监督人脸呈现攻击检测
abstract: Face presentation attack detection (PAD) plays an important role in defending face recognition systems against presentation attacks. The success of PAD largely relies on supervised learning that requires a huge number of labeled data, which is especially challenging for videos and often requires expert knowledge. To avoid the costly collection of labeled data, this paper presents a novel method for self-supervised video representation learning via motion prediction. To achieve this, we exploit the temporal consistency based on three RGB frames which are acquired at three different times in the video sequence. The obtained frames are then transformed into grayscale images where each image is specified to three different channels such as R(red), G(green), and B(blue) to form a dynamic grayscale snippet (DGS). Motivated by this, the labels are automatically generated to increase the temporal diversity based on DGS by using the different temporal lengths of the videos, which prove to be very helpful for the downstream task. Benefiting from the self-supervised nature of our method, we report the results that outperform existing methods on four public benchmarks, namely, Replay-Attack, MSU-MFSD, CASIA-FASD, and OULU-NPU. Explainability analysis has been carried out through LIME and Grad-CAM techniques to visualize the most important features used in the DGS.
summary: Face presentation attack detection (PAD) plays an important role in defending face recognition systems against presentation attacks. The success of PAD largely relies on supervised learning that requires a huge number of labeled data, which is especially challenging for videos and often requires expert knowledge. To avoid the costly collection of labeled data, this paper presents a novel method for self-supervised video representation learning via motion prediction. To achieve this, we exploit the temporal consistency based on three RGB frames which are acquired at three different times in the video sequence. The obtained frames are then transformed into grayscale images where each image is specified to three different channels such as R(red), G(green), and B(blue) to form a dynamic grayscale snippet (DGS). Motivated by this, the labels are automatically generated to increase the temporal diversity based on DGS by using the different temporal lengths of the videos, which prove to be very helpful for the downstream task. Benefiting from the self-supervised nature of our method, we report the results that outperform existing methods on four public benchmarks, namely, Replay-Attack, MSU-MFSD, CASIA-FASD, and OULU-NPU. Explainability analysis has been carried out through LIME and Grad-CAM techniques to visualize the most important features used in the DGS.
abstract_zh: 人脸呈现攻击检测 (PAD) 在保护人脸识别系统免受呈现攻击方面发挥着重要作用。 PAD 的成功很大程度上依赖于监督学习，这需要大量的标记数据，这对于视频来说尤其具有挑战性，并且通常需要专业知识。为了避免昂贵的标记数据收集，本文提出了一种通过运动预测进行自监督视频表示学习的新方法。为了实现这一点，我们利用基于视频序列中三个不同时间获取的三个 RGB 帧的时间一致性。然后将获得的帧转换为灰度图像，其中每个图像被指定给三个不同的通道，例如R（红色）、G（绿色）和B（蓝色），以形成动态灰度片段（DGS）。受此启发，利用视频的不同时间长度，自动生成标签，以增加基于 DGS 的时间多样性，这对下游任务非常有帮助。受益于我们方法的自我监督性质，我们报告了在四个公共基准（即 Replay-Attack、MSU-MFSD、CASIA-FASD 和 OULU-NPU）上优于现有方法的结果。通过 LIME 和 Grad-CAM 技术进行可解释性分析，以可视化 DGS 中使用的最重要的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态灰度片段的自监督人脸呈现攻击检测方法，减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统人脸呈现攻击检测依赖大量标注数据，标注成本高且需专家知识，尤其针对视频数据更具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过视频序列中不同时刻的三帧RGB图像生成动态灰度片段（DGS），利用灰度通道差异和时间一致性进行自监督学习，自动标注时间长度差异以增强时序多样性。
AI.result: 在Replay-Attack、MSU-MFSD、CASIA-FASD和OULU-NPU四个公开基准测试中均优于现有方法，并通过LIME和Grad-CAM验证了特征可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督方法有效提升了人脸攻击检测性能，降低了对标注数据的依赖，为视频领域提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Deng JiaCheng,Dong Li,Yan Diqun,Wang Rangding,Zeng Jiaming
title: SA: Sliding attack for synthetic speech detection with resistance to clipping and self-splicing
title_zh: SA：用于合成语音检测的滑动攻击，具有抗剪裁和自拼接能力
abstract: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples that mislead models with imperceptible perturbations. In audio, although adversarial examples have achieved incredible attack success rates on white-box settings and black-box settings, most existing adversarial attacks are constrained by the input length. A More practical scenario is that the adversarial examples must be clipped or self-spliced and input into the black-box model. Therefore, it is necessary to explore how to improve transferability in different input length settings. In this paper, we take the synthetic speech detection task as an example and consider two representative SOTA models. We observe that the gradients of fragments with the same sample value are similar in different models via analyzing the gradients obtained by feeding samples into the model after cropping or self-splicing. Inspired by the above observation, we propose a new adversarial attack method termed sliding attack. Specifically, we make each sampling point aware of gradients at different locations, which can simulate the situation where adversarial examples are input to black-box models with varying input lengths. Therefore, instead of using the current gradient directly in each iteration of the gradient calculation, we go through the following three steps. First, we extract subsegments of different lengths using sliding windows. We then augment the subsegments with data from the adjacent domains. Finally, we feed the sub-segments into different models to obtain aggregate gradients to update adversarial examples. Empirical results demonstrate that our method could significantly improve the transferability of adversarial examples after clipping or self-splicing. Besides, our method could also enhance the transferability between models based on different features.
summary: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples that mislead models with imperceptible perturbations. In audio, although adversarial examples have achieved incredible attack success rates on white-box settings and black-box settings, most existing adversarial attacks are constrained by the input length. A More practical scenario is that the adversarial examples must be clipped or self-spliced and input into the black-box model. Therefore, it is necessary to explore how to improve transferability in different input length settings. In this paper, we take the synthetic speech detection task as an example and consider two representative SOTA models. We observe that the gradients of fragments with the same sample value are similar in different models via analyzing the gradients obtained by feeding samples into the model after cropping or self-splicing. Inspired by the above observation, we propose a new adversarial attack method termed sliding attack. Specifically, we make each sampling point aware of gradients at different locations, which can simulate the situation where adversarial examples are input to black-box models with varying input lengths. Therefore, instead of using the current gradient directly in each iteration of the gradient calculation, we go through the following three steps. First, we extract subsegments of different lengths using sliding windows. We then augment the subsegments with data from the adjacent domains. Finally, we feed the sub-segments into different models to obtain aggregate gradients to update adversarial examples. Empirical results demonstrate that our method could significantly improve the transferability of adversarial examples after clipping or self-splicing. Besides, our method could also enhance the transferability between models based on different features.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性例子的影响，这些例子会以难以察觉的扰动误导模型。在音频中，尽管对抗性示例在白盒设置和黑盒设置上取得了令人难以置信的攻击成功率，但大多数现有的对抗性攻击都受到输入长度的限制。更实际的场景是，对抗性示例必须被裁剪或自拼接并输入到黑盒模型中。因此，有必要探索如何提高不同输入长度设置下的可转移性。在本文中，我们以合成语音检测任务为例，考虑两种代表性的 SOTA 模型。通过分析将样本经过裁剪或自拼接后输入模型所获得的梯度，我们观察到具有相同样本值的片段在不同模型中的梯度相似。受上述观察的启发，我们提出了一种新的对抗性攻击方法，称为滑动攻击。具体来说，我们使每个采样点了解不同位置的梯度，这可以模拟将对抗性示例输入到具有不同输入长度的黑盒模型的情况。因此，我们不是在梯度计算的每次迭代中直接使用当前梯度，而是经历以下三个步骤。首先，我们使用滑动窗口提取不同长度的子段。然后，我们使用相邻域的数据来扩充子分段。最后，我们将子段输入不同的模型中以获得聚合梯度来更新对抗性示例。经验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着提高裁剪或自拼接后对抗性示例的可迁移性。此外，我们的方法还可以增强基于不同特征的模型之间的可迁移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为滑动攻击（Sliding Attack）的对抗攻击方法，用于提升合成语音检测任务中对抗样本在剪裁和自拼接场景下的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法在输入长度受限的场景（如剪裁或自拼接）下效果不佳，需探索如何提高不同输入长度下的攻击可迁移性。
AI.method: 通过滑动窗口提取不同长度的子片段，结合相邻领域数据增强后输入多模型，聚合梯度更新对抗样本，模拟黑盒模型输入长度变化的攻击场景。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升剪裁/自拼接后对抗样本的可迁移性，并增强基于不同特征的模型间的攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: 滑动攻击方法为音频领域对抗样本生成提供了新思路，有效解决了输入长度变化带来的可迁移性挑战。

result: 实验表明该方法显著提升剪裁/自拼接后对抗样本的可迁移性，并增强基于不同特征的模型间的攻击效果。
conclusion: 滑动攻击方法为音频领域对抗样本生成提供了新思路，有效解决了输入长度变化带来的可迁移性挑战。
search_text: SA: Sliding attack for synthetic speech detection with resistance to clipping and self-splicing SA：用于合成语音检测的滑动攻击，具有抗剪裁和自拼接能力 Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples that mislead models with imperceptible perturbations. In audio, although adversarial examples have achieved incredible attack success rates on white-box settings and black-box settings, most existing adversarial attacks are constrained by the input length. A More practical scenario is that the adversarial examples must be clipped or self-spliced and input into the black-box model. Therefore, it is necessary to explore how to improve transferability in different input length settings. In this paper, we take the synthetic speech detection task as an example and consider two representative SOTA models. We observe that the gradients of fragments with the same sample value are similar in different models via analyzing the gradients obtained by feeding samples into the model after cropping or self-splicing. Inspired by the above observation, we propose a new adversarial attack method termed sliding attack. Specifically, we make each sampling point aware of gradients at different locations, which can simulate the situation where adversarial examples are input to black-box models with varying input lengths. Therefore, instead of using the current gradient directly in each iteration of the gradient calculation, we go through the following three steps. First, we extract subsegments of different lengths using sliding windows. We then augment the subsegments with data from the adjacent domains. Finally, we feed the sub-segments into different models to obtain aggregate gradients to update adversarial examples. Empirical results demonstrate that our method could significantly improve the transferability of adversarial examples after clipping or self-splicing. Besides, our method could also enhance the transferability between models based on different features. 深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性例子的影响，这些例子会以难以察觉的扰动误导模型。在音频中，尽管对抗性示例在白盒设置和黑盒设置上取得了令人难以置信的攻击成功率，但大多数现有的对抗性攻击都受到输入长度的限制。更实际的场景是，对抗性示例必须被裁剪或自拼接并输入到黑盒模型中。因此，有必要探索如何提高不同输入长度设置下的可转移性。在本文中，我们以合成语音检测任务为例，考虑两种代表性的 SOTA 模型。通过分析将样本经过裁剪或自拼接后输入模型所获得的梯度，我们观察到具有相同样本值的片段在不同模型中的梯度相似。受上述观察的启发，我们提出了一种新的对抗性攻击方法，称为滑动攻击。具体来说，我们使每个采样点了解不同位置的梯度，这可以模拟将对抗性示例输入到具有不同输入长度的黑盒模型的情况。因此，我们不是在梯度计算的每次迭代中直接使用当前梯度，而是经历以下三个步骤。首先，我们使用滑动窗口提取不同长度的子段。然后，我们使用相邻域的数据来扩充子分段。最后，我们将子段输入不同的模型中以获得聚合梯度来更新对抗性示例。经验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着提高裁剪或自拼接后对抗性示例的可迁移性。此外，我们的方法还可以增强基于不同特征的模型之间的可迁移性。 本文提出一种名为滑动攻击（Sliding Attack）的对抗攻击方法，用于提升合成语音检测任务中对抗样本在剪裁和自拼接场景下的可迁移性。 Deng JiaCheng,Dong Li,Yan Diqun,Wang Rangding,Zeng Jiaming cs.SD,cs.CR,eess.AS

authors_text: Mayukh Bagchi
title: A Diversity-Aware Domain Development Methodology
title_zh: 具有多样性意识的领域开发方法
comment: 41st International Conference on Conceptual Modeling (ER 2022), Online (Virtual)
comments: 41st International Conference on Conceptual Modeling (ER 2022), Online (Virtual)
abstract: The development of domain ontological models, though being a mature research arena backed by well-established methodologies, still suffer from two key shortcomings. Firstly, the issues concerning the semantic persistency of ontology concepts and their flexible reuse in domain development employing existing approaches. Secondly, due to the difficulty in understanding and reusing top-level concepts in existing foundational ontologies, the obfuscation regarding the semantic nature of domain representations. The paper grounds the aforementioned shortcomings in representation diversity and proposes a three-fold solution - (i) a pipeline for rendering concepts reuse-ready, (ii) a first characterization of a minimalistic foundational knowledge model, named foundational teleology, semantically explicating foundational distinctions enforcing the static as well as dynamic nature of domain representations, and (iii) a flexible, reuse-native methodology for diversity-aware domain development exploiting solutions (i) and (ii). The preliminary work reported validates the potentiality of the solution components.
summary: The development of domain ontological models, though being a mature research arena backed by well-established methodologies, still suffer from two key shortcomings. The paper grounds the aforementioned shortcomings in representation diversity and proposes a three-fold solution - (i) a pipeline for rendering concepts reuse-ready, (ii) a first characterization of a minimalistic foundational knowledge model, named foundational teleology, semantically explicating foundational distinctions enforcing the static as well as dynamic nature of domain representations, and (iii) a flexible, reuse-native methodology for diversity-aware domain development exploiting solutions (i) and (ii). The preliminary work reported validates the potentiality of the solution components.
abstract_zh: 领域本体模型的发展虽然是一个成熟的研究领域，有完善的方法论支持，但仍然存在两个关键缺点。首先，涉及本体概念的语义持久性及其在采用现有方法的领域开发中的灵活重用的问题。其次，由于现有基础本体中的顶层概念难以理解和重用，导致领域表示的语义性质混淆。该论文基于上述表示多样性的缺点，并提出了一个三重解决方案 - (i) 一个用于渲染概念可重用的管道，(ii) 简约基础知识模型的第一个特征，称为基础目的论，从语义上解释强制域表示的静态和动态性质的基本区别，以及 (iii) 利用解决方案 (i) 和 (ii) 进行多样性感知领域开发的灵活的、可重用的本机方法。报告的初步工作验证了解决方案组件的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向多样性的领域开发方法论，解决本体概念语义持久性及灵活复用问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域本体模型在概念语义持久性及顶层概念复用上存在障碍，导致领域表示的语义模糊性。
AI.method: 提出三重解决方案：概念复用管道、基础目的论知识模型及多样性感知的开发方法论。
AI.result: 初步验证表明该方法在语义解释和领域模型构建中具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合语义持久性机制与基础模型，该方法论有效提升了领域开发的灵活性与复用性。

authors_text: Sasikanth Kotti,Mayank Vatsa,Richa Singh
title: On Biased Behavior of GANs for Face Verification
title_zh: 人脸验证中 GAN 的偏差行为
comment: Accepted as a Short Paper at Responsible Computer Vision Workshop, ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted as a Short Paper at Responsible Computer Vision Workshop, ECCV 2022
abstract: Deep Learning systems need large data for training. Datasets for training face verification systems are difficult to obtain and prone to privacy issues. Synthetic data generated by generative models such as GANs can be a good alternative. However, we show that data generated from GANs are prone to bias and fairness issues. Specifically, GANs trained on FFHQ dataset show biased behavior towards generating white faces in the age group of 20-29. We also demonstrate that synthetic faces cause disparate impact, specifically for race attribute, when used for fine tuning face verification systems.
summary: Deep Learning systems need large data for training. Datasets for training face verification systems are difficult to obtain and prone to privacy issues. Synthetic data generated by generative models such as GANs can be a good alternative. However, we show that data generated from GANs are prone to bias and fairness issues. Specifically, GANs trained on FFHQ dataset show biased behavior towards generating white faces in the age group of 20-29. We also demonstrate that synthetic faces cause disparate impact, specifically for race attribute, when used for fine tuning face verification systems.
abstract_zh: 深度学习系统需要大量数据进行训练。用于训练人脸验证系统的数据集很难获取，并且容易出现隐私问题。由 GAN 等生成模型生成的合成数据可能是一个不错的选择。然而，我们表明，GAN 生成的数据容易出现偏差和公平问题。具体来说，在 FFHQ 数据集上训练的 GAN 表现出偏向于在 20-29 岁年龄段生成白人面孔的行为。我们还证明，当用于微调人脸验证系统时，合成人脸会产生不同的影响，特别是对于种族属性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了生成对抗网络（GAN）在生成用于面部验证的合成数据时存在的偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 真实人脸数据获取困难且涉及隐私问题，合成数据成为替代方案，但其可能引入偏见和公平性风险需被关注。
AI.method: 在FFHQ数据集上训练GAN模型，分析生成数据的种族和年龄分布偏差，并评估其对微调面部验证系统的影响。
AI.result: GAN在生成20-29岁白人面部时表现偏向，导致合成数据用于微调后，面部验证系统对种族属性产生差异影响。
AI.conclusion: 需警惕GAN生成数据的偏见问题，以确保面部验证系统的公平性与可靠性。

authors_text: Zhihao Duan,Ming Lu,Zhan Ma,Fengqing Zhu
title: Lossy Image Compression with Quantized Hierarchical VAEs
title_zh: 使用量化分层 VAE 进行有损图像压缩
comment: WACV 2023 Best Algorithms Paper Award, revised version
comments: WACV 2023 Best Algorithms Paper Award, revised version
abstract: Recent research has shown a strong theoretical connection between variational autoencoders (VAEs) and the rate-distortion theory. Motivated by this, we consider the problem of lossy image compression from the perspective of generative modeling. Starting with ResNet VAEs, which are originally designed for data (image) distribution modeling, we redesign their latent variable model using a quantization-aware posterior and prior, enabling easy quantization and entropy coding at test time. Along with improved neural network architecture, we present a powerful and efficient model that outperforms previous methods on natural image lossy compression. Our model compresses images in a coarse-to-fine fashion and supports parallel encoding and decoding, leading to fast execution on GPUs. Code is available at https://github.com/duanzhiihao/lossy-vae.
summary: Recent research has shown a strong theoretical connection between variational autoencoders (VAEs) and the rate-distortion theory. Motivated by this, we consider the problem of lossy image compression from the perspective of generative modeling. Starting with ResNet VAEs, which are originally designed for data (image) distribution modeling, we redesign their latent variable model using a quantization-aware posterior and prior, enabling easy quantization and entropy coding at test time. Along with improved neural network architecture, we present a powerful and efficient model that outperforms previous methods on natural image lossy compression. Our model compresses images in a coarse-to-fine fashion and supports parallel encoding and decoding, leading to fast execution on GPUs. Code is available at https://github.com/duanzhiihao/lossy-vae.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明变分自动编码器（VAE）和率失真理论之间存在紧密的理论联系。受此启发，我们从生成建模的角度考虑有损图像压缩问题。从最初为数据（图像）分布建模而设计的 ResNet VAE 开始，我们使用量化感知后验和先验重新设计其潜在变量模型，从而在测试时轻松进行量化和熵编码。随着神经网络架构的改进，我们提出了一个强大而高效的模型，其性能优于以前的自然图像有损压缩方法。我们的模型以从粗到细的方式压缩图像，并支持并行编码和解码，从而在 GPU 上快速执行。代码可在 https://github.com/duanzhiihao/lossy-vae 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量化分层变分自编码器（VAEs）的有损图像压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 基于变分自编码器（VAEs）与率失真理论的强理论关联，从生成模型视角探索有损图像压缩问题。
AI.method: 改进ResNet VAE的潜在变量模型，采用量化感知的后验和先验设计，结合优化的神经网络架构实现高效压缩。
AI.result: 在自然图像有损压缩任务中优于现有方法，支持并行编解码并在GPU上实现快速执行。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过分层量化与架构优化，在压缩效率和速度上取得了显著提升。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该模型通过分层量化与架构优化，在压缩效率和速度上取得了显著提升。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于量化分层变分自编码器（VAEs）的有损图像压缩方法。
motivation: 基于变分自编码器（VAEs）与率失真理论的强理论关联，从生成模型视角探索有损图像压缩问题。
method: 改进ResNet VAE的潜在变量模型，采用量化感知的后验和先验设计，结合优化的神经网络架构实现高效压缩。
result: 在自然图像有损压缩任务中优于现有方法，支持并行编解码并在GPU上实现快速执行。
conclusion: 该模型通过分层量化与架构优化，在压缩效率和速度上取得了显著提升。
search_text: Lossy Image Compression with Quantized Hierarchical VAEs 使用量化分层 VAE 进行有损图像压缩 Recent research has shown a strong theoretical connection between variational autoencoders (VAEs) and the rate-distortion theory. Motivated by this, we consider the problem of lossy image compression from the perspective of generative modeling. Starting with ResNet VAEs, which are originally designed for data (image) distribution modeling, we redesign their latent variable model using a quantization-aware posterior and prior, enabling easy quantization and entropy coding at test time. Along with improved neural network architecture, we present a powerful and efficient model that outperforms previous methods on natural image lossy compression. Our model compresses images in a coarse-to-fine fashion and supports parallel encoding and decoding, leading to fast execution on GPUs. Code is available at https://github.com/duanzhiihao/lossy-vae. 最近的研究表明变分自动编码器（VAE）和率失真理论之间存在紧密的理论联系。受此启发，我们从生成建模的角度考虑有损图像压缩问题。从最初为数据（图像）分布建模而设计的 ResNet VAE 开始，我们使用量化感知后验和先验重新设计其潜在变量模型，从而在测试时轻松进行量化和熵编码。随着神经网络架构的改进，我们提出了一个强大而高效的模型，其性能优于以前的自然图像有损压缩方法。我们的模型以从粗到细的方式压缩图像，并支持并行编码和解码，从而在 GPU 上快速执行。代码可在 https://github.com/duanzhiihao/lossy-vae 获取。 本文提出一种基于量化分层变分自编码器（VAEs）的有损图像压缩方法。 Zhihao Duan,Ming Lu,Zhan Ma,Fengqing Zhu eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shreyas Kulkarni,Shreyas Singh,Dhananjay Balakrishnan,Siddharth Sharma,Saipraneeth Devunuri,Sai Chowdeswara Rao Korlapati
title: CrackSeg9k: A Collection and Benchmark for Crack Segmentation Datasets and Frameworks
title_zh: CrackSeg9k：裂纹分割数据集和框架的集合和基准
abstract: The detection of cracks is a crucial task in monitoring structural health and ensuring structural safety. The manual process of crack detection is time-consuming and subjective to the inspectors. Several researchers have tried tackling this problem using traditional Image Processing or learning-based techniques. However, their scope of work is limited to detecting cracks on a single type of surface (walls, pavements, glass, etc.). The metrics used to evaluate these methods are also varied across the literature, making it challenging to compare techniques. This paper addresses these problems by combining previously available datasets and unifying the annotations by tackling the inherent problems within each dataset, such as noise and distortions. We also present a pipeline that combines Image Processing and Deep Learning models. Finally, we benchmark the results of proposed models on these metrics on our new dataset and compare them with state-of-the-art models in the literature.
summary: The detection of cracks is a crucial task in monitoring structural health and ensuring structural safety. The manual process of crack detection is time-consuming and subjective to the inspectors. Several researchers have tried tackling this problem using traditional Image Processing or learning-based techniques. However, their scope of work is limited to detecting cracks on a single type of surface (walls, pavements, glass, etc.). The metrics used to evaluate these methods are also varied across the literature, making it challenging to compare techniques. This paper addresses these problems by combining previously available datasets and unifying the annotations by tackling the inherent problems within each dataset, such as noise and distortions. We also present a pipeline that combines Image Processing and Deep Learning models. Finally, we benchmark the results of proposed models on these metrics on our new dataset and compare them with state-of-the-art models in the literature.
abstract_zh: 裂缝检测是监测结构健康和确保结构安全的关键任务。手动裂纹检测过程既耗时又对检查人员来说很主观。一些研究人员尝试使用传统的图像处理或基于学习的技术来解决这个问题。然而，他们的工作范围仅限于检测单一类型表面（墙壁、人行道、玻璃等）上的裂缝。用于评估这些方法的指标在文献中也各不相同，这使得比较技术具有挑战性。本文通过组合以前可用的数据集并通过解决每个数据集内的固有问题（例如噪声和失真）来统一注释来解决这些问题。我们还提出了一个结合图像处理和深度学习模型的管道。最后，我们在新数据集上对这些指标的建议模型的结果进行基准测试，并将它们与文献中最先进的模型进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrackSeg9k数据集和基准框架，用于统一评估裂缝分割方法。
AI.motivation: 现有裂缝检测方法局限于单一表面类型且评估指标不统一，难以横向比较不同技术效果。
AI.method: 整合多源数据集并统一标注规范，提出结合图像处理与深度学习的混合流水线，建立标准化评估体系。
AI.result: 在统一数据集上验证了所提方法的有效性，并与现有先进模型进行性能对比分析。
AI.conclusion: CrackSeg9k为裂缝分割领域提供了标准化研究基准，推动了跨方法公平比较与技术发展。

authors_text: Ziheng Wu,Xinyi Zou,Wenmeng Zhou,Jun Huang
title: YOLOX-PAI: An Improved YOLOX, Stronger and Faster than YOLOv6
title_zh: YOLOX-PAI：改进的YOLOX，比YOLOv6更强、更快
abstract: We develop an all-in-one computer vision toolbox named EasyCV to facilitate the use of various SOTA computer vision methods. Recently, we add YOLOX-PAI, an improved version of YOLOX, into EasyCV. We conduct ablation studies to investigate the influence of some detection methods on YOLOX. We also provide an easy use for PAI-Blade which is used to accelerate the inference process based on BladeDISC and TensorRT. Finally, we receive 42.8 mAP on COCO dateset within 1.0 ms on a single NVIDIA V100 GPU, which is a bit faster than YOLOv6. A simple but efficient predictor api is also designed in EasyCV to conduct end2end object detection. Codes and models are now available at: https://github.com/alibaba/EasyCV.
summary: We develop an all-in-one computer vision toolbox named EasyCV to facilitate the use of various SOTA computer vision methods. Recently, we add YOLOX-PAI, an improved version of YOLOX, into EasyCV. We conduct ablation studies to investigate the influence of some detection methods on YOLOX. We also provide an easy use for PAI-Blade which is used to accelerate the inference process based on BladeDISC and TensorRT. Finally, we receive 42.8 mAP on COCO dateset within 1.0 ms on a single NVIDIA V100 GPU, which is a bit faster than YOLOv6. A simple but efficient predictor api is also designed in EasyCV to conduct end2end object detection. Codes and models are now available at: https://github.com/alibaba/EasyCV.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一款名为 EasyCV 的一体化计算机视觉工具箱，以方便使用各种 SOTA 计算机视觉方法。最近，我们将YOLOX的改进版本YOLOX-PAI添加到EasyCV中。我们进行消融研究来调查一些检测方法对 YOLOX 的影响。我们还提供了 PAI-Blade 的易用性，用于加速基于 BladeDISC 和 TensorRT 的推理过程。最后，我们在单个 NVIDIA V100 GPU 上在 1.0 毫秒内在 COCO 数据集上收到 42.8 mAP，这比 YOLOv6 快一点。 EasyCV 中还设计了一个简单但高效的预测器 api 来进行端到端目标检测。代码和模型现已提供：https://github.com/alibaba/EasyCV。

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLOX-PAI，一种改进的YOLOX目标检测模型，实现比YOLOv6更高的精度和更快的推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测模型在精度与推理速度之间难以平衡，需更高效的算法和工具支持实际应用。
AI.method: 改进YOLOX架构并集成PAI-Blade加速工具，通过消融实验验证方法有效性，设计端到端预测API。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到42.8 mAP，单GPU推理速度1.0ms，超越YOLOv6；提供EasyCV工具箱实现模型易用性。
AI.conclusion: YOLOX-PAI在保持高精度的同时提升推理效率，结合EasyCV工具链可有效推动目标检测技术落地应用。

authors_text: Hong Yang,Gongrui Nan,Mingbao Lin,Fei Chao,Yunhang Shen,Ke Li,Rongrong Ji
title: LAB-Net: LAB Color-Space Oriented Lightweight Network for Shadow Removal
title_zh: LAB-Net：用于阴影去除的 LAB 色彩空间导向轻量级网络
abstract: This paper focuses on the limitations of current over-parameterized shadow removal models. We present a novel lightweight deep neural network that processes shadow images in the LAB color space. The proposed network termed "LAB-Net", is motivated by the following three observations: First, the LAB color space can well separate the luminance information and color properties. Second, sequentially-stacked convolutional layers fail to take full use of features from different receptive fields. Third, non-shadow regions are important prior knowledge to diminish the drastic color difference between shadow and non-shadow regions. Consequently, we design our LAB-Net by involving a two-branch structure: L and AB branches. Thus the shadow-related luminance information can well be processed in the L branch, while the color property is well retained in the AB branch. In addition, each branch is composed of several Basic Blocks, local spatial attention modules (LSA), and convolutional filters. Each Basic Block consists of multiple parallelized dilated convolutions of divergent dilation rates to receive different receptive fields that are operated with distinct network widths to save model parameters and computational costs. Then, an enhanced channel attention module (ECA) is constructed to aggregate features from different receptive fields for better shadow removal. Finally, the LSA modules are further developed to fully use the prior information in non-shadow regions to cleanse the shadow regions. We perform extensive experiments on the both ISTD and SRD datasets. Experimental results show that our LAB-Net well outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Also, our model's parameters and computational costs are reduced by several orders of magnitude. Our code is available at https://github.com/ngrxmu/LAB-Net.
summary: This paper focuses on the limitations of current over-parameterized shadow removal models. We present a novel lightweight deep neural network that processes shadow images in the LAB color space. The proposed network termed "LAB-Net", is motivated by the following three observations: First, the LAB color space can well separate the luminance information and color properties. Second, sequentially-stacked convolutional layers fail to take full use of features from different receptive fields. Third, non-shadow regions are important prior knowledge to diminish the drastic color difference between shadow and non-shadow regions. Consequently, we design our LAB-Net by involving a two-branch structure: L and AB branches. Thus the shadow-related luminance information can well be processed in the L branch, while the color property is well retained in the AB branch. In addition, each branch is composed of several Basic Blocks, local spatial attention modules (LSA), and convolutional filters. Each Basic Block consists of multiple parallelized dilated convolutions of divergent dilation rates to receive different receptive fields that are operated with distinct network widths to save model parameters and computational costs. Then, an enhanced channel attention module (ECA) is constructed to aggregate features from different receptive fields for better shadow removal. Finally, the LSA modules are further developed to fully use the prior information in non-shadow regions to cleanse the shadow regions. We perform extensive experiments on the both ISTD and SRD datasets. Experimental results show that our LAB-Net well outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Also, our model's parameters and computational costs are reduced by several orders of magnitude. Our code is available at https://github.com/ngrxmu/LAB-Net.
abstract_zh: 本文重点讨论当前过度参数化阴影去除模型的局限性。我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级深度神经网络，可以处理 LAB 颜色空间中的阴影图像。所提出的网络称为“LAB-Net”，其动机是以下三个观察结果：首先，LAB 颜色空间可以很好地分离亮度信息和颜色属性。其次，顺序堆叠的卷积层无法充分利用不同感受野的特征。第三，非阴影区域是减少阴影和非阴影区域之间巨大色差的重要先验知识。因此，我们通过包含两个分支结构来设计 LAB-Net：L 和 AB 分支。因此，与阴影相关的亮度信息可以在L分支中得到很好的处理，而颜色属性在AB分支中得到很好的保留。此外，每个分支由几个基本块、局部空间注意模块（LSA）和卷积滤波器组成。每个基本块由多个不同扩张率的并行扩张卷积组成，以接收不同的感受野，这些感受野以不同的网络宽度进行操作，以节省模型参数和计算成本。然后，构建增强通道注意模块（ECA）来聚合来自不同感受野的特征，以更好地去除阴影。最后，进一步开发了LSA模块，以充分利用非阴影区域的先验信息来清理阴影区域。我们对 ISTD 和 SRD 数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的 LAB-Net 远远优于最先进的方法。此外，我们模型的参数和计算成本降低了几个数量级。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ngrxmu/LAB-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LAB颜色空间的轻量级网络LAB-Net，用于高效去除图像中的阴影。
AI.motivation: 现有阴影去除模型参数过多且未能充分利用颜色空间特性与非阴影区域的先验知识，导致效率与效果不足。
AI.method: 设计双分支结构（L分支处理亮度信息，AB分支保留颜色属性），结合扩张卷积、局部空间注意力模块（LSA）和增强通道注意力模块（ECA），通过多尺度特征融合与非阴影区域先验优化阴影消除。
AI.result: 在ISTD和SRD数据集上显著优于现有方法，参数量和计算成本降低多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: LAB-Net通过颜色空间分离与轻量化设计，在保持高精度的同时大幅提升了阴影去除的效率。

search_text: LAB-Net: LAB Color-Space Oriented Lightweight Network for Shadow Removal LAB-Net：用于阴影去除的 LAB 色彩空间导向轻量级网络 This paper focuses on the limitations of current over-parameterized shadow removal models. We present a novel lightweight deep neural network that processes shadow images in the LAB color space. The proposed network termed "LAB-Net", is motivated by the following three observations: First, the LAB color space can well separate the luminance information and color properties. Second, sequentially-stacked convolutional layers fail to take full use of features from different receptive fields. Third, non-shadow regions are important prior knowledge to diminish the drastic color difference between shadow and non-shadow regions. Consequently, we design our LAB-Net by involving a two-branch structure: L and AB branches. Thus the shadow-related luminance information can well be processed in the L branch, while the color property is well retained in the AB branch. In addition, each branch is composed of several Basic Blocks, local spatial attention modules (LSA), and convolutional filters. Each Basic Block consists of multiple parallelized dilated convolutions of divergent dilation rates to receive different receptive fields that are operated with distinct network widths to save model parameters and computational costs. Then, an enhanced channel attention module (ECA) is constructed to aggregate features from different receptive fields for better shadow removal. Finally, the LSA modules are further developed to fully use the prior information in non-shadow regions to cleanse the shadow regions. We perform extensive experiments on the both ISTD and SRD datasets. Experimental results show that our LAB-Net well outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Also, our model's parameters and computational costs are reduced by several orders of magnitude. Our code is available at https://github.com/ngrxmu/LAB-Net. 本文重点讨论当前过度参数化阴影去除模型的局限性。我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级深度神经网络，可以处理 LAB 颜色空间中的阴影图像。所提出的网络称为“LAB-Net”，其动机是以下三个观察结果：首先，LAB 颜色空间可以很好地分离亮度信息和颜色属性。其次，顺序堆叠的卷积层无法充分利用不同感受野的特征。第三，非阴影区域是减少阴影和非阴影区域之间巨大色差的重要先验知识。因此，我们通过包含两个分支结构来设计 LAB-Net：L 和 AB 分支。因此，与阴影相关的亮度信息可以在L分支中得到很好的处理，而颜色属性在AB分支中得到很好的保留。此外，每个分支由几个基本块、局部空间注意模块（LSA）和卷积滤波器组成。每个基本块由多个不同扩张率的并行扩张卷积组成，以接收不同的感受野，这些感受野以不同的网络宽度进行操作，以节省模型参数和计算成本。然后，构建增强通道注意模块（ECA）来聚合来自不同感受野的特征，以更好地去除阴影。最后，进一步开发了LSA模块，以充分利用非阴影区域的先验信息来清理阴影区域。我们对 ISTD 和 SRD 数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的 LAB-Net 远远优于最先进的方法。此外，我们模型的参数和计算成本降低了几个数量级。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ngrxmu/LAB-Net 上获取。 本文提出一种基于LAB颜色空间的轻量级网络LAB-Net，用于高效去除图像中的阴影。 Hong Yang,Gongrui Nan,Mingbao Lin,Fei Chao,Yunhang Shen,Ke Li,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Emna Baccour,Aiman Erbad,Amr Mohamed,Mounir Hamdi,Mohsen Guizani
title: RL-DistPrivacy: Privacy-Aware Distributed Deep Inference for low latency IoT systems
title_zh: RL-DistPrivacy：低延迟物联网系统的隐私感知分布式深度推理
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Network Science and Engineering
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Network Science and Engineering
abstract: Although Deep Neural Networks (DNN) have become the backbone technology of several ubiquitous applications, their deployment in resource-constrained machines, e.g., Internet of Things (IoT) devices, is still challenging. To satisfy the resource requirements of such a paradigm, collaborative deep inference with IoT synergy was introduced. However, the distribution of DNN networks suffers from severe data leakage. Various threats have been presented, including black-box attacks, where malicious participants can recover arbitrary inputs fed into their devices. Although many countermeasures were designed to achieve privacy-preserving DNN, most of them result in additional computation and lower accuracy. In this paper, we present an approach that targets the security of collaborative deep inference via re-thinking the distribution strategy, without sacrificing the model performance. Particularly, we examine different DNN partitions that make the model susceptible to black-box threats and we derive the amount of data that should be allocated per device to hide proprieties of the original input. We formulate this methodology, as an optimization, where we establish a trade-off between the latency of co-inference and the privacy-level of data. Next, to relax the optimal solution, we shape our approach as a Reinforcement Learning (RL) design that supports heterogeneous devices as well as multiple DNNs/datasets.
summary: Although Deep Neural Networks (DNN) have become the backbone technology of several ubiquitous applications, their deployment in resource-constrained machines, e.g., Internet of Things (IoT) devices, is still challenging. To satisfy the resource requirements of such a paradigm, collaborative deep inference with IoT synergy was introduced. However, the distribution of DNN networks suffers from severe data leakage. Various threats have been presented, including black-box attacks, where malicious participants can recover arbitrary inputs fed into their devices. Although many countermeasures were designed to achieve privacy-preserving DNN, most of them result in additional computation and lower accuracy. In this paper, we present an approach that targets the security of collaborative deep inference via re-thinking the distribution strategy, without sacrificing the model performance. Particularly, we examine different DNN partitions that make the model susceptible to black-box threats and we derive the amount of data that should be allocated per device to hide proprieties of the original input. We formulate this methodology, as an optimization, where we establish a trade-off between the latency of co-inference and the privacy-level of data. Next, to relax the optimal solution, we shape our approach as a Reinforcement Learning (RL) design that supports heterogeneous devices as well as multiple DNNs/datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）已成为多种普遍应用的骨干技术，但它们在资源受限的机器（例如物联网（IoT）设备）中的部署仍然具有挑战性。为了满足这种范式的资源需求，引入了物联网协同的协作深度推理。然而，DNN 网络的分布式存在严重的数据泄露问题。已经出现了各种威胁，包括黑盒攻击，恶意参与者可以恢复输入到其设备中的任意输入。尽管设计了许多对策来实现保护隐私的 DNN，但大多数都会导致额外的计算量和较低的精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过重新思考分布策略来实现协作深度推理的安全性的方法，而不牺牲模型性能。特别是，我们检查了使模型容易受到黑盒威胁的不同 DNN 分区，并得出了每个设备应分配的数据量以隐藏原始输入的属性。我们制定了这种方法作为一种优化，在协同推理的延迟和数据的隐私级别之间建立权衡。接下来，为了放宽最优解决方案，我们将我们的方法塑造为强化学习 (RL) 设计，支持异构设备以及多个 DNN/数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RL-DistPrivacy方法，在保证模型性能的同时，通过优化数据分配策略解决分布式深度推理中的隐私泄露问题，适用于低延迟物联网系统。
AI.motivation: 协作深度推理在物联网设备中面临严重数据泄露风险，现有隐私保护方案会导致计算开销增加和精度下降，需在隐私与性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 通过分析DNN分区对黑盒攻击的敏感性，建立延迟与隐私水平的优化模型，并设计基于强化学习的框架以适应异构设备和多模型/数据集场景。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在降低数据泄露风险的同时，保持了模型推理精度，且有效支持异构物联网设备的协同推理。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RL-DistPrivacy框架为物联网环境下的隐私保护提供了高效解决方案，实现了隐私安全与系统性能的协同优化。
