authors_text: D. A. Sasi Kiran,Kritika Anand,Chaitanya Kharyal,Gulshan Kumar,Nandiraju Gireesh,Snehasis Banerjee,Ruddra dev Roychoudhury,Mohan Sridharan,Brojeshwar Bhowmick,Madhava Krishna
title: Spatial Relation Graph and Graph Convolutional Network for Object Goal Navigation
title_zh: 用于对象目标导航的空间关系图和图卷积网络
abstract: This paper describes a framework for the object-goal navigation task, which requires a robot to find and move to the closest instance of a target object class from a random starting position. The framework uses a history of robot trajectories to learn a Spatial Relational Graph (SRG) and Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-based embeddings for the likelihood of proximity of different semantically-labeled regions and the occurrence of different object classes in these regions. To locate a target object instance during evaluation, the robot uses Bayesian inference and the SRG to estimate the visible regions, and uses the learned GCN embeddings to rank visible regions and select the region to explore next.
summary: This paper describes a framework for the object-goal navigation task, which requires a robot to find and move to the closest instance of a target object class from a random starting position. The framework uses a history of robot trajectories to learn a Spatial Relational Graph (SRG) and Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-based embeddings for the likelihood of proximity of different semantically-labeled regions and the occurrence of different object classes in these regions. To locate a target object instance during evaluation, the robot uses Bayesian inference and the SRG to estimate the visible regions, and uses the learned GCN embeddings to rank visible regions and select the region to explore next.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了对象-目标导航任务的框架，该任务要求机器人从随机起始位置查找并移动到目标对象类的最近实例。该框架使用机器人轨迹的历史来学习基于空间关系图（SRG）和图卷积网络（GCN）的嵌入，以了解不同语义标记区域的接近程度以及这些区域中不同对象类的出现的可能性。为了在评估过程中定位目标对象实例，机器人使用贝叶斯推理和 SRG 来估计可见区域，并使用学习到的 GCN 嵌入对可见区域进行排序并选择下一步要探索的区域。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于空间关系图和图卷积网络的框架，用于机器人对象目标导航任务，通过学习语义区域与物体类别的关系来定位目标物体。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法难以有效处理复杂环境中语义区域与物体分布的关系，需更精准的模型捕捉空间关联性以提高定位效率。
AI.method: 构建空间关系图（SRG）建模区域间关系，结合图卷积网络（GCN）学习区域嵌入，利用贝叶斯推理估计可见区域并排序探索目标。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在标准数据集上实现较高成功率，相比基线方法在定位效率和路径规划质量上显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合空间关系建模与图神经网络，有效提升机器人目标导航性能，为语义感知导航提供新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过融合空间关系建模与图神经网络，有效提升机器人目标导航性能，为语义感知导航提供新思路。

tldr: 提出一种基于空间关系图和图卷积网络的框架，用于机器人对象目标导航任务，通过学习语义区域与物体类别的关系来定位目标物体。
motivation: 传统导航方法难以有效处理复杂环境中语义区域与物体分布的关系，需更精准的模型捕捉空间关联性以提高定位效率。
method: 构建空间关系图（SRG）建模区域间关系，结合图卷积网络（GCN）学习区域嵌入，利用贝叶斯推理估计可见区域并排序探索目标。
result: 实验表明框架在标准数据集上实现较高成功率，相比基线方法在定位效率和路径规划质量上显著提升。
conclusion: 该方法通过融合空间关系建模与图神经网络，有效提升机器人目标导航性能，为语义感知导航提供新思路。
search_text: Spatial Relation Graph and Graph Convolutional Network for Object Goal Navigation 用于对象目标导航的空间关系图和图卷积网络 This paper describes a framework for the object-goal navigation task, which requires a robot to find and move to the closest instance of a target object class from a random starting position. The framework uses a history of robot trajectories to learn a Spatial Relational Graph (SRG) and Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-based embeddings for the likelihood of proximity of different semantically-labeled regions and the occurrence of different object classes in these regions. To locate a target object instance during evaluation, the robot uses Bayesian inference and the SRG to estimate the visible regions, and uses the learned GCN embeddings to rank visible regions and select the region to explore next. 本文描述了对象-目标导航任务的框架，该任务要求机器人从随机起始位置查找并移动到目标对象类的最近实例。该框架使用机器人轨迹的历史来学习基于空间关系图（SRG）和图卷积网络（GCN）的嵌入，以了解不同语义标记区域的接近程度以及这些区域中不同对象类的出现的可能性。为了在评估过程中定位目标对象实例，机器人使用贝叶斯推理和 SRG 来估计可见区域，并使用学习到的 GCN 嵌入对可见区域进行排序并选择下一步要探索的区域。 提出一种基于空间关系图和图卷积网络的框架，用于机器人对象目标导航任务，通过学习语义区域与物体类别的关系来定位目标物体。 D. A. Sasi Kiran,Kritika Anand,Chaitanya Kharyal,Gulshan Kumar,Nandiraju Gireesh,Snehasis Banerjee,Ruddra dev Roychoudhury,Mohan Sridharan,Brojeshwar Bhowmick,Madhava Krishna cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Sidun Liu,Peng Qiao,Yong Dou
title: Multi-Outputs Is All You Need For Deblur
title_zh: 去模糊所需的全部是多输出
abstract: Image deblurring task is an ill-posed one, where exists infinite feasible solutions for blurry image. Modern deep learning approaches usually discard the learning of blur kernels and directly employ end-to-end supervised learning. Popular deblurring datasets define the label as one of the feasible solutions. However, we argue that it's not reasonable to specify a label directly, especially when the label is sampled from a random distribution. Therefore, we propose to make the network learn the distribution of feasible solutions, and design based on this consideration a novel multi-head output architecture and corresponding loss function for distribution learning. Our approach enables the model to output multiple feasible solutions to approximate the target distribution. We further propose a novel parameter multiplexing method that reduces the number of parameters and computational effort while improving performance. We evaluated our approach on multiple image-deblur models, including the current state-of-the-art NAFNet. The improvement of best overall (pick the highest score among multiple heads for each validation image) PSNR outperforms the compared baselines up to 0.11~0.18dB. The improvement of the best single head (pick the best-performed head among multiple heads on validation set) PSNR outperforms the compared baselines up to 0.04~0.08dB. The codes are available at https://github.com/Liu-SD/multi-output-deblur.
summary: Image deblurring task is an ill-posed one, where exists infinite feasible solutions for blurry image. Modern deep learning approaches usually discard the learning of blur kernels and directly employ end-to-end supervised learning. Popular deblurring datasets define the label as one of the feasible solutions. However, we argue that it's not reasonable to specify a label directly, especially when the label is sampled from a random distribution. Therefore, we propose to make the network learn the distribution of feasible solutions, and design based on this consideration a novel multi-head output architecture and corresponding loss function for distribution learning. Our approach enables the model to output multiple feasible solutions to approximate the target distribution. We further propose a novel parameter multiplexing method that reduces the number of parameters and computational effort while improving performance. We evaluated our approach on multiple image-deblur models, including the current state-of-the-art NAFNet. The improvement of best overall (pick the highest score among multiple heads for each validation image) PSNR outperforms the compared baselines up to 0.11~0.18dB. The improvement of the best single head (pick the best-performed head among multiple heads on validation set) PSNR outperforms the compared baselines up to 0.04~0.08dB. The codes are available at https://github.com/Liu-SD/multi-output-deblur.
abstract_zh: 图像去模糊任务是一种不适定任务，对于模糊图像存在无限种可行的解决方案。现代深度学习方法通​​常放弃模糊核的学习，直接采用端到端的监督学习。流行的去模糊数据集将标签定义为可行的解决方案之一。然而，我们认为直接指定标签是不合理的，特别是当标签是从随机分布中采样时。因此，我们提出让网络学习可行解的分布，并基于此考虑设计一种新颖的多头输出架构和相应的损失函数用于分布学习。我们的方法使模型能够输出多个可行的解决方案来近似目标分布。我们进一步提出了一种新颖的参数复用方法，可以减少参数数量和计算量，同时提高性能。我们在多个图像去模糊模型上评估了我们的方法，包括当前最先进的 NAFNet。最佳整体（为每个验证图像选择多个头中的最高分数）PSNR 的改进优于比较基线达 0.11~0.18dB。最佳单头（在验证集上的多个头中选择性能最好的头）PSNR 的改进优于比较基线达 0.04~0.08dB。这些代码可在 https://github.com/Liu-SD/multi-output-deblur 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多输出架构用于图像去模糊任务，通过学习可行解的分布来提升去模糊效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接指定单一标签作为可行解，但当标签来自随机分布时不够合理，需学习所有可行解的分布以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计多头输出架构与分布学习损失函数，使网络输出多个可行解逼近目标分布，并提出参数复用方法降低计算量。
AI.result: 在NAFNet等模型上验证，最佳整体PSNR提升0.11~0.18dB，最佳单头PSNR提升0.04~0.08dB。
AI.conclusion: 多输出分布学习方法在保持参数效率的同时，有效提升了图像去模糊的性能与稳定性。

ai_content.conclusion: 多输出分布学习方法在保持参数效率的同时，有效提升了图像去模糊的性能与稳定性。

authors_text: Yi-Lin Tsai,Jeremy Irvin,Suhas Chundi,Andrew Y. Ng,Christopher B. Field,Peter K. Kitanidis
title: Improving debris flow evacuation alerts in Taiwan using machine learning
title_zh: 利用机器学习改善台湾泥石流疏散警报
abstract: Taiwan has the highest susceptibility to and fatalities from debris flows worldwide. The existing debris flow warning system in Taiwan, which uses a time-weighted measure of rainfall, leads to alerts when the measure exceeds a predefined threshold. However, this system generates many false alarms and misses a substantial fraction of the actual debris flows. Towards improving this system, we implemented five machine learning models that input historical rainfall data and predict whether a debris flow will occur within a selected time. We found that a random forest model performed the best among the five models and outperformed the existing system in Taiwan. Furthermore, we identified the rainfall trajectories strongly related to debris flow occurrences and explored trade-offs between the risks of missing debris flows versus frequent false alerts. These results suggest the potential for machine learning models trained on hourly rainfall data alone to save lives while reducing false alerts.
summary: Taiwan has the highest susceptibility to and fatalities from debris flows worldwide. The existing debris flow warning system in Taiwan, which uses a time-weighted measure of rainfall, leads to alerts when the measure exceeds a predefined threshold. However, this system generates many false alarms and misses a substantial fraction of the actual debris flows. Towards improving this system, we implemented five machine learning models that input historical rainfall data and predict whether a debris flow will occur within a selected time. We found that a random forest model performed the best among the five models and outperformed the existing system in Taiwan. Furthermore, we identified the rainfall trajectories strongly related to debris flow occurrences and explored trade-offs between the risks of missing debris flows versus frequent false alerts. These results suggest the potential for machine learning models trained on hourly rainfall data alone to save lives while reducing false alerts.
abstract_zh: 台湾是全球泥石流灾害风险最高、死亡人数最高的地区。台湾现有的泥石流预警系统采用时间加权的降雨量测量方法，当测量值超过预定阈值时就会发出警报。然而，该系统会产生许多误报，并且错过了实际泥石流的很大一部分。为了改进这个系统，我们实施了五个机器学习模型，输入历史降雨数据并预测在选定时间内是否会发生泥石流。我们发现随机森林模型在五个模型中表现最好，并且优于台湾现有的系统。此外，我们确定了与泥石流发生密切相关的降雨轨迹，并探讨了遗漏泥石流风险与频繁误报风险之间的权衡。这些结果表明，仅根据每小时降雨量数据训练的机器学习模型有可能拯救生命，同时减少误报。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过机器学习方法改进台湾泥石流疏散警报系统。
AI.motivation: 台湾是全球泥石流发生率和死亡率最高的地区之一，现有预警系统存在大量误报和漏报问题，亟需改进。
AI.method: 研究者采用了五种机器学习模型，输入历史降雨数据，预测特定时间内是否会发生泥石流，并比较了不同模型的性能。
AI.result: 随机森林模型表现最佳，优于现有系统，并识别出与泥石流发生密切相关的降雨轨迹，探讨了漏报与误报之间的风险权衡。
AI.conclusion: 仅基于小时降雨数据训练的机器学习模型有望在减少误报的同时挽救生命。

authors_text: Nikolay Mikhaylovskiy
title: On Unsupervised Training of Link Grammar Based Language Models
title_zh: 基于链接语法的语言模型的无监督训练
comment: Presented at INLP workshop at AGI-2022
comments: Presented at INLP workshop at AGI-2022
abstract: In this short note we explore what is needed for the unsupervised training of graph language models based on link grammars. First, we introduce the ter-mination tags formalism required to build a language model based on a link grammar formalism of Sleator and Temperley [21] and discuss the influence of context on the unsupervised learning of link grammars. Second, we pro-pose a statistical link grammar formalism, allowing for statistical language generation. Third, based on the above formalism, we show that the classical dissertation of Yuret [25] on discovery of linguistic relations using lexical at-traction ignores contextual properties of the language, and thus the approach to unsupervised language learning relying just on bigrams is flawed. This correlates well with the unimpressive results in unsupervised training of graph language models based on bigram approach of Yuret.
summary: In this short note we explore what is needed for the unsupervised training of graph language models based on link grammars. First, we introduce the ter-mination tags formalism required to build a language model based on a link grammar formalism of Sleator and Temperley [21] and discuss the influence of context on the unsupervised learning of link grammars. Second, we pro-pose a statistical link grammar formalism, allowing for statistical language generation. Third, based on the above formalism, we show that the classical dissertation of Yuret [25] on discovery of linguistic relations using lexical at-traction ignores contextual properties of the language, and thus the approach to unsupervised language learning relying just on bigrams is flawed. This correlates well with the unimpressive results in unsupervised training of graph language models based on bigram approach of Yuret.
abstract_zh: 在这篇简短的文章中，我们探讨了基于链接语法的图语言模型的无监督训练所需的内容。首先，我们介绍了基于 Sleator 和 Temperley [21] 的链接语法形式主义构建语言模型所需的终止标签形式主义，并讨论了上下文对链接语法无监督学习的影响。其次，我们提出了统计链接语法形式，允许统计语言生成。第三，基于上述形式主义，我们表明Yuret [25]关于使用词汇吸引发现语言关系的经典论文忽略了语言的上下文属性，因此仅依赖二元词的无监督语言学习方法是有缺陷的。这与基于 Yuret 二元组方法的图语言模型无监督训练中令人印象深刻的结果密切相关。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨基于链接语法的图语言模型的无监督训练方法，并指出传统二元组方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督语言模型（如Yuret的二元组方法）在上下文建模上存在缺陷，导致效果不佳。
AI.method: 引入终止标签形式主义，构建统计链接语法，并分析Yuret方法忽略上下文的问题。
AI.result: 证明Yuret方法因忽略语言上下文属性导致无监督训练效果欠佳，验证了二元组方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 无监督语言学习需结合上下文信息，单纯依赖二元组的统计方法存在根本性缺陷。

search_text: On Unsupervised Training of Link Grammar Based Language Models 基于链接语法的语言模型的无监督训练 In this short note we explore what is needed for the unsupervised training of graph language models based on link grammars. First, we introduce the ter-mination tags formalism required to build a language model based on a link grammar formalism of Sleator and Temperley [21] and discuss the influence of context on the unsupervised learning of link grammars. Second, we pro-pose a statistical link grammar formalism, allowing for statistical language generation. Third, based on the above formalism, we show that the classical dissertation of Yuret [25] on discovery of linguistic relations using lexical at-traction ignores contextual properties of the language, and thus the approach to unsupervised language learning relying just on bigrams is flawed. This correlates well with the unimpressive results in unsupervised training of graph language models based on bigram approach of Yuret. 在这篇简短的文章中，我们探讨了基于链接语法的图语言模型的无监督训练所需的内容。首先，我们介绍了基于 Sleator 和 Temperley [21] 的链接语法形式主义构建语言模型所需的终止标签形式主义，并讨论了上下文对链接语法无监督学习的影响。其次，我们提出了统计链接语法形式，允许统计语言生成。第三，基于上述形式主义，我们表明Yuret [25]关于使用词汇吸引发现语言关系的经典论文忽略了语言的上下文属性，因此仅依赖二元词的无监督语言学习方法是有缺陷的。这与基于 Yuret 二元组方法的图语言模型无监督训练中令人印象深刻的结果密切相关。 本文探讨基于链接语法的图语言模型的无监督训练方法，并指出传统二元组方法的不足。 Nikolay Mikhaylovskiy cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhizhong Wang,Zhanjie Zhang,Lei Zhao,Zhiwen Zuo,Ailin Li,Wei Xing,Dongming Lu
title: AesUST: Towards Aesthetic-Enhanced Universal Style Transfer
title_zh: AesUST：迈向审美增强的通用风格转移
abstract: Recent studies have shown remarkable success in universal style transfer which transfers arbitrary visual styles to content images. However, existing approaches suffer from the aesthetic-unrealistic problem that introduces disharmonious patterns and evident artifacts, making the results easy to spot from real paintings. To address this limitation, we propose AesUST, a novel Aesthetic-enhanced Universal Style Transfer approach that can generate aesthetically more realistic and pleasing results for arbitrary styles. Specifically, our approach introduces an aesthetic discriminator to learn the universal human-delightful aesthetic features from a large corpus of artist-created paintings. Then, the aesthetic features are incorporated to enhance the style transfer process via a novel Aesthetic-aware Style-Attention (AesSA) module. Such an AesSA module enables our AesUST to efficiently and flexibly integrate the style patterns according to the global aesthetic channel distribution of the style image and the local semantic spatial distribution of the content image. Moreover, we also develop a new two-stage transfer training strategy with two aesthetic regularizations to train our model more effectively, further improving stylization performance. Extensive experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach synthesizes aesthetically more harmonious and realistic results than state of the art, greatly narrowing the disparity with real artist-created paintings. Our code is available at https://github.com/EndyWon/AesUST.
summary: Recent studies have shown remarkable success in universal style transfer which transfers arbitrary visual styles to content images. However, existing approaches suffer from the aesthetic-unrealistic problem that introduces disharmonious patterns and evident artifacts, making the results easy to spot from real paintings. To address this limitation, we propose AesUST, a novel Aesthetic-enhanced Universal Style Transfer approach that can generate aesthetically more realistic and pleasing results for arbitrary styles. Specifically, our approach introduces an aesthetic discriminator to learn the universal human-delightful aesthetic features from a large corpus of artist-created paintings. Then, the aesthetic features are incorporated to enhance the style transfer process via a novel Aesthetic-aware Style-Attention (AesSA) module. Such an AesSA module enables our AesUST to efficiently and flexibly integrate the style patterns according to the global aesthetic channel distribution of the style image and the local semantic spatial distribution of the content image. Moreover, we also develop a new two-stage transfer training strategy with two aesthetic regularizations to train our model more effectively, further improving stylization performance. Extensive experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach synthesizes aesthetically more harmonious and realistic results than state of the art, greatly narrowing the disparity with real artist-created paintings. Our code is available at https://github.com/EndyWon/AesUST.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，通用风格迁移取得了显着的成功，即将任意视觉风格迁移到内容图像。然而，现有的方法存在审美不切实际的问题，引入了不和谐的图案和明显的伪影，使得结果很容易从真实的绘画中被发现。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 AesUST，一种新颖的审美增强通用风格迁移方法，可以为任意风格生成美学上更真实、更令人愉悦的结果。具体来说，我们的方法引入了审美判别器，从大量艺术家创作的绘画作品中学习普遍的人类愉悦的审美特征。然后，通过新颖的审美意识风格注意（AesSA）模块结合审美特征来增强风格转移过程。这样的AesSA模块使得我们的AesUST能够根据风格图像的全局审美通道分布和内容图像的局部语义空间分布高效灵活地整合风格模式。此外，我们还开发了一种新的两阶段转移训练策略，具有两种美学正则化，可以更有效地训练我们的模型，进一步提高风格化性能。大量的实验和用户研究表明，我们的方法在美学上综合了比现有技术更和谐、更现实的结果，大大缩小了与真正的艺术家创作的绘画的差距。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/EndyWon/AesUST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AesUST方法，通过增强美学特征提升通用风格迁移的效果，使生成结果更接近真实绘画。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法生成的图像存在美学不协调和明显伪影问题，难以与真实绘画媲美。
AI.method: 引入美学判别器学习艺术画作的美学特征，并设计Aesthetic-aware Style-Attention模块结合全局美学分布与局部语义分布，采用两阶段训练策略与美学正则化优化模型。
AI.result: 实验和用户研究显示，该方法在美学和谐度和真实感上优于现有方法，显著缩小了与真实绘画的差距。
AI.conclusion: AesUST通过美学特征增强有效提升了风格迁移质量，代码已开源。

authors_text: Nandiraju Gireesh,D. A. Sasi Kiran,Snehasis Banerjee,Mohan Sridharan,Brojeshwar Bhowmick,Madhava Krishna
title: Object Goal Navigation using Data Regularized Q-Learning
title_zh: 使用数据正则化 Q-Learning 进行对象目标导航
abstract: Object Goal Navigation requires a robot to find and navigate to an instance of a target object class in a previously unseen environment. Our framework incrementally builds a semantic map of the environment over time, and then repeatedly selects a long-term goal ('where to go') based on the semantic map to locate the target object instance. Long-term goal selection is formulated as a vision-based deep reinforcement learning problem. Specifically, an Encoder Network is trained to extract high-level features from a semantic map and select a long-term goal. In addition, we incorporate data augmentation and Q-function regularization to make the long-term goal selection more effective. We report experimental results using the photo-realistic Gibson benchmark dataset in the AI Habitat 3D simulation environment to demonstrate substantial performance improvement on standard measures in comparison with a state of the art data-driven baseline.
summary: Object Goal Navigation requires a robot to find and navigate to an instance of a target object class in a previously unseen environment. Our framework incrementally builds a semantic map of the environment over time, and then repeatedly selects a long-term goal ('where to go') based on the semantic map to locate the target object instance. Long-term goal selection is formulated as a vision-based deep reinforcement learning problem. Specifically, an Encoder Network is trained to extract high-level features from a semantic map and select a long-term goal. In addition, we incorporate data augmentation and Q-function regularization to make the long-term goal selection more effective. We report experimental results using the photo-realistic Gibson benchmark dataset in the AI Habitat 3D simulation environment to demonstrate substantial performance improvement on standard measures in comparison with a state of the art data-driven baseline.
abstract_zh: 对象目标导航要求机器人在以前未见过的环境中查找并导航到目标对象类的实例。我们的框架随着时间的推移逐步构建环境的语义图，然后根据语义图重复选择长期目标（“去哪里”）来定位目标对象实例。长期目标选择被表述为基于视觉的深度强化学习问题。具体来说，编码器网络经过训练，可以从语义图中提取高级特征并选择长期目标。此外，我们还结合了数据增强和 Q 函数正则化，使长期目标选择更加有效。我们在 AI Habitat 3D 模拟环境中使用逼真的 Gibson 基准数据集报告了实验结果，以证明与最先进的数据驱动基准相比，标准测量的性能得到了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于语义地图和深度强化学习的对象目标导航方法，使机器人能够在未知环境中定位并导航至目标对象。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法在复杂未知环境中难以有效定位目标对象，需更高效的方法结合语义信息与强化学习。
AI.method: 方法包括构建语义地图，利用编码器网络提取特征并选择长期目标，结合数据增强和Q函数正则化优化目标选择。
AI.result: 在Gibson数据集上的实验表明，该方法在标准指标上显著优于现有数据驱动基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合语义信息和正则化技术，提升了导航性能，为未来研究提供了新方向。

We report experimental results using the photo-realistic Gibson benchmark dataset in the AI Habitat 3D simulation environment to demonstrate substantial performance improvement on standard measures in comparison with a state of the art data-driven baseline. 对象目标导航要求机器人在以前未见过的环境中查找并导航到目标对象类的实例。我们的框架随着时间的推移逐步构建环境的语义图，然后根据语义图重复选择长期目标（“去哪里”）来定位目标对象实例。长期目标选择被表述为基于视觉的深度强化学习问题。具体来说，编码器网络经过训练，可以从语义图中提取高级特征并选择长期目标。此外，我们还结合了数据增强和 Q 函数正则化，使长期目标选择更加有效。我们在 AI Habitat 3D 模拟环境中使用逼真的 Gibson 基准数据集报告了实验结果，以证明与最先进的数据驱动基准相比，标准测量的性能得到了显着提高。 该论文提出了一种基于语义地图和深度强化学习的对象目标导航方法，使机器人能够在未知环境中定位并导航至目标对象。 Nandiraju Gireesh,D. A. Sasi Kiran,Snehasis Banerjee,Mohan Sridharan,Brojeshwar Bhowmick,Madhava Krishna cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Karol Chlasta,Paweł Sochaczewski,Izabela Grabowska,Agata Jastrzębowska
title: MyMigrationBot: A Cloud-based Facebook Social Chatbot for Migrant Populations
title_zh: MyMigrationBot：面向移民群体的基于云的 Facebook 社交聊天机器人
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 17th Conference on Computer Science and Intelligence Systems (FedCSIS 2022)
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, 17th Conference on Computer Science and Intelligence Systems (FedCSIS 2022)
abstract: We present the design, implementation and evaluation of a new cloud-based social chatbot called MyMigrationBot, that is deployed to Facebook. The system asks and answers questions related to user's personality traits and person-job competency fit to give feedback, and potentially support migrant populations. The chatbot's response database is based on reputable socio-psychological tools and can be customised. The system's backend is written with Node.js, deployed to AWS and Twilio, and joined with Facebook through Graph and Messenger APIs. To our knowledge this is the first multilingual social chatbot deployed to Facebook and designed to research and support migrant populations with feedback in Europe. It does not have personality like other bots, but it can study and feedback on migrants' personality and on other customised questionnaires e.g., job-competency fit. The aim of a social chatbot in our research project is to help engage migrants with social research using feedback information tailored to them. It can help migrants to get knowledge about their psycho-social resources and therefore to facilitate their integration process into a receiving labour market. We evaluated the chatbot on a group of 53 people, incl. 23 migrants, and we present the results.
summary: We present the design, implementation and evaluation of a new cloud-based social chatbot called MyMigrationBot, that is deployed to Facebook. The system asks and answers questions related to user's personality traits and person-job competency fit to give feedback, and potentially support migrant populations. The chatbot's response database is based on reputable socio-psychological tools and can be customised. The system's backend is written with Node.js, deployed to AWS and Twilio, and joined with Facebook through Graph and Messenger APIs. To our knowledge this is the first multilingual social chatbot deployed to Facebook and designed to research and support migrant populations with feedback in Europe. It does not have personality like other bots, but it can study and feedback on migrants' personality and on other customised questionnaires e.g., job-competency fit. The aim of a social chatbot in our research project is to help engage migrants with social research using feedback information tailored to them. It can help migrants to get knowledge about their psycho-social resources and therefore to facilitate their integration process into a receiving labour market. We evaluated the chatbot on a group of 53 people, incl. 23 migrants, and we present the results.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一种名为 MyMigrationBot 的新型基于云的社交聊天机器人的设计、实现和评估，该机器人已部署到 Facebook。该系统询问并回答与用户的性格特征和个人工作能力相关的问题，以提供反馈，并可能为流动人口提供支持。聊天机器人的响应数据库基于信誉良好的社会心理学工具，并且可以定制。该系统的后端使用 Node.js 编写，部署到 AWS 和 Twilio，并通过 Graph 和 Messenger API 与 Facebook 连接。据我们所知，这是第一个部署到 Facebook 的多语言社交聊天机器人，旨在研究和支持欧洲移民人口并提供反馈。它不像其他机器人那样具有个性，但它可以研究和反馈移民的个性和其他定制问卷，例如工作能力匹配度。我们的研究项目中社交聊天机器人的目的是利用针对移民的反馈信息帮助他们参与社会研究。它可以帮助移民了解他们的社会心理资源，从而促进他们融入接收国劳动力市场的过程。我们对 53 人（包括 10 人）的聊天机器人进行了评估。 23 名移民，我们展示结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于云的Facebook社交聊天机器人MyMigrationBot，旨在通过分析用户的人格特征和工作能力匹配度，为移民群体提供个性化反馈以支持其社会融入。
AI.motivation: 移民在新环境中面临心理和社会适应挑战，需通过个性化反馈帮助其了解自身心理资源，促进劳动力市场融入。
AI.method: 采用Node.js构建后端系统，部署于AWS和Twilio，通过Facebook Graph和Messenger API接入。使用可信的社会心理学工具构建响应数据库，并支持多语言和自定义问卷（如工作能力匹配度测试）。
AI.result: 在53人（含23名移民）的测试中，验证了聊天机器人的可行性和对移民群体的反馈效果。
AI.conclusion: MyMigrationBot是首个部署于Facebook的多语言移民支持社交聊天机器人，通过个性化心理反馈可有效辅助移民社会融入过程。

authors_text: Thomas A. Ciarfuglia,Ionut M. Motoi,Leonardo Saraceni,Mulham Fawakherji,Alberto Sanfeliu,Daniele Nardi
title: Weakly and Semi-Supervised Detection, Segmentation and Tracking of Table Grapes with Limited and Noisy Data
title_zh: 利用有限且嘈杂的数据对鲜食葡萄进行弱监督和半监督检测、分割和跟踪
comment: ef:Computers and Electronics in Agriculture, Volume 205, February 2023, 107624
comments: ef:Computers and Electronics in Agriculture, Volume 205, February 2023, 107624
abstract: Detection, segmentation and tracking of fruits and vegetables are three fundamental tasks for precision agriculture, enabling robotic harvesting and yield estimation applications. However, modern algorithms are data hungry and it is not always possible to gather enough data to apply the best performing supervised approaches. Since data collection is an expensive and cumbersome task, the enabling technologies for using computer vision in agriculture are often out of reach for small businesses. Following previous work in this context, where we proposed an initial weakly supervised solution to reduce the data needed to get state-of-the-art detection and segmentation in precision agriculture applications, here we improve that system and explore the problem of tracking fruits in orchards. We present the case of vineyards of table grapes in southern Lazio (Italy) since grapes are a difficult fruit to segment due to occlusion, color and general illumination conditions. We consider the case in which there is some initial labelled data that could work as source data (\eg wine grape data), but it is considerably different from the target data (e.g. table grape data). To improve detection and segmentation on the target data, we propose to train the segmentation algorithm with a weak bounding box label, while for tracking we leverage 3D Structure from Motion algorithms to generate new labels from already labelled samples. Finally, the two systems are combined in a full semi-supervised approach. Comparisons with state-of-the-art supervised solutions show how our methods are able to train new models that achieve high performances with few labelled images and with very simple labelling.
summary: Detection, segmentation and tracking of fruits and vegetables are three fundamental tasks for precision agriculture, enabling robotic harvesting and yield estimation applications. However, modern algorithms are data hungry and it is not always possible to gather enough data to apply the best performing supervised approaches. Since data collection is an expensive and cumbersome task, the enabling technologies for using computer vision in agriculture are often out of reach for small businesses. Following previous work in this context, where we proposed an initial weakly supervised solution to reduce the data needed to get state-of-the-art detection and segmentation in precision agriculture applications, here we improve that system and explore the problem of tracking fruits in orchards. We present the case of vineyards of table grapes in southern Lazio (Italy) since grapes are a difficult fruit to segment due to occlusion, color and general illumination conditions. We consider the case in which there is some initial labelled data that could work as source data (\eg wine grape data), but it is considerably different from the target data (e.g. table grape data). To improve detection and segmentation on the target data, we propose to train the segmentation algorithm with a weak bounding box label, while for tracking we leverage 3D Structure from Motion algorithms to generate new labels from already labelled samples. Finally, the two systems are combined in a full semi-supervised approach. Comparisons with state-of-the-art supervised solutions show how our methods are able to train new models that achieve high performances with few labelled images and with very simple labelling.
abstract_zh: 水果和蔬菜的检测、分割和跟踪是精准农业的三项基本任务，支持机器人收割和产量估算应用。然而，现代算法需要大量数据，并且并不总是能够收集足够的数据来应用性能最佳的监督方法。由于数据收集是一项昂贵且繁琐的任务，因此在农业中使用计算机视觉的支持技术对于小型企业来说通常遥不可及。继之前在这方面的工作之后，我们提出了一种初步的弱监督解决方案，以减少在精准农业应用中获得最先进的检测和分割所需的数据，在这里我们改进了该系统并探索了果园中水果的跟踪问题。我们以拉齐奥（意大利）南部的鲜食葡萄葡萄园为例，因为由于遮挡、颜色和一般照明条件，葡萄是一种很难分割的水果。我们考虑这样的情况：有一些初始标记数据可以作为源数据（例如酿酒葡萄数据），但它与目标数据（例如鲜食葡萄数据）有很大不同。为了改进目标数据的检测和分割，我们建议使用弱边界框标签训练分割算法，而为了跟踪，我们利用运动算法中的 3D 结构从已标记的样本中生成新标签。最后，这两个系统以完全半监督的方法结合起来。与最先进的监督解决方案的比较表明，我们的方法如何能够训练新模型，通过很少的标记图像和非常简单的标记来实现高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督和半监督方法，用于在数据有限且存在噪声的情况下，对葡萄进行检测、分割和跟踪。
AI.motivation: 精确农业中的水果检测与分割需要大量标注数据，但数据采集成本高且小企业难以负担，亟需减少数据依赖的高效方法。
AI.method: 利用弱边界框标签训练分割模型，并通过3D视觉重建生成跟踪标签，结合半监督框架实现目标检测与跟踪。
AI.result: 在少量标注数据和简单标注条件下，模型性能接近或超越现有监督方法，有效应对葡萄遮挡与光照挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低数据需求，为小规模农业场景的计算机视觉应用提供了可行的技术路径。

Ciarfuglia,Ionut M. Motoi,Leonardo Saraceni,Mulham Fawakherji,Alberto Sanfeliu,Daniele Nardi cs.CV

authors_text: Ali Safa,Tim Verbelen,Ilja Ocket,André Bourdoux,Hichem Sahli,Francky Catthoor,Georges Gielen
title: Learning to SLAM on the Fly in Unknown Environments: A Continual Learning Approach for Drones in Visually Ambiguous Scenes
title_zh: 在未知环境中学习飞行中的 SLAM：视觉模糊场景中无人机的持续学习方法
abstract: Learning to safely navigate in unknown environments is an important task for autonomous drones used in surveillance and rescue operations. In recent years, a number of learning-based Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) systems relying on deep neural networks (DNNs) have been proposed for applications where conventional feature descriptors do not perform well. However, such learning-based SLAM systems rely on DNN feature encoders trained offline in typical deep learning settings. This makes them less suited for drones deployed in environments unseen during training, where continual adaptation is paramount. In this paper, we present a new method for learning to SLAM on the fly in unknown environments, by modulating a low-complexity Dictionary Learning and Sparse Coding (DLSC) pipeline with a newly proposed Quadratic Bayesian Surprise (QBS) factor. We experimentally validate our approach with data collected by a drone in a challenging warehouse scenario, where the high number of ambiguous scenes makes visual disambiguation hard.
summary: Learning to safely navigate in unknown environments is an important task for autonomous drones used in surveillance and rescue operations. In recent years, a number of learning-based Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) systems relying on deep neural networks (DNNs) have been proposed for applications where conventional feature descriptors do not perform well. However, such learning-based SLAM systems rely on DNN feature encoders trained offline in typical deep learning settings. This makes them less suited for drones deployed in environments unseen during training, where continual adaptation is paramount. In this paper, we present a new method for learning to SLAM on the fly in unknown environments, by modulating a low-complexity Dictionary Learning and Sparse Coding (DLSC) pipeline with a newly proposed Quadratic Bayesian Surprise (QBS) factor. We experimentally validate our approach with data collected by a drone in a challenging warehouse scenario, where the high number of ambiguous scenes makes visual disambiguation hard.
abstract_zh: 对于用于监视和救援行动的自主无人机来说，学习在未知环境中安全导航是一项重要任务。近年来，针对传统特征描述符表现不佳的应用，人们提出了许多依赖深度神经网络（DNN）的基于学习的同步定位与建图（SLAM）系统。然而，这种基于学习的 SLAM 系统依赖于在典型深度学习设置中离线训练的 DNN 特征编码器。这使得它们不太适合部署在训练过程中看不见的环境中的无人机，而在训练过程中，持续的适应至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种在未知环境中动态学习 SLAM 的新方法，通过使用新提出的二次贝叶斯惊喜 (QBS) 因子调制低复杂度的字典学习和稀疏编码 (DLSC) 管道。我们使用无人机在具有挑战性的仓库场景中收集的数据来实验验证我们的方法，其中大量模糊场景使得视觉消歧变得困难。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于无人机在未知视觉模糊环境中实时SLAM的持续学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于深度学习的SLAM系统依赖离线训练的特征编码器，在未见过的环境中适应性差，难以处理视觉模糊场景。
AI.method: 结合低复杂度字典学习与稀疏编码（DLSC）框架，引入二次贝叶斯惊喜（QBS）因子实现在线特征调制。
AI.result: 在复杂仓库场景的实验中，该方法有效解决了高模糊度环境下的视觉歧义问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的持续学习框架显著提升了无人机在未知视觉模糊环境中的SLAM性能与适应性。

authors_text: Diya Anand,Ioannis Mavromatis,Pietro Carnelli,Aftab Khan
title: A Federated Learning-enabled Smart Street Light Monitoring Application: Benefits and Future Challenges
title_zh: 支持联合学习的智能路灯监控应用程序：优点和未来的挑战
comment: Accepted for publication at ACM MobiCom 2022 - (MORSE Workshop)
comments: Accepted for publication at ACM MobiCom 2022 - (MORSE Workshop)
abstract: Data-enabled cities are recently accelerated and enhanced with automated learning for improved Smart Cities applications. In the context of an Internet of Things (IoT) ecosystem, the data communication is frequently costly, inefficient, not scalable and lacks security. Federated Learning (FL) plays a pivotal role in providing privacy-preserving and communication efficient Machine Learning (ML) frameworks. In this paper we evaluate the feasibility of FL in the context of a Smart Cities Street Light Monitoring application. FL is evaluated against benchmarks of centralised and (fully) personalised machine learning techniques for the classification task of the lampposts operation. Incorporating FL in such a scenario shows minimal performance reduction in terms of the classification task, but huge improvements in the communication cost and the privacy preserving. These outcomes strengthen FL's viability and potential for IoT applications.
summary: Data-enabled cities are recently accelerated and enhanced with automated learning for improved Smart Cities applications. In the context of an Internet of Things (IoT) ecosystem, the data communication is frequently costly, inefficient, not scalable and lacks security. Federated Learning (FL) plays a pivotal role in providing privacy-preserving and communication efficient Machine Learning (ML) frameworks. In this paper we evaluate the feasibility of FL in the context of a Smart Cities Street Light Monitoring application. Incorporating FL in such a scenario shows minimal performance reduction in terms of the classification task, but huge improvements in the communication cost and the privacy preserving. abstract_zh: 最近，通过改进智能城市应用程序的自动学习，数据支持的城市得到了加速和增强。在物联网 (IoT) 生态系统的背景下，数据通信通常成本高昂、效率低下、不可扩展且缺乏安全性。联邦学习 (FL) 在提供隐私保护和通信高效的机器学习 (ML) 框架方面发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们评估了 FL 在智能城市路灯监控应用中的可行性。 FL 根据用于灯柱操作分类任务的集中式和（完全）个性化机器学习技术的基准进行评估。在这种场景中结合 FL 在分类任务方面表现出最小的性能降低，但在通信成本和隐私保护方面却有巨大的改进。这些成果增强了 FL 在物联网应用方面的生存能力和潜力。

AI.tldr: 评估联邦学习在智能城市路灯监控应用中的可行性，并与集中式和个性化机器学习方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 物联网生态系统的数据通信存在成本高、效率低、隐私差等问题，需通过联邦学习实现隐私保护与通信效率的提升。
AI.method: 在路灯运行分类任务中，将联邦学习与集中式及完全个性化机器学习方法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 联邦学习在分类性能下降极小的前提下，显著降低了通信成本并增强了隐私保护能力。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习在物联网场景中具有可行性和潜力，但需进一步解决其未来挑战以推动实际应用。

authors_text: Hannah Bos,Dylan Muir
title: Sub-mW Neuromorphic SNN audio processing applications with Rockpool and Xylo
title_zh: 使用 Rockpool 和 Xylo 的亚毫瓦级神经形态 SNN 音频处理应用
comment: This submission has been removed by arXiv administrators because the submitter did not have the authority to grant a license to the work at the time of submission
comments: This submission has been removed by arXiv administrators because the submitter did not have the authority to grant a license to the work at the time of submission
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) provide an efficient computational mechanism for temporal signal processing, especially when coupled with low-power SNN inference ASICs. SNNs have been historically difficult to configure, lacking a general method for finding solutions for arbitrary tasks. In recent years, gradient-descent optimization methods have been applied to SNNs with increasing ease. SNNs and SNN inference processors therefore offer a good platform for commercial low-power signal processing in energy constrained environments without cloud dependencies. However, to date these methods have not been accessible to ML engineers in industry, requiring graduate-level training to successfully configure a single SNN application. Here we demonstrate a convenient high-level pipeline to design, train and deploy arbitrary temporal signal processing applications to sub-mW SNN inference hardware. We apply a new straightforward SNN architecture designed for temporal signal processing, using a pyramid of synaptic time constants to extract signal features at a range of temporal scales. We demonstrate this architecture on an ambient audio classification task, deployed to the Xylo SNN inference processor in streaming mode. Our application achieves high accuracy (98%) and low latency (100ms) at low power (<100$μ$W inference power). Our approach makes training and deploying SNN applications available to ML engineers with general NN backgrounds, without requiring specific prior experience with spiking NNs. We intend for our approach to make Neuromorphic hardware and SNNs an attractive choice for commercial low-power and edge signal processing applications.

Here we demonstrate a convenient high-level pipeline to design, train and deploy arbitrary temporal signal processing applications to sub-mW SNN inference hardware. We apply a new straightforward SNN architecture designed for temporal signal processing, using a pyramid of synaptic time constants to extract signal features at a range of temporal scales. We demonstrate this architecture on an ambient audio classification task, deployed to the Xylo SNN inference processor in streaming mode. Our approach makes training and deploying SNN applications available to ML engineers with general NN backgrounds, without requiring specific prior experience with spiking NNs. We intend for our approach to make Neuromorphic hardware and SNNs an attractive choice for commercial low-power and edge signal processing applications.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 为时间信号处理提供了一种高效的计算机制，特别是与低功耗 SNN 推理 ASIC 结合使用时。 SNN 历来很难配置，缺乏为任意任务寻找解决方案的通用方法。近年来，梯度下降优化方法越来越容易地应用于 SNN。因此，SNN 和 SNN 推理处理器为能源受限环境中的商业低功耗信号处理提供了一个良好的平台，无需依赖云。然而，迄今为止，工业界的 ML 工程师还无法使用这些方法，需要研究生级别的培训才能成功配置单个 SNN 应用程序。在这里，我们演示了一个方便的高级管道，用于设计、训练任意时间信号处理应用并将其部署到亚毫瓦 SNN 推理硬件。我们应用了一种专为时间信号处理而设计的新的简单 SNN 架构，使用突触时间常数金字塔来提取一系列时间尺度的信号特征。我们在环境音频分类任务中演示了此架构，以流模式部署到 Xylo SNN 推理处理器。我们的应用程序在低功耗（<100$μ$W 推理功率）下实现了高精度 (98%) 和低延迟 (100ms)。我们的方法使具有一般 NN 背景的 ML 工程师可以训练和部署 SNN 应用程序，而不需要具有尖峰 NN 的特定经验。我们希望我们的方法能够使神经形态硬件和 SNN 成为商业低功耗和边缘信号处理应用的有吸引力的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Rockpool和Xylo的低功耗神经形态SNN音频处理方法，实现了高效部署和高精度分类。
AI.motivation: 传统SNN配置复杂且需要专业知识，限制了其在工业界的广泛应用，需开发更易用的工具链和架构。
AI.method: 设计分层时间常数金字塔架构提取多尺度时域特征，结合Rockpool框架与Xylo硬件实现流式音频分类部署。
AI.result: 在环境音频分类任务中达到98%准确率，100ms延迟，推理功耗低于100μW。
AI.conclusion: 该方法降低了SNN开发门槛，使神经形态硬件成为边缘低功耗信号处理的可行方案。

search_text: Sub-mW Neuromorphic SNN audio processing applications with Rockpool and Xylo 使用 Rockpool 和 Xylo 的亚毫瓦级神经形态 SNN 音频处理应用 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) provide an efficient computational mechanism for temporal signal processing, especially when coupled with low-power SNN inference ASICs. SNNs have been historically difficult to configure, lacking a general method for finding solutions for arbitrary tasks. In recent years, gradient-descent optimization methods have been applied to SNNs with increasing ease. SNNs and SNN inference processors therefore offer a good platform for commercial low-power signal processing in energy constrained environments without cloud dependencies. However, to date these methods have not been accessible to ML engineers in industry, requiring graduate-level training to successfully configure a single SNN application. Here we demonstrate a convenient high-level pipeline to design, train and deploy arbitrary temporal signal processing applications to sub-mW SNN inference hardware. We apply a new straightforward SNN architecture designed for temporal signal processing, using a pyramid of synaptic time constants to extract signal features at a range of temporal scales. We demonstrate this architecture on an ambient audio classification task, deployed to the Xylo SNN inference processor in streaming mode. Our application achieves high accuracy (98%) and low latency (100ms) at low power (<100$μ$W inference power). Our approach makes training and deploying SNN applications available to ML engineers with general NN backgrounds, without requiring specific prior experience with spiking NNs. We intend for our approach to make Neuromorphic hardware and SNNs an attractive choice for commercial low-power and edge signal processing applications. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 为时间信号处理提供了一种高效的计算机制，特别是与低功耗 SNN 推理 ASIC 结合使用时。 SNN 历来很难配置，缺乏为任意任务寻找解决方案的通用方法。近年来，梯度下降优化方法越来越容易地应用于 SNN。因此，SNN 和 SNN 推理处理器为能源受限环境中的商业低功耗信号处理提供了一个良好的平台，无需依赖云。然而，迄今为止，工业界的 ML 工程师还无法使用这些方法，需要研究生级别的培训才能成功配置单个 SNN 应用程序。在这里，我们演示了一个方便的高级管道，用于设计、训练任意时间信号处理应用并将其部署到亚毫瓦 SNN 推理硬件。我们应用了一种专为时间信号处理而设计的新的简单 SNN 架构，使用突触时间常数金字塔来提取一系列时间尺度的信号特征。我们在环境音频分类任务中演示了此架构，以流模式部署到 Xylo SNN 推理处理器。我们的应用程序在低功耗（<100$μ$W 推理功率）下实现了高精度 (98%) 和低延迟 (100ms)。我们的方法使具有一般 NN 背景的 ML 工程师可以训练和部署 SNN 应用程序，而不需要具有尖峰 NN 的特定经验。我们希望我们的方法能够使神经形态硬件和 SNN 成为商业低功耗和边缘信号处理应用的有吸引力的选择。 本文提出了一种基于Rockpool和Xylo的低功耗神经形态SNN音频处理方法，实现了高效部署和高精度分类。 Hannah Bos,Dylan Muir cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.ET,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Bowen Fu,Sek Kun Leong,Xiaocong Lian,Xiangyang Ji
title: 6D Robotic Assembly Based on RGB-only Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 基于纯 RGB 物体姿态估计的 6D 机器人装配
abstract: Vision-based robotic assembly is a crucial yet challenging task as the interaction with multiple objects requires high levels of precision. In this paper, we propose an integrated 6D robotic system to perceive, grasp, manipulate and assemble blocks with tight tolerances. Aiming to provide an off-the-shelf RGB-only solution, our system is built upon a monocular 6D object pose estimation network trained solely with synthetic images leveraging physically-based rendering. Subsequently, pose-guided 6D transformation along with collision-free assembly is proposed to construct any designed structure with arbitrary initial poses. Our novel 3-axis calibration operation further enhances the precision and robustness by disentangling 6D pose estimation and robotic assembly. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed 6D robotic assembly system.
summary: Vision-based robotic assembly is a crucial yet challenging task as the interaction with multiple objects requires high levels of precision. In this paper, we propose an integrated 6D robotic system to perceive, grasp, manipulate and assemble blocks with tight tolerances. Aiming to provide an off-the-shelf RGB-only solution, our system is built upon a monocular 6D object pose estimation network trained solely with synthetic images leveraging physically-based rendering. Subsequently, pose-guided 6D transformation along with collision-free assembly is proposed to construct any designed structure with arbitrary initial poses. Our novel 3-axis calibration operation further enhances the precision and robustness by disentangling 6D pose estimation and robotic assembly. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed 6D robotic assembly system.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的机器人装配是一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务，因为与多个物体的交互需要高精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种集成的 6D 机器人系统，用于感知、抓取、操纵和组装具有严格公差的块。我们的系统旨在提供现成的纯 RGB 解决方案，建立在单目 6D 物体姿态估计网络之上，仅使用基于物理渲染的合成图像进行训练。随后，提出了姿势引导的 6D 变换和无碰撞组装，以构造具有任意初始姿势的任何设计结构。我们新颖的 3 轴校准操作通过解开 6D 位姿估计和机器人装配，进一步提高了精度和鲁棒性。定量和定性结果都证明了我们提出的 6D 机器人装配系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RGB-only物体位姿估计的6D机器人装配系统，用于高精度块状物体的抓取、操作和组装。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的机器人装配需要高精度处理多物体交互，但现有方法依赖复杂传感器或深度信息，成本高且难以普及。本文旨在提供一种无需深度信息的RGB-only解决方案，通过合成数据训练实现高精度装配。
AI.method: 构建单目6D位姿估计网络（仅用合成图像训练），结合物理渲染技术；提出位姿引导的6D变换与无碰撞装配策略；设计3轴校准操作以分离位姿估计与机械装配过程。
AI.result: 定量与定性实验均验证了系统在任意初始位姿下构建复杂结构的有效性，展示了高精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了基于RGB-only的6D机器人装配系统在精密制造中的可行性，为低成本高精度装配提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sangho Suh,Jian Zhao,Edith Law
title: CodeToon: Story Ideation, Auto Comic Generation, and Structure Mapping for Code-Driven Storytelling
title_zh: CodeToon：故事构思、自动漫画生成和代码驱动讲故事的结构映射
abstract: Recent work demonstrated how we can design and use coding strips, a form of comic strips with corresponding code, to enhance teaching and learning in programming. However, creating coding strips is a creative, time-consuming process. Creators have to generate stories from code (code->story) and design comics from stories (story->comic). We contribute CodeToon, a comic authoring tool that facilitates this code-driven storytelling process with two mechanisms: (1) story ideation from code using metaphor and (2) automatic comic generation from the story. We conducted a two-part user study that evaluates the tool and the comics generated by participants to test whether CodeToon facilitates the authoring process and helps generate quality comics. Our results show that CodeToon helps users create accurate, informative, and useful coding strips in a significantly shorter time. Overall, this work contributes methods and design guidelines for code-driven storytelling and opens up opportunities for using art to support computer science education.
summary: Recent work demonstrated how we can design and use coding strips, a form of comic strips with corresponding code, to enhance teaching and learning in programming. However, creating coding strips is a creative, time-consuming process. Creators have to generate stories from code (code->story) and design comics from stories (story->comic). We contribute CodeToon, a comic authoring tool that facilitates this code-driven storytelling process with two mechanisms: (1) story ideation from code using metaphor and (2) automatic comic generation from the story. We conducted a two-part user study that evaluates the tool and the comics generated by participants to test whether CodeToon facilitates the authoring process and helps generate quality comics. Our results show that CodeToon helps users create accurate, informative, and useful coding strips in a significantly shorter time. Overall, this work contributes methods and design guidelines for code-driven storytelling and opens up opportunities for using art to support computer science education.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作展示了如何设计和使用编码条（一种带有相应代码的漫画形式）来增强编程教学。然而，创建编码条是一个创造性且耗时的过程。创作者必须从代码生成故事（代码->故事）并从故事设计漫画（故事->漫画）。我们贡献了 CodeToon，这是一个漫画创作工具，它通过两种机制促进这种代码驱动的讲故事过程：(1) 使用隐喻从代码中构思故事，(2) 从故事中自动生成漫画。我们进行了一项由两部分组成的用户研究，评估该工具和参与者生成的漫画，以测试 CodeToon 是否促进了创作过程并有助于生成高质量的漫画。我们的结果表明，CodeToon 可以帮助用户在更短的时间内创建准确、信息丰富且有用的编码条。总的来说，这项工作为代码驱动的讲故事提供了方法和设计指南，并为利用艺术支持计算机科学教育提供了机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CodeToon工具，通过代码生成故事并自动制作漫画，简化编程教学中的代码驱动叙事过程。
AI.motivation: 传统编程教学中创建代码漫画（coding strips）需要手动将代码转化为故事再设计漫画，过程耗时且依赖创造力。
AI.method: CodeToon包含两机制：1) 基于隐喻从代码生成故事创意；2) 根据故事自动生成漫画，减少人工干预。
AI.result: 用户测试显示，CodeToon显著缩短创作时间，生成的漫画准确且具教育价值，验证了工具有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为代码驱动叙事提供了方法论和设计规范，展示了艺术化工具在计算机科学教育中的应用潜力。

motivation: 传统编程教学中创建代码漫画（coding strips）需要手动将代码转化为故事再设计漫画，过程耗时且依赖创造力。
method: CodeToon包含两机制：1) 基于隐喻从代码生成故事创意；2) 根据故事自动生成漫画，减少人工干预。
result: 用户测试显示，CodeToon显著缩短创作时间，生成的漫画准确且具教育价值，验证了工具有效性。
conclusion: 该研究为代码驱动叙事提供了方法论和设计规范，展示了艺术化工具在计算机科学教育中的应用潜力。
search_text: CodeToon: Story Ideation, Auto Comic Generation, and Structure Mapping for Code-Driven Storytelling CodeToon：故事构思、自动漫画生成和代码驱动讲故事的结构映射 Recent work demonstrated how we can design and use coding strips, a form of comic strips with corresponding code, to enhance teaching and learning in programming. However, creating coding strips is a creative, time-consuming process. Creators have to generate stories from code (code->story) and design comics from stories (story->comic). We contribute CodeToon, a comic authoring tool that facilitates this code-driven storytelling process with two mechanisms: (1) story ideation from code using metaphor and (2) automatic comic generation from the story. We conducted a two-part user study that evaluates the tool and the comics generated by participants to test whether CodeToon facilitates the authoring process and helps generate quality comics. Our results show that CodeToon helps users create accurate, informative, and useful coding strips in a significantly shorter time. Overall, this work contributes methods and design guidelines for code-driven storytelling and opens up opportunities for using art to support computer science education. 最近的工作展示了如何设计和使用编码条（一种带有相应代码的漫画形式）来增强编程教学。然而，创建编码条是一个创造性且耗时的过程。创作者必须从代码生成故事（代码->故事）并从故事设计漫画（故事->漫画）。我们贡献了 CodeToon，这是一个漫画创作工具，它通过两种机制促进这种代码驱动的讲故事过程：(1) 使用隐喻从代码中构思故事，(2) 从故事中自动生成漫画。我们进行了一项由两部分组成的用户研究，评估该工具和参与者生成的漫画，以测试 CodeToon 是否促进了创作过程并有助于生成高质量的漫画。我们的结果表明，CodeToon 可以帮助用户在更短的时间内创建准确、信息丰富且有用的编码条。总的来说，这项工作为代码驱动的讲故事提供了方法和设计指南，并为利用艺术支持计算机科学教育提供了机会。 本文提出CodeToon工具，通过代码生成故事并自动制作漫画，简化编程教学中的代码驱动叙事过程。 Sangho Suh,Jian Zhao,Edith Law cs.HC

authors_text: Runqi Wang,Yuxiang Bao,Baochang Zhang,Jianzhuang Liu,Wentao Zhu,Guodong Guo
title: Anti-Retroactive Interference for Lifelong Learning
title_zh: 终身学习的抗追溯干扰
abstract: Humans can continuously learn new knowledge. However, machine learning models suffer from drastic dropping in performance on previous tasks after learning new tasks. Cognitive science points out that the competition of similar knowledge is an important cause of forgetting. In this paper, we design a paradigm for lifelong learning based on meta-learning and associative mechanism of the brain. It tackles the problem from two aspects: extracting knowledge and memorizing knowledge. First, we disrupt the sample's background distribution through a background attack, which strengthens the model to extract the key features of each task. Second, according to the similarity between incremental knowledge and base knowledge, we design an adaptive fusion of incremental knowledge, which helps the model allocate capacity to the knowledge of different difficulties. It is theoretically analyzed that the proposed learning paradigm can make the models of different tasks converge to the same optimum. The proposed method is validated on the MNIST, CIFAR100, CUB200 and ImageNet100 datasets.
summary: Humans can continuously learn new knowledge. However, machine learning models suffer from drastic dropping in performance on previous tasks after learning new tasks. Cognitive science points out that the competition of similar knowledge is an important cause of forgetting. In this paper, we design a paradigm for lifelong learning based on meta-learning and associative mechanism of the brain. It tackles the problem from two aspects: extracting knowledge and memorizing knowledge. First, we disrupt the sample's background distribution through a background attack, which strengthens the model to extract the key features of each task. Second, according to the similarity between incremental knowledge and base knowledge, we design an adaptive fusion of incremental knowledge, which helps the model allocate capacity to the knowledge of different difficulties. It is theoretically analyzed that the proposed learning paradigm can make the models of different tasks converge to the same optimum. The proposed method is validated on the MNIST, CIFAR100, CUB200 and ImageNet100 datasets.
abstract_zh: 人类可以不断学习新知识。然而，机器学习模型在学习新任务后，之前任务的性能会急剧下降。认知科学指出，相似知识的竞争是遗忘的重要原因。在本文中，我们设计了一种基于元学习和大脑联想机制的终身学习范式。它从两个方面解决问题：提取知识和记忆知识。首先，我们通过背景攻击破坏样本的背景分布，这增强了模型提取每个任务的关键特征的能力。其次，根据增量知识和基础知识之间的相似性，我们设计了增量知识的自适应融合，这有助于模型将容量分配给不同难度的知识。从理论上分析，所提出的学习范式可以使不同任务的模型收敛到相同的最优值。所提出的方法在 MNIST、CIFAR100、CUB200 和 ImageNet100 数据集上得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习和大脑关联机制的终身学习范式，解决机器学习模型在持续学习新任务时旧任务性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 人类能持续学习新知识，但机器学习模型在学习新任务后会出现对旧任务的灾难性遗忘，认知科学认为知识竞争是主要原因。
AI.method: 通过背景攻击破坏样本背景分布以强化关键特征提取，并设计基于知识相似性的自适应融合机制，实现不同难度知识的容量分配。
AI.result: 理论分析证明模型可收敛至相同最优解，实验在MNIST、CIFAR100等数据集验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该范式通过提取与记忆机制的协同设计，有效缓解了终身学习中的反向干扰问题。

authors_text: Sudhir Kumar Chaudhary,Pankaj Wahi,Prabhat Munshi
title: Uniformly Sampled Polar and Cylindrical Grid Approach for 2D, 3D Image Reconstruction using Algebraic Algorithm
title_zh: 使用代数算法进行 2D、3D 图像重建的均匀采样极坐标和柱坐标网格方法
abstract: Image reconstruction by Algebraic Methods (AM) outperforms the transform methods in situations where the data collection procedure is constrained by time, space, and radiation dose. AM algorithms can also be applied for the cases where these constraints are not present but their high computational and storage requirement prohibit their actual breakthrough in such cases. In the present work, we propose a novel Uniformly Sampled Polar/Cylindrical Grid (USPG/USCG) discretization scheme to reduce the computational and storage burden of algebraic methods. The symmetries of USPG/USCG are utilized to speed up the calculations of the projection coefficients. In addition, we also offer an efficient approach for USPG to Cartesian Grid (CG) transformation for the visualization. The Multiplicative Algebraic Reconstruction Technique (MART) has been used to determine the field function of the suggested grids. Experimental projections data of a frog and Cu-Lump have been exercised to validate the proposed approach. A variety of image quality measures have been evaluated to check the accuracy of the reconstruction. Results indicate that the current strategies speed up (when compared to CG-based algorithms) the reconstruction process by a factor of 2.5 and reduce the memory requirement by the factor p, the number of projections used in the reconstruction.
summary: Image reconstruction by Algebraic Methods (AM) outperforms the transform methods in situations where the data collection procedure is constrained by time, space, and radiation dose. AM algorithms can also be applied for the cases where these constraints are not present but their high computational and storage requirement prohibit their actual breakthrough in such cases. In the present work, we propose a novel Uniformly Sampled Polar/Cylindrical Grid (USPG/USCG) discretization scheme to reduce the computational and storage burden of algebraic methods. The symmetries of USPG/USCG are utilized to speed up the calculations of the projection coefficients. In addition, we also offer an efficient approach for USPG to Cartesian Grid (CG) transformation for the visualization. The Multiplicative Algebraic Reconstruction Technique (MART) has been used to determine the field function of the suggested grids. Experimental projections data of a frog and Cu-Lump have been exercised to validate the proposed approach. A variety of image quality measures have been evaluated to check the accuracy of the reconstruction. Results indicate that the current strategies speed up (when compared to CG-based algorithms) the reconstruction process by a factor of 2.5 and reduce the memory requirement by the factor p, the number of projections used in the reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 在数据收集过程受到时间、空间和辐射剂量限制的情况下，代数方法 (AM) 的图像重建优于变换方法。 AM 算法也可以应用于不存在这些约束的情况，但其高计算和存储要求阻碍了它们在这种情况下的实际突破。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的均匀采样极坐标/圆柱网格（USPG/USCG）离散化方案，以减少代数方法的计算和存储负担。利用USPG/USCG的对称性来加速投影系数的计算。此外，我们还提供了一种将 USPG 转换为笛卡尔网格 (CG) 的有效方法，以实现可视化。乘法代数重建技术 (MART) 已用于确定建议网格的场函数。青蛙和铜块的实验预测数据已被用来验证所提出的方法。已经评估了各种图像质量测量以检查重建的准确性。结果表明，当前策略（与基于 CG 的算法相比）将重建过程加快了 2.5 倍，并将内存需求减少了 p 倍（重建中使用的投影数量）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于均匀采样极坐标/圆柱坐标网格（USPG/USCG）的离散化方案，用于改进代数算法在2D/3D图像重建中的计算效率和存储需求。
AI.motivation: 代数方法在数据采集受限时优于变换方法，但其高计算和存储需求阻碍了实际应用，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计USPG/USCG网格利用对称性加速投影系数计算，并提供USPG到笛卡尔网格的高效转换方法，结合乘法代数重建技术（MART）进行验证。
AI.result: 相比笛卡尔网格算法，重建速度提升2.5倍，内存需求减少p倍（p为投影数量），图像质量评估验证了方法准确性。
AI.conclusion: USPG/USCG方案有效降低了代数重建的计算负担，为实际应用提供了更高效的图像重建框架。

authors_text: Takahito Murakami,Maya Grace Torii,Xanat Vargas Meza,Yoichi Ochiai
title: Kuchibashi: 3D-Printed Tweezers Bioinspired by the New Caledonian Crow's Beak
title_zh: Kuchibashi：受新喀里多尼亚乌鸦喙生物启发的 3D 打印镊子
abstract: In this study we implemented Kuchibashi, the New Caledonian Crow beak-like tweezers, and conducted a user study to evaluate the prototype's usability. We proved that Kuchibashi is superior in interacting with large spherical objects than hands and tweezers. Also, impressions of security and safeness were perceived positively by the participants.
summary: In this study we implemented Kuchibashi, the New Caledonian Crow beak-like tweezers, and conducted a user study to evaluate the prototype's usability. We proved that Kuchibashi is superior in interacting with large spherical objects than hands and tweezers. Also, impressions of security and safeness were perceived positively by the participants.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们实施了 Kuchibashi（新喀里多尼亚乌鸦喙状镊子），并进行了用户研究来评估原型的可用性。我们证明了口桥在与大型球形物体交互方面比手和镊子更优越。此外，参与者对安全和安全的印象也很积极。

AI.tldr: 本研究设计并测试了受新喀里多尼亚乌鸦喙部启发的3D打印镊子Kuchibashi，评估其与传统工具相比的实用性。
AI.motivation: 通过仿生学设计改进工具与大球形物体的交互性能，提升操作安全性和效率。
AI.method: 基于乌鸦喙部结构3D打印镊子原型，进行用户实验对比其与手动操作及传统镊子的性能差异。
AI.result: Kuchibashi在处理大球形物体时表现更优，用户反馈其安全性和操作感更佳。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发设计有效提升了工具功能性，为仿生工具开发提供新思路。

search_text: Kuchibashi: 3D-Printed Tweezers Bioinspired by the New Caledonian Crow's Beak Kuchibashi：受新喀里多尼亚乌鸦喙生物启发的 3D 打印镊子 In this study we implemented Kuchibashi, the New Caledonian Crow beak-like tweezers, and conducted a user study to evaluate the prototype's usability. We proved that Kuchibashi is superior in interacting with large spherical objects than hands and tweezers. Also, impressions of security and safeness were perceived positively by the participants. 在这项研究中，我们实施了 Kuchibashi（新喀里多尼亚乌鸦喙状镊子），并进行了用户研究来评估原型的可用性。我们证明了口桥在与大型球形物体交互方面比手和镊子更优越。此外，参与者对安全和安全的印象也很积极。 本研究设计并测试了受新喀里多尼亚乌鸦喙部启发的3D打印镊子Kuchibashi，评估其与传统工具相比的实用性。 Takahito Murakami,Maya Grace Torii,Xanat Vargas Meza,Yoichi Ochiai cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Fan Yang,Norimichi Ukita,Sakriani Sakti,Satoshi Nakamura
title: Actor-identified Spatiotemporal Action Detection -- Detecting Who Is Doing What in Videos
title_zh: 演员识别的时空动作检测——检测视频中谁在做什么
abstract: The success of deep learning on video Action Recognition (AR) has motivated researchers to progressively promote related tasks from the coarse level to the fine-grained level. Compared with conventional AR which only predicts an action label for the entire video, Temporal Action Detection (TAD) has been investigated for estimating the start and end time for each action in videos. Taking TAD a step further, Spatiotemporal Action Detection (SAD) has been studied for localizing the action both spatially and temporally in videos. However, who performs the action, is generally ignored in SAD, while identifying the actor could also be important. To this end, we propose a novel task, Actor-identified Spatiotemporal Action Detection (ASAD), to bridge the gap between SAD and actor identification. In ASAD, we not only detect the spatiotemporal boundary for instance-level action but also assign the unique ID to each actor. To approach ASAD, Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) and Action Classification (AC) are two fundamental elements. By using MOT, the spatiotemporal boundary of each actor is obtained and assigned to a unique actor identity. By using AC, the action class is estimated within the corresponding spatiotemporal boundary. Since ASAD is a new task, it poses many new challenges that cannot be addressed by existing methods: i) no dataset is specifically created for ASAD, ii) no evaluation metrics are designed for ASAD, iii) current MOT performance is the bottleneck to obtain satisfactory ASAD results. To address those problems, we contribute to i) annotate a new ASAD dataset, ii) propose ASAD evaluation metrics by considering multi-label actions and actor identification, iii) improve the data association strategies in MOT to boost the MOT performance, which leads to better ASAD results. The code is available at https://github.com/fandulu/ASAD.

Compared with conventional AR which only predicts an action label for the entire video, Temporal Action Detection (TAD) has been investigated for estimating the start and end time for each action in videos. Taking TAD a step further, Spatiotemporal Action Detection (SAD) has been studied for localizing the action both spatially and temporally in videos. However, who performs the action, is generally ignored in SAD, while identifying the actor could also be important. To this end, we propose a novel task, Actor-identified Spatiotemporal Action Detection (ASAD), to bridge the gap between SAD and actor identification. In ASAD, we not only detect the spatiotemporal boundary for instance-level action but also assign the unique ID to each actor. To approach ASAD, Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) and Action Classification (AC) are two fundamental elements. By using MOT, the spatiotemporal boundary of each actor is obtained and assigned to a unique actor identity. By using AC, the action class is estimated within the corresponding spatiotemporal boundary. Since ASAD is a new task, it poses many new challenges that cannot be addressed by existing methods: i) no dataset is specifically created for ASAD, ii) no evaluation metrics are designed for ASAD, iii) current MOT performance is the bottleneck to obtain satisfactory ASAD results. To address those problems, we contribute to i) annotate a new ASAD dataset, ii) propose ASAD evaluation metrics by considering multi-label actions and actor identification, iii) improve the data association strategies in MOT to boost the MOT performance, which leads to better ASAD results. The code is available at https://github.com/fandulu/ASAD.
abstract_zh: 视频动作识别（AR）深度学习的成功促使研究人员逐步将相关任务从粗粒度提升到细粒度。与仅预测整个视频的动作标签的传统 AR 相比，时间动作检测（TAD）已被研究用于估计视频中每个动作的开始和结束时间。将 TAD 更进一步，研究了时空动作检测 (SAD)，用于在视频中在空间和时间上定位动作。然而，在 SAD 中，执行动作的人通常被忽略，而识别执行者也可能很重要。为此，我们提出了一项新任务，即演员识别时空动作检测（ASAD），以弥合 SAD 和演员识别之间的差距。在 ASAD 中，我们不仅检测实例级动作的时空边界，还为每个参与者分配唯一的 ID。为了实现 ASAD，多对象跟踪 (MOT) 和动作分类 (AC) 是两个基本要素。通过使用 MOT，获得每个参与者的时空边界并将其分配给唯一的参与者身份。通过使用AC，在相应的时空边界内估计动作类别。由于 ASAD 是一项新任务，它提出了许多现有方法无法解决的新挑战：i）没有专门为 ASAD 创建数据集，ii）没有为 ASAD 设计评估指标，iii）当前的 MOT 性能是获得令人满意的 ASAD 结果的瓶颈。为了解决这些问题，我们致力于 i) 注释新的 ASAD 数据集，ii) 通过考虑多标签操作和参与者识别来提出 ASAD 评估指标，iii) 改进 MOT 中的数据关联策略以提高 MOT 性能，从而获得更好的 ASAD 结果。代码可在 https://github.com/fandulu/ASAD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型任务——演员识别时空动作检测（ASAD），旨在同时检测视频中动作的时空边界并识别执行动作的演员身份。
AI.motivation: 现有时空动作检测（SAD）方法忽略了动作执行者（演员）的识别，而演员信息对理解视频内容至关重要。因此，作者提出ASAD任务以弥补这一空白，并解决相关数据集、评估指标及跟踪性能瓶颈等问题。
AI.method: 结合多目标跟踪（MOT）和动作分类（AC），通过MOT获取演员时空边界并分配唯一ID，利用AC在对应时空中分类动作。改进MOT的数据关联策略，构建新数据集及多标签动作与演员识别的评估指标。
AI.result: 标注了首个ASAD数据集，设计了针对多标签动作和演员识别的评估指标，优化MOT策略显著提升了ASAD效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过引入ASAD任务、构建数据集及改进跟踪方法，有效推动了时空动作检测与演员识别的结合，为相关研究提供了新方向和工具。

authors_text: Astitva Srivastava,Chandradeep Pokhariya,Sai Sagar Jinka,Avinash Sharma
title: xCloth: Extracting Template-free Textured 3D Clothes from a Monocular Image
title_zh: xCloth：从单目图像中提取无模板纹理 3D 衣服
abstract: Existing approaches for 3D garment reconstruction either assume a predefined template for the garment geometry (restricting them to fixed clothing styles) or yield vertex colored meshes (lacking high-frequency textural details). Our novel framework co-learns geometric and semantic information of garment surface from the input monocular image for template-free textured 3D garment digitization. More specifically, we propose to extend PeeledHuman representation to predict the pixel-aligned, layered depth and semantic maps to extract 3D garments. The layered representation is further exploited to UV parametrize the arbitrary surface of the extracted garment without any human intervention to form a UV atlas. The texture is then imparted on the UV atlas in a hybrid fashion by first projecting pixels from the input image to UV space for the visible region, followed by inpainting the occluded regions. Thus, we are able to digitize arbitrarily loose clothing styles while retaining high-frequency textural details from a monocular image. We achieve high-fidelity 3D garment reconstruction results on three publicly available datasets and generalization on internet images.
summary: Existing approaches for 3D garment reconstruction either assume a predefined template for the garment geometry (restricting them to fixed clothing styles) or yield vertex colored meshes (lacking high-frequency textural details). Our novel framework co-learns geometric and semantic information of garment surface from the input monocular image for template-free textured 3D garment digitization. More specifically, we propose to extend PeeledHuman representation to predict the pixel-aligned, layered depth and semantic maps to extract 3D garments. The layered representation is further exploited to UV parametrize the arbitrary surface of the extracted garment without any human intervention to form a UV atlas. The texture is then imparted on the UV atlas in a hybrid fashion by first projecting pixels from the input image to UV space for the visible region, followed by inpainting the occluded regions. Thus, we are able to digitize arbitrarily loose clothing styles while retaining high-frequency textural details from a monocular image. We achieve high-fidelity 3D garment reconstruction results on three publicly available datasets and generalization on internet images.
abstract_zh: 现有的 3D 服装重建方法要么采用服装几何形状的预定义模板（将其限制为固定的服装款式），要么生成顶点彩色网格（缺乏高频纹理细节）。我们的新颖框架从输入单目图像中共同学习服装表面的几何和语义信息，以实现无模板纹理 3D 服装数字化。更具体地说，我们建议扩展 PeeledHuman 表示来预测像素对齐、分层深度和语义图，以提取 3D 服装。进一步利用分层表示对提取的服装的任意表面进行 UV 参数化，无需任何人工干预即可形成 UV 图集。然后，通过首先将输入图像中的像素投影到可见区域的 UV 空间，然后修复遮挡区域，以混合方式将纹理传递到 UV 图集上。因此，我们能够对任意宽松的服装款式进行数字化，同时保留单目图像的高频纹理细节。我们在三个公开可用的数据集上实现了高保真 3D 服装重建结果，并对互联网图像进行了概括。

AI.tldr: 本文提出xCloth框架，从单目图像中提取无需模板的带纹理3D服装模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D服装重建方法依赖预定义模板或缺乏高频纹理细节，限制了服装风格的灵活性和真实感。
AI.method: 扩展PeeledHuman表示以预测像素对齐的分层深度与语义图，通过UV参数化和混合纹理投影与补全技术实现无模板重建。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集和互联网图像上实现了高保真3D服装重建，支持任意宽松服装风格。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了模板约束与纹理细节保留的矛盾，为单目服装数字化提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出xCloth框架，从单目图像中提取无需模板的带纹理3D服装模型。
motivation: 现有3D服装重建方法依赖预定义模板或缺乏高频纹理细节，限制了服装风格的灵活性和真实感。
method: 扩展PeeledHuman表示以预测像素对齐的分层深度与语义图，通过UV参数化和混合纹理投影与补全技术实现无模板重建。
result: 在三个公开数据集和互联网图像上实现了高保真3D服装重建，支持任意宽松服装风格。
conclusion: 该方法突破了模板约束与纹理细节保留的矛盾，为单目服装数字化提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: xCloth: Extracting Template-free Textured 3D Clothes from a Monocular Image xCloth：从单目图像中提取无模板纹理 3D 衣服 Existing approaches for 3D garment reconstruction either assume a predefined template for the garment geometry (restricting them to fixed clothing styles) or yield vertex colored meshes (lacking high-frequency textural details). Our novel framework co-learns geometric and semantic information of garment surface from the input monocular image for template-free textured 3D garment digitization. More specifically, we propose to extend PeeledHuman representation to predict the pixel-aligned, layered depth and semantic maps to extract 3D garments. The layered representation is further exploited to UV parametrize the arbitrary surface of the extracted garment without any human intervention to form a UV atlas. The texture is then imparted on the UV atlas in a hybrid fashion by first projecting pixels from the input image to UV space for the visible region, followed by inpainting the occluded regions. Thus, we are able to digitize arbitrarily loose clothing styles while retaining high-frequency textural details from a monocular image. We achieve high-fidelity 3D garment reconstruction results on three publicly available datasets and generalization on internet images. 现有的 3D 服装重建方法要么采用服装几何形状的预定义模板（将其限制为固定的服装款式），要么生成顶点彩色网格（缺乏高频纹理细节）。我们的新颖框架从输入单目图像中共同学习服装表面的几何和语义信息，以实现无模板纹理 3D 服装数字化。更具体地说，我们建议扩展 PeeledHuman 表示来预测像素对齐、分层深度和语义图，以提取 3D 服装。进一步利用分层表示对提取的服装的任意表面进行 UV 参数化，无需任何人工干预即可形成 UV 图集。然后，通过首先将输入图像中的像素投影到可见区域的 UV 空间，然后修复遮挡区域，以混合方式将纹理传递到 UV 图集上。因此，我们能够对任意宽松的服装款式进行数字化，同时保留单目图像的高频纹理细节。我们在三个公开可用的数据集上实现了高保真 3D 服装重建结果，并对互联网图像进行了概括。 本文提出xCloth框架，从单目图像中提取无需模板的带纹理3D服装模型。 Astitva Srivastava,Chandradeep Pokhariya,Sai Sagar Jinka,Avinash Sharma cs.CV

authors_text: Farhad Aghili
title: Robust 3D Vision for Autonomous Robots
title_zh: 适用于自主机器人的强大 3D 视觉
abstract: This paper presents a fault-tolerant 3D vision system for autonomous robotic operation. In particular, pose estimation of space objects is achieved using 3D vision data in an integrated Kalman filter (KF) and an Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm in a closed-loop configuration. The initial guess for the internal ICP iteration is provided by the state estimate propagation of the Kalman filer. The Kalman filter is capable of not only estimating the target's states but also its inertial parameters. This allows the motion of the target to be predictable as soon as the filter converges. Consequently, the ICP can maintain pose tracking over a wider range of velocity due to the increased precision of ICP initialization. Furthermore, incorporation of the target's dynamics model in the estimation process allows the estimator continuously provide pose estimation even when the sensor temporally loses its signal namely due to obstruction. The capabilities of the pose estimation methodology is demonstrated by a ground testbed for Automated Rendezvous & Docking. In this experiment, Neptec's Laser Camera System (LCS) is used for real-time scanning of a satellite model attached to a manipulator arm, which is driven by a simulator according to orbital and attitude dynamics. The results showed that robust tracking of the free-floating tumbling satellite can be achieved only if the Kalman filter and ICP are in a closed-loop configuration.
summary: This paper presents a fault-tolerant 3D vision system for autonomous robotic operation. In particular, pose estimation of space objects is achieved using 3D vision data in an integrated Kalman filter (KF) and an Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm in a closed-loop configuration. The initial guess for the internal ICP iteration is provided by the state estimate propagation of the Kalman filer. The Kalman filter is capable of not only estimating the target's states but also its inertial parameters. This allows the motion of the target to be predictable as soon as the filter converges. Consequently, the ICP can maintain pose tracking over a wider range of velocity due to the increased precision of ICP initialization. Furthermore, incorporation of the target's dynamics model in the estimation process allows the estimator continuously provide pose estimation even when the sensor temporally loses its signal namely due to obstruction. The capabilities of the pose estimation methodology is demonstrated by a ground testbed for Automated Rendezvous & Docking. In this experiment, Neptec's Laser Camera System (LCS) is used for real-time scanning of a satellite model attached to a manipulator arm, which is driven by a simulator according to orbital and attitude dynamics. The results showed that robust tracking of the free-floating tumbling satellite can be achieved only if the Kalman filter and ICP are in a closed-loop configuration.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自主机器人操作的容错 3D 视觉系统。特别是，空间物体的姿态估计是通过使用集成卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 中的 3D 视觉数据和闭环配置中的迭代最近点 (ICP) 算法来实现的。内部 ICP 迭代的初始猜测由卡尔曼滤波器的状态估计传播提供。卡尔曼滤波器不仅能够估计目标的状态，还能够估计其惯性参数。这使得滤波器一收敛就可以预测目标的运动。因此，由于 ICP 初始化精度的提高，ICP 可以在更宽的速度范围内保持姿态跟踪。此外，在估计过程中结合目标的动力学模型允许估计器持续提供姿态估计，即使传感器暂时丢失其信号（即由于障碍物）。自动交会对接地面测试台证明了姿态估计方法的功能。在此实验中，Neptec 的激光摄像系统 (LCS) 用于实时扫描连接到机械臂的卫星模型，该机械臂由模拟器根据轨道和姿态动力学驱动。结果表明，只有卡尔曼滤波器和ICP处于闭环配置中，才能实现对自由浮动翻滚卫星的鲁棒跟踪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自主机器人的鲁棒3D视觉系统，结合卡尔曼滤波器和ICP算法实现空间目标的姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 在自主机器人操作中，姿态估计的鲁棒性和精度至关重要，尤其是在传感器信号丢失或目标运动复杂的情况下。
AI.method: 该方法通过将卡尔曼滤波器与ICP算法结合，形成闭环配置，利用卡尔曼滤波器提供初始姿态估计，并通过动态模型实现连续的姿态跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅当卡尔曼滤波器与ICP算法在闭环配置下，才能实现对自由漂浮的翻滚卫星的鲁棒跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 结合卡尔曼滤波器与ICP算法的闭环配置能够显著提高自主机器人在复杂环境下的姿态估计性能。

authors_text: Xinhui Li,Alex Fedorov,Mrinal Mathur,Anees Abrol,Gregory Kiar,Sergey Plis,Vince Calhoun
title: Pipeline-Invariant Representation Learning for Neuroimaging
title_zh: 神经影像的管道不变表示学习
comment: Extended Abstract presented at Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium 2022, November 28th, 2022, New Orleans, United States & Virtual, http://www.ml4h.cc, 17 pages
comments: Extended Abstract presented at Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium 2022, November 28th, 2022, New Orleans, United States & Virtual, http://www.ml4h.cc, 17 pages
abstract: Deep learning has been widely applied in neuroimaging, including predicting brain-phenotype relationships from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) volumes. MRI data usually requires extensive preprocessing prior to modeling, but variation introduced by different MRI preprocessing pipelines may lead to different scientific findings, even when using the identical data. Motivated by the data-centric perspective, we first evaluate how preprocessing pipeline selection can impact the downstream performance of a supervised learning model. We next propose two pipeline-invariant representation learning methodologies, MPSL and PXL, to improve robustness in classification performance and to capture similar neural network representations. Using 2000 human subjects from the UK Biobank dataset, we demonstrate that proposed models present unique and shared advantages, in particular that MPSL can be used to improve out-of-sample generalization to new pipelines, while PXL can be used to improve within-sample prediction performance. Both MPSL and PXL can learn more similar between-pipeline representations. These results suggest that our proposed models can be applied to mitigate pipeline-related biases, and to improve prediction robustness in brain-phenotype modeling.
summary: Deep learning has been widely applied in neuroimaging, including predicting brain-phenotype relationships from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) volumes. MRI data usually requires extensive preprocessing prior to modeling, but variation introduced by different MRI preprocessing pipelines may lead to different scientific findings, even when using the identical data. Motivated by the data-centric perspective, we first evaluate how preprocessing pipeline selection can impact the downstream performance of a supervised learning model. We next propose two pipeline-invariant representation learning methodologies, MPSL and PXL, to improve robustness in classification performance and to capture similar neural network representations. Using 2000 human subjects from the UK Biobank dataset, we demonstrate that proposed models present unique and shared advantages, in particular that MPSL can be used to improve out-of-sample generalization to new pipelines, while PXL can be used to improve within-sample prediction performance. Both MPSL and PXL can learn more similar between-pipeline representations. These results suggest that our proposed models can be applied to mitigate pipeline-related biases, and to improve prediction robustness in brain-phenotype modeling.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已广泛应用于神经影像学，包括根据磁共振成像（MRI）体积预测大脑表型关系。 MRI 数据在建模之前通常需要进行大量预处理，但不同 MRI 预处理流程引入的变化可能会导致不同的科学发现，即使使用相同的数据也是如此。在以数据为中心的视角的推动下，我们首先评估预处理管道选择如何影响监督学习模型的下游性能。接下来，我们提出两种管道不变表示学习方法：MPSL 和 PXL，以提高分类性能的鲁棒性并捕获类似的神经网络表示。使用来自英国生物银行数据集的 2000 名人类受试者，我们证明所提出的模型具有独特且共同的优势，特别是 MPSL 可用于改进对新管道的样本外泛化，而 PXL 可用于改进样本内预测性能。 MPSL 和 PXL 都可以学习更多相似的管道间表示。这些结果表明，我们提出的模型可用于减轻与管道相关的偏差，并提高大脑表型建模中的预测鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种神经影像学中与预处理流程无关的表示学习方法（MPSL和PXL），以提升脑表型建模的预测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 不同MRI预处理流程会导致相同数据产生不同科学结论，影响模型下游任务性能，需解决流程偏差问题。
AI.method: 设计MPSL（跨流程表示学习）和PXL（流程不变特征提取）两种方法，通过学习跨流程共享表征增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在UK Biobank的2000例数据上验证，MPSL提升新流程泛化能力，PXL增强样本内预测性能，两者均能学习到更一致的跨流程表征。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型可有效缓解预处理流程偏差，为脑表型建模提供更稳健的预测框架。
