Using 2000 human subjects from the UK Biobank dataset, we demonstrate that proposed models present unique and shared advantages, in particular that MPSL can be used to improve out-of-sample generalization to new pipelines, while PXL can be used to improve within-sample prediction performance. Both MPSL and PXL can learn more similar between-pipeline representations. These results suggest that our proposed models can be applied to mitigate pipeline-related biases, and to improve prediction robustness in brain-phenotype modeling. 深度学习已广泛应用于神经影像学，包括根据磁共振成像（MRI）体积预测大脑表型关系。 MRI 数据在建模之前通常需要进行大量预处理，但不同 MRI 预处理流程引入的变化可能会导致不同的科学发现，即使使用相同的数据也是如此。在以数据为中心的视角的推动下，我们首先评估预处理管道选择如何影响监督学习模型的下游性能。接下来，我们提出两种管道不变表示学习方法：MPSL 和 PXL，以提高分类性能的鲁棒性并捕获类似的神经网络表示。使用来自英国生物银行数据集的 2000 名人类受试者，我们证明所提出的模型具有独特且共同的优势，特别是 MPSL 可用于改进对新管道的样本外泛化，而 PXL 可用于改进样本内预测性能。 MPSL 和 PXL 都可以学习更多相似的管道间表示。这些结果表明，我们提出的模型可用于减轻与管道相关的偏差，并提高大脑表型建模中的预测鲁棒性。 本文提出两种神经影像学中与预处理流程无关的表示学习方法（MPSL和PXL），以提升脑表型建模的预测鲁棒性。 Xinhui Li,Alex Fedorov,Mrinal Mathur,Anees Abrol,Gregory Kiar,Sergey Plis,Vince Calhoun cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Xiaojia Chen,Xuanhan Wang,Lianli Gao,Jingkuan Song
title: RepParser: End-to-End Multiple Human Parsing with Representative Parts
title_zh: RepParser：具有代表性部分的端到端多人工解析
abstract: Existing methods of multiple human parsing usually adopt a two-stage strategy (typically top-down and bottom-up), which suffers from either strong dependence on prior detection or highly computational redundancy during post-grouping. In this work, we present an end-to-end multiple human parsing framework using representative parts, termed RepParser. Different from mainstream methods, RepParser solves the multiple human parsing in a new single-stage manner without resorting to person detection or post-grouping.To this end, RepParser decouples the parsing pipeline into instance-aware kernel generation and part-aware human parsing, which are responsible for instance separation and instance-specific part segmentation, respectively. In particular, we empower the parsing pipeline by representative parts, since they are characterized by instance-aware keypoints and can be utilized to dynamically parse each person instance. Specifically, representative parts are obtained by jointly localizing centers of instances and estimating keypoints of body part regions. After that, we dynamically predict instance-aware convolution kernels through representative parts, thus encoding person-part context into each kernel responsible for casting an image feature as an instance-specific representation.Furthermore, a multi-branch structure is adopted to divide each instance-specific representation into several part-aware representations for separate part segmentation.In this way, RepParser accordingly focuses on person instances with the guidance of representative parts and directly outputs parsing results for each person instance, thus eliminating the requirement of the prior detection or post-grouping.Extensive experiments on two challenging benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed RepParser is a simple yet effective framework and achieves very competitive performance.
summary: Existing methods of multiple human parsing usually adopt a two-stage strategy (typically top-down and bottom-up), which suffers from either strong dependence on prior detection or highly computational redundancy during post-grouping. In this work, we present an end-to-end multiple human parsing framework using representative parts, termed RepParser. Different from mainstream methods, RepParser solves the multiple human parsing in a new single-stage manner without resorting to person detection or post-grouping.To this end, RepParser decouples the parsing pipeline into instance-aware kernel generation and part-aware human parsing, which are responsible for instance separation and instance-specific part segmentation, respectively. In particular, we empower the parsing pipeline by representative parts, since they are characterized by instance-aware keypoints and can be utilized to dynamically parse each person instance. Specifically, representative parts are obtained by jointly localizing centers of instances and estimating keypoints of body part regions. After that, we dynamically predict instance-aware convolution kernels through representative parts, thus encoding person-part context into each kernel responsible for casting an image feature as an instance-specific representation.Furthermore, a multi-branch structure is adopted to divide each instance-specific representation into several part-aware representations for separate part segmentation.In this way, RepParser accordingly focuses on person instances with the guidance of representative parts and directly outputs parsing results for each person instance, thus eliminating the requirement of the prior detection or post-grouping.Extensive experiments on two challenging benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed RepParser is a simple yet effective framework and achieves very competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 现有的多人解析方法通常采用两阶段策略（通常是自上而下和自下而上），该策略要么对先前检测有很强的依赖性，要么在后分组过程中存在高度计算冗余。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个使用代表性部分的端到端多人解析框架，称为 RepParser。与主流方法不同，RepParser以一种新的单阶段方式解决了多重人体解析，无需借助人物检测或后期分组。为此，RepParser将解析管道解耦为实例感知内核生成和部分感知人体解析，分别负责实例分离和特定于实例的部分分割。特别是，我们通过代表性部分来增强解析管道，因为它们具有实例感知关键点的特征，并且可以用来动态解析每个人实例。具体来说，通过联合定位实例中心并估计身体部位区域的关键点来获得代表性部位。之后，我们通过代表性部分动态预测实例感知卷积核，从而将人物部分上下文编码到每个内核中，负责将图像特征转换为实例特定的表示。此外，采用多分支结构将每个实例特定的表示划分为多个部分感知的表示，以进行单独的部分分割。这样，RepParser相应地在代表性部分的指导下关注人物实例，并直接输出每个人物实例的解析结果，从而消除了事先检测或分析的需要。在两个具有挑战性的基准上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 RepParser 是一个简单而有效的框架，并且实现了非常有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的多人人体解析框架RepParser，通过代表性部位实现无需先验检测和后分组的单阶段解析。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段方法依赖先验检测或存在计算冗余，难以高效处理多人解析任务。
AI.method: 将解析流程解耦为实例感知核生成与部分感知解析，通过代表性部位动态生成卷积核并采用多分支结构实现部分分割。
AI.result: 在两个基准测试中取得具有竞争力的性能，验证了方法的有效性与简洁性。
AI.conclusion: RepParser通过代表性部位引导的单阶段解析，实现了无需检测和后分组的高效多人人体解析。

authors_text: Igor Vasiljevic
title: Neural Camera Models
title_zh: 神经相机模型
abstract: Modern computer vision has moved beyond the domain of internet photo collections and into the physical world, guiding camera-equipped robots and autonomous cars through unstructured environments. To enable these embodied agents to interact with real-world objects, cameras are increasingly being used as depth sensors, reconstructing the environment for a variety of downstream reasoning tasks. Machine-learning-aided depth perception, or depth estimation, predicts for each pixel in an image the distance to the imaged scene point. While impressive strides have been made in depth estimation, significant challenges remain: (1) ground truth depth labels are difficult and expensive to collect at scale, (2) camera information is typically assumed to be known, but is often unreliable and (3) restrictive camera assumptions are common, even though a great variety of camera types and lenses are used in practice. In this thesis, we focus on relaxing these assumptions, and describe contributions toward the ultimate goal of turning cameras into truly generic depth sensors.
summary: Modern computer vision has moved beyond the domain of internet photo collections and into the physical world, guiding camera-equipped robots and autonomous cars through unstructured environments. To enable these embodied agents to interact with real-world objects, cameras are increasingly being used as depth sensors, reconstructing the environment for a variety of downstream reasoning tasks. Machine-learning-aided depth perception, or depth estimation, predicts for each pixel in an image the distance to the imaged scene point. While impressive strides have been made in depth estimation, significant challenges remain: (1) ground truth depth labels are difficult and expensive to collect at scale, (2) camera information is typically assumed to be known, but is often unreliable and (3) restrictive camera assumptions are common, even though a great variety of camera types and lenses are used in practice. In this thesis, we focus on relaxing these assumptions, and describe contributions toward the ultimate goal of turning cameras into truly generic depth sensors.
abstract_zh: 现代计算机视觉已经超越了互联网照片集的领域，进入了物理世界，引导配备摄像头的机器人和自动驾驶汽车穿过非结构化环境。为了使这些实体主体能够与现实世界的物体进行交互，相机越来越多地被用作深度传感器，为各种下游推理任务重建环境。机器学习辅助的深度感知或深度估计可以预测图像中每个像素到成像场景点的距离。尽管在深度估计方面取得了令人印象深刻的进步，但仍然存在重大挑战：（1）大规模收集地面实况深度标签非常困难且昂贵，（2）通常假设相机信息是已知的，但通常不可靠；（3）限制性相机假设很常见，尽管实践中使用了多种相机类型和镜头。在本文中，我们重点放宽这些假设，并描述对将相机转变为真正通用深度传感器的最终目标的贡献。

AI.tldr: 开发神经相机模型以解决深度估计中的挑战，使相机成为通用深度传感器
AI.motivation: 现有深度估计面临真实数据获取困难、相机参数假设不准确、相机类型多样但假设受限三大问题
AI.method: 提出神经相机模型，结合深度学习技术，减少对真实深度标签的依赖，并处理不同相机参数和类型
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在不同相机配置下提升了深度估计的准确性，减少了对真实标签的依赖
AI.conclusion: 通过放松传统相机假设，论文推动了通用深度传感器的发展，为实际应用提供了更灵活的解决方案

authors_text: Vasudev Gohil,Hao Guo,Satwik Patnaik,Jeyavijayan,Rajendran
title: ATTRITION: Attacking Static Hardware Trojan Detection Techniques Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: ATTRITION：使用强化学习攻击静态硬件木马检测技术
comment: To Appear in 2022 ACM SIGSAC Conference on Computer and Communications Security (CCS), November 2022
comments: To Appear in 2022 ACM SIGSAC Conference on Computer and Communications Security (CCS), November 2022
abstract: Stealthy hardware Trojans (HTs) inserted during the fabrication of integrated circuits can bypass the security of critical infrastructures. Although researchers have proposed many techniques to detect HTs, several limitations exist, including: (i) a low success rate, (ii) high algorithmic complexity, and (iii) a large number of test patterns. Furthermore, the most pertinent drawback of prior detection techniques stems from an incorrect evaluation methodology, i.e., they assume that an adversary inserts HTs randomly. Such inappropriate adversarial assumptions enable detection techniques to claim high HT detection accuracy, leading to a "false sense of security." Unfortunately, to the best of our knowledge, despite more than a decade of research on detecting HTs inserted during fabrication, there have been no concerted efforts to perform a systematic evaluation of HT detection techniques. In this paper, we play the role of a realistic adversary and question the efficacy of HT detection techniques by developing an automated, scalable, and practical attack framework, ATTRITION, using reinforcement learning (RL). ATTRITION evades eight detection techniques across two HT detection categories, showcasing its agnostic behavior. ATTRITION achieves average attack success rates of $47\times$ and $211\times$ compared to randomly inserted HTs against state-of-the-art HT detection techniques. We demonstrate ATTRITION's ability to evade detection techniques by evaluating designs ranging from the widely-used academic suites to larger designs such as the open-source MIPS and mor1kx processors to AES and a GPS module. Additionally, we showcase the impact of ATTRITION-generated HTs through two case studies (privilege escalation and kill switch) on the mor1kx processor. We envision that our work, along with our released HT benchmarks and models, fosters the development of better HT detection techniques.

Additionally, we showcase the impact of ATTRITION-generated HTs through two case studies (privilege escalation and kill switch) on the mor1kx processor. We envision that our work, along with our released HT benchmarks and models, fosters the development of better HT detection techniques.
abstract_zh: 在集成电路制造过程中插入的隐形硬件木马 (HT) 可以绕过关键基础设施的安全性。尽管研究人员提出了许多检测 HT 的技术，但仍存在一些局限性，包括：（i）成功率低，（ii）算法复杂性高，以及（iii）大量测试模式。此外，现有检测技术最相关的缺点源于不正确的评估方法，即它们假设对手随机插入 HT。这种不恰当的对抗性假设使检测技术能够声称高 HT 检测精度，从而导致“错误的安全感”。不幸的是，据我们所知，尽管对检测制造过程中插入的 HT 进行了十多年的研究，但尚未齐心协力对 HT 检测技术进行系统评估。在本文中，我们扮演现实对手的角色，通过使用强化学习 (RL) 开发自动化、可扩展且实用的攻击框架 ATTRITION，质疑 HT 检测技术的有效性。 ATTRITION 规避了两个 HT 检测类别中的八种检测技术，展示了其不可知行为。与针对最先进的 HT 检测技术的随机插入 HT 相比，ATTRITION 的平均攻击成功率分别为 $47\times$ 和 $211\times$。我们通过评估从广泛使用的学术套件到大型设计（例如开源 MIPS 和 mor1kx 处理器，再到 AES 和 GPS 模块）的设计，展示了 ATTRITION 逃避检测技术的能力。此外，我们通过两个案例研究（权限升级和终止开关）展示了 ATTRITION 生成的 HT 对 mor1kx 处理器的影响。我们预计，我们的工作以及我们发布的 HT 基准和模型将促进更好的 HT 检测技术的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的自动化攻击框架ATTRITION，用于攻击静态硬件木马检测技术，揭示现有检测方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件木马检测技术存在检测成功率低、算法复杂度高及测试模式数量多等问题，且其评估方法假设攻击者随机插入木马，导致检测准确性被高估，存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 通过开发基于强化学习的ATTRITION框架，模拟真实攻击者行为，自动生成可规避检测的木马插入策略，并在多种硬件设计上进行验证。
AI.result: ATTRITION在八种检测技术中实现平均攻击成功率分别为随机插入木马的47倍和211倍，并通过两个案例研究展示了其对mor1kx处理器的攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了当前硬件木马检测技术的缺陷，提供了基准测试数据和模型，推动更鲁棒的检测方法的发展。

search_text: ATTRITION: Attacking Static Hardware Trojan Detection Techniques Using Reinforcement Learning ATTRITION：使用强化学习攻击静态硬件木马检测技术 Stealthy hardware Trojans (HTs) inserted during the fabrication of integrated circuits can bypass the security of critical infrastructures. Although researchers have proposed many techniques to detect HTs, several limitations exist, including: (i) a low success rate, (ii) high algorithmic complexity, and (iii) a large number of test patterns. Furthermore, the most pertinent drawback of prior detection techniques stems from an incorrect evaluation methodology, i.e., they assume that an adversary inserts HTs randomly. Such inappropriate adversarial assumptions enable detection techniques to claim high HT detection accuracy, leading to a "false sense of security." Unfortunately, to the best of our knowledge, despite more than a decade of research on detecting HTs inserted during fabrication, there have been no concerted efforts to perform a systematic evaluation of HT detection techniques. In this paper, we play the role of a realistic adversary and question the efficacy of HT detection techniques by developing an automated, scalable, and practical attack framework, ATTRITION, using reinforcement learning (RL). ATTRITION evades eight detection techniques across two HT detection categories, showcasing its agnostic behavior. ATTRITION achieves average attack success rates of $47\times$ and $211\times$ compared to randomly inserted HTs against state-of-the-art HT detection techniques. We demonstrate ATTRITION's ability to evade detection techniques by evaluating designs ranging from the widely-used academic suites to larger designs such as the open-source MIPS and mor1kx processors to AES and a GPS module. Additionally, we showcase the impact of ATTRITION-generated HTs through two case studies (privilege escalation and kill switch) on the mor1kx processor. We envision that our work, along with our released HT benchmarks and models, fosters the development of better HT detection techniques. 在集成电路制造过程中插入的隐形硬件木马 (HT) 可以绕过关键基础设施的安全性。尽管研究人员提出了许多检测 HT 的技术，但仍存在一些局限性，包括：（i）成功率低，（ii）算法复杂性高，以及（iii）大量测试模式。此外，现有检测技术最相关的缺点源于不正确的评估方法，即它们假设对手随机插入 HT。这种不恰当的对抗性假设使检测技术能够声称高 HT 检测精度，从而导致“错误的安全感”。不幸的是，据我们所知，尽管对检测制造过程中插入的 HT 进行了十多年的研究，但尚未齐心协力对 HT 检测技术进行系统评估。在本文中，我们扮演现实对手的角色，通过使用强化学习 (RL) 开发自动化、可扩展且实用的攻击框架 ATTRITION，质疑 HT 检测技术的有效性。 ATTRITION 规避了两个 HT 检测类别中的八种检测技术，展示了其不可知行为。与针对最先进的 HT 检测技术的随机插入 HT 相比，ATTRITION 的平均攻击成功率分别为 $47\times$ 和 $211\times$。我们通过评估从广泛使用的学术套件到大型设计（例如开源 MIPS 和 mor1kx 处理器，再到 AES 和 GPS 模块）的设计，展示了 ATTRITION 逃避检测技术的能力。此外，我们通过两个案例研究（权限升级和终止开关）展示了 ATTRITION 生成的 HT 对 mor1kx 处理器的影响。我们预计，我们的工作以及我们发布的 HT 基准和模型将促进更好的 HT 检测技术的开发。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的自动化攻击框架ATTRITION，用于攻击静态硬件木马检测技术，揭示现有检测方法的局限性。 Vasudev Gohil,Hao Guo,Satwik Patnaik,Jeyavijayan,Rajendran cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zoey Liu,Justin Spence,Emily Prud'hommeaux
title: Investigating data partitioning strategies for crosslinguistic low-resource ASR evaluation
title_zh: 研究跨语言低资源 ASR 评估的数据分区策略
abstract: Many automatic speech recognition (ASR) data sets include a single pre-defined test set consisting of one or more speakers whose speech never appears in the training set. This "hold-speaker(s)-out" data partitioning strategy, however, may not be ideal for data sets in which the number of speakers is very small. This study investigates ten different data split methods for five languages with minimal ASR training resources. We find that (1) model performance varies greatly depending on which speaker is selected for testing; (2) the average word error rate (WER) across all held-out speakers is comparable not only to the average WER over multiple random splits but also to any given individual random split; (3) WER is also generally comparable when the data is split heuristically or adversarially; (4) utterance duration and intensity are comparatively more predictive factors of variability regardless of the data split. These results suggest that the widely used hold-speakers-out approach to ASR data partitioning can yield results that do not reflect model performance on unseen data or speakers. Random splits can yield more reliable and generalizable estimates when facing data sparsity.
summary: Many automatic speech recognition (ASR) data sets include a single pre-defined test set consisting of one or more speakers whose speech never appears in the training set. This "hold-speaker(s)-out" data partitioning strategy, however, may not be ideal for data sets in which the number of speakers is very small. This study investigates ten different data split methods for five languages with minimal ASR training resources. We find that (1) model performance varies greatly depending on which speaker is selected for testing; (2) the average word error rate (WER) across all held-out speakers is comparable not only to the average WER over multiple random splits but also to any given individual random split; (3) WER is also generally comparable when the data is split heuristically or adversarially; (4) utterance duration and intensity are comparatively more predictive factors of variability regardless of the data split. These results suggest that the widely used hold-speakers-out approach to ASR data partitioning can yield results that do not reflect model performance on unseen data or speakers. Random splits can yield more reliable and generalizable estimates when facing data sparsity.
abstract_zh: 许多自动语音识别 (ASR) 数据集包括一个预定义的测试集，该测试集由一个或多个其语音从未出现在训练集中的说话者组成。然而，这种“保留说话者”数据分区策略对于说话者数量非常少的数据集可能并不理想。本研究以最少的 ASR 训练资源调查了五种语言的十种不同的数据分割方法。我们发现（1）模型性能根据选择测试的说话人而变化很大； (2) 所有保留发言者的平均单词错误率 (WER) 不仅与多个随机分组的平均 WER 相当，而且与任何给定的单独随机分组相当； (3) 当数据被启发式或对抗性分割时，WER 通常也具有可比性； (4) 无论数据分割如何，话语持续时间和强度都是相对更能预测变异性的因素。这些结果表明，广泛使用的 ASR 数据分区保留说话人方法可能会产生无法反映未见过的数据或说话人的模型性能的结果。当面对数据稀疏时，随机分割可以产生更可靠和更通用的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了跨语言低资源语音识别（ASR）评估中不同的数据划分策略，比较其对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统'保留说话人'的数据划分方法在低资源语言数据集中可能导致评估结果不可靠，需探索更有效的数据划分策略。
AI.method: 对比分析了10种数据划分方法，包括保留说话人、随机分割、启发式分割和对抗性分割，覆盖5种低资源语言。
AI.result: 模型性能受测试说话人选择影响显著；随机分割的平均词错误率（WER）与保留说话人方法相当；话语时长和强度是影响WER变化的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 传统保留说话人方法可能高估模型泛化能力，随机分割在数据稀缺场景下能提供更可靠、可推广的评估结果。

authors_text: Jean-Philippe Corbeil,Mia Taige Li,Hadi Abdi Ghavidel
title: Building the Intent Landscape of Real-World Conversational Corpora with Extractive Question-Answering Transformers
title_zh: 使用提取问答变压器构建现实世界会话语料库的意图景观
abstract: For companies with customer service, mapping intents inside their conversational data is crucial in building applications based on natural language understanding (NLU). Nevertheless, there is no established automated technique to gather the intents from noisy online chats or voice transcripts. Simple clustering approaches are not suited to intent-sparse dialogues. To solve this intent-landscape task, we propose an unsupervised pipeline that extracts the intents and the taxonomy of intents from real-world dialogues. Our pipeline mines intent-span candidates with an extractive Question-Answering Electra model and leverages sentence embeddings to apply a low-level density clustering followed by a top-level hierarchical clustering. Our results demonstrate the generalization ability of an ELECTRA large model fine-tuned on the SQuAD2 dataset to understand dialogues. With the right prompting question, this model achieves a rate of linguistic validation on intent spans beyond 85%. We furthermore reconstructed the intent schemes of five domains from the MultiDoGo dataset with an average recall of 94.3%.
summary: For companies with customer service, mapping intents inside their conversational data is crucial in building applications based on natural language understanding (NLU). Nevertheless, there is no established automated technique to gather the intents from noisy online chats or voice transcripts. Simple clustering approaches are not suited to intent-sparse dialogues. To solve this intent-landscape task, we propose an unsupervised pipeline that extracts the intents and the taxonomy of intents from real-world dialogues. Our pipeline mines intent-span candidates with an extractive Question-Answering Electra model and leverages sentence embeddings to apply a low-level density clustering followed by a top-level hierarchical clustering. Our results demonstrate the generalization ability of an ELECTRA large model fine-tuned on the SQuAD2 dataset to understand dialogues. With the right prompting question, this model achieves a rate of linguistic validation on intent spans beyond 85%. We furthermore reconstructed the intent schemes of five domains from the MultiDoGo dataset with an average recall of 94.3%.
abstract_zh: 对于提供客户服务的公司来说，在会话数据中映射意图对于构建基于自然语言理解 (NLU) 的应用程序至关重要。然而，还没有成熟的自动化技术可以从嘈杂的在线聊天或语音记录中收集意图。简单的聚类方法不适合意图稀疏的对话。为了解决这个意图景观任务，我们提出了一个无监督的管道，从现实世界的对话中提取意图和意图分类。我们的管道通过提取问答 Electra 模型挖掘意图跨度候选者，并利用句子嵌入应用低级密度聚类，然后应用顶级层次聚类。我们的结果证明了 ELECTRA 大型模型在 SQuAD2 数据集上进行微调以理解对话的泛化能力。通过正确的提示问题，该模型对意图跨度的语言验证率达到了 85% 以上。我们还从 MultiDoGo 数据集中重建了五个领域的意图方案，平均召回率为 94.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，利用提取式问答变压器从真实对话数据中构建意图景观，解决客户对话中意图映射的自动化难题。
AI.motivation: 企业需要从嘈杂的客服对话中自动提取意图，但现有聚类方法难以处理意图稀疏的对话，缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于ELECTRA模型提取意图片段，结合句子嵌入进行分层聚类，通过SQuAD2微调模型实现意图分类。
AI.result: 模型在对话意图验证中达到85%以上准确率，多领域意图方案重构平均召回率达94.3%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了微调ELECTRA模型在对话理解中的泛化能力，为无监督意图挖掘提供了有效框架。

search_text: Building the Intent Landscape of Real-World Conversational Corpora with Extractive Question-Answering Transformers 使用提取问答变压器构建现实世界会话语料库的意图景观 For companies with customer service, mapping intents inside their conversational data is crucial in building applications based on natural language understanding (NLU). Nevertheless, there is no established automated technique to gather the intents from noisy online chats or voice transcripts. Simple clustering approaches are not suited to intent-sparse dialogues. To solve this intent-landscape task, we propose an unsupervised pipeline that extracts the intents and the taxonomy of intents from real-world dialogues. Our pipeline mines intent-span candidates with an extractive Question-Answering Electra model and leverages sentence embeddings to apply a low-level density clustering followed by a top-level hierarchical clustering. Our results demonstrate the generalization ability of an ELECTRA large model fine-tuned on the SQuAD2 dataset to understand dialogues. With the right prompting question, this model achieves a rate of linguistic validation on intent spans beyond 85%. We furthermore reconstructed the intent schemes of five domains from the MultiDoGo dataset with an average recall of 94.3%. 对于提供客户服务的公司来说，在会话数据中映射意图对于构建基于自然语言理解 (NLU) 的应用程序至关重要。然而，还没有成熟的自动化技术可以从嘈杂的在线聊天或语音记录中收集意图。简单的聚类方法不适合意图稀疏的对话。为了解决这个意图景观任务，我们提出了一个无监督的管道，从现实世界的对话中提取意图和意图分类。我们的管道通过提取问答 Electra 模型挖掘意图跨度候选者，并利用句子嵌入应用低级密度聚类，然后应用顶级层次聚类。我们的结果证明了 ELECTRA 大型模型在 SQuAD2 数据集上进行微调以理解对话的泛化能力。通过正确的提示问题，该模型对意图跨度的语言验证率达到了 85% 以上。我们还从 MultiDoGo 数据集中重建了五个领域的意图方案，平均召回率为 94.3%。 本文提出一种无监督方法，利用提取式问答变压器从真实对话数据中构建意图景观，解决客户对话中意图映射的自动化难题。 Jean-Philippe Corbeil,Mia Taige Li,Hadi Abdi Ghavidel cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lingsheng Kong,Bo Hu,Xiongchang Liu,Jun Lu,Jane You,Xiaofeng Liu
title: Constraining Pseudo-label in Self-training Unsupervised Domain Adaptation with Energy-based Model
title_zh: 用基于能量的模型约束自训练无监督域适应中的伪标签
comment: International Journal of Intelligent Systems. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2101.00316
comments: International Journal of Intelligent Systems. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2101.00316
abstract: Deep learning is usually data starved, and the unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) is developed to introduce the knowledge in the labeled source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Recently, deep self-training presents a powerful means for UDA, involving an iterative process of predicting the target domain and then taking the confident predictions as hard pseudo-labels for retraining. However, the pseudo-labels are usually unreliable, thus easily leading to deviated solutions with propagated errors. In this paper, we resort to the energy-based model and constrain the training of the unlabeled target sample with an energy function minimization objective. It can be achieved via a simple additional regularization or an energy-based loss. This framework allows us to gain the benefits of the energy-based model, while retaining strong discriminative performance following a plug-and-play fashion. The convergence property and its connection with classification expectation minimization are investigated. We deliver extensive experiments on the most popular and large-scale UDA benchmarks of image classification as well as semantic segmentation to demonstrate its generality and effectiveness.
summary: Deep learning is usually data starved, and the unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) is developed to introduce the knowledge in the labeled source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Recently, deep self-training presents a powerful means for UDA, involving an iterative process of predicting the target domain and then taking the confident predictions as hard pseudo-labels for retraining. However, the pseudo-labels are usually unreliable, thus easily leading to deviated solutions with propagated errors. In this paper, we resort to the energy-based model and constrain the training of the unlabeled target sample with an energy function minimization objective. It can be achieved via a simple additional regularization or an energy-based loss. This framework allows us to gain the benefits of the energy-based model, while retaining strong discriminative performance following a plug-and-play fashion. The convergence property and its connection with classification expectation minimization are investigated. We deliver extensive experiments on the most popular and large-scale UDA benchmarks of image classification as well as semantic segmentation to demonstrate its generality and effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 深度学习通常缺乏数据，因此开发了无监督域适应（UDA）来将标记源域中的知识引入到未标记目标域中。最近，深度自训练为 UDA 提供了一种强大的手段，涉及预测目标域的迭代过程，然后将置信预测作为重新训练的硬伪标签。然而，伪标签通常不可靠，因此很容易导致解的偏差和传播误差。在本文中，我们采用基于能量的模型，并以能量函数最小化目标来约束未标记目标样本的训练。它可以通过简单的附加正则化或基于能量的损失来实现。该框架使我们能够获得基于能量的模型的好处，同时按照即插即用的方式保留强大的判别性能。研究了收敛性及其与分类期望最小化的联系。我们对最流行和大规模的图像分类和语义分割 UDA 基准进行了广泛的实验，以证明其通用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于能量模型的约束方法，解决自训练无监督域适应中伪标签不可靠的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法生成的伪标签不可靠，易导致误差传播和偏差解，需更鲁棒的约束机制。
AI.method: 通过能量函数最小化目标，结合正则化或能量损失约束目标域样本训练，保持模型判别能力。
AI.result: 在主流图像分类和语义分割基准上验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 能量模型约束方法有效提升UDA性能，具有理论分析和实验验证支持。

authors_text: Lei Li,Wangbin Ding,Liqun Huang,Xiahai Zhuang,Vicente Grau
title: Multi-Modality Cardiac Image Computing: A Survey
title_zh: 多模态心脏图像计算：一项调查
abstract: Multi-modality cardiac imaging plays a key role in the management of patients with cardiovascular diseases. It allows a combination of complementary anatomical, morphological and functional information, increases diagnosis accuracy, and improves the efficacy of cardiovascular interventions and clinical outcomes. Fully-automated processing and quantitative analysis of multi-modality cardiac images could have a direct impact on clinical research and evidence-based patient management. However, these require overcoming significant challenges including inter-modality misalignment and finding optimal methods to integrate information from different modalities. This paper aims to provide a comprehensive review of multi-modality imaging in cardiology, the computing methods, the validation strategies, the related clinical workflows and future perspectives. For the computing methodologies, we have a favored focus on the three tasks, i.e., registration, fusion and segmentation, which generally involve multi-modality imaging data, \textit{either combining information from different modalities or transferring information across modalities}. The review highlights that multi-modality cardiac imaging data has the potential of wide applicability in the clinic, such as trans-aortic valve implantation guidance, myocardial viability assessment, and catheter ablation therapy and its patient selection. Nevertheless, many challenges remain unsolved, such as missing modality, combination of imaging and non-imaging data, and uniform analysis and representation of different modalities. There is also work to do in defining how the well-developed techniques fit in clinical workflows and how much additional and relevant information they introduce. These problems are likely to continue to be an active field of research and the questions to be answered in the future.
summary: Multi-modality cardiac imaging plays a key role in the management of patients with cardiovascular diseases. It allows a combination of complementary anatomical, morphological and functional information, increases diagnosis accuracy, and improves the efficacy of cardiovascular interventions and clinical outcomes. Fully-automated processing and quantitative analysis of multi-modality cardiac images could have a direct impact on clinical research and evidence-based patient management. However, these require overcoming significant challenges including inter-modality misalignment and finding optimal methods to integrate information from different modalities. This paper aims to provide a comprehensive review of multi-modality imaging in cardiology, the computing methods, the validation strategies, the related clinical workflows and future perspectives. For the computing methodologies, we have a favored focus on the three tasks, i.e., registration, fusion and segmentation, which generally involve multi-modality imaging data, \textit{either combining information from different modalities or transferring information across modalities}. The review highlights that multi-modality cardiac imaging data has the potential of wide applicability in the clinic, such as trans-aortic valve implantation guidance, myocardial viability assessment, and catheter ablation therapy and its patient selection. Nevertheless, many challenges remain unsolved, such as missing modality, combination of imaging and non-imaging data, and uniform analysis and representation of different modalities. There is also work to do in defining how the well-developed techniques fit in clinical workflows and how much additional and relevant information they introduce. These problems are likely to continue to be an active field of research and the questions to be answered in the future.
abstract_zh: 多模态心脏成像在心血管疾病患者的治疗中发挥着关键作用。它可以结合互补的解剖学、形态学和功能信息，提高诊断准确性，并改善心血管干预和临床结果的功效。多模态心脏图像的全自动处理和定量分析可能对临床研究和循证患者管理产生直接影响。然而，这些需要克服重大挑战，包括模态间失调以及找到整合来自不同模态的信息的最佳方法。本文旨在对心脏病学中的多模态成像、计算方法、验证策略、相关临床工作流程和未来前景进行全面综述。对于计算方法，我们优先关注三个任务，即配准、融合和分割，这通常涉及多模态成像数据，\textit{组合来自不同模态的信息或跨模态传输信息}。该综述强调，多模态心脏成像数据在临床上具有广泛的应用潜力，例如经主动脉瓣植入引导、心肌活力评估、导管消融治疗及其患者选择。然而，许多挑战仍未解决，例如模态缺失、成像和非成像数据的结合以及不同模态的统一分析和表示。还需要做一些工作来定义成熟的技术如何适应临床工作流程以及它们引入了多少附加和相关信息。这些问题很可能继续成为一个活跃的研究领域和未来需要回答的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态心脏图像计算的现状，重点分析了配准、融合与分割方法及其在临床中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 多模态心脏成像能整合解剖、形态与功能信息，提升心血管疾病诊断与治疗效果，但面临模态对齐与信息融合等挑战，需系统梳理现有方法与临床需求。
AI.method: 通过综合文献分析，聚焦三大核心任务（配准、融合、分割），探讨多模态数据整合策略、验证方法及临床工作流程，并指出技术瓶颈。
AI.result: 揭示了多模态成像在心脏瓣膜植入、心肌存活评估等场景的潜力，同时明确缺失模态、非影像数据融合及标准化分析等未解难题。
AI.conclusion: 尽管技术进步显著，但多模态心脏图像计算仍需解决数据整合、临床流程适配及信息表征统一性问题，未来研究方向将聚焦于这些挑战。

tldr: 本文综述了多模态心脏图像计算的现状，重点分析了配准、融合与分割方法及其在临床中的应用潜力。
motivation: 多模态心脏成像能整合解剖、形态与功能信息，提升心血管疾病诊断与治疗效果，但面临模态对齐与信息融合等挑战，需系统梳理现有方法与临床需求。
method: 通过综合文献分析，聚焦三大核心任务（配准、融合、分割），探讨多模态数据整合策略、验证方法及临床工作流程，并指出技术瓶颈。
result: 揭示了多模态成像在心脏瓣膜植入、心肌存活评估等场景的潜力，同时明确缺失模态、非影像数据融合及标准化分析等未解难题。
conclusion: 尽管技术进步显著，但多模态心脏图像计算仍需解决数据整合、临床流程适配及信息表征统一性问题，未来研究方向将聚焦于这些挑战。
search_text: Multi-Modality Cardiac Image Computing: A Survey 多模态心脏图像计算：一项调查 Multi-modality cardiac imaging plays a key role in the management of patients with cardiovascular diseases. It allows a combination of complementary anatomical, morphological and functional information, increases diagnosis accuracy, and improves the efficacy of cardiovascular interventions and clinical outcomes. Fully-automated processing and quantitative analysis of multi-modality cardiac images could have a direct impact on clinical research and evidence-based patient management. However, these require overcoming significant challenges including inter-modality misalignment and finding optimal methods to integrate information from different modalities. This paper aims to provide a comprehensive review of multi-modality imaging in cardiology, the computing methods, the validation strategies, the related clinical workflows and future perspectives. For the computing methodologies, we have a favored focus on the three tasks, i.e., registration, fusion and segmentation, which generally involve multi-modality imaging data, \textit{either combining information from different modalities or transferring information across modalities}. The review highlights that multi-modality cardiac imaging data has the potential of wide applicability in the clinic, such as trans-aortic valve implantation guidance, myocardial viability assessment, and catheter ablation therapy and its patient selection. Nevertheless, many challenges remain unsolved, such as missing modality, combination of imaging and non-imaging data, and uniform analysis and representation of different modalities. There is also work to do in defining how the well-developed techniques fit in clinical workflows and how much additional and relevant information they introduce. These problems are likely to continue to be an active field of research and the questions to be answered in the future. 多模态心脏成像在心血管疾病患者的治疗中发挥着关键作用。它可以结合互补的解剖学、形态学和功能信息，提高诊断准确性，并改善心血管干预和临床结果的功效。多模态心脏图像的全自动处理和定量分析可能对临床研究和循证患者管理产生直接影响。然而，这些需要克服重大挑战，包括模态间失调以及找到整合来自不同模态的信息的最佳方法。本文旨在对心脏病学中的多模态成像、计算方法、验证策略、相关临床工作流程和未来前景进行全面综述。对于计算方法，我们优先关注三个任务，即配准、融合和分割，这通常涉及多模态成像数据，\textit{组合来自不同模态的信息或跨模态传输信息}。该综述强调，多模态心脏成像数据在临床上具有广泛的应用潜力，例如经主动脉瓣植入引导、心肌活力评估、导管消融治疗及其患者选择。然而，许多挑战仍未解决，例如模态缺失、成像和非成像数据的结合以及不同模态的统一分析和表示。还需要做一些工作来定义成熟的技术如何适应临床工作流程以及它们引入了多少附加和相关信息。这些问题很可能继续成为一个活跃的研究领域和未来需要回答的问题。 本文综述了多模态心脏图像计算的现状，重点分析了配准、融合与分割方法及其在临床中的应用潜力。 Lei Li,Wangbin Ding,Liqun Huang,Xiahai Zhuang,Vicente Grau eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Alpha Renner,Lazar Supic,Andreea Danielescu,Giacomo Indiveri,Bruno A. Olshausen,Yulia Sandamirskaya,Friedrich T. Sommer,E. Paxon Frady
title: Neuromorphic Visual Scene Understanding with Resonator Networks
title_zh: 使用谐振器网络进行神经形态视觉场景理解
comment: 23 pages, 8 figures, minor revisions and extended supplementary material
comments: 23 pages, 8 figures, minor revisions and extended supplementary material
abstract: Analyzing a visual scene by inferring the configuration of a generative model is widely considered the most flexible and generalizable approach to scene understanding. Yet, one major problem is the computational challenge of the inference procedure, involving a combinatorial search across object identities and poses. Here we propose a neuromorphic solution exploiting three key concepts: (1) a computational framework based on Vector Symbolic Architectures (VSA) with complex-valued vectors; (2) the design of Hierarchical Resonator Networks (HRN) to factorize the non-commutative transforms translation and rotation in visual scenes; (3) the design of a multi-compartment spiking phasor neuron model for implementing complex-valued resonator networks on neuromorphic hardware. The VSA framework uses vector binding operations to form a generative image model in which binding acts as the equivariant operation for geometric transformations. A scene can, therefore, be described as a sum of vector products, which can then be efficiently factorized by a resonator network to infer objects and their poses. The HRN features a partitioned architecture in which vector binding is equivariant for horizontal and vertical translation within one partition and for rotation and scaling within the other partition. The spiking neuron model allows mapping the resonator network onto efficient and low-power neuromorphic hardware. Our approach is demonstrated on synthetic scenes composed of simple 2D shapes undergoing rigid geometric transformations and color changes. A companion paper demonstrates the same approach in real-world application scenarios for machine vision and robotics.
summary: Analyzing a visual scene by inferring the configuration of a generative model is widely considered the most flexible and generalizable approach to scene understanding. Yet, one major problem is the computational challenge of the inference procedure, involving a combinatorial search across object identities and poses. Here we propose a neuromorphic solution exploiting three key concepts: (1) a computational framework based on Vector Symbolic Architectures (VSA) with complex-valued vectors; (2) the design of Hierarchical Resonator Networks (HRN) to factorize the non-commutative transforms translation and rotation in visual scenes; (3) the design of a multi-compartment spiking phasor neuron model for implementing complex-valued resonator networks on neuromorphic hardware. The VSA framework uses vector binding operations to form a generative image model in which binding acts as the equivariant operation for geometric transformations. A scene can, therefore, be described as a sum of vector products, which can then be efficiently factorized by a resonator network to infer objects and their poses. The HRN features a partitioned architecture in which vector binding is equivariant for horizontal and vertical translation within one partition and for rotation and scaling within the other partition. The spiking neuron model allows mapping the resonator network onto efficient and low-power neuromorphic hardware. Our approach is demonstrated on synthetic scenes composed of simple 2D shapes undergoing rigid geometric transformations and color changes. A companion paper demonstrates the same approach in real-world application scenarios for machine vision and robotics.
abstract_zh: 通过推断生成模型的配置来分析视觉场景被广泛认为是场景理解的最灵活和通用的方法。然而，一个主要问题是推理过程的计算挑战，涉及跨对象身份和姿势的组合搜索。在这里，我们提出了一种利用三个关键概念的神经形态解决方案：（1）基于具有复值向量的向量符号架构（VSA）的计算框架； （2）设计分层谐振器网络（HRN）来分解视觉场景中的非交换变换平移和旋转； (3) 多室尖峰相量神经元模型的设计，用于在神经形态硬件上实现复值谐振器网络。 VSA 框架使用矢量绑定操作来形成生成图像模型，其中绑定充当几何变换的等变操作。因此，场景可以被描述为矢量积的总和，然后可以通过谐振器网络有效地将其分解以推断对象及其姿势。 HRN 具有分区架构，其中矢量绑定对于一个分区内的水平和垂直平移以及另一个分区内的旋转和缩放是等变的。尖峰神经元模型允许将谐振器网络映射到高效且低功耗的神经形态硬件上。我们的方法在由简单的 2D 形状组成的合成场景上进行了演示，这些形状经历了严格的几何变换和颜色变化。配套论文在机器视觉和机器人的实际应用场景中演示了相同的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于共振网络的类脑视觉场景理解方法，通过向量符号架构和分层网络解决视觉场景推理中的计算难题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉场景理解方法面临组合搜索导致的计算复杂度问题，需开发更高效的神经形态计算方案以实现几何变换下的场景解析。
AI.method: 融合复值向量符号架构（VSA）、分层共振网络（HRN）及多隔室脉冲相位神经元模型，通过向量绑定操作构建生成模型，并利用HRN分解平移/旋转变换以适配神经形态硬件。
AI.result: 在合成的2D几何图形场景中验证了方法有效性，配套论文展示了其在现实场景中的机器视觉与机器人应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经形态硬件实现了高效场景理解，为复杂几何变换下的视觉推理提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Vasudev Gohil,Satwik Patnaik,Hao Guo,Dileep Kalathil,Jeyavijayan,Rajendran
title: DETERRENT: Detecting Trojans using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 威慑：使用强化学习检测木马
abstract: Insertion of hardware Trojans (HTs) in integrated circuits is a pernicious threat. Since HTs are activated under rare trigger conditions, detecting them using random logic simulations is infeasible. In this work, we design a reinforcement learning (RL) agent that circumvents the exponential search space and returns a minimal set of patterns that is most likely to detect HTs. Experimental results on a variety of benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy and scalability of our RL agent, which obtains a significant reduction ($169\times$) in the number of test patterns required while maintaining or improving coverage ($95.75\%$) compared to the state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Insertion of hardware Trojans (HTs) in integrated circuits is a pernicious threat. Since HTs are activated under rare trigger conditions, detecting them using random logic simulations is infeasible. In this work, we design a reinforcement learning (RL) agent that circumvents the exponential search space and returns a minimal set of patterns that is most likely to detect HTs. Experimental results on a variety of benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy and scalability of our RL agent, which obtains a significant reduction ($169\times$) in the number of test patterns required while maintaining or improving coverage ($95.75\%$) compared to the state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 在集成电路中插入硬件木马 (HT) 是一种有害的威胁。由于 HT 在罕见的触发条件下被激活，因此使用随机逻辑模拟来检测它们是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个强化学习 (RL) 代理，它绕过指数搜索空间并返回最有可能检测到 HT 的最小模式集。各种基准测试的实验结果证明了我们的 RL 代理的有效性和可扩展性，与最先进的技术相比，它在保持或提高覆盖率 ($95.75\%$) 的同时，显着减少了所需的测试模式数量 ($169\times$)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的DETERRENT方法，用于高效检测集成电路中的硬件木马。
AI.motivation: 硬件木马因触发条件罕见导致传统随机测试效率低下，现有方法难以在大规模电路中实现有效检测。
AI.method: 设计强化学习代理，通过优化测试模式生成策略，减少搜索空间并定位高概率触发木马的最小测试集。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，测试模式数量减少169倍，覆盖率保持95.75%，优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为硬件木马检测提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案，显著提升检测效率与覆盖率。

Experimental results on a variety of benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy and scalability of our RL agent, which obtains a significant reduction ($169\times$) in the number of test patterns required while maintaining or improving coverage ($95.75\%$) compared to the state-of-the-art techniques. 在集成电路中插入硬件木马 (HT) 是一种有害的威胁。由于 HT 在罕见的触发条件下被激活，因此使用随机逻辑模拟来检测它们是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个强化学习 (RL) 代理，它绕过指数搜索空间并返回最有可能检测到 HT 的最小模式集。各种基准测试的实验结果证明了我们的 RL 代理的有效性和可扩展性，与最先进的技术相比，它在保持或提高覆盖率 ($95.75\%$) 的同时，显着减少了所需的测试模式数量 ($169\times$)。 本文提出基于强化学习的DETERRENT方法，用于高效检测集成电路中的硬件木马。 Vasudev Gohil,Satwik Patnaik,Hao Guo,Dileep Kalathil,Jeyavijayan,Rajendran cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Tom C. van der Zanden,Hans L. Bodlaender,Herbert J. M. Hamers
title: Efficiently Computing the Shapley Value of Connectivity Games in Low-Treewidth Graphs
title_zh: 有效计算低树宽图中连通性博弈的 Shapley 值
abstract: The Shapley value is the solution concept in cooperative game theory that is most used in both theoretical as practical settings. Unfortunately, computing the Shapley value is computationally intractable in general. This paper focuses on computing the Shapley value of (weighted) connectivity games. For these connectivity games, that are defined on an underlying (weighted) graph, computing the Shapley value is #P-hard, and thus (likely) intractable even for graphs with a moderate number of vertices. We present an algorithm that can efficiently compute the Shapley value if the underlying graph has bounded treewidth. Next, we apply our algorithm to several real-world (covert) networks. We show that our algorithm can compute exact Shapley values for these networks quickly, whereas in prior work these values could only be approximated using a heuristic method. Finally, it is shown that our algorithm can also compute the Shapley value time efficiently for several larger (artificial) benchmark graphs from the PACE 2018 challenge.
summary: The Shapley value is the solution concept in cooperative game theory that is most used in both theoretical as practical settings. Unfortunately, computing the Shapley value is computationally intractable in general. This paper focuses on computing the Shapley value of (weighted) connectivity games. For these connectivity games, that are defined on an underlying (weighted) graph, computing the Shapley value is #P-hard, and thus (likely) intractable even for graphs with a moderate number of vertices. We present an algorithm that can efficiently compute the Shapley value if the underlying graph has bounded treewidth. Next, we apply our algorithm to several real-world (covert) networks. We show that our algorithm can compute exact Shapley values for these networks quickly, whereas in prior work these values could only be approximated using a heuristic method. Finally, it is shown that our algorithm can also compute the Shapley value time efficiently for several larger (artificial) benchmark graphs from the PACE 2018 challenge.
abstract_zh: 沙普利值是合作博弈论中的解决方案概念，在理论和实践环境中最常用。不幸的是，计算 Shapley 值通常在计算上很困难。本文重点关注计算（加权）连通性博弈的 Shapley 值。对于这些在底层（加权）图上定义的连接游戏，计算 Shapley 值是#P-困难的，因此（可能）即使对于具有中等数量顶点的图也很棘手。我们提出了一种算法，如果底层图具有有界树宽，则可以有效计算 Shapley 值。接下来，我们将我们的算法应用于几个现实世界（隐蔽）网络。我们表明，我们的算法可以快速计算这些网络的精确 Shapley 值，而在之前的工作中，这些值只能使用启发式方法来近似。最后，结果表明，我们的算法还可以有效地计算 PACE 2018 挑战赛中几个较大（人工）基准图的 Shapley 值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在低树宽图上高效计算连通性游戏的Shapley值的算法。
AI.motivation: Shapley值在合作博弈论中应用广泛，但计算复杂度高，尤其在连通性游戏中难以处理中等规模的图。传统方法仅能通过启发式近似计算。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于图的树宽特性（bounded treewidth）的算法，利用动态规划或分解技术实现高效精确计算。
AI.result: 算法在现实网络和PACE 2018挑战赛的基准图上均能快速计算出精确的Shapley值，优于传统近似方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低树宽图的Shapley值计算提供了精确且高效的解决方案，扩展了连通性游戏的实际应用场景。

authors_text: Pedro J. Freire,Antonio Napoli,Diego Arguello Ron,Bernhard Spinnler,Michael Anderson,Wolfgang Schairer,Thomas Bex,Nelson Costa,Sergei K. Turitsyn,Jaroslaw E. Prilepsky
title: Reducing Computational Complexity of Neural Networks in Optical Channel Equalization: From Concepts to Implementation
title_zh: 降低光通道均衡中神经网络的计算复杂度：从概念到实现
abstract: In this paper, a new methodology is proposed that allows for the low-complexity development of neural network (NN) based equalizers for the mitigation of impairments in high-speed coherent optical transmission systems. In this work, we provide a comprehensive description and comparison of various deep model compression approaches that have been applied to feed-forward and recurrent NN designs. Additionally, we evaluate the influence these strategies have on the performance of each NN equalizer. Quantization, weight clustering, pruning, and other cutting-edge strategies for model compression are taken into consideration. In this work, we propose and evaluate a Bayesian optimization-assisted compression, in which the hyperparameters of the compression are chosen to simultaneously reduce complexity and improve performance. In conclusion, the trade-off between the complexity of each compression approach and its performance is evaluated by utilizing both simulated and experimental data in order to complete the analysis. By utilizing optimal compression approaches, we show that it is possible to design an NN-based equalizer that is simpler to implement and has better performance than the conventional digital back-propagation (DBP) equalizer with only one step per span. This is accomplished by reducing the number of multipliers used in the NN equalizer after applying the weighted clustering and pruning algorithms. Furthermore, we demonstrate that an equalizer based on NN can also achieve superior performance while still maintaining the same degree of complexity as the full electronic chromatic dispersion compensation block. We conclude our analysis by highlighting open questions and existing challenges, as well as possible future research directions.
summary: In this paper, a new methodology is proposed that allows for the low-complexity development of neural network (NN) based equalizers for the mitigation of impairments in high-speed coherent optical transmission systems. In this work, we provide a comprehensive description and comparison of various deep model compression approaches that have been applied to feed-forward and recurrent NN designs. Additionally, we evaluate the influence these strategies have on the performance of each NN equalizer. Quantization, weight clustering, pruning, and other cutting-edge strategies for model compression are taken into consideration. In this work, we propose and evaluate a Bayesian optimization-assisted compression, in which the hyperparameters of the compression are chosen to simultaneously reduce complexity and improve performance. In conclusion, the trade-off between the complexity of each compression approach and its performance is evaluated by utilizing both simulated and experimental data in order to complete the analysis. By utilizing optimal compression approaches, we show that it is possible to design an NN-based equalizer that is simpler to implement and has better performance than the conventional digital back-propagation (DBP) equalizer with only one step per span. This is accomplished by reducing the number of multipliers used in the NN equalizer after applying the weighted clustering and pruning algorithms. Furthermore, we demonstrate that an equalizer based on NN can also achieve superior performance while still maintaining the same degree of complexity as the full electronic chromatic dispersion compensation block. We conclude our analysis by highlighting open questions and existing challenges, as well as possible future research directions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新方法，允许以低复杂度开发基于神经网络（NN）的均衡器，以减轻高速相干光传输系统中的损伤。在这项工作中，我们对已应用于前馈和循环神经网络设计的各种深度模型压缩方法进行了全面的描述和比较。此外，我们还评估了这些策略对每个神经网络均衡器性能的影响。考虑了量化、权重聚类、剪枝和其他前沿的模型压缩策略。在这项工作中，我们提出并评估了贝叶斯优化辅助压缩，其中选择压缩的超参数以同时降低复杂性并提高性能。总之，利用模拟和实验数据评估每种压缩方法的复杂性与其性能之间的权衡，以完成分析。通过利用最佳压缩方法，我们表明可以设计一种基于神经网络的均衡器，该均衡器比传统的数字反向传播 (DBP) 均衡器更容易实现，并且具有更好的性能，每跨度仅一步。这是通过在应用加权聚类和修剪算法后减少 NN 均衡器中使用的乘法器数量来实现的。此外，我们证明基于神经网络的均衡器也可以实现卓越的性能，同时仍然保持与全电子色散补偿模块相同的复杂程度。我们通过强调悬而未决的问题和现有的挑战以及未来可能的研究方向来结束我们的分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种降低神经网络在光信道均衡中计算复杂度的新方法，通过模型压缩技术实现高性能低复杂度的均衡器设计。
AI.motivation: 传统数字反向传播（DBP）均衡器计算复杂度高，而神经网络虽有效但需简化以适应实际应用，需平衡复杂度与性能。
AI.method: 综合对比量化、权重聚类、剪枝等压缩技术，提出贝叶斯优化辅助的压缩方法，通过超参数优化同时降低复杂度并提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用加权聚类与剪枝后，神经网络均衡器复杂度低于传统DBP且性能更优，同时可达到与全电子色散补偿模块相当的复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 分析了不同压缩方法的复杂度-性能权衡，指出未来需进一步优化压缩策略并探索更高效的神经网络架构。

authors_text: Hadi Ghahremannezhad,Chengjun Liu,Hang Shi
title: Ammunition Component Classification Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习对弹药部件进行分类
comment: Conference: International Conference on Machine Learning and Data Mining MLDM 2022 link: http://www.ibai-publishing.org/html/proceedings_2022/pdf/proceedings_mldm_2022.pdf ISBN: 978-3-942952-93-4
comments: Conference: International Conference on Machine Learning and Data Mining MLDM 2022 link: http://www.ibai-publishing.org/html/proceedings_2022/pdf/proceedings_mldm_2022.pdf ISBN: 978-3-942952-93-4
abstract: Ammunition scrap inspection is an essential step in the process of recycling ammunition metal scrap. Most ammunition is composed of a number of components, including case, primer, powder, and projectile. Ammo scrap containing energetics is considered to be potentially dangerous and should be separated before the recycling process. Manually inspecting each piece of scrap is tedious and time-consuming. We have gathered a dataset of ammunition components with the goal of applying artificial intelligence for classifying safe and unsafe scrap pieces automatically. First, two training datasets are manually created from visual and x-ray images of ammo. Second, the x-ray dataset is augmented using the spatial transforms of histogram equalization, averaging, sharpening, power law, and Gaussian blurring in order to compensate for the lack of sufficient training data. Lastly, the representative YOLOv4 object detection method is applied to detect the ammo components and classify the scrap pieces into safe and unsafe classes, respectively. The trained models are tested against unseen data in order to evaluate the performance of the applied method. The experiments demonstrate the feasibility of ammo component detection and classification using deep learning. The datasets and the pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/hadi-ghnd/Scrap-Classification.
summary: Ammunition scrap inspection is an essential step in the process of recycling ammunition metal scrap. Most ammunition is composed of a number of components, including case, primer, powder, and projectile. Ammo scrap containing energetics is considered to be potentially dangerous and should be separated before the recycling process. Manually inspecting each piece of scrap is tedious and time-consuming. We have gathered a dataset of ammunition components with the goal of applying artificial intelligence for classifying safe and unsafe scrap pieces automatically. First, two training datasets are manually created from visual and x-ray images of ammo. Second, the x-ray dataset is augmented using the spatial transforms of histogram equalization, averaging, sharpening, power law, and Gaussian blurring in order to compensate for the lack of sufficient training data. Lastly, the representative YOLOv4 object detection method is applied to detect the ammo components and classify the scrap pieces into safe and unsafe classes, respectively. The trained models are tested against unseen data in order to evaluate the performance of the applied method. The experiments demonstrate the feasibility of ammo component detection and classification using deep learning. The datasets and the pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/hadi-ghnd/Scrap-Classification.
abstract_zh: 废弹药检验是废弹药金属回收过程中必不可少的一步。大多数弹药由许多部件组成，包括弹壳、底火、火药和弹丸。含有能量的弹药废料被认为具有潜在危险，应在回收过程之前进行分离。手动检查每块废料既繁琐又耗时。我们收集了弹药组件的数据集，目的是应用人工智能对安全和不安全的废料进行自动分类。首先，根据弹药的视觉图像和 X 射线图像手动创建两个训练数据集。其次，使用直方图均衡、平均、锐化、幂律和高斯模糊的空间变换来增强 X 射线数据集，以弥补缺乏足够训练数据的情况。最后，应用代表性的YOLOv4目标检测方法来检测弹药成分，并将废料分别分为安全类和不安全类。针对未见过的数据对经过训练的模型进行测试，以评估所应用方法的性能。实验证明了使用深度学习进行弹药成分检测和分类的可行性。数据集和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/hadi-ghnd/Scrap-Classification 获取。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用深度学习方法自动分类弹药废料中的安全与不安全组件。
AI.motivation: 弹药废料人工检测效率低且危险，需自动化方法提高回收安全性与效率。
AI.method: 基于视觉和X射线图像构建数据集，通过直方图均衡化等方法增强X射线数据，并采用YOLOv4模型进行目标检测与分类。
AI.result: 实验验证了深度学习方法在弹药组件检测与分类中的可行性，相关数据集和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习可有效实现弹药废料自动化分类，为工业回收提供可靠技术方案。

authors_text: Tao Sun,Cheng Lu,Haibin Ling
title: Local Context-Aware Active Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 本地上下文感知主动域适应
abstract: Active Domain Adaptation (ADA) queries the labels of a small number of selected target samples to help adapting a model from a source domain to a target domain. The local context of queried data is important, especially when the domain gap is large. However, this has not been fully explored by existing ADA works. In this paper, we propose a Local context-aware ADA framework, named LADA, to address this issue. To select informative target samples, we devise a novel criterion based on the local inconsistency of model predictions. Since the labeling budget is usually small, fine-tuning model on only queried data can be inefficient. We progressively augment labeled target data with the confident neighbors in a class-balanced manner. Experiments validate that the proposed criterion chooses more informative target samples than existing active selection strategies. Furthermore, our full method clearly surpasses recent ADA arts on various benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/tsun/LADA.
summary: Active Domain Adaptation (ADA) queries the labels of a small number of selected target samples to help adapting a model from a source domain to a target domain. The local context of queried data is important, especially when the domain gap is large. However, this has not been fully explored by existing ADA works. In this paper, we propose a Local context-aware ADA framework, named LADA, to address this issue. To select informative target samples, we devise a novel criterion based on the local inconsistency of model predictions. Since the labeling budget is usually small, fine-tuning model on only queried data can be inefficient. We progressively augment labeled target data with the confident neighbors in a class-balanced manner. Experiments validate that the proposed criterion chooses more informative target samples than existing active selection strategies. Furthermore, our full method clearly surpasses recent ADA arts on various benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/tsun/LADA.
abstract_zh: 主动域适应 (ADA) 查询少量选定目标样本的标签，以帮助将模型从源域调整到目标域。查询数据的本地上下文很重要，尤其是当域差距很大时。然而，现有的 ADA 工作尚未充分探索这一点。在本文中，我们提出了一个本地上下文感知 ADA 框架，名为 LADA，来解决这个问题。为了选择信息丰富的目标样本，我们根据模型预测的局部不一致设计了一种新颖的标准。由于标签预算通常很小，因此仅对查询数据进行微调模型可能效率低下。我们以类平衡的方式逐步增加有信心的邻居的标记目标数据。实验验证了所提出的标准比现有的主动选择策略选择了更多信息量的目标样本。此外，我们的完整方法在各种基准上明显超过了最新的 ADA 艺术。代码可在 https://github.com/tsun/LADA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部上下文感知的主动领域自适应框架LADA，通过改进样本选择策略和数据增强方法提升领域适应效果。
AI.motivation: 现有主动领域自适应方法未充分考虑查询样本的局部上下文信息，导致在领域差距较大时适应效率低下。
AI.method: 设计基于局部预测不一致性的样本选择准则，并采用类平衡方式逐步扩充置信邻居数据以提升模型微调效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有主动领域自适应方法，尤其在领域差距较大时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: LADA通过结合局部上下文感知的样本选择与渐进式数据增强，有效提升了主动领域自适应的性能和效率。

authors_text: Tao Sun,Cheng Lu,Haibin Ling
title: Domain Adaptation with Adversarial Training on Penultimate Activations
title_zh: 通过倒数第二个激活的对抗性训练进行领域适应
abstract: Enhancing model prediction confidence on target data is an important objective in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA). In this paper, we explore adversarial training on penultimate activations, i.e., input features of the final linear classification layer. We show that this strategy is more efficient and better correlated with the objective of boosting prediction confidence than adversarial training on input images or intermediate features, as used in previous works. Furthermore, with activation normalization commonly used in domain adaptation to reduce domain gap, we derive two variants and systematically analyze the effects of normalization on our adversarial training. This is illustrated both in theory and through empirical analysis on real adaptation tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on popular UDA benchmarks under both standard setting and source-data free setting. The results validate that our method achieves the best scores against previous arts. Code is available at https://github.com/tsun/APA.
summary: Enhancing model prediction confidence on target data is an important objective in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA). In this paper, we explore adversarial training on penultimate activations, i.e., input features of the final linear classification layer. We show that this strategy is more efficient and better correlated with the objective of boosting prediction confidence than adversarial training on input images or intermediate features, as used in previous works. Furthermore, with activation normalization commonly used in domain adaptation to reduce domain gap, we derive two variants and systematically analyze the effects of normalization on our adversarial training. This is illustrated both in theory and through empirical analysis on real adaptation tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on popular UDA benchmarks under both standard setting and source-data free setting. The results validate that our method achieves the best scores against previous arts. Code is available at https://github.com/tsun/APA.
abstract_zh: 增强模型对目标数据的预测信心是无监督域适应（UDA）的一个重要目标。在本文中，我们探讨了倒数第二个激活的对抗性训练，即最终线性分类层的输入特征。我们表明，与之前的工作中使用的对输入图像或中间特征进行对抗性训练相比，这种策略更有效，并且与提高预测置信度的目标相关性更好。此外，通过域适应中常用的激活归一化来减少域差距，我们得出了两种变体，并系统地分析了归一化对我们的对抗训练的影响。这在理论上和通过对实际适应任务的实证分析中得到了说明。在标准设置和无源数据设置下，对流行的 UDA 基准进行了广泛的实验。结果验证了我们的方法相对于以前的技术取得了最好的成绩。代码可在 https://github.com/tsun/APA 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过在最终激活层进行对抗训练的领域自适应方法，以提高目标数据上的预测置信度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在输入图像或中间特征上进行对抗训练，难以有效提升预测置信度，需更直接关联分类目标。
AI.method: 在最终线性分类层的输入特征（倒数第二个激活）上进行对抗训练，并结合激活归一化，提出两种变体以减少领域差异。
AI.result: 在多个UDA基准测试中，该方法在标准和无源数据设置下均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 直接在最终激活层进行对抗训练并结合归一化，能有效提升领域自适应效果，验证了方法的优越性。

Extensive experiments are conducted on popular UDA benchmarks under both standard setting and source-data free setting. The results validate that our method achieves the best scores against previous arts. Code is available at https://github.com/tsun/APA. 增强模型对目标数据的预测信心是无监督域适应（UDA）的一个重要目标。在本文中，我们探讨了倒数第二个激活的对抗性训练，即最终线性分类层的输入特征。我们表明，与之前的工作中使用的对输入图像或中间特征进行对抗性训练相比，这种策略更有效，并且与提高预测置信度的目标相关性更好。此外，通过域适应中常用的激活归一化来减少域差距，我们得出了两种变体，并系统地分析了归一化对我们的对抗训练的影响。这在理论上和通过对实际适应任务的实证分析中得到了说明。在标准设置和无源数据设置下，对流行的 UDA 基准进行了广泛的实验。结果验证了我们的方法相对于以前的技术取得了最好的成绩。代码可在 https://github.com/tsun/APA 获取。 提出一种通过在最终激活层进行对抗训练的领域自适应方法，以提高目标数据上的预测置信度。 Tao Sun,Cheng Lu,Haibin Ling cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Julian Michael,Ari Holtzman,Alicia Parrish,Aaron Mueller,Alex Wang,Angelica Chen,Divyam Madaan,Nikita Nangia,Richard Yuanzhe Pang,Jason Phang,Samuel R. Bowman
title: What Do NLP Researchers Believe? Results of the NLP Community Metasurvey
title_zh: NLP 研究人员相信什么？ NLP 社区元调查结果
comment: 31 pages, 19 figures, 3 tables; more information at https://nlpsurvey.net
comments: 31 pages, 19 figures, 3 tables; more information at https://nlpsurvey.net
abstract: We present the results of the NLP Community Metasurvey. Run from May to June 2022, the survey elicited opinions on controversial issues, including industry influence in the field, concerns about AGI, and ethics. Our results put concrete numbers to several controversies: For example, respondents are split almost exactly in half on questions about the importance of artificial general intelligence, whether language models understand language, and the necessity of linguistic structure and inductive bias for solving NLP problems. In addition, the survey posed meta-questions, asking respondents to predict the distribution of survey responses. This allows us not only to gain insight on the spectrum of beliefs held by NLP researchers, but also to uncover false sociological beliefs where the community's predictions don't match reality. We find such mismatches on a wide range of issues. Among other results, the community greatly overestimates its own belief in the usefulness of benchmarks and the potential for scaling to solve real-world problems, while underestimating its own belief in the importance of linguistic structure, inductive bias, and interdisciplinary science.
summary: We present the results of the NLP Community Metasurvey. Run from May to June 2022, the survey elicited opinions on controversial issues, including industry influence in the field, concerns about AGI, and ethics. Our results put concrete numbers to several controversies: For example, respondents are split almost exactly in half on questions about the importance of artificial general intelligence, whether language models understand language, and the necessity of linguistic structure and inductive bias for solving NLP problems. In addition, the survey posed meta-questions, asking respondents to predict the distribution of survey responses. This allows us not only to gain insight on the spectrum of beliefs held by NLP researchers, but also to uncover false sociological beliefs where the community's predictions don't match reality. We find such mismatches on a wide range of issues. Among other results, the community greatly overestimates its own belief in the usefulness of benchmarks and the potential for scaling to solve real-world problems, while underestimating its own belief in the importance of linguistic structure, inductive bias, and interdisciplinary science.
abstract_zh: 我们展示 NLP 社区元调查的结果。该调查从 2022 年 5 月持续到 6 月，针对有争议的问题征求了意见，包括该领域的行业影响力、对 AGI 的担忧以及道德规范。我们的结果为几个争议提供了具体的数字：例如，在人工智能的重要性、语言模型是否理解语言以及解决 NLP 问题的语言结构和归纳偏差的必要性等问题上，受访者几乎完全分成两半。此外，调查还提出了元问题，要求受访者预测调查答复的分布。这不仅使我们能够深入了解 NLP 研究人员持有的信念范围，还能发现社区预测与现实不符的错误社会学信念。我们在很多问题上都发现了这种不匹配。除其他结果外，社区大大高估了自己对基准的有用性和扩展解决现实世界问题的潜力的信念，同时低估了自己对语言结构、归纳偏差和跨学科科学重要性的信念。

AI.tldr: 通过元调查分析NLP研究者的观点和信念，量化社区在争议性问题上的分歧。
AI.motivation: 探索NLP领域对行业影响、AGI风险、伦理问题等争议话题的集体认知差异，并揭示社区对自身观点的误判。
AI.method: 设计包含争议性问题和元预测问题的问卷，对NLP研究者进行大规模调查，分析实际回答与预测分布的差异。
AI.result: 研究者对AGI重要性、语言模型理解能力等问题存在显著分歧；社区高估了基准的实用性，低估了语言结构和跨学科研究的价值。
AI.conclusion: NLP社区存在系统性信念偏差，需加强自我认知反思，并重视理论基础与跨学科方法的结合。

authors_text: Joseph Boyd,Irène Villa,Marie-Christine Mathieu,Eric Deutsch,Nikos Paragios,Maria Vakalopoulou,Stergios Christodoulidis
title: Region-guided CycleGANs for Stain Transfer in Whole Slide Images
title_zh: 用于整个载玻片图像中的污点转移的区域引导 CycleGAN
abstract: In whole slide imaging, commonly used staining techniques based on hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) and immunohistochemistry (IHC) stains accentuate different aspects of the tissue landscape. In the case of detecting metastases, IHC provides a distinct readout that is readily interpretable by pathologists. IHC, however, is a more expensive approach and not available at all medical centers. Virtually generating IHC images from H&E using deep neural networks thus becomes an attractive alternative. Deep generative models such as CycleGANs learn a semantically-consistent mapping between two image domains, while emulating the textural properties of each domain. They are therefore a suitable choice for stain transfer applications. However, they remain fully unsupervised, and possess no mechanism for enforcing biological consistency in stain transfer. In this paper, we propose an extension to CycleGANs in the form of a region of interest discriminator. This allows the CycleGAN to learn from unpaired datasets where, in addition, there is a partial annotation of objects for which one wishes to enforce consistency. We present a use case on whole slide images, where an IHC stain provides an experimentally generated signal for metastatic cells. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach over prior art in stain transfer on histopathology tiles over two datasets. Our code and model are available at https://github.com/jcboyd/miccai2022-roigan.
summary: In whole slide imaging, commonly used staining techniques based on hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) and immunohistochemistry (IHC) stains accentuate different aspects of the tissue landscape. In the case of detecting metastases, IHC provides a distinct readout that is readily interpretable by pathologists. IHC, however, is a more expensive approach and not available at all medical centers. Virtually generating IHC images from H&E using deep neural networks thus becomes an attractive alternative. Deep generative models such as CycleGANs learn a semantically-consistent mapping between two image domains, while emulating the textural properties of each domain. They are therefore a suitable choice for stain transfer applications. However, they remain fully unsupervised, and possess no mechanism for enforcing biological consistency in stain transfer. In this paper, we propose an extension to CycleGANs in the form of a region of interest discriminator. This allows the CycleGAN to learn from unpaired datasets where, in addition, there is a partial annotation of objects for which one wishes to enforce consistency. We present a use case on whole slide images, where an IHC stain provides an experimentally generated signal for metastatic cells. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach over prior art in stain transfer on histopathology tiles over two datasets. Our code and model are available at https://github.com/jcboyd/miccai2022-roigan.
abstract_zh: 在全玻片成像中，常用的基于苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 和免疫组织化学 (IHC) 染色的染色技术强调了组织景观的不同方面。在检测转移的情况下，IHC 提供了病理学家易于解释的独特读数。然而，IHC 是一种更昂贵的方法，并非所有医疗中心都提供。因此，使用深度神经网络从 H&E 虚拟生成 IHC 图像成为一种有吸引力的替代方案。 CycleGAN 等深度生成模型学习两个图像域之间语义一致的映射，同时模拟每个域的纹理属性。因此，它们是污渍转移应用的合适选择。然而，它们仍然完全不受监督，并且不具备强制染色转移生物一致性的机制。在本文中，我们提出以感兴趣区域鉴别器的形式对 CycleGAN 进行扩展。这使得 CycleGAN 能够从不成对的数据集中学习，此外，还有希望强制执行一致性的对象的部分注释。我们提出了一个关于整个幻灯片图像的用例，其中 IHC 染色为转移细胞提供实验生成的信号。我们在两个数据集上的组织病理学切片上的染色转移方面证明了我们的方法相对于现有技术的优越性。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/jcboyd/miccai2022-roigan 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于区域引导的CycleGAN方法，用于在全切片图像中进行染色转换，以从H&E染色生成IHC染色图像。
AI.motivation: 免疫组化（IHC）染色虽能提供病理学家易解读的转移细胞信号，但成本高且非所有医疗机构均可获得，需通过深度学习生成IHC图像作为替代方案。现有CycleGAN等方法缺乏生物一致性约束。
AI.method: 在CycleGAN框架中引入兴趣区域判别器，利用部分标注的区域信息强化染色转换的生物一致性，从而在无配对数据集中实现更准确的染色迁移。
AI.result: 在两个全切片图像数据集上，该方法在染色转换任务中优于现有方法，生成的IHC图像更符合生物特性。
AI.conclusion: 区域引导的CycleGAN通过引入部分标注的生物信息，有效提升了染色转换的准确性和生物学合理性，为病理图像分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: Michael S. Yao,Michael S. Hansen
title: A Path Towards Clinical Adaptation of Accelerated MRI
title_zh: 加速 MRI 临床适应之路
abstract: Accelerated MRI reconstructs images of clinical anatomies from sparsely sampled signal data to reduce patient scan times. While recent works have leveraged deep learning to accomplish this task, such approaches have often only been explored in simulated environments where there is no signal corruption or resource limitations. In this work, we explore augmentations to neural network MRI image reconstructors to enhance their clinical relevancy. Namely, we propose a ConvNet model for detecting sources of image artifacts that achieves a classifier $F_2$ score of 79.1%. We also demonstrate that training reconstructors on MR signal data with variable acceleration factors can improve their average performance during a clinical patient scan by up to 2%. We offer a loss function to overcome catastrophic forgetting when models learn to reconstruct MR images of multiple anatomies and orientations. Finally, we propose a method for using simulated phantom data to pre-train reconstructors in situations with limited clinically acquired datasets and compute capabilities. Our results provide a potential path forward for clinical adaptation of accelerated MRI.
summary: Accelerated MRI reconstructs images of clinical anatomies from sparsely sampled signal data to reduce patient scan times. While recent works have leveraged deep learning to accomplish this task, such approaches have often only been explored in simulated environments where there is no signal corruption or resource limitations. In this work, we explore augmentations to neural network MRI image reconstructors to enhance their clinical relevancy. Namely, we propose a ConvNet model for detecting sources of image artifacts that achieves a classifier $F_2$ score of 79.1%. We also demonstrate that training reconstructors on MR signal data with variable acceleration factors can improve their average performance during a clinical patient scan by up to 2%. We offer a loss function to overcome catastrophic forgetting when models learn to reconstruct MR images of multiple anatomies and orientations. Finally, we propose a method for using simulated phantom data to pre-train reconstructors in situations with limited clinically acquired datasets and compute capabilities. Our results provide a potential path forward for clinical adaptation of accelerated MRI.
abstract_zh: 加速 MRI 从稀疏采样的信号数据中重建临床解剖图像，以减少患者扫描时间。虽然最近的工作利用深度学习来完成这项任务，但此类方法通常仅在不存在信号损坏或资源限制的模拟环境中进行探索。在这项工作中，我们探索神经网络 MRI 图像重建器的增强功能，以增强其临床相关性。也就是说，我们提出了一种用于检测图像伪影来源的 ConvNet 模型，该模型的分类器 $F_2$ 得分为 79.1%。我们还证明，在具有可变加速因子的 MR 信号数据上训练重建器可以将其在临床患者扫描期间的平均性能提高高达 2%。当模型学习重建多个解剖结构和方向的 MR 图像时，我们提供了一个损失函数来克服灾难性遗忘。最后，我们提出了一种在临床获取的数据集和计算能力有限的情况下使用模拟模型数据来预训练重建器的方法。我们的结果为加速 MRI 的临床应用提供了潜在的前进道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过改进深度学习方法，推动加速MRI技术在临床环境中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有加速MRI的深度学习方法多在模拟环境中测试，未考虑信号干扰和资源限制，缺乏临床实用性。
AI.method: 设计ConvNet检测图像伪影，使用可变加速因子训练重建模型，提出防止灾难性遗忘的损失函数，并利用模拟数据预训练模型。
AI.result: ConvNet伪影检测F2得分为79.1%，临床扫描性能提升2%，有效解决多解剖结构学习中的遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进方法为加速MRI的临床转化提供了可行路径，提升了模型鲁棒性和实际应用价值。

search_text: A Path Towards Clinical Adaptation of Accelerated MRI 加速 MRI 临床适应之路 Accelerated MRI reconstructs images of clinical anatomies from sparsely sampled signal data to reduce patient scan times. While recent works have leveraged deep learning to accomplish this task, such approaches have often only been explored in simulated environments where there is no signal corruption or resource limitations. In this work, we explore augmentations to neural network MRI image reconstructors to enhance their clinical relevancy. Namely, we propose a ConvNet model for detecting sources of image artifacts that achieves a classifier $F_2$ score of 79.1%. We also demonstrate that training reconstructors on MR signal data with variable acceleration factors can improve their average performance during a clinical patient scan by up to 2%. We offer a loss function to overcome catastrophic forgetting when models learn to reconstruct MR images of multiple anatomies and orientations. Finally, we propose a method for using simulated phantom data to pre-train reconstructors in situations with limited clinically acquired datasets and compute capabilities. Our results provide a potential path forward for clinical adaptation of accelerated MRI. 加速 MRI 从稀疏采样的信号数据中重建临床解剖图像，以减少患者扫描时间。虽然最近的工作利用深度学习来完成这项任务，但此类方法通常仅在不存在信号损坏或资源限制的模拟环境中进行探索。在这项工作中，我们探索神经网络 MRI 图像重建器的增强功能，以增强其临床相关性。也就是说，我们提出了一种用于检测图像伪影来源的 ConvNet 模型，该模型的分类器 $F_2$ 得分为 79.1%。我们还证明，在具有可变加速因子的 MR 信号数据上训练重建器可以将其在临床患者扫描期间的平均性能提高高达 2%。当模型学习重建多个解剖结构和方向的 MR 图像时，我们提供了一个损失函数来克服灾难性遗忘。最后，我们提出了一种在临床获取的数据集和计算能力有限的情况下使用模拟模型数据来预训练重建器的方法。我们的结果为加速 MRI 的临床应用提供了潜在的前进道路。 本文提出通过改进深度学习方法，推动加速MRI技术在临床环境中的应用。 Michael S. Yao,Michael S. Hansen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Francesca Favaro,Keith Hutchings,Philip Nemec,Leticia Cavalcante,Trent Victor
title: Waymo's Fatigue Risk Management Framework: Prevention, Monitoring, and Mitigation of Fatigue-Induced Risks while Testing Automated Driving Systems
title_zh: Waymo 的疲劳风险管理框架：在测试自动驾驶系统时预防、监控和缓解疲劳引发的风险
abstract: This report presents Waymo's proposal for a systematic fatigue risk management framework that addresses prevention, monitoring, and mitigation of fatigue-induced risks during on-road testing of ADS technology. The proposed framework remains flexible to incorporate continuous improvements, and was informed by state of the art practices, research, learnings, and experience (both internal and external to Waymo). Fatigue is a recognized contributory factor in a substantial fraction of on-road crashes involving human drivers, and mitigation of fatigue-induced risks is still an open concern researched world-wide. While the proposed framework was specifically designed in relation to on-road testing of SAE Level 4 ADS technology, it has implications and applicability to lower levels of automation as well.
summary: This report presents Waymo's proposal for a systematic fatigue risk management framework that addresses prevention, monitoring, and mitigation of fatigue-induced risks during on-road testing of ADS technology. The proposed framework remains flexible to incorporate continuous improvements, and was informed by state of the art practices, research, learnings, and experience (both internal and external to Waymo). Fatigue is a recognized contributory factor in a substantial fraction of on-road crashes involving human drivers, and mitigation of fatigue-induced risks is still an open concern researched world-wide. While the proposed framework was specifically designed in relation to on-road testing of SAE Level 4 ADS technology, it has implications and applicability to lower levels of automation as well.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了 Waymo 关于系统性疲劳风险管理框架的提案，该框架旨在预防、监控和缓解 ADS 技术道路测试期间疲劳引发的风险。拟议的框架保持灵活性，以纳入持续改进，并借鉴了最先进的实践、研究、学习和经验（Waymo 内部和外部）。疲劳是大部分涉及人类驾驶员的道路交通事故的一个公认的促成因素，而减轻疲劳引起的风险仍然是世界范围内研究的一个开放问题。虽然提议的框架是专门针对 SAE 4 级 ADS 技术的道路测试而设计的，但它也对较低级别的自动化具有影响和适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出系统性疲劳风险管理框架，预防、监控和减轻自动驾驶系统道路测试中的疲劳风险
AI.motivation: 疲劳是道路事故的重要因素，现有缓解措施不足，需系统性框架应对自动驾驶测试中的疲劳风险
AI.method: 整合现有最佳实践与研究，结合内外部经验，构建灵活可迭代的疲劳风险管理框架
AI.result: 形成适用于SAE四级ADS道路测试的疲劳风险管理框架，可扩展至低级别自动化系统
AI.conclusion: 为自动驾驶测试提供系统性疲劳风险管理方案，推动行业安全标准建立

authors_text: Tom Peham,Lukas Burgholzer,Robert Wille
title: Equivalence Checking of Quantum Circuits with the ZX-Calculus
title_zh: 使用 ZX 微积分进行量子电路的等效性检查
comment: 15 pages, 12 figures, to be published in IEEE Journal on Emerging and Selected Topics in Circuits and Systems
comments: 15 pages, 12 figures, to be published in IEEE Journal on Emerging and Selected Topics in Circuits and Systems
abstract: As state-of-the-art quantum computers are capable of running increasingly complex algorithms, the need for automated methods to design and test potential applications rises. Equivalence checking of quantum circuits is an important, yet hardly automated, task in the development of the quantum software stack. Recently, new methods have been proposed that tackle this problem from widely different perspectives. One of them is based on the ZX-calculus, a graphical rewriting system for quantum computing. However, the power and capability of this equivalence checking method has barely been explored. The aim of this work is to evaluate the ZX-calculus as a tool for equivalence checking of quantum circuits. To this end, it is demonstrated how the ZX-calculus based approach for equivalence checking can be expanded in order to verify the results of compilation flows and optimizations on quantum circuits. It is also shown that the ZX-calculus based method is not complete$\unicode{x2014}$especially for quantum circuits with ancillary qubits. In order to properly evaluate the proposed method, we conduct a detailed case study by comparing it to two other state-of-the-art methods for equivalence checking: one based on path-sums and another based on decision diagrams. The proposed methods have been integrated into the publicly available QCEC tool (https://github.com/cda-tum/qcec) which is part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT).
summary: As state-of-the-art quantum computers are capable of running increasingly complex algorithms, the need for automated methods to design and test potential applications rises. Equivalence checking of quantum circuits is an important, yet hardly automated, task in the development of the quantum software stack. Recently, new methods have been proposed that tackle this problem from widely different perspectives. One of them is based on the ZX-calculus, a graphical rewriting system for quantum computing. However, the power and capability of this equivalence checking method has barely been explored. The aim of this work is to evaluate the ZX-calculus as a tool for equivalence checking of quantum circuits. To this end, it is demonstrated how the ZX-calculus based approach for equivalence checking can be expanded in order to verify the results of compilation flows and optimizations on quantum circuits. It is also shown that the ZX-calculus based method is not complete$\unicode{x2014}$especially for quantum circuits with ancillary qubits. In order to properly evaluate the proposed method, we conduct a detailed case study by comparing it to two other state-of-the-art methods for equivalence checking: one based on path-sums and another based on decision diagrams. The proposed methods have been integrated into the publicly available QCEC tool (https://github.com/cda-tum/qcec) which is part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT).
abstract_zh: 随着最先进的量子计算机能够运行日益复杂的算法，对设计和测试潜在应用的自动化方法的需求不断增加。量子电路的等效性检查是量子软件堆栈开发中的一项重要但很难自动化的任务。最近，人们提出了从不同角度解决这个问题的新方法。其中之一基于 ZX-calculus，这是一种用于量子计算的图形重写系统。然而，这种等价性检查方法的威力和能力几乎没有被探索过。这项工作的目的是评估 ZX 微积分作为量子电路等价性检查的工具。为此，演示了如何扩展基于 ZX 微积分的等价检查方法，以验证量子电路的编译流程和优化的结果。它还表明，基于 ZX 微积分的方法并不完整$\unicode{x2014}$，特别是对于具有辅助量子位的量子电路。为了正确评估所提出的方法，我们通过将其与其他两种最先进的等价性检查方法进行比较来进行详细的案例研究：一种基于路径和，另一种基于决策图。所提出的方法已集成到公开可用的 QCEC 工具 (https://github.com/cda-tum/qcec) 中，该工具是慕尼黑量子工具包 (MQT) 的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于ZX演算的量子电路等价性检查方法的有效性，并探讨其在量子电路编译和优化验证中的应用。
AI.motivation: 随着量子计算机复杂度提升，自动化设计与测试量子电路的需求增加，但现有等价性检查方法尚未充分探索，尤其缺乏对含辅助量子比特电路的完整验证手段。
AI.method: 扩展基于ZX演算的等价性检查方法以验证量子电路编译流程，并通过与路径求和法和决策图方法的对比实验进行评估，同时集成到开源工具QCEC中。
AI.result: 发现基于ZX演算的方法在含辅助量子比特的电路中不完整，且在特定场景下表现劣于其他两种方法，但工具已实现并公开。
AI.conclusion: ZX演算为量子电路验证提供了新思路，但需进一步改进其完备性，未来研究应结合多种方法提升验证能力。
