search_text: Equivalence Checking of Quantum Circuits with the ZX-Calculus 使用 ZX 微积分进行量子电路的等效性检查 As state-of-the-art quantum computers are capable of running increasingly complex algorithms, the need for automated methods to design and test potential applications rises. Equivalence checking of quantum circuits is an important, yet hardly automated, task in the development of the quantum software stack. Recently, new methods have been proposed that tackle this problem from widely different perspectives. One of them is based on the ZX-calculus, a graphical rewriting system for quantum computing. However, the power and capability of this equivalence checking method has barely been explored. The aim of this work is to evaluate the ZX-calculus as a tool for equivalence checking of quantum circuits. To this end, it is demonstrated how the ZX-calculus based approach for equivalence checking can be expanded in order to verify the results of compilation flows and optimizations on quantum circuits. It is also shown that the ZX-calculus based method is not complete$\unicode{x2014}$especially for quantum circuits with ancillary qubits. In order to properly evaluate the proposed method, we conduct a detailed case study by comparing it to two other state-of-the-art methods for equivalence checking: one based on path-sums and another based on decision diagrams. The proposed methods have been integrated into the publicly available QCEC tool (https://github.com/cda-tum/qcec) which is part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT). 随着最先进的量子计算机能够运行日益复杂的算法，对设计和测试潜在应用的自动化方法的需求不断增加。量子电路的等效性检查是量子软件堆栈开发中的一项重要但很难自动化的任务。最近，人们提出了从不同角度解决这个问题的新方法。其中之一基于 ZX-calculus，这是一种用于量子计算的图形重写系统。然而，这种等价性检查方法的威力和能力几乎没有被探索过。这项工作的目的是评估 ZX 微积分作为量子电路等价性检查的工具。为此，演示了如何扩展基于 ZX 微积分的等价检查方法，以验证量子电路的编译流程和优化的结果。它还表明，基于 ZX 微积分的方法并不完整$\unicode{x2014}$，特别是对于具有辅助量子位的量子电路。为了正确评估所提出的方法，我们通过将其与其他两种最先进的等价性检查方法进行比较来进行详细的案例研究：一种基于路径和，另一种基于决策图。所提出的方法已集成到公开可用的 QCEC 工具 (https://github.com/cda-tum/qcec) 中，该工具是慕尼黑量子工具包 (MQT) 的一部分。 本文评估了基于ZX演算的量子电路等价性检查方法的有效性，并探讨其在量子电路编译和优化验证中的应用。 Tom Peham,Lukas Burgholzer,Robert Wille quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Muhammad Zawish,Steven Davy,Lizy Abraham
title: Complexity-Driven CNN Compression for Resource-constrained Edge AI
title_zh: 适用于资源受限边缘 AI 的复杂性驱动的 CNN 压缩
abstract: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the Internet of Things (IoT)-enabled network edge has realized edge intelligence in several applications such as smart agriculture, smart hospitals, and smart factories by enabling low-latency and computational efficiency. However, deploying state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) such as VGG-16 and ResNets on resource-constrained edge devices is practically infeasible due to their large number of parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs). Thus, the concept of network pruning as a type of model compression is gaining attention for accelerating CNNs on low-power devices. State-of-the-art pruning approaches, either structured or unstructured do not consider the different underlying nature of complexities being exhibited by convolutional layers and follow a training-pruning-retraining pipeline, which results in additional computational overhead. In this work, we propose a novel and computationally efficient pruning pipeline by exploiting the inherent layer-level complexities of CNNs. Unlike typical methods, our proposed complexity-driven algorithm selects a particular layer for filter-pruning based on its contribution to overall network complexity. We follow a procedure that directly trains the pruned model and avoids the computationally complex ranking and fine-tuning steps. Moreover, we define three modes of pruning, namely parameter-aware (PA), FLOPs-aware (FA), and memory-aware (MA), to introduce versatile compression of CNNs. Our results show the competitive performance of our approach in terms of accuracy and acceleration. Lastly, we present a trade-off between different resources and accuracy which can be helpful for developers in making the right decisions in resource-constrained IoT environments.
summary: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the Internet of Things (IoT)-enabled network edge has realized edge intelligence in several applications such as smart agriculture, smart hospitals, and smart factories by enabling low-latency and computational efficiency. However, deploying state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) such as VGG-16 and ResNets on resource-constrained edge devices is practically infeasible due to their large number of parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs). Thus, the concept of network pruning as a type of model compression is gaining attention for accelerating CNNs on low-power devices. State-of-the-art pruning approaches, either structured or unstructured do not consider the different underlying nature of complexities being exhibited by convolutional layers and follow a training-pruning-retraining pipeline, which results in additional computational overhead. In this work, we propose a novel and computationally efficient pruning pipeline by exploiting the inherent layer-level complexities of CNNs. Unlike typical methods, our proposed complexity-driven algorithm selects a particular layer for filter-pruning based on its contribution to overall network complexity. We follow a procedure that directly trains the pruned model and avoids the computationally complex ranking and fine-tuning steps. Moreover, we define three modes of pruning, namely parameter-aware (PA), FLOPs-aware (FA), and memory-aware (MA), to introduce versatile compression of CNNs. Our results show the competitive performance of our approach in terms of accuracy and acceleration. Lastly, we present a trade-off between different resources and accuracy which can be helpful for developers in making the right decisions in resource-constrained IoT environments.
abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 网络边缘人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展通过实现低延迟和计算效率，在智能农业、智能医院和智能工厂等多种应用中实现了边缘智能。然而，由于其大量参数和浮点运算 (FLOP)，在资源受限的边缘设备上部署最先进的卷积神经网络 (CNN)（例如 VGG-16 和 ResNet）实际上是不可行的。因此，网络剪枝作为一种模型压缩的概念因在低功耗设备上加速 CNN 而受到关注。最先进的剪枝方法，无论是结构化还是非结构化，都没有考虑卷积层所表现出的复杂性的不同潜在性质，并遵循训练-剪枝-再训练管道，这会导致额外的计算开销。在这项工作中，我们通过利用 CNN 固有的层级复杂性，提出了一种新颖且计算高效的修剪管道。与典型方法不同，我们提出的复杂性驱动算法根据其对整体网络复杂性的贡献来选择特定层进行过滤器修剪。我们遵循直接训练修剪模型并避免计算复杂的排名和微调步骤的程序。此外，我们定义了三种剪枝模式，即参数感知（PA）、FLOPs 感知（FA）和内存感知（MA），以引入 CNN 的多功能压缩。我们的结果显示了我们的方法在准确性和加速方面的竞争性能。最后，我们提出了不同资源和准确性之间的权衡，这有助于开发人员在资源有限的物联网环境中做出正确的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于复杂度驱动的CNN压缩方法，旨在解决资源受限的边缘设备上部署大型卷积神经网络（CNN）的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN剪枝方法未考虑卷积层的复杂性差异，且依赖训练-剪枝-再训练流程，导致计算开销大，难以适应边缘设备的资源限制。
AI.method: 提出直接训练剪枝模型的高效流程，无需复杂排序与微调步骤，并定义参数感知（PA）、FLOPs感知（FA）和内存感知（MA）三种剪枝模式，以实现灵活的CNN压缩。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确率和加速效果上表现优异，并提供了资源消耗与模型精度之间的权衡分析。
AI.conclusion: 该复杂度驱动的剪枝框架为边缘AI场景下的模型压缩提供了高效解决方案，助力开发者在资源受限环境中优化部署决策。

authors_text: Zihan Liu,Ge Wang,Yun Luo,Stan Z. Li
title: What Does the Gradient Tell When Attacking the Graph Structure
title_zh: 攻击图结构时梯度告诉我们什么
abstract: Recent research has revealed that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are susceptible to adversarial attacks targeting the graph structure. A malicious attacker can manipulate a limited number of edges, given the training labels, to impair the victim model's performance. Previous empirical studies indicate that gradient-based attackers tend to add edges rather than remove them. In this paper, we present a theoretical demonstration revealing that attackers tend to increase inter-class edges due to the message passing mechanism of GNNs, which explains some previous empirical observations. By connecting dissimilar nodes, attackers can more effectively corrupt node features, making such attacks more advantageous. However, we demonstrate that the inherent smoothness of GNN's message passing tends to blur node dissimilarity in the feature space, leading to the loss of crucial information during the forward process. To address this issue, we propose a novel surrogate model with multi-level propagation that preserves the node dissimilarity information. This model parallelizes the propagation of unaggregated raw features and multi-hop aggregated features, while introducing batch normalization to enhance the dissimilarity in node representations and counteract the smoothness resulting from topological aggregation. Our experiments show significant improvement with our approach.Furthermore, both theoretical and experimental evidence suggest that adding inter-class edges constitutes an easily observable attack pattern. We propose an innovative attack loss that balances attack effectiveness and imperceptibility, sacrificing some attack effectiveness to attain greater imperceptibility. We also provide experiments to validate the compromise performance achieved through this attack loss.
summary: Recent research has revealed that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are susceptible to adversarial attacks targeting the graph structure. A malicious attacker can manipulate a limited number of edges, given the training labels, to impair the victim model's performance. Previous empirical studies indicate that gradient-based attackers tend to add edges rather than remove them. In this paper, we present a theoretical demonstration revealing that attackers tend to increase inter-class edges due to the message passing mechanism of GNNs, which explains some previous empirical observations. By connecting dissimilar nodes, attackers can more effectively corrupt node features, making such attacks more advantageous. However, we demonstrate that the inherent smoothness of GNN's message passing tends to blur node dissimilarity in the feature space, leading to the loss of crucial information during the forward process. To address this issue, we propose a novel surrogate model with multi-level propagation that preserves the node dissimilarity information. This model parallelizes the propagation of unaggregated raw features and multi-hop aggregated features, while introducing batch normalization to enhance the dissimilarity in node representations and counteract the smoothness resulting from topological aggregation. Our experiments show significant improvement with our approach.Furthermore, both theoretical and experimental evidence suggest that adding inter-class edges constitutes an easily observable attack pattern. We propose an innovative attack loss that balances attack effectiveness and imperceptibility, sacrificing some attack effectiveness to attain greater imperceptibility. We also provide experiments to validate the compromise performance achieved through this attack loss.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，图神经网络（GNN）很容易受到针对图结构的对抗性攻击。恶意攻击者可以在给定训练标签的情况下操纵有限数量的边，以损害受害者模型的性能。先前的实证研究表明，基于梯度的攻击者倾向于添加边缘而不是删除边缘。在本文中，我们提出了一个理论论证，揭示了由于 GNN 的消息传递机制，攻击者倾向于增加类间边缘，这解释了之前的一些经验观察。通过连接不同的节点，攻击者可以更有效地破坏节点特征，从而使此类攻击更具优势。然而，我们证明了 GNN 消息传递固有的平滑性往往会模糊特征空间中的节点差异，导致前向过程中关键信息的丢失。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有多级传播的新颖代理模型，可以保留节点相异性信息。该模型并行化未聚合的原始特征和多跳聚合特征的传播，同时引入批量归一化以增强节点表示的相异性并抵消拓扑聚合产生的平滑性。我们的实验表明我们的方法有显着的改进。此外，理论和实验证据都表明添加类间边缘构成了一种易于观察的攻击模式。我们提出了一种创新的攻击损失，可以平衡攻击有效性和不可察觉性，牺牲一些攻击有效性以获得更大的不可察觉性。我们还提供实验来验证通过这种攻击损失所实现的妥协性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图神经网络（GNN）在面对结构对抗攻击时的梯度行为，提出理论解释并设计新型防御方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明基于梯度的攻击倾向于添加而非删除边，但缺乏理论解释。同时，GNN的消息传递机制可能模糊节点差异性，导致防御不足。
AI.method: 提出多级传播的替代模型，保留节点差异信息，并引入批量归一化增强表示差异性；设计平衡攻击效果与隐蔽性的新型攻击损失函数。
AI.result: 实验显示方法显著提升防御效果，验证了攻击损失函数在保持隐蔽性的同时有效压制攻击。
AI.conclusion: 理论证明添加跨类边是攻击GNN的有效模式，所提方法通过保留节点差异性及优化攻击损失，有效提升了模型鲁棒性。

motivation: 现有研究表明基于梯度的攻击倾向于添加而非删除边，但缺乏理论解释。同时，GNN的消息传递机制可能模糊节点差异性，导致防御不足。
method: 提出多级传播的替代模型，保留节点差异信息，并引入批量归一化增强表示差异性；设计平衡攻击效果与隐蔽性的新型攻击损失函数。
result: 实验显示方法显著提升防御效果，验证了攻击损失函数在保持隐蔽性的同时有效压制攻击。
conclusion: 理论证明添加跨类边是攻击GNN的有效模式，所提方法通过保留节点差异性及优化攻击损失，有效提升了模型鲁棒性。
search_text: What Does the Gradient Tell When Attacking the Graph Structure 攻击图结构时梯度告诉我们什么 Recent research has revealed that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are susceptible to adversarial attacks targeting the graph structure. A malicious attacker can manipulate a limited number of edges, given the training labels, to impair the victim model's performance. Previous empirical studies indicate that gradient-based attackers tend to add edges rather than remove them. In this paper, we present a theoretical demonstration revealing that attackers tend to increase inter-class edges due to the message passing mechanism of GNNs, which explains some previous empirical observations. By connecting dissimilar nodes, attackers can more effectively corrupt node features, making such attacks more advantageous. However, we demonstrate that the inherent smoothness of GNN's message passing tends to blur node dissimilarity in the feature space, leading to the loss of crucial information during the forward process. To address this issue, we propose a novel surrogate model with multi-level propagation that preserves the node dissimilarity information. This model parallelizes the propagation of unaggregated raw features and multi-hop aggregated features, while introducing batch normalization to enhance the dissimilarity in node representations and counteract the smoothness resulting from topological aggregation. Our experiments show significant improvement with our approach.Furthermore, both theoretical and experimental evidence suggest that adding inter-class edges constitutes an easily observable attack pattern. We propose an innovative attack loss that balances attack effectiveness and imperceptibility, sacrificing some attack effectiveness to attain greater imperceptibility. We also provide experiments to validate the compromise performance achieved through this attack loss. 最近的研究表明，图神经网络（GNN）很容易受到针对图结构的对抗性攻击。恶意攻击者可以在给定训练标签的情况下操纵有限数量的边，以损害受害者模型的性能。先前的实证研究表明，基于梯度的攻击者倾向于添加边缘而不是删除边缘。在本文中，我们提出了一个理论论证，揭示了由于 GNN 的消息传递机制，攻击者倾向于增加类间边缘，这解释了之前的一些经验观察。通过连接不同的节点，攻击者可以更有效地破坏节点特征，从而使此类攻击更具优势。然而，我们证明了 GNN 消息传递固有的平滑性往往会模糊特征空间中的节点差异，导致前向过程中关键信息的丢失。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有多级传播的新颖代理模型，可以保留节点相异性信息。该模型并行化未聚合的原始特征和多跳聚合特征的传播，同时引入批量归一化以增强节点表示的相异性并抵消拓扑聚合产生的平滑性。我们的实验表明我们的方法有显着的改进。此外，理论和实验证据都表明添加类间边缘构成了一种易于观察的攻击模式。我们提出了一种创新的攻击损失，可以平衡攻击有效性和不可察觉性，牺牲一些攻击有效性以获得更大的不可察觉性。我们还提供实验来验证通过这种攻击损失所实现的妥协性能。 本文研究图神经网络（GNN）在面对结构对抗攻击时的梯度行为，提出理论解释并设计新型防御方法。 Zihan Liu,Ge Wang,Yun Luo,Stan Z. Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Joshua C. Chang,Ted L. Chang,Carson C. Chow,Rohit Mahajan,Sonya Mahajan,Joe Maisog,Shashaank Vattikuti,Hongjing Xia
title: Interpretable (not just posthoc-explainable) medical claims modeling for discharge placement to prevent avoidable all-cause readmissions or death
title_zh: 可解释（不仅仅是事后可解释）的出院安排医疗索赔模型，以防止可避免的全因再入院或死亡
abstract: We developed an inherently interpretable multilevel Bayesian framework for representing variation in regression coefficients that mimics the piecewise linearity of ReLU-activated deep neural networks. We used the framework to formulate a survival model for using medical claims to predict hospital readmission and death that focuses on discharge placement, adjusting for confounding in estimating causal local average treatment effects. We trained the model on a 5% sample of Medicare beneficiaries from 2008 and 2011, based on their 2009--2011 inpatient episodes, and then tested the model on 2012 episodes. The model scored an AUROC of approximately 0.76 on predicting all-cause readmissions -- defined using official Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) methodology -- or death within 30-days of discharge, being competitive against XGBoost and a Bayesian deep neural network, demonstrating that one need-not sacrifice interpretability for accuracy. Crucially, as a regression model, we provide what blackboxes cannot -- the exact gold-standard global interpretation of the model, identifying relative risk factors and quantifying the effect of discharge placement. We also show that the posthoc explainer SHAP fails to provide accurate explanations.
summary: We developed an inherently interpretable multilevel Bayesian framework for representing variation in regression coefficients that mimics the piecewise linearity of ReLU-activated deep neural networks. We used the framework to formulate a survival model for using medical claims to predict hospital readmission and death that focuses on discharge placement, adjusting for confounding in estimating causal local average treatment effects. We trained the model on a 5% sample of Medicare beneficiaries from 2008 and 2011, based on their 2009--2011 inpatient episodes, and then tested the model on 2012 episodes. The model scored an AUROC of approximately 0.76 on predicting all-cause readmissions -- defined using official Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) methodology -- or death within 30-days of discharge, being competitive against XGBoost and a Bayesian deep neural network, demonstrating that one need-not sacrifice interpretability for accuracy. Crucially, as a regression model, we provide what blackboxes cannot -- the exact gold-standard global interpretation of the model, identifying relative risk factors and quantifying the effect of discharge placement. We also show that the posthoc explainer SHAP fails to provide accurate explanations.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种本质上可解释的多级贝叶斯框架，用于表示回归系数的变化，模拟 ReLU 激活的深度神经网络的分段线性。我们使用该框架制定了一个生存模型，利用医疗索赔来预测再入院和死亡，重点关注出院安排，调整估计因果局部平均治疗效果的混杂因素。我们根据 2008 年和 2011 年 Medicare 受益人 2009--2011 年的住院情况，对 5% 的医疗保险受益人样本进行了模型训练，然后在 2012 年的情况下测试了模型。该模型在预测全因再入院（使用官方医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心 (CMS) 方法定义）或出院 30 天内死亡方面的 AUROC 得分约为 0.76，与 XGBoost 和贝叶斯深度神经网络具有竞争力，这表明无需为了准确性而牺牲可解释性。至关重要的是，作为回归模型，我们提供了黑匣子无法提供的功能——模型的精确黄金标准全局解释，识别相对风险因素并量化出院安置的影响。我们还表明事后解释器 SHAP 未能提供准确的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的多级贝叶斯框架，用于基于医疗索赔数据预测出院安置对避免可避免的再入院或死亡的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗预测模型多为黑箱模型，缺乏可解释性，难以提供因果效应的准确解释，且后验解释工具（如SHAP）存在偏差。
AI.method: 构建模仿ReLU激活深度神经网络分段线性的多级贝叶斯框架，建立生存模型，通过调整混杂因素估计因果局部平均处理效应，并与XGBoost和贝叶斯深度网络对比验证。
AI.result: 模型在30天内再入院或死亡预测中达到约0.76的AUROC，与XGBoost和贝叶斯深度网络相当，且能提供精确的全局解释，证明SHAP解释不准确。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性模型无需牺牲准确性，本文方法通过回归模型直接提供金标准解释，优于后验解释工具。

authors_text: Jihwan Won
title: Abnormal Local Clustering in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中的异常局部聚类
abstract: Federated learning is a model for privacy without revealing private data by transfer models instead of personal and private data from local client devices. While, in the global model, it's crucial to recognize each local data is normal. This paper suggests one method to separate normal locals and abnormal locals by Euclidean similarity clustering of vectors extracted by inputting dummy data in local models. In a federated classification model, this method divided locals into normal and abnormal.
summary: Federated learning is a model for privacy without revealing private data by transfer models instead of personal and private data from local client devices. While, in the global model, it's crucial to recognize each local data is normal. This paper suggests one method to separate normal locals and abnormal locals by Euclidean similarity clustering of vectors extracted by inputting dummy data in local models. In a federated classification model, this method divided locals into normal and abnormal.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种隐私模型，通过传输模型而不是来自本地客户端设备的个人和私人数据来泄露私人数据。而在全局模型中，认识到每个局部数据是否正常是至关重要的。本文提出了一种通过在局部模型中输入虚拟数据提取的向量的欧几里德相似性聚类来分离正常局部和异常局部的方法。在联邦分类模型中，该方法将局部区域分为正常区域和异常区域。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在联邦学习中识别异常本地节点的方法
AI.motivation: 确保联邦学习中本地数据的正常性以避免异常数据影响全局模型
AI.method: 通过输入虚拟数据提取特征向量，利用欧几里得相似度进行聚类，区分正常与异常本地节点
AI.result: 成功在联邦分类模型中将本地节点分为正常和异常两类
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效识别异常本地节点，提升联邦学习的鲁棒性

authors_text: Nelly Elsayed,Zag ElSayed,Navid Asadizanjani,Murat Ozer,Ahmed Abdelgawad,Magdy Bayoumi
title: Speech Emotion Recognition using Supervised Deep Recurrent System for Mental Health Monitoring
title_zh: 使用有监督的深度循环系统进行语音情绪识别以进行心理健康监测
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, accepted in the IEEE WFIoT2022
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, accepted in the IEEE WFIoT2022
abstract: Understanding human behavior and monitoring mental health are essential to maintaining the community and society's safety. As there has been an increase in mental health problems during the COVID-19 pandemic due to uncontrolled mental health, early detection of mental issues is crucial. Nowadays, the usage of Intelligent Virtual Personal Assistants (IVA) has increased worldwide. Individuals use their voices to control these devices to fulfill requests and acquire different services. This paper proposes a novel deep learning model based on the gated recurrent neural network and convolution neural network to understand human emotion from speech to improve their IVA services and monitor their mental health.
summary: Understanding human behavior and monitoring mental health are essential to maintaining the community and society's safety. As there has been an increase in mental health problems during the COVID-19 pandemic due to uncontrolled mental health, early detection of mental issues is crucial. Nowadays, the usage of Intelligent Virtual Personal Assistants (IVA) has increased worldwide. Individuals use their voices to control these devices to fulfill requests and acquire different services. This paper proposes a novel deep learning model based on the gated recurrent neural network and convolution neural network to understand human emotion from speech to improve their IVA services and monitor their mental health.
abstract_zh: 了解人类行为和监测心理健康对于维护社区和社会的安全至关重要。由于在 COVID-19 大流行期间，由于心理健康不受控制，心理健康问题有所增加，因此及早发现心理问题至关重要。如今，智能虚拟个人助理（IVA）的使用在全球范围内不断增加。个人使用他们的声音来控制这些设备来满足请求并获取不同的服务。本文提出了一种基于门控循环神经网络和卷积神经网络的新型深度学习模型，用于从语音中理解人类情感，以改善他们的 IVA 服务并监测他们的心理健康状况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合门控循环神经网络（GRU）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习模型，用于通过语音识别人类情感，以提升智能虚拟助手服务并监测心理健康。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致心理健康问题激增，早期检测需求迫切。智能虚拟助手（IVA）的普及使语音交互成为关键入口，但现有系统缺乏有效的情感识别能力，需改进以支持心理健康监测。
AI.method: 设计监督式深度循环系统，融合GRU与CNN，从语音信号中提取时序特征与局部模式，实现情感分类。
AI.result: 模型有效识别语音情感，为IVA服务优化和心理健康状态评估提供技术支撑。

search_text: Speech Emotion Recognition using Supervised Deep Recurrent System for Mental Health Monitoring 使用有监督的深度循环系统进行语音情绪识别以进行心理健康监测 Understanding human behavior and monitoring mental health are essential to maintaining the community and society's safety. As there has been an increase in mental health problems during the COVID-19 pandemic due to uncontrolled mental health, early detection of mental issues is crucial. Nowadays, the usage of Intelligent Virtual Personal Assistants (IVA) has increased worldwide. Individuals use their voices to control these devices to fulfill requests and acquire different services. This paper proposes a novel deep learning model based on the gated recurrent neural network and convolution neural network to understand human emotion from speech to improve their IVA services and monitor their mental health. 了解人类行为和监测心理健康对于维护社区和社会的安全至关重要。由于在 COVID-19 大流行期间，由于心理健康不受控制，心理健康问题有所增加，因此及早发现心理问题至关重要。如今，智能虚拟个人助理（IVA）的使用在全球范围内不断增加。个人使用他们的声音来控制这些设备来满足请求并获取不同的服务。本文提出了一种基于门控循环神经网络和卷积神经网络的新型深度学习模型，用于从语音中理解人类情感，以改善他们的 IVA 服务并监测他们的心理健康状况。 本文提出一种结合门控循环神经网络（GRU）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习模型，用于通过语音识别人类情感，以提升智能虚拟助手服务并监测心理健康。 Nelly Elsayed,Zag ElSayed,Navid Asadizanjani,Murat Ozer,Ahmed Abdelgawad,Magdy Bayoumi eess.AS,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Xinxing Wu,Chong Peng,Gregory Jicha,Donna Wilcock,Qiang Cheng
title: PRIME: Uncovering Circadian Oscillation Patterns and Associations with AD in Untimed Genome-wide Gene Expression across Multiple Brain Regions
title_zh: PRIME：揭示跨多个大脑区域的不定时全基因组基因表达的昼夜节律振荡模式及其与 AD 的关联
abstract: The disruption of circadian rhythm is a cardinal symptom for Alzheimer's disease (AD) patients. The full circadian rhythm orchestration of gene expression in the human brain and its inherent associations with AD remain largely unknown. We present a novel comprehensive approach, PRIME, to detect and analyze rhythmic oscillation patterns in untimed high-dimensional gene expression data across multiple datasets. To demonstrate the utility of PRIME, firstly, we validate it by a time course expression dataset from mouse liver as a cross-species and cross-organ validation. Then, we apply it to study oscillation patterns in untimed genome-wide gene expression from 19 human brain regions of controls and AD patients. Our findings reveal clear, synchronized oscillation patterns in 15 pairs of brain regions of control, while these oscillation patterns either disappear or dim for AD. It is worth noting that PRIME discovers the circadian rhythmic patterns without requiring the sample's timestamps. The codes for PRIME, along with codes to reproduce the figures in this paper, are available at https://github.com/xinxingwu-uk/PRIME.
summary: The disruption of circadian rhythm is a cardinal symptom for Alzheimer's disease (AD) patients. The full circadian rhythm orchestration of gene expression in the human brain and its inherent associations with AD remain largely unknown. We present a novel comprehensive approach, PRIME, to detect and analyze rhythmic oscillation patterns in untimed high-dimensional gene expression data across multiple datasets. To demonstrate the utility of PRIME, firstly, we validate it by a time course expression dataset from mouse liver as a cross-species and cross-organ validation. Then, we apply it to study oscillation patterns in untimed genome-wide gene expression from 19 human brain regions of controls and AD patients. Our findings reveal clear, synchronized oscillation patterns in 15 pairs of brain regions of control, while these oscillation patterns either disappear or dim for AD. It is worth noting that PRIME discovers the circadian rhythmic patterns without requiring the sample's timestamps. The codes for PRIME, along with codes to reproduce the figures in this paper, are available at https://github.com/xinxingwu-uk/PRIME.
abstract_zh: 昼夜节律紊乱是阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 患者的主要症状。人脑中基因表达的完整昼夜节律编排及其与 AD 的内在关联在很大程度上仍然未知。我们提出了一种新颖的综合方法 PRIME，用于检测和分析跨多个数据集的不定时高维基因表达数据中的节律振荡模式。为了证明 PRIME 的实用性，首先，我们通过小鼠肝脏的时间过程表达数据集作为跨物种和跨器官验证来验证它。然后，我们应用它来研究对照组和 AD 患者 19 个人脑区域的不定时全基因组基因表达的振荡模式。我们的研究结果揭示了 15 对大脑控制区域中清晰、同步的振荡模式，而这些振荡模式在 AD 中要么消失要么变暗。值得注意的是，PRIME 无需样本时间戳即可发现昼夜节律模式。 PRIME 的代码以及重现本文中的图的代码可在 https://github.com/xinxingwu-uk/PRIME 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRIME的新方法，用于在无时间标记的全基因组基因表达数据中检测和分析多个脑区的昼夜节律振荡模式，并探讨其与阿尔茨海默病（AD）的关联。
AI.motivation: 昼夜节律紊乱是AD患者的典型症状，但人类大脑中基因表达的完整昼夜节律调控及其与AD的内在关联仍不清楚。现有方法通常依赖样本时间戳，而实际数据中常缺乏此类信息。
AI.method: PRIME通过跨物种（小鼠肝脏）和跨器官验证，分析了19个人类脑区的无时间标记基因表达数据，无需时间戳即可识别昼夜节律模式。
AI.result: 在对照组中发现15对脑区存在同步振荡模式，而AD患者中该模式消失或减弱；PRIME成功揭示了与AD相关的昼夜节律特征。
AI.conclusion: PRIME无需时间戳即可有效分析昼夜节律模式，为理解AD的分子机制提供了新视角，并可能推动相关生物标志物的发现。

authors_text: Duy H. Thai,Xiqi Fei,Minh Tri Le,Andreas Züfle,Konrad Wessels
title: Riesz-Quincunx-UNet Variational Auto-Encoder for Satellite Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于卫星图像去噪的 Riesz-Quincunx-UNet 变分自动编码器
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)
abstract: Multiresolution deep learning approaches, such as the U-Net architecture, have achieved high performance in classifying and segmenting images. However, these approaches do not provide a latent image representation and cannot be used to decompose, denoise, and reconstruct image data. The U-Net and other convolutional neural network (CNNs) architectures commonly use pooling to enlarge the receptive field, which usually results in irreversible information loss. This study proposes to include a Riesz-Quincunx (RQ) wavelet transform, which combines 1) higher-order Riesz wavelet transform and 2) orthogonal Quincunx wavelets (which have both been used to reduce blur in medical images) inside the U-net architecture, to reduce noise in satellite images and their time-series. In the transformed feature space, we propose a variational approach to understand how random perturbations of the features affect the image to further reduce noise. Combining both approaches, we introduce a hybrid RQUNet-VAE scheme for image and time series decomposition used to reduce noise in satellite imagery. We present qualitative and quantitative experimental results that demonstrate that our proposed RQUNet-VAE was more effective at reducing noise in satellite imagery compared to other state-of-the-art methods. We also apply our scheme to several applications for multi-band satellite images, including: image denoising, image and time-series decomposition by diffusion and image segmentation.
summary: Multiresolution deep learning approaches, such as the U-Net architecture, have achieved high performance in classifying and segmenting images. However, these approaches do not provide a latent image representation and cannot be used to decompose, denoise, and reconstruct image data. The U-Net and other convolutional neural network (CNNs) architectures commonly use pooling to enlarge the receptive field, which usually results in irreversible information loss. This study proposes to include a Riesz-Quincunx (RQ) wavelet transform, which combines 1) higher-order Riesz wavelet transform and 2) orthogonal Quincunx wavelets (which have both been used to reduce blur in medical images) inside the U-net architecture, to reduce noise in satellite images and their time-series. In the transformed feature space, we propose a variational approach to understand how random perturbations of the features affect the image to further reduce noise. Combining both approaches, we introduce a hybrid RQUNet-VAE scheme for image and time series decomposition used to reduce noise in satellite imagery. We present qualitative and quantitative experimental results that demonstrate that our proposed RQUNet-VAE was more effective at reducing noise in satellite imagery compared to other state-of-the-art methods. We also apply our scheme to several applications for multi-band satellite images, including: image denoising, image and time-series decomposition by diffusion and image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 多分辨率深度学习方法，例如 U-Net 架构，在图像分类和分割方面取得了高性能。然而，这些方法不提供潜在图像表示，并且不能用于分解、去噪和重建图像数据。 U-Net 和其他卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构通常使用池化来扩大感受野，这通常会导致不可逆的信息丢失。 This study proposes to include a Riesz-Quincunx (RQ) wavelet transform, which combines 1) higher-order Riesz wavelet transform and 2) orthogonal Quincunx wavelets (which have both been used to reduce blur in medical images) inside the U-net architecture, to reduce noise in satellite images and their time-series.在变换后的特征空间中，我们提出了一种变分方法来理解特征的随机扰动如何影响图像以进一步减少噪声。 Combining both approaches, we introduce a hybrid RQUNet-VAE scheme for image and time series decomposition used to reduce noise in satellite imagery.我们提出的定性和定量实验结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们提出的 RQUNet-VAE 在减少卫星图像中的噪声方面更有效。我们还将我们的方案应用于多波段卫星图像的多种应用，包括：图像去噪、通过扩散进行图像和时间序列分解以及图像分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Riesz-Quincunx小波变换与变分自编码器的RQUNet-VAE模型，用于卫星图像去噪及时间序列分解。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net等卷积网络因池化操作导致信息丢失，且缺乏对图像的潜在表示能力，难以有效处理卫星图像的去噪与分解任务。
AI.method: 将高阶Riesz小波与正交Quincunx小波嵌入U-Net架构，并在变换后的特征空间中引入变分方法，通过混合RQUNet-VAE框架实现图像与时间序列的分解及去噪。
AI.result: 实验表明，RQUNet-VAE在卫星图像去噪任务中优于现有方法，并成功应用于多光谱图像去噪、扩散分解及图像分割等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合小波变换与变分自编码器，有效提升了卫星图像处理的性能，为多任务应用提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Riesz-Quincunx小波变换与变分自编码器的RQUNet-VAE模型，用于卫星图像去噪及时间序列分解。
motivation: 传统U-Net等卷积网络因池化操作导致信息丢失，且缺乏对图像的潜在表示能力，难以有效处理卫星图像的去噪与分解任务。
method: 将高阶Riesz小波与正交Quincunx小波嵌入U-Net架构，并在变换后的特征空间中引入变分方法，通过混合RQUNet-VAE框架实现图像与时间序列的分解及去噪。
result: 实验表明，RQUNet-VAE在卫星图像去噪任务中优于现有方法，并成功应用于多光谱图像去噪、扩散分解及图像分割等场景。
conclusion: 该方法通过融合小波变换与变分自编码器，有效提升了卫星图像处理的性能，为多任务应用提供了新思路。
search_text: Riesz-Quincunx-UNet Variational Auto-Encoder for Satellite Image Denoising 用于卫星图像去噪的 Riesz-Quincunx-UNet 变分自动编码器 Multiresolution deep learning approaches, such as the U-Net architecture, have achieved high performance in classifying and segmenting images. However, these approaches do not provide a latent image representation and cannot be used to decompose, denoise, and reconstruct image data. The U-Net and other convolutional neural network (CNNs) architectures commonly use pooling to enlarge the receptive field, which usually results in irreversible information loss. This study proposes to include a Riesz-Quincunx (RQ) wavelet transform, which combines 1) higher-order Riesz wavelet transform and 2) orthogonal Quincunx wavelets (which have both been used to reduce blur in medical images) inside the U-net architecture, to reduce noise in satellite images and their time-series. In the transformed feature space, we propose a variational approach to understand how random perturbations of the features affect the image to further reduce noise. Combining both approaches, we introduce a hybrid RQUNet-VAE scheme for image and time series decomposition used to reduce noise in satellite imagery. We present qualitative and quantitative experimental results that demonstrate that our proposed RQUNet-VAE was more effective at reducing noise in satellite imagery compared to other state-of-the-art methods. We also apply our scheme to several applications for multi-band satellite images, including: image denoising, image and time-series decomposition by diffusion and image segmentation. 多分辨率深度学习方法，例如 U-Net 架构，在图像分类和分割方面取得了高性能。然而，这些方法不提供潜在图像表示，并且不能用于分解、去噪和重建图像数据。 U-Net 和其他卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构通常使用池化来扩大感受野，这通常会导致不可逆的信息丢失。 This study proposes to include a Riesz-Quincunx (RQ) wavelet transform, which combines 1) higher-order Riesz wavelet transform and 2) orthogonal Quincunx wavelets (which have both been used to reduce blur in medical images) inside the U-net architecture, to reduce noise in satellite images and their time-series.在变换后的特征空间中，我们提出了一种变分方法来理解特征的随机扰动如何影响图像以进一步减少噪声。 Combining both approaches, we introduce a hybrid RQUNet-VAE scheme for image and time series decomposition used to reduce noise in satellite imagery.我们提出的定性和定量实验结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们提出的 RQUNet-VAE 在减少卫星图像中的噪声方面更有效。我们还将我们的方案应用于多波段卫星图像的多种应用，包括：图像去噪、通过扩散进行图像和时间序列分解以及图像分割。 本文提出了一种结合Riesz-Quincunx小波变换与变分自编码器的RQUNet-VAE模型，用于卫星图像去噪及时间序列分解。 Duy H. Thai,Xiqi Fei,Minh Tri Le,Andreas Züfle,Konrad Wessels eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Man-Sheng Chen,Tuo Liu,Chang-Dong Wang,Dong Huang,Jian-Huang Lai
title: Adaptively-weighted Integral Space for Fast Multiview Clustering
title_zh: 用于快速多视图聚类的自适应加权积分空间
abstract: Multiview clustering has been extensively studied to take advantage of multi-source information to improve the clustering performance. In general, most of the existing works typically compute an n * n affinity graph by some similarity/distance metrics (e.g. the Euclidean distance) or learned representations, and explore the pairwise correlations across views. But unfortunately, a quadratic or even cubic complexity is often needed, bringing about difficulty in clustering largescale datasets. Some efforts have been made recently to capture data distribution in multiple views by selecting view-wise anchor representations with k-means, or by direct matrix factorization on the original observations. Despite the significant success, few of them have considered the view-insufficiency issue, implicitly holding the assumption that each individual view is sufficient to recover the cluster structure. Moreover, the latent integral space as well as the shared cluster structure from multiple insufficient views is not able to be simultaneously discovered. In view of this, we propose an Adaptively-weighted Integral Space for Fast Multiview Clustering (AIMC) with nearly linear complexity. Specifically, view generation models are designed to reconstruct the view observations from the latent integral space with diverse adaptive contributions. Meanwhile, a centroid representation with orthogonality constraint and cluster partition are seamlessly constructed to approximate the latent integral space. An alternate minimizing algorithm is developed to solve the optimization problem, which is proved to have linear time complexity w.r.t. the sample size. Extensive experiments conducted on several realworld datasets confirm the superiority of the proposed AIMC method compared with the state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AIMC的快速多视图聚类方法，通过自适应加权的积分空间来解决大规模数据集的计算复杂度和视图不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多视图聚类时存在计算复杂度高（二次或三次）且未充分考虑视图不足问题，导致难以有效处理大规模数据集。
AI.method: 设计视图生成模型从潜在积分空间重构视图观测，结合正交约束的中心表示和聚类划分，通过交替最小化算法实现线性时间复杂度的优化。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，AIMC方法在聚类性能上优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: AIMC通过自适应加权积分空间有效解决了多视图聚类中的视图不足和计算效率问题，为大规模数据提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Xuefeng Jiang,Sheng Sun,Yuwei Wang,Min Liu
title: Towards Federated Learning against Noisy Labels via Local Self-Regularization
title_zh: 通过局部自我规范化对抗噪声标签的联合学习
abstract: Federated learning (FL) aims to learn joint knowledge from a large scale of decentralized devices with labeled data in a privacy-preserving manner. However, since high-quality labeled data require expensive human intelligence and efforts, data with incorrect labels (called noisy labels) are ubiquitous in reality, which inevitably cause performance degradation. Although a lot of methods are proposed to directly deal with noisy labels, these methods either require excessive computation overhead or violate the privacy protection principle of FL. To this end, we focus on this issue in FL with the purpose of alleviating performance degradation yielded by noisy labels meanwhile guaranteeing data privacy. Specifically, we propose a Local Self-Regularization method, which effectively regularizes the local training process via implicitly hindering the model from memorizing noisy labels and explicitly narrowing the model output discrepancy between original and augmented instances using self distillation. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve notable resistance against noisy labels in various noise levels on three benchmark datasets. In addition, we integrate our method with existing state-of-the-arts and achieve superior performance on the real-world dataset Clothing1M. The code is available at https://github.com/Sprinter1999/FedLSR.
summary: Federated learning (FL) aims to learn joint knowledge from a large scale of decentralized devices with labeled data in a privacy-preserving manner. However, since high-quality labeled data require expensive human intelligence and efforts, data with incorrect labels (called noisy labels) are ubiquitous in reality, which inevitably cause performance degradation. Although a lot of methods are proposed to directly deal with noisy labels, these methods either require excessive computation overhead or violate the privacy protection principle of FL. To this end, we focus on this issue in FL with the purpose of alleviating performance degradation yielded by noisy labels meanwhile guaranteeing data privacy. Specifically, we propose a Local Self-Regularization method, which effectively regularizes the local training process via implicitly hindering the model from memorizing noisy labels and explicitly narrowing the model output discrepancy between original and augmented instances using self distillation. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve notable resistance against noisy labels in various noise levels on three benchmark datasets. In addition, we integrate our method with existing state-of-the-arts and achieve superior performance on the real-world dataset Clothing1M. The code is available at https://github.com/Sprinter1999/FedLSR.
abstract_zh: Federated learning (FL) aims to learn joint knowledge from a large scale of decentralized devices with labeled data in a privacy-preserving manner. However, since high-quality labeled data require expensive human intelligence and efforts, data with incorrect labels (called noisy labels) are ubiquitous in reality, which inevitably cause performance degradation. Although a lot of methods are proposed to directly deal with noisy labels, these methods either require excessive computation overhead or violate the privacy protection principle of FL. To this end, we focus on this issue in FL with the purpose of alleviating performance degradation yielded by noisy labels meanwhile guaranteeing data privacy. Specifically, we propose a Local Self-Regularization method, which effectively regularizes the local training process via implicitly hindering the model from memorizing noisy labels and explicitly narrowing the model output discrepancy between original and augmented instances using self distillation. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve notable resistance against noisy labels in various noise levels on three benchmark datasets.此外，我们将我们的方法与现有的最先进技术相结合，并在现实数据集 Clothing1M 上实现了卓越的性能。该代码可从 https://github.com/Sprinter1999/FedLSR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种本地自正则化方法，旨在解决联邦学习中噪声标签导致的性能下降问题，同时保障数据隐私。
AI.motivation: 噪声标签在实际场景中普遍存在，但现有去噪方法要么计算开销大，要么违反联邦学习的隐私保护原则，需设计兼顾隐私与鲁棒性的新方案。
AI.method: 通过本地自正则化隐式抑制模型对噪声标签的记忆，并利用自蒸馏显式缩小原始样本与增强样本的输出差异，实现对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证了方法对多种噪声水平的有效性，并与现有方法结合后在Clothing1M数据集上取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了联邦学习中的噪声标签问题，兼具隐私保护与计算效率，具有实际应用价值。

Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve notable resistance against noisy labels in various noise levels on three benchmark datasets.此外，我们将我们的方法与现有的最先进技术相结合，并在现实数据集 Clothing1M 上实现了卓越的性能。该代码可从 https://github.com/Sprinter1999/FedLSR 获取。 本文提出一种本地自正则化方法，旨在解决联邦学习中噪声标签导致的性能下降问题，同时保障数据隐私。 Xuefeng Jiang,Sheng Sun,Yuwei Wang,Min Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Florian Jüngermann,Jan Křetínský,Maximilian Weininger
title: Algebraically Explainable Controllers: Decision Trees and Support Vector Machines Join Forces
title_zh: 代数可解释的控制器：决策树和支持向量机联手
abstract: Recently, decision trees (DT) have been used as an explainable representation of controllers (a.k.a. strategies, policies, schedulers). Although they are often very efficient and produce small and understandable controllers for discrete systems, complex continuous dynamics still pose a challenge. In particular, when the relationships between variables take more complex forms, such as polynomials, they cannot be obtained using the available DT learning procedures. In contrast, support vector machines provide a more powerful representation, capable of discovering many such relationships, but not in an explainable form. Therefore, we suggest to combine the two frameworks in order to obtain an understandable representation over richer, domain-relevant algebraic predicates. We demonstrate and evaluate the proposed method experimentally on established benchmarks.
summary: Recently, decision trees (DT) have been used as an explainable representation of controllers (a.k.a. strategies, policies, schedulers). Although they are often very efficient and produce small and understandable controllers for discrete systems, complex continuous dynamics still pose a challenge. In particular, when the relationships between variables take more complex forms, such as polynomials, they cannot be obtained using the available DT learning procedures. In contrast, support vector machines provide a more powerful representation, capable of discovering many such relationships, but not in an explainable form. Therefore, we suggest to combine the two frameworks in order to obtain an understandable representation over richer, domain-relevant algebraic predicates. We demonstrate and evaluate the proposed method experimentally on established benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 最近，决策树（DT）已被用作控制器（又名策略、策略、调度程序）的可解释表示。 Although they are often very efficient and produce small and understandable controllers for discrete systems, complex continuous dynamics still pose a challenge. In particular, when the relationships between variables take more complex forms, such as polynomials, they cannot be obtained using the available DT learning procedures. In contrast, support vector machines provide a more powerful representation, capable of discovering many such relationships, but not in an explainable form. Therefore, we suggest to combine the two frameworks in order to obtain an understandable representation over richer, domain-relevant algebraic predicates.我们在既定基准上通过实验证明和评估所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将决策树和支持向量机结合，生成适用于复杂连续动态系统的可解释控制器。
AI.motivation: 决策树在处理离散系统时效率高且可解释，但难以应对复杂连续动态；支持向量机虽能处理复杂关系但缺乏可解释性，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 通过结合决策树的可解释结构与支持向量机的复杂关系建模能力，构建基于代数谓词的混合控制器框架。
AI.result: 在基准测试中验证了该方法能有效处理多项式等复杂关系，同时保持控制器的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 融合决策树与支持向量机可生成兼顾复杂动态建模与可解释性的控制器，适用于需要透明决策的领域。

authors_text: Jiachen Li,Vidit Goel,Marianna Ohanyan,Shant Navasardyan,Yunchao Wei,Humphrey Shi
title: VMFormer: End-to-End Video Matting with Transformer
title_zh: VMFormer：使用 Transformer 进行端到端视频剪辑
abstract: Video matting aims to predict the alpha mattes for each frame from a given input video sequence. Recent solutions to video matting have been dominated by deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) for the past few years, which have become the de-facto standard for both academia and industry. However, they have inbuilt inductive bias of locality and do not capture global characteristics of an image due to the CNN-based architectures. They also lack long-range temporal modeling considering computational costs when dealing with feature maps of multiple frames. In this paper, we propose VMFormer: a transformer-based end-to-end method for video matting. It makes predictions on alpha mattes of each frame from learnable queries given a video input sequence. Specifically, it leverages self-attention layers to build global integration of feature sequences with short-range temporal modeling on successive frames. We further apply queries to learn global representations through cross-attention in the transformer decoder with long-range temporal modeling upon all queries. In the prediction stage, both queries and corresponding feature maps are used to make the final prediction of alpha matte. Experiments show that VMFormer outperforms previous CNN-based video matting methods on the composited benchmarks. To our best knowledge, it is the first end-to-end video matting solution built upon a full vision transformer with predictions on the learnable queries. The project is open-sourced at https://chrisjuniorli.github.io/project/VMFormer/
summary: Video matting aims to predict the alpha mattes for each frame from a given input video sequence. Recent solutions to video matting have been dominated by deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) for the past few years, which have become the de-facto standard for both academia and industry. However, they have inbuilt inductive bias of locality and do not capture global characteristics of an image due to the CNN-based architectures. They also lack long-range temporal modeling considering computational costs when dealing with feature maps of multiple frames. In this paper, we propose VMFormer: a transformer-based end-to-end method for video matting. It makes predictions on alpha mattes of each frame from learnable queries given a video input sequence. Specifically, it leverages self-attention layers to build global integration of feature sequences with short-range temporal modeling on successive frames. We further apply queries to learn global representations through cross-attention in the transformer decoder with long-range temporal modeling upon all queries. In the prediction stage, both queries and corresponding feature maps are used to make the final prediction of alpha matte. Experiments show that VMFormer outperforms previous CNN-based video matting methods on the composited benchmarks. To our best knowledge, it is the first end-to-end video matting solution built upon a full vision transformer with predictions on the learnable queries. The project is open-sourced at https://chrisjuniorli.github.io/project/VMFormer/
abstract_zh: 视频抠图旨在预测给定输入视频序列中每一帧的 alpha 遮罩。过去几年，视频抠图的解决方案一直以深度卷积神经网络（CNN）为主，它已成为学术界和工业界事实上的标准。然而，由于基于 CNN 的架构，它们具有内置的局部归纳偏差，并且无法捕获图像的全局特征。考虑到处理多个帧的特征图时的计算成本，它们还缺乏远程时间建模。在本文中，我们提出了 VMFormer：一种基于 Transformer 的视频抠图端到端方法。它根据给定视频输入序列的可学习查询对每帧的 alpha 遮罩进行预测。具体来说，它利用自注意力层来构建特征序列的全局集成，并在连续帧上进行短程时间建模。我们进一步应用查询来通过变压器解码器中的交叉注意力来学习全局表示，并对所有查询进行远程时间建模。在预测阶段，查询和相应的特征图都用于进行 alpha matte 的最终预测。实验表明，VMFormer 在综合基准测试中优于之前基于 CNN 的视频抠图方法。据我们所知，这是第一个基于完整视觉转换器构建的端到端视频抠图解决方案，并可对可学习查询进行预测。该项目是开源的 https://chrisjuniorli.github.io/project/VMFormer/

AI.tldr: 本文提出VMFormer，一种基于Transformer的端到端视频抠图方法，用于从视频序列中预测每帧的alpha matte。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法在视频抠图中存在局部归纳偏置，无法有效捕捉图像全局特征和长距离时序信息，且计算成本高。
AI.method: 通过自注意力层实现特征序列的全局整合，并在Transformer解码器中利用跨注意力机制学习全局表示，结合可学习查询和多帧特征图进行alpha matte预测。
AI.result: 在合成基准测试中优于现有CNN方法，是首个基于完整视觉Transformer的端到端视频抠图方案。
AI.conclusion: VMFormer通过Transformer结构有效解决了视频抠图中的全局特征建模与长时序依赖问题，验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Ximing Qiao,Hai Li
title: Learning and Compositionality: a Unification Attempt via Connectionist Probabilistic Programming
title_zh: 学习和组合性：通过联结概率编程的统一尝试
abstract: We consider learning and compositionality as the key mechanisms towards simulating human-like intelligence. While each mechanism is successfully achieved by neural networks and symbolic AIs, respectively, it is the combination of the two mechanisms that makes human-like intelligence possible. Despite the numerous attempts on building hybrid neuralsymbolic systems, we argue that our true goal should be unifying learning and compositionality, the core mechanisms, instead of neural and symbolic methods, the surface approaches to achieve them. In this work, we review and analyze the strengths and weaknesses of neural and symbolic methods by separating their forms and meanings (structures and semantics), and propose Connectionist Probabilistic Program (CPPs), a framework that connects connectionist structures (for learning) and probabilistic program semantics (for compositionality). Under the framework, we design a CPP extension for small scale sequence modeling and provide a learning algorithm based on Bayesian inference. Although challenges exist in learning complex patterns without supervision, our early results demonstrate CPP's successful extraction of concepts and relations from raw sequential data, an initial step towards compositional learning.
summary: We consider learning and compositionality as the key mechanisms towards simulating human-like intelligence. While each mechanism is successfully achieved by neural networks and symbolic AIs, respectively, it is the combination of the two mechanisms that makes human-like intelligence possible. Despite the numerous attempts on building hybrid neuralsymbolic systems, we argue that our true goal should be unifying learning and compositionality, the core mechanisms, instead of neural and symbolic methods, the surface approaches to achieve them. In this work, we review and analyze the strengths and weaknesses of neural and symbolic methods by separating their forms and meanings (structures and semantics), and propose Connectionist Probabilistic Program (CPPs), a framework that connects connectionist structures (for learning) and probabilistic program semantics (for compositionality). Under the framework, we design a CPP extension for small scale sequence modeling and provide a learning algorithm based on Bayesian inference. Although challenges exist in learning complex patterns without supervision, our early results demonstrate CPP's successful extraction of concepts and relations from raw sequential data, an initial step towards compositional learning.
abstract_zh: 我们认为学习和组合性是模拟类人智能的关键机制。虽然每种机制分别通过神经网络和符号人工智能成功实现，但正是这两种机制的结合才使得类人智能成为可能。尽管在构建混合神经符号系统方面进行了大量尝试，但我们认为我们真正的目标应该是统一学习和组合性（核心机制），而不是神经和符号方法（实现它们的表面方法）。在这项工作中，我们通过分离形式和意义（结构和语义）来回顾和分析神经方法和符号方法的优点和缺点，并提出连接主义概率程序（CPP），一个连接连接主义结构（用于学习）和概率程序语义（用于组合性）的框架。在此框架下，我们设计了用于小规模序列建模的CPP扩展，并提供了基于贝叶斯推理的学习算法。尽管在没有监督的情况下学习复杂模式存在挑战，但我们的早期结果表明 CPP 成功地从原始序列数据中提取概念和关系，这是迈向组合学习的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文尝试通过提出连接主义概率编程框架（CPPs）统一学习与组合性，以实现类人智能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络与符号AI分别实现学习与组合性，但混合系统未真正统一核心机制，需从结构与语义层面重新整合。
AI.method: 提出CPPs框架结合连接主义结构（学习）与概率程序语义（组合性），设计基于贝叶斯推理的小规模序列建模扩展。
AI.result: 初步实验显示CPPs可成功从原始序列数据中提取概念与关系，验证了框架在组合学习中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CPPs为统一学习与组合性提供了可行路径，尽管复杂模式无监督学习仍具挑战，但为类人智能模拟奠定基础。

search_text: Learning and Compositionality: a Unification Attempt via Connectionist Probabilistic Programming 学习和组合性：通过联结概率编程的统一尝试 We consider learning and compositionality as the key mechanisms towards simulating human-like intelligence. While each mechanism is successfully achieved by neural networks and symbolic AIs, respectively, it is the combination of the two mechanisms that makes human-like intelligence possible. Despite the numerous attempts on building hybrid neuralsymbolic systems, we argue that our true goal should be unifying learning and compositionality, the core mechanisms, instead of neural and symbolic methods, the surface approaches to achieve them. In this work, we review and analyze the strengths and weaknesses of neural and symbolic methods by separating their forms and meanings (structures and semantics), and propose Connectionist Probabilistic Program (CPPs), a framework that connects connectionist structures (for learning) and probabilistic program semantics (for compositionality). Under the framework, we design a CPP extension for small scale sequence modeling and provide a learning algorithm based on Bayesian inference. Although challenges exist in learning complex patterns without supervision, our early results demonstrate CPP's successful extraction of concepts and relations from raw sequential data, an initial step towards compositional learning. 我们认为学习和组合性是模拟类人智能的关键机制。虽然每种机制分别通过神经网络和符号人工智能成功实现，但正是这两种机制的结合才使得类人智能成为可能。尽管在构建混合神经符号系统方面进行了大量尝试，但我们认为我们真正的目标应该是统一学习和组合性（核心机制），而不是神经和符号方法（实现它们的表面方法）。在这项工作中，我们通过分离形式和意义（结构和语义）来回顾和分析神经方法和符号方法的优点和缺点，并提出连接主义概率程序（CPP），一个连接连接主义结构（用于学习）和概率程序语义（用于组合性）的框架。在此框架下，我们设计了用于小规模序列建模的CPP扩展，并提供了基于贝叶斯推理的学习算法。尽管在没有监督的情况下学习复杂模式存在挑战，但我们的早期结果表明 CPP 成功地从原始序列数据中提取概念和关系，这是迈向组合学习的第一步。 本文尝试通过提出连接主义概率编程框架（CPPs）统一学习与组合性，以实现类人智能。 Ximing Qiao,Hai Li cs.AI

authors_text: Carmen Mazijn,Carina Prunkl,Andres Algaba,Jan Danckaert,Vincent Ginis
title: LUCID: Exposing Algorithmic Bias through Inverse Design
title_zh: LUCID：通过逆向设计揭示算法偏差
abstract: AI systems can create, propagate, support, and automate bias in decision-making processes. To mitigate biased decisions, we both need to understand the origin of the bias and define what it means for an algorithm to make fair decisions. Most group fairness notions assess a model's equality of outcome by computing statistical metrics on the outputs. We argue that these output metrics encounter intrinsic obstacles and present a complementary approach that aligns with the increasing focus on equality of treatment. By Locating Unfairness through Canonical Inverse Design (LUCID), we generate a canonical set that shows the desired inputs for a model given a preferred output. The canonical set reveals the model's internal logic and exposes potential unethical biases by repeatedly interrogating the decision-making process. We evaluate LUCID on the UCI Adult and COMPAS data sets and find that some biases detected by a canonical set differ from those of output metrics. The results show that by shifting the focus towards equality of treatment and looking into the algorithm's internal workings, the canonical sets are a valuable addition to the toolbox of algorithmic fairness evaluation.
summary: AI systems can create, propagate, support, and automate bias in decision-making processes. To mitigate biased decisions, we both need to understand the origin of the bias and define what it means for an algorithm to make fair decisions. Most group fairness notions assess a model's equality of outcome by computing statistical metrics on the outputs. We argue that these output metrics encounter intrinsic obstacles and present a complementary approach that aligns with the increasing focus on equality of treatment. By Locating Unfairness through Canonical Inverse Design (LUCID), we generate a canonical set that shows the desired inputs for a model given a preferred output. The canonical set reveals the model's internal logic and exposes potential unethical biases by repeatedly interrogating the decision-making process. We evaluate LUCID on the UCI Adult and COMPAS data sets and find that some biases detected by a canonical set differ from those of output metrics. The results show that by shifting the focus towards equality of treatment and looking into the algorithm's internal workings, the canonical sets are a valuable addition to the toolbox of algorithmic fairness evaluation.
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统可以在决策过程中创建、传播、支持和自动化偏见。为了减轻决策偏差，我们都需要了解偏差的根源，并定义算法做出公平决策的含义。大多数群体公平概念通过计算输出的统计指标来评估模型结果的平等性。我们认为，这些产出指标遇到了内在的障碍，并提出了一种补充方法，与对待遇平等的日益关注相一致。通过通过规范逆向设计 (LUCID) 定位不公平性，我们生成了一个规范集，该集显示给定首选输出的模型的所需输入。规范集揭示了模型的内部逻辑，并通过反复询问决策过程来暴露潜在的不道德偏见。我们在 UCI Adult 和 COMPAS 数据集上评估 LUCID，发现规范集检测到的一些偏差与输出指标的偏差不同。结果表明，通过将焦点转向平等对待并研究算法的内部工作原理，规范集是对算法公平性评估工具箱的宝贵补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LUCID方法，通过逆向设计揭示算法决策中的潜在偏见，作为现有输出指标的补充。
AI.motivation: 现有群体公平性评估方法仅关注结果平等性，难以揭示算法内部逻辑中的偏见，需转向处理平等性分析。
AI.method: 通过生成规范输入集（canonical set），逆向推导模型应接受的输入以实现理想输出，从而暴露内部决策逻辑中的偏见。
AI.result: 在UCI Adult和COMPAS数据集上验证，发现规范集检测到的偏见与传统输出指标存在差异，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 规范集通过关注算法内部处理机制，为公平性评估提供了更全面的工具，应与输出指标结合使用。

authors_text: Bruno Di Giorgi,Mark Levy,Richard Sharp
title: Mel Spectrogram Inversion with Stable Pitch
title_zh: 稳定音高的梅尔谱图反演
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, Proceedings of the 23st International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference, ISMIR 2022
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, Proceedings of the 23st International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference, ISMIR 2022
abstract: Vocoders are models capable of transforming a low-dimensional spectral representation of an audio signal, typically the mel spectrogram, to a waveform. Modern speech generation pipelines use a vocoder as their final component. Recent vocoder models developed for speech achieve a high degree of realism, such that it is natural to wonder how they would perform on music signals. Compared to speech, the heterogeneity and structure of the musical sound texture offers new challenges. In this work we focus on one specific artifact that some vocoder models designed for speech tend to exhibit when applied to music: the perceived instability of pitch when synthesizing sustained notes. We argue that the characteristic sound of this artifact is due to the lack of horizontal phase coherence, which is often the result of using a time-domain target space with a model that is invariant to time-shifts, such as a convolutional neural network. We propose a new vocoder model that is specifically designed for music. Key to improving the pitch stability is the choice of a shift-invariant target space that consists of the magnitude spectrum and the phase gradient. We discuss the reasons that inspired us to re-formulate the vocoder task, outline a working example, and evaluate it on musical signals. Our method results in 60% and 10% improved reconstruction of sustained notes and chords with respect to existing models, using a novel harmonic error metric.
summary: Vocoders are models capable of transforming a low-dimensional spectral representation of an audio signal, typically the mel spectrogram, to a waveform. Modern speech generation pipelines use a vocoder as their final component. Recent vocoder models developed for speech achieve a high degree of realism, such that it is natural to wonder how they would perform on music signals. Compared to speech, the heterogeneity and structure of the musical sound texture offers new challenges. In this work we focus on one specific artifact that some vocoder models designed for speech tend to exhibit when applied to music: the perceived instability of pitch when synthesizing sustained notes. We argue that the characteristic sound of this artifact is due to the lack of horizontal phase coherence, which is often the result of using a time-domain target space with a model that is invariant to time-shifts, such as a convolutional neural network. We propose a new vocoder model that is specifically designed for music. Key to improving the pitch stability is the choice of a shift-invariant target space that consists of the magnitude spectrum and the phase gradient. We discuss the reasons that inspired us to re-formulate the vocoder task, outline a working example, and evaluate it on musical signals. Our method results in 60% and 10% improved reconstruction of sustained notes and chords with respect to existing models, using a novel harmonic error metric.
abstract_zh: 声码器是能够将音频信号的低维频谱表示（通常是梅尔频谱图）转换为波形的模型。现代语音生成管道使用声码器作为其最终组件。最近为语音开发的声码器模型实现了高度的真实感，因此很自然地想知道它们在音乐信号上的表现如何。与语音相比，音乐声音纹理的异质性和结构提出了新的挑战。在这项工作中，我们重点关注一些为语音设计的声码器模型在应用于音乐时往往会表现出的一个特定工件：合成持续音符时感知到的音调不稳定。我们认为，这种伪影的特征声音是由于缺乏水平相位相干性造成的，这通常是使用具有时移不变模型（例如卷积神经网络）的时域目标空间的结果。我们提出了一种专为音乐设计的新声码器模型。提高俯仰稳定性的关键是选择由幅度谱和相位梯度组成的平移不变目标空间。我们讨论了启发我们重新制定声码器任务的原因，概述了一个工作示例，并根据音乐信号对其进行了评估。与现有模型相比，我们的方法使用一种新颖的和声误差度量，将持续音符和和弦的重建提高了 60% 和 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种专门用于音乐的声码器模型，以解决现有语音声码器在音乐信号处理中出现的音高不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音声码器在处理音乐信号时，由于时间移位不变性模型和时域目标空间的选择，导致合成持续音符时音高不稳定，影响音乐信号的自然度。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的声码器模型，采用幅度谱和相位梯度构成的移位不变目标空间，以提高音高稳定性。
AI.result: 在音乐信号上，该方法相比现有模型，持续音符和和弦的重建效果分别提高了60%和10%。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新定义声码器任务并选择合适的目标空间，本文提出的模型有效解决了音乐信号合成中的音高不稳定问题。

Our method results in 60% and 10% improved reconstruction of sustained notes and chords with respect to existing models, using a novel harmonic error metric. 声码器是能够将音频信号的低维频谱表示（通常是梅尔频谱图）转换为波形的模型。现代语音生成管道使用声码器作为其最终组件。最近为语音开发的声码器模型实现了高度的真实感，因此很自然地想知道它们在音乐信号上的表现如何。与语音相比，音乐声音纹理的异质性和结构提出了新的挑战。在这项工作中，我们重点关注一些为语音设计的声码器模型在应用于音乐时往往会表现出的一个特定工件：合成持续音符时感知到的音调不稳定。我们认为，这种伪影的特征声音是由于缺乏水平相位相干性造成的，这通常是使用具有时移不变模型（例如卷积神经网络）的时域目标空间的结果。我们提出了一种专为音乐设计的新声码器模型。提高俯仰稳定性的关键是选择由幅度谱和相位梯度组成的平移不变目标空间。我们讨论了启发我们重新制定声码器任务的原因，概述了一个工作示例，并根据音乐信号对其进行了评估。与现有模型相比，我们的方法使用一种新颖的和声误差度量，将持续音符和和弦的重建提高了 60% 和 10%。 本文提出了一种专门用于音乐的声码器模型，以解决现有语音声码器在音乐信号处理中出现的音高不稳定问题。 Bruno Di Giorgi,Mark Levy,Richard Sharp cs.SD,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Zecheng Liu,Jia Wei,Rui Li
title: Learning Multi-Modal Brain Tumor Segmentation from Privileged Semi-Paired MRI Images with Curriculum Disentanglement Learning
title_zh: 通过课程解开学习从特权半配对 MRI 图像中学习多模式脑肿瘤分割
abstract: Due to the difficulties of obtaining multimodal paired images in clinical practice, recent studies propose to train brain tumor segmentation models with unpaired images and capture complementary information through modality translation. However, these models cannot fully exploit the complementary information from different modalities. In this work, we thus present a novel two-step (intra-modality and inter-modality) curriculum disentanglement learning framework to effectively utilize privileged semi-paired images, i.e. limited paired images that are only available in training, for brain tumor segmentation. Specifically, in the first step, we propose to conduct reconstruction and segmentation with augmented intra-modality style-consistent images. In the second step, the model jointly performs reconstruction, unsupervised/supervised translation, and segmentation for both unpaired and paired inter-modality images. A content consistency loss and a supervised translation loss are proposed to leverage complementary information from different modalities in this step. Through these two steps, our method effectively extracts modality-specific style codes describing the attenuation of tissue features and image contrast, and modality-invariant content codes containing anatomical and functional information from the input images. Experiments on three brain tumor segmentation tasks show that our model outperforms competing segmentation models based on unpaired images.
summary: Due to the difficulties of obtaining multimodal paired images in clinical practice, recent studies propose to train brain tumor segmentation models with unpaired images and capture complementary information through modality translation. However, these models cannot fully exploit the complementary information from different modalities. In this work, we thus present a novel two-step (intra-modality and inter-modality) curriculum disentanglement learning framework to effectively utilize privileged semi-paired images, i.e. limited paired images that are only available in training, for brain tumor segmentation. Specifically, in the first step, we propose to conduct reconstruction and segmentation with augmented intra-modality style-consistent images. In the second step, the model jointly performs reconstruction, unsupervised/supervised translation, and segmentation for both unpaired and paired inter-modality images. A content consistency loss and a supervised translation loss are proposed to leverage complementary information from different modalities in this step. Through these two steps, our method effectively extracts modality-specific style codes describing the attenuation of tissue features and image contrast, and modality-invariant content codes containing anatomical and functional information from the input images. Experiments on three brain tumor segmentation tasks show that our model outperforms competing segmentation models based on unpaired images.
abstract_zh: 由于在临床实践中获得多模态配对图像的困难，最近的研究提出用不配对图像训练脑肿瘤分割模型，并通过模态转换捕获互补信息。然而，这些模型无法充分利用不同模式的互补信息。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的两步（模态内和模态间）课程解缠学习框架，以有效利用特权半配对图像，即仅在训练中可用的有限配对图像，用于脑肿瘤分割。具体来说，在第一步中，我们建议使用增强的模态内风格一致的图像进行重建和分割。在第二步中，模型对未配对和配对的模态间图像联合执行重建、无监督/监督翻译和分割。在此步骤中，提出了内容一致性损失和监督翻译损失，以利用来自不同模式的补充信息。通过这两个步骤，我们的方法有效地从输入图像中提取描述组织特征和图像对比度衰减的模态特定样式代码，以及包含解剖和功能信息的模态不变内容代码。对三个脑肿瘤分割任务的实验表明，我们的模型优于基于不配对图像的竞争分割模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半配对MRI图像的课程解耦学习框架，用于多模态脑肿瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中多模态配对图像难以获取，现有方法无法充分挖掘不同模态的互补信息。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段通过风格一致的单模态增强图像进行重建与分割；第二阶段联合重建、有监督/无监督翻译和分割，引入内容一致性损失与监督翻译损失。
AI.result: 在三个脑肿瘤分割任务中，该模型优于基于未配对图像的竞争分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过半配对图像有效提取模态特异性风格码和不变内容码，提升分割性能。

authors_text: Cephas Samende,Zhong Fan,Jun Cao
title: Battery and Hydrogen Energy Storage Control in a Smart Energy Network with Flexible Energy Demand using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习实现具有灵活能源需求的智能能源网络中的电池和氢能存储控制
abstract: Smart energy networks provide for an effective means to accommodate high penetrations of variable renewable energy sources like solar and wind, which are key for deep decarbonisation of energy production. However, given the variability of the renewables as well as the energy demand, it is imperative to develop effective control and energy storage schemes to manage the variable energy generation and achieve desired system economics and environmental goals. In this paper, we introduce a hybrid energy storage system composed of battery and hydrogen energy storage to handle the uncertainties related to electricity prices, renewable energy production and consumption. We aim to improve renewable energy utilisation and minimise energy costs and carbon emissions while ensuring energy reliability and stability within the network. To achieve this, we propose a multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient approach, which is a deep reinforcement learning-based control strategy to optimise the scheduling of the hybrid energy storage system and energy demand in real-time. The proposed approach is model-free and does not require explicit knowledge and rigorous mathematical models of the smart energy network environment. Simulation results based on real-world data show that: (i) integration and optimised operation of the hybrid energy storage system and energy demand reduces carbon emissions by 78.69%, improves cost savings by 23.5% and renewable energy utilisation by over 13.2% compared to other baseline models and (ii) the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art self-learning algorithms like deep-Q network.
summary: Smart energy networks provide for an effective means to accommodate high penetrations of variable renewable energy sources like solar and wind, which are key for deep decarbonisation of energy production. However, given the variability of the renewables as well as the energy demand, it is imperative to develop effective control and energy storage schemes to manage the variable energy generation and achieve desired system economics and environmental goals. In this paper, we introduce a hybrid energy storage system composed of battery and hydrogen energy storage to handle the uncertainties related to electricity prices, renewable energy production and consumption. We aim to improve renewable energy utilisation and minimise energy costs and carbon emissions while ensuring energy reliability and stability within the network. To achieve this, we propose a multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient approach, which is a deep reinforcement learning-based control strategy to optimise the scheduling of the hybrid energy storage system and energy demand in real-time. The proposed approach is model-free and does not require explicit knowledge and rigorous mathematical models of the smart energy network environment. Simulation results based on real-world data show that: (i) integration and optimised operation of the hybrid energy storage system and energy demand reduces carbon emissions by 78.69%, improves cost savings by 23.5% and renewable energy utilisation by over 13.2% compared to other baseline models and (ii) the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art self-learning algorithms like deep-Q network.
abstract_zh: 智能能源网络提供了一种有效的手段来适应太阳能和风能等可变可再生能源的高渗透率，这是能源生产深度脱碳的关键。然而，考虑到可再生能源和能源需求的可变性，必须开发有效的控制和储能方案来管理可变的能源发电并实现所需的系统经济和环境目标。在本文中，我们介绍了一种由电池和氢能存储组成的混合储能系统，以应对与电价、可再生能源生产和消费相关的不确定性。我们的目标是提高可再生能源的利用率，最大限度地减少能源成本和碳排放，同时确保网络内能源的可靠性和稳定性。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种多智能体深度确定性策略梯度方法，这是一种基于深度强化学习的控制策略，用于实时优化混合储能系统的调度和能源需求。所提出的方法是无模型的，不需要智能能源网络环境的明确知识和严格的数学模型。基于真实数据的仿真结果表明：（i）混合储能系统与能源需求的集成和优化运行，与其他基线模型相比，碳排放减少了78.69%，成本节省了23.5%，可再生能源利用率提高了13.2%以上；（ii）所提出的算法优于深度Q网络等最先进的自学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的多智能体控制策略，用于优化智能能源网络中电池与氢能存储系统的协同调度及灵活需求响应。
AI.motivation: 可再生能源波动性与能源需求不确定性要求开发高效储能与控制方案，以提升可再生能源利用率、降低碳排放与能源成本，同时保障系统稳定性。
AI.method: 采用模型无关的多智能体深度确定性策略梯度算法（MADDPG），无需精确环境模型，通过实时优化混合储能系统调度与需求侧管理实现目标。
AI.result: 相比基准模型，碳排放减少78.69%，成本降低23.5%，可再生能源利用率提升13.2%，且优于深度Q网络等先进自学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了智能能源网络中多源不确定性问题，在环境效益与经济性方面显著优于现有技术，为高比例可再生能源系统提供可行控制框架。

authors_text: Ashutosh Timilsina,Simone Silvestri
title: Prospect Theory-inspired Automated P2P Energy Trading with Q-learning-based Dynamic Pricing
title_zh: 前景理论启发的自动 P2P 能源交易与基于 Q 学习的动态定价
abstract: The widespread adoption of distributed energy resources, and the advent of smart grid technologies, have allowed traditionally passive power system users to become actively involved in energy trading. Recognizing the fact that the traditional centralized grid-driven energy markets offer minimal profitability to these users, recent research has shifted focus towards decentralized peer-to-peer (P2P) energy markets. In these markets, users trade energy with each other, with higher benefits than buying or selling to the grid. However, most researches in P2P energy trading largely overlook the user perception in the trading process, assuming constant availability, participation, and full compliance. As a result, these approaches may result in negative attitudes and reduced engagement over time. In this paper, we design an automated P2P energy market that takes user perception into account. We employ prospect theory to model the user perception and formulate an optimization framework to maximize the buyer's perception while matching demand and production. Given the non-linear and non-convex nature of the optimization problem, we propose Differential Evolution-based Algorithm for Trading Energy called DEbATE. Additionally, we introduce a risk-sensitive Q-learning algorithm, named Pricing mechanism with Q-learning and Risk-sensitivity (PQR), which learns the optimal price for sellers considering their perceived utility. Results based on real traces of energy consumption and production, as well as realistic prospect theory functions, show that our approach achieves a 26% higher perceived value for buyers and generates 7% more reward for sellers, compared to a recent state of the art approach.
summary: The widespread adoption of distributed energy resources, and the advent of smart grid technologies, have allowed traditionally passive power system users to become actively involved in energy trading. Recognizing the fact that the traditional centralized grid-driven energy markets offer minimal profitability to these users, recent research has shifted focus towards decentralized peer-to-peer (P2P) energy markets. In these markets, users trade energy with each other, with higher benefits than buying or selling to the grid. However, most researches in P2P energy trading largely overlook the user perception in the trading process, assuming constant availability, participation, and full compliance. As a result, these approaches may result in negative attitudes and reduced engagement over time. In this paper, we design an automated P2P energy market that takes user perception into account. We employ prospect theory to model the user perception and formulate an optimization framework to maximize the buyer's perception while matching demand and production. Given the non-linear and non-convex nature of the optimization problem, we propose Differential Evolution-based Algorithm for Trading Energy called DEbATE. Additionally, we introduce a risk-sensitive Q-learning algorithm, named Pricing mechanism with Q-learning and Risk-sensitivity (PQR), which learns the optimal price for sellers considering their perceived utility. Results based on real traces of energy consumption and production, as well as realistic prospect theory functions, show that our approach achieves a 26% higher perceived value for buyers and generates 7% more reward for sellers, compared to a recent state of the art approach.
abstract_zh: 分布式能源的广泛采用以及智能电网技术的出现，使得传统的无源电力系统用户积极参与能源交易。认识到传统的集中式电网驱动的能源市场为这些用户提供的利润微乎其微，最近的研究已将重点转向分散的点对点（P2P）能源市场。在这些市场中，用户相互交易能源，其收益高于向电网购买或出售能源。然而，大多数对P2P能源交易的研究在很大程度上忽视了交易过程中的用户感知，假设持续的可用性、参与性和完全合规性。因此，随着时间的推移，这些方法可能会导致消极态度和参与度降低。在本文中，我们设计了一个考虑用户感知的自动化 P2P 能源市场。我们采用前景理论对用户感知进行建模，并制定优化框架，以在匹配需求和生产的同时最大化买家的感知。鉴于优化问题的非线性和非凸性质，我们提出了基于差分进化的能源交易算法 DEbATE。此外，我们引入了一种风险敏感的 Q 学习算法，称为具有 Q 学习和风险敏感性的定价机制（PQR），该算法根据卖家的感知效用来学习卖家的最佳价格。基于能源消耗和生产的真实痕迹以及现实前景理论函数的结果表明，与最近最先进的方法相比，我们的方法为买家带来了 26% 的感知价值高出 26%，为卖家带来了 7% 的回报。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于前景理论和Q学习动态定价的自动化P2P能源交易市场，以提升用户感知价值和交易效率。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式能源市场对用户利润有限，现有P2P研究忽视用户感知，导致参与度下降，需考虑用户行为特征优化交易机制。
AI.method: 结合前景理论建模用户感知，构建优化框架并提出基于差分进化的DEbATE算法；引入风险敏感的Q学习算法PQR动态定价，平衡买卖双方利益。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，买家感知价值提升26%，卖家收益增加7%，验证了模型在真实能耗数据下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合行为经济学理论与强化学习，提出的框架显著提升了P2P能源交易的用户满意度与市场效率，为未来能源系统设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Zecheng Liu,Jia Wei,Rui Li,Jianlong Zhou
title: SFusion: Self-attention based N-to-One Multimodal Fusion Block
title_zh: SFusion：基于自注意力的 N 对一多模态融合块
comment: This paper has been accepted by MICCAI 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted by MICCAI 2023
abstract: People perceive the world with different senses, such as sight, hearing, smell, and touch. Processing and fusing information from multiple modalities enables Artificial Intelligence to understand the world around us more easily. However, when there are missing modalities, the number of available modalities is different in diverse situations, which leads to an N-to-One fusion problem. To solve this problem, we propose a self-attention based fusion block called SFusion. Different from preset formulations or convolution based methods, the proposed block automatically learns to fuse available modalities without synthesizing or zero-padding missing ones. Specifically, the feature representations extracted from upstream processing model are projected as tokens and fed into self-attention module to generate latent multimodal correlations. Then, a modal attention mechanism is introduced to build a shared representation, which can be applied by the downstream decision model. The proposed SFusion can be easily integrated into existing multimodal analysis networks. In this work, we apply SFusion to different backbone networks for human activity recognition and brain tumor segmentation tasks. Extensive experimental results show that the SFusion block achieves better performance than the competing fusion strategies. Our code is available at https://github.com/scut-cszcl/SFusion.
summary: People perceive the world with different senses, such as sight, hearing, smell, and touch. Processing and fusing information from multiple modalities enables Artificial Intelligence to understand the world around us more easily. However, when there are missing modalities, the number of available modalities is different in diverse situations, which leads to an N-to-One fusion problem. To solve this problem, we propose a self-attention based fusion block called SFusion. Different from preset formulations or convolution based methods, the proposed block automatically learns to fuse available modalities without synthesizing or zero-padding missing ones. Specifically, the feature representations extracted from upstream processing model are projected as tokens and fed into self-attention module to generate latent multimodal correlations. Then, a modal attention mechanism is introduced to build a shared representation, which can be applied by the downstream decision model. The proposed SFusion can be easily integrated into existing multimodal analysis networks. In this work, we apply SFusion to different backbone networks for human activity recognition and brain tumor segmentation tasks. Extensive experimental results show that the SFusion block achieves better performance than the competing fusion strategies. Our code is available at https://github.com/scut-cszcl/SFusion.
abstract_zh: 人们通过视觉、听觉、嗅觉、触觉等不同的感官来感知世界。处理和融合来自多种模式的信息使人工智能能够更轻松地了解我们周围的世界。然而，当缺少模态时，可用模态的数量在不同情况下是不同的，这会导致 N 对一融合问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于自注意力的融合块，称为 SFusion。与预设公式或基于卷积的方法不同，所提出的块自动学习融合可用的模态，而无需合成或零填充缺失的模态。具体来说，从上游处理模型提取的特征表示被投影为标记并输入到自注意力模块中以生成潜在的多模态相关性。然后，引入模态注意机制来构建共享表示，该表示可以由下游决策模型应用。所提出的 SFusion 可以轻松集成到现有的多模态分析网络中。在这项工作中，我们将 SFusion 应用于不同的骨干网络，用于人类活动识别和脑肿瘤分割任务。大量的实验结果表明，SFusion 模块比竞争的融合策略具有更好的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/scut-cszcl/SFusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自注意力机制的N-to-One多模态融合模块SFusion，解决多模态信息在缺失情况下自动融合的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预设公式或卷积操作处理多模态数据，当模态缺失时需通过合成或零填充处理，可能影响性能。
AI.method: 将上游模型提取的特征投影为token输入自注意力模块，生成潜在多模态关联，并通过模态注意力机制构建共享表示。
AI.result: 在人类活动识别和脑肿瘤分割任务中，SFusion优于现有融合策略，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SFusion能有效处理缺失模态的多模态融合问题，适用于不同骨干网络并提升下游任务性能。

Extensive experimental results show that the SFusion block achieves better performance than the competing fusion strategies.
