authors_text: Xuyang Li,Hamed Bolandi,Talal Salem,Nizar Lajnef,Vishnu Naresh Boddeti
title: NeuralSI: Structural Parameter Identification in Nonlinear Dynamical Systems
title_zh: NeuralSI：非线性动力系统中的结构参数识别
comment: ECCV 2022 Workshop on Computer Vision for Civil and Infrastructure Engineering
comments: ECCV 2022 Workshop on Computer Vision for Civil and Infrastructure Engineering
abstract: Structural monitoring for complex built environments often suffers from mismatch between design, laboratory testing, and actual built parameters. Additionally, real-world structural identification problems encounter many challenges. For example, the lack of accurate baseline models, high dimensionality, and complex multivariate partial differential equations (PDEs) pose significant difficulties in training and learning conventional data-driven algorithms. This paper explores a new framework, dubbed NeuralSI, for structural identification by augmenting PDEs that govern structural dynamics with neural networks. Our approach seeks to estimate nonlinear parameters from governing equations. We consider the vibration of nonlinear beams with two unknown parameters, one that represents geometric and material variations, and another that captures energy losses in the system mainly through damping. The data for parameter estimation is obtained from a limited set of measurements, which is conducive to applications in structural health monitoring where the exact state of an existing structure is typically unknown and only a limited amount of data samples can be collected in the field. The trained model can also be extrapolated under both standard and extreme conditions using the identified structural parameters. We compare with pure data-driven Neural Networks and other classical Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs). Our approach reduces both interpolation and extrapolation errors in displacement distribution by two to five orders of magnitude over the baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/human-analysis/neural-structural-identification

The data for parameter estimation is obtained from a limited set of measurements, which is conducive to applications in structural health monitoring where the exact state of an existing structure is typically unknown and only a limited amount of data samples can be collected in the field.还可以使用已识别的结构参数在标准和极端条件下推断训练后的模型。我们与纯数据驱动的神经网络和其他经典的物理信息神经网络（PINN）进行比较。 Our approach reduces both interpolation and extrapolation errors in displacement distribution by two to five orders of magnitude over the baselines.代码可在 https://github.com/ human-analysis/neural-structural-identification 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NeuralSI的框架，用于通过结合神经网络和偏微分方程（PDEs）来识别非线性动力学系统的结构参数。
AI.motivation: 现有结构监测方法在实际应用中面临设计与实际参数不匹配、缺乏准确基准模型、高维度及复杂多变量PDEs等问题，导致传统数据驱动算法训练困难。
AI.method: 通过将神经网络与结构动力学控制的PDEs结合，估计非线性参数。利用有限测量数据识别梁结构的几何/材料变化及能量损耗参数，并在标准和极端条件下进行模型外推。
AI.result: 与纯数据驱动神经网络和经典物理信息神经网络（PINNs）相比，NeuralSI在位移分布的插值和外推误差上减少了2至5个数量级。
AI.conclusion: NeuralSI框架有效解决了结构健康监测中参数识别难题，尤其适用于现场数据有限的场景，为复杂结构的参数估计提供了新方法。

authors_text: Abdulrahman Kerim,Washington L. S. Ramos,Leandro Soriano Marcolino,Erickson R. Nascimento,Richard Jiang
title: Leveraging Synthetic Data to Learn Video Stabilization Under Adverse Conditions
title_zh: 利用合成数据学习不利条件下的视频稳定性
abstract: Video stabilization plays a central role to improve videos quality. However, despite the substantial progress made by these methods, they were, mainly, tested under standard weather and lighting conditions, and may perform poorly under adverse conditions. In this paper, we propose a synthetic-aware adverse weather robust algorithm for video stabilization that does not require real data and can be trained only on synthetic data. We also present Silver, a novel rendering engine to generate the required training data with an automatic ground-truth extraction procedure. Our approach uses our specially generated synthetic data for training an affine transformation matrix estimator avoiding the feature extraction issues faced by current methods. Additionally, since no video stabilization datasets under adverse conditions are available, we propose the novel VSAC105Real dataset for evaluation. We compare our method to five state-of-the-art video stabilization algorithms using two benchmarks. Our results show that current approaches perform poorly in at least one weather condition, and that, even training in a small dataset with synthetic data only, we achieve the best performance in terms of stability average score, distortion score, success rate, and average cropping ratio when considering all weather conditions. Hence, our video stabilization model generalizes well on real-world videos and does not require large-scale synthetic training data to converge.
summary: Video stabilization plays a central role to improve videos quality. However, despite the substantial progress made by these methods, they were, mainly, tested under standard weather and lighting conditions, and may perform poorly under adverse conditions. In this paper, we propose a synthetic-aware adverse weather robust algorithm for video stabilization that does not require real data and can be trained only on synthetic data. We also present Silver, a novel rendering engine to generate the required training data with an automatic ground-truth extraction procedure. Our approach uses our specially generated synthetic data for training an affine transformation matrix estimator avoiding the feature extraction issues faced by current methods. Additionally, since no video stabilization datasets under adverse conditions are available, we propose the novel VSAC105Real dataset for evaluation. We compare our method to five state-of-the-art video stabilization algorithms using two benchmarks. Our results show that current approaches perform poorly in at least one weather condition, and that, even training in a small dataset with synthetic data only, we achieve the best performance in terms of stability average score, distortion score, success rate, and average cropping ratio when considering all weather conditions. Hence, our video stabilization model generalizes well on real-world videos and does not require large-scale synthetic training data to converge.
abstract_zh: 视频稳定对于提高视频质量起着核心作用。然而，尽管这些方法取得了实质性进展，但它们主要是在标准天气和照明条件下进行测试的，在不利条件下可能表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视频稳定的合成感知恶劣天气鲁棒算法，该算法不需要真实数据，并且只能在合成数据上进行训练。我们还推出了 Silver，一种新颖的渲染引擎，可通过自动地面实况提取程序生成所需的训练数据。我们的方法使用我们专门生成的合成数据来训练仿射变换矩阵估计器，避免当前方法面临的特征提取问题。此外，由于没有不利条件下的视频稳定数据集，我们提出了新颖的 VSAC105Real 数据集进行评估。我们使用两个基准将我们的方法与五种最先进的视频稳定算法进行比较。我们的结果表明，当前的方法在至少一种天气条件下表现不佳，并且即使在仅使用合成数据的小数据集中进行训练，在考虑所有天气条件时，我们在稳定性平均得分、失真得分、成功率和平均裁剪率方面也取得了最佳性能。因此，我们的视频稳定模型可以很好地推广到现实世界的视频，并且不需要大规模的合成训练数据来收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于合成数据的视频稳定算法，以解决恶劣天气条件下视频质量下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频稳定方法在标准条件下表现良好，但在恶劣天气下效果不佳，且依赖真实数据训练，而相关数据集稀缺。
AI.method: 开发了合成数据驱动的算法与渲染引擎Silver，生成带自动标注的训练数据，并训练仿射变换矩阵估计器，避免特征提取问题。
AI.result: 在VSAC105Real数据集上，该方法在稳定性、失真度、成功率等指标上优于五种最新算法，且仅需少量合成数据即可收敛。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据训练的模型能有效泛化到真实场景，无需大规模数据即可实现恶劣条件下的视频稳定。

authors_text: Andrea Ferigo,Leonardo Lucio Custode,Giovanni Iacca
title: Quality Diversity Evolutionary Learning of Decision Trees
title_zh: 决策树的质量多样性进化学习
abstract: Addressing the need for explainable Machine Learning has emerged as one of the most important research directions in modern Artificial Intelligence (AI). While the current dominant paradigm in the field is based on black-box models, typically in the form of (deep) neural networks, these models lack direct interpretability for human users, i.e., their outcomes (and, even more so, their inner working) are opaque and hard to understand. This is hindering the adoption of AI in safety-critical applications, where high interests are at stake. In these applications, explainable by design models, such as decision trees, may be more suitable, as they provide interpretability. Recent works have proposed the hybridization of decision trees and Reinforcement Learning, to combine the advantages of the two approaches. So far, however, these works have focused on the optimization of those hybrid models. Here, we apply MAP-Elites for diversifying hybrid models over a feature space that captures both the model complexity and its behavioral variability. We apply our method on two well-known control problems from the OpenAI Gym library, on which we discuss the "illumination" patterns projected by MAP-Elites, comparing its results against existing similar approaches.
summary: Addressing the need for explainable Machine Learning has emerged as one of the most important research directions in modern Artificial Intelligence (AI). While the current dominant paradigm in the field is based on black-box models, typically in the form of (deep) neural networks, these models lack direct interpretability for human users, i.e., their outcomes (and, even more so, their inner working) are opaque and hard to understand. This is hindering the adoption of AI in safety-critical applications, where high interests are at stake. In these applications, explainable by design models, such as decision trees, may be more suitable, as they provide interpretability. Recent works have proposed the hybridization of decision trees and Reinforcement Learning, to combine the advantages of the two approaches. So far, however, these works have focused on the optimization of those hybrid models. Here, we apply MAP-Elites for diversifying hybrid models over a feature space that captures both the model complexity and its behavioral variability. We apply our method on two well-known control problems from the OpenAI Gym library, on which we discuss the "illumination" patterns projected by MAP-Elites, comparing its results against existing similar approaches.
abstract_zh: 满足可解释的机器学习的需求已成为现代人工智能（AI）最重要的研究方向之一。虽然该领域当前的主导范式基于黑盒模型，通常以（深度）神经网络的形式存在，但这些模型缺乏对人类用户的直接解释性，即它们的结果（更重要的是它们的内部工作）是不透明且难以理解的。这阻碍了人工智能在涉及高利益的安全关键应用中的采用。在这些应用中，可解释的设计模型（例如决策树）可能更合适，因为它们提供了可解释性。最近的工作提出了决策树和强化学习的混合，以结合两种方法的优点。然而，到目前为止，这些工作都集中在这些混合模型的优化上。在这里，我们应用 MAP-Elites 在特征空间上实现混合模型的多样化，捕获模型的复杂性及其行为可变性。我们将我们的方法应用于 OpenAI Gym 库中的两个众所周知的控制问题，在此基础上我们讨论了 MAP-Elites 投射的“照明”模式，并将其结果与现有的类似方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用MAP-Elites方法多样化决策树与强化学习的混合模型，以提升AI模型的可解释性与行为多样性。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的黑箱模型（如深度神经网络）缺乏可解释性，难以满足安全关键领域的应用需求，而决策树等可解释模型需通过多样化行为提升适应性。
AI.method: 基于MAP-Elites进化算法，在特征空间中同时优化模型复杂度与行为多样性，生成多种决策树混合模型并对比分析其效果。
AI.result: 在OpenAI Gym的两个控制任务中，MAP-Elites生成的模型展示了多样化的行为模式，并优于现有类似方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为安全关键场景下的可解释AI提供了新的模型设计思路，通过多样性优化兼顾模型性能与可解释性需求。

authors_text: Chunyan Zeng,Shixiong Feng,Zhifeng Wang,Xiangkui Wan,Yunfan Chen,Nan Zhao
title: Spatio-Temporal Representation Learning Enhanced Source Cell-phone Recognition from Speech Recordings
title_zh: 时空表示从语音录音中学习增强的源手机识别
abstract: The existing source cell-phone recognition method lacks the long-term feature characterization of the source device, resulting in inaccurate representation of the source cell-phone related features which leads to insufficient recognition accuracy. In this paper, we propose a source cell-phone recognition method based on spatio-temporal representation learning, which includes two main parts: extraction of sequential Gaussian mean matrix features and construction of a recognition model based on spatio-temporal representation learning. In the feature extraction part, based on the analysis of time-series representation of recording source signals, we extract sequential Gaussian mean matrix with long-term and short-term representation ability by using the sensitivity of Gaussian mixture model to data distribution. In the model construction part, we design a structured spatio-temporal representation learning network C3D-BiLSTM to fully characterize the spatio-temporal information, combine 3D convolutional network and bidirectional long short-term memory network for short-term spectral information and long-time fluctuation information representation learning, and achieve accurate recognition of cell-phones by fusing spatio-temporal feature information of recording source signals. The method achieves an average accuracy of 99.03% for the closed-set recognition of 45 cell-phones under the CCNU\_Mobile dataset, and 98.18% in small sample size experiments, with recognition performance better than the existing state-of-the-art methods. The experimental results show that the method exhibits excellent recognition performance in multi-class cell-phones recognition.
summary: The existing source cell-phone recognition method lacks the long-term feature characterization of the source device, resulting in inaccurate representation of the source cell-phone related features which leads to insufficient recognition accuracy. In this paper, we propose a source cell-phone recognition method based on spatio-temporal representation learning, which includes two main parts: extraction of sequential Gaussian mean matrix features and construction of a recognition model based on spatio-temporal representation learning. In the feature extraction part, based on the analysis of time-series representation of recording source signals, we extract sequential Gaussian mean matrix with long-term and short-term representation ability by using the sensitivity of Gaussian mixture model to data distribution. In the model construction part, we design a structured spatio-temporal representation learning network C3D-BiLSTM to fully characterize the spatio-temporal information, combine 3D convolutional network and bidirectional long short-term memory network for short-term spectral information and long-time fluctuation information representation learning, and achieve accurate recognition of cell-phones by fusing spatio-temporal feature information of recording source signals. The method achieves an average accuracy of 99.03% for the closed-set recognition of 45 cell-phones under the CCNU\_Mobile dataset, and 98.18% in small sample size experiments, with recognition performance better than the existing state-of-the-art methods. The experimental results show that the method exhibits excellent recognition performance in multi-class cell-phones recognition.
abstract_zh: 现有的源手机识别方法缺乏对源设备的长期特征表征，导致源手机相关特征的表征不准确，导致识别精度不足。本文提出一种基于时空表示学习的源手机识别方法，该方法主要包括两个部分：序列高斯均值矩阵特征的提取和基于时空表示学习的识别模型的构建。在特征提取部分，在分析记录源信号的时间序列表示的基础上，利用高斯混合模型对数据分布的敏感性，提取具有长期和短期表示能力的序贯高斯均值矩阵。在模型构建部分，我们设计了结构化时空表示学习网络C3D-BiLSTM来充分表征时空信息，结合3D卷积网络和双向长短期记忆网络进行短期频谱信息和长期波动信息表示学习，并通过融合记录源信号的时空特征信息实现对手机的准确识别。该方法在CCNU\_Mobile数据集下对45款手机的闭集识别平均准确率达到99.03%，在小样本量实验中达到98.18%的平均准确率，识别性能优于现有的state-of-the-art方法。实验结果表明，该方法在多类别手机识别中表现出优异的识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空表示学习的手机来源识别方法，通过融合时序特征和时空信息提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有手机来源识别方法缺乏对设备长期特征的有效表征，导致特征表示不充分和识别精度不足。
AI.method: 提出包含两部分的方法：1）利用高斯混合模型提取具有长短时表征能力的序列高斯均值矩阵特征；2）设计C3D-BiLSTM结构化网络，结合3D卷积与双向LSTM学习短时频谱和长期波动特征，融合时空信息实现识别。
AI.result: 在CCNU_Mobile数据集上达到99.03%的闭集识别准确率，小样本实验中达98.18%，优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效建模时空特征，在多类别手机识别任务中展现出卓越的性能。

authors_text: Deyin Liu,Lin Yuanbo Wu,Bo Li,Zongyuan Ge
title: T-Person-GAN: Text-to-Person Image Generation with Identity-Consistency and Manifold Mix-Up
title_zh: T-Person-GAN：具有身份一致性和流形混合的文本到人图像生成
abstract: In this paper, we present an end-to-end approach to generate high-resolution person images conditioned on texts only. State-of-the-art text-to-image generation models are mainly designed for center-object generation, e.g., flowers and birds. Unlike center-placed objects with similar shapes and orientation, person image generation is a more challenging task, for which we observe the followings: 1) the generated images for the same person exhibit visual details with identity-consistency, e.g., identity-related textures/clothes/shoes across the images, and 2) those images should be discriminant for being robust against the inter-person variations caused by visual ambiguities. To address the above challenges, we develop an effective generative model to produce person images with two novel mechanisms. In particular, our first mechanism (called T-Person-GAN-ID) is to integrate the one-stream generator with an identity-preserving network such that the representations of generated data are regularized in their feature space to ensure the identity-consistency. The second mechanism (called T-Person-GAN-ID-MM) is based on the manifold mix-up to produce mixed images via the linear interpolation across generated images from different manifold identities, and we further enforce such interpolated images to be linearly classified in the feature space. This amounts to learning a linear classification boundary that can perfectly separate images from two identities. Our proposed method is empirically validated to achieve a remarkable improvement in text-to-person image generation. Our architecture is orthogonal to StackGAN++ , and focuses on person image generation, with all of them together to enrich the spectrum of GANs for the image generation task. Codes are available on \url{https://github.com/linwu-github/Person-Image-Generation.git}.
summary: In this paper, we present an end-to-end approach to generate high-resolution person images conditioned on texts only. State-of-the-art text-to-image generation models are mainly designed for center-object generation, e.g., flowers and birds. Unlike center-placed objects with similar shapes and orientation, person image generation is a more challenging task, for which we observe the followings: 1) the generated images for the same person exhibit visual details with identity-consistency, e.g., identity-related textures/clothes/shoes across the images, and 2) those images should be discriminant for being robust against the inter-person variations caused by visual ambiguities. To address the above challenges, we develop an effective generative model to produce person images with two novel mechanisms. In particular, our first mechanism (called T-Person-GAN-ID) is to integrate the one-stream generator with an identity-preserving network such that the representations of generated data are regularized in their feature space to ensure the identity-consistency. The second mechanism (called T-Person-GAN-ID-MM) is based on the manifold mix-up to produce mixed images via the linear interpolation across generated images from different manifold identities, and we further enforce such interpolated images to be linearly classified in the feature space. This amounts to learning a linear classification boundary that can perfectly separate images from two identities. Our proposed method is empirically validated to achieve a remarkable improvement in text-to-person image generation. Our architecture is orthogonal to StackGAN++ , and focuses on person image generation, with all of them together to enrich the spectrum of GANs for the image generation task. Codes are available on \url{https://github.com/linwu-github/Person-Image-Generation.git}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端方法来生成仅以文本为条件的高分辨率人物图像。最先进的文本到图像生成模型主要是为中心对象生成而设计的，例如花和鸟。与具有相似形状和方向的中心放置的物体不同，人物图像生成是一项更具挑战性的任务，为此我们观察到以下几点：1）为同一个人生成的图像表现出具有身份一致性的视觉细节，例如图像中与身份相关的纹理/衣服/鞋子，2）这些图像应该能够区分由视觉模糊引起的人际差异。为了解决上述挑战，我们开发了一种有效的生成模型，通过两种新颖的机制来生成人物图像。特别是，我们的第一个机制（称为 T-Person-GAN-ID）是将单流生成器与身份保留网络集成，以便生成的数据的表示在其特征空间中进行正则化，以确保身份一致性。第二种机制（称为 T-Person-GAN-ID-MM）基于流形混合，通过对来自不同流形身份的生成图像进行线性插值来生成混合图像，并且我们进一步强制此类插值图像在特征空间中进行线性分类。这相当于学习一个线性分类边界，可以完美地将图像与两个身份分开。我们提出的方法经过实证验证，可以在文本到人的图像生成方面取得显着的改进。我们的架构与 StackGAN++ 正交，专注于人物图像生成，将所有这些架构结合在一起，丰富了图像生成任务的 GAN 范围。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/linwu-github/Person-Image-Generation.git} 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的文本到人物图像生成方法T-Person-GAN，通过身份一致性约束和流形混合机制生成高分辨率人物图像。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型主要针对中心物体（如花、鸟），而人物图像生成面临身份一致性保持和跨人视觉歧义鲁棒性两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出双机制：1) T-Person-GAN-ID通过单流生成器与身份保持网络实现特征空间正则化；2) T-Person-GAN-ID-MM基于流形混合技术，在不同身份生成图像间进行线性插值并强化特征空间线性可分性。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在文本到人物图像生成任务中取得显著性能提升，且与StackGAN++架构正交互补。
AI.conclusion: 通过身份约束与流形混合机制的结合，有效解决了人物图像生成中的关键挑战，拓展了GANs在图像生成领域的应用谱系。

search_text: T-Person-GAN: Text-to-Person Image Generation with Identity-Consistency and Manifold Mix-Up T-Person-GAN：具有身份一致性和流形混合的文本到人图像生成 In this paper, we present an end-to-end approach to generate high-resolution person images conditioned on texts only. State-of-the-art text-to-image generation models are mainly designed for center-object generation, e.g., flowers and birds. Unlike center-placed objects with similar shapes and orientation, person image generation is a more challenging task, for which we observe the followings: 1) the generated images for the same person exhibit visual details with identity-consistency, e.g., identity-related textures/clothes/shoes across the images, and 2) those images should be discriminant for being robust against the inter-person variations caused by visual ambiguities. To address the above challenges, we develop an effective generative model to produce person images with two novel mechanisms. In particular, our first mechanism (called T-Person-GAN-ID) is to integrate the one-stream generator with an identity-preserving network such that the representations of generated data are regularized in their feature space to ensure the identity-consistency. The second mechanism (called T-Person-GAN-ID-MM) is based on the manifold mix-up to produce mixed images via the linear interpolation across generated images from different manifold identities, and we further enforce such interpolated images to be linearly classified in the feature space. This amounts to learning a linear classification boundary that can perfectly separate images from two identities. Our proposed method is empirically validated to achieve a remarkable improvement in text-to-person image generation. Our architecture is orthogonal to StackGAN++ , and focuses on person image generation, with all of them together to enrich the spectrum of GANs for the image generation task. Codes are available on \url{https://github.com/linwu-github/Person-Image-Generation.git}. 在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端方法来生成仅以文本为条件的高分辨率人物图像。最先进的文本到图像生成模型主要是为中心对象生成而设计的，例如花和鸟。与具有相似形状和方向的中心放置的物体不同，人物图像生成是一项更具挑战性的任务，为此我们观察到以下几点：1）为同一个人生成的图像表现出具有身份一致性的视觉细节，例如图像中与身份相关的纹理/衣服/鞋子，2）这些图像应该能够区分由视觉模糊引起的人际差异。为了解决上述挑战，我们开发了一种有效的生成模型，通过两种新颖的机制来生成人物图像。特别是，我们的第一个机制（称为 T-Person-GAN-ID）是将单流生成器与身份保留网络集成，以便生成的数据的表示在其特征空间中进行正则化，以确保身份一致性。第二种机制（称为 T-Person-GAN-ID-MM）基于流形混合，通过对来自不同流形身份的生成图像进行线性插值来生成混合图像，并且我们进一步强制此类插值图像在特征空间中进行线性分类。这相当于学习一个线性分类边界，可以完美地将图像与两个身份分开。我们提出的方法经过实证验证，可以在文本到人的图像生成方面取得显着的改进。我们的架构与 StackGAN++ 正交，专注于人物图像生成，将所有这些架构结合在一起，丰富了图像生成任务的 GAN 范围。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/linwu-github/Person-Image-Generation.git} 上找到。 本文提出了一种端到端的文本到人物图像生成方法T-Person-GAN，通过身份一致性约束和流形混合机制生成高分辨率人物图像。 Deyin Liu,Lin Yuanbo Wu,Bo Li,Zongyuan Ge cs.CV

authors_text: Vivek Gopalakrishnan,Polina Golland
title: Fast Auto-Differentiable Digitally Reconstructed Radiographs for Solving Inverse Problems in Intraoperative Imaging
title_zh: 用于解决术中成像逆问题的快速自动微分数字重建射线照片
comment: Published in Clinical Image-based Procedures (CLIP) workshop at MICCAI 2022
comments: Published in Clinical Image-based Procedures (CLIP) workshop at MICCAI 2022
abstract: The use of digitally reconstructed radiographs (DRRs) to solve inverse problems such as slice-to-volume registration and 3D reconstruction is well-studied in preoperative settings. In intraoperative imaging, the utility of DRRs is limited by the challenges in generating them in real-time and supporting optimization procedures that rely on repeated DRR synthesis. While immense progress has been made in accelerating the generation of DRRs through algorithmic refinements and GPU implementations, DRR-based optimization remains slow because most DRR generators do not offer a straightforward way to obtain gradients with respect to the imaging parameters. To make DRRs interoperable with gradient-based optimization and deep learning frameworks, we have reformulated Siddon's method, the most popular ray-tracing algorithm used in DRR generation, as a series of vectorized tensor operations. We implemented this vectorized version of Siddon's method in PyTorch, taking advantage of the library's strong automatic differentiation engine to make this DRR generator fully differentiable with respect to its parameters. Additionally, using GPU-accelerated tensor computation enables our vectorized implementation to achieve rendering speeds equivalent to state-of-the-art DRR generators implemented in CUDA and C++. We illustrate the resulting method in the context of slice-to-volume registration. Moreover, our simulations suggest that the loss landscapes for the slice-to-volume registration problem are convex in the neighborhood of the optimal solution, and gradient-based registration promises a much faster solution than prevailing gradient-free optimization strategies. The proposed DRR generator enables fast computer vision algorithms to support image guidance in minimally invasive procedures. Our implementation is publically available at https://github.com/v715/DiffDRR.
summary: The use of digitally reconstructed radiographs (DRRs) to solve inverse problems such as slice-to-volume registration and 3D reconstruction is well-studied in preoperative settings. In intraoperative imaging, the utility of DRRs is limited by the challenges in generating them in real-time and supporting optimization procedures that rely on repeated DRR synthesis. While immense progress has been made in accelerating the generation of DRRs through algorithmic refinements and GPU implementations, DRR-based optimization remains slow because most DRR generators do not offer a straightforward way to obtain gradients with respect to the imaging parameters. To make DRRs interoperable with gradient-based optimization and deep learning frameworks, we have reformulated Siddon's method, the most popular ray-tracing algorithm used in DRR generation, as a series of vectorized tensor operations. We implemented this vectorized version of Siddon's method in PyTorch, taking advantage of the library's strong automatic differentiation engine to make this DRR generator fully differentiable with respect to its parameters. Additionally, using GPU-accelerated tensor computation enables our vectorized implementation to achieve rendering speeds equivalent to state-of-the-art DRR generators implemented in CUDA and C++. We illustrate the resulting method in the context of slice-to-volume registration. Moreover, our simulations suggest that the loss landscapes for the slice-to-volume registration problem are convex in the neighborhood of the optimal solution, and gradient-based registration promises a much faster solution than prevailing gradient-free optimization strategies. The proposed DRR generator enables fast computer vision algorithms to support image guidance in minimally invasive procedures. Our implementation is publically available at https://github.com/v715/DiffDRR.
abstract_zh: 在术前环境中，人们对使用数字重建放射线照片 (DRR) 来解决切片到体积配准和 3D 重建等逆问题进行了充分研究。在术中成像中，DRR 的实用性受到实时生成 DRR 和支持依赖于重复 DRR 合成的优化程序的挑战的限制。虽然通过算法改进和 GPU 实现在加速 DRR 生成方面取得了巨大进展，但基于 DRR 的优化仍然缓慢，因为大多数 DRR 生成器不提供获取成像参数梯度的直接方法。为了使 DRR 能够与基于梯度的优化和深度学习框架互操作，我们将 DRR 生成中最流行的光线追踪算法 Siddon 方法重新表述为一系列矢量化张量运算。我们在 PyTorch 中实现了 Siddon 方法的矢量化版本，利用该库强大的自动微分引擎使该 DRR 生成器在其参数方面完全可微分。此外，使用 GPU 加速的张量计算使我们的矢量化实现能够达到与用 CUDA 和 C++ 实现的最先进的 DRR 生成器相当的渲染速度。我们在切片到体积配准的背景下说明了所得到的方法。此外，我们的模拟表明，切片到体积配准问题的损失景观在最佳解决方案的邻域中是凸的，并且基于梯度的配准有望比流行的无梯度优化策略更快的解决方案。所提出的 DRR 生成器使快速计算机视觉算法能够支持微创手术中的图像引导。我们的实现可在 https://github.com/v715/DiffDRR 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速且自动可微的数字重建射线图（DRR）生成方法，用于解决术中成像的逆问题。
AI.motivation: 传统DRR生成方法在实时术中成像和梯度优化中存在效率不足，限制了其在图像引导手术中的应用。
AI.method: 将Siddon射线追踪算法重构为PyTorch中的向量化张量操作，利用自动微分引擎实现参数的全可微性，并通过GPU加速达到与CUDA相当的渲染速度。
AI.result: 在切片到体积配准任务中验证了方法有效性，仿真表明梯度优化在损失函数凸区域比无梯度方法快得多。
AI.conclusion: 该可微DRR生成器为微创手术的实时图像引导提供了高效的计算支持，代码已开源。

authors_text: Leonidas Tsepenekas,Ivan Brugere,Freddy Lecue,Daniele Magazzeni
title: Comparing Apples to Oranges: Learning Similarity Functions for Data Produced by Different Distributions
title_zh: 比较苹果和橙子：学习不同分布生成的数据的相似性函数
abstract: Similarity functions measure how comparable pairs of elements are, and play a key role in a wide variety of applications, e.g., notions of Individual Fairness abiding by the seminal paradigm of Dwork et al., as well as Clustering problems. However, access to an accurate similarity function should not always be considered guaranteed, and this point was even raised by Dwork et al. For instance, it is reasonable to assume that when the elements to be compared are produced by different distributions, or in other words belong to different ``demographic'' groups, knowledge of their true similarity might be very difficult to obtain. In this work, we present an efficient sampling framework that learns these across-groups similarity functions, using only a limited amount of experts' feedback. We show analytical results with rigorous theoretical bounds, and empirically validate our algorithms via a large suite of experiments.
summary: Similarity functions measure how comparable pairs of elements are, and play a key role in a wide variety of applications, e.g., notions of Individual Fairness abiding by the seminal paradigm of Dwork et al., as well as Clustering problems. However, access to an accurate similarity function should not always be considered guaranteed, and this point was even raised by Dwork et al. For instance, it is reasonable to assume that when the elements to be compared are produced by different distributions, or in other words belong to different ``demographic'' groups, knowledge of their true similarity might be very difficult to obtain. In this work, we present an efficient sampling framework that learns these across-groups similarity functions, using only a limited amount of experts' feedback. We show analytical results with rigorous theoretical bounds, and empirically validate our algorithms via a large suite of experiments.
abstract_zh: 相似性函数衡量元素对的可比性，并在各种应用中发挥关键作用，例如遵守 Dwork 等人的开创性范式的个人公平概念以及聚类问题。然而，并不总是能保证获得准确的相似性函数，这一点甚至由 Dwork 等人提出。例如，可以合理地假设，当要比较的元素由不同的分布产生时，或者换句话说，属于不同的“人口统计”群体时，可能很难获得它们真正的相似性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个有效的采样框架，仅使用有限数量的专家反馈来学习这些跨组相似性函数。我们展示了具有严格理论界限的分析结果，并通过大量实验对我们的算法进行了实证验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效采样框架，用于在不同分布的数据之间学习跨组相似性函数，仅需有限的专家反馈。
AI.motivation: 当比较来自不同分布（如不同人口统计群体）的数据时，获取真实相似性信息极为困难，传统相似性函数可能无法准确反映跨组关系，影响公平性和聚类效果。
AI.method: 设计基于有限专家反馈的采样框架，通过理论分析和实验验证，学习跨组相似性函数并提供严格理论界保证。
AI.result: 理论分析给出了误差界，实验验证表明算法在多个场景下有效，能够准确学习跨组相似性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为跨分布数据的相似性学习提供了高效解决方案，有助于提升公平性相关应用的性能。

search_text: Comparing Apples to Oranges: Learning Similarity Functions for Data Produced by Different Distributions 比较苹果和橙子：学习不同分布生成的数据的相似性函数 Similarity functions measure how comparable pairs of elements are, and play a key role in a wide variety of applications, e.g., notions of Individual Fairness abiding by the seminal paradigm of Dwork et al., as well as Clustering problems. However, access to an accurate similarity function should not always be considered guaranteed, and this point was even raised by Dwork et al. For instance, it is reasonable to assume that when the elements to be compared are produced by different distributions, or in other words belong to different ``demographic'' groups, knowledge of their true similarity might be very difficult to obtain. In this work, we present an efficient sampling framework that learns these across-groups similarity functions, using only a limited amount of experts' feedback. We show analytical results with rigorous theoretical bounds, and empirically validate our algorithms via a large suite of experiments. 相似性函数衡量元素对的可比性，并在各种应用中发挥关键作用，例如遵守 Dwork 等人的开创性范式的个人公平概念以及聚类问题。然而，并不总是能保证获得准确的相似性函数，这一点甚至由 Dwork 等人提出。例如，可以合理地假设，当要比较的元素由不同的分布产生时，或者换句话说，属于不同的“人口统计”群体时，可能很难获得它们真正的相似性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个有效的采样框架，仅使用有限数量的专家反馈来学习这些跨组相似性函数。我们展示了具有严格理论界限的分析结果，并通过大量实验对我们的算法进行了实证验证。 本文提出了一种高效采样框架，用于在不同分布的数据之间学习跨组相似性函数，仅需有限的专家反馈。 Leonidas Tsepenekas,Ivan Brugere,Freddy Lecue,Daniele Magazzeni cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nicola Leone,Marco Manna,Maria Concetta Morelli,Simona Perri
title: A Formal Comparison between Datalog-based Languages for Stream Reasoning (extended version)
title_zh: 用于流推理的基于数据记录的语言之间的正式比较（扩展版）
abstract: The paper investigates the relative expressiveness of two logic-based languages for reasoning over streams, namely LARS Programs -- the language of the Logic-based framework for Analytic Reasoning over Streams called LARS -- and LDSR -- the language of the recent extension of the I-DLV system for stream reasoning called I-DLV-sr. Although these two languages build over Datalog, they do differ both in syntax and semantics. To reconcile their expressive capabilities for stream reasoning, we define a comparison framework that allows us to show that, without any restrictions, the two languages are incomparable and to identify fragments of each language that can be expressed via the other one.
summary: The paper investigates the relative expressiveness of two logic-based languages for reasoning over streams, namely LARS Programs -- the language of the Logic-based framework for Analytic Reasoning over Streams called LARS -- and LDSR -- the language of the recent extension of the I-DLV system for stream reasoning called I-DLV-sr. Although these two languages build over Datalog, they do differ both in syntax and semantics. To reconcile their expressive capabilities for stream reasoning, we define a comparison framework that allows us to show that, without any restrictions, the two languages are incomparable and to identify fragments of each language that can be expressed via the other one.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了两种用于流推理的基于逻辑的语言的相对表达能力，即 LARS 程序（称为 LARS 的基于逻辑的流分析推理框架的语言）和 LDSR（称为 I-DLV-sr 的 I-DLV 系统最近扩展的流推理语言）。尽管这两种语言构建在 Datalog 之上，但它们在语法和语义上确实有所不同。为了协调它们的流推理表达能力，我们定义了一个比较框架，它允许我们在没有任何限制的情况下证明这两种语言是不可比较的，并识别每种语言可以通过另一种语言表达的片段。

AI.tldr: 本文通过形式化方法比较两种基于Datalog的流推理语言LARS Programs和LDSR的表达能力。
AI.motivation: 不同流推理语言在语法和语义上的差异导致其表达能力难以直接对比，需建立统一框架进行系统性分析。
AI.method: 定义比较框架，通过形式化证明分析两种语言在无限制条件下的表达能力及可互模拟的片段。
AI.result: 两种语言在无限制情况下表达能力不可比较，但各自存在可被另一种语言表达的子集。
AI.conclusion: 需根据具体应用场景选择合适语言，未来可探索更精细的表达能力划分标准。

authors_text: Yi-chong Xia,Bin Chen,Yan Feng,Tian-shuo Ge
title: Multi-Scale Architectures Matter: On the Adversarial Robustness of Flow-based Lossless Compression
title_zh: 多尺度架构很重要：关于基于流的无损压缩的对抗鲁棒性
abstract: As a probabilistic modeling technique, the flow-based model has demonstrated remarkable potential in the field of lossless compression \cite{idf,idf++,lbb,ivpf,iflow},. Compared with other deep generative models (eg. Autoregressive, VAEs) \cite{bitswap,hilloc,pixelcnn++,pixelsnail} that explicitly model the data distribution probabilities, flow-based models perform better due to their excellent probability density estimation and satisfactory inference speed. In flow-based models, multi-scale architecture provides a shortcut from the shallow layer to the output layer, which significantly reduces the computational complexity and avoid performance degradation when adding more layers. This is essential for constructing an advanced flow-based learnable bijective mapping. Furthermore, the lightweight requirement of the model design in practical compression tasks suggests that flows with multi-scale architecture achieve the best trade-off between coding complexity and compression efficiency.
summary: As a probabilistic modeling technique, the flow-based model has demonstrated remarkable potential in the field of lossless compression \cite{idf,idf++,lbb,ivpf,iflow},. Compared with other deep generative models (eg. Autoregressive, VAEs) \cite{bitswap,hilloc,pixelcnn++,pixelsnail} that explicitly model the data distribution probabilities, flow-based models perform better due to their excellent probability density estimation and satisfactory inference speed. In flow-based models, multi-scale architecture provides a shortcut from the shallow layer to the output layer, which significantly reduces the computational complexity and avoid performance degradation when adding more layers. This is essential for constructing an advanced flow-based learnable bijective mapping. Furthermore, the lightweight requirement of the model design in practical compression tasks suggests that flows with multi-scale architecture achieve the best trade-off between coding complexity and compression efficiency.
abstract_zh: 作为一种概率建模技术，基于流的模型在无损压缩领域表现出了巨大的潜力\cite{idf,idf++,lbb,ivpf,iflow},。与其他显式建模数据分布概率的深度生成模型（例如自回归、VAE）相比，基于流的模型由于其出色的概率密度估计和令人满意的推理速度而表现更好。在基于流的模型中，多尺度架构提供了从浅层到输出层的捷径，这显着降低了计算复杂度，并避免了添加更多层时的性能下降。这对于构建先进的基于流的可学习双射映射至关重要。此外，实际压缩任务中模型设计的轻量级要求表明，具有多尺度架构的流实现了编码复杂度和压缩效率之间的最佳权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多尺度架构对基于流的无损压缩模型的对抗鲁棒性的影响，并验证其在压缩效率与计算复杂度间的平衡优势。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型在无损压缩中存在计算复杂度高或性能退化问题，需设计轻量级且高效的流模型以满足实际压缩任务需求。
AI.method: 通过分析多尺度架构在流模型中的信息传递路径，设计 shortcut 连接以降低计算复杂度并保持映射可逆性，对比不同架构的压缩性能。
AI.result: 多尺度流模型在保持较高压缩效率的同时显著降低了计算复杂度，在编码复杂度与压缩率间达到最优权衡。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度架构是构建高效鲁棒流模型的关键，为无损压缩任务提供了兼顾速度与精度的可行方案。

authors_text: Patrick Ebel,Kim Julian Gülle,Christoph Lingenfelder,Andreas Vogelsang
title: ICEBOAT: An Interactive User Behavior Analysis Tool for Automotive User Interfaces
title_zh: ICEBOAT：用于汽车用户界面的交互式用户行为分析工具
comment: The Adjunct Publication of the 35th Annual ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology
comments: The Adjunct Publication of the 35th Annual ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology
abstract: In this work, we present ICEBOAT an interactive tool that enables automotive UX experts to explore how users interact with In-vehicle Information Systems. Based on large naturalistic driving data continuously collected from production line vehicles, ICEBOAT visualizes drivers' interactions and driving behavior on different levels of detail. Hence, it allows to easily compare different user flows based on performance- and safety-related metrics.
summary: In this work, we present ICEBOAT an interactive tool that enables automotive UX experts to explore how users interact with In-vehicle Information Systems. Based on large naturalistic driving data continuously collected from production line vehicles, ICEBOAT visualizes drivers' interactions and driving behavior on different levels of detail. Hence, it allows to easily compare different user flows based on performance- and safety-related metrics.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了 ICEBOAT 一款交互式工具，使汽车用户体验专家能够探索用户如何与车载信息系统交互。 Based on large naturalistic driving data continuously collected from production line vehicles, ICEBOAT visualizes drivers' interactions and driving behavior on different levels of detail.因此，它可以根据性能和安全相关指标轻松比较不同的用户流。

AI.tldr: 介绍ICEBOAT工具，用于分析汽车用户界面的交互行为
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效分析真实驾驶数据中的用户交互行为，需更直观的工具支持优化设计
AI.method: 基于生产车辆持续收集的自然驾驶数据，构建多层级可视化系统，支持性能与安全指标对比分析
AI.result: 实现用户流程的性能与安全指标对比，辅助优化车载系统设计
AI.conclusion: 验证了ICEBOAT在提升汽车用户界面分析效率与准确性方面的有效性

search_text: ICEBOAT: An Interactive User Behavior Analysis Tool for Automotive User Interfaces ICEBOAT：用于汽车用户界面的交互式用户行为分析工具 In this work, we present ICEBOAT an interactive tool that enables automotive UX experts to explore how users interact with In-vehicle Information Systems. Based on large naturalistic driving data continuously collected from production line vehicles, ICEBOAT visualizes drivers' interactions and driving behavior on different levels of detail. Hence, it allows to easily compare different user flows based on performance- and safety-related metrics. 在这项工作中，我们展示了 ICEBOAT 一款交互式工具，使汽车用户体验专家能够探索用户如何与车载信息系统交互。 Based on large naturalistic driving data continuously collected from production line vehicles, ICEBOAT visualizes drivers' interactions and driving behavior on different levels of detail.因此，它可以根据性能和安全相关指标轻松比较不同的用户流。 介绍ICEBOAT工具，用于分析汽车用户界面的交互行为 Patrick Ebel,Kim Julian Gülle,Christoph Lingenfelder,Andreas Vogelsang cs.HC

authors_text: Tong Wu,Jiaqi Wang,Xingang Pan,Xudong Xu,Christian Theobalt,Ziwei Liu,Dahua Lin
title: Voxurf: Voxel-based Efficient and Accurate Neural Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: Voxurf：基于体素的高效准确的神经表面重建
comment: ICLR 2023 Spotlight. Our code is available at https://github.com/wutong16/Voxurf
comments: ICLR 2023 Spotlight. Our code is available at https://github.com/wutong16/Voxurf
abstract: Neural surface reconstruction aims to reconstruct accurate 3D surfaces based on multi-view images. Previous methods based on neural volume rendering mostly train a fully implicit model with MLPs, which typically require hours of training for a single scene. Recent efforts explore the explicit volumetric representation to accelerate the optimization via memorizing significant information with learnable voxel grids. However, existing voxel-based methods often struggle in reconstructing fine-grained geometry, even when combined with an SDF-based volume rendering scheme. We reveal that this is because 1) the voxel grids tend to break the color-geometry dependency that facilitates fine-geometry learning, and 2) the under-constrained voxel grids lack spatial coherence and are vulnerable to local minima. In this work, we present Voxurf, a voxel-based surface reconstruction approach that is both efficient and accurate. Voxurf addresses the aforementioned issues via several key designs, including 1) a two-stage training procedure that attains a coherent coarse shape and recovers fine details successively, 2) a dual color network that maintains color-geometry dependency, and 3) a hierarchical geometry feature to encourage information propagation across voxels. Extensive experiments show that Voxurf achieves high efficiency and high quality at the same time. On the DTU benchmark, Voxurf achieves higher reconstruction quality with a 20x training speedup compared to previous fully implicit methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/wutong16/Voxurf.
summary: Neural surface reconstruction aims to reconstruct accurate 3D surfaces based on multi-view images. Previous methods based on neural volume rendering mostly train a fully implicit model with MLPs, which typically require hours of training for a single scene. Recent efforts explore the explicit volumetric representation to accelerate the optimization via memorizing significant information with learnable voxel grids. However, existing voxel-based methods often struggle in reconstructing fine-grained geometry, even when combined with an SDF-based volume rendering scheme. We reveal that this is because 1) the voxel grids tend to break the color-geometry dependency that facilitates fine-geometry learning, and 2) the under-constrained voxel grids lack spatial coherence and are vulnerable to local minima. In this work, we present Voxurf, a voxel-based surface reconstruction approach that is both efficient and accurate. Voxurf addresses the aforementioned issues via several key designs, including 1) a two-stage training procedure that attains a coherent coarse shape and recovers fine details successively, 2) a dual color network that maintains color-geometry dependency, and 3) a hierarchical geometry feature to encourage information propagation across voxels. Extensive experiments show that Voxurf achieves high efficiency and high quality at the same time. On the DTU benchmark, Voxurf achieves higher reconstruction quality with a 20x training speedup compared to previous fully implicit methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/wutong16/Voxurf.
abstract_zh: 神经表面重建旨在基于多视图图像重建精确的3D表面。以前基于神经体积渲染的方法大多使用 MLP 训练完全隐式模型，这通常需要对单个场景进行数小时的训练。 Recent efforts explore the explicit volumetric representation to accelerate the optimization via memorizing significant information with learnable voxel grids.然而，现有的基于体素的方法即使与基于 SDF 的体渲染方案结合使用，在重建细粒度几何体方面也常常遇到困难。我们发现这是因为：1）体素网格往往会打破有利于精细几何学习的颜色几何依赖性，2）约束不足的体素网格缺乏空间连贯性并且容易受到局部最小值的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Voxurf，一种基于体素的表面重建方法，既高效又准确。 Voxurf 通过几个关键设计解决了上述问题，包括 1) 两阶段训练程序，获得连贯的粗糙形状并连续恢复精细细节；2) 保持颜色几何依赖性的双色网络；3) 分层几何特征，以鼓励跨体素的信息传播。大量实验表明Voxurf同时实现了高效率和高质量。在 DTU 基准上，与之前的完全隐式方法相比，Voxurf 实现了更高的重建质量，训练速度提高了 20 倍。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wutong16/Voxurf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Voxurf方法，通过体素表示实现高效且精确的神经表面重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于体素的神经表面重建方法在细粒度几何重建上表现不足，主要因体素网格破坏颜色-几何依赖性且缺乏空间一致性。
AI.method: 设计两阶段训练流程逐步恢复粗略形状与细节，引入双颜色网络维持颜色-几何依赖性，并采用分层几何特征促进体素间信息传播。
AI.result: 在DTU基准测试中，Voxurf相比全隐式方法训练速度提升20倍且重建质量更高。
AI.conclusion: Voxurf通过关键设计有效解决了体素方法的局限性，在效率与精度上取得平衡。

Extensive experiments show that Voxurf achieves high efficiency and high quality at the same time. On the DTU benchmark, Voxurf achieves higher reconstruction quality with a 20x training speedup compared to previous fully implicit methods. authors_text: Maxim Bonnaerens,Matthias Freiberger,Marian Verhelst,Joni Dambre
title: Hardware-aware mobile building block evaluation for computer vision
title_zh: 用于计算机视觉的硬件感知移动构建块评估
abstract: In this work we propose a methodology to accurately evaluate and compare the performance of efficient neural network building blocks for computer vision in a hardware-aware manner. Our comparison uses pareto fronts based on randomly sampled networks from a design space to capture the underlying accuracy/complexity trade-offs. We show that our approach allows to match the information obtained by previous comparison paradigms, but provides more insights in the relationship between hardware cost and accuracy. We use our methodology to analyze different building blocks and evaluate their performance on a range of embedded hardware platforms. This highlights the importance of benchmarking building blocks as a preselection step in the design process of a neural network. We show that choosing the right building block can speed up inference by up to a factor of 2x on specific hardware ML accelerators.
summary: In this work we propose a methodology to accurately evaluate and compare the performance of efficient neural network building blocks for computer vision in a hardware-aware manner. Our comparison uses pareto fronts based on randomly sampled networks from a design space to capture the underlying accuracy/complexity trade-offs. We show that our approach allows to match the information obtained by previous comparison paradigms, but provides more insights in the relationship between hardware cost and accuracy. We use our methodology to analyze different building blocks and evaluate their performance on a range of embedded hardware platforms. This highlights the importance of benchmarking building blocks as a preselection step in the design process of a neural network. We show that choosing the right building block can speed up inference by up to a factor of 2x on specific hardware ML accelerators.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，以硬件感知的方式准确评估和比较计算机视觉的高效神经网络构建块的性能。我们的比较使用基于设计空间中随机采样网络的帕累托前沿来捕获潜在的准确性/复杂性权衡。我们表明，我们的方法可以匹配之前的比较范例获得的信息，但提供了有关硬件成本和准确性之间关系的更多见解。我们使用我们的方法来分析不同的构建块并评估它们在一系列嵌入式硬件平台上的性能。这凸显了对构建块进行基准测试作为神经网络设计过程中预选步骤的重要性。我们证明，选择正确的构建块可以将特定硬件 ML 加速器上的推理速度提高 2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种硬件感知的评估方法，用于准确比较计算机视觉中高效神经网络模块的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法未能充分揭示硬件成本与模型精度的关联，导致神经网络设计效率低下。
AI.method: 基于设计空间中随机采样的网络，通过帕累托前沿分析准确率/复杂度权衡关系，并在多款嵌入式硬件平台进行验证。
AI.result: 该方法可匹配传统评估范式结果，同时揭示硬件成本与精度的关联性，特定硬件加速器上推理速度可提升2倍。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络模块的基准测试应作为设计流程的预筛选步骤，硬件感知的模块选择显著提升推理效率。

We show that choosing the right building block can speed up inference by up to a factor of 2x on specific hardware ML accelerators. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，以硬件感知的方式准确评估和比较计算机视觉的高效神经网络构建块的性能。我们的比较使用基于设计空间中随机采样网络的帕累托前沿来捕获潜在的准确性/复杂性权衡。我们表明，我们的方法可以匹配之前的比较范例获得的信息，但提供了有关硬件成本和准确性之间关系的更多见解。我们使用我们的方法来分析不同的构建块并评估它们在一系列嵌入式硬件平台上的性能。这凸显了对构建块进行基准测试作为神经网络设计过程中预选步骤的重要性。我们证明，选择正确的构建块可以将特定硬件 ML 加速器上的推理速度提高 2 倍。 本文提出一种硬件感知的评估方法，用于准确比较计算机视觉中高效神经网络模块的性能。 Maxim Bonnaerens,Matthias Freiberger,Marian Verhelst,Joni Dambre cs.CV

authors_text: Jiangmeng Li,Yanan Zhang,Wenwen Qiang,Lingyu Si,Chengbo Jiao,Xiaohui Hu,Changwen Zheng,Fuchun Sun
title: Disentangle and Remerge: Interventional Knowledge Distillation for Few-Shot Object Detection from A Conditional Causal Perspective
title_zh: 解开和重新合并：从条件因果角度进行小样本目标检测的介入知识蒸馏
abstract: Few-shot learning models learn representations with limited human annotations, and such a learning paradigm demonstrates practicability in various tasks, e.g., image classification, object detection, etc. However, few-shot object detection methods suffer from an intrinsic defect that the limited training data makes the model cannot sufficiently explore semantic information. To tackle this, we introduce knowledge distillation to the few-shot object detection learning paradigm. We further run a motivating experiment, which demonstrates that in the process of knowledge distillation, the empirical error of the teacher model degenerates the prediction performance of the few-shot object detection model as the student. To understand the reasons behind this phenomenon, we revisit the learning paradigm of knowledge distillation on the few-shot object detection task from the causal theoretic standpoint, and accordingly, develop a Structural Causal Model. Following the theoretical guidance, we propose a backdoor adjustment-based knowledge distillation method for the few-shot object detection task, namely Disentangle and Remerge (D&R), to perform conditional causal intervention toward the corresponding Structural Causal Model. Empirically, the experiments on benchmarks demonstrate that D&R can yield significant performance boosts in few-shot object detection. Code is available at https://github.com/ZYN-1101/DandR.git.
summary: Few-shot learning models learn representations with limited human annotations, and such a learning paradigm demonstrates practicability in various tasks, e.g., image classification, object detection, etc. However, few-shot object detection methods suffer from an intrinsic defect that the limited training data makes the model cannot sufficiently explore semantic information. To tackle this, we introduce knowledge distillation to the few-shot object detection learning paradigm. We further run a motivating experiment, which demonstrates that in the process of knowledge distillation, the empirical error of the teacher model degenerates the prediction performance of the few-shot object detection model as the student. To understand the reasons behind this phenomenon, we revisit the learning paradigm of knowledge distillation on the few-shot object detection task from the causal theoretic standpoint, and accordingly, develop a Structural Causal Model. Following the theoretical guidance, we propose a backdoor adjustment-based knowledge distillation method for the few-shot object detection task, namely Disentangle and Remerge (D&R), to perform conditional causal intervention toward the corresponding Structural Causal Model. Empirically, the experiments on benchmarks demonstrate that D&R can yield significant performance boosts in few-shot object detection. Code is available at https://github.com/ZYN-1101/DandR.git.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习模型学习具有有限人类注释的表示，这种学习范式在图像分类、目标检测等各种任务中表现出了实用性。然而，少样本目标检测方法存在一个固有缺陷，即有限的训练数据使得模型无法充分探索语义信息。为了解决这个问题，我们将知识蒸馏引入到少样本目标检测学习范式中。我们进一步进行了一个激励实验，结果表明，在知识蒸馏的过程中，教师模型的经验误差会降低学生少镜头目标检测模型的预测性能。为了理解这种现象背后的原因，我们从因果理论的角度重新审视了少镜头目标检测任务的知识蒸馏学习范式，并相应地开发了结构因果模型。在理论指导下，我们针对少样本目标检测任务提出了一种基于后门调整的知识蒸馏方法，即解缠和重新合并（D＆R），以对相应的结构因果模型进行条件因果干预。根据经验，基准实验表明 D&R 可以在少样本目标检测中产生显着的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/ZYN-1101/DandR.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件因果干预的知识蒸馏方法D&R，用于解决少样本目标检测中因训练数据不足导致的语义信息探索不足问题。
AI.motivation: 少样本目标检测模型因训练数据有限而难以充分学习语义信息，传统知识蒸馏方法在该任务中可能因教师模型的经验证误差影响学生模型性能。
AI.method: 从因果理论角度构建结构因果模型，提出基于后门调整的因果干预知识蒸馏方法D&R，通过解耦与重组过程实现条件因果干预。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，D&R方法显著提升了少样本目标检测的性能。
AI.conclusion: 从因果视角出发的干预式知识蒸馏能有效缓解少样本目标检测中的语义信息不足问题，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Shin-I Cheng,Yu-Jie Chen,Wei-Chen Chiu,Hung-Yu Tseng,Hsin-Ying Lee
title: Adaptively-Realistic Image Generation from Stroke and Sketch with Diffusion Model
title_zh: 使用扩散模型从笔划和草图生成自适应逼真图像
abstract: Generating images from hand-drawings is a crucial and fundamental task in content creation. The translation is difficult as there exist infinite possibilities and the different users usually expect different outcomes. Therefore, we propose a unified framework supporting a three-dimensional control over the image synthesis from sketches and strokes based on diffusion models. Users can not only decide the level of faithfulness to the input strokes and sketches, but also the degree of realism, as the user inputs are usually not consistent with the real images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance while providing flexibility in generating customized images with control over shape, color, and realism. Moreover, our method unleashes applications such as editing on real images, generation with partial sketches and strokes, and multi-domain multi-modal synthesis.
summary: Generating images from hand-drawings is a crucial and fundamental task in content creation. The translation is difficult as there exist infinite possibilities and the different users usually expect different outcomes. Therefore, we propose a unified framework supporting a three-dimensional control over the image synthesis from sketches and strokes based on diffusion models. Users can not only decide the level of faithfulness to the input strokes and sketches, but also the degree of realism, as the user inputs are usually not consistent with the real images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance while providing flexibility in generating customized images with control over shape, color, and realism. Moreover, our method unleashes applications such as editing on real images, generation with partial sketches and strokes, and multi-domain multi-modal synthesis.
abstract_zh: 从手绘生成图像是内容创作中至关重要且基本的任务。翻译很困难，因为存在无限的可能性，并且不同的用户通常期望不同的结果。因此，我们提出了一个统一的框架，支持基于扩散模型对草图和笔划的图像合成进行三维控制。用户不仅可以决定输入笔画和草图的忠实程度，还可以决定真实程度，因为用户输入通常与真实图像不一致。定性和定量实验表明，我们的框架实现了最先进的性能，同时提供了通过控制形状、颜色和真实感来生成定制图像的灵活性。此外，我们的方法还释放了诸如编辑真实图像、生成部分草图和笔画以及多域多模态合成等应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的框架，从草图和笔触生成图像，并支持对形状、颜色和真实感的三维控制。
AI.motivation: 手绘图像生成需满足用户多样化的忠实度和真实感需求，现有方法难以灵活平衡两者。
AI.method: 设计统一扩散模型框架，通过三维控制参数调节生成图像的形状保真度、颜色匹配度及现实感。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在生成质量与灵活性上达到SOTA，支持真实图像编辑、部分草图生成等多场景应用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了手绘到图像生成的控制难题，为多领域内容创作提供灵活工具。

authors_text: Matilda Tamm,Olivia Shamon,Hector Anadon Leon,Konrad Tollmar,Linus Gisslén
title: Automatic Testing and Validation of Level of Detail Reductions Through Supervised Learning
title_zh: 通过监督学习自动测试和验证细节级别的降低
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, to be published on IEEE Conference on Games
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, to be published on IEEE Conference on Games
abstract: Modern video games are rapidly growing in size and scale, and to create rich and interesting environments, a large amount of content is needed. As a consequence, often several thousands of detailed 3D assets are used to create a single scene. As each asset's polygon mesh can contain millions of polygons, the number of polygons that need to be drawn every frame may exceed several billions. Therefore, the computational resources often limit how many detailed objects that can be displayed in a scene. To push this limit and to optimize performance one can reduce the polygon count of the assets when possible. Basically, the idea is that an object at farther distance from the capturing camera, consequently with relatively smaller screen size, its polygon count may be reduced without affecting the perceived quality. Level of Detail (LOD) refers to the complexity level of a 3D model representation. The process of removing complexity is often called LOD reduction and can be done automatically with an algorithm or by hand by artists. However, this process may lead to deterioration of the visual quality if the different LODs differ significantly, or if LOD reduction transition is not seamless. Today the validation of these results is mainly done manually requiring an expert to visually inspect the results. However, this process is slow, mundane, and therefore prone to error. Herein we propose a method to automate this process based on the use of deep convolutional networks. We report promising results and envision that this method can be used to automate the process of LOD reduction testing and validation.
summary: Modern video games are rapidly growing in size and scale, and to create rich and interesting environments, a large amount of content is needed. As a consequence, often several thousands of detailed 3D assets are used to create a single scene. As each asset's polygon mesh can contain millions of polygons, the number of polygons that need to be drawn every frame may exceed several billions. Therefore, the computational resources often limit how many detailed objects that can be displayed in a scene. To push this limit and to optimize performance one can reduce the polygon count of the assets when possible. Basically, the idea is that an object at farther distance from the capturing camera, consequently with relatively smaller screen size, its polygon count may be reduced without affecting the perceived quality. Level of Detail (LOD) refers to the complexity level of a 3D model representation. The process of removing complexity is often called LOD reduction and can be done automatically with an algorithm or by hand by artists. However, this process may lead to deterioration of the visual quality if the different LODs differ significantly, or if LOD reduction transition is not seamless. Today the validation of these results is mainly done manually requiring an expert to visually inspect the results. However, this process is slow, mundane, and therefore prone to error. Herein we propose a method to automate this process based on the use of deep convolutional networks. We report promising results and envision that this method can be used to automate the process of LOD reduction testing and validation.
abstract_zh: 现代视频游戏的规模和规模正在迅速增长，为了创造丰富有趣的环境，需要大量的内容。因此，通常会使用数千个详细的 3D 资源来创建单个场景。由于每个资产的多边形网格可以包含数百万个多边形，因此每帧需要绘制的多边形数量可能会超过数十亿。因此，计算资源通常限制场景中可以显示的详细对象的数量。为了突破这一限制并优化性能，可以在可能的情况下减少资源的多边形数量。基本上，这个想法是，距离捕捉相机较远的物体，因此具有相对较小的屏幕尺寸，其多边形数量可以减少，而不影响感知质量。细节级别 (LOD) 是指 3D 模型表示的复杂程度。消除复杂性的过程通常称为 LOD 缩减，可以通过算法自动完成，也可以由艺术家手动完成。然而，如果不同的 LOD 差异显着，或者 LOD 减少过渡不无缝，则此过程可能会导致视觉质量下降。如今，这些结果的验证主要是手动完成的，需要专家目视检查结果。然而，这个过程是缓慢的、平凡的，因此容易出错。在这里，我们提出了一种基于深度卷积网络的使用来自动化此过程的方法。我们报告了有希望的结果，并设想该方法可用于自动化 LOD 降低测试和验证过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过监督学习自动测试和验证3D模型细节层次（LOD）缩减的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统视频游戏场景中大量高精度3D模型导致性能瓶颈，手动验证LOD缩减质量效率低且易出错，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 基于深度卷积网络构建自动检测系统，通过监督学习评估LOD缩减后模型的视觉质量与过渡平滑性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效检测LOD缩减缺陷，验证了其在自动化测试中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为LOD缩减的自动化测试提供了新思路，有望提升游戏开发效率与视觉质量保障。

search_text: Automatic Testing and Validation of Level of Detail Reductions Through Supervised Learning 通过监督学习自动测试和验证细节级别的降低 Modern video games are rapidly growing in size and scale, and to create rich and interesting environments, a large amount of content is needed. As a consequence, often several thousands of detailed 3D assets are used to create a single scene. As each asset's polygon mesh can contain millions of polygons, the number of polygons that need to be drawn every frame may exceed several billions. Therefore, the computational resources often limit how many detailed objects that can be displayed in a scene. To push this limit and to optimize performance one can reduce the polygon count of the assets when possible. Basically, the idea is that an object at farther distance from the capturing camera, consequently with relatively smaller screen size, its polygon count may be reduced without affecting the perceived quality. Level of Detail (LOD) refers to the complexity level of a 3D model representation. The process of removing complexity is often called LOD reduction and can be done automatically with an algorithm or by hand by artists. However, this process may lead to deterioration of the visual quality if the different LODs differ significantly, or if LOD reduction transition is not seamless. Today the validation of these results is mainly done manually requiring an expert to visually inspect the results. However, this process is slow, mundane, and therefore prone to error. Herein we propose a method to automate this process based on the use of deep convolutional networks. We report promising results and envision that this method can be used to automate the process of LOD reduction testing and validation. 现代视频游戏的规模和规模正在迅速增长，为了创造丰富有趣的环境，需要大量的内容。因此，通常会使用数千个详细的 3D 资源来创建单个场景。由于每个资产的多边形网格可以包含数百万个多边形，因此每帧需要绘制的多边形数量可能会超过数十亿。因此，计算资源通常限制场景中可以显示的详细对象的数量。为了突破这一限制并优化性能，可以在可能的情况下减少资源的多边形数量。基本上，这个想法是，距离捕捉相机较远的物体，因此具有相对较小的屏幕尺寸，其多边形数量可以减少，而不影响感知质量。细节级别 (LOD) 是指 3D 模型表示的复杂程度。消除复杂性的过程通常称为 LOD 缩减，可以通过算法自动完成，也可以由艺术家手动完成。然而，如果不同的 LOD 差异显着，或者 LOD 减少过渡不无缝，则此过程可能会导致视觉质量下降。如今，这些结果的验证主要是手动完成的，需要专家目视检查结果。然而，这个过程是缓慢的、平凡的，因此容易出错。在这里，我们提出了一种基于深度卷积网络的使用来自动化此过程的方法。我们报告了有希望的结果，并设想该方法可用于自动化 LOD 降低测试和验证过程。 本文提出通过监督学习自动测试和验证3D模型细节层次（LOD）缩减的效果。 Matilda Tamm,Olivia Shamon,Hector Anadon Leon,Konrad Tollmar,Linus Gisslén cs.GR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yue Tang,Yawen Wu,Peipei Zhou,Jingtong Hu
title: Enabling Weakly-Supervised Temporal Action Localization from On-Device Learning of the Video Stream
title_zh: 通过视频流的设备上学习实现弱监督时间动作本地化
comment: Manuscript received April 07, 2022; revised June 11, 2022; accepted July 05, 2022. This article was presented in the International Conference on 2022 and appears as part of the ESWEEK-TCAD special issue
comments: Manuscript received April 07, 2022; revised June 11, 2022; accepted July 05, 2022. This article was presented in the International Conference on 2022 and appears as part of the ESWEEK-TCAD special issue
abstract: Detecting actions in videos have been widely applied in on-device applications. Practical on-device videos are always untrimmed with both action and background. It is desirable for a model to both recognize the class of action and localize the temporal position where the action happens. Such a task is called temporal action location (TAL), which is always trained on the cloud where multiple untrimmed videos are collected and labeled. It is desirable for a TAL model to continuously and locally learn from new data, which can directly improve the action detection precision while protecting customers' privacy. However, it is non-trivial to train a TAL model, since tremendous video samples with temporal annotations are required. However, annotating videos frame by frame is exorbitantly time-consuming and expensive. Although weakly-supervised TAL (W-TAL) has been proposed to learn from untrimmed videos with only video-level labels, such an approach is also not suitable for on-device learning scenarios. In practical on-device learning applications, data are collected in streaming. Dividing such a long video stream into multiple video segments requires lots of human effort, which hinders the exploration of applying the TAL tasks to realistic on-device learning applications. To enable W-TAL models to learn from a long, untrimmed streaming video, we propose an efficient video learning approach that can directly adapt to new environments. We first propose a self-adaptive video dividing approach with a contrast score-based segment merging approach to convert the video stream into multiple segments. Then, we explore different sampling strategies on the TAL tasks to request as few labels as possible. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first attempt to directly learn from the on-device, long video stream.

It is desirable for a model to both recognize the class of action and localize the temporal position where the action happens. Such a task is called temporal action location (TAL), which is always trained on the cloud where multiple untrimmed videos are collected and labeled. It is desirable for a TAL model to continuously and locally learn from new data, which can directly improve the action detection precision while protecting customers' privacy. However, it is non-trivial to train a TAL model, since tremendous video samples with temporal annotations are required. However, annotating videos frame by frame is exorbitantly time-consuming and expensive. Although weakly-supervised TAL (W-TAL) has been proposed to learn from untrimmed videos with only video-level labels, such an approach is also not suitable for on-device learning scenarios. In practical on-device learning applications, data are collected in streaming. Dividing such a long video stream into multiple video segments requires lots of human effort, which hinders the exploration of applying the TAL tasks to realistic on-device learning applications. To enable W-TAL models to learn from a long, untrimmed streaming video, we propose an efficient video learning approach that can directly adapt to new environments. We first propose a self-adaptive video dividing approach with a contrast score-based segment merging approach to convert the video stream into multiple segments. Then, we explore different sampling strategies on the TAL tasks to request as few labels as possible. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first attempt to directly learn from the on-device, long video stream.
abstract_zh: 检测视频中的动作已广泛应用于设备端应用程序。实用的设备视频始终没有经过动作和背景的修剪。我们希望模型能够识别动作类别并定位动作发生的时间位置。这样的任务称为时间动作定位（TAL），它始终在云端进行训练，在云端收集和标记多个未修剪的视频。 TAL 模型需要不断地在本地学习新数据，这可以直接提高动作检测精度，同时保护客户的隐私。然而，训练 TAL 模型并非易事，因为需要大量带有时间注释的视频样本。然而，逐帧注释视频非常耗时且昂贵。尽管弱监督 TAL (W-TAL) 已被提出来从仅具有视频级标签的未修剪视频中进行学习，但这种方法也不适合设备上的学习场景。在实际的设备上学习应用程序中，数据以流式传输的方式收集。将这么长的视频流分成多个视频片段需要大量的人力，这阻碍了将 TAL 任务应用于现实的设备上学习应用程序的探索。为了使 W-TAL 模型能够从未经修剪的长流视频中学习，我们提出了一种可以直接适应新环境的高效视频学习方法。我们首先提出了一种自适应视频分割方法，采用基于对比度分数的片段合并方法，将视频流转换为多个片段。然后，我们在 TAL 任务上探索不同的采样策略，以请求尽可能少的标签。据我们所知，我们是第一次尝试直接从设备上的长视频流中学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督时序动作定位方法，使模型能够直接从设备端的长视频流中学习，无需人工分割视频片段。
AI.motivation: 传统时序动作定位（TAL）依赖云端标注的视频数据，但设备端学习需保护隐私且难以获取标注数据，现有弱监督方法无法处理长视频流的连续学习需求。
AI.method: 提出基于对比分数的自适应视频分割方法，将长视频流划分为多个片段，并探索高效采样策略以最小化标注需求。
AI.result: 首次实现从设备端长视频流中直接学习，显著降低标注成本并提升动作检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为设备端弱监督时序动作定位提供了可行方案，解决了隐私保护与连续学习的挑战。

authors_text: Kaushal Santosh Bhogale,Abhigyan Raman,Tahir Javed,Sumanth Doddapaneni,Anoop Kunchukuttan,Pratyush Kumar,Mitesh M. Khapra
title: Effectiveness of Mining Audio and Text Pairs from Public Data for Improving ASR Systems for Low-Resource Languages
title_zh: 从公共数据中挖掘音频和文本对以改进低资源语言的 ASR 系统的有效性
abstract: End-to-end (E2E) models have become the default choice for state-of-the-art speech recognition systems. Such models are trained on large amounts of labelled data, which are often not available for low-resource languages. Techniques such as self-supervised learning and transfer learning hold promise, but have not yet been effective in training accurate models. On the other hand, collecting labelled datasets on a diverse set of domains and speakers is very expensive. In this work, we demonstrate an inexpensive and effective alternative to these approaches by ``mining'' text and audio pairs for Indian languages from public sources, specifically from the public archives of All India Radio. As a key component, we adapt the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm to align sentences with corresponding audio segments given a long audio and a PDF of its transcript, while being robust to errors due to OCR, extraneous text, and non-transcribed speech. We thus create Shrutilipi, a dataset which contains over 6,400 hours of labelled audio across 12 Indian languages totalling to 4.95M sentences. On average, Shrutilipi results in a 2.3x increase over publicly available labelled data. We establish the quality of Shrutilipi with 21 human evaluators across the 12 languages. We also establish the diversity of Shrutilipi in terms of represented regions, speakers, and mentioned named entities. Significantly, we show that adding Shrutilipi to the training set of Wav2Vec models leads to an average decrease in WER of 5.8\% for 7 languages on the IndicSUPERB benchmark. For Hindi, which has the most benchmarks (7), the average WER falls from 18.8% to 13.5%. This improvement extends to efficient models: We show a 2.3% drop in WER for a Conformer model (10x smaller than Wav2Vec). Finally, we demonstrate the diversity of Shrutilipi by showing that the model trained with it is more robust to noisy input.

Such models are trained on large amounts of labelled data, which are often not available for low-resource languages. On the other hand, collecting labelled datasets on a diverse set of domains and speakers is very expensive. In this work, we demonstrate an inexpensive and effective alternative to these approaches by ``mining'' text and audio pairs for Indian languages from public sources, specifically from the public archives of All India Radio. As a key component, we adapt the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm to align sentences with corresponding audio segments given a long audio and a PDF of its transcript, while being robust to errors due to OCR, extraneous text, and non-transcribed speech. We thus create Shrutilipi, a dataset which contains over 6,400 hours of labelled audio across 12 Indian languages totalling to 4.95M sentences. On average, Shrutilipi results in a 2.3x increase over publicly available labelled data. We establish the quality of Shrutilipi with 21 human evaluators across the 12 languages. We also establish the diversity of Shrutilipi in terms of represented regions, speakers, and mentioned named entities. For Hindi, which has the most benchmarks (7), the average WER falls from 18.8% to 13.5%. This improvement extends to efficient models: We show a 2.3% drop in WER for a Conformer model (10x smaller than Wav2Vec). Finally, we demonstrate the diversity of Shrutilipi by showing that the model trained with it is more robust to noisy input.
abstract_zh: 端到端（E2E）模型已成为最先进的语音识别系统的默认选择。此类模型是在大量标记数据上进行训练的，而这些数据通常不适用于资源匮乏的语言。自监督学习和迁移学习等技术很有希望，但在训练准确的模型方面尚未有效。另一方面，收集不同领域和发言人的标记数据集非常昂贵。在这项工作中，我们通过从公共来源（特别是全印度广播电台的公共档案）“挖掘”印度语言的文本和音频对，展示了这些方法的廉价且有效的替代方案。作为关键组件，我们采用 Needleman-Wunsch 算法，在给定长音频及其转录文本的 PDF 的情况下将句子与相应的音频片段对齐，同时对 OCR、无关文本和非转录语音造成的错误具有鲁棒性。因此，我们创建了 Shruutilipi，这是一个数据集，其中包含 12 种印度语言的 6,400 多个小时的标记音频，总计 495 万个句子。平均而言，Shrutilipi 的结果比公开可用的标记数据增加了 2.3 倍。我们通过 12 种语言的 21 名人工评估员来确定 Shrutilipi 的质量。我们还根据代表地区、说话者和提及的命名实体确定了 Shrutilipi 的多样性。值得注意的是，我们表明，将 Shrutilipi 添加到 Wav2Vec 模型的训练集中会导致 IndicSUPERB 基准上 7 种语言的 WER 平均下降 5.8%。对于拥有最多基准 (7) 的印地语，平均 WER 从 18.8% 下降至 13.5%。这种改进延伸到了高效模型：我们发现 Conformer 模型的 WER 下降了 2.3%（比 Wav2Vec 小 10 倍）。最后，我们通过证明用 Shrutilipi 训练的模型对噪声输入更加鲁棒来证明 Shrutilipi 的多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过挖掘公共数据中的音频和文本对，构建用于改进低资源语言ASR系统的标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音识别模型依赖大量标注数据，而低资源语言缺乏此类数据，且现有自监督学习等方法效果有限，数据收集成本高昂。
AI.method: 利用Needleman-Wunsch算法对齐音频与文本，从All India Radio档案中挖掘印度12种语言的音频-文本对，构建包含6400小时标注数据的Shrutilipi数据集，并验证其质量与多样性。
AI.result: Shrutilipi使标注数据量提升2.3倍，Wav2Vec模型在IndicSUPERB基准测试中平均WER下降5.8%，Hindi语言WER从18.8%降至13.5%，且对噪声输入更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低资源语言ASR系统提供了高效、低成本的标注数据解决方案，显著提升模型性能并增强鲁棒性。

search_text: Effectiveness of Mining Audio and Text Pairs from Public Data for Improving ASR Systems for Low-Resource Languages 从公共数据中挖掘音频和文本对以改进低资源语言的 ASR 系统的有效性 End-to-end (E2E) models have become the default choice for state-of-the-art speech recognition systems. Such models are trained on large amounts of labelled data, which are often not available for low-resource languages. Techniques such as self-supervised learning and transfer learning hold promise, but have not yet been effective in training accurate models. On the other hand, collecting labelled datasets on a diverse set of domains and speakers is very expensive. In this work, we demonstrate an inexpensive and effective alternative to these approaches by ``mining'' text and audio pairs for Indian languages from public sources, specifically from the public archives of All India Radio. As a key component, we adapt the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm to align sentences with corresponding audio segments given a long audio and a PDF of its transcript, while being robust to errors due to OCR, extraneous text, and non-transcribed speech. We thus create Shrutilipi, a dataset which contains over 6,400 hours of labelled audio across 12 Indian languages totalling to 4.95M sentences. On average, Shrutilipi results in a 2.3x increase over publicly available labelled data. We establish the quality of Shrutilipi with 21 human evaluators across the 12 languages. We also establish the diversity of Shrutilipi in terms of represented regions, speakers, and mentioned named entities. Significantly, we show that adding Shrutilipi to the training set of Wav2Vec models leads to an average decrease in WER of 5.8\% for 7 languages on the IndicSUPERB benchmark. For Hindi, which has the most benchmarks (7), the average WER falls from 18.8% to 13.5%. This improvement extends to efficient models: We show a 2.3% drop in WER for a Conformer model (10x smaller than Wav2Vec). Finally, we demonstrate the diversity of Shrutilipi by showing that the model trained with it is more robust to noisy input. 端到端（E2E）模型已成为最先进的语音识别系统的默认选择。此类模型是在大量标记数据上进行训练的，而这些数据通常不适用于资源匮乏的语言。自监督学习和迁移学习等技术很有希望，但在训练准确的模型方面尚未有效。另一方面，收集不同领域和发言人的标记数据集非常昂贵。在这项工作中，我们通过从公共来源（特别是全印度广播电台的公共档案）“挖掘”印度语言的文本和音频对，展示了这些方法的廉价且有效的替代方案。作为关键组件，我们采用 Needleman-Wunsch 算法，在给定长音频及其转录文本的 PDF 的情况下将句子与相应的音频片段对齐，同时对 OCR、无关文本和非转录语音造成的错误具有鲁棒性。因此，我们创建了 Shruutilipi，这是一个数据集，其中包含 12 种印度语言的 6,400 多个小时的标记音频，总计 495 万个句子。平均而言，Shrutilipi 的结果比公开可用的标记数据增加了 2.3 倍。我们通过 12 种语言的 21 名人工评估员来确定 Shrutilipi 的质量。我们还根据代表地区、说话者和提及的命名实体确定了 Shrutilipi 的多样性。值得注意的是，我们表明，将 Shrutilipi 添加到 Wav2Vec 模型的训练集中会导致 IndicSUPERB 基准上 7 种语言的 WER 平均下降 5.8%。对于拥有最多基准 (7) 的印地语，平均 WER 从 18.8% 下降至 13.5%。这种改进延伸到了高效模型：我们发现 Conformer 模型的 WER 下降了 2.3%（比 Wav2Vec 小 10 倍）。最后，我们通过证明用 Shrutilipi 训练的模型对噪声输入更加鲁棒来证明 Shrutilipi 的多样性。 本文提出通过挖掘公共数据中的音频和文本对，构建用于改进低资源语言ASR系统的标注数据集。 Kaushal Santosh Bhogale,Abhigyan Raman,Tahir Javed,Sumanth Doddapaneni,Anoop Kunchukuttan,Pratyush Kumar,Mitesh M. authors_text: Chen Yang,Wang Ziyue,Fang Zijie,Bian Hao,Zhang Yongbing
title: Multi tasks RetinaNet for mitosis detection
title_zh: 用于有丝分裂检测的多任务 RetinaNet
abstract: The account of mitotic cells is a key feature in tumor diagnosis. However, due to the variability of mitotic cell morphology, it is a highly challenging task to detect mitotic cells in tumor tissues. At the same time, although advanced deep learning method have achieved great success in cell detection, the performance is often unsatisfactory when tested data from another domain (i.e. the different tumor types and different scanners). Therefore, it is necessary to develop algorithms for detecting mitotic cells with robustness in domain shifts scenarios. Our work further proposes a foreground detection and tumor classification task based on the baseline(Retinanet), and utilizes data augmentation to improve the domain generalization performance of our model. We achieve the state-of-the-art performance (F1 score: 0.5809) on the challenging premilary test dataset.
summary: The account of mitotic cells is a key feature in tumor diagnosis. However, due to the variability of mitotic cell morphology, it is a highly challenging task to detect mitotic cells in tumor tissues. At the same time, although advanced deep learning method have achieved great success in cell detection, the performance is often unsatisfactory when tested data from another domain (i.e. the different tumor types and different scanners). Therefore, it is necessary to develop algorithms for detecting mitotic cells with robustness in domain shifts scenarios. Our work further proposes a foreground detection and tumor classification task based on the baseline(Retinanet), and utilizes data augmentation to improve the domain generalization performance of our model. We achieve the state-of-the-art performance (F1 score: 0.5809) on the challenging premilary test dataset.
abstract_zh: 有丝分裂细胞的描述是肿瘤诊断的一个关键特征。然而，由于有丝分裂细胞形态的变异性，检测肿瘤组织中的有丝分裂细胞是一项极具挑战性的任务。同时，尽管先进的深度学习方法在细胞检测方面取得了巨大成功，但当测试来自另一个领域（即不同肿瘤类型和不同扫描仪）的数据时，性能往往不能令人满意。因此，有必要开发在域转移场景中具有鲁棒性的检测有丝分裂细胞的算法。我们的工作进一步提出了基于基线（Retinanet）的前景检测和肿瘤分类任务，并利用数据增强来提高我们模型的领域泛化性能。我们在具有挑战性的预测试数据集上实现了最先进的性能（F1 分数：0.5809）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多任务RetinaNet的有丝分裂细胞检测方法，旨在提升跨域场景下的检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在跨域数据（不同肿瘤类型和扫描设备）上检测有丝分裂细胞时性能不足，需提高算法鲁棒性以满足实际诊断需求。
AI.method: 在RetinaNet基线模型中引入前景检测与肿瘤分类双任务，并结合数据增强策略提升领域泛化能力。
AI.result: 在挑战性预测试数据集上取得SOTA结果，F1分数达0.5809。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习与数据增强有效提升跨域检测性能，为肿瘤诊断提供更可靠的检测工具。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Lin
title: Towards Robust Drone Vision in the Wild
title_zh: 在野外实现强大的无人机视觉
abstract: The past few years have witnessed the burst of drone-based applications where computer vision plays an essential role. However, most public drone-based vision datasets focus on detection and tracking. On the other hand, the performance of most existing image super-resolution methods is sensitive to the dataset, specifically, the degradation model between high-resolution and low-resolution images. In this thesis, we propose the first image super-resolution dataset for drone vision. Image pairs are captured by two cameras on the drone with different focal lengths. We collect data at different altitudes and then propose pre-processing steps to align image pairs. Extensive empirical studies show domain gaps exist among images captured at different altitudes. Meanwhile, the performance of pretrained image super-resolution networks also suffers a drop on our dataset and varies among altitudes. Finally, we propose two methods to build a robust image super-resolution network at different altitudes. The first feeds altitude information into the network through altitude-aware layers. The second uses one-shot learning to quickly adapt the super-resolution model to unknown altitudes. Our results reveal that the proposed methods can efficiently improve the performance of super-resolution networks at varying altitudes.
summary: The past few years have witnessed the burst of drone-based applications where computer vision plays an essential role. However, most public drone-based vision datasets focus on detection and tracking. On the other hand, the performance of most existing image super-resolution methods is sensitive to the dataset, specifically, the degradation model between high-resolution and low-resolution images. In this thesis, we propose the first image super-resolution dataset for drone vision. Image pairs are captured by two cameras on the drone with different focal lengths. We collect data at different altitudes and then propose pre-processing steps to align image pairs. Extensive empirical studies show domain gaps exist among images captured at different altitudes. Meanwhile, the performance of pretrained image super-resolution networks also suffers a drop on our dataset and varies among altitudes. Finally, we propose two methods to build a robust image super-resolution network at different altitudes. The first feeds altitude information into the network through altitude-aware layers. The second uses one-shot learning to quickly adapt the super-resolution model to unknown altitudes. Our results reveal that the proposed methods can efficiently improve the performance of super-resolution networks at varying altitudes.
abstract_zh: 过去几年见证了基于无人机的应用的爆发，其中计算机视觉发挥着重要作用。然而，大多数基于无人机的公共视觉数据集都专注于检测和跟踪。另一方面，大多数现有图像超分辨率方法的性能对数据集敏感，特别是高分辨率和低分辨率图像之间的退化模型。在本文中，我们提出了第一个用于无人机视觉的图像超分辨率数据集。无人机上具有不同焦距的两个摄像头捕获图像对。我们收集不同高度的数据，然后提出预处理步骤来对齐图像对。大量的实证研究表明，在不同高度捕获的图像之间存在域差距。与此同时，预训练图像超分辨率网络的性能在我们的数据集上也有所下降，并且随海拔高度的变化而变化。最后，我们提出了两种方法来构建不同高度下的鲁棒图像超分辨率网络。第一个通过高度感知层将高度信息输入网络。第二个方法使用一次性学习来快速使超分辨率模型适应未知的高度。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效地提高超分辨率网络在不同海拔高度的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个针对无人机视觉的图像超分辨率数据集，并设计两种方法提升不同海拔下的超分辨率网络鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机视觉数据集缺乏对图像超分辨率的研究，且现有超分辨率模型在不同海拔下的性能表现不稳定。
AI.method: 构建双焦距摄像头采集的多海拔图像配对数据集，设计海拔感知层网络结构，并采用单次学习方法适应未知海拔场景。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在不同海拔场景下均能有效提升超分辨率网络性能，优于预训练模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入海拔信息和单次学习机制，可显著增强无人机视觉系统在复杂野外环境下的超分辨率能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出首个针对无人机视觉的图像超分辨率数据集，并设计两种方法提升不同海拔下的超分辨率网络鲁棒性。
