search_text: Towards Robust Drone Vision in the Wild 在野外实现强大的无人机视觉 The past few years have witnessed the burst of drone-based applications where computer vision plays an essential role. However, most public drone-based vision datasets focus on detection and tracking. On the other hand, the performance of most existing image super-resolution methods is sensitive to the dataset, specifically, the degradation model between high-resolution and low-resolution images. In this thesis, we propose the first image super-resolution dataset for drone vision. Image pairs are captured by two cameras on the drone with different focal lengths. We collect data at different altitudes and then propose pre-processing steps to align image pairs. Extensive empirical studies show domain gaps exist among images captured at different altitudes. Meanwhile, the performance of pretrained image super-resolution networks also suffers a drop on our dataset and varies among altitudes. Finally, we propose two methods to build a robust image super-resolution network at different altitudes. The first feeds altitude information into the network through altitude-aware layers. The second uses one-shot learning to quickly adapt the super-resolution model to unknown altitudes. Our results reveal that the proposed methods can efficiently improve the performance of super-resolution networks at varying altitudes. 过去几年见证了基于无人机的应用的爆发，其中计算机视觉发挥着重要作用。然而，大多数基于无人机的公共视觉数据集都专注于检测和跟踪。另一方面，大多数现有图像超分辨率方法的性能对数据集敏感，特别是高分辨率和低分辨率图像之间的退化模型。在本文中，我们提出了第一个用于无人机视觉的图像超分辨率数据集。无人机上具有不同焦距的两个摄像头捕获图像对。我们收集不同高度的数据，然后提出预处理步骤来对齐图像对。大量的实证研究表明，在不同高度捕获的图像之间存在域差距。与此同时，预训练图像超分辨率网络的性能在我们的数据集上也有所下降，并且随海拔高度的变化而变化。最后，我们提出了两种方法来构建不同高度下的鲁棒图像超分辨率网络。第一个通过高度感知层将高度信息输入网络。第二个方法使用一次性学习来快速使超分辨率模型适应未知的高度。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效地提高超分辨率网络在不同海拔高度的性能。 本文提出首个针对无人机视觉的图像超分辨率数据集，并设计两种方法提升不同海拔下的超分辨率网络鲁棒性。 Xiaoyu Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Jianing Li,Jiaming Liu,Xiaobao Wei,Jiyuan Zhang,Ming Lu,Lei Ma,Li Du,Tiejun Huang,Shanghang Zhang
title: Uncertainty Guided Depth Fusion for Spike Camera
title_zh: 尖峰相机的不确定性引导深度融合
abstract: Depth estimation is essential for various important real-world applications such as autonomous driving. However, it suffers from severe performance degradation in high-velocity scenario since traditional cameras can only capture blurred images. To deal with this problem, the spike camera is designed to capture the pixel-wise luminance intensity at high frame rate. However, depth estimation with spike camera remains very challenging using traditional monocular or stereo depth estimation algorithms, which are based on the photometric consistency. In this paper, we propose a novel Uncertainty-Guided Depth Fusion (UGDF) framework to fuse the predictions of monocular and stereo depth estimation networks for spike camera. Our framework is motivated by the fact that stereo spike depth estimation achieves better results at close range while monocular spike depth estimation obtains better results at long range. Therefore, we introduce a dual-task depth estimation architecture with a joint training strategy and estimate the distributed uncertainty to fuse the monocular and stereo results. In order to demonstrate the advantage of spike depth estimation over traditional camera depth estimation, we contribute a spike-depth dataset named CitySpike20K, which contains 20K paired samples, for spike depth estimation. UGDF achieves state-of-the-art results on CitySpike20K, surpassing all monocular or stereo spike depth estimation baselines. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the effectiveness and generalization of our method on CitySpike20K. To the best of our knowledge, our framework is the first dual-task fusion framework for spike camera depth estimation. Code and dataset will be released.
summary: Depth estimation is essential for various important real-world applications such as autonomous driving. However, it suffers from severe performance degradation in high-velocity scenario since traditional cameras can only capture blurred images. To deal with this problem, the spike camera is designed to capture the pixel-wise luminance intensity at high frame rate. However, depth estimation with spike camera remains very challenging using traditional monocular or stereo depth estimation algorithms, which are based on the photometric consistency. In this paper, we propose a novel Uncertainty-Guided Depth Fusion (UGDF) framework to fuse the predictions of monocular and stereo depth estimation networks for spike camera. Our framework is motivated by the fact that stereo spike depth estimation achieves better results at close range while monocular spike depth estimation obtains better results at long range. Therefore, we introduce a dual-task depth estimation architecture with a joint training strategy and estimate the distributed uncertainty to fuse the monocular and stereo results. In order to demonstrate the advantage of spike depth estimation over traditional camera depth estimation, we contribute a spike-depth dataset named CitySpike20K, which contains 20K paired samples, for spike depth estimation. UGDF achieves state-of-the-art results on CitySpike20K, surpassing all monocular or stereo spike depth estimation baselines. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the effectiveness and generalization of our method on CitySpike20K. To the best of our knowledge, our framework is the first dual-task fusion framework for spike camera depth estimation. Code and dataset will be released.
abstract_zh: 深度估计对于自动驾驶等各种重要的现实应用至关重要。然而，由于传统相机只能捕捉模糊的图像，因此在高速场景下其性能会严重下降。为了解决这个问题，尖峰相机被设计为以高帧速率捕获像素级亮度强度。然而，使用基于光度一致性的传统单目或立体深度估计算法，使用尖峰相机进行深度估计仍然非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的不确定性引导深度融合（UGDF）框架来融合尖峰相机的单目和立体深度估计网络的预测。我们的框架的动机是立体尖峰深度估计在近距离获得更好的结果，而单目尖峰深度估计在远距离获得更好的结果。因此，我们引入了具有联合训练策略的双任务深度估计架构，并估计分布式不确定性以融合单目和立体结果。为了证明尖峰深度估计相对于传统相机深度估计的优势，我们贡献了一个名为 CitySpike20K 的尖峰深度数据集，其中包含 20K 配对样本，用于尖峰深度估计。 UGDF 在 CitySpike20K 上取得了最先进的结果，超越了所有单目或立体尖峰深度估计基线。我们进行了大量的实验来评估我们的方法在 CitySpike20K 上的有效性和泛化性。据我们所知，我们的框架是第一个用于尖峰相机深度估计的双任务融合框架。代码和数据集将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的深度融合框架（UGDF），用于改进脉冲相机的深度估计，通过融合单目和立体深度估计网络的预测结果。
AI.motivation: 传统相机在高速场景下因图像模糊导致深度估计性能下降，而脉冲相机虽能捕捉高速场景但现有单目或立体算法效果不佳。单目算法在远距离表现更好，立体算法在近距离更优，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计双任务深度估计架构，采用联合训练策略并引入不确定性估计模块，结合单目与立体预测结果。同时构建包含20K样本的CitySpike20K数据集用于评估。
AI.result: UGDF在CitySpike20K数据集上达到SOTA性能，优于所有单目和立体基线方法，实验验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出脉冲相机的双任务融合框架，通过不确定性引导的深度融合显著提升深度估计精度，并公开了代码和数据集。

authors_text: Ghodai Abdelrahman,Sherif Abdelfattah,Qing Wang,Yu Lin
title: DBE-KT22: A Knowledge Tracing Dataset Based on Online Student Evaluation
title_zh: DBE-KT22：基于在线学生评价的知识追踪数据集
abstract: Online education has gained an increasing importance over the last decade for providing affordable high-quality education to students worldwide. This has been further magnified during the global pandemic as more students switched to study online. The majority of online education tasks, e.g., course recommendation, exercise recommendation, or automated evaluation, depends on tracking students' knowledge progress. This is known as the \emph{Knowledge Tracing} problem in the literature. Addressing this problem requires collecting student evaluation data that can reflect their knowledge evolution over time. In this paper, we propose a new knowledge tracing dataset named Database Exercises for Knowledge Tracing (DBE-KT22) that is collected from an online student exercise system in a course taught at the Australian National University in Australia. We discuss the characteristics of the DBE-KT22 dataset and contrast it with the existing datasets in the knowledge tracing literature. Our dataset is available for public access through the Australian Data Archive platform.
summary: Online education has gained an increasing importance over the last decade for providing affordable high-quality education to students worldwide. This has been further magnified during the global pandemic as more students switched to study online. The majority of online education tasks, e.g., course recommendation, exercise recommendation, or automated evaluation, depends on tracking students' knowledge progress. This is known as the \emph{Knowledge Tracing} problem in the literature. Addressing this problem requires collecting student evaluation data that can reflect their knowledge evolution over time. In this paper, we propose a new knowledge tracing dataset named Database Exercises for Knowledge Tracing (DBE-KT22) that is collected from an online student exercise system in a course taught at the Australian National University in Australia. We discuss the characteristics of the DBE-KT22 dataset and contrast it with the existing datasets in the knowledge tracing literature. Our dataset is available for public access through the Australian Data Archive platform.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，在线教育为世界各地的学生提供负担得起的高质量教育变得越来越重要。在全球大流行期间，随着越来越多的学生转向在线学习，这种情况进一​​步放大。大多数在线教育任务，例如课程推荐、练习推荐或自动评估，都依赖于跟踪学生的知识进步。这在文献中被称为\emph{知识追踪}问题。解决这个问题需要收集学生评估数据，这些数据可以反映他们的知识随时间的演变。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为知识追踪数据库练习（DBE-KT22）的新知识追踪数据集，该数据集是从澳大利亚国立大学教授的课程中的在线学生练习系统收集的。我们讨论了 DBE-KT22 数据集的特征，并将其与知识追踪文献中的现有数据集进行了对比。我们的数据集可通过澳大利亚数据档案平台供公众访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为DBE-KT22的新知识追踪数据集，用于支持在线教育中的知识追踪研究。
AI.motivation: 在线教育需求激增导致知识追踪问题的重要性提升，但现有数据集难以满足研究需求，需构建高质量数据集以推动相关算法发展。
AI.method: 从澳大利亚国立大学的在线练习系统中收集学生答题数据，构建包含时间序列知识状态的DBE-KT22数据集，并分析其与现有数据集的差异性特征。
AI.result: 成功构建DBE-KT22数据集，通过对比分析证实其在数据规模、时间粒度和学科覆盖维度上优于现有数据集，已通过澳大利亚数据档案馆公开共享。
AI.conclusion: DBE-KT22为知识追踪算法研究提供新基准，其公开共享将促进教育数据挖掘领域的发展，助力个性化学习系统优化。

search_text: DBE-KT22: A Knowledge Tracing Dataset Based on Online Student Evaluation DBE-KT22：基于在线学生评价的知识追踪数据集 Online education has gained an increasing importance over the last decade for providing affordable high-quality education to students worldwide. This has been further magnified during the global pandemic as more students switched to study online. The majority of online education tasks, e.g., course recommendation, exercise recommendation, or automated evaluation, depends on tracking students' knowledge progress. This is known as the \emph{Knowledge Tracing} problem in the literature. Addressing this problem requires collecting student evaluation data that can reflect their knowledge evolution over time. In this paper, we propose a new knowledge tracing dataset named Database Exercises for Knowledge Tracing (DBE-KT22) that is collected from an online student exercise system in a course taught at the Australian National University in Australia. We discuss the characteristics of the DBE-KT22 dataset and contrast it with the existing datasets in the knowledge tracing literature. Our dataset is available for public access through the Australian Data Archive platform. 在过去的十年中，在线教育为世界各地的学生提供负担得起的高质量教育变得越来越重要。在全球大流行期间，随着越来越多的学生转向在线学习，这种情况进一​​步放大。大多数在线教育任务，例如课程推荐、练习推荐或自动评估，都依赖于跟踪学生的知识进步。这在文献中被称为\emph{知识追踪}问题。解决这个问题需要收集学生评估数据，这些数据可以反映他们的知识随时间的演变。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为知识追踪数据库练习（DBE-KT22）的新知识追踪数据集，该数据集是从澳大利亚国立大学教授的课程中的在线学生练习系统收集的。我们讨论了 DBE-KT22 数据集的特征，并将其与知识追踪文献中的现有数据集进行了对比。我们的数据集可通过澳大利亚数据档案平台供公众访问。 本文提出一个名为DBE-KT22的新知识追踪数据集，用于支持在线教育中的知识追踪研究。 Ghodai Abdelrahman,Sherif Abdelfattah,Qing Wang,Yu Lin cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Tomohiro Suzuki,Kazuya Takeda,Keisuke Fujii
title: Automatic detection of faults in race walking from a smartphone camera: a comparison of an Olympic medalist and university athletes
title_zh: 通过智能手机摄像头自动检测竞走失误：奥运会奖牌获得者和大学运动员的比较
abstract: Automatic fault detection is a major challenge in many sports. In race walking, referees visually judge faults according to the rules. Hence, ensuring objectivity and fairness while judging is important. To address this issue, some studies have attempted to use sensors and machine learning to automatically detect faults. However, there are problems associated with sensor attachments and equipment such as a high-speed camera, which conflict with the visual judgement of referees, and the interpretability of the fault detection models. In this study, we proposed a fault detection system for non-contact measurement. We used pose estimation and machine learning models trained based on the judgements of multiple qualified referees to realize fair fault judgement. We verified them using smartphone videos of normal race walking and walking with intentional faults in several athletes including the medalist of the Tokyo Olympics. The validation results show that the proposed system detected faults with an average accuracy of over 90%. We also revealed that the machine learning model detects faults according to the rules of race walking. In addition, the intentional faulty walking movement of the medalist was different from that of university walkers. This finding informs realization of a more general fault detection model. The code and data are available at https://github.com/SZucchini/racewalk-aijudge.
summary: Automatic fault detection is a major challenge in many sports. In race walking, referees visually judge faults according to the rules. Hence, ensuring objectivity and fairness while judging is important. To address this issue, some studies have attempted to use sensors and machine learning to automatically detect faults. However, there are problems associated with sensor attachments and equipment such as a high-speed camera, which conflict with the visual judgement of referees, and the interpretability of the fault detection models. In this study, we proposed a fault detection system for non-contact measurement. We used pose estimation and machine learning models trained based on the judgements of multiple qualified referees to realize fair fault judgement. We verified them using smartphone videos of normal race walking and walking with intentional faults in several athletes including the medalist of the Tokyo Olympics. The validation results show that the proposed system detected faults with an average accuracy of over 90%. We also revealed that the machine learning model detects faults according to the rules of race walking. In addition, the intentional faulty walking movement of the medalist was different from that of university walkers. This finding informs realization of a more general fault detection model. The code and data are available at https://github.com/SZucchini/racewalk-aijudge.
abstract_zh: 自动故障检测是许多运动中的主要挑战。在竞走比赛中，裁判员根据规则目测判断失误。因此，保证评审的客观性和公正性非常重要。为了解决这个问题，一些研究尝试使用传感器和机器学习来自动检测故障。然而，传感器附件和高速摄像机等设备存在一些问题，与裁判的视觉判断和故障检测模型的可解释性相冲突。在本研究中，我们提出了一种用于非接触式测量的故障检测系统。我们使用基于多名合格裁判的判断训练的姿态估计和机器学习模型来实现公平的故障判断。我们使用包括东京奥运会奖牌得主在内的几位运动员的正常竞走和故意失误竞走的智能手机视频来验证这些结果。验证结果表明，所提出的系统检测故障的平均准确率超过90%。我们还透露，机器学习模型根据竞走规则来检测故障。此外，奖牌获得者的故意错误步行动作与大学步行者的不同。这一发现为实现更通用的故障检测模型提供了信息。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/SZucchini/racewalk-aijudge 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能手机摄像头的非接触式赛走故障检测系统，通过姿态估计和机器学习模型实现公平判罚。
AI.motivation: 传统赛走裁判依赖人工视觉判断，存在主观性和设备限制，需开发客观且无需传感器的自动检测方法。
AI.method: 结合姿态估计技术与多位裁判标注的机器学习模型，利用智能手机视频分析正常及故意违规动作。
AI.result: 系统平均准确率超90%，发现奥运奖牌得主与大学生运动员的违规动作模式存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可实现客观公平的赛走判罚，且不同运动员的违规特征差异为通用模型优化提供依据。

authors_text: Charlotte Siegmann,Markus Anderljung
title: The Brussels Effect and Artificial Intelligence: How EU regulation will impact the global AI market
title_zh: 布鲁塞尔效应和人工智能：欧盟监管将如何影响全球人工智能市场
abstract: The European Union is likely to introduce among the first, most stringent, and most comprehensive AI regulatory regimes of the world's major jurisdictions. In this report, we ask whether the EU's upcoming regulation for AI will diffuse globally, producing a so-called "Brussels Effect". Building on and extending Anu Bradford's work, we outline the mechanisms by which such regulatory diffusion may occur. We consider both the possibility that the EU's AI regulation will incentivise changes in products offered in non-EU countries (a de facto Brussels Effect) and the possibility it will influence regulation adopted by other jurisdictions (a de jure Brussels Effect). Focusing on the proposed EU AI Act, we tentatively conclude that both de facto and de jure Brussels effects are likely for parts of the EU regulatory regime. A de facto effect is particularly likely to arise in large US tech companies with AI systems that the AI Act terms "high-risk". We argue that the upcoming regulation might be particularly important in offering the first and most influential operationalisation of what it means to develop and deploy trustworthy or human-centred AI. If the EU regime is likely to see significant diffusion, ensuring it is well-designed becomes a matter of global importance.
summary: The European Union is likely to introduce among the first, most stringent, and most comprehensive AI regulatory regimes of the world's major jurisdictions. In this report, we ask whether the EU's upcoming regulation for AI will diffuse globally, producing a so-called "Brussels Effect". Building on and extending Anu Bradford's work, we outline the mechanisms by which such regulatory diffusion may occur. We consider both the possibility that the EU's AI regulation will incentivise changes in products offered in non-EU countries (a de facto Brussels Effect) and the possibility it will influence regulation adopted by other jurisdictions (a de jure Brussels Effect). Focusing on the proposed EU AI Act, we tentatively conclude that both de facto and de jure Brussels effects are likely for parts of the EU regulatory regime. A de facto effect is particularly likely to arise in large US tech companies with AI systems that the AI Act terms "high-risk". We argue that the upcoming regulation might be particularly important in offering the first and most influential operationalisation of what it means to develop and deploy trustworthy or human-centred AI. If the EU regime is likely to see significant diffusion, ensuring it is well-designed becomes a matter of global importance.
abstract_zh: 欧盟可能会推出全球主要司法管辖区中最早、最严格、最全面的人工智能监管制度。在本报告中，我们询问欧盟即将出台的人工智能监管是否会在全球范围内扩散，从而产生所谓的“布鲁塞尔效应”。在 Anu Bradford 的工作的基础上并加以扩展，我们概述了这种监管扩散可能发生的机制。我们考虑欧盟的人工智能法规将激励非欧盟国家提供的产品发生变化（事实上的布鲁塞尔效应）的可能性，以及它将影响其他司法管辖区采用的法规的可能性（法律上的布鲁塞尔效应）。着眼于拟议的欧盟人工智能法案，我们初步得出结论，事实上和法律上的布鲁塞尔效应都可能对欧盟监管制度的部分内容产生影响。事实上的影响特别有可能出现在拥有人工智能系统的美国大型科技公司中，这些系统被《人工智能法案》称为“高风险”。我们认为，即将出台的法规可能特别重要，它可以为开发和部署值得信赖或以人为本的人工智能提供第一个也是最有影响力的实施。如果欧盟制度可能会出现重大扩散，那么确保其设计良好就成为具有全球重要性的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨欧盟人工智能监管法规是否会产生全球性的'布鲁塞尔效应'，即对全球AI市场产生扩散影响。
AI.motivation: 欧盟可能制定全球最严格的人工智能监管框架，研究其是否会对非欧盟国家的产品和法规产生示范效应，具有重要的全球治理意义。
AI.method: 基于Anu Bradford的理论框架，分析欧盟《人工智能法案》的监管机制，区分'事实性布鲁塞尔效应'（产品层面）和'法定性布鲁塞尔效应'（法规层面）两种扩散路径。
AI.result: 研究认为欧盟AI监管可能同时引发事实性和法定性布鲁塞尔效应，尤其对美国大型科技公司的高风险AI系统产生显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 欧盟AI监管框架的完善程度将直接影响全球AI治理格局，其制度设计需兼顾有效性与全球适应性。

conclusion: 欧盟AI监管框架的完善程度将直接影响全球AI治理格局，其制度设计需兼顾有效性与全球适应性。
search_text: The Brussels Effect and Artificial Intelligence: How EU regulation will impact the global AI market 布鲁塞尔效应和人工智能：欧盟监管将如何影响全球人工智能市场 The European Union is likely to introduce among the first, most stringent, and most comprehensive AI regulatory regimes of the world's major jurisdictions. In this report, we ask whether the EU's upcoming regulation for AI will diffuse globally, producing a so-called "Brussels Effect". Building on and extending Anu Bradford's work, we outline the mechanisms by which such regulatory diffusion may occur. We consider both the possibility that the EU's AI regulation will incentivise changes in products offered in non-EU countries (a de facto Brussels Effect) and the possibility it will influence regulation adopted by other jurisdictions (a de jure Brussels Effect). Focusing on the proposed EU AI Act, we tentatively conclude that both de facto and de jure Brussels effects are likely for parts of the EU regulatory regime. A de facto effect is particularly likely to arise in large US tech companies with AI systems that the AI Act terms "high-risk". We argue that the upcoming regulation might be particularly important in offering the first and most influential operationalisation of what it means to develop and deploy trustworthy or human-centred AI. If the EU regime is likely to see significant diffusion, ensuring it is well-designed becomes a matter of global importance. 欧盟可能会推出全球主要司法管辖区中最早、最严格、最全面的人工智能监管制度。在本报告中，我们询问欧盟即将出台的人工智能监管是否会在全球范围内扩散，从而产生所谓的“布鲁塞尔效应”。在 Anu Bradford 的工作的基础上并加以扩展，我们概述了这种监管扩散可能发生的机制。我们考虑欧盟的人工智能法规将激励非欧盟国家提供的产品发生变化（事实上的布鲁塞尔效应）的可能性，以及它将影响其他司法管辖区采用的法规的可能性（法律上的布鲁塞尔效应）。着眼于拟议的欧盟人工智能法案，我们初步得出结论，事实上和法律上的布鲁塞尔效应都可能对欧盟监管制度的部分内容产生影响。事实上的影响特别有可能出现在拥有人工智能系统的美国大型科技公司中，这些系统被《人工智能法案》称为“高风险”。我们认为，即将出台的法规可能特别重要，它可以为开发和部署值得信赖或以人为本的人工智能提供第一个也是最有影响力的实施。如果欧盟制度可能会出现重大扩散，那么确保其设计良好就成为具有全球重要性的问题。 本文探讨欧盟人工智能监管法规是否会产生全球性的'布鲁塞尔效应'，即对全球AI市场产生扩散影响。 Charlotte Siegmann,Markus Anderljung cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Sibendu Paul,Kunal Rao,Giuseppe Coviello,Murugan Sankaradas,Oliver Po,Y. Charlie Hu,Srimat Chakradhar
title: Why is the video analytics accuracy fluctuating, and what can we do about it?
title_zh: 为什么视频分析准确性会波动，我们可以采取什么措施？
abstract: It is a common practice to think of a video as a sequence of images (frames), and re-use deep neural network models that are trained only on images for similar analytics tasks on videos. In this paper, we show that this leap of faith that deep learning models that work well on images will also work well on videos is actually flawed. We show that even when a video camera is viewing a scene that is not changing in any human-perceptible way, and we control for external factors like video compression and environment (lighting), the accuracy of video analytics application fluctuates noticeably. These fluctuations occur because successive frames produced by the video camera may look similar visually, but these frames are perceived quite differently by the video analytics applications. We observed that the root cause for these fluctuations is the dynamic camera parameter changes that a video camera automatically makes in order to capture and produce a visually pleasing video. The camera inadvertently acts as an unintentional adversary because these slight changes in the image pixel values in consecutive frames, as we show, have a noticeably adverse impact on the accuracy of insights from video analytics tasks that re-use image-trained deep learning models. To address this inadvertent adversarial effect from the camera, we explore the use of transfer learning techniques to improve learning in video analytics tasks through the transfer of knowledge from learning on image analytics tasks. In particular, we show that our newly trained Yolov5 model reduces fluctuation in object detection across frames, which leads to better tracking of objects(40% fewer mistakes in tracking). Our paper also provides new directions and techniques to mitigate the camera's adversarial effect on deep learning models used for video analytics applications.
summary: It is a common practice to think of a video as a sequence of images (frames), and re-use deep neural network models that are trained only on images for similar analytics tasks on videos. In this paper, we show that this leap of faith that deep learning models that work well on images will also work well on videos is actually flawed. We show that even when a video camera is viewing a scene that is not changing in any human-perceptible way, and we control for external factors like video compression and environment (lighting), the accuracy of video analytics application fluctuates noticeably. These fluctuations occur because successive frames produced by the video camera may look similar visually, but these frames are perceived quite differently by the video analytics applications. We observed that the root cause for these fluctuations is the dynamic camera parameter changes that a video camera automatically makes in order to capture and produce a visually pleasing video. The camera inadvertently acts as an unintentional adversary because these slight changes in the image pixel values in consecutive frames, as we show, have a noticeably adverse impact on the accuracy of insights from video analytics tasks that re-use image-trained deep learning models. To address this inadvertent adversarial effect from the camera, we explore the use of transfer learning techniques to improve learning in video analytics tasks through the transfer of knowledge from learning on image analytics tasks. In particular, we show that our newly trained Yolov5 model reduces fluctuation in object detection across frames, which leads to better tracking of objects(40% fewer mistakes in tracking). Our paper also provides new directions and techniques to mitigate the camera's adversarial effect on deep learning models used for video analytics applications.
abstract_zh: 通常的做法是将视频视为图像（帧）序列，并重新使用仅针对图像进行训练的深度神经网络模型来执行类似的视频分析任务。在本文中，我们表明，这种相信在图像上运行良好的深度学习模型在视频上也运行良好的信念实际上是有缺陷的。我们表明，即使摄像机正在观看的场景没有以任何人类可感知的方式发生变化，并且我们控制了视频压缩和环境（照明）等外部因素，视频分析应用程序的准确性也会明显波动。出现这些波动的原因是摄像机产生的连续帧在视觉上看起来相似，但视频分析应用程序对这些帧的感知却截然不同。我们观察到，这些波动的根本原因是摄像机为了捕捉和生成视觉上令人愉悦的视频而自动进行的动态摄像机参数变化。相机无意中充当了无意识的对手，因为正如我们所展示的，连续帧中图像像素值的这些微小变化会对重新使用图像训练的深度学习模型的视频分析任务的见解的准确性产生明显的不利影响。为了解决相机无意中产生的对抗性影响，我们探索使用迁移学习技术，通过图像分析任务学习中的知识迁移来改进视频分析任务的学习。特别是，我们表明新训练的 Yolov5 模型减少了跨帧对象检测的波动，从而更好地跟踪对象（跟踪错误减少 40%）。我们的论文还提供了新的方向和技术，以减轻相机对用于视频分析应用的深度学习模型的对抗性影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了视频分析准确率波动的原因，并提出通过迁移学习缓解摄像头参数变化对深度学习模型的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将图像模型直接用于视频分析存在缺陷，因摄像头自动调整参数导致帧间像素值变化，进而影响分析准确性。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习技术，基于图像分析任务的知识训练改进后的Yolov5模型，以减少帧间检测波动。
AI.result: 新模型使目标跟踪错误减少40%，有效缓解了摄像头参数变化引发的准确率波动问题。
AI.conclusion: 摄像头参数变化是视频分析准确率波动的根源，迁移学习可作为有效解决方案，并为应对摄像头对抗效应提供新方向。

authors_text: Attila Egri-Nagy,Antti Törmänen
title: The cost of passing -- using deep learning AIs to expand our understanding of the ancient game of Go
title_zh: 通过的成本——使用深度学习人工智能来扩展我们对围棋这一古老游戏的理解
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, final version will be published elsewhere
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, final version will be published elsewhere
abstract: AI engines utilizing deep learning neural networks provide excellent tools for analyzing traditional board games. Here we are interested in gaining new insights into the ancient game of Go. For that purpose, we need to define new numerical measures based on the raw output of the engines. In this paper, we develop a numerical tool for automated move-by-move performance evaluation in a context-sensitive manner and for recognizing game features. We measure the urgency of a move by the cost of passing, which is the score value difference between the current configuration of stones and after a hypothetical pass in the same board position. Here we investigate the properties of this measure and describe some applications.
summary: AI engines utilizing deep learning neural networks provide excellent tools for analyzing traditional board games. Here we are interested in gaining new insights into the ancient game of Go. For that purpose, we need to define new numerical measures based on the raw output of the engines. In this paper, we develop a numerical tool for automated move-by-move performance evaluation in a context-sensitive manner and for recognizing game features. We measure the urgency of a move by the cost of passing, which is the score value difference between the current configuration of stones and after a hypothetical pass in the same board position. Here we investigate the properties of this measure and describe some applications.
abstract_zh: 利用深度学习神经网络的人工智能引擎为分析传统棋盘游戏提供了出色的工具。在这里，我们有兴趣获得对古老的围棋游戏的新见解。为此，我们需要根据发动机的原始输出定义新的数值测量。在本文中，我们开发了一种数值工具，用于以上下文敏感的方式自动评估每一步棋的表现并识别游戏特征。我们通过传球成本来衡量走棋的紧迫性，传球成本是当前棋子配置与同一棋盘位置假设传球后的得分值差异。在这里，我们研究了该度量的属性并描述了一些应用。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习AI分析围棋，通过定义'让步成本'这一数值指标来评估每一步的紧迫性，并识别游戏特征。
AI.motivation: 传统围棋分析方法难以量化评估单步棋的紧迫性，需借助AI输出开发新指标以深入理解游戏策略。
AI.method: 基于深度学习AI的输出，构建'让步成本'数值工具，通过比较当前棋盘状态与假设让步后的得分差异，实现逐步性能评估和特征识别。
AI.result: 提出'让步成本'作为衡量移动紧迫性的有效指标，验证其特性并应用于围棋分析场景，揭示了新策略特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为围棋研究提供了量化分析新工具，通过AI驱动的数值指标可更精准评估棋局动态与策略价值。

In this paper, we develop a numerical tool for automated move-by-move performance evaluation in a context-sensitive manner and for recognizing game features. We measure the urgency of a move by the cost of passing, which is the score value difference between the current configuration of stones and after a hypothetical pass in the same board position. Here we investigate the properties of this measure and describe some applications. 利用深度学习神经网络的人工智能引擎为分析传统棋盘游戏提供了出色的工具。在这里，我们有兴趣获得对古老的围棋游戏的新见解。为此，我们需要根据发动机的原始输出定义新的数值测量。在本文中，我们开发了一种数值工具，用于以上下文敏感的方式自动评估每一步棋的表现并识别游戏特征。我们通过传球成本来衡量走棋的紧迫性，传球成本是当前棋子配置与同一棋盘位置假设传球后的得分值差异。在这里，我们研究了该度量的属性并描述了一些应用。 本文利用深度学习AI分析围棋，通过定义'让步成本'这一数值指标来评估每一步的紧迫性，并识别游戏特征。 Attila Egri-Nagy,Antti Törmänen cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Wenbin Gan,Yuan Sun
title: Prerequisite-driven Q-matrix Refinement for Learner Knowledge Assessment: A Case Study in Online Learning Context
title_zh: 用于学习者知识评估的先决条件驱动的 Q 矩阵细化：在线学习环境中的案例研究
abstract: The ever growing abundance of learning traces in the online learning platforms promises unique insights into the learner knowledge assessment (LKA), a fundamental personalized-tutoring technique for enabling various further adaptive tutoring services in these platforms. Precise assessment of learner knowledge requires the fine-grained Q-matrix, which is generally designed by experts to map the items to skills in the domain. Due to the subjective tendency, some misspecifications may degrade the performance of LKA. Some efforts have been made to refine the small-scale Q-matrix, however, it is difficult to extend the scalability and apply these methods to the large-scale online learning context with numerous items and massive skills. Moreover, the existing LKA models employ flexible deep learning models that excel at this task, but the adequacy of LKA is still challenged by the representation capability of the models on the quite sparse item-skill graph and the learners' exercise data. To overcome these issues, in this paper we propose a prerequisite-driven Q-matrix refinement framework for learner knowledge assessment (PQRLKA) in online context. We infer the prerequisites from learners' response data and use it to refine the expert-defined Q-matrix, which enables the interpretability and the scalability to apply it to the large-scale online learning context. Based on the refined Q-matrix, we propose a Metapath2Vec enhanced convolutional representation method to obtain the comprehensive representations of the items with rich information, and feed them to the PQRLKA model to finally assess the learners' knowledge. Experiments conducted on three real-world datasets demonstrate the capability of our model to infer the prerequisites for Q-matrix refinement, and also its superiority for the LKA task.
summary: The ever growing abundance of learning traces in the online learning platforms promises unique insights into the learner knowledge assessment (LKA), a fundamental personalized-tutoring technique for enabling various further adaptive tutoring services in these platforms. Precise assessment of learner knowledge requires the fine-grained Q-matrix, which is generally designed by experts to map the items to skills in the domain. Due to the subjective tendency, some misspecifications may degrade the performance of LKA. Some efforts have been made to refine the small-scale Q-matrix, however, it is difficult to extend the scalability and apply these methods to the large-scale online learning context with numerous items and massive skills. Moreover, the existing LKA models employ flexible deep learning models that excel at this task, but the adequacy of LKA is still challenged by the representation capability of the models on the quite sparse item-skill graph and the learners' exercise data. To overcome these issues, in this paper we propose a prerequisite-driven Q-matrix refinement framework for learner knowledge assessment (PQRLKA) in online context. We infer the prerequisites from learners' response data and use it to refine the expert-defined Q-matrix, which enables the interpretability and the scalability to apply it to the large-scale online learning context. Based on the refined Q-matrix, we propose a Metapath2Vec enhanced convolutional representation method to obtain the comprehensive representations of the items with rich information, and feed them to the PQRLKA model to finally assess the learners' knowledge. Experiments conducted on three real-world datasets demonstrate the capability of our model to infer the prerequisites for Q-matrix refinement, and also its superiority for the LKA task.
abstract_zh: 在线学习平台中日益丰富的学习轨迹为学习者知识评估（LKA）提供了独特的见解，LKA是一种基本的个性化辅导技术，可在这些平台上实现各种进一步的自适应辅导服务。对学习者知识的精确评估需要细粒度的 Q 矩阵，该矩阵通常由专家设计，用于将项目映射到该领域的技能。由于主观倾向，一些错误的指定可能会降低 LKA 的性能。人们已经在细化小规模 Q 矩阵方面做出了一些努力，然而，很难扩展可扩展性并将这些方法应用到具有众多项目和大量技能的大规模在线学习环境中。此外，现有的 LKA 模型采用灵活的深度学习模型，在这项任务上表现出色，但 LKA 的充分性仍然受到模型在相当稀疏的项目技能图和学习者练习数据上的表示能力的挑战。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于在线环境中学习者知识评估（PQRLKA）的先决条件驱动的 Q 矩阵细化框架。我们从学习者的响应数据中推断先决条件，并用它来细化专家定义的 Q 矩阵，从而使其具有可解释性和可扩展性，可将其应用于大规模在线学习环境。基于精化的Q矩阵，我们提出了一种Metapath2Vec增强卷积表示方法，以获得具有丰富信息的项目的综合表示，并将其输入PQRLKA模型以最终评估学习者的知识。在三个真实数据集上进行的实验证明了我们的模型推断 Q 矩阵细化先决条件的能力，以及它对于 LKA 任务的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于先决条件驱动的Q矩阵优化框架（PQRLKA），用于改进在线学习环境中的学习者知识评估。
AI.motivation: 现有Q矩阵依赖专家设计且存在主观偏差，难以扩展至大规模在线学习场景；同时，现有模型在稀疏的项目-技能图和学习者数据表征上存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过分析学习者响应数据推断先决条件，优化专家定义的Q矩阵，并结合Metapath2Vec增强的卷积表示方法提升项目表征能力，最终输入PQRLKA模型进行知识评估。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，该模型能有效推断先决条件并提升学习者知识评估性能，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合先决条件驱动的Q矩阵优化与增强表征方法，可有效提升大规模在线学习场景下的学习者知识评估准确性与可扩展性。

authors_text: Soheyl Massoudi,Jürg Schiffmann
title: ARRID: ANN-based Rotordynamics for Robust and Integrated Design
title_zh: ARRID：基于 ANN 的转子动力学，用于稳健的集成设计
comment: Submitted to Machine Learning in Computational Design Workshop of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2022, 4 pages, 1 figure
comments: Submitted to Machine Learning in Computational Design Workshop of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2022, 4 pages, 1 figure
abstract: The purpose of this study is to introduce ANN-based software for the fast evaluation of rotordynamics in the context of robust and integrated design. It is based on a surrogate model made of ensembles of artificial neural networks running in a Bokeh web application. The use of a surrogate model has sped up the computation by three orders of magnitude compared to the current models. ARRID offers fast performance information, including the effect of manufacturing deviations. As such, it helps the designer to make optimal design choices early in the design process. The designer can manipulate the parameters of the design and the operating conditions to obtain performance information in a matter of seconds.
summary: The purpose of this study is to introduce ANN-based software for the fast evaluation of rotordynamics in the context of robust and integrated design. It is based on a surrogate model made of ensembles of artificial neural networks running in a Bokeh web application. The use of a surrogate model has sped up the computation by three orders of magnitude compared to the current models. ARRID offers fast performance information, including the effect of manufacturing deviations. As such, it helps the designer to make optimal design choices early in the design process. The designer can manipulate the parameters of the design and the operating conditions to obtain performance information in a matter of seconds.
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是介绍基于人工神经网络的软件，用于在稳健和集成设计的背景下快速评估转子动力学。它基于由在 Bokeh Web 应用程序中运行的人工神经网络集合组成的代理模型。与当前模型相比，替代模型的使用将计算速度提高了三个数量级。 ARRID 提供快速的性能信息，包括制造偏差的影响。因此，它可以帮助设计人员在设计过程的早期做出最佳的设计选择。设计人员可以操纵设计参数和操作条件，在几秒钟内获得性能信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于人工神经网络（ANN）的ARRID软件，用于加速转子动力学分析以支持鲁棒和集成设计。
AI.motivation: 传统转子动力学计算方法效率低，难以有效评估制造偏差对设计的影响，亟需快速评估工具辅助早期设计优化。
AI.method: 构建基于神经网络集成的代理模型，并通过Bokeh框架开发Web应用，实现参数化快速计算。
AI.result: 计算速度较传统方法提升3个数量级，可在秒级提供包含制造偏差影响的性能分析结果。
AI.conclusion: ARRID工具通过高效计算支持设计师在早期阶段进行参数优化，提升设计鲁棒性和集成效率。

authors_text: Diego Gonzalez Morin,Ester Gonzalez-Sosa,Pablo Perez,Alvaro Villegas
title: Full Body Video-Based Self-Avatars for Mixed Reality: from E2E System to User Study
title_zh: 用于混合现实的基于全身视频的自我化身：从端到端系统到用户研究
comment: Diego Gonzalez-Morin and Ester Gonzalez-Sosa contribute equally
comments: Diego Gonzalez-Morin and Ester Gonzalez-Sosa contribute equally
abstract: In this work we explore the creation of self-avatars through video pass-through in Mixed Reality (MR) applications. We present our end-to-end system, including: custom MR video pass-through implementation on a commercial head mounted display (HMD), our deep learning-based real-time egocentric body segmentation algorithm, and our optimized offloading architecture, to communicate the segmentation server with the HMD. To validate this technology, we designed an immersive VR experience where the user has to walk through a narrow tiles path over an active volcano crater. The study was performed under three body representation conditions: virtual hands, video pass-through with color-based full-body segmentation and video pass-through with deep learning full-body segmentation. This immersive experience was carried out by 30 women and 28 men. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first user study focused on evaluating video-based self-avatars to represent the user in a MR scene. Results showed no significant differences between the different body representations in terms of presence, with moderate improvements in some Embodiment components between the virtual hands and full-body representations. Visual Quality results showed better results from the deep-learning algorithms in terms of the whole body perception and overall segmentation quality. We provide some discussion regarding the use of video-based self-avatars, and some reflections on the evaluation methodology. The proposed E2E solution is in the boundary of the state of the art, so there is still room for improvement before it reaches maturity. However, this solution serves as a crucial starting point for novel MR distributed solutions.
summary: In this work we explore the creation of self-avatars through video pass-through in Mixed Reality (MR) applications. We present our end-to-end system, including: custom MR video pass-through implementation on a commercial head mounted display (HMD), our deep learning-based real-time egocentric body segmentation algorithm, and our optimized offloading architecture, to communicate the segmentation server with the HMD. To validate this technology, we designed an immersive VR experience where the user has to walk through a narrow tiles path over an active volcano crater. The study was performed under three body representation conditions: virtual hands, video pass-through with color-based full-body segmentation and video pass-through with deep learning full-body segmentation. This immersive experience was carried out by 30 women and 28 men. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first user study focused on evaluating video-based self-avatars to represent the user in a MR scene. Results showed no significant differences between the different body representations in terms of presence, with moderate improvements in some Embodiment components between the virtual hands and full-body representations. Visual Quality results showed better results from the deep-learning algorithms in terms of the whole body perception and overall segmentation quality. We provide some discussion regarding the use of video-based self-avatars, and some reflections on the evaluation methodology. The proposed E2E solution is in the boundary of the state of the art, so there is still room for improvement before it reaches maturity. However, this solution serves as a crucial starting point for novel MR distributed solutions.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索在混合现实 (MR) 应用程序中通过视频传递创建自我化身。我们展示我们的端到端系统，包括：在商用头戴式显示器 (HMD) 上实现自定义 MR 视频直通、基于深度学习的实时自我中心身体分割算法，以及优化的卸载架构，用于将分割服务器与 HMD 进行通信。为了验证这项技术，我们设计了一种身临其境的 VR 体验，用户必须穿过活火山火山口上方狭窄的瓷砖路径。该研究在三种身体表征条件下进行：虚拟手、基于颜色的全身分割的视频传递和深度学习全身分割的视频传递。这项沉浸式体验由 30 名女性和 28 名男性进行。据我们所知，这是第一个专注于评估基于视频的自我化身以代表 MR 场景中的用户的用户研究。结果显示，不同身体表征之间在存在感方面没有显着差异，虚拟手和全身表征之间的一些实施例组件有适度改进。视觉质量结果表明，深度学习算法在全身感知和整体分割质量方面取得了更好的结果。我们提供了一些关于使用基于视频的自我化身的讨论，以及对评估方法的一些思考。所提出的E2E解决方案处于最先进技术的边界，因此在成熟之前仍有改进的空间。然而，该解决方案是新型 MR 分布式解决方案的重要起点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全身视频的混合现实（MR）自我化身系统，并通过用户研究评估了不同身体表示方式的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对基于视频的自我化身在混合现实场景中表现的系统性评估，需探索更自然的用户身体表示方式以提升沉浸感。
AI.method: 开发了包含定制MR视频透传系统、实时全身分割算法及优化卸载架构的端到端方案，并设计火山场景VR实验，对比虚拟手、色彩分割和深度学习分割三种身体表示方式。
AI.result: 不同身体表示方式在临场感上无显著差异，但全身表示在具身性部分有所提升；深度学习算法在整体分割质量上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方案处于领域前沿但需进一步优化，为分布式MR系统提供了关键起点，并对评估方法进行了反思。

search_text: Full Body Video-Based Self-Avatars for Mixed Reality: from E2E System to User Study 用于混合现实的基于全身视频的自我化身：从端到端系统到用户研究 In this work we explore the creation of self-avatars through video pass-through in Mixed Reality (MR) applications. We present our end-to-end system, including: custom MR video pass-through implementation on a commercial head mounted display (HMD), our deep learning-based real-time egocentric body segmentation algorithm, and our optimized offloading architecture, to communicate the segmentation server with the HMD. To validate this technology, we designed an immersive VR experience where the user has to walk through a narrow tiles path over an active volcano crater. The study was performed under three body representation conditions: virtual hands, video pass-through with color-based full-body segmentation and video pass-through with deep learning full-body segmentation. This immersive experience was carried out by 30 women and 28 men. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first user study focused on evaluating video-based self-avatars to represent the user in a MR scene. Results showed no significant differences between the different body representations in terms of presence, with moderate improvements in some Embodiment components between the virtual hands and full-body representations. Visual Quality results showed better results from the deep-learning algorithms in terms of the whole body perception and overall segmentation quality. We provide some discussion regarding the use of video-based self-avatars, and some reflections on the evaluation methodology. The proposed E2E solution is in the boundary of the state of the art, so there is still room for improvement before it reaches maturity. However, this solution serves as a crucial starting point for novel MR distributed solutions. 在这项工作中，我们探索在混合现实 (MR) 应用程序中通过视频传递创建自我化身。我们展示我们的端到端系统，包括：在商用头戴式显示器 (HMD) 上实现自定义 MR 视频直通、基于深度学习的实时自我中心身体分割算法，以及优化的卸载架构，用于将分割服务器与 HMD 进行通信。为了验证这项技术，我们设计了一种身临其境的 VR 体验，用户必须穿过活火山火山口上方狭窄的瓷砖路径。该研究在三种身体表征条件下进行：虚拟手、基于颜色的全身分割的视频传递和深度学习全身分割的视频传递。这项沉浸式体验由 30 名女性和 28 名男性进行。据我们所知，这是第一个专注于评估基于视频的自我化身以代表 MR 场景中的用户的用户研究。结果显示，不同身体表征之间在存在感方面没有显着差异，虚拟手和全身表征之间的一些实施例组件有适度改进。视觉质量结果表明，深度学习算法在全身感知和整体分割质量方面取得了更好的结果。我们提供了一些关于使用基于视频的自我化身的讨论，以及对评估方法的一些思考。所提出的E2E解决方案处于最先进技术的边界，因此在成熟之前仍有改进的空间。然而，该解决方案是新型 MR 分布式解决方案的重要起点。 本文提出了一种基于全身视频的混合现实（MR）自我化身系统，并通过用户研究评估了不同身体表示方式的效果。 Diego Gonzalez Morin,Ester Gonzalez-Sosa,Pablo Perez,Alvaro Villegas cs.CV

authors_text: Fabiano Pereira de Oliveira,Christiane Gresse von Wangenheim,Jean C. R. Hauck
title: TMIC: App Inventor Extension for the Deployment of Image Classification Models Exported from Teachable Machine
title_zh: TMIC：用于部署从可教机器导出的图像分类模型的 App Inventor 扩展
abstract: TMIC is an App Inventor extension for the deployment of ML models for image classification developed with Google Teachable Machine in educational settings. Google Teachable Machine, is an intuitive visual tool that provides workflow-oriented support for the development of ML models for image classification. Aiming at the usage of models developed with Google Teachable Machine, the extension TMIC enables the deployment of the trained models exported as TensorFlow.js to Google Cloud as part of App Inventor, one of the most popular block-based programming environments for teaching computing in K-12. The extension was created with the App Inventor extension framework based on the extension PIC and is available under the BSD 3 license. It can be used for teaching ML in K-12, in introductory courses in higher education or by anyone interested in creating intelligent apps with image classification. The extension TMIC is being developed by the initiative Computação na Escola of the Department of Informatics and Statistics at the Federal University of Santa Catarina/Brazil as part of a research effort aiming at introducing AI education in K-12.
summary: TMIC is an App Inventor extension for the deployment of ML models for image classification developed with Google Teachable Machine in educational settings. Google Teachable Machine, is an intuitive visual tool that provides workflow-oriented support for the development of ML models for image classification. Aiming at the usage of models developed with Google Teachable Machine, the extension TMIC enables the deployment of the trained models exported as TensorFlow.js to Google Cloud as part of App Inventor, one of the most popular block-based programming environments for teaching computing in K-12. The extension was created with the App Inventor extension framework based on the extension PIC and is available under the BSD 3 license. It can be used for teaching ML in K-12, in introductory courses in higher education or by anyone interested in creating intelligent apps with image classification. The extension TMIC is being developed by the initiative Computação na Escola of the Department of Informatics and Statistics at the Federal University of Santa Catarina/Brazil as part of a research effort aiming at introducing AI education in K-12.
abstract_zh: TMIC 是一个 App Inventor 扩展，用于部署在教育环境中使用 Google Teachable Machine 开发的用于图像分类的 ML 模型。 Google Teachable Machine 是一种直观的可视化工具，可为图像分类的 ML 模型的开发提供面向工作流程的支持。针对使用 Google Teachable Machine 开发的模型的使用，扩展 TMIC 可以将作为 TensorFlow.js 导出的训练模型部署到 Google Cloud，作为 App Inventor 的一部分，App Inventor 是用于 K-12 教学计算的最流行的基于块的编程环境之一。该扩展是使用基于扩展 PIC 的 App Inventor 扩展框架创建的，可在 BSD 3 许可证下使用。它可用于 K-12 中的 ML 教学、高等教育的入门课程或任何有兴趣创建具有图像分类功能的智能应用程序的人。 TMIC 扩展是由巴西圣卡塔琳娜联邦大学信息学和统计系的 Computação na Escola 计划开发的，作为旨在将人工智能教育引入 K-12 的研究工作的一部分。

AI.tldr: 开发TMIC扩展以在教育环境中部署图像分类模型
AI.motivation: Teachable Machine缺乏模型部署工具，而App Inventor在K-12教育中广泛使用，因此需要TMIC来支持AI教学
AI.method: 基于App Inventor扩展框架和PIC开发，将TensorFlow.js模型部署至Google Cloud
AI.result: 实现了TMIC扩展，支持在App Inventor中使用Teachable Machine模型，促进AI教育应用
AI.conclusion: TMIC扩展有效支持教育中的AI教学，推动K-12阶段的AI教育普及

authors_text: Jafar Jafarov
title: Four Algorithms for Correlation Clustering: A Survey
title_zh: 相关聚类的四种算法：调查
abstract: In the Correlation Clustering problem, we are given a set of objects with pairwise similarity information. Our aim is to partition these objects into clusters that match this information as closely as possible. More specifically, the pairwise information is given as a weighted graph $G$ with its edges labelled as ``similar" or ``dissimilar" by a binary classifier. The goal is to produce a clustering that minimizes the weight of ``disagreements": the sum of the weights of similar edges across clusters and dissimilar edges within clusters. In this exposition we focus on the case when $G$ is complete and unweighted. We explore four approximation algorithms for the Correlation Clustering problem under this assumption. In particular, we describe the following algorithms: (i) the $17429-$approximation algorithm by Bansal, Blum, and Chawla, (ii) the $4-$approximation algorithm by Charikar, Guruswami, and Wirth (iii) the $3-$approximation algorithm by Ailon, Charikar, and Newman (iv) the $2.06-$approximation algorithm by Chawla, Makarychev, Schramm, and Yaroslavtsev.
summary: In the Correlation Clustering problem, we are given a set of objects with pairwise similarity information. Our aim is to partition these objects into clusters that match this information as closely as possible. More specifically, the pairwise information is given as a weighted graph $G$ with its edges labelled as ``similar" or ``dissimilar" by a binary classifier. The goal is to produce a clustering that minimizes the weight of ``disagreements": the sum of the weights of similar edges across clusters and dissimilar edges within clusters. In this exposition we focus on the case when $G$ is complete and unweighted. We explore four approximation algorithms for the Correlation Clustering problem under this assumption. In particular, we describe the following algorithms: (i) the $17429-$approximation algorithm by Bansal, Blum, and Chawla, (ii) the $4-$approximation algorithm by Charikar, Guruswami, and Wirth (iii) the $3-$approximation algorithm by Ailon, Charikar, and Newman (iv) the $2.06-$approximation algorithm by Chawla, Makarychev, Schramm, and Yaroslavtsev.
abstract_zh: 在相关聚类问题中，我们给出一组具有成对相似性信息的对象。我们的目标是将这些对象划分为尽可能匹配这些信息的簇。更具体地说，成对信息以加权图 $G$ 的形式给出，其边缘被二元分类器标记为“相似”或“不相似”。目标是产生一个最小化“不一致”权重的聚类：簇间相似边和簇内不相似边的权重之和。在本次阐述中，我们重点关注 $G$ 完整且未加权的情况。在此假设下，我们探索了相关聚类问题的四种近似算法。特别是，我们描述了以下算法：(i) Bansal、Blum 和的 $17429-$ 近似算法Chawla，(ii) Charikar、Guruswami 和 Wirth 提出的 $4-$ 近似算法 (iii) Ailon、Charikar 和 Newman 提出的 $3-$ 近似算法 (iv) Chawla、Makarychev、Schramm 和 Yaroslavtsev 提出的 $2.06-$ 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了关联聚类问题的四种近似算法，旨在通过最小化相似边跨簇和不同边内簇的权重之和来划分对象簇。
AI.motivation: 关联聚类在数据聚类领域具有重要应用，但精确求解大规模数据的复杂度极高，因此需要高效的近似算法。
AI.method: 通过分析完全无权图的关联聚类问题，系统阐述了四种代表性近似算法的原理及实现方式。
AI.result: 总结了不同算法的近似比（17429→4→3→2.06），展示了算法优化的演进过程及性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 近似算法为大规模关联聚类提供了可行解决方案，未来研究可进一步优化近似比与实际应用适配性。

motivation: 关联聚类在数据聚类领域具有重要应用，但精确求解大规模数据的复杂度极高，因此需要高效的近似算法。
method: 通过分析完全无权图的关联聚类问题，系统阐述了四种代表性近似算法的原理及实现方式。
result: 总结了不同算法的近似比（17429→4→3→2.06），展示了算法优化的演进过程及性能差异。
conclusion: 近似算法为大规模关联聚类提供了可行解决方案，未来研究可进一步优化近似比与实际应用适配性。
search_text: Four Algorithms for Correlation Clustering: A Survey 相关聚类的四种算法：调查 In the Correlation Clustering problem, we are given a set of objects with pairwise similarity information. Our aim is to partition these objects into clusters that match this information as closely as possible. More specifically, the pairwise information is given as a weighted graph $G$ with its edges labelled as ``similar" or ``dissimilar" by a binary classifier. The goal is to produce a clustering that minimizes the weight of ``disagreements": the sum of the weights of similar edges across clusters and dissimilar edges within clusters. In this exposition we focus on the case when $G$ is complete and unweighted. We explore four approximation algorithms for the Correlation Clustering problem under this assumption. In particular, we describe the following algorithms: (i) the $17429-$approximation algorithm by Bansal, Blum, and Chawla, (ii) the $4-$approximation algorithm by Charikar, Guruswami, and Wirth (iii) the $3-$approximation algorithm by Ailon, Charikar, and Newman (iv) the $2.06-$approximation algorithm by Chawla, Makarychev, Schramm, and Yaroslavtsev. 在相关聚类问题中，我们给出一组具有成对相似性信息的对象。我们的目标是将这些对象划分为尽可能匹配这些信息的簇。更具体地说，成对信息以加权图 $G$ 的形式给出，其边缘被二元分类器标记为“相似”或“不相似”。目标是产生一个最小化“不一致”权重的聚类：簇间相似边和簇内不相似边的权重之和。在本次阐述中，我们重点关注 $G$ 完整且未加权的情况。在此假设下，我们探索了相关聚类问题的四种近似算法。特别是，我们描述了以下算法：(i) Bansal、Blum 和的 $17429-$ 近似算法Chawla，(ii) Charikar、Guruswami 和 Wirth 提出的 $4-$ 近似算法 (iii) Ailon、Charikar 和 Newman 提出的 $3-$ 近似算法 (iv) Chawla、Makarychev、Schramm 和 Yaroslavtsev 提出的 $2.06-$ 近似算法。 本文综述了关联聚类问题的四种近似算法，旨在通过最小化相似边跨簇和不同边内簇的权重之和来划分对象簇。 Jafar Jafarov cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Satoshi Kondo,Satoshi Kasai,Kousuke Hirasawa
title: A Two Step Approach for Whole Slide Image Registration
title_zh: 整个幻灯片图像配准的两步方法
abstract: Multi-stain whole-slide-image (WSI) registration is an active field of research. It is unclear, however, how the current WSI registration methods would perform on a real-world data set. AutomatiC Registration Of Breast cAncer Tissue (ACROBAT) challenge is held to verify the performance of the current WSI registration methods by using a new dataset that originates from routine diagnostics to assess real-world applicability. In this report, we present our solution for the ACROBAT challenge. We employ a two-step approach including rigid and non-rigid transforms. The experimental results show that the median 90th percentile is 1,250 um for the validation dataset.
summary: Multi-stain whole-slide-image (WSI) registration is an active field of research. It is unclear, however, how the current WSI registration methods would perform on a real-world data set. AutomatiC Registration Of Breast cAncer Tissue (ACROBAT) challenge is held to verify the performance of the current WSI registration methods by using a new dataset that originates from routine diagnostics to assess real-world applicability. In this report, we present our solution for the ACROBAT challenge. We employ a two-step approach including rigid and non-rigid transforms. The experimental results show that the median 90th percentile is 1,250 um for the validation dataset.
abstract_zh: 多染色全切片图像（WSI）配准是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，目前尚不清楚当前的 WSI 注册方法将如何在现实世界的数据集上执行。乳腺癌组织自动注册 (ACROBAT) 挑战赛的目的是通过使用源自常规诊断的新数据集来验证当前 WSI 注册方法的性能，以评估现实世界的适用性。在本报告中，我们介绍了针对 ACROBAT 挑战的解决方案。我们采用两步方法，包括刚性和非刚性变换。实验结果表明，验证数据集的 90% 中位数为 1,250 um。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两步法用于多染色全切片图像配准，以应对真实数据集的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有WSI配准方法在真实诊断数据集上的表现尚未明确，需通过ACROBAT挑战赛验证其实际应用效果。
AI.method: 采用包含刚性变换和非刚性变换的两步配准方法。
AI.result: 验证数据集的中位数90百分位误差为1,250微米。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在真实数据集上表现有效，但需进一步优化以提高配准精度。

authors_text: Sander De Coninck,Wei-Cheng Wang,Sam Leroux,Pieter Simoens
title: Selective manipulation of disentangled representations for privacy-aware facial image processing
title_zh: 选择性操纵解开的表示以进行隐私感知的面部图像处理
comment: Accepted to the MLCS workshop at ECML PKDD 2022
comments: Accepted to the MLCS workshop at ECML PKDD 2022
abstract: Camera sensors are increasingly being combined with machine learning to perform various tasks such as intelligent surveillance. Due to its computational complexity, most of these machine learning algorithms are offloaded to the cloud for processing. However, users are increasingly concerned about privacy issues such as function creep and malicious usage by third-party cloud providers. To alleviate this, we propose an edge-based filtering stage that removes privacy-sensitive attributes before the sensor data are transmitted to the cloud. We use state-of-the-art image manipulation techniques that leverage disentangled representations to achieve privacy filtering. We define opt-in and opt-out filter operations and evaluate their effectiveness for filtering private attributes from face images. Additionally, we examine the effect of naturally occurring correlations and residual information on filtering. We find the results promising and believe this elicits further research on how image manipulation can be used for privacy preservation.
summary: Camera sensors are increasingly being combined with machine learning to perform various tasks such as intelligent surveillance. Due to its computational complexity, most of these machine learning algorithms are offloaded to the cloud for processing. However, users are increasingly concerned about privacy issues such as function creep and malicious usage by third-party cloud providers. To alleviate this, we propose an edge-based filtering stage that removes privacy-sensitive attributes before the sensor data are transmitted to the cloud. We use state-of-the-art image manipulation techniques that leverage disentangled representations to achieve privacy filtering. We define opt-in and opt-out filter operations and evaluate their effectiveness for filtering private attributes from face images. Additionally, we examine the effect of naturally occurring correlations and residual information on filtering. We find the results promising and believe this elicits further research on how image manipulation can be used for privacy preservation.
abstract_zh: 相机传感器越来越多地与机器学习相结合，以执行智能监控等各种任务。由于其计算复杂性，大多数机器学习算法都被卸载到云端进行处理。然而，用户越来越担心功能蠕变、第三方云提供商恶意使用等隐私问题。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了一个基于边缘的过滤阶段，该阶段可以在传感器数据传输到云端之前删除隐私敏感属性。我们使用最先进的图像处理技术，利用解开的表示来实现隐私过滤。我们定义选择加入和选择退出过滤器操作，并评估它们从面部图像中过滤私有属性的有效性。此外，我们还研究了自然发生的相关性和残留信息对过滤的影响。我们发现结果很有希望，并相信这引发了对如何使用图像处理来保护隐私的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边缘计算的隐私保护方法，通过解耦表示技术对人脸图像进行选择性处理，以去除敏感属性。
AI.motivation: 随着云计算处理机器学习任务的普及，用户担忧第三方云服务提供商可能导致隐私泄露（如功能蔓延和恶意使用）。
AI.method: 在传感器数据上传云端前，采用边缘计算过滤阶段，利用解耦表示技术实现隐私敏感属性的去除，并定义了可选的过滤操作。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在过滤人脸图像隐私属性上的有效性，同时发现自然相关性和残差信息对过滤效果有影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了图像处理技术在隐私保护中的潜力，未来需进一步研究如何优化此类技术以增强隐私保障。

authors_text: Charl Maree,Christian W. Omlin
title: Symbolic Explanation of Affinity-Based Reinforcement Learning Agents with Markov Models
title_zh: 基于亲和力的强化学习智能体与马尔可夫模型的符号解释
abstract: The proliferation of artificial intelligence is increasingly dependent on model understanding. Understanding demands both an interpretation - a human reasoning about a model's behavior - and an explanation - a symbolic representation of the functioning of the model. Notwithstanding the imperative of transparency for safety, trust, and acceptance, the opacity of state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms conceals the rudiments of their learned strategies. We have developed a policy regularization method that asserts the global intrinsic affinities of learned strategies. These affinities provide a means of reasoning about a policy's behavior, thus making it inherently interpretable. We have demonstrated our method in personalized prosperity management where individuals' spending behavior in time dictate their investment strategies, i.e. distinct spending personalities may have dissimilar associations with different investment classes. We now explain our model by reproducing the underlying prototypical policies with discretized Markov models. These global surrogates are symbolic representations of the prototypical policies.
summary: The proliferation of artificial intelligence is increasingly dependent on model understanding. Understanding demands both an interpretation - a human reasoning about a model's behavior - and an explanation - a symbolic representation of the functioning of the model. Notwithstanding the imperative of transparency for safety, trust, and acceptance, the opacity of state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms conceals the rudiments of their learned strategies. We have developed a policy regularization method that asserts the global intrinsic affinities of learned strategies. These affinities provide a means of reasoning about a policy's behavior, thus making it inherently interpretable. We have demonstrated our method in personalized prosperity management where individuals' spending behavior in time dictate their investment strategies, i.e. distinct spending personalities may have dissimilar associations with different investment classes. We now explain our model by reproducing the underlying prototypical policies with discretized Markov models. These global surrogates are symbolic representations of the prototypical policies.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的扩散越来越依赖于模型理解。理解需要解释（人类对模型行为的推理）和解释（模型功能的符号表示）。尽管透明度对于安全、信任和接受至关重要，但最先进的强化学习算法的不透明性掩盖了其学习策略的基本原理。我们开发了一种策略正则化方法，该方法断言学习策略的全局内在亲和力。这些相似性提供了一种推理策略行为的方法，从而使其本质上是可解释的。我们已经展示了个性化繁荣管理的方法，其中个人的消费行为及时决定了他们的投资策略，即不同的消费个性可能与不同的投资类别有不同的关联。现在，我们通过使用离散马尔可夫模型重现底层原型策略来解释我们的模型。这些全球替代品是原型政策的象征性代表。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于马尔可夫模型的符号化解释方法，用于增强基于亲和力的强化学习代理的透明度。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习算法的不透明性阻碍了其在安全、信任和接受度关键场景中的应用，需通过符号化解释提升策略可解释性。
AI.method: 开发了策略正则化方法以捕捉策略的全局内在亲和力，并通过离散化马尔可夫模型生成原型策略的符号化替代模型。
AI.result: 在个性化财富管理场景中验证了方法有效性，展示了不同消费行为模式与投资策略间的符号化关联规则。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为强化学习策略提供了可解释的符号化表示，有助于提升AI系统的透明度和可信度。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于马尔可夫模型的符号化解释方法，用于增强基于亲和力的强化学习代理的透明度。
motivation: 当前强化学习算法的不透明性阻碍了其在安全、信任和接受度关键场景中的应用，需通过符号化解释提升策略可解释性。
method: 开发了策略正则化方法以捕捉策略的全局内在亲和力，并通过离散化马尔可夫模型生成原型策略的符号化替代模型。
result: 在个性化财富管理场景中验证了方法有效性，展示了不同消费行为模式与投资策略间的符号化关联规则。
conclusion: 该方法为强化学习策略提供了可解释的符号化表示，有助于提升AI系统的透明度和可信度。
search_text: Symbolic Explanation of Affinity-Based Reinforcement Learning Agents with Markov Models 基于亲和力的强化学习智能体与马尔可夫模型的符号解释 The proliferation of artificial intelligence is increasingly dependent on model understanding. Understanding demands both an interpretation - a human reasoning about a model's behavior - and an explanation - a symbolic representation of the functioning of the model. Notwithstanding the imperative of transparency for safety, trust, and acceptance, the opacity of state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms conceals the rudiments of their learned strategies. We have developed a policy regularization method that asserts the global intrinsic affinities of learned strategies. These affinities provide a means of reasoning about a policy's behavior, thus making it inherently interpretable. We have demonstrated our method in personalized prosperity management where individuals' spending behavior in time dictate their investment strategies, i.e. distinct spending personalities may have dissimilar associations with different investment classes. We now explain our model by reproducing the underlying prototypical policies with discretized Markov models. These global surrogates are symbolic representations of the prototypical policies. 人工智能的扩散越来越依赖于模型理解。理解需要解释（人类对模型行为的推理）和解释（模型功能的符号表示）。尽管透明度对于安全、信任和接受至关重要，但最先进的强化学习算法的不透明性掩盖了其学习策略的基本原理。我们开发了一种策略正则化方法，该方法断言学习策略的全局内在亲和力。这些相似性提供了一种推理策略行为的方法，从而使其本质上是可解释的。我们已经展示了个性化繁荣管理的方法，其中个人的消费行为及时决定了他们的投资策略，即不同的消费个性可能与不同的投资类别有不同的关联。现在，我们通过使用离散马尔可夫模型重现底层原型策略来解释我们的模型。这些全球替代品是原型政策的象征性代表。 本文提出了一种基于马尔可夫模型的符号化解释方法，用于增强基于亲和力的强化学习代理的透明度。 Charl Maree,Christian W. Omlin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Simon Roburin,Charles Corbière,Gilles Puy,Nicolas Thome,Matthieu Aubry,Renaud Marlet,Patrick Pérez
title: Take One Gram of Neural Features, Get Enhanced Group Robustness
title_zh: 采用一克神经特征，增强群体鲁棒性
comment: Long version (Previous version: OOD-CV Workshop @ ECCV 2022)
comments: Long version (Previous version: OOD-CV Workshop @ ECCV 2022)
abstract: Predictive performance of machine learning models trained with empirical risk minimization (ERM) can degrade considerably under distribution shifts. The presence of spurious correlations in training datasets leads ERM-trained models to display high loss when evaluated on minority groups not presenting such correlations. Extensive attempts have been made to develop methods improving worst-group robustness. However, they require group information for each training input or at least, a validation set with group labels to tune their hyperparameters, which may be expensive to get or unknown a priori. In this paper, we address the challenge of improving group robustness without group annotation during training or validation. To this end, we propose to partition the training dataset into groups based on Gram matrices of features extracted by an ``identification'' model and to apply robust optimization based on these pseudo-groups. In the realistic context where no group labels are available, our experiments show that our approach not only improves group robustness over ERM but also outperforms all recent baselines
summary: Predictive performance of machine learning models trained with empirical risk minimization (ERM) can degrade considerably under distribution shifts. The presence of spurious correlations in training datasets leads ERM-trained models to display high loss when evaluated on minority groups not presenting such correlations. Extensive attempts have been made to develop methods improving worst-group robustness. However, they require group information for each training input or at least, a validation set with group labels to tune their hyperparameters, which may be expensive to get or unknown a priori. In this paper, we address the challenge of improving group robustness without group annotation during training or validation. To this end, we propose to partition the training dataset into groups based on Gram matrices of features extracted by an ``identification'' model and to apply robust optimization based on these pseudo-groups. In the realistic context where no group labels are available, our experiments show that our approach not only improves group robustness over ERM but also outperforms all recent baselines
abstract_zh: 经过经验风险最小化 (ERM) 训练的机器学习模型的预测性能在分布变化下可能会大幅下降。训练数据集中存在虚假相关性，导致 ERM 训练的模型在对不存在此类相关性的少数群体进行评估时显示出较高的损失。人们已经进行了广泛的尝试来开发提高最差群体鲁棒性的方法。然而，它们需要每个训练输入的组信息，或者至少需要一个带有组标签的验证集来调整它们的超参数，而获得这些信息可能会很昂贵或者是先验未知的。在本文中，我们解决了在训练或验证期间无需进行组注释的情况下提高组鲁棒性的挑战。为此，我们建议根据“识别”模型提取的特征的 Gram 矩阵将训练数据集划分为组，并基于这些伪组应用鲁棒优化。在没有可用组标签的现实环境中，我们的实验表明，我们的方法不仅提高了 ERM 上的组稳健性，而且优于所有最近的基线

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需群体标注的提升机器学习模型群体鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有提升群体鲁棒性的方法依赖训练或验证阶段的群体标注信息，而实际场景中此类信息往往难以获取。
AI.method: 通过识别模型提取特征的Gram矩阵划分伪群体，并基于这些伪群体进行鲁棒优化。
AI.result: 在无群体标签的现实场景中，该方法在群体鲁棒性上优于ERM及最新基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 无需群体标注即可有效提升模型群体鲁棒性，为实际应用提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Hanna Müller,Vlad Niculescu,Tommaso Polonelli,Michele Magno,Luca Benini
title: Robust and Efficient Depth-based Obstacle Avoidance for Autonomous Miniaturized UAVs
title_zh: 自主小型无人机稳健、高效的基于深度的避障
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Nano-size drones hold enormous potential to explore unknown and complex environments. Their small size makes them agile and safe for operation close to humans and allows them to navigate through narrow spaces. However, their tiny size and payload restrict the possibilities for on-board computation and sensing, making fully autonomous flight extremely challenging. The first step towards full autonomy is reliable obstacle avoidance, which has proven to be technically challenging by itself in a generic indoor environment. Current approaches utilize vision-based or 1-dimensional sensors to support nano-drone perception algorithms. This work presents a lightweight obstacle avoidance system based on a novel millimeter form factor 64 pixels multi-zone Time-of-Flight (ToF) sensor and a generalized model-free control policy. Reported in-field tests are based on the Crazyflie 2.1, extended by a custom multi-zone ToF deck, featuring a total flight mass of 35g. The algorithm only uses 0.3% of the on-board processing power (210uS execution time) with a frame rate of 15fps, providing an excellent foundation for many future applications. Less than 10% of the total drone power is needed to operate the proposed perception system, including both lifting and operating the sensor. The presented autonomous nano-size drone reaches 100% reliability at 0.5m/s in a generic and previously unexplored indoor environment. The proposed system is released open-source with an extensive dataset including ToF and gray-scale camera data, coupled with UAV position ground truth from motion capture.

Reported in-field tests are based on the Crazyflie 2.1, extended by a custom multi-zone ToF deck, featuring a total flight mass of 35g. The algorithm only uses 0.3% of the on-board processing power (210uS execution time) with a frame rate of 15fps, providing an excellent foundation for many future applications. The presented autonomous nano-size drone reaches 100% reliability at 0.5m/s in a generic and previously unexplored indoor environment. The proposed system is released open-source with an extensive dataset including ToF and gray-scale camera data, coupled with UAV position ground truth from motion capture.
abstract_zh: 纳米无人机在探索未知和复杂的环境方面具有巨大的潜力。它们体积小，使它们能够灵活、安全地靠近人类操作，并允许它们在狭窄的空间中导航。然而，它们的微小尺寸和有效载荷限制了机载计算和传感的可能性，使得完全自主飞行极具挑战性。实现完全自主的第一步是可靠的避障，事实证明，在一般的室内环境中，这本身就具有技术挑战性。当前的方法利用基于视觉或一维传感器来支持纳米无人机感知算法。这项工作提出了一种基于新型毫米外形 64 像素多区域飞行时间 (ToF) 传感器和通用无模型控制策略的轻型避障系统。报道的现场测试基于 Crazyflie 2.1，并通过定制的多区域 ToF 甲板进行扩展，总飞行质量为 35 克。该算法仅使用0.3%的板载处理能力（210uS执行时间），帧速率为15fps，为许多未来的应用提供了良好的基础。操作拟议的感知系统（包括提升和操作传感器）所需的无人机总功率不到 10%。所展示的自主纳米级无人机在通用且先前未探索的室内环境中以 0.5m/s 的速度达到 100% 的可靠性。所提出的系统是开源发布的，具有广泛的数据集，包括 ToF 和灰度相机数据，以及来自运动捕捉的无人机位置地面实况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于毫米级多区域飞行时间（ToF）传感器和无模型控制策略的轻量级避障系统，用于实现微型无人机的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 微型无人机因体积小、载重有限，难以搭载高性能计算和感知设备，导致自主避障技术面临重大挑战，亟需高效可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计集成多区域 ToF 传感器的定制硬件扩展板，结合无需复杂建模的控制策略，在 Crazyflie 2.1 无人机上实现低功耗、低计算量的实时避障算法。
AI.result: 系统仅占用 0.3% 的计算资源（210μs/帧），功耗占总功率的 10% 以下，在未知室内环境中以 0.5m/s 速度实现 100% 避障可靠性，并开源了数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为微型无人机自主飞行提供了高效可靠的避障基础，其低功耗特性和开源数据集可推动更多相关应用研究。

The proposed system is released open-source with an extensive dataset including ToF and gray-scale camera data, coupled with UAV position ground truth from motion capture. 纳米无人机在探索未知和复杂的环境方面具有巨大的潜力。它们体积小，使它们能够灵活、安全地靠近人类操作，并允许它们在狭窄的空间中导航。然而，它们的微小尺寸和有效载荷限制了机载计算和传感的可能性，使得完全自主飞行极具挑战性。实现完全自主的第一步是可靠的避障，事实证明，在一般的室内环境中，这本身就具有技术挑战性。当前的方法利用基于视觉或一维传感器来支持纳米无人机感知算法。这项工作提出了一种基于新型毫米外形 64 像素多区域飞行时间 (ToF) 传感器和通用无模型控制策略的轻型避障系统。报道的现场测试基于 Crazyflie 2.1，并通过定制的多区域 ToF 甲板进行扩展，总飞行质量为 35 克。该算法仅使用0.3%的板载处理能力（210uS执行时间），帧速率为15fps，为许多未来的应用提供了良好的基础。操作拟议的感知系统（包括提升和操作传感器）所需的无人机总功率不到 10%。所展示的自主纳米级无人机在通用且先前未探索的室内环境中以 0.5m/s 的速度达到 100% 的可靠性。所提出的系统是开源发布的，具有广泛的数据集，包括 ToF 和灰度相机数据，以及来自运动捕捉的无人机位置地面实况。 本文提出一种基于毫米级多区域飞行时间（ToF）传感器和无模型控制策略的轻量级避障系统，用于实现微型无人机的自主导航。 Hanna Müller,Vlad Niculescu,Tommaso Polonelli,Michele Magno,Luca Benini cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Baomin Wang,Geng Hu,Dan Chen,Lihua Hu,Cheng Li,Yu An,Guiping Hu,Guang Jia
title: From WSI-level to Patch-level: Structure Prior Guided Binuclear Cell Fine-grained Detection
title_zh: 从WSI级到补丁级：结构先验引导双核细胞细粒度检测
abstract: Accurately and quickly binuclear cell (BC) detection plays a significant role in predicting the risk of leukemia and other malignant tumors. However, manual microscopy counting is time-consuming and lacks objectivity. Moreover, with the limitation of staining quality and diversity of morphology features in BC microscopy whole slide images (WSIs), traditional image processing approaches are helpless. To overcome this challenge, we propose a two-stage detection method inspired by the structure prior of BC based on deep learning, which cascades to implement BCs coarse detection at the WSI-level and fine-grained classification in patch-level. The coarse detection network is a multi-task detection framework based on circular bounding boxes for cells detection, and central key points for nucleus detection. The circle representation reduces the degrees of freedom, mitigates the effect of surrounding impurities compared to usual rectangular boxes and can be rotation invariant in WSI. Detecting key points in the nucleus can assist network perception and be used for unsupervised color layer segmentation in later fine-grained classification. The fine classification network consists of a background region suppression module based on color layer mask supervision and a key region selection module based on a transformer due to its global modeling capability. Additionally, an unsupervised and unpaired cytoplasm generator network is firstly proposed to expand the long-tailed distribution dataset. Finally, experiments are performed on BC multicenter datasets. The proposed BC fine detection method outperforms other benchmarks in almost all the evaluation criteria, providing clarification and support for tasks such as cancer screenings.
summary: Accurately and quickly binuclear cell (BC) detection plays a significant role in predicting the risk of leukemia and other malignant tumors. However, manual microscopy counting is time-consuming and lacks objectivity. Moreover, with the limitation of staining quality and diversity of morphology features in BC microscopy whole slide images (WSIs), traditional image processing approaches are helpless. To overcome this challenge, we propose a two-stage detection method inspired by the structure prior of BC based on deep learning, which cascades to implement BCs coarse detection at the WSI-level and fine-grained classification in patch-level. The coarse detection network is a multi-task detection framework based on circular bounding boxes for cells detection, and central key points for nucleus detection. The circle representation reduces the degrees of freedom, mitigates the effect of surrounding impurities compared to usual rectangular boxes and can be rotation invariant in WSI. Detecting key points in the nucleus can assist network perception and be used for unsupervised color layer segmentation in later fine-grained classification. The fine classification network consists of a background region suppression module based on color layer mask supervision and a key region selection module based on a transformer due to its global modeling capability. Additionally, an unsupervised and unpaired cytoplasm generator network is firstly proposed to expand the long-tailed distribution dataset. Finally, experiments are performed on BC multicenter datasets. The proposed BC fine detection method outperforms other benchmarks in almost all the evaluation criteria, providing clarification and support for tasks such as cancer screenings.
abstract_zh: 准确、快速的双核细胞（BC）检测对于预测白血病和其他恶性肿瘤的风险具有重要作用。然而，手动显微镜计数耗时且缺乏客观性。此外，由于BC显微镜全玻片图像（WSI）的染色质量和形态特征多样性的限制，传统的图像处理方法无能为力。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种受基于深度学习的BC先验结构启发的两阶段检测方法，该方法级联以实现WSI级别的BC粗检测和补丁级别的细粒度分类。粗检测网络是基于用于细胞检测的圆形边界框和用于细胞核检测的中心关键点的多任务检测框架。与通常的矩形框相比，圆形表示降低了自由度，减轻了周围杂质的影响，并且在 WSI 中可以保持旋转不变。检测核中的关键点可以辅助网络感知，并可用于后期细粒度分类中的无监督颜色层分割。精细分类网络由基于颜色层掩模监督的背景区域抑制模块和基于变压器（由于其全局建模能力）的关键区域选择模块组成。此外，首次提出了无监督且不配对的细胞质生成网络来扩展长尾分布数据集。最后，在BC多中心数据集上进行实验。所提出的 BC 精细检测方法在几乎所有评估标准中都优于其他基准，为癌症筛查等任务提供了澄清和支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的双核细胞（BC）细粒度检测方法，通过两阶段策略实现WSI级别的粗检测和小块级别的精细分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以应对显微镜全切片图像（WSI）中双核细胞染色质量差、形态多样性高导致的检测难题，且手动计数效率低、主观性强。
AI.method: 设计两阶段检测框架：1）WSI级多任务网络，采用圆形边界框检测细胞并定位核关键点；2）小块级分类网络，包含颜色层掩码抑制背景模块、Transformer全局建模的关键区域选择模块，以及无监督细胞质生成器扩充数据集。
AI.result: 在多中心BC数据集上，该方法在多数评估指标中优于现有基准方法，显著提升检测准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结构先验引导的两阶段方法有效解决了双核细胞检测的挑战，为癌症筛查等临床任务提供可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Matthew Barthet,Ahmed Khalifa,Antonios Liapis,Georgios N. Yannakakis
title: Play with Emotion: Affect-Driven Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 玩转情感：情感驱动的强化学习
abstract: This paper introduces a paradigm shift by viewing the task of affect modeling as a reinforcement learning (RL) process. According to the proposed paradigm, RL agents learn a policy (i.e. affective interaction) by attempting to maximize a set of rewards (i.e. behavioral and affective patterns) via their experience with their environment (i.e. context). Our hypothesis is that RL is an effective paradigm for interweaving affect elicitation and manifestation with behavioral and affective demonstrations. Importantly, our second hypothesis-building on Damasio's somatic marker hypothesis-is that emotion can be the facilitator of decision-making. We test our hypotheses in a racing game by training Go-Blend agents to model human demonstrations of arousal and behavior; Go-Blend is a modified version of the Go-Explore algorithm which has recently showcased supreme performance in hard exploration tasks. We first vary the arousal-based reward function and observe agents that can effectively display a palette of affect and behavioral patterns according to the specified reward. Then we use arousal-based state selection mechanisms in order to bias the strategies that Go-Blend explores. Our findings suggest that Go-Blend not only is an efficient affect modeling paradigm but, more importantly, affect-driven RL improves exploration and yields higher performing agents, validating Damasio's hypothesis in the domain of games.
summary: This paper introduces a paradigm shift by viewing the task of affect modeling as a reinforcement learning (RL) process. According to the proposed paradigm, RL agents learn a policy (i.e. affective interaction) by attempting to maximize a set of rewards (i.e. behavioral and affective patterns) via their experience with their environment (i.e. context). Our hypothesis is that RL is an effective paradigm for interweaving affect elicitation and manifestation with behavioral and affective demonstrations. Importantly, our second hypothesis-building on Damasio's somatic marker hypothesis-is that emotion can be the facilitator of decision-making. We test our hypotheses in a racing game by training Go-Blend agents to model human demonstrations of arousal and behavior; Go-Blend is a modified version of the Go-Explore algorithm which has recently showcased supreme performance in hard exploration tasks. We first vary the arousal-based reward function and observe agents that can effectively display a palette of affect and behavioral patterns according to the specified reward. Then we use arousal-based state selection mechanisms in order to bias the strategies that Go-Blend explores. Our findings suggest that Go-Blend not only is an efficient affect modeling paradigm but, more importantly, affect-driven RL improves exploration and yields higher performing agents, validating Damasio's hypothesis in the domain of games.
abstract_zh: 本文通过将情感建模任务视为强化学习 (RL) 过程，引入了范式转变。根据所提出的范式，强化学习代理通过尝试通过其环境（即上下文）的经验最大化一组奖励（即行为和情感模式）来学习策略（即情感交互）。我们的假设是，强化学习是将情感引发和表现与行为和情感演示交织在一起的有效范例。重要的是，我们的第二个假设（基于达马西奥的躯体标记假设）是情绪可以促进决策。我们通过训练 Go-Blend 代理来模拟人类的唤醒和行为演示，在赛车游戏中测试我们的假设； Go-Blend 是 Go-Explore 算法的修改版本，该算法最近在困难的探索任务中展示了卓越的性能。我们首先改变基于唤醒的奖励函数，并观察能够根据指定奖励有效地显示一系列情感和行为模式的代理。然后，我们使用基于唤醒的状态选择机制来偏置 Go-Blend 探索的策略。我们的研究结果表明，Go-Blend 不仅是一种有效的情感建模范式，更重要的是，情感驱动的强化学习改进了探索并产生了更高性能的代理，从而验证了达马西奥在游戏领域的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将情感建模作为强化学习过程的新范式，通过RL代理学习策略以最大化情感和行为模式的奖励。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效融合情感诱发与行为示范，而基于Damasio体感标记假设，认为情感可作为决策促进因素，需验证其在强化学习中的有效性。
AI.method: 采用改进的Go-Explore算法（Go-Blend），在赛车游戏中训练代理，通过调整基于唤醒的奖励函数和状态选择机制来建模人类的情感与行为示范。
AI.result: 实验表明，Go-Blend有效建模情感与行为模式，情感驱动的RL提升探索效率并生成更高性能的代理，验证了Damasio假设在游戏领域的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 情感驱动的强化学习范式有效整合情感与行为，提升代理性能，验证了情感作为决策促进因素的理论假设。
