search_text: Play with Emotion: Affect-Driven Reinforcement Learning 玩转情感：情感驱动的强化学习 This paper introduces a paradigm shift by viewing the task of affect modeling as a reinforcement learning (RL) process. According to the proposed paradigm, RL agents learn a policy (i.e. affective interaction) by attempting to maximize a set of rewards (i.e. behavioral and affective patterns) via their experience with their environment (i.e. context). Our hypothesis is that RL is an effective paradigm for interweaving affect elicitation and manifestation with behavioral and affective demonstrations. Importantly, our second hypothesis-building on Damasio's somatic marker hypothesis-is that emotion can be the facilitator of decision-making. We test our hypotheses in a racing game by training Go-Blend agents to model human demonstrations of arousal and behavior; Go-Blend is a modified version of the Go-Explore algorithm which has recently showcased supreme performance in hard exploration tasks. We first vary the arousal-based reward function and observe agents that can effectively display a palette of affect and behavioral patterns according to the specified reward. Then we use arousal-based state selection mechanisms in order to bias the strategies that Go-Blend explores. Our findings suggest that Go-Blend not only is an efficient affect modeling paradigm but, more importantly, affect-driven RL improves exploration and yields higher performing agents, validating Damasio's hypothesis in the domain of games. 本文通过将情感建模任务视为强化学习 (RL) 过程，引入了范式转变。根据所提出的范式，强化学习代理通过尝试通过其环境（即上下文）的经验最大化一组奖励（即行为和情感模式）来学习策略（即情感交互）。我们的假设是，强化学习是将情感引发和表现与行为和情感演示交织在一起的有效范例。重要的是，我们的第二个假设（基于达马西奥的躯体标记假设）是情绪可以促进决策。我们通过训练 Go-Blend 代理来模拟人类的唤醒和行为演示，在赛车游戏中测试我们的假设； Go-Blend 是 Go-Explore 算法的修改版本，该算法最近在困难的探索任务中展示了卓越的性能。我们首先改变基于唤醒的奖励函数，并观察能够根据指定奖励有效地显示一系列情感和行为模式的代理。然后，我们使用基于唤醒的状态选择机制来偏置 Go-Blend 探索的策略。我们的研究结果表明，Go-Blend 不仅是一种有效的情感建模范式，更重要的是，情感驱动的强化学习改进了探索并产生了更高性能的代理，从而验证了达马西奥在游戏领域的假设。 本文提出了一种将情感建模作为强化学习过程的新范式，通过RL代理学习策略以最大化情感和行为模式的奖励。 Matthew Barthet,Ahmed Khalifa,Antonios Liapis,Georgios N. Yannakakis cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Unggi Lee,Yonghyun Park,Yujin Kim,Seongyune Choi,Hyeoncheol Kim
title: MonaCoBERT: Monotonic attention based ConvBERT for Knowledge Tracing
title_zh: MonaCoBERT：基于单调注意力的 ConvBERT，用于知识追踪
abstract: Knowledge tracing (KT) is a field of study that predicts the future performance of students based on prior performance datasets collected from educational applications such as intelligent tutoring systems, learning management systems, and online courses. Some previous studies on KT have concentrated only on the interpretability of the model, whereas others have focused on enhancing the performance. Models that consider both interpretability and the performance improvement have been insufficient. Moreover, models that focus on performance improvements have not shown an overwhelming performance compared with existing models. In this study, we propose MonaCoBERT, which achieves the best performance on most benchmark datasets and has significant interpretability. MonaCoBERT uses a BERT-based architecture with monotonic convolutional multihead attention, which reflects forgetting behavior of the students and increases the representation power of the model. We can also increase the performance and interpretability using a classical test-theory-based (CTT-based) embedding strategy that considers the difficulty of the question. To determine why MonaCoBERT achieved the best performance and interpret the results quantitatively, we conducted ablation studies and additional analyses using Grad-CAM, UMAP, and various visualization techniques. The analysis results demonstrate that both attention components complement one another and that CTT-based embedding represents information on both global and local difficulties. We also demonstrate that our model represents the relationship between concepts.
summary: Knowledge tracing (KT) is a field of study that predicts the future performance of students based on prior performance datasets collected from educational applications such as intelligent tutoring systems, learning management systems, and online courses. Some previous studies on KT have concentrated only on the interpretability of the model, whereas others have focused on enhancing the performance. Models that consider both interpretability and the performance improvement have been insufficient. Moreover, models that focus on performance improvements have not shown an overwhelming performance compared with existing models. In this study, we propose MonaCoBERT, which achieves the best performance on most benchmark datasets and has significant interpretability. MonaCoBERT uses a BERT-based architecture with monotonic convolutional multihead attention, which reflects forgetting behavior of the students and increases the representation power of the model. We can also increase the performance and interpretability using a classical test-theory-based (CTT-based) embedding strategy that considers the difficulty of the question. To determine why MonaCoBERT achieved the best performance and interpret the results quantitatively, we conducted ablation studies and additional analyses using Grad-CAM, UMAP, and various visualization techniques. The analysis results demonstrate that both attention components complement one another and that CTT-based embedding represents information on both global and local difficulties. We also demonstrate that our model represents the relationship between concepts.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）是一个研究领域，它根据从智能辅导系统、学习管理系统和在线课程等教育应用程序收集的先前表现数据集来预测学生的未来表现。之前一些关于 KT 的研究仅集中在模型的可解释性上，而其他研究则侧重于提高性能。同时考虑可解释性和性能改进的模型还不够。而且，与现有模型相比，专注于性能改进的模型并未表现出压倒性的性能。在这项研究中，我们提出了 MonaCoBERT，它在大多数基准数据集上实现了最佳性能，并且具有显着的可解释性。 MonaCoBERT 采用基于 BERT 的架构，具有单调卷积多头注意力，反映了学生的遗忘行为，提高了模型的表示能力。我们还可以使用考虑问题难度的经典的基于测试理论（基于 CTT）的嵌入策略来提高性能和可解释性。为了确定 MonaCoBERT 取得最佳性能的原因并定量解释结果，我们使用 Grad-CAM、UMAP 和各种可视化技术进行了消融研究和其他分析。分析结果表明，这两种注意力成分是相互补充的，并且基于 CTT 的嵌入代表了全局和局部困难的信息。我们还证明我们的模型代表了概念之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MonaCoBERT模型，结合单调注意力机制与基于经典测试理论的嵌入策略，用于提升知识追踪（KT）任务的性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识追踪模型或侧重可解释性，或专注性能提升，缺乏兼顾两者且表现优异的方案，需设计兼顾模型性能与可解释性的新方法。
AI.method: 基于BERT架构引入单调卷积多头注意力机制以模拟学生遗忘行为，并采用经典测试理论（CTT）嵌入策略考虑题目难度；通过消融实验、Grad-CAM、UMAP等技术验证模型效果与可解释性。
AI.result: MonaCoBERT在多数基准数据集上取得最佳性能，显著提升可解释性；分析表明注意力组件互补，CTT嵌入可表征全局与局部难度信息，且模型能有效捕捉概念间关系。
AI.conclusion: MonaCoBERT通过创新架构与嵌入策略，在知识追踪任务中实现了性能与可解释性的平衡，为教育AI模型设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Frank Xiao
title: Image augmentation improves few-shot classification performance in plant disease recognition
title_zh: 图像增强提高了植物病害识别中的少样本分类性能
abstract: With the world population projected to near 10 billion by 2050, minimizing crop damage and guaranteeing food security has never been more important. Machine learning has been proposed as a solution to quickly and efficiently identify diseases in crops. Convolutional Neural Networks typically require large datasets of annotated data which are not available on demand. Collecting this data is a long and arduous process which involves manually picking, imaging, and annotating each individual leaf. I tackle the problem of plant image data scarcity by exploring the efficacy of various data augmentation techniques when used in conjunction with transfer learning. I evaluate the impact of various data augmentation techniques both individually and combined on the performance of a ResNet. I propose an augmentation scheme utilizing a sequence of different augmentations which consistently improves accuracy through many trials. Using only 10 total seed images, I demonstrate that my augmentation framework can increase model accuracy by upwards of 25\%.
summary: With the world population projected to near 10 billion by 2050, minimizing crop damage and guaranteeing food security has never been more important. Machine learning has been proposed as a solution to quickly and efficiently identify diseases in crops. Convolutional Neural Networks typically require large datasets of annotated data which are not available on demand. Collecting this data is a long and arduous process which involves manually picking, imaging, and annotating each individual leaf. I tackle the problem of plant image data scarcity by exploring the efficacy of various data augmentation techniques when used in conjunction with transfer learning. I evaluate the impact of various data augmentation techniques both individually and combined on the performance of a ResNet. I propose an augmentation scheme utilizing a sequence of different augmentations which consistently improves accuracy through many trials. Using only 10 total seed images, I demonstrate that my augmentation framework can increase model accuracy by upwards of 25\%.
abstract_zh: 到 2050 年，世界人口预计将接近 100 亿，最大限度地减少农作物损失和保障粮食安全变得前所未有的重要。机器学习已被提议作为快速有效地识别农作物疾病的解决方案。卷积神经网络通常需要大量带注释的数据集，而这些数据集无法按需提供。收集这些数据是一个漫长而艰巨的过程，涉及手动采摘、成像和注释每片叶子。我通过探索各种数据增强技术与迁移学习结合使用的功效来解决植物图像数据稀缺的问题。我评估了各种数据增强技术单独和组合对 ResNet 性能的影响。我提出了一种利用一系列不同增强的增强方案，通过多次试验不断提高准确性。我仅使用 10 个种子图像，证明我的增强框架可以将模型精度提高 25% 以上。

AI.tldr: 研究数据增强技术在少样本情况下提升植物疾病分类准确率的效果
AI.motivation: 解决植物疾病识别中数据不足的问题，以提升模型在少量样本下的分类性能
AI.method: 结合迁移学习，评估多种数据增强技术对ResNet的影响，并提出一种组合增强方案
AI.result: 使用10张种子图像，模型准确率提升超过25%
AI.conclusion: 数据增强技术能有效提升少样本场景下的植物疾病分类准确率，提出的增强框架具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Wenbo Gong,Digory Smith,Zichao Wang,Craig Barton,Simon Woodhead,Nick Pawlowski,Joel Jennings,Cheng Zhang
title: NeurIPS Competition Instructions and Guide: Causal Insights for Learning Paths in Education
title_zh: NeurIPS 竞赛说明和指南：教育学习路径的因果见解
abstract: In this competition, participants will address two fundamental causal challenges in machine learning in the context of education using time-series data. The first is to identify the causal relationships between different constructs, where a construct is defined as the smallest element of learning. The second challenge is to predict the impact of learning one construct on the ability to answer questions on other constructs. Addressing these challenges will enable optimisation of students' knowledge acquisition, which can be deployed in a real edtech solution impacting millions of students. Participants will run these tasks in an idealised environment with synthetic data and a real-world scenario with evaluation data collected from a series of A/B tests.
summary: In this competition, participants will address two fundamental causal challenges in machine learning in the context of education using time-series data. The first is to identify the causal relationships between different constructs, where a construct is defined as the smallest element of learning. The second challenge is to predict the impact of learning one construct on the ability to answer questions on other constructs. Addressing these challenges will enable optimisation of students' knowledge acquisition, which can be deployed in a real edtech solution impacting millions of students. Participants will run these tasks in an idealised environment with synthetic data and a real-world scenario with evaluation data collected from a series of A/B tests.
abstract_zh: 在本次比赛中，参与者将使用时间序列数据解决教育背景下机器学习中的两个基本因果挑战。首先是确定不同结构之间的因果关系，其中结构被定义为学习的最小元素。第二个挑战是预测学习一种结构对回答其他结构问题的能力的影响。解决这些挑战将能够优化学生的知识获取，这可以部署在影响数百万学生的真正的教育技术解决方案中。参与者将在具有合成数据的理想环境和具有从一系列 A/B 测试中收集的评估数据的现实场景中运行这些任务。

AI.tldr: 本论文竞赛要求参赛者利用时间序列数据解决教育领域的两个因果问题：识别学习构念间的因果关系，并预测学习某一构念对其他构念答题能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 通过因果分析优化学生知识获取路径，开发可应用于教育科技的解决方案，从而提升大规模学生的个性化学习效果。
AI.method: 参赛者需在合成数据的理想化环境中和基于A/B测试的真实场景中，分别运行因果关系识别与学习效果预测任务。
AI.result: 竞赛将产出优化知识学习路径的方法，并通过真实A/B测试数据验证其有效性，为教育技术提供可部署的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该竞赛推动了因果推理在教育领域的应用，为个性化学习路径优化提供了研究框架与实践验证途径。

search_text: NeurIPS Competition Instructions and Guide: Causal Insights for Learning Paths in Education NeurIPS 竞赛说明和指南：教育学习路径的因果见解 In this competition, participants will address two fundamental causal challenges in machine learning in the context of education using time-series data. The first is to identify the causal relationships between different constructs, where a construct is defined as the smallest element of learning. The second challenge is to predict the impact of learning one construct on the ability to answer questions on other constructs. Addressing these challenges will enable optimisation of students' knowledge acquisition, which can be deployed in a real edtech solution impacting millions of students. Participants will run these tasks in an idealised environment with synthetic data and a real-world scenario with evaluation data collected from a series of A/B tests. 在本次比赛中，参与者将使用时间序列数据解决教育背景下机器学习中的两个基本因果挑战。首先是确定不同结构之间的因果关系，其中结构被定义为学习的最小元素。第二个挑战是预测学习一种结构对回答其他结构问题的能力的影响。解决这些挑战将能够优化学生的知识获取，这可以部署在影响数百万学生的真正的教育技术解决方案中。参与者将在具有合成数据的理想环境和具有从一系列 A/B 测试中收集的评估数据的现实场景中运行这些任务。 本论文竞赛要求参赛者利用时间序列数据解决教育领域的两个因果问题：识别学习构念间的因果关系，并预测学习某一构念对其他构念答题能力的影响。 Wenbo Gong,Digory Smith,Zichao Wang,Craig Barton,Simon Woodhead,Nick Pawlowski,Joel Jennings,Cheng Zhang cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Elwin Huaman,Jorge Luis Huaman,Wendi Huaman
title: Getting Quechua Closer to Final Users through Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 通过知识图让盖丘亚语更接近最终用户
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, submitted to The 9th International Conference on Information Management and Big Data (SIMBig 2022)
comments: 9 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, submitted to The 9th International Conference on Information Management and Big Data (SIMBig 2022)
abstract: Quechua language and Quechua knowledge gather millions of people around the world, especially in several countries in South America. Unfortunately, there are only a few resources available to Quechua communities, and they are mainly stored in PDF format. In this paper, the Quechua Knowledge Graph is envisioned and generated as an effort to get Quechua closer to the Quechua communities, researchers, and technology developers. Currently, there are 553636 triples stored in the Quechua Knowledge Graph, which is accessible on the Web, retrievable by machines, and curated by users. To showcase the deployment of the Quechua Knowledge Graph, use cases and future work are described.
summary: Quechua language and Quechua knowledge gather millions of people around the world, especially in several countries in South America. Unfortunately, there are only a few resources available to Quechua communities, and they are mainly stored in PDF format. In this paper, the Quechua Knowledge Graph is envisioned and generated as an effort to get Quechua closer to the Quechua communities, researchers, and technology developers. Currently, there are 553636 triples stored in the Quechua Knowledge Graph, which is accessible on the Web, retrievable by machines, and curated by users. To showcase the deployment of the Quechua Knowledge Graph, use cases and future work are described.
abstract_zh: 盖丘亚语言和盖丘亚知识聚集了世界各地数百万人，特别是在南美洲的几个国家。不幸的是，盖丘亚语社区可用的资源很少，而且主要以 PDF 格式存储。在本文中，盖丘亚语知识图谱的设想和生成是为了让盖丘亚语更接近盖丘亚语社区、研究人员和技术开发人员。目前，Quechua 知识图谱中存储了 553636 个三元组，可以通过网络访问、机器检索并由用户管理。为了展示盖丘亚语知识图的部署，描述了用例和未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 构建克丘亚语知识图谱以促进其社区、研究者及开发者使用
AI.motivation: 克丘亚语资源稀缺且多为PDF格式，难以有效利用，需创建更易访问的知识图谱
AI.method: 构建包含553,636个三元组的克丘亚语知识图谱，通过网络公开，支持机器检索与用户协作维护
AI.result: 建成可公开访问的克丘亚语知识图谱，包含553,636个三元组，支持机器检索与用户维护，并展示应用案例与未来方向
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱有效推动克丘亚语资源的利用，未来需扩展规模与优化应用

authors_text: Brian Hsu,Rahul Mazumder,Preetam Nandy,Kinjal Basu
title: Pushing the limits of fairness impossibility: Who's the fairest of them all?
title_zh: 挑战公平不可能的极限：谁是最公平的？
abstract: The impossibility theorem of fairness is a foundational result in the algorithmic fairness literature. It states that outside of special cases, one cannot exactly and simultaneously satisfy all three common and intuitive definitions of fairness - demographic parity, equalized odds, and predictive rate parity. This result has driven most works to focus on solutions for one or two of the metrics. Rather than follow suit, in this paper we present a framework that pushes the limits of the impossibility theorem in order to satisfy all three metrics to the best extent possible. We develop an integer-programming based approach that can yield a certifiably optimal post-processing method for simultaneously satisfying multiple fairness criteria under small violations. We show experiments demonstrating that our post-processor can improve fairness across the different definitions simultaneously with minimal model performance reduction. We also discuss applications of our framework for model selection and fairness explainability, thereby attempting to answer the question: who's the fairest of them all?
summary: The impossibility theorem of fairness is a foundational result in the algorithmic fairness literature. It states that outside of special cases, one cannot exactly and simultaneously satisfy all three common and intuitive definitions of fairness - demographic parity, equalized odds, and predictive rate parity. This result has driven most works to focus on solutions for one or two of the metrics. Rather than follow suit, in this paper we present a framework that pushes the limits of the impossibility theorem in order to satisfy all three metrics to the best extent possible. We develop an integer-programming based approach that can yield a certifiably optimal post-processing method for simultaneously satisfying multiple fairness criteria under small violations. We show experiments demonstrating that our post-processor can improve fairness across the different definitions simultaneously with minimal model performance reduction. We also discuss applications of our framework for model selection and fairness explainability, thereby attempting to answer the question: who's the fairest of them all?
abstract_zh: 公平不可能性定理是算法公平文献的基础结果。它指出，除了特殊情况外，人们无法完全同时满足公平的所有三种常见且直观的定义——人口平等、均等赔率和预测率平等。这一结果促使大多数工作专注于一两个指标的解决方案。在本文中，我们没有效仿，而是提出了一个框架，该框架突破了不可能定理的限制，以便尽可能地满足所有三个指标。我们开发了一种基于整数规划的方法，该方法可以产生可证明的最佳后处理方法，以在小违规情况下同时满足多个公平标准。我们的实验表明，我们的后处理器可以提高不同定义的公平性，同时将模型性能的降低降到最低。我们还讨论了模型选择和公平性可解释性框架的应用，从而试图回答这个问题：谁是最公平的？

AI.tldr: 本文旨在突破公平性不可能定理的限制，提出一个框架以尽可能同时满足人口统计公平性、均等机会和预测率公平性三个指标。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于解决部分公平性指标，但无法同时满足所有三个指标，因此需要更全面的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用基于整数规划的方法，开发出可认证的最优后处理技术，以在最小模型性能损失下同时满足多个公平性标准。
AI.result: 实验表明，该后处理器能同时提升各类公平性指标，且模型性能损失极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过框架的应用，可在模型选择和公平性解释中找到最优平衡点，从而回答‘谁是最公平的’这一问题。

authors_text: Hugues Thomas,Jian Zhang,Timothy D. Barfoot
title: The Foreseeable Future: Self-Supervised Learning to Predict Dynamic Scenes for Indoor Navigation
title_zh: 可预见的未来：通过自监督学习预测室内导航的动态场景
abstract: We present a method for generating, predicting, and using Spatiotemporal Occupancy Grid Maps (SOGM), which embed future semantic information of real dynamic scenes. We present an auto-labeling process that creates SOGMs from noisy real navigation data. We use a 3D-2D feedforward architecture, trained to predict the future time steps of SOGMs, given 3D lidar frames as input. Our pipeline is entirely self-supervised, thus enabling lifelong learning for real robots. The network is composed of a 3D back-end that extracts rich features and enables the semantic segmentation of the lidar frames, and a 2D front-end that predicts the future information embedded in the SOGM representation, potentially capturing the complexities and uncertainties of real-world multi-agent, multi-future interactions. We also design a navigation system that uses these predicted SOGMs within planning, after they have been transformed into Spatiotemporal Risk Maps (SRMs). We verify our navigation system's abilities in simulation, validate it on a real robot, study SOGM predictions on real data in various circumstances, and provide a novel indoor 3D lidar dataset, collected during our experiments, which includes our automated annotations.
summary: We present a method for generating, predicting, and using Spatiotemporal Occupancy Grid Maps (SOGM), which embed future semantic information of real dynamic scenes. We present an auto-labeling process that creates SOGMs from noisy real navigation data. We use a 3D-2D feedforward architecture, trained to predict the future time steps of SOGMs, given 3D lidar frames as input. Our pipeline is entirely self-supervised, thus enabling lifelong learning for real robots. The network is composed of a 3D back-end that extracts rich features and enables the semantic segmentation of the lidar frames, and a 2D front-end that predicts the future information embedded in the SOGM representation, potentially capturing the complexities and uncertainties of real-world multi-agent, multi-future interactions. We also design a navigation system that uses these predicted SOGMs within planning, after they have been transformed into Spatiotemporal Risk Maps (SRMs). We verify our navigation system's abilities in simulation, validate it on a real robot, study SOGM predictions on real data in various circumstances, and provide a novel indoor 3D lidar dataset, collected during our experiments, which includes our automated annotations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种生成、预测和使用时空占用网格图（SOGM）的方法，它嵌入了真实动态场景的未来语义信息。我们提出了一种自动标记过程，可以从嘈杂的真实导航数据中创建 SOGM。我们使用 3D-2D 前馈架构，经过训练可以在给定 3D 激光雷达帧作为输入的情况下预测 SOGM 的未来时间步长。我们的管道完全是自我监督的，从而使真正的机器人能够终身学习。该网络由一个 3D 后端和一个 2D 前端组成，前者提取丰富的特征并实现激光雷达帧的语义分割，后者预测嵌入在 SOGM 表示中的未来信息，潜在地捕获现实世界多智能体、多未来交互的复杂性和不确定性。我们还设计了一个导航系统，在规划中使用这些预测的 SOGM，并将其转换为时空风险地图 (SRM)。我们验证了导航系统的模拟能力，在真实的机器人上进行了验证，研究了各种情况下对真实数据的 SOGM 预测，并提供了在实验期间收集的新颖的室内 3D 激光雷达数据集，其中包括我们的自动注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的方法，用于生成和预测室内动态场景的时空占用网格地图（SOGM），以提升机器人导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据且难以适应复杂动态环境，需开发无需人工标注、支持终身学习的自监督预测框架以应对室内多智能体交互的不确定性。
AI.method: 设计3D-2D前馈网络架构：3D后端提取激光雷达特征并进行语义分割，2D前端预测SOGM未来状态；通过自动标注流程处理噪声数据，并将SOGM转换为时空风险地图（SRM）用于导航规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人上验证导航系统有效性，展示多场景下的SOGM预测能力，并发布包含自动化标注的新型室内3D激光雷达数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习实现了动态场景的准确预测，为复杂室内环境下的机器人长期自主导航提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: The Foreseeable Future: Self-Supervised Learning to Predict Dynamic Scenes for Indoor Navigation 可预见的未来：通过自监督学习预测室内导航的动态场景 We present a method for generating, predicting, and using Spatiotemporal Occupancy Grid Maps (SOGM), which embed future semantic information of real dynamic scenes. We present an auto-labeling process that creates SOGMs from noisy real navigation data. We use a 3D-2D feedforward architecture, trained to predict the future time steps of SOGMs, given 3D lidar frames as input. We also design a navigation system that uses these predicted SOGMs within planning, after they have been transformed into Spatiotemporal Risk Maps (SRMs). We verify our navigation system's abilities in simulation, validate it on a real robot, study SOGM predictions on real data in various circumstances, and provide a novel indoor 3D lidar dataset, collected during our experiments, which includes our automated annotations. 我们提出了一种生成、预测和使用时空占用网格图（SOGM）的方法，它嵌入了真实动态场景的未来语义信息。我们提出了一种自动标记过程，可以从嘈杂的真实导航数据中创建 SOGM。我们使用 3D-2D 前馈架构，经过训练可以在给定 3D 激光雷达帧作为输入的情况下预测 SOGM 的未来时间步长。我们的管道完全是自我监督的，从而使真正的机器人能够终身学习。该网络由一个 3D 后端和一个 2D 前端组成，前者提取丰富的特征并实现激光雷达帧的语义分割，后者预测嵌入在 SOGM 表示中的未来信息，潜在地捕获现实世界多智能体、多未来交互的复杂性和不确定性。我们还设计了一个导航系统，在规划中使用这些预测的 SOGM，并将其转换为时空风险地图 (SRM)。我们验证了导航系统的模拟能力，在真实的机器人上进行了验证，研究了各种情况下对真实数据的 SOGM 预测，并提供了在实验期间收集的新颖的室内 3D 激光雷达数据集，其中包括我们的自动注释。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的方法，用于生成和预测室内动态场景的时空占用网格地图（SOGM），以提升机器人导航能力。 Hugues Thomas,Jian Zhang,Timothy D. authors_text: Angela Weiss
title: A Polynomial Decision for 3-SAT
title_zh: 3-SAT 的多项式决策
abstract: We propose a polynomially bounded, in time and space, method to decide whether a given 3-SAT formula is satisfiable or not. The tools we use here are, in fact, very simple. We first decide satisfiability for a particular 3-SAT formula, called pivoted 3-SAT and, after a plain transformation, still keeping the polynomial boundaries, it is shown that 3-SAT formulas can be written as pivoted formulas.
summary: We propose a polynomially bounded, in time and space, method to decide whether a given 3-SAT formula is satisfiable or not. The tools we use here are, in fact, very simple. We first decide satisfiability for a particular 3-SAT formula, called pivoted 3-SAT and, after a plain transformation, still keeping the polynomial boundaries, it is shown that 3-SAT formulas can be written as pivoted formulas.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在时间和空间上多项式有界的方法来确定给定的 3-SAT 公式是否可满足。事实上，我们在这里使用的工具非常简单。我们首先确定特定 3-SAT 公式的可满足性，称为枢轴 3-SAT，并且在简单变换之后，仍然保持多项式边界，结果表明 3-SAT 公式可以写为枢轴公式。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多项式时间与空间的方法判断3-SAT公式的可满足性
AI.motivation: 3-SAT作为NP完全问题，传统方法无法在多项式时间内解决，本文旨在提出高效算法
AI.method: 通过解决pivoted 3-SAT的可满足性，并利用简单转换将一般3-SAT转化为pivoted形式
AI.result: 证明3-SAT公式可转化为pivoted形式，且保持多项式时间与空间复杂度
AI.conclusion: 为NP完全问题提供了新的多项式解法思路，可能对计算复杂性理论产生影响

authors_text: Mostafa Jahanifar,Adam Shephard,Neda Zamanitajeddin,Simon Graham,Shan E Ahmed Raza,Fayyaz Minhas,Nasir Rajpoot
title: Mitosis Detection, Fast and Slow: Robust and Efficient Detection of Mitotic Figures
title_zh: 有丝分裂检测，快速和慢速：稳健且高效的有丝分裂图检测
comment: Extended version of the work done for MIDOG challenge submission
comments: Extended version of the work done for MIDOG challenge submission
abstract: Counting of mitotic figures is a fundamental step in grading and prognostication of several cancers. However, manual mitosis counting is tedious and time-consuming. In addition, variation in the appearance of mitotic figures causes a high degree of discordance among pathologists. With advances in deep learning models, several automatic mitosis detection algorithms have been proposed but they are sensitive to {\em domain shift} often seen in histology images. We propose a robust and efficient two-stage mitosis detection framework, which comprises mitosis candidate segmentation ({\em Detecting Fast}) and candidate refinement ({\em Detecting Slow}) stages. The proposed candidate segmentation model, termed \textit{EUNet}, is fast and accurate due to its architectural design. EUNet can precisely segment candidates at a lower resolution to considerably speed up candidate detection. Candidates are then refined using a deeper classifier network, EfficientNet-B7, in the second stage. We make sure both stages are robust against domain shift by incorporating domain generalization methods. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and generalizability of the proposed model on the three largest publicly available mitosis datasets, winning the two mitosis domain generalization challenge contests (MIDOG21 and MIDOG22). Finally, we showcase the utility of the proposed algorithm by processing the TCGA breast cancer cohort (1,125 whole-slide images) to generate and release a repository of more than 620K mitotic figures.
summary: Counting of mitotic figures is a fundamental step in grading and prognostication of several cancers. However, manual mitosis counting is tedious and time-consuming. In addition, variation in the appearance of mitotic figures causes a high degree of discordance among pathologists. With advances in deep learning models, several automatic mitosis detection algorithms have been proposed but they are sensitive to {\em domain shift} often seen in histology images. We propose a robust and efficient two-stage mitosis detection framework, which comprises mitosis candidate segmentation ({\em Detecting Fast}) and candidate refinement ({\em Detecting Slow}) stages. The proposed candidate segmentation model, termed \textit{EUNet}, is fast and accurate due to its architectural design. EUNet can precisely segment candidates at a lower resolution to considerably speed up candidate detection. Candidates are then refined using a deeper classifier network, EfficientNet-B7, in the second stage. We make sure both stages are robust against domain shift by incorporating domain generalization methods. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and generalizability of the proposed model on the three largest publicly available mitosis datasets, winning the two mitosis domain generalization challenge contests (MIDOG21 and MIDOG22). Finally, we showcase the utility of the proposed algorithm by processing the TCGA breast cancer cohort (1,125 whole-slide images) to generate and release a repository of more than 620K mitotic figures.
abstract_zh: 有丝分裂计数是多种癌症分级和预后的基本步骤。然而，手动有丝分裂计数既繁琐又耗时。此外，有丝分裂图外观的变化导致病理学家之间存在高度不一致。随着深度学习模型的进步，已经提出了几种自动有丝分裂检测算法，但它们对组织学图像中常见的域转移很敏感。我们提出了一个稳健且高效的两阶段有丝分裂检测框架，其中包括有丝分裂候选分割（{\em 检测快速}）和候选细化（{\em 检测慢速}）阶段。所提出的候选分割模型，称为 \textit{EUNet}，由于其架构设计而快速且准确。 EUNet 可以以较低分辨率精确分割候选者，从而显着加快候选者检测速度。然后在第二阶段使用更深层次的分类器网络 EfficientNet-B7 来细化候选对象。我们通过结合域泛化方法来确保这两个阶段都能够抵抗域转移。我们在三个最大的公开有丝分裂数据集上展示了所提出的模型的最先进的性能和泛化性，赢得了两项有丝分裂域泛化挑战赛（MIDOG21 和 MIDOG22）。最后，我们通过处理 TCGA 乳腺癌队列（1,125 个完整幻灯片图像）来生成和发布超过 620K 有丝分裂图的存储库，展示了所提出算法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒且高效的两阶段有丝分裂检测框架，用于癌症诊断中的有丝分裂体检测。
AI.motivation: 手动计数有丝分裂体耗时且病理学家间存在较大差异，现有算法易受组织学图像领域偏移影响。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段使用EUNet模型快速分割候选区域，第二阶段通过EfficientNet-B7深度分类器精修，并引入领域泛化方法提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上取得最先进性能，赢得MIDOG21/22挑战赛，处理TCGA乳腺癌队列生成62万+有丝分裂体数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决领域偏移问题，为癌症分级和预后研究提供高效可靠的检测工具。

search_text: Mitosis Detection, Fast and Slow: Robust and Efficient Detection of Mitotic Figures 有丝分裂检测，快速和慢速：稳健且高效的有丝分裂图检测 Counting of mitotic figures is a fundamental step in grading and prognostication of several cancers. However, manual mitosis counting is tedious and time-consuming. In addition, variation in the appearance of mitotic figures causes a high degree of discordance among pathologists. With advances in deep learning models, several automatic mitosis detection algorithms have been proposed but they are sensitive to {\em domain shift} often seen in histology images. We propose a robust and efficient two-stage mitosis detection framework, which comprises mitosis candidate segmentation ({\em Detecting Fast}) and candidate refinement ({\em Detecting Slow}) stages. The proposed candidate segmentation model, termed \textit{EUNet}, is fast and accurate due to its architectural design. EUNet can precisely segment candidates at a lower resolution to considerably speed up candidate detection. Candidates are then refined using a deeper classifier network, EfficientNet-B7, in the second stage. We make sure both stages are robust against domain shift by incorporating domain generalization methods. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and generalizability of the proposed model on the three largest publicly available mitosis datasets, winning the two mitosis domain generalization challenge contests (MIDOG21 and MIDOG22). Finally, we showcase the utility of the proposed algorithm by processing the TCGA breast cancer cohort (1,125 whole-slide images) to generate and release a repository of more than 620K mitotic figures. 有丝分裂计数是多种癌症分级和预后的基本步骤。然而，手动有丝分裂计数既繁琐又耗时。此外，有丝分裂图外观的变化导致病理学家之间存在高度不一致。随着深度学习模型的进步，已经提出了几种自动有丝分裂检测算法，但它们对组织学图像中常见的域转移很敏感。我们提出了一个稳健且高效的两阶段有丝分裂检测框架，其中包括有丝分裂候选分割（{\em 检测快速}）和候选细化（{\em 检测慢速}）阶段。所提出的候选分割模型，称为 \textit{EUNet}，由于其架构设计而快速且准确。 EUNet 可以以较低分辨率精确分割候选者，从而显着加快候选者检测速度。然后在第二阶段使用更深层次的分类器网络 EfficientNet-B7 来细化候选对象。我们通过结合域泛化方法来确保这两个阶段都能够抵抗域转移。我们在三个最大的公开有丝分裂数据集上展示了所提出的模型的最先进的性能和泛化性，赢得了两项有丝分裂域泛化挑战赛（MIDOG21 和 MIDOG22）。最后，我们通过处理 TCGA 乳腺癌队列（1,125 个完整幻灯片图像）来生成和发布超过 620K 有丝分裂图的存储库，展示了所提出算法的实用性。 本文提出一种鲁棒且高效的两阶段有丝分裂检测框架，用于癌症诊断中的有丝分裂体检测。 Mostafa Jahanifar,Adam Shephard,Neda Zamanitajeddin,Simon Graham,Shan E Ahmed Raza,Fayyaz Minhas,Nasir Rajpoot cs.CV

authors_text: Ruixiang Xue,Jianqiang Wang,Zhan Ma
title: Efficient LiDAR Point Cloud Geometry Compression Through Neighborhood Point Attention
title_zh: 通过邻域点关注实现高效 LiDAR 点云几何压缩
abstract: Although convolutional representation of multiscale sparse tensor demonstrated its superior efficiency to accurately model the occupancy probability for the compression of geometry component of dense object point clouds, its capacity for representing sparse LiDAR point cloud geometry (PCG) was largely limited. This is because 1) fixed receptive field of the convolution cannot characterize extremely and unevenly distributed sparse LiDAR points very well; and 2) pretrained convolutions with fixed weights are insufficient to dynamically capture information conditioned on the input. This work therefore suggests the neighborhood point attention (NPA) to tackle them, where we first use k nearest neighbors (kNN) to construct adaptive local neighborhood; and then leverage the self-attention mechanism to dynamically aggregate information within this neighborhood. Such NPA is devised as a NPAFormer to best exploit cross-scale and same-scale correlations for geometric occupancy probability estimation. Compared with the anchor using standardized G-PCC, our method provides >17% BD-rate gains for lossy compression, and >14% bitrate reduction for lossless scenario using popular LiDAR point clouds in SemanticKITTI and Ford datasets. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) solution using attention optimized octree coding method, our approach requires much less decoding runtime with about 640 times speedup on average, while still presenting better compression efficiency.
summary: Although convolutional representation of multiscale sparse tensor demonstrated its superior efficiency to accurately model the occupancy probability for the compression of geometry component of dense object point clouds, its capacity for representing sparse LiDAR point cloud geometry (PCG) was largely limited. This is because 1) fixed receptive field of the convolution cannot characterize extremely and unevenly distributed sparse LiDAR points very well; and 2) pretrained convolutions with fixed weights are insufficient to dynamically capture information conditioned on the input. This work therefore suggests the neighborhood point attention (NPA) to tackle them, where we first use k nearest neighbors (kNN) to construct adaptive local neighborhood; and then leverage the self-attention mechanism to dynamically aggregate information within this neighborhood. Such NPA is devised as a NPAFormer to best exploit cross-scale and same-scale correlations for geometric occupancy probability estimation. Compared with the anchor using standardized G-PCC, our method provides >17% BD-rate gains for lossy compression, and >14% bitrate reduction for lossless scenario using popular LiDAR point clouds in SemanticKITTI and Ford datasets. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) solution using attention optimized octree coding method, our approach requires much less decoding runtime with about 640 times speedup on average, while still presenting better compression efficiency.
abstract_zh: 尽管多尺度稀疏张量的卷积表示展示了其在精确建模密集物体点云几何分量压缩的占用概率方面的卓越效率，但其表示稀疏激光雷达点云几何（PCG）的能力在很大程度上受到限制。这是因为1）固定的卷积感受野不能很好地表征极度且分布不均匀的稀疏LiDAR点； 2）具有固定权重的预训练卷积不足以动态捕获以输入为条件的信息。因此，这项工作建议使用邻域点注意（NPA）来解决这些问题，我们首先使用 k 个最近邻（kNN）来构建自适应局部邻域；然后利用自注意力机制动态聚合该邻域内的信息。这种 NPA 被设计为 NPAFormer，以最好地利用跨尺度和同尺度相关性进行几何占用概率估计。与使用标准化 G-PCC 的锚点相比，我们的方法为有损压缩提供了 >17% 的 BD 速率增益，并使用 SemanticKITTI 和 Ford 数据集中流行的 LiDAR 点云为无损场景提供了 >14% 的比特率降低。与使用注意力优化八叉树编码方法的最先进（SOTA）解决方案相比，我们的方法需要更少的解码运行时间，平均加速约 640 倍，同时仍然呈现更好的压缩效率。

AI.tldr: 通过邻域点注意力机制实现高效LiDAR点云几何压缩
AI.motivation: 现有卷积方法在处理稀疏LiDAR点云时存在感受野固定和权重静态的局限性，难以有效建模稀疏点云的几何特征
AI.method: 提出邻域点注意力（NPA）方法，结合k近邻构建自适应局部邻域，并利用自注意力机制动态聚合信息，构建NPAFormer模型
AI.result: 相较标准G-PCC方法，在SemanticKITTI和Ford数据集上实现损压缩率提升17%，无损压缩比特率降低14%，解码速度较最优注意力八叉树编码方法提升640倍
AI.conclusion: NPAFormer在保持压缩效率优势的同时显著提升解码速度，为稀疏LiDAR点云压缩提供新解决方案

authors_text: Maria Osório,Luís Sa-Couto,Andreas Wichert
title: Can a Hebbian-like learning rule be avoiding the curse of dimensionality in sparse distributed data?
title_zh: 类似赫布的学习规则能否避免稀疏分布式数据中的维数灾难？
abstract: It is generally assumed that the brain uses something akin to sparse distributed representations. These representations, however, are high-dimensional and consequently they affect classification performance of traditional Machine Learning models due to "the curse of dimensionality". In tasks for which there is a vast amount of labeled data, Deep Networks seem to solve this issue with many layers and a non-Hebbian backpropagation algorithm. The brain, however, seems to be able to solve the problem with few layers. In this work, we hypothesize that this happens by using Hebbian learning. Actually, the Hebbian-like learning rule of Restricted Boltzmann Machines learns the input patterns asymmetrically. It exclusively learns the correlation between non-zero values and ignores the zeros, which represent the vast majority of the input dimensionality. By ignoring the zeros "the curse of dimensionality" problem can be avoided. To test our hypothesis, we generated several sparse datasets and compared the performance of a Restricted Boltzmann Machine classifier with some Backprop-trained networks. The experiments using these codes confirm our initial intuition as the Restricted Boltzmann Machine shows a good generalization performance, while the Neural Networks trained with the backpropagation algorithm overfit the training data.
summary: It is generally assumed that the brain uses something akin to sparse distributed representations. These representations, however, are high-dimensional and consequently they affect classification performance of traditional Machine Learning models due to "the curse of dimensionality". In tasks for which there is a vast amount of labeled data, Deep Networks seem to solve this issue with many layers and a non-Hebbian backpropagation algorithm. The brain, however, seems to be able to solve the problem with few layers. In this work, we hypothesize that this happens by using Hebbian learning. Actually, the Hebbian-like learning rule of Restricted Boltzmann Machines learns the input patterns asymmetrically. It exclusively learns the correlation between non-zero values and ignores the zeros, which represent the vast majority of the input dimensionality. By ignoring the zeros "the curse of dimensionality" problem can be avoided. To test our hypothesis, we generated several sparse datasets and compared the performance of a Restricted Boltzmann Machine classifier with some Backprop-trained networks. The experiments using these codes confirm our initial intuition as the Restricted Boltzmann Machine shows a good generalization performance, while the Neural Networks trained with the backpropagation algorithm overfit the training data.
abstract_zh: 通常认为大脑使用类似于稀疏分布式表示的东西。然而，这些表示是高维的，因此由于“维数灾难”，它们会影响传统机器学习模型的分类性能。在存在大量标记数据的任务中，深度网络似乎通过多层和非赫布反向传播算法来解决这个问题。然而，大脑似乎能够用很少的层次来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们假设这是通过使用赫布学习来实现的。实际上，受限玻尔兹曼机的类赫布学习规则不对称地学习输入模式。它专门学习非零值之间的相关性并忽略代表绝大多数输入维度的零。通过忽略零，可以避免“维数灾难”问题。为了检验我们的假设，我们生成了几个稀疏数据集，并将受限玻尔兹曼机分类器与一些反向传播训练的网络的性能进行了比较。使用这些代码的实验证实了我们最初的直觉，因为受限玻尔兹曼机显示出良好的泛化性能，而使用反向传播算法训练的神经网络则过度拟合训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨Hebbian学习规则是否能在稀疏分布式数据中避免维度灾难问题，并通过受限玻尔兹曼机（RBM）与反向传播网络的对比实验进行验证。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在处理高维稀疏数据时受维度灾难影响，而大脑似乎能通过少量层级解决此问题。作者假设Hebbian学习规则可能通过忽略稀疏数据中的零值来规避这一问题。
AI.method: 生成多个稀疏数据集，比较RBM分类器（基于Hebbian-like规则）与反向传播训练的神经网络在分类性能和过拟合方面的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，RBM在稀疏数据上表现出良好的泛化能力，而反向传播网络出现过拟合现象，验证了Hebbian规则的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Hebbian学习规则通过关注非零值关联而非整体维度，可有效避免维度灾难，为稀疏数据分类提供类似大脑机制的解决方案。

The experiments using these codes confirm our initial intuition as the Restricted Boltzmann Machine shows a good generalization performance, while the Neural Networks trained with the backpropagation algorithm overfit the training data. 通常认为大脑使用类似于稀疏分布式表示的东西。然而，这些表示是高维的，因此由于“维数灾难”，它们会影响传统机器学习模型的分类性能。在存在大量标记数据的任务中，深度网络似乎通过多层和非赫布反向传播算法来解决这个问题。然而，大脑似乎能够用很少的层次来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们假设这是通过使用赫布学习来实现的。实际上，受限玻尔兹曼机的类赫布学习规则不对称地学习输入模式。它专门学习非零值之间的相关性并忽略代表绝大多数输入维度的零。通过忽略零，可以避免“维数灾难”问题。为了检验我们的假设，我们生成了几个稀疏数据集，并将受限玻尔兹曼机分类器与一些反向传播训练的网络的性能进行了比较。使用这些代码的实验证实了我们最初的直觉，因为受限玻尔兹曼机显示出良好的泛化性能，而使用反向传播算法训练的神经网络则过度拟合训练数据。 本文探讨Hebbian学习规则是否能在稀疏分布式数据中避免维度灾难问题，并通过受限玻尔兹曼机（RBM）与反向传播网络的对比实验进行验证。 Maria Osório,Luís Sa-Couto,Andreas Wichert cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Walter Didimo,Michael Kaufmann,Giuseppe Liotta,Giacomo Ortali
title: Rectilinear Planarity of Partial 2-Trees
title_zh: 部分二叉树的直线平面性
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.00548 Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.00548 Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: A graph is rectilinear planar if it admits a planar orthogonal drawing without bends. While testing rectilinear planarity is NP-hard in general (Garg and Tamassia, 2001), it is a long-standing open problem to establish a tight upper bound on its complexity for partial 2-trees, i.e., graphs whose biconnected components are series-parallel. We describe a new O(n^2)-time algorithm to test rectilinear planarity of partial 2-trees, which improves over the current best bound of O(n^3 \log n) (Di Giacomo et al., 2022). Moreover, for partial 2-trees where no two parallel-components in a biconnected component share a pole, we are able to achieve optimal O(n)-time complexity. Our algorithms are based on an extensive study and a deeper understanding of the notion of orthogonal spirality, introduced several years ago (Di Battista et al, 1998) to describe how much an orthogonal drawing of a subgraph is rolled-up in an orthogonal drawing of the graph.
summary: A graph is rectilinear planar if it admits a planar orthogonal drawing without bends. While testing rectilinear planarity is NP-hard in general (Garg and Tamassia, 2001), it is a long-standing open problem to establish a tight upper bound on its complexity for partial 2-trees, i.e., graphs whose biconnected components are series-parallel. We describe a new O(n^2)-time algorithm to test rectilinear planarity of partial 2-trees, which improves over the current best bound of O(n^3 \log n) (Di Giacomo et al., 2022). Moreover, for partial 2-trees where no two parallel-components in a biconnected component share a pole, we are able to achieve optimal O(n)-time complexity. Our algorithms are based on an extensive study and a deeper understanding of the notion of orthogonal spirality, introduced several years ago (Di Battista et al, 1998) to describe how much an orthogonal drawing of a subgraph is rolled-up in an orthogonal drawing of the graph.
abstract_zh: 如果一个图允许无弯曲的平面正交绘图，则该图是直线平面的。虽然测试直线平面性一般来说是 NP 困难的（Garg 和 Tamassia，2001），但为部分 2 树（即双连通分量为串并联的图）的复杂性建立严格的上限是一个长期存在的开放问题。我们描述了一种新的 O(n^2) 时间算法来测试部分 2 树的直线平面性，该算法改进了当前 O(n^3 \log n) 的最佳界限（Di Giacomo 等人，2022）。此外，对于部分 2 树，双连通组件中没有两个并行组件共享一个极点，我们能够实现最佳的 O(n) 时间复杂度。我们的算法基于对正交螺旋概念的广泛研究和更深入的理解，正交螺旋概念是几年前引入的（Di Battista 等人，1998），用于描述子图的正交绘图在图的正交绘图中卷起的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究部分2-树的直角平面性判定问题，提出更高效的算法。
AI.motivation: 直角平面性判定对部分2-树这类图的复杂度上限仍不清楚，现有算法效率较低。
AI.method: 基于正交螺旋度理论，深入分析子图的卷曲特性设计新算法。
AI.result: 提出O(n²)时间算法，特定条件下优化至O(n)，优于之前O(n³ log n)的复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 通过正交螺旋度的深入研究，成功改进部分2-树直角平面性判定的算法效率。

authors_text: Jiahui Chen,Yixin Xu,Shicheng Wan,Wensheng Gan,Jerry Chun-Wei Lin
title: Itemset Utility Maximization with Correlation Measure
title_zh: 具有相关性度量的项集效用最大化
abstract: As an important data mining technology, high utility itemset mining (HUIM) is used to find out interesting but hidden information (e.g., profit and risk). HUIM has been widely applied in many application scenarios, such as market analysis, medical detection, and web click stream analysis. However, most previous HUIM approaches often ignore the relationship between items in an itemset. Therefore, many irrelevant combinations (e.g., \{gold, apple\} and \{notebook, book\}) are discovered in HUIM. To address this limitation, many algorithms have been proposed to mine correlated high utility itemsets (CoHUIs). In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm called the Itemset Utility Maximization with Correlation Measure (CoIUM), which considers both a strong correlation and the profitable values of the items. Besides, the novel algorithm adopts a database projection mechanism to reduce the cost of database scanning. Moreover, two upper bounds and four pruning strategies are utilized to effectively prune the search space. And a concise array-based structure named utility-bin is used to calculate and store the adopted upper bounds in linear time and space. Finally, extensive experimental results on dense and sparse datasets demonstrate that CoIUM significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of runtime and memory consumption.
summary: As an important data mining technology, high utility itemset mining (HUIM) is used to find out interesting but hidden information (e.g., profit and risk). HUIM has been widely applied in many application scenarios, such as market analysis, medical detection, and web click stream analysis. However, most previous HUIM approaches often ignore the relationship between items in an itemset. Therefore, many irrelevant combinations (e.g., \{gold, apple\} and \{notebook, book\}) are discovered in HUIM. To address this limitation, many algorithms have been proposed to mine correlated high utility itemsets (CoHUIs). In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm called the Itemset Utility Maximization with Correlation Measure (CoIUM), which considers both a strong correlation and the profitable values of the items. Besides, the novel algorithm adopts a database projection mechanism to reduce the cost of database scanning. Moreover, two upper bounds and four pruning strategies are utilized to effectively prune the search space. And a concise array-based structure named utility-bin is used to calculate and store the adopted upper bounds in linear time and space. Finally, extensive experimental results on dense and sparse datasets demonstrate that CoIUM significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of runtime and memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 作为一种重要的数据挖掘技术，高效用项集挖掘（HUIM）用于找出有趣但隐藏的信息（例如利润和风险）。 HUIM已广泛应用于市场分析、医疗检测、网页点击流分析等多种应用场景。然而，大多数以前的 HUIM 方法经常忽略项目集中项目之间的关系。因此，在 HUIM 中发现了许多不相关的组合（例如，\{gold, apple\} 和 \{notebook, book\}）。为了解决这个限制，人们提出了许多算法来挖掘相关的高效用项集（CoHUI）。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为具有相关性度量的项目集效用最大化（CoIUM）的新颖算法，该算法同时考虑了项目的强相关性和盈利价值。此外，该算法采用数据库投影机制来降低数据库扫描的成本。此外，利用两个上限和四种剪枝策略来有效地剪枝搜索空间。并使用一个名为utility-bin的简洁的基于数组的结构来计算和存储所采用的线性时间和空间上界。最后，在密集和稀疏数据集上的大量实验结果表明，CoIUM 在运行时间和内存消耗方面显着优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoIUM的新算法，用于在高效挖掘高效用项集（HUIM）时考虑项之间的相关性，以减少无关组合的发现。
AI.motivation: 传统HUIM方法忽略了项集内项之间的关系，导致挖掘出许多不相关的组合，影响实际应用效果。
AI.method: CoIUM算法结合强相关性与项的利润值，采用数据库投影机制降低扫描成本，并利用两个上界和四种剪枝策略高效缩减搜索空间，同时使用线性时间和空间的utility-bin结构存储上界。
AI.result: 在密集和稀疏数据集上的实验表明，CoIUM在运行时间和内存消耗方面显著优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: CoIUM通过引入相关性度量和优化结构，有效解决了传统HUIM方法的局限性，提升了挖掘效率和实用性。

HUIM has been widely applied in many application scenarios, such as market analysis, medical detection, and web click stream analysis. However, most previous HUIM approaches often ignore the relationship between items in an itemset. authors_text: Jichao Zhang,Aliaksandr Siarohin,Yahui Liu,Hao Tang,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang
title: Training and Tuning Generative Neural Radiance Fields for Attribute-Conditional 3D-Aware Face Generation
title_zh: 训练和调整生成神经辐射场以实现属性条件 3D 感知人脸生成
abstract: Generative Neural Radiance Fields (GNeRF)-based 3D-aware GANs have showcased remarkable prowess in crafting high-fidelity images while upholding robust 3D consistency, particularly face generation. However, specific existing models prioritize view consistency over disentanglement, leading to constrained semantic or attribute control during the generation process. While many methods have explored incorporating semantic masks or leveraging 3D Morphable Models (3DMM) priors to imbue models with semantic control, these methods often demand training from scratch, entailing significant computational overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel approach: a conditional GNeRF model that integrates specific attribute labels as input, thus amplifying the controllability and disentanglement capabilities of 3D-aware generative models. Our approach builds upon a pre-trained 3D-aware face model, and we introduce a Training as Init and Optimizing for Tuning (TRIOT) method to train a conditional normalized flow module to enable the facial attribute editing, then optimize the latent vector to improve attribute-editing precision further. Our extensive experiments substantiate the efficacy of our model, showcasing its ability to generate high-quality edits with enhanced view consistency while safeguarding non-target regions. The code for our model is publicly available at https://github.com/zhangqianhui/TT-GNeRF.
summary: Generative Neural Radiance Fields (GNeRF)-based 3D-aware GANs have showcased remarkable prowess in crafting high-fidelity images while upholding robust 3D consistency, particularly face generation. However, specific existing models prioritize view consistency over disentanglement, leading to constrained semantic or attribute control during the generation process. While many methods have explored incorporating semantic masks or leveraging 3D Morphable Models (3DMM) priors to imbue models with semantic control, these methods often demand training from scratch, entailing significant computational overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel approach: a conditional GNeRF model that integrates specific attribute labels as input, thus amplifying the controllability and disentanglement capabilities of 3D-aware generative models. Our approach builds upon a pre-trained 3D-aware face model, and we introduce a Training as Init and Optimizing for Tuning (TRIOT) method to train a conditional normalized flow module to enable the facial attribute editing, then optimize the latent vector to improve attribute-editing precision further. Our extensive experiments substantiate the efficacy of our model, showcasing its ability to generate high-quality edits with enhanced view consistency while safeguarding non-target regions. The code for our model is publicly available at https://github.com/zhangqianhui/TT-GNeRF.
abstract_zh: 基于生成神经辐射场 (GNeRF) 的 3D 感知 GAN 在制作高保真图像方面展现了非凡的能力，同时保持了强大的 3D 一致性，尤其是面部生成。然而，特定的现有模型优先考虑视图一致性而不是解开，导致生成过程中语义或属性控制受到限制。虽然许多方法在为模型注入语义控制之前已经探索了合并语义掩码或利用 3D Morphable Models (3DMM)，但这些方法通常需要从头开始训练，从而产生大量的计算开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法：一种条件 GNeRF 模型，它将特定的属性标签集成为输入，从而增强了 3D 感知生成模型的可控性和解缠能力。我们的方法建立在预先训练的 3D 感知面部模型的基础上，并引入了训练作为初始化和优化调整 (TRIOT) 方法来训练条件归一化流模块以实现面部属性编辑，然后优化潜在向量以进一步提高属性编辑精度。我们广泛的实验证实了我们模型的有效性，展示了其生成高质量编辑的能力，增强了视图一致性，同时保护非目标区域。我们模型的代码可在 https://github.com/zhangqianhui/TT-GNeRF 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件生成神经辐射场（GNeRF）的3D感知人脸生成方法，通过引入属性标签提升模型的可控性和解耦能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型过度关注视角一致性而忽视语义解耦，导致属性控制受限；依赖语义掩码或3DMM先验的方法需从头训练，计算成本高。
AI.method: 构建条件GNeRF模型，将属性标签作为输入；基于预训练3D感知人脸模型，采用TRIOT方法训练归一化流模块并优化潜在向量以提升属性编辑精度。
AI.result: 实验表明模型可生成高质量编辑结果，增强视角一致性并保护非目标区域，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需从头训练的前提下，有效提升了3D感知生成模型的可控性与视角一致性。

search_text: Training and Tuning Generative Neural Radiance Fields for Attribute-Conditional 3D-Aware Face Generation 训练和调整生成神经辐射场以实现属性条件 3D 感知人脸生成 Generative Neural Radiance Fields (GNeRF)-based 3D-aware GANs have showcased remarkable prowess in crafting high-fidelity images while upholding robust 3D consistency, particularly face generation. However, specific existing models prioritize view consistency over disentanglement, leading to constrained semantic or attribute control during the generation process. While many methods have explored incorporating semantic masks or leveraging 3D Morphable Models (3DMM) priors to imbue models with semantic control, these methods often demand training from scratch, entailing significant computational overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel approach: a conditional GNeRF model that integrates specific attribute labels as input, thus amplifying the controllability and disentanglement capabilities of 3D-aware generative models. Our approach builds upon a pre-trained 3D-aware face model, and we introduce a Training as Init and Optimizing for Tuning (TRIOT) method to train a conditional normalized flow module to enable the facial attribute editing, then optimize the latent vector to improve attribute-editing precision further. Our extensive experiments substantiate the efficacy of our model, showcasing its ability to generate high-quality edits with enhanced view consistency while safeguarding non-target regions. The code for our model is publicly available at https://github.com/zhangqianhui/TT-GNeRF. 基于生成神经辐射场 (GNeRF) 的 3D 感知 GAN 在制作高保真图像方面展现了非凡的能力，同时保持了强大的 3D 一致性，尤其是面部生成。然而，特定的现有模型优先考虑视图一致性而不是解开，导致生成过程中语义或属性控制受到限制。虽然许多方法在为模型注入语义控制之前已经探索了合并语义掩码或利用 3D Morphable Models (3DMM)，但这些方法通常需要从头开始训练，从而产生大量的计算开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法：一种条件 GNeRF 模型，它将特定的属性标签集成为输入，从而增强了 3D 感知生成模型的可控性和解缠能力。我们的方法建立在预先训练的 3D 感知面部模型的基础上，并引入了训练作为初始化和优化调整 (TRIOT) 方法来训练条件归一化流模块以实现面部属性编辑，然后优化潜在向量以进一步提高属性编辑精度。我们广泛的实验证实了我们模型的有效性，展示了其生成高质量编辑的能力，增强了视图一致性，同时保护非目标区域。我们模型的代码可在 https://github.com/zhangqianhui/TT-GNeRF 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于条件生成神经辐射场（GNeRF）的3D感知人脸生成方法，通过引入属性标签提升模型的可控性和解耦能力。 Jichao Zhang,Aliaksandr Siarohin,Yahui Liu,Hao Tang,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Steven Chaplick,Emilio Di Giacomo,Fabrizio Frati,Robert Ganian,Chrysanthi N. Raftopoulou,Kirill Simonov
title: Testing Upward Planarity of Partial $2$-Trees
title_zh: 测试部分 2 美元树的向上平面度
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: We present an $O(n^2)$-time algorithm to test whether an $n$-vertex directed partial $2$-tree is upward planar. This result improves upon the previously best known algorithm, which runs in $O(n^4)$ time.
summary: We present an $O(n^2)$-time algorithm to test whether an $n$-vertex directed partial $2$-tree is upward planar. This result improves upon the previously best known algorithm, which runs in $O(n^4)$ time.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个 $O(n^2)$ 时间算法来测试 $n$ 顶点定向的部分 $2$ 树是否是向上平面的。此结果改进了之前最知名的算法，该算法的运行时间为 $O(n^4)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在O(n²)时间内判断有向部分2-树是否向上平面的算法。
AI.motivation: 此前最佳算法时间复杂度为O(n⁴)，无法高效处理大规模图结构，需改进算法效率。
AI.method: 利用部分2-树的结构特性，结合向上平面性的判定条件设计更高效的算法框架。
AI.result: 成功将时间复杂度从O(n⁴)降至O(n²)，显著提升了算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为处理大规模有向图的向上平面性问题提供了更可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Zizhao Zhang,Yifan Feng,Shihui Ying,Yue Gao
title: Deep Hypergraph Structure Learning
title_zh: 深度超图结构学习
abstract: Learning on high-order correlation has shown superiority in data representation learning, where hypergraph has been widely used in recent decades. The performance of hypergraph-based representation learning methods, such as hypergraph neural networks, highly depends on the quality of the hypergraph structure. How to generate the hypergraph structure among data is still a challenging task. Missing and noisy data may lead to "bad connections" in the hypergraph structure and destroy the hypergraph-based representation learning process. Therefore, revealing the high-order structure, i.e., the hypergraph behind the observed data, becomes an urgent but important task. To address this issue, we design a general paradigm of deep hypergraph structure learning, namely DeepHGSL, to optimize the hypergraph structure for hypergraph-based representation learning. Concretely, inspired by the information bottleneck principle for the robustness issue, we first extend it to the hypergraph case, named by the hypergraph information bottleneck (HIB) principle. Then, we apply this principle to guide the hypergraph structure learning, where the HIB is introduced to construct the loss function to minimize the noisy information in the hypergraph structure. The hypergraph structure can be optimized and this process can be regarded as enhancing the correct connections and weakening the wrong connections in the training phase. Therefore, the proposed method benefits to extract more robust representations even on a heavily noisy structure. Finally, we evaluate the model on four benchmark datasets for representation learning. The experimental results on both graph- and hypergraph-structured data demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Learning on high-order correlation has shown superiority in data representation learning, where hypergraph has been widely used in recent decades. The performance of hypergraph-based representation learning methods, such as hypergraph neural networks, highly depends on the quality of the hypergraph structure. How to generate the hypergraph structure among data is still a challenging task. Missing and noisy data may lead to "bad connections" in the hypergraph structure and destroy the hypergraph-based representation learning process. Therefore, revealing the high-order structure, i.e., the hypergraph behind the observed data, becomes an urgent but important task. To address this issue, we design a general paradigm of deep hypergraph structure learning, namely DeepHGSL, to optimize the hypergraph structure for hypergraph-based representation learning. Concretely, inspired by the information bottleneck principle for the robustness issue, we first extend it to the hypergraph case, named by the hypergraph information bottleneck (HIB) principle. Then, we apply this principle to guide the hypergraph structure learning, where the HIB is introduced to construct the loss function to minimize the noisy information in the hypergraph structure. The hypergraph structure can be optimized and this process can be regarded as enhancing the correct connections and weakening the wrong connections in the training phase. Therefore, the proposed method benefits to extract more robust representations even on a heavily noisy structure. Finally, we evaluate the model on four benchmark datasets for representation learning. The experimental results on both graph- and hypergraph-structured data demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 高阶相关性的学习在数据表示学习中表现出了优越性，近几十年来超图在数据表示学习中得到了广泛的应用。基于超图的表示学习方法（例如超图神经网络）的性能很大程度上取决于超图结构的质量。如何生成数据之间的超图结构仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。丢失和嘈杂的数据可能会导致超图结构中的“不良连接”并破坏基于超图的表示学习过程。因此，揭示观测数据背后的高阶结构，即超图，成为一项紧迫而重要的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种深度超图结构学习的通用范式，即 DeepHGSL，来优化基于超图表示学习的超图结构。具体来说，受到鲁棒性问题的信息瓶颈原理的启发，我们首先将其扩展到超图情况，命名为超图信息瓶颈（HIB）原理。然后，我们应用这一原理来指导超图结构学习，其中引入HIB来构造损失函数以最小化超图结构中的噪声信息。超图结构是可以优化的，这个过程可以看作是训练阶段增强正确连接、削弱错误连接。因此，即使在噪声严重的结构上，所提出的方法也有利于提取更鲁棒的表示。最后，我们在四个用于表示学习的基准数据集上评估模型。图结构和超图结构数据的实验结果证明了我们的方法与其他最先进的方法相比的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度超图结构学习框架DeepHGSL，旨在优化超图结构以提升基于超图的表示学习性能。
AI.motivation: 超图结构的质量直接影响基于超图的表示学习效果，但现有方法在处理噪声和缺失数据时易产生错误连接，导致学习过程受损。
AI.method: 受信息瓶颈原理启发，提出超图信息瓶颈（HIB）原则，通过构建损失函数优化超图结构，增强正确连接并削弱错误连接。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在图结构和超图结构数据上均优于现有先进方法，展现出更强的鲁棒性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeepHGSL通过优化超图结构有效缓解了噪声干扰，为高阶关联建模提供了更稳健的解决方案。

Therefore, the proposed method benefits to extract more robust representations even on a heavily noisy structure. Finally, we evaluate the model on four benchmark datasets for representation learning. The experimental results on both graph- and hypergraph-structured data demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method compared with other state-of-the-art methods. 高阶相关性的学习在数据表示学习中表现出了优越性，近几十年来超图在数据表示学习中得到了广泛的应用。基于超图的表示学习方法（例如超图神经网络）的性能很大程度上取决于超图结构的质量。如何生成数据之间的超图结构仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。丢失和嘈杂的数据可能会导致超图结构中的“不良连接”并破坏基于超图的表示学习过程。因此，揭示观测数据背后的高阶结构，即超图，成为一项紧迫而重要的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种深度超图结构学习的通用范式，即 DeepHGSL，来优化基于超图表示学习的超图结构。具体来说，受到鲁棒性问题的信息瓶颈原理的启发，我们首先将其扩展到超图情况，命名为超图信息瓶颈（HIB）原理。然后，我们应用这一原理来指导超图结构学习，其中引入HIB来构造损失函数以最小化超图结构中的噪声信息。超图结构是可以优化的，这个过程可以看作是训练阶段增强正确连接、削弱错误连接。因此，即使在噪声严重的结构上，所提出的方法也有利于提取更鲁棒的表示。最后，我们在四个用于表示学习的基准数据集上评估模型。图结构和超图结构数据的实验结果证明了我们的方法与其他最先进的方法相比的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种深度超图结构学习框架DeepHGSL，旨在优化超图结构以提升基于超图的表示学习性能。 Zizhao Zhang,Yifan Feng,Shihui Ying,Yue Gao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Guanzhou Ke,Yongqi Zhu,Yang Yu
title: MORI-RAN: Multi-view Robust Representation Learning via Hybrid Contrastive Fusion
title_zh: MORI-RAN：通过混合对比融合进行多视图鲁棒表示学习
abstract: Multi-view representation learning is essential for many multi-view tasks, such as clustering and classification. However, there are two challenging problems plaguing the community: i)how to learn robust multi-view representation from mass unlabeled data and ii) how to balance the view consistency and the view specificity. To this end, in this paper, we proposed a hybrid contrastive fusion algorithm to extract robust view-common representation from unlabeled data. Specifically, we found that introducing an additional representation space and aligning representations on this space enables the model to learn robust view-common representations. At the same time, we designed an asymmetric contrastive strategy to ensure that the model does not obtain trivial solutions. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms 12 competitive multi-view methods on four real-world datasets in terms of clustering and classification. Our source code will be available soon at \url{https://github.com/guanzhou-ke/mori-ran}.
summary: Multi-view representation learning is essential for many multi-view tasks, such as clustering and classification. However, there are two challenging problems plaguing the community: i)how to learn robust multi-view representation from mass unlabeled data and ii) how to balance the view consistency and the view specificity. To this end, in this paper, we proposed a hybrid contrastive fusion algorithm to extract robust view-common representation from unlabeled data. Specifically, we found that introducing an additional representation space and aligning representations on this space enables the model to learn robust view-common representations. At the same time, we designed an asymmetric contrastive strategy to ensure that the model does not obtain trivial solutions. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms 12 competitive multi-view methods on four real-world datasets in terms of clustering and classification. Our source code will be available soon at \url{https://github.com/guanzhou-ke/mori-ran}.
abstract_zh: 多视图表示学习对于许多多视图任务（例如聚类和分类）至关重要。然而，有两个具有挑战性的问题困扰着社区：i）如何从大量未标记数据中学习鲁棒的多视图表示；ii）如何平衡视图一致性和视图特异性。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种混合对比融合算法，从未标记的数据中提取鲁棒的视图公共表示。具体来说，我们发现引入额外的表示空间并在该空间上对齐表示使模型能够学习鲁棒的视图公共表示。同时，我们设计了非对称对比策略，以确保模型不会获得平凡的解决方案。实验结果表明，该方法在聚类和分类方面优于四个真实数据集上的 12 种竞争性多视图方法。我们的源代码即将在 \url{https://github.com/guanzhou-ke/mori-ran} 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MORI-RAN方法，通过混合对比融合算法解决多视角表示学习中鲁棒性与视角平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未标记数据时难以学习鲁棒的多视角表示，且难以平衡视角一致性与特异性。
AI.method: 引入额外表示空间对齐视角表示，并设计非对称对比策略防止平凡解，实现视角共性与特性的平衡。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上聚类和分类任务中优于12种竞争方法，代码即将开源。
AI.conclusion: 混合对比融合框架有效解决了多视角学习中的鲁棒性与平衡性挑战。

authors_text: Abdul Rahman Kreidieh,Zhe Fu,Alexandre M. Bayen
title: Learning energy-efficient driving behaviors by imitating experts
title_zh: 模仿专家学习节能驾驶行为
abstract: The rise of vehicle automation has generated significant interest in the potential role of future automated vehicles (AVs). In particular, in highly dense traffic settings, AVs are expected to serve as congestion-dampeners, mitigating the presence of instabilities that arise from various sources. However, in many applications, such maneuvers rely heavily on non-local sensing or coordination by interacting AVs, thereby rendering their adaptation to real-world settings a particularly difficult challenge. To address this challenge, this paper examines the role of imitation learning in bridging the gap between such control strategies and realistic limitations in communication and sensing. Treating one such controller as an "expert", we demonstrate that imitation learning can succeed in deriving policies that, if adopted by 5% of vehicles, may boost the energy-efficiency of networks with varying traffic conditions by 15% using only local observations. Results and code are available online at https://sites.google.com/view/il-traffic/home.
summary: The rise of vehicle automation has generated significant interest in the potential role of future automated vehicles (AVs). In particular, in highly dense traffic settings, AVs are expected to serve as congestion-dampeners, mitigating the presence of instabilities that arise from various sources. However, in many applications, such maneuvers rely heavily on non-local sensing or coordination by interacting AVs, thereby rendering their adaptation to real-world settings a particularly difficult challenge. To address this challenge, this paper examines the role of imitation learning in bridging the gap between such control strategies and realistic limitations in communication and sensing. Treating one such controller as an "expert", we demonstrate that imitation learning can succeed in deriving policies that, if adopted by 5% of vehicles, may boost the energy-efficiency of networks with varying traffic conditions by 15% using only local observations. Results and code are available online at https://sites.google.com/view/il-traffic/home.
abstract_zh: 车辆自动化的兴起引起了人们对未来自动车辆 (AV) 潜在作用的极大兴趣。特别是，在高度密集的交通环境中，自动驾驶汽车有望充当拥堵抑制器，减轻各种来源引起的不稳定现象。然而，在许多应用中，此类操作严重依赖于交互自动驾驶汽车的非本地感知或协调，从而使其适应现实世界环境成为一项特别困难的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，本文研究了模仿学习在弥合此类控制策略与通信和感知的现实限制之间的差距方面的作用。将这样的控制器视为“专家”，我们证明模仿学习可以成功地导出策略，如果 5％ 的车辆采用这些策略，则仅使用本地观察即可将不同交通条件下的网络的能源效率提高 15％。结果和代码可在线获取：https://sites.google.com/view/il-traffic/home。

AI.tldr: 本文通过模仿专家控制器，研究自动驾驶车辆（AVs）在密集交通环境中学习节能驾驶行为的方法。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在密集交通中需应对通信和感知限制带来的挑战，传统依赖非局部感知的控制策略难以适应现实场景，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将一种控制器视为‘专家’，利用模仿学习从局部观测中学习驾驶策略，无需非局部感知或车辆间协调。
AI.result: 当5%的车辆采用该策略时，不同交通条件下网络能源效率提升15%。
AI.conclusion: 模仿学习可有效桥接控制策略与现实限制，为自动驾驶车辆实现节能驾驶提供可行方案。

However, in many applications, such maneuvers rely heavily on non-local sensing or coordination by interacting AVs, thereby rendering their adaptation to real-world settings a particularly difficult challenge. To address this challenge, this paper examines the role of imitation learning in bridging the gap between such control strategies and realistic limitations in communication and sensing. authors_text: Jiaming Liu,Qizhe Zhang,Xiaoqi Li,Jianing Li,Guanqun Wang,Ming Lu,Tiejun Huang,Shanghang Zhang
title: Unsupervised Spike Depth Estimation via Cross-modality Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 通过跨模态跨领域知识转移进行无监督尖峰深度估计
abstract: Neuromorphic spike data, an upcoming modality with high temporal resolution, has shown promising potential in autonomous driving by mitigating the challenges posed by high-velocity motion blur. However, training the spike depth estimation network holds significant challenges in two aspects: sparse spatial information for pixel-wise tasks and difficulties in achieving paired depth labels for temporally intensive spike streams. Therefore, we introduce open-source RGB data to support spike depth estimation, leveraging its annotations and spatial information. The inherent differences in modalities and data distribution make it challenging to directly apply transfer learning from open-source RGB to target spike data. To this end, we propose a cross-modality cross-domain (BiCross) framework to realize unsupervised spike depth estimation by introducing simulated mediate source spike data. Specifically, we design a Coarse-to-Fine Knowledge Distillation (CFKD) approach to facilitate comprehensive cross-modality knowledge transfer while preserving the unique strengths of both modalities, utilizing a spike-oriented uncertainty scheme. Then, we propose a Self-Correcting Teacher-Student (SCTS) mechanism to screen out reliable pixel-wise pseudo labels and ease the domain shift of the student model, which avoids error accumulation in target spike data. To verify the effectiveness of BiCross, we conduct extensive experiments on four scenarios, including Synthetic to Real, Extreme Weather, Scene Changing, and Real Spike. Our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances, compared with RGB-oriented unsupervised depth estimation methods. Code and dataset: https://github.com/Theia-4869/BiCross
summary: Neuromorphic spike data, an upcoming modality with high temporal resolution, has shown promising potential in autonomous driving by mitigating the challenges posed by high-velocity motion blur. However, training the spike depth estimation network holds significant challenges in two aspects: sparse spatial information for pixel-wise tasks and difficulties in achieving paired depth labels for temporally intensive spike streams. Therefore, we introduce open-source RGB data to support spike depth estimation, leveraging its annotations and spatial information. The inherent differences in modalities and data distribution make it challenging to directly apply transfer learning from open-source RGB to target spike data. To this end, we propose a cross-modality cross-domain (BiCross) framework to realize unsupervised spike depth estimation by introducing simulated mediate source spike data. Specifically, we design a Coarse-to-Fine Knowledge Distillation (CFKD) approach to facilitate comprehensive cross-modality knowledge transfer while preserving the unique strengths of both modalities, utilizing a spike-oriented uncertainty scheme. Then, we propose a Self-Correcting Teacher-Student (SCTS) mechanism to screen out reliable pixel-wise pseudo labels and ease the domain shift of the student model, which avoids error accumulation in target spike data. To verify the effectiveness of BiCross, we conduct extensive experiments on four scenarios, including Synthetic to Real, Extreme Weather, Scene Changing, and Real Spike. Our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances, compared with RGB-oriented unsupervised depth estimation methods. Code and dataset: https://github.com/Theia-4869/BiCross
abstract_zh: 神经形态尖峰数据是一种即将出现的具有高时间分辨率的模式，通过减轻高速运动模糊带来的挑战，在自动驾驶方面显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，训练尖峰深度估计网络在两个方面面临着巨大的挑战：像素级任务的稀疏空间信息以及为时间密集的尖峰流实现配对深度标签的困难。因此，我们引入开源 RGB 数据来支持尖峰深度估计，利用其注释和空间信息。模式和数据分布的固有差异使得直接将开源 RGB 的迁移学习应用于目标尖峰数据具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了一种跨模态跨域（BiCross）框架，通过引入模拟中间源尖峰数据来实现无监督尖峰深度估计。具体来说，我们设计了一种从粗到细的知识蒸馏（CFKD）方法，利用面向尖峰的不确定性方案，促进全面的跨模态知识转移，同时保留两种模态的独特优势。然后，我们提出了一种自校正教师-学生（SCTS）机制来筛选可靠的像素级伪标签并缓解学生模型的域转移，从而避免目标尖峰数据中的错误累积。为了验证 BiCross 的有效性，我们对四种场景进行了广泛的实验，包括合成真实、极端天气、场景变化和真实尖峰。与面向 RGB 的无监督深度估计方法相比，我们的方法实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能。代码和数据集：https://github.com/Theia-4869/BiCross

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态跨域知识迁移框架BiCross，用于实现无监督的脉冲深度估计，通过结合RGB数据和模拟脉冲数据解决脉冲数据稀疏性和标注困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 脉冲数据在自动驾驶中具有高时间分辨率优势，但其稀疏空间信息和缺乏配对深度标签导致训练困难。现有方法难以直接迁移RGB到脉冲数据，需解决模态差异和分布差异带来的挑战。
AI.method: 设计BiCross框架，包含粗到细知识蒸馏（CFKD）促进跨模态知识迁移，并引入自校正教师-学生（SCTS）机制筛选可靠伪标签，减少目标域误差累积。
AI.result: 在合成到真实、极端天气、场景变化和真实脉冲四类场景中取得SOTA性能，优于其他无监督深度估计方法。
AI.conclusion: BiCross通过跨模态跨域知识迁移有效解决了脉冲深度估计的标注与分布挑战，为无监督学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Unsupervised Spike Depth Estimation via Cross-modality Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer 通过跨模态跨领域知识转移进行无监督尖峰深度估计 Neuromorphic spike data, an upcoming modality with high temporal resolution, has shown promising potential in autonomous driving by mitigating the challenges posed by high-velocity motion blur. However, training the spike depth estimation network holds significant challenges in two aspects: sparse spatial information for pixel-wise tasks and difficulties in achieving paired depth labels for temporally intensive spike streams. Therefore, we introduce open-source RGB data to support spike depth estimation, leveraging its annotations and spatial information. The inherent differences in modalities and data distribution make it challenging to directly apply transfer learning from open-source RGB to target spike data. To this end, we propose a cross-modality cross-domain (BiCross) framework to realize unsupervised spike depth estimation by introducing simulated mediate source spike data. Specifically, we design a Coarse-to-Fine Knowledge Distillation (CFKD) approach to facilitate comprehensive cross-modality knowledge transfer while preserving the unique strengths of both modalities, utilizing a spike-oriented uncertainty scheme. Then, we propose a Self-Correcting Teacher-Student (SCTS) mechanism to screen out reliable pixel-wise pseudo labels and ease the domain shift of the student model, which avoids error accumulation in target spike data. To verify the effectiveness of BiCross, we conduct extensive experiments on four scenarios, including Synthetic to Real, Extreme Weather, Scene Changing, and Real Spike. Our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances, compared with RGB-oriented unsupervised depth estimation methods. authors_text: Yabing Wang,Jianfeng Dong,Tianxiang Liang,Minsong Zhang,Rui Cai,Xun Wang
title: Cross-Lingual Cross-Modal Retrieval with Noise-Robust Learning
title_zh: 具有抗噪学习的跨语言跨模态检索
comment: Accepted by ACM MM 2022. Code and data are available at https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr
comments: Accepted by ACM MM 2022. Code and data are available at https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr
abstract: Despite the recent developments in the field of cross-modal retrieval, there has been less research focusing on low-resource languages due to the lack of manually annotated datasets. In this paper, we propose a noise-robust cross-lingual cross-modal retrieval method for low-resource languages. To this end, we use Machine Translation (MT) to construct pseudo-parallel sentence pairs for low-resource languages. However, as MT is not perfect, it tends to introduce noise during translation, rendering textual embeddings corrupted and thereby compromising the retrieval performance. To alleviate this, we introduce a multi-view self-distillation method to learn noise-robust target-language representations, which employs a cross-attention module to generate soft pseudo-targets to provide direct supervision from the similarity-based view and feature-based view. Besides, inspired by the back-translation in unsupervised MT, we minimize the semantic discrepancies between origin sentences and back-translated sentences to further improve the noise robustness of the textual encoder. Extensive experiments are conducted on three video-text and image-text cross-modal retrieval benchmarks across different languages, and the results demonstrate that our method significantly improves the overall performance without using extra human-labeled data. In addition, equipped with a pre-trained visual encoder from a recent vision-and-language pre-training framework, i.e., CLIP, our model achieves a significant performance gain, showing that our method is compatible with popular pre-training models. Code and data are available at https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr.
summary: Despite the recent developments in the field of cross-modal retrieval, there has been less research focusing on low-resource languages due to the lack of manually annotated datasets. In this paper, we propose a noise-robust cross-lingual cross-modal retrieval method for low-resource languages. To this end, we use Machine Translation (MT) to construct pseudo-parallel sentence pairs for low-resource languages. However, as MT is not perfect, it tends to introduce noise during translation, rendering textual embeddings corrupted and thereby compromising the retrieval performance. To alleviate this, we introduce a multi-view self-distillation method to learn noise-robust target-language representations, which employs a cross-attention module to generate soft pseudo-targets to provide direct supervision from the similarity-based view and feature-based view. Besides, inspired by the back-translation in unsupervised MT, we minimize the semantic discrepancies between origin sentences and back-translated sentences to further improve the noise robustness of the textual encoder. Extensive experiments are conducted on three video-text and image-text cross-modal retrieval benchmarks across different languages, and the results demonstrate that our method significantly improves the overall performance without using extra human-labeled data. In addition, equipped with a pre-trained visual encoder from a recent vision-and-language pre-training framework, i.e., CLIP, our model achieves a significant performance gain, showing that our method is compatible with popular pre-training models. Code and data are available at https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr.
abstract_zh: 尽管跨模态检索领域最近取得了进展，但由于缺乏手动注释的数据集，针对低资源语言的研究较少。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对低资源语言的抗噪声跨语言跨模态检索方法。为此，我们使用机器翻译（MT）为低资源语言构建伪并行句子对。然而，由于机器翻译并不完美，它往往会在翻译过程中引入噪声，导致文本嵌入损坏，从而影响检索性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一种多视图自蒸馏方法来学习噪声鲁棒的目标语言表示，该方法采用交叉注意模块来生成软伪目标，以从基于相似性的视图和基于特征的视图提供直接监督。此外，受无监督机器翻译中反向翻译的启发，我们最小化了源句子和反向翻译句子之间的语义差异，以进一步提高文本编码器的噪声鲁棒性。在不同语言的三个视频文本和图像文本跨模态检索基准上进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法在不使用额外的人工标记数据的情况下显着提高了整体性能。此外，配备了来自最新视觉和语言预训练框架（即 CLIP）的预训练视觉编码器，我们的模型实现了显着的性能增益，表明我们的方法与流行的预训练模型兼容。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对低资源语言的噪声鲁棒跨语言跨模态检索方法，通过机器翻译构建伪平行语料并结合多视角自蒸馏技术提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态检索研究多聚焦高资源语言，低资源语言因缺乏人工标注数据而被忽视，且机器翻译生成的伪数据存在噪声影响模型效果。
AI.method: 利用机器翻译生成伪平行句对，采用多视角自蒸馏方法（包含交叉注意力模块生成软伪目标）和反向翻译策略，联合优化文本编码器的噪声鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个跨语言图文/视频-文本检索基准测试中显著提升性能，且无需额外标注数据；结合CLIP预训练视觉编码器进一步提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解翻译噪声影响，在低资源语言跨模态检索任务中表现优异，且兼容主流预训练模型框架。
