search_text: Cross-Lingual Cross-Modal Retrieval with Noise-Robust Learning 具有抗噪学习的跨语言跨模态检索 Despite the recent developments in the field of cross-modal retrieval, there has been less research focusing on low-resource languages due to the lack of manually annotated datasets. In this paper, we propose a noise-robust cross-lingual cross-modal retrieval method for low-resource languages. To this end, we use Machine Translation (MT) to construct pseudo-parallel sentence pairs for low-resource languages. However, as MT is not perfect, it tends to introduce noise during translation, rendering textual embeddings corrupted and thereby compromising the retrieval performance. To alleviate this, we introduce a multi-view self-distillation method to learn noise-robust target-language representations, which employs a cross-attention module to generate soft pseudo-targets to provide direct supervision from the similarity-based view and feature-based view. Besides, inspired by the back-translation in unsupervised MT, we minimize the semantic discrepancies between origin sentences and back-translated sentences to further improve the noise robustness of the textual encoder. Extensive experiments are conducted on three video-text and image-text cross-modal retrieval benchmarks across different languages, and the results demonstrate that our method significantly improves the overall performance without using extra human-labeled data. In addition, equipped with a pre-trained visual encoder from a recent vision-and-language pre-training framework, i.e., CLIP, our model achieves a significant performance gain, showing that our method is compatible with popular pre-training models. Code and data are available at https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr. 尽管跨模态检索领域最近取得了进展，但由于缺乏手动注释的数据集，针对低资源语言的研究较少。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对低资源语言的抗噪声跨语言跨模态检索方法。为此，我们使用机器翻译（MT）为低资源语言构建伪并行句子对。然而，由于机器翻译并不完美，它往往会在翻译过程中引入噪声，导致文本嵌入损坏，从而影响检索性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一种多视图自蒸馏方法来学习噪声鲁棒的目标语言表示，该方法采用交叉注意模块来生成软伪目标，以从基于相似性的视图和基于特征的视图提供直接监督。此外，受无监督机器翻译中反向翻译的启发，我们最小化了源句子和反向翻译句子之间的语义差异，以进一步提高文本编码器的噪声鲁棒性。在不同语言的三个视频文本和图像文本跨模态检索基准上进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法在不使用额外的人工标记数据的情况下显着提高了整体性能。此外，配备了来自最新视觉和语言预训练框架（即 CLIP）的预训练视觉编码器，我们的模型实现了显着的性能增益，表明我们的方法与流行的预训练模型兼容。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/nrccr 获取。 本文提出一种针对低资源语言的噪声鲁棒跨语言跨模态检索方法，通过机器翻译构建伪平行语料并结合多视角自蒸馏技术提升检索性能。 Yabing Wang,Jianfeng Dong,Tianxiang Liang,Minsong Zhang,Rui Cai,Xun Wang cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Martin Glauer,Robert West,Susan Michie,Janna Hastings
title: ESC-Rules: Explainable, Semantically Constrained Rule Sets
title_zh: ESC-规则：可解释的、语义约束的规则集
abstract: We describe a novel approach to explainable prediction of a continuous variable based on learning fuzzy weighted rules. Our model trains a set of weighted rules to maximise prediction accuracy and minimise an ontology-based 'semantic loss' function including user-specified constraints on the rules that should be learned in order to maximise the explainability of the resulting rule set from a user perspective. This system fuses quantitative sub-symbolic learning with symbolic learning and constraints based on domain knowledge. We illustrate our system on a case study in predicting the outcomes of behavioural interventions for smoking cessation, and show that it outperforms other interpretable approaches, achieving performance close to that of a deep learning model, while offering transparent explainability that is an essential requirement for decision-makers in the health domain.
summary: We describe a novel approach to explainable prediction of a continuous variable based on learning fuzzy weighted rules. Our model trains a set of weighted rules to maximise prediction accuracy and minimise an ontology-based 'semantic loss' function including user-specified constraints on the rules that should be learned in order to maximise the explainability of the resulting rule set from a user perspective. This system fuses quantitative sub-symbolic learning with symbolic learning and constraints based on domain knowledge. We illustrate our system on a case study in predicting the outcomes of behavioural interventions for smoking cessation, and show that it outperforms other interpretable approaches, achieving performance close to that of a deep learning model, while offering transparent explainability that is an essential requirement for decision-makers in the health domain.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种基于学习模糊加权规则的连续变量的可解释预测的新方法。我们的模型训练一组加权规则，以最大化预测准确性并最小化基于本体的“语义损失”函数，包括用户指定的对应该学习的规则的约束，以便从用户的角度最大化结果规则集的可解释性。该系统将定量子符号学习与符号学习和基于领域知识的约束融合在一起。我们通过一个案例研究来说明我们的系统，用于预测戒烟行为干预的结果，并表明它优于其他可解释的方法，实现了接近深度学习模型的性能，同时提供透明的可解释性，这是健康领域决策者的基本要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模糊加权规则的可解释预测模型，通过结合语义约束提升连续变量预测的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释模型预测性能不足，而深度学习模型缺乏透明度，医疗等领域亟需兼顾准确性与可解释性的决策支持工具。
AI.method: 融合次符号学习与符号学习，训练加权规则集以最大化预测精度并最小化语义损失函数，集成用户定义的领域约束条件。
AI.result: 在戒烟干预效果预测任务中，模型性能接近深度学习方法，同时提供符合医疗决策需求的透明规则解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了预测性能与可解释性，为医疗等高透明度需求领域提供了可行的模型框架。

authors_text: Huixu Dong,Yue Feng,Chen Qiu,Ye Pan,Miaoying He,I-Ming Chen
title: Enabling Massage Actions: An Interactive Parallel Robot with Compliant Joints
title_zh: 实现按摩动作：具有柔性关节的交互式并联机器人
abstract: We propose a parallel massage robot with compliant joints based on the series elastic actuator (SEA), offering a unified force-position control approach. First, the kinematic and static force models are established for obtaining the corresponding control variables. Then, a novel force-position control strategy is proposed to separately control the force-position along the normal direction of the surface and another two-direction displacement, without the requirement of a robotic dynamics model. To evaluate its performance, we implement a series of robotic massage experiments. The results demonstrate that the proposed massage manipulator can successfully achieve desired forces and motion patterns of massage tasks, arriving at a high-score user experience.
summary: We propose a parallel massage robot with compliant joints based on the series elastic actuator (SEA), offering a unified force-position control approach. First, the kinematic and static force models are established for obtaining the corresponding control variables. Then, a novel force-position control strategy is proposed to separately control the force-position along the normal direction of the surface and another two-direction displacement, without the requirement of a robotic dynamics model. To evaluate its performance, we implement a series of robotic massage experiments. The results demonstrate that the proposed massage manipulator can successfully achieve desired forces and motion patterns of massage tasks, arriving at a high-score user experience.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于串联弹性执行器（SEA）的具有柔顺关节的并联按摩机器人，提供统一的力位置控制方法。首先，建立运动学和静力模型以获得相应的控制变量。然后，提出了一种新颖的力-位置控制策略，可以单独控制沿表面法线方向的力-位置和另一个两个方向的位移，而不需要机器人动力学模型。为了评估其性能，我们进行了一系列机器人按摩实验。结果表明，所提出的按摩机械手可以成功地实现按摩任务所需的力和运动模式，从而获得高分的用户体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于系列弹性执行器（SEA）的并联按摩机器人，通过统一的力-位置控制方法实现按摩动作。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人缺乏柔性和适应性，难以满足按摩任务中对力与位置精确控制的需求，需开发具有合规关节的交互式机器人以提升用户体验。
AI.method: 建立运动学和静力模型，提出无需动力学模型的力-位置控制策略，分别控制表面法向力及两个方向的位移。
AI.result: 实验验证该按摩机械臂可成功实现目标力与运动模式，用户评价得分高。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的控制方法有效实现了按摩任务的力与运动控制，为交互式机器人提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Vincent Gaudillière,Gilles Simon,Marie-Odile Berger
title: Perspective-1-Ellipsoid: Formulation, Analysis and Solutions of the Camera Pose Estimation Problem from One Ellipse-Ellipsoid Correspondence
title_zh: Perspective-1-Ellipsoid：基于一个椭圆-椭球对应的相机位姿估计问题的公式、分析和解决方案
abstract: In computer vision, camera pose estimation from correspondences between 3D geometric entities and their projections into the image has been a widely investigated problem. Although most state-of-the-art methods exploit low-level primitives such as points or lines, the emergence of very effective CNN-based object detectors in the recent years has paved the way to the use of higher-level features carrying semantically meaningful information. Pioneering works in that direction have shown that modelling 3D objects by ellipsoids and 2D detections by ellipses offers a convenient manner to link 2D and 3D data. However, the mathematical formalism most often used in the related litterature does not enable to easily distinguish ellipsoids and ellipses from other quadrics and conics, leading to a loss of specificity potentially detrimental in some developments. Moreover, the linearization process of the projection equation creates an over-representation of the camera parameters, also possibly causing an efficiency loss. In this paper, we therefore introduce an ellipsoid-specific theoretical framework and demonstrate its beneficial properties in the context of pose estimation. More precisely, we first show that the proposed formalism enables to reduce the pose estimation problem to a position or orientation-only estimation problem in which the remaining unknowns can be derived in closed-form. Then, we demonstrate that it can be further reduced to a 1 Degree-of-Freedom (1DoF) problem and provide the analytical derivations of the pose as a function of that unique scalar unknown. We illustrate our theoretical considerations by visual examples and include a discussion on the practical aspects. Finally, we release this paper along with the corresponding source code in order to contribute towards more efficient resolutions of ellipsoid-related pose estimation problems.
summary: In computer vision, camera pose estimation from correspondences between 3D geometric entities and their projections into the image has been a widely investigated problem. Although most state-of-the-art methods exploit low-level primitives such as points or lines, the emergence of very effective CNN-based object detectors in the recent years has paved the way to the use of higher-level features carrying semantically meaningful information. Pioneering works in that direction have shown that modelling 3D objects by ellipsoids and 2D detections by ellipses offers a convenient manner to link 2D and 3D data. However, the mathematical formalism most often used in the related litterature does not enable to easily distinguish ellipsoids and ellipses from other quadrics and conics, leading to a loss of specificity potentially detrimental in some developments. Moreover, the linearization process of the projection equation creates an over-representation of the camera parameters, also possibly causing an efficiency loss. In this paper, we therefore introduce an ellipsoid-specific theoretical framework and demonstrate its beneficial properties in the context of pose estimation. More precisely, we first show that the proposed formalism enables to reduce the pose estimation problem to a position or orientation-only estimation problem in which the remaining unknowns can be derived in closed-form. Then, we demonstrate that it can be further reduced to a 1 Degree-of-Freedom (1DoF) problem and provide the analytical derivations of the pose as a function of that unique scalar unknown. We illustrate our theoretical considerations by visual examples and include a discussion on the practical aspects. Finally, we release this paper along with the corresponding source code in order to contribute towards more efficient resolutions of ellipsoid-related pose estimation problems.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉中，根据 3D 几何实体及其在图像中的投影之间的对应关系进行相机姿态估计已成为广泛研究的问题。尽管大多数最先进的方法都利用点或线等低级基元，但近年来非常有效的基于 CNN 的目标检测器的出现为使用携带语义上有意义的信息的高级特征铺平了道路。这方面的开创性工作表明，通过椭球体建模 3D 对象和通过椭圆体进行 2D 检测提供了一种链接 2D 和 3D 数据的便捷方式。然而，相关文献中最常使用的数学形式主义无法轻松地区分椭球体和椭圆与其他二次曲线和二次曲线，从而导致特异性的丧失，这在某些发展中可能是有害的。此外，投影方程的线性化过程会造成相机参数的过度表示，也可能导致效率损失。因此，在本文中，我们引入了椭球特定的理论框架，并在位姿估计的背景下展示了其有益的特性。更准确地说，我们首先表明，所提出的形式能够将姿态估计问题简化为仅位置或方向的估计问题，其中剩余的未知数可以以封闭形式导出。然后，我们证明它可以进一步简化为 1 自由度 (1DoF) 问题，并提供作为该独特标量未知数的函数的位姿的分析推导。我们通过视觉示例说明我们的理论考虑，并包括对实践方面的讨论。最后，我们发布了本文以及相应的源代码，以便为更有效地解决与椭球体相关的位姿估计问题做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于椭球体与椭圆对应关系的相机位姿估计方法，通过特定理论框架提升估计效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以区分椭球体与椭圆等二次曲线，导致位姿估计效率低下且缺乏针对性。
AI.method: 构建椭球体专用数学框架，将位姿估计问题简化为单自由度问题并推导闭式解。
AI.result: 通过视觉实例验证理论有效性，并公开源代码以促进相关研究。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为椭球体位姿估计提供了更高效且具理论保证的解决方案。

search_text: Perspective-1-Ellipsoid: Formulation, Analysis and Solutions of the Camera Pose Estimation Problem from One Ellipse-Ellipsoid Correspondence Perspective-1-Ellipsoid：基于一个椭圆-椭球对应的相机位姿估计问题的公式、分析和解决方案 In computer vision, camera pose estimation from correspondences between 3D geometric entities and their projections into the image has been a widely investigated problem. Although most state-of-the-art methods exploit low-level primitives such as points or lines, the emergence of very effective CNN-based object detectors in the recent years has paved the way to the use of higher-level features carrying semantically meaningful information. Pioneering works in that direction have shown that modelling 3D objects by ellipsoids and 2D detections by ellipses offers a convenient manner to link 2D and 3D data. However, the mathematical formalism most often used in the related litterature does not enable to easily distinguish ellipsoids and ellipses from other quadrics and conics, leading to a loss of specificity potentially detrimental in some developments. Moreover, the linearization process of the projection equation creates an over-representation of the camera parameters, also possibly causing an efficiency loss. In this paper, we therefore introduce an ellipsoid-specific theoretical framework and demonstrate its beneficial properties in the context of pose estimation. More precisely, we first show that the proposed formalism enables to reduce the pose estimation problem to a position or orientation-only estimation problem in which the remaining unknowns can be derived in closed-form. Then, we demonstrate that it can be further reduced to a 1 Degree-of-Freedom (1DoF) problem and provide the analytical derivations of the pose as a function of that unique scalar unknown. We illustrate our theoretical considerations by visual examples and include a discussion on the practical aspects. Finally, we release this paper along with the corresponding source code in order to contribute towards more efficient resolutions of ellipsoid-related pose estimation problems. 在计算机视觉中，根据 3D 几何实体及其在图像中的投影之间的对应关系进行相机姿态估计已成为广泛研究的问题。尽管大多数最先进的方法都利用点或线等低级基元，但近年来非常有效的基于 CNN 的目标检测器的出现为使用携带语义上有意义的信息的高级特征铺平了道路。这方面的开创性工作表明，通过椭球体建模 3D 对象和通过椭圆体进行 2D 检测提供了一种链接 2D 和 3D 数据的便捷方式。然而，相关文献中最常使用的数学形式主义无法轻松地区分椭球体和椭圆与其他二次曲线和二次曲线，从而导致特异性的丧失，这在某些发展中可能是有害的。此外，投影方程的线性化过程会造成相机参数的过度表示，也可能导致效率损失。因此，在本文中，我们引入了椭球特定的理论框架，并在位姿估计的背景下展示了其有益的特性。更准确地说，我们首先表明，所提出的形式能够将姿态估计问题简化为仅位置或方向的估计问题，其中剩余的未知数可以以封闭形式导出。然后，我们证明它可以进一步简化为 1 自由度 (1DoF) 问题，并提供作为该独特标量未知数的函数的位姿的分析推导。我们通过视觉示例说明我们的理论考虑，并包括对实践方面的讨论。最后，我们发布了本文以及相应的源代码，以便为更有效地解决与椭球体相关的位姿估计问题做出贡献。 本文提出一种基于椭球体与椭圆对应关系的相机位姿估计方法，通过特定理论框架提升估计效率。 Vincent Gaudillière,Gilles Simon,Marie-Odile Berger cs.CV

authors_text: Xianke Chen,Daizong Liu,Xun Yang,Xirong Li,Jianfeng Dong,Meng Wang,Xun Wang
title: PRVR: Partially Relevant Video Retrieval
title_zh: PRVR：部分相关视频检索
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. The paper's homepage is https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/ms-sl-pp
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. The paper's homepage is https://github.com/HuiGuanLab/ms-sl-pp
abstract: In current text-to-video retrieval (T2VR), videos to be retrieved have been properly trimmed so that a correspondence between the videos and ad-hoc textual queries naturally exists. Note in practice that videos circulated on the Internet and social media platforms, while being relatively short, are typically rich in their content. Often, multiple scenes / actions / events are shown in a single video, leading to a more challenging T2VR setting wherein only part of the video content is relevant w.r.t. a given query. This paper presents a first study on this setting which we term Partially Relevant Video Retrieval (PRVR). Considering that a video typically consists of multiple moments, a video is regarded as partially relevant w.r.t. to a given query if it contains a query-related moment. We formulate the PRVR task as a multiple instance learning problem, and propose a Multi-Scale Similarity Learning (MS-SL++) network that jointly learns both clip-scale and frame-scale similarities to determine the partial relevance between video-query pairs. Extensive experiments on three diverse video-text datasets (TVshow Retrieval, ActivityNet-Captions and Charades-STA) demonstrate the viability of the proposed method.
summary: In current text-to-video retrieval (T2VR), videos to be retrieved have been properly trimmed so that a correspondence between the videos and ad-hoc textual queries naturally exists. Note in practice that videos circulated on the Internet and social media platforms, while being relatively short, are typically rich in their content. Often, multiple scenes / actions / events are shown in a single video, leading to a more challenging T2VR setting wherein only part of the video content is relevant w.r.t. a given query. This paper presents a first study on this setting which we term Partially Relevant Video Retrieval (PRVR). Considering that a video typically consists of multiple moments, a video is regarded as partially relevant w.r.t. to a given query if it contains a query-related moment. We formulate the PRVR task as a multiple instance learning problem, and propose a Multi-Scale Similarity Learning (MS-SL++) network that jointly learns both clip-scale and frame-scale similarities to determine the partial relevance between video-query pairs. Extensive experiments on three diverse video-text datasets (TVshow Retrieval, ActivityNet-Captions and Charades-STA) demonstrate the viability of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在当前的文本到视频检索（T2VR）中，要检索的视频已被适当修剪，以便视频和即席文本查询之间自然存在对应关系。请注意，在实践中，互联网和社交媒体平台上流传的视频虽然相对较短，但内容通常很丰富。通常，单个视频中会显示多个场景/动作/事件，这会导致更具挑战性的 T2VR 设置，其中只有部分视频内容与相关。给定的查询。本文提出了对此设置的第一项研究，我们将其称为部分相关视频检索（PRVR）。考虑到视频通常由多个时刻组成，因此视频被视为部分相关。如果给定查询包含与查询相关的时刻。我们将 PRVR 任务表述为多实例学习问题，并提出了一种多尺度相似性学习（MS-SL++）网络，该网络联合学习剪辑尺度和帧尺度相似性，以确定视频查询对之间的部分相关性。对三个不同视频文本数据集（TVshow Retrieval、ActivityNet-Captions 和 Charades-STA）的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRVR的部分相关视频检索方法，用于处理视频中仅部分内容与查询相关的情况。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到视频检索方法假设视频已剪辑为与查询完全对应，但实际视频内容复杂，常包含多个场景，导致部分相关性问题。
AI.method: 将PRVR建模为多实例学习问题，提出MS-SL++网络，联合学习片段级和帧级相似性以判断局部相关性。
AI.result: 在TVshow Retrieval、ActivityNet-Captions和Charades-STA三个数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了部分相关视频检索问题，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Ravi Kant Gupta,Shivani Nandgaonkar,Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Swapnil Rane,Amit Sethi
title: EGFR Mutation Prediction of Lung Biopsy Images using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习预测肺活检图像的 EGFR 突变
abstract: The standard diagnostic procedures for targeted therapies in lung cancer treatment involve histological subtyping and subsequent detection of key driver mutations, such as EGFR. Even though molecular profiling can uncover the driver mutation, the process is often expensive and time-consuming. Deep learning-oriented image analysis offers a more economical alternative for discovering driver mutations directly from whole slide images (WSIs). In this work, we used customized deep learning pipelines with weak supervision to identify the morphological correlates of EGFR mutation from hematoxylin and eosin-stained WSIs, in addition to detecting tumor and histologically subtyping it. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pipeline by conducting rigorous experiments and ablation studies on two lung cancer datasets - TCGA and a private dataset from India. With our pipeline, we achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) of 0.964 for tumor detection, and 0.942 for histological subtyping between adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma on the TCGA dataset. For EGFR detection, we achieved an average AUC of 0.864 on the TCGA dataset and 0.783 on the dataset from India. Our key learning points include the following. Firstly, there is no particular advantage of using a feature extractor layers trained on histology, if one is going to fine-tune the feature extractor on the target dataset. Secondly, selecting patches with high cellularity, presumably capturing tumor regions, is not always helpful, as the sign of a disease class may be present in the tumor-adjacent stroma.
summary: The standard diagnostic procedures for targeted therapies in lung cancer treatment involve histological subtyping and subsequent detection of key driver mutations, such as EGFR. Even though molecular profiling can uncover the driver mutation, the process is often expensive and time-consuming. Deep learning-oriented image analysis offers a more economical alternative for discovering driver mutations directly from whole slide images (WSIs). In this work, we used customized deep learning pipelines with weak supervision to identify the morphological correlates of EGFR mutation from hematoxylin and eosin-stained WSIs, in addition to detecting tumor and histologically subtyping it. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pipeline by conducting rigorous experiments and ablation studies on two lung cancer datasets - TCGA and a private dataset from India. With our pipeline, we achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) of 0.964 for tumor detection, and 0.942 for histological subtyping between adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma on the TCGA dataset. For EGFR detection, we achieved an average AUC of 0.864 on the TCGA dataset and 0.783 on the dataset from India. Our key learning points include the following. Firstly, there is no particular advantage of using a feature extractor layers trained on histology, if one is going to fine-tune the feature extractor on the target dataset. Secondly, selecting patches with high cellularity, presumably capturing tumor regions, is not always helpful, as the sign of a disease class may be present in the tumor-adjacent stroma.
abstract_zh: 肺癌靶向治疗的标准诊断程序包括组织学分型和随后检测关键驱动突变，例如 EGFR。尽管分子分析可以揭示驱动突变，但该过程通常既昂贵又耗时。面向深度学习的图像分析为直接从整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 发现驱动突变提供了一种更经济的替代方案。在这项工作中，我们使用弱监督的定制深度学习流程来识别苏木精和伊红染色的 WSI 中 EGFR 突变的形态学相关性，此外还检测肿瘤并对其进行组织学分型。我们通过对两个肺癌数据集（TCGA 和来自印度的私人数据集）进行严格的实验和消融研究来证明我们的管道的有效性。通过我们的流程，我们在 TCGA 数据集上实现了肿瘤检测的平均曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.964，腺癌和鳞状细胞癌之间的组织学亚型为 0.942。对于 EGFR 检测，我们在 TCGA 数据集上的平均 AUC 为 0.864，在印度数据集上的平均 AUC 为 0.783。我们的主要学习点包括以下内容。首先，如果要在目标数据集上微调特征提取器，那么使用在组织学上训练的特征提取器层并没有特别的优势。其次，选择具有高细胞结构的斑块（可能捕获肿瘤区域）并不总是有帮助，因为疾病类别的迹象可能存在于肿瘤邻近的基质中。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的弱监督管道，用于从肺部活检图像中预测EGFR突变，并进行肿瘤检测和组织学亚型分类。
AI.motivation: 传统的肺癌靶向治疗诊断流程依赖分子检测，但成本高且耗时。深度学习图像分析可提供更经济的替代方案，直接从全切片图像中发现驱动突变。
AI.method: 使用定制化深度学习管道与弱监督方法，结合HE染色的WSI图像，通过肿瘤检测、组织学亚型分类和EGFR突变预测任务进行训练与验证，并在TCGA和印度私有数据集上进行实验与消融研究。
AI.result: 在TCGA数据集上，肿瘤检测AUC达0.964，腺癌与鳞状细胞癌分类AUC为0.942，EGFR检测AUC为0.864；印度数据集EGFR检测AUC为0.783。
AI.conclusion: 预训练的组织学特征提取器在目标数据集上微调未必有优势；高细胞密度区域未必有助于疾病特征捕捉，肿瘤邻近间质可能包含关键信息。

tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的弱监督管道，用于从肺部活检图像中预测EGFR突变，并进行肿瘤检测和组织学亚型分类。
motivation: 传统的肺癌靶向治疗诊断流程依赖分子检测，但成本高且耗时。深度学习图像分析可提供更经济的替代方案，直接从全切片图像中发现驱动突变。
method: 使用定制化深度学习管道与弱监督方法，结合HE染色的WSI图像，通过肿瘤检测、组织学亚型分类和EGFR突变预测任务进行训练与验证，并在TCGA和印度私有数据集上进行实验与消融研究。

conclusion: 预训练的组织学特征提取器在目标数据集上微调未必有优势；高细胞密度区域未必有助于疾病特征捕捉，肿瘤邻近间质可能包含关键信息。
search_text: EGFR Mutation Prediction of Lung Biopsy Images using Deep Learning 使用深度学习预测肺活检图像的 EGFR 突变 The standard diagnostic procedures for targeted therapies in lung cancer treatment involve histological subtyping and subsequent detection of key driver mutations, such as EGFR. Even though molecular profiling can uncover the driver mutation, the process is often expensive and time-consuming. Deep learning-oriented image analysis offers a more economical alternative for discovering driver mutations directly from whole slide images (WSIs). In this work, we used customized deep learning pipelines with weak supervision to identify the morphological correlates of EGFR mutation from hematoxylin and eosin-stained WSIs, in addition to detecting tumor and histologically subtyping it. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pipeline by conducting rigorous experiments and ablation studies on two lung cancer datasets - TCGA and a private dataset from India. With our pipeline, we achieved an average area under the curve (AUC) of 0.964 for tumor detection, and 0.942 for histological subtyping between adenocarcinoma and squamous cell carcinoma on the TCGA dataset. For EGFR detection, we achieved an average AUC of 0.864 on the TCGA dataset and 0.783 on the dataset from India. Our key learning points include the following. Firstly, there is no particular advantage of using a feature extractor layers trained on histology, if one is going to fine-tune the feature extractor on the target dataset. Secondly, selecting patches with high cellularity, presumably capturing tumor regions, is not always helpful, as the sign of a disease class may be present in the tumor-adjacent stroma. 肺癌靶向治疗的标准诊断程序包括组织学分型和随后检测关键驱动突变，例如 EGFR。尽管分子分析可以揭示驱动突变，但该过程通常既昂贵又耗时。面向深度学习的图像分析为直接从整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 发现驱动突变提供了一种更经济的替代方案。在这项工作中，我们使用弱监督的定制深度学习流程来识别苏木精和伊红染色的 WSI 中 EGFR 突变的形态学相关性，此外还检测肿瘤并对其进行组织学分型。我们通过对两个肺癌数据集（TCGA 和来自印度的私人数据集）进行严格的实验和消融研究来证明我们的管道的有效性。通过我们的流程，我们在 TCGA 数据集上实现了肿瘤检测的平均曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.964，腺癌和鳞状细胞癌之间的组织学亚型为 0.942。对于 EGFR 检测，我们在 TCGA 数据集上的平均 AUC 为 0.864，在印度数据集上的平均 AUC 为 0.783。我们的主要学习点包括以下内容。首先，如果要在目标数据集上微调特征提取器，那么使用在组织学上训练的特征提取器层并没有特别的优势。其次，选择具有高细胞结构的斑块（可能捕获肿瘤区域）并不总是有帮助，因为疾病类别的迹象可能存在于肿瘤邻近的基质中。 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的弱监督管道，用于从肺部活检图像中预测EGFR突变，并进行肿瘤检测和组织学亚型分类。 Ravi Kant Gupta,Shivani Nandgaonkar,Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Swapnil Rane,Amit Sethi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yusen Zhang,Zhongli Li,Qingyu Zhou,Ziyi Liu,Chao Li,Mina Ma,Yunbo Cao,Hongzhi Liu
title: AiM: Taking Answers in Mind to Correct Chinese Cloze Tests in Educational Applications
title_zh: AiM：在教育应用中牢记答案纠正中文完形填空测试
abstract: To automatically correct handwritten assignments, the traditional approach is to use an OCR model to recognize characters and compare them to answers. The OCR model easily gets confused on recognizing handwritten Chinese characters, and the textual information of the answers is missing during the model inference. However, teachers always have these answers in mind to review and correct assignments. In this paper, we focus on the Chinese cloze tests correction and propose a multimodal approach (named AiM). The encoded representations of answers interact with the visual information of students' handwriting. Instead of predicting 'right' or 'wrong', we perform the sequence labeling on the answer text to infer which answer character differs from the handwritten content in a fine-grained way. We take samples of OCR datasets as the positive samples for this task, and develop a negative sample augmentation method to scale up the training data. Experimental results show that AiM outperforms OCR-based methods by a large margin. Extensive studies demonstrate the effectiveness of our multimodal approach.
summary: To automatically correct handwritten assignments, the traditional approach is to use an OCR model to recognize characters and compare them to answers. The OCR model easily gets confused on recognizing handwritten Chinese characters, and the textual information of the answers is missing during the model inference. However, teachers always have these answers in mind to review and correct assignments. In this paper, we focus on the Chinese cloze tests correction and propose a multimodal approach (named AiM). The encoded representations of answers interact with the visual information of students' handwriting. Instead of predicting 'right' or 'wrong', we perform the sequence labeling on the answer text to infer which answer character differs from the handwritten content in a fine-grained way. We take samples of OCR datasets as the positive samples for this task, and develop a negative sample augmentation method to scale up the training data. Experimental results show that AiM outperforms OCR-based methods by a large margin. Extensive studies demonstrate the effectiveness of our multimodal approach.
abstract_zh: 为了自动纠正手写作业，传统的方法是使用 OCR 模型来识别字符并将其与答案进行比较。 OCR模型在识别手写汉字时容易出现混乱，并且在模型推理过程中丢失答案的文本信息。然而，老师在复习和批改作业时总是牢记这些答案。在本文中，我们专注于中文完形填空测试的纠正，并提出了一种多模态方法（称为 AiM）。答案的编码表示与学生笔迹的视觉信息相互作用。我们不是预测“对”或“错”，而是对答案文本进行序列标记，以细粒度的方式推断哪个答案字符与手写内容不同。我们将 OCR 数据集的样本作为该任务的正样本，并开发负样本增强方法来扩展训练数据。实验结果表明，AiM 的性能大幅优于基于 OCR 的方法。广泛的研究证明了我们多模式方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AiM的多模态方法，用于通过结合答案知识与手写内容分析来改进中文完形填空题的自动批改。
AI.motivation: 传统OCR方法在识别手写中文字符时容易出错且缺乏答案文本信息，而教师批改时通常依赖对答案的先验知识，因此需开发能融合答案信息与手写内容的新型批改方法。
AI.method: 通过编码答案表示与学生手写视觉信息的交互，采用序列标注方法细粒度识别差异字符，并利用OCR数据集样本及负样本增强技术扩展训练数据。
AI.result: 实验表明AiM在准确率上显著优于基于OCR的方法，多模态方法的有效性得到充分验证。
AI.conclusion: 结合答案先验知识与视觉信息的多模态方法能有效提升中文手写作业批改效果，为教育场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Anupam K. Gupta,Alex Church,Nathan F. Lepora
title: Semi-Supervised Disentanglement of Tactile Contact~Geometry from Sliding-Induced Shear
title_zh: 触觉接触的半监督解缠~滑动诱导剪切的几何形状
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted for publication in IROS 2022
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, accepted for publication in IROS 2022
abstract: The sense of touch is fundamental to human dexterity. When mimicked in robotic touch, particularly by use of soft optical tactile sensors, it suffers from distortion due to motion-dependent shear. This complicates tactile tasks like shape reconstruction and exploration that require information about contact geometry. In this work, we pursue a semi-supervised approach to remove shear while preserving contact-only information. We validate our approach by showing a match between the model-generated unsheared images with their counterparts from vertically tapping onto the object. The model-generated unsheared images give faithful reconstruction of contact-geometry otherwise masked by shear, along with robust estimation of object pose then used for sliding exploration and full reconstruction of several planar shapes. We show that our semi-supervised approach achieves comparable performance to its fully supervised counterpart across all validation tasks with an order of magnitude less supervision. The semi-supervised method is thus more computational and labeled sample-efficient. We expect it will have broad applicability to wide range of complex tactile exploration and manipulation tasks performed via a shear-sensitive sense of touch.
summary: The sense of touch is fundamental to human dexterity. When mimicked in robotic touch, particularly by use of soft optical tactile sensors, it suffers from distortion due to motion-dependent shear. This complicates tactile tasks like shape reconstruction and exploration that require information about contact geometry. In this work, we pursue a semi-supervised approach to remove shear while preserving contact-only information. We validate our approach by showing a match between the model-generated unsheared images with their counterparts from vertically tapping onto the object. The model-generated unsheared images give faithful reconstruction of contact-geometry otherwise masked by shear, along with robust estimation of object pose then used for sliding exploration and full reconstruction of several planar shapes. We show that our semi-supervised approach achieves comparable performance to its fully supervised counterpart across all validation tasks with an order of magnitude less supervision. The semi-supervised method is thus more computational and labeled sample-efficient. We expect it will have broad applicability to wide range of complex tactile exploration and manipulation tasks performed via a shear-sensitive sense of touch.
abstract_zh: 触觉是人类灵活性的基础。当在机器人触摸中进行模仿时，特别是通过使用软光学触觉传感器时，它会因运动相关的剪切而遭受失真。这使得形状重建和探索等需要接触几何信息的触觉任务变得复杂。在这项工作中，我们采用半监督方法来消除剪切力，同时保留仅接触的信息。我们通过显示模型生成的未剪切图像与垂直点击对象的对应图像之间的匹配来验证我们的方法。模型生成的未剪切图像可以忠实地重建接触几何形状，否则会被剪切掩盖，并对物体姿态进行鲁棒估计，然后用于滑动探索和几个平面形状的完全重建。我们表明，我们的半监督方法在所有验证任务中都实现了与完全监督方法相当的性能，而监督程度要低一个数量级。因此，半监督方法的计算量和标记样本效率更高。我们预计它将广泛适用于通过剪切敏感触觉执行的各种复杂的触觉探索和操作任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法，用于从滑动引起的剪切中分离触觉接触几何信息，以提升软体触觉传感器在形状重建等任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 软体触觉传感器在模拟人类触觉时因运动相关剪切导致信息失真，影响接触几何信息的获取，需解决此问题以实现更精确的触觉任务。
AI.method: 通过半监督学习框架分离剪切效应，利用垂直敲击生成的无剪切图像作为监督信号，结合模型生成的无剪切图像进行验证与重建。
AI.result: 半监督方法在所有验证任务中性能接近全监督方法，但监督数据量减少一个数量级，同时实现物体姿态估计与多种平面形状的完整重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和标注样本需求上优于全监督方法，适用于复杂触觉探索与操作任务。

We show that our semi-supervised approach achieves comparable performance to its fully supervised counterpart across all validation tasks with an order of magnitude less supervision. The semi-supervised method is thus more computational and labeled sample-efficient. We expect it will have broad applicability to wide range of complex tactile exploration and manipulation tasks performed via a shear-sensitive sense of touch. 触觉是人类灵活性的基础。当在机器人触摸中进行模仿时，特别是通过使用软光学触觉传感器时，它会因运动相关的剪切而遭受失真。这使得形状重建和探索等需要接触几何信息的触觉任务变得复杂。在这项工作中，我们采用半监督方法来消除剪切力，同时保留仅接触的信息。我们通过显示模型生成的未剪切图像与垂直点击对象的对应图像之间的匹配来验证我们的方法。模型生成的未剪切图像可以忠实地重建接触几何形状，否则会被剪切掩盖，并对物体姿态进行鲁棒估计，然后用于滑动探索和几个平面形状的完全重建。我们表明，我们的半监督方法在所有验证任务中都实现了与完全监督方法相当的性能，而监督程度要低一个数量级。因此，半监督方法的计算量和标记样本效率更高。我们预计它将广泛适用于通过剪切敏感触觉执行的各种复杂的触觉探索和操作任务。 本文提出一种半监督方法，用于从滑动引起的剪切中分离触觉接触几何信息，以提升软体触觉传感器在形状重建等任务中的性能。 Anupam K. Gupta,Alex Church,Nathan F. Lepora cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Junyoung Son,Jinsung Kim,Jungwoo Lim,Heuiseok Lim
title: GRASP: Guiding model with RelAtional Semantics using Prompt for Dialogue Relation Extraction
title_zh: GRASP：使用对话关系提取提示使用关系语义指导模型
abstract: The dialogue-based relation extraction (DialogRE) task aims to predict the relations between argument pairs that appear in dialogue. Most previous studies utilize fine-tuning pre-trained language models (PLMs) only with extensive features to supplement the low information density of the dialogue by multiple speakers. To effectively exploit inherent knowledge of PLMs without extra layers and consider scattered semantic cues on the relation between the arguments, we propose a Guiding model with RelAtional Semantics using Prompt (GRASP). We adopt a prompt-based fine-tuning approach and capture relational semantic clues of a given dialogue with 1) an argument-aware prompt marker strategy and 2) the relational clue detection task. In the experiments, GRASP achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both F1 and F1c scores on a DialogRE dataset even though our method only leverages PLMs without adding any extra layers.
summary: The dialogue-based relation extraction (DialogRE) task aims to predict the relations between argument pairs that appear in dialogue. Most previous studies utilize fine-tuning pre-trained language models (PLMs) only with extensive features to supplement the low information density of the dialogue by multiple speakers. To effectively exploit inherent knowledge of PLMs without extra layers and consider scattered semantic cues on the relation between the arguments, we propose a Guiding model with RelAtional Semantics using Prompt (GRASP). We adopt a prompt-based fine-tuning approach and capture relational semantic clues of a given dialogue with 1) an argument-aware prompt marker strategy and 2) the relational clue detection task. In the experiments, GRASP achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both F1 and F1c scores on a DialogRE dataset even though our method only leverages PLMs without adding any extra layers.
abstract_zh: 基于对话的关系提取（DialogRE）任务旨在预测对话中出现的参数对之间的关​​系。之前的大多数研究仅利用具有广泛特征的微调预训练语言模型（PLM）来补充多个说话者对话的低信息密度。为了在没有额外层的情况下有效利用 PLM 的固有知识并考虑参数之间关系的分散语义线索，我们提出了一种使用提示的关系语义指导模型（GRASP）。我们采用基于提示的微调方法，并通过 1）参数感知提示标记策略和 2）关系线索检测任务捕获给定对话的关系语义线索。在实验中，GRASP 在 DialogRE 数据集上的 F1 和 F1c 分数方面实现了最先进的性能，即使我们的方法仅利用 PLM 而不添加任何额外的层。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRASP方法，通过提示机制在不增加额外层的情况下提升对话关系抽取性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量特征补充对话信息密度不足的问题，但未充分利用预训练语言模型（PLM）的内在知识且未有效捕捉论证间分散的语义线索。
AI.method: 采用基于提示的微调方法，包含1) 论证感知的提示标记策略和2) 关系线索检测任务，通过关系语义提示引导模型学习对话中的关系模式。
AI.result: 在DialogRE数据集上，GRASP在F1和F1c指标上均达到最先进水平，且未添加任何额外网络层。
AI.conclusion: GRASP通过有效利用PLM的内在知识和关系语义提示，为对话关系抽取提供了简洁高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Joel Honkamaa,Umair Khan,Sonja Koivukoski,Mira Valkonen,Leena Latonen,Pekka Ruusuvuori,Pekka Marttinen
title: Deformation equivariant cross-modality image synthesis with paired non-aligned training data
title_zh: 具有配对非对齐训练数据的变形等变跨模态图像合成
abstract: Cross-modality image synthesis is an active research topic with multiple medical clinically relevant applications. Recently, methods allowing training with paired but misaligned data have started to emerge. However, no robust and well-performing methods applicable to a wide range of real world data sets exist. In this work, we propose a generic solution to the problem of cross-modality image synthesis with paired but non-aligned data by introducing new deformation equivariance encouraging loss functions. The method consists of joint training of an image synthesis network together with separate registration networks and allows adversarial training conditioned on the input even with misaligned data. The work lowers the bar for new clinical applications by allowing effortless training of cross-modality image synthesis networks for more difficult data sets.
summary: Cross-modality image synthesis is an active research topic with multiple medical clinically relevant applications. Recently, methods allowing training with paired but misaligned data have started to emerge. However, no robust and well-performing methods applicable to a wide range of real world data sets exist. In this work, we propose a generic solution to the problem of cross-modality image synthesis with paired but non-aligned data by introducing new deformation equivariance encouraging loss functions. The method consists of joint training of an image synthesis network together with separate registration networks and allows adversarial training conditioned on the input even with misaligned data. The work lowers the bar for new clinical applications by allowing effortless training of cross-modality image synthesis networks for more difficult data sets.
abstract_zh: 跨模态图像合成是一个活跃的研究课题，具有多种医学临床相关应用。最近，允许使用配对但未对齐的数据进行训练的方法已经开始出现。然而，不存在适用于广泛的现实世界数据集的稳健且性能良好的方法。在这项工作中，我们通过引入新的变形等方差鼓励损失函数，提出了一种通用的解决方案，解决具有配对但非对齐数据的跨模态图像合成问题。该方法包括图像合成网络与单独的配准网络的联合训练，并且允许以输入为条件的对抗性训练，即使数据未对齐。这项工作通过允许轻松地训练跨模态图像合成网络来处理更困难的数据集，降低了新临床应用的门槛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于跨模态图像合成的新方法，解决配对但未对齐数据的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理真实世界中常见的配对但未对齐数据，限制了跨模态图像合成在医学等领域的应用。
AI.method: 通过引入变形等变性损失函数，联合训练图像合成网络与配准网络，实现对抗训练下的非对齐数据建模。
AI.result: 方法有效提升了跨模态图像合成性能，降低了复杂数据集的训练门槛。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为临床场景提供了通用解决方案，推动了非对齐数据下的跨模态图像合成应用。

authors_text: Stone Yun,Alexander Wong
title: GHN-Q: Parameter Prediction for Unseen Quantized Convolutional Architectures via Graph Hypernetworks
title_zh: GHN-Q：通过图超网络对不可见的量化卷积架构进行参数预测
comment: Updated Figure 1 and added additional results in Table 1. Initial extended abstract version accepted at Edge Intelligence Workshop 2022 for poster presentation
comments: Updated Figure 1 and added additional results in Table 1. Initial extended abstract version accepted at Edge Intelligence Workshop 2022 for poster presentation
abstract: Deep convolutional neural network (CNN) training via iterative optimization has had incredible success in finding optimal parameters. However, modern CNN architectures often contain millions of parameters. Thus, any given model for a single architecture resides in a massive parameter space. Models with similar loss could have drastically different characteristics such as adversarial robustness, generalizability, and quantization robustness. For deep learning on the edge, quantization robustness is often crucial. Finding a model that is quantization-robust can sometimes require significant efforts. Recent works using Graph Hypernetworks (GHN) have shown remarkable performance predicting high-performant parameters of varying CNN architectures. Inspired by these successes, we wonder if the graph representations of GHN-2 can be leveraged to predict quantization-robust parameters as well, which we call GHN-Q. We conduct the first-ever study exploring the use of graph hypernetworks for predicting parameters of unseen quantized CNN architectures. We focus on a reduced CNN search space and find that GHN-Q can in fact predict quantization-robust parameters for various 8-bit quantized CNNs. Decent quantized accuracies are observed even with 4-bit quantization despite GHN-Q not being trained on it. Quantized finetuning of GHN-Q at lower bitwidths may bring further improvements and is currently being explored.
summary: Deep convolutional neural network (CNN) training via iterative optimization has had incredible success in finding optimal parameters. However, modern CNN architectures often contain millions of parameters. Thus, any given model for a single architecture resides in a massive parameter space. Models with similar loss could have drastically different characteristics such as adversarial robustness, generalizability, and quantization robustness. For deep learning on the edge, quantization robustness is often crucial. Finding a model that is quantization-robust can sometimes require significant efforts. Recent works using Graph Hypernetworks (GHN) have shown remarkable performance predicting high-performant parameters of varying CNN architectures. Inspired by these successes, we wonder if the graph representations of GHN-2 can be leveraged to predict quantization-robust parameters as well, which we call GHN-Q. We conduct the first-ever study exploring the use of graph hypernetworks for predicting parameters of unseen quantized CNN architectures. We focus on a reduced CNN search space and find that GHN-Q can in fact predict quantization-robust parameters for various 8-bit quantized CNNs. Decent quantized accuracies are observed even with 4-bit quantization despite GHN-Q not being trained on it. Quantized finetuning of GHN-Q at lower bitwidths may bring further improvements and is currently being explored.
abstract_zh: 通过迭代优化进行深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 训练在寻找最佳参数方面取得了令人难以置信的成功。然而，现代 CNN 架构通常包含数百万个参数。因此，单一架构的任何给定模型都驻留在巨大的参数空间中。具有相似损失的模型可能具有截然不同的特征，例如对抗鲁棒性、泛化性和量化鲁棒性。对于边缘深度学习，量化鲁棒性通常至关重要。寻找量化稳健的模型有时需要付出巨大的努力。最近使用图超网络 (GHN) 的工作在预测不同 CNN 架构的高性能参数方面表现出了卓越的性能。受到这些成功的启发，我们想知道 GHN-2 的图形表示是否也可以用来预测量化鲁棒参数，我们称之为 GHN-Q。我们进行了有史以来第一项研究，探索使用图超网络来预测未见过的量化 CNN 架构的参数。我们专注于减少 CNN 搜索空间，发现 GHN-Q 实际上可以预测各种 8 位量化 CNN 的量化稳健参数。尽管 GHN-Q 没有接受过训练，但即使使用 4 位量化，也能观察到不错的量化精度。 GHN-Q 在较低位宽下的量化微调可能会带来进一步的改进，目前正在探索中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GHN-Q方法，利用图超网络预测未见过的量化卷积神经网络架构的参数。
AI.motivation: 深度CNN训练参数量庞大，量化鲁棒性对边缘设备至关重要，但现有方法难以高效预测量化稳健参数。
AI.method: 基于GHN-2的图表示，构建GHN-Q模型直接预测量化CNN参数，无需在低比特宽度数据上训练。
AI.result: 在8位量化CNN上实现良好精度，4位量化下仍保持 decent 性能，低比特微调潜力正在探索中。
AI.conclusion: GHN-Q有效预测量化稳健参数，为边缘设备部署提供新思路，后续微调可能进一步提升性能。

ai_content.conclusion: GHN-Q有效预测量化稳健参数，为边缘设备部署提供新思路，后续微调可能进一步提升性能。

search_text: GHN-Q: Parameter Prediction for Unseen Quantized Convolutional Architectures via Graph Hypernetworks GHN-Q：通过图超网络对不可见的量化卷积架构进行参数预测 Deep convolutional neural network (CNN) training via iterative optimization has had incredible success in finding optimal parameters. However, modern CNN architectures often contain millions of parameters. Thus, any given model for a single architecture resides in a massive parameter space. Models with similar loss could have drastically different characteristics such as adversarial robustness, generalizability, and quantization robustness. For deep learning on the edge, quantization robustness is often crucial. Finding a model that is quantization-robust can sometimes require significant efforts. Recent works using Graph Hypernetworks (GHN) have shown remarkable performance predicting high-performant parameters of varying CNN architectures. Inspired by these successes, we wonder if the graph representations of GHN-2 can be leveraged to predict quantization-robust parameters as well, which we call GHN-Q. We conduct the first-ever study exploring the use of graph hypernetworks for predicting parameters of unseen quantized CNN architectures. We focus on a reduced CNN search space and find that GHN-Q can in fact predict quantization-robust parameters for various 8-bit quantized CNNs. Decent quantized accuracies are observed even with 4-bit quantization despite GHN-Q not being trained on it. Quantized finetuning of GHN-Q at lower bitwidths may bring further improvements and is currently being explored. 通过迭代优化进行深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 训练在寻找最佳参数方面取得了令人难以置信的成功。然而，现代 CNN 架构通常包含数百万个参数。因此，单一架构的任何给定模型都驻留在巨大的参数空间中。具有相似损失的模型可能具有截然不同的特征，例如对抗鲁棒性、泛化性和量化鲁棒性。对于边缘深度学习，量化鲁棒性通常至关重要。寻找量化稳健的模型有时需要付出巨大的努力。最近使用图超网络 (GHN) 的工作在预测不同 CNN 架构的高性能参数方面表现出了卓越的性能。受到这些成功的启发，我们想知道 GHN-2 的图形表示是否也可以用来预测量化鲁棒参数，我们称之为 GHN-Q。我们进行了有史以来第一项研究，探索使用图超网络来预测未见过的量化 CNN 架构的参数。我们专注于减少 CNN 搜索空间，发现 GHN-Q 实际上可以预测各种 8 位量化 CNN 的量化稳健参数。尽管 GHN-Q 没有接受过训练，但即使使用 4 位量化，也能观察到不错的量化精度。 GHN-Q 在较低位宽下的量化微调可能会带来进一步的改进，目前正在探索中。 本文提出GHN-Q方法，利用图超网络预测未见过的量化卷积神经网络架构的参数。 Stone Yun,Alexander Wong cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Francesco Foscarin,Katharina Hoedt,Verena Praher,Arthur Flexer,Gerhard Widmer
title: Concept-Based Techniques for "Musicologist-friendly" Explanations in a Deep Music Classifier
title_zh: 深度音乐分类器中基于概念的“音乐学家友好”解释技术
comment: In Proceedings of the 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2022), Bengaluru, India
comments: In Proceedings of the 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2022), Bengaluru, India
abstract: Current approaches for explaining deep learning systems applied to musical data provide results in a low-level feature space, e.g., by highlighting potentially relevant time-frequency bins in a spectrogram or time-pitch bins in a piano roll. This can be difficult to understand, particularly for musicologists without technical knowledge. To address this issue, we focus on more human-friendly explanations based on high-level musical concepts. Our research targets trained systems (post-hoc explanations) and explores two approaches: a supervised one, where the user can define a musical concept and test if it is relevant to the system; and an unsupervised one, where musical excerpts containing relevant concepts are automatically selected and given to the user for interpretation. We demonstrate both techniques on an existing symbolic composer classification system, showcase their potential, and highlight their intrinsic limitations.
summary: Current approaches for explaining deep learning systems applied to musical data provide results in a low-level feature space, e.g., by highlighting potentially relevant time-frequency bins in a spectrogram or time-pitch bins in a piano roll. This can be difficult to understand, particularly for musicologists without technical knowledge. To address this issue, we focus on more human-friendly explanations based on high-level musical concepts. Our research targets trained systems (post-hoc explanations) and explores two approaches: a supervised one, where the user can define a musical concept and test if it is relevant to the system; and an unsupervised one, where musical excerpts containing relevant concepts are automatically selected and given to the user for interpretation. We demonstrate both techniques on an existing symbolic composer classification system, showcase their potential, and highlight their intrinsic limitations.
abstract_zh: 当前用于解释应用于音乐数据的深度学习系统的方法提供了低级特征空间中的结果，例如，通过突出显示频谱图中潜在相关的时频箱或钢琴卷帘中的时音箱。这可能很难理解，特别是对于没有技术知识的音乐学家来说。为了解决这个问题，我们专注于基于高级音乐概念的更人性化的解释。我们的研究针对经过训练的系统（事后解释）并探索两种方法：一种是监督方法，用户可以定义音乐概念并测试它是否与系统相关；另一种是监督方法，用户可以定义音乐概念并测试它是否与系统相关。一种是无监督的，其中包含相关概念的音乐摘录会被自动选择并提供给用户进行解释。我们在现有的符号作曲家分类系统上展示了这两种技术，展示了它们的潜力，并强调了它们的内在局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为深度音乐分类器开发基于高层次音乐概念的解释技术，以帮助音乐学家理解模型决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习解释方法依赖低层次特征空间（如时频bins），难以被缺乏技术背景的音乐学家直观理解。
AI.method: 提出两种后验解释方法：监督方法允许用户定义音乐概念并验证其相关性；非监督方法自动筛选包含潜在概念的音乐片段供用户分析。
AI.result: 两种方法在符号作曲分类系统中得到验证，展示了概念级解释的可行性，同时揭示了方法在覆盖范围和准确性上的固有限制。
AI.conclusion: 基于音乐概念的解释技术能有效提升模型可解释性，但需平衡自动化程度与领域知识的深度整合。

authors_text: Sangjun Han,Taeil Hur,Youngmi Hur
title: Laplacian Pyramid-like Autoencoder
title_zh: 拉普拉斯金字塔式自动编码器
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, Science and Information Conference 2022, Intelligent Computing
comments: 20 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, Science and Information Conference 2022, Intelligent Computing
abstract: In this paper, we develop the Laplacian pyramid-like autoencoder (LPAE) by adding the Laplacian pyramid (LP) concept widely used to analyze images in Signal Processing. LPAE decomposes an image into the approximation image and the detail image in the encoder part and then tries to reconstruct the original image in the decoder part using the two components. We use LPAE for experiments on classifications and super-resolution areas. Using the detail image and the smaller-sized approximation image as inputs of a classification network, our LPAE makes the model lighter. Moreover, we show that the performance of the connected classification networks has remained substantially high. In a super-resolution area, we show that the decoder part gets a high-quality reconstruction image by setting to resemble the structure of LP. Consequently, LPAE improves the original results by combining the decoder part of the autoencoder and the super-resolution network.
summary: In this paper, we develop the Laplacian pyramid-like autoencoder (LPAE) by adding the Laplacian pyramid (LP) concept widely used to analyze images in Signal Processing. LPAE decomposes an image into the approximation image and the detail image in the encoder part and then tries to reconstruct the original image in the decoder part using the two components. We use LPAE for experiments on classifications and super-resolution areas. Using the detail image and the smaller-sized approximation image as inputs of a classification network, our LPAE makes the model lighter. Moreover, we show that the performance of the connected classification networks has remained substantially high. In a super-resolution area, we show that the decoder part gets a high-quality reconstruction image by setting to resemble the structure of LP. Consequently, LPAE improves the original results by combining the decoder part of the autoencoder and the super-resolution network.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过添加广泛用于分析信号处理中图像的拉普拉斯金字塔（LP）概念来开发拉普拉斯金字塔式自动编码器（LPAE）。 LPAE 在编码器部分将图像分解为近似图像和细节图像，然后尝试使用这两个分量在解码器部分重建原始图像。我们使用 LPAE 进行分类和超分辨率区域的实验。使用细节图像和较小尺寸的近似图像作为分类网络的输入，我们的 LPAE 使模型更轻。此外，我们表明连接的分类网络的性能仍然很高。在超分辨率区域，我们表明解码器部分通过设置类似于 LP 的结构来获得高质量的重建图像。因此，LPAE 通过结合自动编码器的解码器部分和超分辨率网络来改进原始结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合拉普拉斯金字塔概念的自编码器（LPAE），用于图像分类和超分辨率任务，通过分解和重建图像提升模型效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器在图像细节和多尺度信息处理上存在不足，而拉普拉斯金字塔在信号处理中能有效分解图像，因此提出结合两者的LPAE以提升模型性能。
AI.method: LPAE通过编码器将图像分解为近似图像和细节图像，解码器利用这两部分重建原图，结构借鉴拉普拉斯金字塔，应用于分类和超分辨率任务。
AI.result: 在分类任务中，模型更轻且保持高准确率；超分辨率任务中，解码器重建图像质量高，结合自编码器和超分网络提升效果。
AI.conclusion: LPAE通过结合拉普拉斯金字塔结构，有效提升了图像分类和超分辨率任务的性能，证明了其在模型轻量化和重建质量上的优势。

authors_text: Sangdo Han
title: Cross-lingual Transfer Learning for Fake News Detector in a Low-Resource Language
title_zh: 低资源语言中的假新闻检测器的跨语言迁移学习
comment: I've withdraw this paper from a journal during revision. There were two reasons. First, data was not verified enough. Data verification steps are required. Second, even the average accuracy was higher than baseline, but it was not stable enough. However, I think the news embedding truely represents credibility of the speakers. I hope that the knowledge I've got would help for other researchers

Second, even the average accuracy was higher than baseline, but it was not stable enough. However, I think the news embedding truely represents credibility of the speakers. I hope that the knowledge I've got would help for other researchers
abstract: Development of methods to detect fake news (FN) in low-resource languages has been impeded by a lack of training data. In this study, we solve the problem by using only training data from a high-resource language. Our FN-detection system permitted this strategy by applying adversarial learning that transfers the detection knowledge through languages. To assist the knowledge transfer, our system judges the reliability of articles by exploiting source information, which is a cross-lingual feature that represents the credibility of the speaker. In experiments, our system got 3.71% higher accuracy than a system that uses a machine-translated training dataset. In addition, our suggested cross-lingual feature exploitation for fake news detection improved accuracy by 3.03%.

Our FN-detection system permitted this strategy by applying adversarial learning that transfers the detection knowledge through languages. To assist the knowledge transfer, our system judges the reliability of articles by exploiting source information, which is a cross-lingual feature that represents the credibility of the speaker. In experiments, our system got 3.71% higher accuracy than a system that uses a machine-translated training dataset. In addition, our suggested cross-lingual feature exploitation for fake news detection improved accuracy by 3.03%.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏训练数据，低资源语言检测假新闻（FN）的方法的开发一直受到阻碍。在本研究中，我们仅使用来自高资源语言的训练数据来解决该问题。我们的 FN 检测系统通过应用通过语言传输检测知识的对抗性学习来实现这一策略。为了协助知识转移，我们的系统通过利用源信息来判断文章的可靠性，这是一种跨语言特征，代表了说话者的可信度。在实验中，我们的系统比使用机器翻译训练数据集的系统准确率高 3.71%。此外，我们建议利用跨语言特征来检测假新闻，准确率提高了 3.03%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨语言迁移学习方法，用于在低资源语言中检测虚假新闻。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言缺乏足够的训练数据，导致虚假新闻检测方法效果不佳，需借助高资源语言数据进行知识迁移。
AI.method: 通过对抗学习实现跨语言知识迁移，并利用源信息等跨语言特征评估文章可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该系统准确率比使用机器翻译数据集的系统高3.71%，且跨语言特征应用使准确率提升3.03%。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言迁移学习结合源信息特征能有效提升低资源语言虚假新闻检测性能。

authors_text: Trupti Padiya,Frank Löffler,Friederike Klan
title: Need for Design Patterns: Interoperability Issues and Modelling Challenges for Observational Data
title_zh: 对设计模式的需求：观测数据的互操作性问题和建模挑战
abstract: Interoperability issues concerning observational data have gained attention in recent times. Automated data integration is important when it comes to the scientific analysis of observational data from different sources. However, it is hampered by various data interoperability issues. We focus exclusively on semantic interoperability issues for observational characteristics. We propose a use-case-driven approach to identify general classes of interoperability issues. In this paper, this is exemplarily done for the use-case of citizen science fireball observations. We derive key concepts for the identified interoperability issues that are generalizable to observational data in other fields of science. These key concepts contain several modeling challenges, and we broadly describe each modeling challenges associated with its interoperability issue. We believe, that addressing these challenges with a set of ontology design patterns will be an effective means for unified semantic modeling, paving the way for a unified approach for resolving interoperability issues in observational data. We demonstrate this with one design pattern, highlighting the importance and need for ontology design patterns for observational data, and leave the remaining patterns to future work. Our paper thus describes interoperability issues along with modeling challenges as a starting point for developing a set of extensible and reusable design patterns.
summary: Interoperability issues concerning observational data have gained attention in recent times. Automated data integration is important when it comes to the scientific analysis of observational data from different sources. However, it is hampered by various data interoperability issues. We focus exclusively on semantic interoperability issues for observational characteristics. We propose a use-case-driven approach to identify general classes of interoperability issues. In this paper, this is exemplarily done for the use-case of citizen science fireball observations. We derive key concepts for the identified interoperability issues that are generalizable to observational data in other fields of science. These key concepts contain several modeling challenges, and we broadly describe each modeling challenges associated with its interoperability issue. We believe, that addressing these challenges with a set of ontology design patterns will be an effective means for unified semantic modeling, paving the way for a unified approach for resolving interoperability issues in observational data. We demonstrate this with one design pattern, highlighting the importance and need for ontology design patterns for observational data, and leave the remaining patterns to future work. Our paper thus describes interoperability issues along with modeling challenges as a starting point for developing a set of extensible and reusable design patterns.
abstract_zh: 近年来，有关观测数据的互操作性问题引起了人们的关注。当涉及到对不同来源的观测数据进行科学分析时，自动数据集成非常重要。然而，它受到各种数据互操作性问题的阻碍。我们专门关注观测特征的语义互操作性问题。我们提出了一种用例驱动的方法来识别一般类别的互操作性问题。在本文中，这是针对公民科学火球观测用例的示例。我们得出了已识别的互操作性问题的关键概念，这些概念可推广到其他科学领域的观测数据。这些关键概念包含几个建模挑战，我们广泛地描述了与其互操作性问题相关的每个建模挑战。我们相信，通过一组本体设计模式来应对这些挑战将是统一语义建模的有效手段，为解决观测数据中的互操作性问题的统一方法铺平了道路。我们用一种设计模式证明了这一点，强调了观测数据本体设计模式的重要性和需求，并将其余模式留给未来的工作。因此，我们的论文描述了互操作性问题以及建模挑战，作为开发一组可扩展和可重用的设计模式的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了观测数据的互操作性问题，提出通过本体设计模式解决语义互操作性挑战，并以公民科学火球观测为例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 观测数据来自不同源，自动化整合受语义互操作性问题阻碍，需统一建模方法实现跨领域数据融合。
AI.method: 采用用例驱动方法，以公民科学火球观测为案例，识别互操作性问题并提炼通用建模挑战，提出可扩展的本体设计模式。
AI.result: 明确了观测数据互操作性的核心概念与建模挑战，展示了首个设计模式的有效性，为后续模式开发奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 本体设计模式是解决观测数据语义互操作性的有效途径，未来需扩展更多模式以形成统一解决方案。

authors_text: Omar Zamzam,Haleh Akrami,Richard Leahy
title: Learning From Positive and Unlabeled Data Using Observer-GAN
title_zh: 使用 Observer-GAN 从正面和未标记的数据中学习
abstract: The problem of learning from positive and unlabeled data (A.K.A. PU learning) has been studied in a binary (i.e., positive versus negative) classification setting, where the input data consist of (1) observations from the positive class and their corresponding labels, (2) unlabeled observations from both positive and negative classes. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been used to reduce the problem to the supervised setting with the advantage that supervised learning has state-of-the-art accuracy in classification tasks. In order to generate \textit{pseudo}-negative observations, GANs are trained on positive and unlabeled observations with a modified loss. Using both positive and \textit{pseudo}-negative observations leads to a supervised learning setting. The generation of pseudo-negative observations that are realistic enough to replace missing negative class samples is a bottleneck for current GAN-based algorithms. By including an additional classifier into the GAN architecture, we provide a novel GAN-based approach. In our suggested method, the GAN discriminator instructs the generator only to produce samples that fall into the unlabeled data distribution, while a second classifier (observer) network monitors the GAN training to: (i) prevent the generated samples from falling into the positive distribution; and (ii) learn the features that are the key distinction between the positive and negative observations. Experiments on four image datasets demonstrate that our trained observer network performs better than existing techniques in discriminating between real unseen positive and negative samples.
summary: The problem of learning from positive and unlabeled data (A.K.A. PU learning) has been studied in a binary (i.e., positive versus negative) classification setting, where the input data consist of (1) observations from the positive class and their corresponding labels, (2) unlabeled observations from both positive and negative classes. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been used to reduce the problem to the supervised setting with the advantage that supervised learning has state-of-the-art accuracy in classification tasks. In order to generate \textit{pseudo}-negative observations, GANs are trained on positive and unlabeled observations with a modified loss. Using both positive and \textit{pseudo}-negative observations leads to a supervised learning setting. The generation of pseudo-negative observations that are realistic enough to replace missing negative class samples is a bottleneck for current GAN-based algorithms. By including an additional classifier into the GAN architecture, we provide a novel GAN-based approach. In our suggested method, the GAN discriminator instructs the generator only to produce samples that fall into the unlabeled data distribution, while a second classifier (observer) network monitors the GAN training to: (i) prevent the generated samples from falling into the positive distribution; and (ii) learn the features that are the key distinction between the positive and negative observations. Experiments on four image datasets demonstrate that our trained observer network performs better than existing techniques in discriminating between real unseen positive and negative samples.
abstract_zh: 从正数据和未标记数据中学习（又名 PU 学习）的问题已在二元（即正与负）分类设置中进行了研究，其中输入数据包括 (1) 来自正类及其相应标签的观察值，(2) 来自正类和负类的未标记观察值。生成对抗网络（GAN）已被用来将问题减少到监督环境中，其优点是监督学习在分类任务中具有最先进的准确性。为了生成 \textit{pseudo}-负观测值，GAN 使用修改后的损失对正观测值和未标记观测值进行训练。使用正向和 \textit{pseudo}-负向观察会导致监督学习设置。生成足够真实的伪负观测值来替换缺失的负类样本是当前基于 GAN 的算法的瓶颈。通过在 GAN 架构中包含一个额外的分类器，我们提供了一种新颖的基于 GAN 的方法。在我们建议的方法中，GAN 判别器指示生成器仅生成落入未标记数据分布的样本，而第二个分类器（观察者）网络监视 GAN 训练，以：（i）防止生成的样本落入正分布； (ii) 了解积极观察和消极观察之间关键区别的特征。对四个图像数据集的实验表明，我们训练有素的观察者网络在区分真实的未见过的正样本和负样本方面比现有技术表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Observer-GAN的方法，解决正例和未标记数据（PU学习）的分类问题，通过生成伪负样本并引入观察者网络提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN方法在生成高质量伪负样本时存在瓶颈，难以有效区分正负类，导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 提出Observer-GAN架构，包含GAN判别器和观察者分类器，判别器生成符合未标记分布的样本，观察者网络防止生成正类样本并学习区分正负类特征。
AI.result: 在四个图像数据集上，观察者网络在区分真实正负样本上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入观察者网络，有效解决了伪负样本生成的瓶颈，提升了PU学习的分类性能。

search_text: Learning From Positive and Unlabeled Data Using Observer-GAN 使用 Observer-GAN 从正面和未标记的数据中学习 The problem of learning from positive and unlabeled data (A.K.A. PU learning) has been studied in a binary (i.e., positive versus negative) classification setting, where the input data consist of (1) observations from the positive class and their corresponding labels, (2) unlabeled observations from both positive and negative classes. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been used to reduce the problem to the supervised setting with the advantage that supervised learning has state-of-the-art accuracy in classification tasks. In order to generate \textit{pseudo}-negative observations, GANs are trained on positive and unlabeled observations with a modified loss. Using both positive and \textit{pseudo}-negative observations leads to a supervised learning setting. The generation of pseudo-negative observations that are realistic enough to replace missing negative class samples is a bottleneck for current GAN-based algorithms. By including an additional classifier into the GAN architecture, we provide a novel GAN-based approach. In our suggested method, the GAN discriminator instructs the generator only to produce samples that fall into the unlabeled data distribution, while a second classifier (observer) network monitors the GAN training to: (i) prevent the generated samples from falling into the positive distribution; and (ii) learn the features that are the key distinction between the positive and negative observations. Experiments on four image datasets demonstrate that our trained observer network performs better than existing techniques in discriminating between real unseen positive and negative samples. 从正数据和未标记数据中学习（又名 PU 学习）的问题已在二元（即正与负）分类设置中进行了研究，其中输入数据包括 (1) 来自正类及其相应标签的观察值，(2) 来自正类和负类的未标记观察值。生成对抗网络（GAN）已被用来将问题减少到监督环境中，其优点是监督学习在分类任务中具有最先进的准确性。为了生成 \textit{pseudo}-负观测值，GAN 使用修改后的损失对正观测值和未标记观测值进行训练。使用正向和 \textit{pseudo}-负向观察会导致监督学习设置。生成足够真实的伪负观测值来替换缺失的负类样本是当前基于 GAN 的算法的瓶颈。通过在 GAN 架构中包含一个额外的分类器，我们提供了一种新颖的基于 GAN 的方法。在我们建议的方法中，GAN 判别器指示生成器仅生成落入未标记数据分布的样本，而第二个分类器（观察者）网络监视 GAN 训练，以：（i）防止生成的样本落入正分布； (ii) 了解积极观察和消极观察之间关键区别的特征。对四个图像数据集的实验表明，我们训练有素的观察者网络在区分真实的未见过的正样本和负样本方面比现有技术表现更好。 本文提出一种基于Observer-GAN的方法，解决正例和未标记数据（PU学习）的分类问题，通过生成伪负样本并引入观察者网络提升分类性能。 Omar Zamzam,Haleh Akrami,Richard Leahy cs.CV

authors_text: Junjie Hu,Chenyou Fan,Mete Ozay,Hualie Jiang,Tin Lun Lam
title: Dense Depth Distillation with Out-of-Distribution Simulated Images
title_zh: 具有分布外模拟图像的密集深度蒸馏
abstract: We study data-free knowledge distillation (KD) for monocular depth estimation (MDE), which learns a lightweight model for real-world depth perception tasks by compressing it from a trained teacher model while lacking training data in the target domain. Owing to the essential difference between image classification and dense regression, previous methods of data-free KD are not applicable to MDE. To strengthen its applicability in real-world tasks, in this paper, we propose to apply KD with out-of-distribution simulated images. The major challenges to be resolved are i) lacking prior information about scene configurations of real-world training data and ii) domain shift between simulated and real-world images. To cope with these difficulties, we propose a tailored framework for depth distillation. The framework generates new training samples for embracing a multitude of possible object arrangements in the target domain and utilizes a transformation network to efficiently adapt them to the feature statistics preserved in the teacher model. Through extensive experiments on various depth estimation models and two different datasets, we show that our method outperforms the baseline KD by a good margin and even achieves slightly better performance with as few as 1/6 of training images, demonstrating a clear superiority.
summary: We study data-free knowledge distillation (KD) for monocular depth estimation (MDE), which learns a lightweight model for real-world depth perception tasks by compressing it from a trained teacher model while lacking training data in the target domain. Owing to the essential difference between image classification and dense regression, previous methods of data-free KD are not applicable to MDE. To strengthen its applicability in real-world tasks, in this paper, we propose to apply KD with out-of-distribution simulated images. The major challenges to be resolved are i) lacking prior information about scene configurations of real-world training data and ii) domain shift between simulated and real-world images. To cope with these difficulties, we propose a tailored framework for depth distillation. The framework generates new training samples for embracing a multitude of possible object arrangements in the target domain and utilizes a transformation network to efficiently adapt them to the feature statistics preserved in the teacher model. Through extensive experiments on various depth estimation models and two different datasets, we show that our method outperforms the baseline KD by a good margin and even achieves slightly better performance with as few as 1/6 of training images, demonstrating a clear superiority.
abstract_zh: 我们研究用于单目深度估计（MDE）的无数据知识蒸馏（KD），它通过从训练有素的教师模型中压缩模型来学习现实世界深度感知任务的轻量级模型，同时缺乏目标域中的训练数据。由于图像分类和稠密回归之间的本质区别，以前的无数据KD方法不适用于MDE。为了加强其在现实世界任务中的适用性，在本文中，我们建议将 KD 应用于分布外的模拟图像。需要解决的主要挑战是 i) 缺乏有关真实世界训练数据场景配置的先验信息，以及 ii) 模拟图像和真实世界图像之间的域转换。为了应对这些困难，我们提出了一个量身定制的深度蒸馏框架。该框架生成新的训练样本，用于包含目标域中多种可能的对象排列，并利用转换网络有效地使它们适应教师模型中保存的特征统计数据。通过对各种深度估计模型和两个不同数据集的大量实验，我们表明我们的方法明显优于基线 KD，甚至在训练图像少至 1/6 的情况下实现了稍微更好的性能，表现出明显的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无数据知识蒸馏在单目深度估计中的应用，通过使用分布外模拟图像解决真实场景数据缺乏和域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法无法直接应用于密集回归任务，且真实场景数据获取困难，域偏移问题显著影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出定制化蒸馏框架，生成多样化的模拟训练样本，并利用转换网络对齐教师模型的特征统计分布。
AI.result: 在多个深度估计模型和数据集上优于基线方法，使用仅1/6训练图像时仍保持轻微性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解域偏移问题，显著提升无数据蒸馏性能，为实际深度估计任务提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yi Lin,Luyan Liu,Kai Ma,Yefeng Zheng
title: Seg4Reg+: Consistency Learning between Spine Segmentation and Cobb Angle Regression
title_zh: Seg4Reg+：脊柱分割和科布角回归之间的一致性学习
abstract: Automated methods for Cobb angle estimation are of high demand for scoliosis assessment. Existing methods typically calculate the Cobb angle from landmark estimation, or simply combine the low-level task (e.g., landmark detection and spine segmentation) with the Cobb angle regression task, without fully exploring the benefits from each other. In this study, we propose a novel multi-task framework, named Seg4Reg+, which jointly optimizes the segmentation and regression networks. We thoroughly investigate both local and global consistency and knowledge transfer between each other. Specifically, we propose an attention regularization module leveraging class activation maps (CAMs) from image-segmentation pairs to discover additional supervision in the regression network, and the CAMs can serve as a region-of-interest enhancement gate to facilitate the segmentation task in turn. Meanwhile, we design a novel triangle consistency learning to train the two networks jointly for global optimization. The evaluations performed on the public AASCE Challenge dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of each module and superior performance of our model to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Automated methods for Cobb angle estimation are of high demand for scoliosis assessment. Existing methods typically calculate the Cobb angle from landmark estimation, or simply combine the low-level task (e.g., landmark detection and spine segmentation) with the Cobb angle regression task, without fully exploring the benefits from each other. In this study, we propose a novel multi-task framework, named Seg4Reg+, which jointly optimizes the segmentation and regression networks. We thoroughly investigate both local and global consistency and knowledge transfer between each other. Specifically, we propose an attention regularization module leveraging class activation maps (CAMs) from image-segmentation pairs to discover additional supervision in the regression network, and the CAMs can serve as a region-of-interest enhancement gate to facilitate the segmentation task in turn. Meanwhile, we design a novel triangle consistency learning to train the two networks jointly for global optimization. The evaluations performed on the public AASCE Challenge dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of each module and superior performance of our model to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 脊柱侧弯评估对柯布角自动化估计方法的需求很高。现有方法通常根据地标估计计算科布角，或者简单地将低级任务（例如地标检测和脊柱分割）与科布角回归任务结合起来，而没有充分探索彼此的好处。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务框架，名为 Seg4Reg+，它联合优化了分割和回归网络。我们彻底调查本地和全球的一致性以及彼此之间的知识转移。具体来说，我们提出了一个注意力正则化模块，利用图像分割对中的类激活图（CAM）来发现回归网络中的额外监督，并且 CAM 可以作为感兴趣区域增强门来依次促进分割任务。同时，我们设计了一种新颖的三角形一致性学习来联合训练两个网络以实现全局优化。对公共 AASCE 挑战数据集进行的评估证明了每个模块的有效性以及我们的模型相对于最先进方法的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 提出Seg4Reg+多任务框架，通过分割与科布角回归的一致性学习提升脊柱侧弯评估的自动化水平
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分挖掘分割任务与回归任务间的协同潜力，导致科布角估计精度受限
AI.method: 设计注意力正则化模块利用类激活图实现双向监督，结合三角一致性学习实现全局优化
AI.result: 在AASCE数据集上验证各模块有效性，模型性能优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: 通过分割与回归任务的深度协同学习，可显著提升脊柱侧弯角度估计的准确性

authors_text: Esha Sadia Nasir,Arshi Perviaz,Muhammad Moazam Fraz
title: Nuclei & Glands Instance Segmentation in Histology Images: A Narrative Review
title_zh: 组织学图像中的细胞核和腺体实例分割：叙事回顾
abstract: Instance segmentation of nuclei and glands in the histology images is an important step in computational pathology workflow for cancer diagnosis, treatment planning and survival analysis. With the advent of modern hardware, the recent availability of large-scale quality public datasets and the community organized grand challenges have seen a surge in automated methods focusing on domain specific challenges, which is pivotal for technology advancements and clinical translation. In this survey, 126 papers illustrating the AI based methods for nuclei and glands instance segmentation published in the last five years (2017-2022) are deeply analyzed, the limitations of current approaches and the open challenges are discussed. Moreover, the potential future research direction is presented and the contribution of state-of-the-art methods is summarized. Further, a generalized summary of publicly available datasets and a detailed insights on the grand challenges illustrating the top performing methods specific to each challenge is also provided. Besides, we intended to give the reader current state of existing research and pointers to the future directions in developing methods that can be used in clinical practice enabling improved diagnosis, grading, prognosis, and treatment planning of cancer. To the best of our knowledge, no previous work has reviewed the instance segmentation in histology images focusing towards this direction.

abstract_zh: 组织学图像中细胞核和腺体的实例分割是癌症诊断、治疗计划和生存分析的计算病理学工作流程中的重要一步。随着现代硬件的出现，最近出现的大规模高质量公共数据集和社区组织的重大挑战，导致专注于特定领域挑战的自动化方法激增，这对于技术进步和临床转化至关重要。在这项调查中，深入分析了过去五年（2017-2022）发表的 126 篇基于人工智能的细胞核和腺体实例分割方法的论文，讨论了当前方法的局限性和开放挑战。此外，还提出了未来潜在的研究方向，并总结了最先进方法的贡献。此外，还提供了公开可用数据集的概括摘要以及对重大挑战的详细见解，说明了针对每个挑战的最佳表现方法。此外，我们旨在向读者提供现有研究的现状，并指出开发可用于临床实践的方法的未来方向，从而改善癌症的诊断、分级、预后和治疗计划。据我们所知，之前的工作还没有回顾过针对这个方向的组织学图像中的实例分割。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去五年中基于人工智能的组织学图像中细胞核和腺体实例分割方法，分析现状、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 推动计算病理学技术进步和临床转化，解决当前方法的局限性，指导未来研究方向。
AI.method: 系统分析126篇AI方法论文，讨论局限性，总结数据集和挑战赛结果，提出未来方向。
AI.result: 总结了最新方法的贡献，概述公开数据集，分析挑战赛中的高性能方法，指出当前局限性和未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文全面回顾了相关研究，为开发临床实用的分割方法提供了指导，推动癌症诊断和治疗的进步。

authors_text: Yu Zhang,Shuaifei Chen,Jiayi Zhang
title: Exploiting Deep Reinforcement Learning for Edge Caching in Cell-Free Massive MIMO Systems
title_zh: 利用深度强化学习实现无细胞大规模 MIMO 系统中的边缘缓存
comment: The focus of the research has shifted, and the current submission is no longer aligned with our objectives
comments: The focus of the research has shifted, and the current submission is no longer aligned with our objectives
abstract: Cell-free massive multiple-input-multiple-output is promising to meet the stringent quality-of-experience (QoE) requirements of railway wireless communications by coordinating many successional access points (APs) to serve the onboard users coherently. A key challenge is how to deliver the desired contents timely due to the radical changing propagation environment caused by the growing train speed. In this paper, we propose to proactively cache the likely-requesting contents at the upcoming APs which perform the coherent transmission to reduce end-to-end delay. A long-term QoE-maximization problem is formulated and two cache placement algorithms are proposed. One is based on heuristic convex optimization (HCO) and the other exploits deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with soft actor-critic (SAC). Compared to the conventional benchmark, numerical results show the advantage of our proposed algorithms on QoE and hit probability. With the advanced DRL model, SAC outperforms HCO on QoE by predicting the user requests accurately.
summary: Cell-free massive multiple-input-multiple-output is promising to meet the stringent quality-of-experience (QoE) requirements of railway wireless communications by coordinating many successional access points (APs) to serve the onboard users coherently. A key challenge is how to deliver the desired contents timely due to the radical changing propagation environment caused by the growing train speed. In this paper, we propose to proactively cache the likely-requesting contents at the upcoming APs which perform the coherent transmission to reduce end-to-end delay. A long-term QoE-maximization problem is formulated and two cache placement algorithms are proposed. One is based on heuristic convex optimization (HCO) and the other exploits deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with soft actor-critic (SAC). Compared to the conventional benchmark, numerical results show the advantage of our proposed algorithms on QoE and hit probability. With the advanced DRL model, SAC outperforms HCO on QoE by predicting the user requests accurately.
abstract_zh: 无蜂窝大规模多输入多输出通过协调许多连续的接入点（AP）来为车载用户提供一致的服务，有望满足铁路无线通信严格的体验质量（QoE）要求。随着列车速度的提高，传播环境发生了巨大变化，如何及时传递所需的内容是一个关键的挑战。在本文中，我们建议在即将执行相干传输的 AP 上主动缓存可能请求的内容，以减少端到端延迟。制定了长期 QoE 最大化问题并提出了两种缓存放置算法。一种基于启发式凸优化 (HCO)，另一种利用深度强化学习 (DRL) 和软演员批评家 (SAC)。与传统基准相比，数值结果显示了我们提出的算法在 QoE 和命中概率方面的优势。凭借先进的 DRL 模型，SAC 通过准确预测用户请求，在 QoE 方面优于 HCO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度强化学习优化无蜂窝大规模MIMO系统中的边缘缓存，以提升铁路通信的QoE。
AI.motivation: 高速列车导致传播环境剧烈变化，传统方法难以及时分发内容，需通过预缓存减少延迟并提升用户体验。
AI.method: 提出两种缓存算法：基于启发式凸优化（HCO）和结合深度强化学习（DRL）的软演员评论家（SAC）算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAC在QoE和内容命中率上优于传统方法，尤其在预测用户请求准确性方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SAC算法能有效适应动态环境，为高速场景下的边缘缓存优化提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yunyao Mao,Wengang Zhou,Zhenbo Lu,Jiajun Deng,Houqiang Li
title: CMD: Self-supervised 3D Action Representation Learning with Cross-modal Mutual Distillation
title_zh: CMD：具有跨模态相互蒸馏的自监督 3D 动作表示学习
abstract: In 3D action recognition, there exists rich complementary information between skeleton modalities. Nevertheless, how to model and utilize this information remains a challenging problem for self-supervised 3D action representation learning. In this work, we formulate the cross-modal interaction as a bidirectional knowledge distillation problem. Different from classic distillation solutions that transfer the knowledge of a fixed and pre-trained teacher to the student, in this work, the knowledge is continuously updated and bidirectionally distilled between modalities. To this end, we propose a new Cross-modal Mutual Distillation (CMD) framework with the following designs. On the one hand, the neighboring similarity distribution is introduced to model the knowledge learned in each modality, where the relational information is naturally suitable for the contrastive frameworks. On the other hand, asymmetrical configurations are used for teacher and student to stabilize the distillation process and to transfer high-confidence information between modalities. By derivation, we find that the cross-modal positive mining in previous works can be regarded as a degenerated version of our CMD. We perform extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and PKU-MMD II datasets. Our approach outperforms existing self-supervised methods and sets a series of new records. The code is available at: https://github.com/maoyunyao/CMD
summary: In 3D action recognition, there exists rich complementary information between skeleton modalities. Nevertheless, how to model and utilize this information remains a challenging problem for self-supervised 3D action representation learning. In this work, we formulate the cross-modal interaction as a bidirectional knowledge distillation problem. Different from classic distillation solutions that transfer the knowledge of a fixed and pre-trained teacher to the student, in this work, the knowledge is continuously updated and bidirectionally distilled between modalities. To this end, we propose a new Cross-modal Mutual Distillation (CMD) framework with the following designs. On the one hand, the neighboring similarity distribution is introduced to model the knowledge learned in each modality, where the relational information is naturally suitable for the contrastive frameworks. On the other hand, asymmetrical configurations are used for teacher and student to stabilize the distillation process and to transfer high-confidence information between modalities. By derivation, we find that the cross-modal positive mining in previous works can be regarded as a degenerated version of our CMD. We perform extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and PKU-MMD II datasets. Our approach outperforms existing self-supervised methods and sets a series of new records. The code is available at: https://github.com/maoyunyao/CMD
abstract_zh: 在3D动作识别中，骨架模态之间存在丰富的互补信息。然而，如何建模和利用这些信息对于自监督 3D 动作表示学习来说仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们将跨模式交互表述为双向知识蒸馏问题。与将固定且预先培训的教师的知识转移给学生的经典蒸馏解决方案不同，在这项工作中，知识在模式之间不断更新和双向蒸馏。为此，我们提出了一种新的跨模态相互蒸馏（CMD）框架，其设计如下。一方面，引入邻近相似度分布来对每种模态中学习的知识进行建模，其中关系信息自然适合对比框架。另一方面，教师和学生使用不对称配置来稳定蒸馏过程并在模态之间传输高可信度信息。通过推导，我们发现之前的工作中的跨模态正向挖掘可以被视为我们的 CMD 的退化版本。我们在 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 PKU-MMD II 数据集上进行了大量实验。我们的方法优于现有的自我监督方法，并创下了一系列新记录。代码位于：https://github.com/maounyao/CMD

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CMD的跨模态互蒸馏框架，用于自监督3D动作表示学习，通过骨骼模态间的双向知识蒸馏提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 在3D动作识别中，骨骼模态间存在丰富的互补信息，但如何建模和利用这些信息仍是自监督学习中的挑战。
AI.method: 设计跨模态互蒸馏框架CMD，引入邻近相似性分布建模模态知识，并采用不对称师生配置稳定蒸馏过程，将先前的跨模态正样本挖掘视为该方法的退化版本。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120和PKU-MMD II数据集上，该方法超越现有自监督方法并创下新纪录。
AI.conclusion: CMD通过模态间双向知识蒸馏有效利用跨模态信息，在自监督3D动作表示学习中达到先进水平。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CMD的跨模态互蒸馏框架，用于自监督3D动作表示学习，通过骨骼模态间的双向知识蒸馏提升动作识别性能。
ai_content.motivation: 在3D动作识别中，骨骼模态间存在丰富的互补信息，但如何建模和利用这些信息仍是自监督学习中的挑战。
