search_text: CMD: Self-supervised 3D Action Representation Learning with Cross-modal Mutual Distillation CMD：具有跨模态相互蒸馏的自监督 3D 动作表示学习 In 3D action recognition, there exists rich complementary information between skeleton modalities. Nevertheless, how to model and utilize this information remains a challenging problem for self-supervised 3D action representation learning. In this work, we formulate the cross-modal interaction as a bidirectional knowledge distillation problem. Different from classic distillation solutions that transfer the knowledge of a fixed and pre-trained teacher to the student, in this work, the knowledge is continuously updated and bidirectionally distilled between modalities. To this end, we propose a new Cross-modal Mutual Distillation (CMD) framework with the following designs. On the one hand, the neighboring similarity distribution is introduced to model the knowledge learned in each modality, where the relational information is naturally suitable for the contrastive frameworks. On the other hand, asymmetrical configurations are used for teacher and student to stabilize the distillation process and to transfer high-confidence information between modalities. By derivation, we find that the cross-modal positive mining in previous works can be regarded as a degenerated version of our CMD. We perform extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and PKU-MMD II datasets. Our approach outperforms existing self-supervised methods and sets a series of new records. The code is available at: https://github.com/maoyunyao/CMD 在3D动作识别中，骨架模态之间存在丰富的互补信息。然而，如何建模和利用这些信息对于自监督 3D 动作表示学习来说仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们将跨模式交互表述为双向知识蒸馏问题。与将固定且预先培训的教师的知识转移给学生的经典蒸馏解决方案不同，在这项工作中，知识在模式之间不断更新和双向蒸馏。为此，我们提出了一种新的跨模态相互蒸馏（CMD）框架，其设计如下。一方面，引入邻近相似度分布来对每种模态中学习的知识进行建模，其中关系信息自然适合对比框架。另一方面，教师和学生使用不对称配置来稳定蒸馏过程并在模态之间传输高可信度信息。通过推导，我们发现之前的工作中的跨模态正向挖掘可以被视为我们的 CMD 的退化版本。我们在 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 PKU-MMD II 数据集上进行了大量实验。我们的方法优于现有的自我监督方法，并创下了一系列新记录。代码位于：https://github.com/maounyao/CMD 本文提出了一种名为CMD的跨模态互蒸馏框架，用于自监督3D动作表示学习，通过骨骼模态间的双向知识蒸馏提升动作识别性能。 Yunyao Mao,Wengang Zhou,Zhenbo Lu,Jiajun Deng,Houqiang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Kousik Rajesh,Eklavya Jain,Prakash Kotecha
title: A Multi-Objective approach to the Electric Vehicle Routing Problem
title_zh: 电动汽车路径问题的多目标方法
abstract: The electric vehicle routing problem (EVRP) has garnered great interest from researchers and industrialists in an attempt to move from fuel-based vehicles to healthier and more efficient electric vehicles (EVs). While it seems that the EVRP should not be much different from traditional vehicle routing problems (VRPs), challenges like limited cruising time, long charging times, and limited availability of charging facilities for electric vehicles makes all the difference. Previous works target logistics and delivery-related solutions wherein a homogeneous fleet of commercial EVs have to return to the initial point after making multiple stops. On the opposing front, we solve a personal electric vehicle routing problem and provide an optimal route for a single vehicle in a long origin-destination (OD) trip. We perform multi-objective optimization - minimizing the total trip time and the cumulative cost of charging. In addition, we incorporate external and real-life elements like traffic at charging stations, detour distances for reaching a charging station, and variable costs of electricity at different charging stations into the problem formulation. In particular, we define a multi-objective mixed integer non-linear programming (MINLP) problem and obtain a feasible solution using the $ε$-constraint algorithm. We further implement meta-heuristic techniques such as Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) to obtain the most optimal route and hence, the objective values. The experiment is carried out for multiple self-generated data instances and the results are thereby compared.
summary: The electric vehicle routing problem (EVRP) has garnered great interest from researchers and industrialists in an attempt to move from fuel-based vehicles to healthier and more efficient electric vehicles (EVs). While it seems that the EVRP should not be much different from traditional vehicle routing problems (VRPs), challenges like limited cruising time, long charging times, and limited availability of charging facilities for electric vehicles makes all the difference. Previous works target logistics and delivery-related solutions wherein a homogeneous fleet of commercial EVs have to return to the initial point after making multiple stops. On the opposing front, we solve a personal electric vehicle routing problem and provide an optimal route for a single vehicle in a long origin-destination (OD) trip. We perform multi-objective optimization - minimizing the total trip time and the cumulative cost of charging. In addition, we incorporate external and real-life elements like traffic at charging stations, detour distances for reaching a charging station, and variable costs of electricity at different charging stations into the problem formulation. In particular, we define a multi-objective mixed integer non-linear programming (MINLP) problem and obtain a feasible solution using the $ε$-constraint algorithm. We further implement meta-heuristic techniques such as Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) to obtain the most optimal route and hence, the objective values. The experiment is carried out for multiple self-generated data instances and the results are thereby compared.
abstract_zh: 电动汽车路线问题（EVRP）引起了研究人员和实业家的极大兴趣，试图从燃油汽车转向更健康、更高效的电动汽车（EV）。虽然 EVRP 似乎与传统的车辆路径问题 (VRP) 没有太大区别，但巡航时间有限、充电时间长以及电动汽车充电设施有限等挑战使一切变得不同。之前的工作目标是物流和交付相关的解决方案，其中同质的商用电动车队必须在多次停靠后返回初始点。另一方面，我们解决了个人电动汽车路线问题，并为单辆车在长途起点-目的地（OD）行程中提供最佳路线。我们执行多目标优化 - 最大限度地减少总行程时间和累积充电成本。此外，我们还将外部和现实生活中的因素（例如充电站的交通情况、到达充电站的绕行距离以及不同充电站的可变电费）纳入问题的制定中。特别是，我们定义了一个多目标混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）问题，并使用 $ε$ 约束算法获得了可行的解决方案。我们进一步实施遗传算法（GA）和粒子群优化（PSO）等元启发式技术来获得最佳路线，从而获得目标值。对多个自生成的数据实例进行实验，并对结果进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多目标优化方法，解决个人电动车辆在长距离出行中的最优路径规划问题，同时考虑行程时间和充电成本。
AI.motivation: 电动车辆路由问题（EVRP）因环保和效率需求备受关注，但现有研究多聚焦于物流配送场景，缺乏针对个人用户长距离出行的解决方案，且未充分纳入充电站拥堵、绕行距离和电价差异等现实因素。
AI.method: 构建多目标混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）模型，采用ε约束算法求解，并结合遗传算法（GA）和粒子群优化（PSO）等元启发式方法获取最优路径。
AI.result: 通过多组自定义数据实例验证，算法能有效平衡行程时间与充电成本，且在不同现实约束条件下生成可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为个人电动车辆用户提供了一种考虑多现实因素的路径优化方案，可为未来智能出行系统提供参考。

authors_text: Shicheng Wan,Zhenqiang Ye,Wensheng Gan,Jiahui Chen
title: Temporal Fuzzy Utility Maximization with Remaining Measure
title_zh: 剩余测度的时间模糊效用最大化
abstract: High utility itemset mining approaches discover hidden patterns from large amounts of temporal data. However, an inescapable problem of high utility itemset mining is that its discovered results hide the quantities of patterns, which causes poor interpretability. The results only reflect the shopping trends of customers, which cannot help decision makers quantify collected information. In linguistic terms, computers use mathematical or programming languages that are precisely formalized, but the language used by humans is always ambiguous. In this paper, we propose a novel one-phase temporal fuzzy utility itemset mining approach called TFUM. It revises temporal fuzzy-lists to maintain less but major information about potential high temporal fuzzy utility itemsets in memory, and then discovers a complete set of real interesting patterns in a short time. In particular, the remaining measure is the first adopted in the temporal fuzzy utility itemset mining domain in this paper. The remaining maximal temporal fuzzy utility is a tighter and stronger upper bound than that of previous studies adopted. Hence, it plays an important role in pruning the search space in TFUM. Finally, we also evaluate the efficiency and effectiveness of TFUM on various datasets. Extensive experimental results indicate that TFUM outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of runtime cost, memory usage, and scalability. In addition, experiments prove that the remaining measure can significantly prune unnecessary candidates during mining.
summary: High utility itemset mining approaches discover hidden patterns from large amounts of temporal data. However, an inescapable problem of high utility itemset mining is that its discovered results hide the quantities of patterns, which causes poor interpretability. The results only reflect the shopping trends of customers, which cannot help decision makers quantify collected information. In linguistic terms, computers use mathematical or programming languages that are precisely formalized, but the language used by humans is always ambiguous. In this paper, we propose a novel one-phase temporal fuzzy utility itemset mining approach called TFUM. It revises temporal fuzzy-lists to maintain less but major information about potential high temporal fuzzy utility itemsets in memory, and then discovers a complete set of real interesting patterns in a short time. In particular, the remaining measure is the first adopted in the temporal fuzzy utility itemset mining domain in this paper. The remaining maximal temporal fuzzy utility is a tighter and stronger upper bound than that of previous studies adopted. Hence, it plays an important role in pruning the search space in TFUM. Finally, we also evaluate the efficiency and effectiveness of TFUM on various datasets. Extensive experimental results indicate that TFUM outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of runtime cost, memory usage, and scalability. In addition, experiments prove that the remaining measure can significantly prune unnecessary candidates during mining.
abstract_zh: 高实用性项集挖掘方法从大量时态数据中发现隐藏的模式。然而，高效用项集挖掘不可避免的问题是其发现的结果隐藏了模式的数量，导致可解释性差。结果仅反映顾客的购物趋势，不能帮助决策者量化收集到的信息。从语言学的角度来看，计算机使用精确形式化的数学或编程语言，但人类使用的语言总是模棱两可的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的单阶段时间模糊效用项集挖掘方法，称为 TFUM。它修改时间模糊列表，以在内存中保留有关潜在高时间模糊效用项集的较少但主要的信息，然后在短时间内发现一组完整的真正有趣的模式。特别是，剩余测度是本文首次在时间模糊效用项集挖掘领域中采用的。剩余的最大时间模糊效用是比以前的研究采用的更严格、更强的上限。因此，它在修剪 TFUM 中的搜索空间方面发挥着重要作用。最后，我们还评估了 TFUM 在各种数据集上的效率和有效性。大量的实验结果表明，TFUM 在运行时成本、内存使用和可扩展性方面优于最先进的算法。此外，实验证明剩余措施可以在挖掘过程中显着修剪不必要的候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TFUM的单阶段时间模糊效用项集挖掘方法，通过引入剩余度量优化搜索空间，提升挖掘效率和结果可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有高效用项集挖掘方法无法量化模式数量，导致结果可解释性差，且难以处理人类语言的模糊性，需改进算法以兼顾效率与可解释性。
AI.method: 设计TFUM方法，改进时间模糊列表以保留关键信息，并首次引入剩余度量作为更紧的上界，有效剪枝搜索空间。
AI.result: 实验表明TFUM在运行时间、内存消耗和可扩展性上优于现有算法，剩余度量显著减少冗余候选。
AI.conclusion: TFUM通过剩余度量优化有效解决了时间模糊效用项集挖掘的效率与可解释性问题，未来可探索更复杂场景的应用。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为TFUM的单阶段时间模糊效用项集挖掘方法，通过引入剩余度量优化搜索空间，提升挖掘效率和结果可解释性。
motivation: 现有高效用项集挖掘方法无法量化模式数量，导致结果可解释性差，且难以处理人类语言的模糊性，需改进算法以兼顾效率与可解释性。
method: 设计TFUM方法，改进时间模糊列表以保留关键信息，并首次引入剩余度量作为更紧的上界，有效剪枝搜索空间。
result: 实验表明TFUM在运行时间、内存消耗和可扩展性上优于现有算法，剩余度量显著减少冗余候选。
conclusion: TFUM通过剩余度量优化有效解决了时间模糊效用项集挖掘的效率与可解释性问题，未来可探索更复杂场景的应用。
search_text: Temporal Fuzzy Utility Maximization with Remaining Measure 剩余测度的时间模糊效用最大化 High utility itemset mining approaches discover hidden patterns from large amounts of temporal data. However, an inescapable problem of high utility itemset mining is that its discovered results hide the quantities of patterns, which causes poor interpretability. The results only reflect the shopping trends of customers, which cannot help decision makers quantify collected information. In linguistic terms, computers use mathematical or programming languages that are precisely formalized, but the language used by humans is always ambiguous. In this paper, we propose a novel one-phase temporal fuzzy utility itemset mining approach called TFUM. It revises temporal fuzzy-lists to maintain less but major information about potential high temporal fuzzy utility itemsets in memory, and then discovers a complete set of real interesting patterns in a short time. In particular, the remaining measure is the first adopted in the temporal fuzzy utility itemset mining domain in this paper. The remaining maximal temporal fuzzy utility is a tighter and stronger upper bound than that of previous studies adopted. Hence, it plays an important role in pruning the search space in TFUM. Finally, we also evaluate the efficiency and effectiveness of TFUM on various datasets. Extensive experimental results indicate that TFUM outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of runtime cost, memory usage, and scalability. In addition, experiments prove that the remaining measure can significantly prune unnecessary candidates during mining. 高实用性项集挖掘方法从大量时态数据中发现隐藏的模式。然而，高效用项集挖掘不可避免的问题是其发现的结果隐藏了模式的数量，导致可解释性差。结果仅反映顾客的购物趋势，不能帮助决策者量化收集到的信息。从语言学的角度来看，计算机使用精确形式化的数学或编程语言，但人类使用的语言总是模棱两可的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的单阶段时间模糊效用项集挖掘方法，称为 TFUM。它修改时间模糊列表，以在内存中保留有关潜在高时间模糊效用项集的较少但主要的信息，然后在短时间内发现一组完整的真正有趣的模式。特别是，剩余测度是本文首次在时间模糊效用项集挖掘领域中采用的。剩余的最大时间模糊效用是比以前的研究采用的更严格、更强的上限。因此，它在修剪 TFUM 中的搜索空间方面发挥着重要作用。最后，我们还评估了 TFUM 在各种数据集上的效率和有效性。大量的实验结果表明，TFUM 在运行时成本、内存使用和可扩展性方面优于最先进的算法。此外，实验证明剩余措施可以在挖掘过程中显着修剪不必要的候选者。 本文提出一种名为TFUM的单阶段时间模糊效用项集挖掘方法，通过引入剩余度量优化搜索空间，提升挖掘效率和结果可解释性。 Shicheng Wan,Zhenqiang Ye,Wensheng Gan,Jiahui Chen cs.DB,cs.AI

authors_text: Ahammed Ullah
title: Computing Clique Cover with Structural Parameterization
title_zh: 使用结构参数化计算派覆盖
abstract: An abundance of real-world problems manifest as covering edges and/or vertices of a graph with cliques that are optimized for some objectives. We consider different structural parameters of graph, and design fixed-parameter tractable algorithms for a number of clique cover problems. Using a set representation of graph, we introduce a framework for computing clique cover with different objectives. We demonstrate use of the framework for a variety of clique cover problems. Our results include a number of new algorithms with exponential to double exponential improvements in the running time.
summary: An abundance of real-world problems manifest as covering edges and/or vertices of a graph with cliques that are optimized for some objectives. We consider different structural parameters of graph, and design fixed-parameter tractable algorithms for a number of clique cover problems. Using a set representation of graph, we introduce a framework for computing clique cover with different objectives. We demonstrate use of the framework for a variety of clique cover problems. Our results include a number of new algorithms with exponential to double exponential improvements in the running time.
abstract_zh: 大量的现实世界问题表现为用针对某些目标优化的派系覆盖图的边缘和/或顶点。我们考虑了图的不同结构参数，并为许多团覆盖问题设计了固定参数的易处理算法。使用图的集合表示，我们引入了一个用于计算具有不同目标的派系覆盖的框架。我们演示了如何使用该框架来解决各种派系覆盖问题。我们的结果包括许多新算法，运行时间呈指数至双指数改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用结构参数化方法设计固定参数可解算法，解决多种团覆盖问题，并通过集合表示法构建通用框架以优化不同目标下的团覆盖计算。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中存在大量需要优化团覆盖的问题，传统方法效率不足，需基于图结构参数设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: 采用集合表示法构建通用框架，结合结构参数化技术，设计适用于不同团覆盖问题的固定参数可解算法。
AI.result: 提出多项新算法，在运行时间上实现指数级至双指数级的改进，并验证了框架在多种团覆盖问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构参数化与集合框架的结合，显著提升了团覆盖问题的求解效率，为相关应用提供了新的理论支持与算法工具。

authors_text: Hongyan Gu,Mohammad Haeri,Shuo Ni,Christopher Kazu Williams,Neda Zarrin-Khameh,Shino Magaki,Xiang 'Anthony' Chen
title: Detecting Mitoses with a Convolutional Neural Network for MIDOG 2022 Challenge
title_zh: MIDOG 2022 挑战赛中使用卷积神经网络检测有丝分裂
abstract: This work presents a mitosis detection method with only one vanilla Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Our method consists of two steps: given an image, we first apply a CNN using a sliding window technique to extract patches that have mitoses; we then calculate each extracted patch's class activation map to obtain the mitosis's precise location. To increase the model performance on high-domain-variance pathology images, we train the CNN with a data augmentation pipeline, a noise-tolerant loss that copes with unlabeled images, and a multi-rounded active learning strategy. In the MIDOG 2022 challenge, our approach, with an EfficientNet-b3 CNN model, achieved an overall F1 score of 0.7323 in the preliminary test phase, and 0.6847 in the final test phase (task 1). Our approach sheds light on the broader applicability of class activation maps for object detections in pathology images.
summary: This work presents a mitosis detection method with only one vanilla Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Our method consists of two steps: given an image, we first apply a CNN using a sliding window technique to extract patches that have mitoses; we then calculate each extracted patch's class activation map to obtain the mitosis's precise location. To increase the model performance on high-domain-variance pathology images, we train the CNN with a data augmentation pipeline, a noise-tolerant loss that copes with unlabeled images, and a multi-rounded active learning strategy. In the MIDOG 2022 challenge, our approach, with an EfficientNet-b3 CNN model, achieved an overall F1 score of 0.7323 in the preliminary test phase, and 0.6847 in the final test phase (task 1). Our approach sheds light on the broader applicability of class activation maps for object detections in pathology images.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种仅使用一个普通卷积神经网络（CNN）的有丝分裂检测方法。我们的方法由两个步骤组成：给定图像，我们首先使用滑动窗口技术应用 CNN 来提取有丝分裂的斑块；然后我们计算每个提取的补丁的类激活图以获得有丝分裂的精确位置。为了提高高域方差病理图像上的模型性能，我们使用数据增强管道、处理未标记图像的耐噪损失以及多轮主动学习策略来训练 CNN。在 MIDOG 2022 挑战中，我们的方法采用 EfficientNet-b3 CNN 模型，在初步测试阶段获得了 0.7323 的总体 F1 分数，在最终测试阶段（任务 1）获得了 0.6847 的总体 F1 分数。我们的方法揭示了类激活图在病理图像中对象检测的更广泛适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于单个卷积神经网络（CNN）的有丝分裂检测方法，用于MIDOG 2022挑战赛。
AI.motivation: 为了解决病理图像中有丝分裂检测的挑战，提出一种更高效且鲁棒的检测方法，以应对图像域方差大的问题。
AI.method: 采用两步法：首先使用滑动窗口CNN提取含有的图像块，再通过类别激活图精确定位；结合数据增强、噪声容忍损失函数和多轮主动学习策略提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在MIDOG 2022挑战赛中，使用EfficientNet-b3模型，预赛F1得分为0.7323，决赛为0.6847（任务1）。
AI.conclusion: 展示了类别激活图在病理图像中有丝分裂检测中的有效性和广泛适用性。
